☣️ Quarantine Zone: The Last Check

Stand at the final barrier between order and collapse in Quarantine Zone: The Last Check, a tense survival thriller where every decision can mean life—or outbreak. As the officer assigned to humanity’s last operational checkpoint, you must inspect survivors, detect infection, and determine who is allowed to pass into the safe zone.

One mistake could doom everyone behind you.

🛂 Inspect. Decide. Survive.

Examine documents, scan for symptoms, question suspicious behavior, and look for subtle signs of infection. Some travelers are desperate. Some are hiding something. Others may not even know they’re infected.

Your job isn’t to save everyone—it’s to prevent catastrophe.

🧠 Moral Dilemmas Under Pressure

Supplies are limited. Panic is spreading. Families beg to stay together. Smugglers attempt to slip through. As pressure mounts from superiors and civilians alike, you’ll face impossible choices between compassion and protocol.

Are you a protector… or a gatekeeper of death?

🌑 A World on the Brink

Set in a bleak, outbreak-ravaged region, the game builds tension through atmosphere, sound design, and escalating stakes. Each shift introduces new rules, mutations, and unexpected events that challenge your judgment and adaptability.

The threat evolves. So must you.

🔁 Consequences That Carry Forward

Your decisions influence infection spread, resource stability, and the fate of the quarantine zone. Multiple endings reflect how well you managed risk, upheld policy, or gave in to emotion.

mac_games.title: Biomutant
mac_games.description:
🐾 Biomutant

Enter a vibrant, post-apocalyptic world where nature has reclaimed civilization and evolution is your greatest weapon. Biomutant is an open-world action RPG that blends martial arts combat, mutant abilities, and a branching narrative shaped by your choices. As a customizable, genetically altered warrior, you’ll determine the fate of a dying world torn apart by rival tribes and a looming ecological catastrophe.

The Tree of Life is withering. The balance of nature hangs in your hands.

🌍 A Living, Breathing Open World

Explore lush forests, toxic wastelands, frozen tundras, and crumbling city ruins—all seamlessly connected in a colorful yet decaying landscape. Traverse on foot, by mech, jet-ski, airship, or unusual mounts as you uncover hidden bunkers, ancient relics, and long-forgotten technologies.

Every corner of the world tells a story of collapse—and rebirth.

🥋 Martial Arts Meets Mutation

Engage in fast-paced combat that combines melee weapons, firearms, and supernatural mutant powers. Customize your fighting style with a flexible combat system that encourages fluid movement, combo chaining, and creative ability use.

Bio-genetic mutations and cybernetic enhancements grant unique skills—from telekinetic bursts to elemental attacks—letting you craft a playstyle that’s entirely your own.

⚖️ Choice-Driven Narrative

Align with different tribes, unite them, or conquer them. Moral decisions influence how the world evolves, how characters respond to you, and which ending unfolds. Your aura—light or dark—affects dialogue options and available powers.

Will you heal the world… or let it fall?

🔧 Deep Customization

Create your own mutant hero from the ground up. Adjust genetic attributes, craft weapons from scavenged parts, upgrade gear, and modify resistances to survive extreme environments.

In Biomutant, evolution isn’t automatic—it’s intentional.

🌱 A World on the Brink

Face massive Worldeaters threatening the Tree of Life and uncover the mystery of the old world’s downfall. Blending whimsy with philosophical undertones about balance, industry, and consequence, the journey is both action-packed and reflective.

Adapt. Evolve. Decide the future.

mac_games.title: INDIKA
mac_games.description:
✝️ INDIKA

Step into a strange and unsettling journey where faith collides with doubt in INDIKA, a narrative-driven adventure set in an alternate 19th-century Russia. Blending dark humor, psychological tension, and surreal storytelling, the game follows a young nun grappling with her beliefs—and an unexpected companion who may be the devil himself.

In a world where religion shapes every rule and expectation, Indika’s inner conflict becomes as dangerous as the harsh landscapes she must cross.

🌨️ A Haunting, Alternate Russia

Traverse bleak monasteries, snow-covered villages, and industrial wastelands rendered with striking realism and subtle surrealism. The environment reflects Indika’s mental and spiritual state, shifting between grounded historical detail and dreamlike distortion.

Reality feels fragile. Faith feels uncertain.

🧠 Psychological & Philosophical Narrative

INDIKA explores themes of guilt, free will, morality, and institutional control. Through conversations, environmental storytelling, and introspective moments, players guide Indika as she questions the foundations of her devotion.

Is her unseen companion temptation, truth—or madness?

🧩 Puzzles with Purpose

Solve environmental puzzles that blend practical problem-solving with symbolic meaning. Gameplay shifts between grounded exploration and unexpected retro-inspired sequences that challenge both perception and perspective.

Every obstacle reflects a deeper internal struggle.

🎭 A Story of Identity and Doubt

At its core, INDIKA is about confronting belief systems and personal identity. As Indika journeys beyond the monastery walls, she must decide what faith truly means to her—and whether salvation lies in obedience or self-discovery.

mac_games.title: The Hong Kong Massacre
mac_games.description:
🔫 The Hong Kong Massacre

Step into a neon-soaked underworld of vengeance and bullets in The Hong Kong Massacre, a stylish, hard-hitting action shooter inspired by classic action cinema. 🔥 Brutal, Fast-Paced Combat

mac_games.title: Final Fantasy VII Remake

In the dark metropolis of Midgar, where power is bought with mako and freedom is a fading dream, a mercenary named Cloud Strife is drawn into a conflict far greater than himself—one that will challenge everything he thought he knew about loyalty, identity, and destiny.

Combat Evolved: Strategy Meets Style:

Time slows when issuing commands, giving you the thrill of real-time combat with the depth of tactical decision-making. Every enemy is a puzzle—every victory, hard-earned.

A World of Steel, Shadows, and Sky:
Midgar is more than a setting—it’s a suffocating, industrial labyrinth of slums and skyscrapers, where every alley tells a story and every reactor hums with stolen life. The haunting beauty of its decaying grandeur is rendered in exquisite detail for PlayStation 5, enhanced with improved textures, lighting, and faster load times. Accompanied by Nobuo Uematsu’s reorchestrated score, the world pulses with tension, sorrow, and rebellion.

A Glimpse Beyond the Smoke: INTERmission—Yuffie’s Tale:
Exclusive to Intergrade, Episode INTERmission follows Yuffie Kisaragi, a ninja from Wutai on a covert mission into enemy territory. Her chapter adds new layers to the narrative, introducing fresh combat mechanics and deepening the intrigue around the future of this fractured timeline. It’s a bold new piece of the puzzle—one that hints at the storm to come.

mac_games.description:
🧽 SpongeBob SquarePants: Titans of the Tide — A Nautical Battle Beneath the Waves

Dive into an all-new Bikini Bottom adventure where the ocean itself is in danger! SpongeBob SquarePants: Titans of the Tide blends fast-paced action, humor, and heroic chaos as familiar faces rise up to defend the seas from colossal threats.

🌊 When the Ocean Fights Back
Mysterious tidal forces have awakened massive sea titans, throwing Bikini Bottom into turmoil. From towering crustacean behemoths to ancient deep-sea creatures, the ocean is more dangerous than ever—and only unlikely heroes can stop it.

⭐ Play as Iconic Characters
Step into the porous shoes of SpongeBob, Patrick, Sandy, and more—each with unique abilities, combos, and over-the-top special moves. Swap characters to solve puzzles, dominate enemies, and unleash cartoon-powered mayhem.

⚔️ Action-Packed Combat & Spectacle
Battle waves of enemies and face screen-filling titans in dynamic encounters that mix platforming, brawling, and outrageous animations. Every fight is packed with humor, slapstick, and satisfying impacts.

🏝️ Explore a Living Bikini Bottom
Journey through colorful, reimagined locations—from Jellyfish Fields to the depths of the ocean floor. Discover secrets, side missions, and character-driven moments that celebrate the heart of the SpongeBob universe.

😂 Classic Humor, Epic Scale
Packed with jokes, familiar voices, and absurd scenarios, Titans of the Tide delivers the charm of the show with the scale of a heroic adventure.

✨ The Sea Needs a Sponge
When titans rise and tides turn, it’s up to SpongeBob and friends to save Bikini Bottom—one laugh, one battle, and one bubble-blowing hero at a time.

mac_games.title: PowerWash Simulator 2
mac_games.description:
🧼 PowerWash Simulator 2 — Clean, Restore, Satisfy
PowerWash Simulator 2 invites you back into a world where dirt is the enemy and satisfaction comes one spray at a time. Bigger, better, and more immersive than ever, this sequel transforms the simple joy of cleaning into a deeply relaxing and rewarding experience.

💦 Evolved Power-Washing Perfection
Feel every blast of water as you strip away layers of grime with improved physics, more responsive controls, and expanded washer tools. From stubborn stains to delicate surfaces, precision and technique matter more than ever.

🏙️ Larger, More Detailed Locations
Clean sprawling environments packed with detail—vehicles, buildings, public spaces, and bizarre new jobs that tell their own visual stories. Each location is designed to reward patience, curiosity, and a keen eye for dirt hiding in plain sight.

🛠️ Deeper Progression & Customization
Upgrade your washers, unlock specialized nozzles, manage resources, and personalize your loadout. Progression feels meaningful as tougher jobs demand smarter tool choices and careful water management.

🧠 Relaxing Yet Engaging Gameplay
No timers. No pressure. Just you, the dirt, and the soothing rhythm of restoration. Whether you want a calm, meditative experience or a methodical cleaning challenge, the game adapts to your pace.

🤝 Enhanced Co-Op Cleaning
Team up with friends and tackle massive jobs together. Coordinate, divide tasks, or simply spray side by side as chaos turns into cleanliness.

✨ Turn Mess into Mastery
PowerWash Simulator 2 proves that even the dirtiest jobs can be deeply satisfying. Wash away the stress, restore the world, and enjoy the simple joy of seeing everything spotless again.

mac_games.title: Pacific Drive
mac_games.description:
🚗 Pacific Drive — Survive the Zone One Mile at a Time

Pacific Drive is a first-person survival driving game set in the eerie and unpredictable Pacific Northwest, where a mysterious exclusion zone warps reality itself. Your car is your lifeline—your shelter, your weapon, and your only companion—as you venture deeper into a world shaped by strange phenomena and forgotten experiments.

🌲 A Beautifully Unsettling World
Explore rain-soaked forests, abandoned highways, and crumbling research sites trapped inside the Olympic Exclusion Zone. The environment is alive with supernatural anomalies, sudden storms, and shifting terrain that make every journey dangerous and unforgettable.

🔧 Your Car Is Your Home
Maintain, repair, and upgrade your station wagon to survive the Zone’s hazards. Customize parts, install experimental tech, and scavenge resources to keep your vehicle running. Damage isn’t cosmetic—neglecting your car can strand you in places you may never escape.

⚠️ Unpredictable Survival Challenges
Anomalies distort physics, drain power, and tear apart machinery. You’ll need to read the road, manage resources, and adapt on the fly as the Zone reacts to your presence. Every run is different, shaped by procedural events and emergent danger.

📻 A Haunting, Story-Driven Mystery
Uncover the secrets behind the Exclusion Zone through environmental storytelling, radio broadcasts, and lost research. The narrative unfolds gradually, rewarding curiosity and perseverance rather than combat.

🌧️ No Guns. No Glory. Just Endurance.
Pacific Drive is about tension, atmosphere, and survival through preparation and ingenuity. It’s a slow-burn journey where escape isn’t guaranteed—and the road itself may be your greatest enemy.

mac_games.title: Escape from Duckov
mac_games.description:
🪖 Escape from Tarkov — Survive the Ultimate Modern Warzone

Escape from Tarkov is a hardcore, realism-driven FPS/RPG hybrid that drops you into a fictional Russian city torn apart by political collapse, private military conflict, and lawlessness. This is not a casual shooter—every raid is a high-stakes struggle for survival where knowledge, preparation, and nerve mean the difference between profit and permanent loss.

🔫 Brutal, High-Risk Combat
Gunfights are fast, lethal, and unforgiving. Realistic ballistics, armor penetration, weapon recoil, and ammunition types matter immensely. A single well-placed shot can end a raid instantly—yours or your enemy’s. There are no hit markers, no minimap, and no second chances.

🎒 Lose Everything, Gain Everything
Death means losing all gear you brought into the raid. Victory means extracting with valuable loot, weapons, and resources. Every decision—when to fight, when to hide, when to escape—carries real consequences that create unmatched tension and adrenaline.

🏙️ A Living, Hostile City
Tarkov’s environments are dense, atmospheric, and grounded in modern realism. Abandoned malls, factories, streets, and military installations tell stories through environmental detail. AI-controlled Scavs, elite bosses, and unpredictable players ensure no two raids are ever the same.

📈 Deep Progression & Customization
Build and modify weapons down to individual components, manage your stash, upgrade your hideout, trade with factions, and develop your PMC’s skills through action and survival. Progression is slow, deliberate, and deeply rewarding.

🧠 Knowledge Is Your Greatest Weapon
Map awareness, sound cues, ammo choice, medical treatment, and extraction planning are just as important as aim. Mastering Tarkov means learning systems, adapting under pressure, and surviving chaos—not chasing kill counts.

☢️ No Hand-Holding. No Mercy.
Escape from Tarkov offers a punishing, immersive experience that respects player intelligence and demands resilience. It’s a game about tension, loss, and triumph—where survival itself is the ultimate victory.

mac_games.title: Kingdom Come: Deliverance
mac_games.description:
🛡️ Kingdom Come: Deliverance — Live and Breathe the Middle Ages

Kingdom Come: Deliverance is a deep, story-driven open-world RPG that places you in the heart of 15th-century Bohemia during a time of war, political turmoil, and social upheaval. Unlike traditional fantasy RPGs, this is a grounded and realistic experience where skill, knowledge, and preparation matter just as much as bravery.

⚔️ Challenging, Skill-Based Combat
Every fight is dangerous. Combat emphasizes realistic swordplay, stamina management, positioning, and timing. You must learn techniques, train with masters, maintain your weapons and armor, and choose your battles wisely—reckless fighting often leads to death.

🏰 A Historically Authentic World
The game world is meticulously recreated using real locations, architecture, and historical research. Townsfolk follow daily routines, laws must be respected, and social status affects how NPCs react to you. Theft, crime, and reputation have lasting consequences.

📜 A Mature, Story-Driven Narrative
You play as Henry, a blacksmith’s son whose life is shattered by war. His journey is one of survival, loyalty, and growth, shaped by meaningful choices and realistic dialogue. There are multiple ways to solve quests through diplomacy, stealth, or force.

🛠️ Deep Role-Playing & Survival Systems
Eat, sleep, heal wounds, manage skills, learn to read, brew potions, and train professions. Progression feels earned, reinforcing the sense that you are truly living in the medieval world.

🌲 Freedom Without Fantasy
No magic, no monsters—only steel, strategy, and human ambition. Kingdom Come: Deliverance offers a slow-burning, immersive RPG experience that rewards patience, curiosity, and respect for history.

✨ History Is Your Battlefield

mac_games.title: Mount & Blade II: Bannerlord (TX_Engine)
mac_games.description:
✨⚔️ Mount & Blade II: Bannerlord — Forge Your Destiny

The horns of war echo across Calradia. Mount & Blade II: Bannerlord is a grand medieval sandbox where strategy, skill, and ambition collide. Build your legacy in a living world shaped by battles, politics, and player choice.

🏰 A Living, Breathing Medieval World
Calradia is alive with warring kingdoms, shifting alliances, and dynamic economies. Cities prosper or fall, lords rise and perish, and every campaign unfolds differently based on your actions.

⚔️ Massive Real-Time Battles
Lead hundreds of soldiers into visceral, skill-based combat. Fight on horseback or on foot, command troops in real time, and experience large-scale battles where tactics and positioning decide victory.

👑 From Mercenary to Monarch
Start as a lone adventurer and rise through the ranks. Serve a kingdom, build armies, manage settlements, marry into noble houses, or carve out your own empire.

🧠 Deep Strategy & Management
Recruit and train troops, manage fiefs, influence politics, trade goods, and make decisions that impact the balance of power across the realm.

🛡️ Customize Your Warrior
Craft weapons, choose perks, and develop your character’s skills to suit your playstyle—whether you’re a battlefield commander, master trader, or cunning diplomat.

🌍 Endless Replayability
No two campaigns are the same. Dynamic events, emergent storytelling, and extensive mod support ensure countless hours of unique adventures.

✨ Rule the Battlefield. Shape the Realm.
Mount & Blade II: Bannerlord is the ultimate medieval sandbox—where every swing of the sword and every choice you make forges history.

mac_games.title: ROUTINE
mac_games.description:
✨🌑 ROUTINE — Fear in the Silence of Space

Step into an abandoned future where something has gone terribly wrong. ROUTINE is a tense sci-fi horror experience set on a retro-futuristic lunar base, where isolation, atmosphere, and uncertainty are your greatest enemies.

🚀 A Retro Vision of the Future
Explore a moon base inspired by 1970s visions of space travel—chunky tech, flickering lights, and analog machines. Every corridor feels authentic, eerie, and unsettling, blending nostalgia with dread.

👁️ Pure Atmospheric Horror
ROUTINE relies on tension, sound design, and environment rather than constant action. Long stretches of silence make every noise matter, keeping you on edge as you navigate the unknown.

🧭 Explore, Survive, Uncover the Truth
Search dark hallways, locked rooms, and forgotten facilities to piece together what happened. There are no easy answers—only clues, fragments of story, and the creeping feeling that you’re not alone.

🤖 Unpredictable Threats
When danger appears, it’s sudden and terrifying. Enemies are rare but deadly, forcing you to stay alert, plan your movements, and respect every encounter.

🎵 Haunting Soundscape
A minimalist, unsettling soundtrack and environmental audio heighten the fear. The hum of machinery, distant echoes, and abrupt alarms make silence just as frightening as sound.

🌕 Slow-Burn Sci-Fi Horror Done Right
ROUTINE rewards patience and curiosity, delivering a chilling experience that builds dread over time rather than overwhelming you with action.

✨ Isolation. Mystery. Survival.
ROUTINE is a love letter to classic sci-fi horror—quiet, intense, and unforgettable.

🌌 The Moon Is Silent. You Should Be Too.

mac_games.title: Once Upon A KATAMARI
mac_games.description:
✨🌍 Once Upon A KATAMARI — Roll Into a Storybook World

The Prince returns in a whimsical new adventure where every roll tells a tale. Once Upon A KATAMARI brings the series’ signature charm into a playful storybook setting, blending quirky humor, imaginative worlds, and the endlessly satisfying joy of rolling everything in sight.

📖 A Fairy-Tale Twist on the Katamari World
Journey through vibrant, storybook-inspired stages filled with colorful environments and charming details. Each level feels like a page from a living picture book, packed with surprises, personality, and delightful chaos.

🌱 Simple, Addictive Gameplay
Roll your katamari, collect objects big and small, and watch your ball grow from tiny trinkets into massive, world-consuming spheres. Easy to pick up and endlessly fun, the core gameplay is as satisfying as ever.

🎯 Creative Objectives & Challenges
Tackle a variety of playful goals, time limits, and special conditions that keep each stage feeling fresh. Master control, plan your route, and roll efficiently to reach King-sized success.

🎶 Quirky Music & Signature Humor
Enjoy an upbeat, eclectic soundtrack paired with the King of All Cosmos’ iconic humor. The game doesn’t take itself seriously—and that’s exactly the point.

👑 Classic Katamari Charm, Reimagined
Beloved characters, absurd dialogue, and joyful chaos return, wrapped in a new narrative style that celebrates creativity and fun.

✨ A Delightfully Weird Adventure for Everyone
Whether you’re a longtime fan or new to the series, Once Upon A KATAMARI delivers a lighthearted, stress-free experience full of charm and imagination.

🌟 Roll the World. Tell the Story.
Once Upon A KATAMARI is a playful celebration of creativity, whimsy, and the simple joy of making everything stick.

mac_games.title: Voidtrain
mac_games.description:
🚆🌌 Voidtrain — Ride the Rails Through the Unknown

Board a living, customizable train and journey through a mysterious interdimensional void where danger, discovery, and survival go hand in hand. Voidtrain blends survival, crafting, exploration, and co-op gameplay into a strange and unforgettable adventure.

🌠 A World Between Worlds
Travel through a surreal void filled with floating islands, strange creatures, abandoned ruins, and shifting realities. Every stop along the rails hides new resources, secrets, and threats waiting to be uncovered.

🚆 Your Train Is Your Lifeline
Build, expand, and upgrade your train as you move forward. Add new cars, improve defenses, install crafting stations, and turn your train into a rolling fortress and home base that grows with you.

🛠️ Survival, Crafting & Exploration
Gather resources from dangerous environments, craft tools and weapons, and manage supplies carefully. Survival means adapting to the unknown and making smart decisions with limited resources.

⚔️ Combat Against the Void
Face off against hostile creatures, anomalies, and enemies that lurk in the darkness. Use crafted weapons, positioning, and teamwork to stay alive as threats become more dangerous the farther you travel.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Co-Op for Shared Survival
Play solo or team up with friends in cooperative multiplayer. Work together to explore, fight, and build—every role matters when survival depends on coordination.

🎨 Atmospheric Visuals & Mystery
Voidtrain’s eerie art style, haunting environments, and sense of constant discovery create a strong atmosphere of mystery and tension throughout the journey.

✨ An Ever-Changing Adventure
With procedural elements, upgrades, and discoveries along the way, no two journeys are exactly alike.

🌌 Build the Train. Survive the Void. Keep Moving Forward.
Voidtrain delivers a unique survival experience where curiosity, creativity, and teamwork are the keys to escaping the unknown.

mac_games.title: Octopath Traveler II (2023)
mac_games.description:
✨📜 Octopath Traveler II — Eight New Journeys, A Greater Adventure

Return to the HD-2D world of Solistia, where eight new travelers set out on deeply personal quests across land and sea. Octopath Traveler II expands on everything fans loved from the original—richer stories, deeper gameplay, and a world that feels more alive than ever.

🌍 A Vast, Living World
Explore a diverse continent split between eastern and western regions, connected by bustling cities, quiet villages, open oceans, and dangerous frontiers. Day and night cycles change the world around you, affecting NPC behavior, events, and exploration.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Eight Travelers, Eight New Stories
Meet a brand-new cast of heroes, each with unique motivations and emotional storylines. Begin with any traveler, recruit the others freely, and experience their individual tales as they unfold and intersect.

⚔️ Refined Turn-Based Combat
The strategic Break & Boost battle system returns, now deeper and more flexible. Exploit enemy weaknesses, manage resources carefully, and unleash powerful abilities at just the right moment to turn the tide of battle.

🧠 Expanded Path Actions
Every character can interact with the world in multiple ways depending on the time of day—challenge, steal, guide, inquire, purchase, or recruit. These actions open new routes, secrets, and story opportunities.

🛠️ Greater Customization & Systems
New mechanics like Latent Powers, enhanced jobs, and expanded skills allow for more strategic freedom and party experimentation than ever before.

🎵 A Powerful, Emotional Soundtrack
A sweeping orchestral score elevates every scene—from quiet character moments to epic boss battles—perfectly capturing the tone and emotion of each journey.

✨ A Bold Evolution of a Modern Classic
Octopath Traveler II builds upon the foundation of its predecessor with deeper storytelling, improved systems, and a more dynamic world, while staying true to the charm of classic JRPGs.

🌟 Eight Paths. One World. A New Legend Begins.

mac_games.title: OCTOPATH TRAVELER
mac_games.description:
✨📜 Octopath Traveler — Eight Stories, One Epic Journey
Step into a beautifully crafted fantasy world where classic RPG storytelling meets modern design. Octopath Traveler delivers a rich, emotional adventure told through eight unique heroes, each walking their own path—and shaping a greater journey together.

🌍 A Living World Brought to Life
Explore the vast land of Orsterra, a world filled with bustling towns, quiet villages, ancient ruins, and dangerous wilds. Presented in the stunning HD-2D art style, the game blends pixel-art characters with detailed 3D environments, dynamic lighting, and a nostalgic yet fresh visual charm.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Eight Travelers, Eight Destinies
Choose from eight distinct protagonists, each with their own backstory, motivations, and personal struggles—such as a noble knight, a clever merchant, a wandering scholar, or a vengeful thief. You decide where to begin and how their stories unfold.

🗺️ Freedom to Travel Your Own Way
There’s no single path to follow. Recruit characters in any order, explore towns at your own pace, and uncover side stories and secrets scattered across the world. Every journey feels personal, shaped by your choices.

⚔️ Strategic Turn-Based Combat
Battle enemies using a refined turn-based system that rewards smart thinking. Exploit enemy weaknesses, break their defenses, and unleash powerful abilities at the perfect moment. Strategy matters, and every fight feels satisfying.

🧠 Unique Path Actions
Each character can interact with the world in their own way—duel townsfolk, steal items, gather information, guide NPCs, or trade for rare gear. These abilities open new routes, stories, and opportunities, making exploration deeply rewarding.

🎵 A Soundtrack Full of Emotion
The orchestral score enhances every moment, from peaceful town themes to intense boss battles. The music perfectly complements the emotional weight and beauty of each character’s story.

🔁 Deep Progression & Replay Value
Customize your party with jobs, skills, equipment, and strategies. With multiple characters, branching stories, and countless combinations, the game invites experimentation and replaying.

✨ A Modern Love Letter to Classic RPGs
Octopath Traveler captures the heart of traditional role-playing games while adding fresh ideas, stunning visuals, and meaningful storytelling. It’s thoughtful, adventurous, and unforgettable.

🌟 Eight Paths. One World. Your Story.
Whether you’re chasing justice, knowledge, redemption, or hope, Octopath Traveler invites you to walk a journey that’s as beautiful as it is profound.

mac_games.title: Lego Marvel Super Heroes
mac_games.description:
🧱✨ LEGO Marvel Super Heroes — Build the Ultimate Superhero Adventure

Jump into a lighthearted, action-packed journey where the Marvel Universe gets the classic LEGO twist. LEGO Marvel Super Heroes brings together iconic heroes, hilarious storytelling, and creative gameplay in an adventure that’s fun, fast, and full of super-powered charm.

🌍 A LEGO Marvel World Like No Other
Explore a colorful, brick-built Marvel universe packed with famous locations like New York City, Stark Tower, and more. From city streets to cosmic chaos, every environment is designed to be explored, smashed, and rebuilt—LEGO-style.

🦸 Play as Your Favorite Marvel Heroes
Assemble an enormous roster of Marvel characters including Iron Man, Spider-Man, Hulk, Captain America, Thor, and dozens more. Each hero has unique abilities—fly, smash, swing, shrink, or blast your way through enemies and puzzles.

💥 Action-Packed, Family-Friendly Combat
Battle classic Marvel villains in fast-paced combat that’s easy to learn and fun for everyone. Defeat enemies, break everything in sight, and collect LEGO studs as you fight to save the world—no super-serious tone, just pure fun.

🧠 Creative Puzzles & Super Abilities
Progress isn’t just about fighting. Use character abilities to solve clever puzzles, unlock secrets, and reach new areas. Switching heroes and experimenting with powers is key to uncovering everything the game has to offer.

👫 Drop-In, Drop-Out Co-Op Fun
Play solo or team up with a friend in local co-op. Work together to solve puzzles, defeat enemies, and cause double the LEGO chaos. It’s perfect for playing together on the couch.

😂 Classic LEGO Humor & Marvel Charm
LEGO Marvel Super Heroes is packed with jokes, visual gags, and playful takes on Marvel lore. The story doesn’t take itself too seriously, making it fun for longtime Marvel fans and newcomers alike.

🔓 Endless Collecting & Replayability
Unlock new characters, vehicles, and extras as you replay levels in Free Play mode. With secrets hidden everywhere, there’s always something new to discover.

✨ A Superhero Adventure Built for Everyone
LEGO Marvel Super Heroes blends action, exploration, humor, and creativity into an experience that’s welcoming, exciting, and endlessly entertaining.

🧱 Build. Smash. Save the World.
Whether you’re swinging through the city or smashing villains into LEGO bricks, LEGO Marvel Super Heroes delivers a heroic adventure that’s bursting with fun, imagination, and Marvel magic.

mac_games.title: Battlefield V
mac_games.description:
🔥 Battlefield V — War on a Human Scale

Step onto the front lines of the most devastating conflict in history with Battlefield V, a bold and immersive return to World War II. This isn’t just about massive battles and powerful weapons—it’s about the people, the chaos, and the untold stories that defined the war.

🌍 World War II Like You’ve Never Seen It
Battlefield V takes you across iconic and lesser-known theaters of WWII, from frozen Nordic battlefields to sun-scorched deserts and war-torn European cities. The game shines a light on overlooked battles and perspectives, showing the human cost of a global war.

⚔️ All-Out Multiplayer Warfare
At its core, Battlefield V delivers large-scale, combined-arms combat. Infantry, tanks, aircraft, and destructible environments collide in matches that feel dynamic and unpredictable. Every battle evolves based on player choices, teamwork, and the battlefield itself.

🎯 Gunplay That Rewards Skill
Movement and shooting feel tight, responsive, and grounded. Recoil, positioning, and awareness matter. Whether you’re clearing objectives with your squad or holding the line alone, victory depends on smart play—not luck.

🪖 Squad-Based Teamwork
You’re strongest together. Battlefield V emphasizes squad cooperation with shared resources, revives, and tactical roles. Working with your squad can turn the tide of battle, making teamwork as important as aim.

💣 Dynamic Destruction & Fortifications
The battlefield is never static. Buildings crumble, cover disappears, and terrain changes as the fight rages on. Use fortifications to rebuild defenses, create cover, and adapt to the ever-shifting chaos of war.

📖 War Stories: Personal Tales of Courage
Beyond multiplayer, Battlefield V features War Stories—short, narrative-driven experiences that focus on individual soldiers and their struggles. These stories highlight bravery, sacrifice, and survival from perspectives rarely shown in WWII games.

🎼 Immersive Audio & Atmosphere
Explosions thunder, bullets crack overhead, and engines roar with cinematic intensity. Combined with a powerful soundtrack, Battlefield V captures the fear, tension, and scale of warfare like few games can.

🔥 A War Fought by Ordinary People
Battlefield V isn’t just about heroes—it’s about soldiers pushed to their limits. It’s about holding the line, supporting your squad, and surviving moments where everything can fall apart in seconds.

💥 Fight Together. Survive Together.
With epic multiplayer battles, intense gunplay, and a focus on teamwork and immersion, Battlefield V delivers a World War II experience that feels personal, brutal, and unforgettable.

mac_games.title: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
mac_games.description:
🌌 Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order — Rise of a Jedi in a Broken Galaxy

Prepare to feel the Force in Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order, an epic, story-driven adventure that puts you in the boots of a surviving Jedi hunted by the Empire. This isn’t just a Star Wars game—it’s a cinematic journey of survival, growth, and hope in a galaxy plunged into darkness.

✨ A Galaxy Under Imperial Rule
Set after Revenge of the Sith, Fallen Order drops you into a time when the Jedi Order has been nearly wiped out. The Empire tightens its grip on the galaxy, and you must explore ancient worlds, crumbling temples, and dangerous cities—all while staying one step ahead of relentless Imperial forces.

⚔️ Skill-Based Lightsaber Combat
Combat is intense, tactical, and deeply satisfying. Every swing of your lightsaber matters. Master parries, dodges, and Force abilities to overcome stormtroopers, deadly creatures, and elite Inquisitors. Victory comes not from button-mashing, but from patience, precision, and growth as a Jedi.

🧑‍🚀 A New Jedi’s Journey
Play as Cal Kestis, a young Padawan who survived Order 66 and has been hiding his powers to stay alive. As his past catches up with him, Cal must reconnect with the Force, confront his trauma, and decide what it truly means to be a Jedi in a shattered era.

🤖 Companions with Heart
You’re never truly alone. Meet memorable allies like Cere, Greez, and the fan-favorite droid BD-1. From healing you in battle to unlocking secrets in the environment, BD-1 is more than a companion—it’s the emotional core of your journey.

🌍 Explore Iconic & Mysterious Worlds
Travel across richly detailed planets inspired by classic Star Wars locations and new alien worlds alike. Each environment is filled with secrets, shortcuts, and lore waiting to be uncovered, encouraging exploration and rewarding curiosity.

🧩 Puzzle-Focused Exploration
Use the Force to solve environmental puzzles, manipulate objects, and access hidden paths. Exploration feels thoughtful and immersive, blending platforming and brain-teasing challenges into every planet you visit.

🎼 Cinematic Star Wars Atmosphere
From John Williams–inspired musical themes to authentic sound design, Fallen Order captures the soul of Star Wars. Every lightsaber hum, TIE fighter scream, and Force-powered moment feels straight out of the movies.

🔥 A Story About Hope
At its heart, Jedi: Fallen Order is about rebuilding—faith, identity, and the Jedi legacy itself. You’re not just fighting the Empire; you’re fighting to keep hope alive in a galaxy that desperately needs it.

💫 Become What the Galaxy Needs
With gripping combat, emotional storytelling, and a deep connection to Star Wars lore, Jedi: Fallen Order delivers an unforgettable single-player adventure.

The Force is calling.
Will you answer?

mac_games.title: Hi-Fi Rush
mac_games.description:
🎶 Hi-Fi Rush: A Rhythmic Adventure Like No Other

Get ready to rock and roll in Hi-Fi Rush, where music isn't just a soundtrack—it's the heartbeat of everything! Step into a vibrant, rhythm-infused world where combat, movement, and story unfold to the beat of the music. This isn't just a game—it's a pulse-pounding, rhythm-based revolution!

🌟 A World Powered by Music
Hi-Fi Rush drops you into a colorful, high-energy universe where every beat dictates the flow of combat and exploration. From bustling cityscapes to surreal, music-filled environments, every level feels alive with sound, light, and rhythm. It's a world built on music's power, and you’re at the center of it.

🎵 Rhythm-Fueled Combat
Fight with style in a combat system where timing is everything. Every punch, kick, and combo syncs to the beat of the soundtrack. No button-mashing here—mastering the rhythm lets you unleash devastating moves, create harmonic chaos, and flow through battles with fluidity and finesse.

🕺 A Cast of Unforgettable Characters
Join Chai, a rebellious young man who finds himself turned into the unlikely hero after a botched experiment. Along with his quirky band of allies—each with their own groove—he’ll take on corporate corruption, giant robots, and more. Every character is designed with personality, humor, and flair that matches the game’s rhythm.

🎶 Music is the Core of Everything
In Hi-Fi Rush, the world’s atmosphere is built from music that pulses through every action. Dynamic soundtracks accompany every move, with licensed tracks and original compositions blending seamlessly to create a truly unique experience. Get into the groove as the rhythm drives not just your combat, but the very world around you.

⚡ A Colorful, Stylized Adventure
Explore a world drenched in color, creativity, and expression. Whether you’re navigating high-tech factories or traversing strange, abstract environments, the art style and animation flow as smoothly as the soundtrack. Every visual cue, character design, and level is designed with precision to match the musicality of the game.

🤖 Fighting for More than Just Survival
Your journey isn't just about defeating enemies—it’s about toppling a corrupt tech empire. With every battle, you uncover secrets, build alliances, and face off against mechanical foes in epic boss fights. But victory is sweetened by the harmony you create with your team, making each success feel like a melody.

🎮 Rhythm-Based Exploration
It's not just about combat. As you move through the world, the environment itself reacts to the rhythm. From jumping on beat-specific platforms to triggering hidden areas by syncing with the music, every moment feels like part of the soundtrack.

🔥 A Game That’s Alive with Energy
With every enemy you face, every boss fight you conquer, and every friendship you build, Hi-Fi Rush brings you into a world where rhythm is power, and style is the ultimate weapon. Dance your way to victory—and don't forget to keep in time with the beat.

💥 Unleash the Music, Unleash the Chaos
Hi-Fi Rush is a game where rhythm is everything—where the soundtrack, the action, and the world itself sync perfectly in a high-energy celebration of music, movement, and mayhem.

Ready to join the beat?

mac_games.title: Sons of the Forest
mac_games.description:
A completely new experience from the creators of "The Forest".

Sent to a remote island to search for a missing billionaire, you find yourself in a cannibal-infested hell. Craft, build, and fight for survival alone or with friends in this terrifying open-world survival simulator.



A survival simulator in the horror genre.

Experience complete freedom of action in this world. You decide what to do, where to go, and how best to survive. There are no NPCs giving you orders or giving you unwanted quests. You give the orders, you choose what happens next.



Fight demons.

Entering a world where no place is safe, battle a multitude of mutated creatures: some are almost human-like, while others are unlike anything you've ever seen. Armed with pistols, axes, stun guns, and other weapons, defend yourself and those you love.



Build and create.

Experience every interaction: break branches for a fire, use an axe to cut windows and floors. Build a small hut or a coastal fort—the choice is yours.



Changing seasons.

Catch fresh salmon straight from the streams in spring and summer. Preserve and store the meat for the cold winter months. You're not alone on this island, and when winter arrives and food and resources become scarce, you won't be the only one looking for sustenance.

mac_games.title: Battlefield™ 1
mac_games.description:
💥 Battlefield 1 throws you into a world where war reshaped everything—and survival depends on chaos, teamwork, and courage.

The Great War is raging across land, air, and sea. Empires collide, weapons evolve overnight, and every battlefield tells a human story. This is warfare at its most brutal, emotional, and transformative.

🌍 A World at War
From scorched deserts to frozen mountain passes, Battlefield 1 spans massive, dynamic battlefields inspired by real WWI fronts. Every location feels alive with danger, destruction, and constant movement—where the front line can shift in seconds.

🔥 All-Out Warfare
Battlefield 1 isn’t about lone heroes—it’s about total war. Infantry clashes, tanks roll through ruined towns, planes duel in the skies, and warships dominate the seas. Every vehicle and role matters, and victory is earned through coordination and adaptability.

⚙️ Combat That Evolves in Real Time
No plan survives first contact. Buildings crumble, terrain changes, and new threats emerge without warning. Destruction isn’t just visual—it reshapes how you fight, move, and survive on the battlefield.

🪖 Stories of Soldiers
Beyond large-scale multiplayer battles, Battlefield 1 delivers powerful war stories—short, focused narratives that show the conflict through the eyes of different soldiers. These are personal, grounded experiences that highlight sacrifice, fear, and resilience.

🎯 Teamwork Is the Ultimate Weapon
Classes are built to support one another. Medics save lives, supports keep weapons firing, scouts gather intelligence, and assaults break through defenses. Lone wolves fall—squads that work together change the course of battle.

🎧 An Atmosphere of Chaos and Intensity
Explosions echo across fields, bullets crack overhead, and distant horns signal incoming attacks. The soundscape captures the overwhelming scale of war, making every moment tense and unforgettable.

⚠️ War Without Glory
Battlefield 1 doesn’t romanticize conflict. It shows war as massive, relentless, and costly—where progress is paid for in sacrifice, and every victory leaves scars.

🔥 Fight Through History. Survive the Storm.
In Battlefield 1, war isn’t just a setting—it’s the force that shapes every decision, every moment, and every life on the battlefield.

mac_games.title: Is This Seat Taken?
mac_games.description:
Is This Seat Taken? is a logic puzzle game where you must accommodate characters with different, often conflicting, preferences. Find the perfect spot for each character to unlock new, cozy levels.



Window seat or aisle seat? Table or bar counter? Lone wolf or life of the party? Your goal in Is This Seat Taken? is to organize groups of characters based on their preferences. It's a cozy and relaxing puzzle game where you have to seat everyone in their right place.


Meet new characters at the cinema, on the bus, at a wedding, or in a taxi. A guest with a sensitive nose won't want to sit next to a perfumed stranger, and a sleepy passenger definitely doesn't want to listen to their neighbor's loud music. Learn the characters' needs and accommodate them accordingly!


Slava wants to become a movie star, and one day she sees her exact replica on the silver screen. Filled with inspiration, Slava decides to find her new idol. Embark on an exciting journey, visit new cities, and meet fascinating characters.

mac_games.title: Watch Dogs
mac_games.description:
🕶️ Watch Dogs pulls you into a city where information is power—and every secret is a weapon.
Chicago is alive, connected, and constantly watching. In this hyper-connected world, control doesn’t come from strength alone—it comes from knowing everything. One device, one system, one city at your fingertips.

📡 No Privacy. No Blind Spots. Total Access
Step into the role of a digital vigilante who bends the city’s infrastructure to their will. Traffic lights, security cameras, bank accounts—nothing is off-limits. Every street hides data, every person carries a story, and every system can be turned against itself.

⚙️ Power Through Technology
You don’t overpower the city—you outthink it. Hack networks, disrupt enemies, and manipulate environments in real time. The city reacts to your actions, forcing you to adapt, plan, and strike when the moment is right.

🌆 A Living City Under Constant Surveillance
Watch Dogs presents a city that never sleeps and never stops collecting data. Citizens move with routines, secrets, and vulnerabilities. The world feels real, reactive, and tense—where one hacked signal can change everything.

🎯 Choices That Shape Your Reputation
Your actions ripple outward. Help civilians, expose corruption, or pursue your own agenda. The city remembers what you do, and public perception shifts as your influence grows. You’re not just fighting enemies—you’re shaping how the city sees you.

🎧 A Cold, Electronic Atmosphere
Digital pulses, ambient city noise, and sharp audio cues reinforce the feeling of constant monitoring. Silence can be just as threatening as chaos, and every hacked signal feels deliberate and precise.

⚠️ A World Where Control Is the Ultimate Weapon
Watch Dogs explores a future where systems decide lives—and those who control the systems decide everything. It’s not about being a hero. It’s about taking control in a world built to control you.

🔥 Hack the City. Rewrite the Rules.
In Watch Dogs, the city is your battlefield—and information is the deadliest force of all.

mac_games.title: No Mercy
mac_games.description:
No Mercy drags you into a brutal, unforgiving underworld where violence is currency, power is seized—not given—and survival demands absolute dominance. This is a world stripped of mercy and morality, where every encounter pushes limits and every decision carries consequences written in blood.

🔪 No Rules. No Redemption. Only Control
Step into a ruthless world driven by desire, dominance, and raw instinct. In No Mercy, you don’t play the hero—you embrace power in its darkest form. Every interaction is charged, every choice deliberate, as you carve your path through a world that rewards those bold enough to take what they want.

🔥 A Dark Adult Power Fantasy
Designed for mature audiences, No Mercy explores taboo themes and unapologetic intensity. The game places you at the center of an explicit, provocative experience where control, manipulation, and corruption define the journey. Nothing is sanitized. Nothing is safe.

🩸 Choices That Shape a Twisted World
Your actions influence relationships, outcomes, and the balance of power around you. Characters remember how you treat them—whether with cruelty, dominance, or calculated restraint. Every decision deepens your descent into a world that bends to your will.

💋 Seduction, Violence, and Psychological Warfare
This isn’t just physical domination—it’s mental. Manipulate, intimidate, and exploit weaknesses as you assert control over a cast of characters drawn into your orbit. Power is multifaceted, and the strongest weapon is understanding how to wield it.

🌑 An Atmosphere Thick with Tension
Dark interiors, moody lighting, and oppressive environments reinforce the game’s suffocating tone. Every scene pulses with unease, desire, and danger, pulling you deeper into a world where morality erodes with every step forward.

🎧 Sound Design That Amplifies the Descent
Low, ominous tones and intimate soundscapes heighten every interaction. Silence becomes threatening, dialogue becomes a weapon, and every moment feels charged with intent.

⚠️ Unfiltered. Unapologetic. Unforgiving
No Mercy is not for everyone—and it was never meant to be. It challenges boundaries, embraces controversy, and delivers an experience that refuses to compromise or soften its vision.

🔥 Power Is Taken—Not Given
Removed, restricted, and whispered about, No Mercy exists as a stark reminder of what happens when a game refuses to play by the rules. This is a descent into dominance where mercy is weakness—and control is everything.

Enter only if you’re prepared.
In No Mercy, the world doesn’t judge you—but it will submit.

mac_games.title: Nioh
mac_games.description:
Nioh hurls you into a war-torn Japan drowning in darkness, where ancient spirits stir, demonic Yokai roam, and every clash of steel echoes through a land on the brink of collapse. From blood-soaked battlefields to sacred mountaintop shrines, every encounter demands precision, every duel tests your soul, and every victory feels hard-earned and heroic.

🗡️ Live and Die by the Sword
Become William, a relentless warrior guided by guardian spirits and haunted by a mysterious past. With samurai, ninja, and mystical powers at your fingertips, forge your path through a nation ravaged by supernatural corruption and civil war. Fate rests on your blade—and your mastery of it.

🇯🇵 Feudal Japan in All Its Ferocity and Beauty
Traverse war-scarred villages, shadowy forests, mist-laden temples, and fortresses torn apart by feuding clans. Ancient landscapes blend with the haunting presence of Yokai, turning every corner into a breathtaking, terrifying vision of myth and history intertwined.

⚔️ Combat That Strikes Like Lightning
Unleash beautifully brutal swordplay with katanas, dual blades, spears, axes, and kusarigamas. Master stance-based combat that rewards discipline and punishes hesitation. Dodge, parry, unleash Ki Pulses, and channel your guardian spirit to become a whirlwind of precision and carnage—every fight is a deadly dance where a single mistake spells doom.

🔥 The Yokai Are Relentless—So Are You
Face off against monstrous Oni, spectral warriors, twisted beasts, and cursed souls born of chaos. These ancient nightmares don’t just challenge your skills—they drive you to evolve, adapt, and sharpen your instincts with every battle.

💠 Build a Warrior Worthy of Legend
Collect powerful gear, craft deadly weapons, and tailor your abilities to forge a fighting style that’s uniquely yours. Enhance guardian spirits, unlock mystical techniques, and ascend from wandering swordsman to unstoppable demon hunter.

👺 A World Haunted by War and Myth
Meet cunning warlords, weary villagers, and spirits both benevolent and vengeful as you carve your path through a land split between the mortal and the supernatural. Human treachery and Yokai malice collide to form a world rich with danger, mystery, and ancient lore.

🎶 A Score Born of Battle and Spirit
Thunderous drums, mournful flutes, and thunderclap crescendos heighten every duel and descent into darkness. Each encounter feels like a moment carved into legend, carried by music that stirs both dread and determination.

🔥 Where Steel Meets Spirit, Legends Are Forged
Nioh delivers a razor-sharp blend of samurai intensity, Yokai terror, and myth-infused storytelling. This is more than a fight for survival—it’s a journey into the heart of Japan’s most turbulent era, where only the resolute, the disciplined, and the fearless can rise.

Brace yourself. In Nioh, death is the teacher—and mastery is the reward.

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed Syndicate
mac_games.description:
Assassin’s Creed Syndicate throws you headfirst into the smoke-choked streets of Industrial Revolution London—a city bursting with invention, injustice, and uprising. From the thundering factories of Lambeth to the glittering halls of Westminster, every alley hides a conspiracy, every rooftop invites rebellion, and every shadow belongs to an Assassin.

🗡️ Lead the Brotherhood Into a New Age
Step into the boots of Jacob and Evie Frye—twin Assassins with clashing styles but one purpose: to liberate London from the Templar-controlled empire of greed. Build your own gang, the Rooks, and rally the oppressed as you seize borough after borough. Your decisions and leadership reshape the very heartbeat of the city.

🏙️ Victorian London at Its Grittiest and Grandest
Scale iconic landmarks like Big Ben, Buckingham Palace, and the Tower of London as the city roars beneath you. Ride horse-drawn carriages through crowded streets, race atop speeding trains, and navigate maze-like rooftops using the revolutionary rope launcher. Every district tells a new story of struggle, ambition, and power.

⚔️ Fight With Swagger, Precision, and Style
Brawl with brass knuckles, cane-swords, kukris, and hidden blades in fast, brutal combat designed for close-quarters chaos. Strike from the shadows as Evie, or charge head-on as Jacob—each encounter is a chance to unleash your own brand of Assassin justice.

🔥 Take Back the City Block by Block
Infiltrate Templar strongholds, sabotage factories, free child laborers, and dismantle criminal networks run by ruthless gang leaders. Turn enemy territory into liberated havens as London slowly transforms under your command.

💼 Innovation Meets Revolution
Upgrade your gang, expand your influence, and recruit specialists to help you dominate the underworld. Craft gear, enhance your skills, and manipulate the city's booming industries to strengthen the Brotherhood’s grip on the capital.

🐀 A Living, Breathing Urban Jungle
London teems with life—cutthroat gangsters, desperate workers, swaggering street urchins, and high-society elites brushing past each other in a city bursting with contradiction. Every crowded market, fog-shrouded dock, and moonlit alley feels raw, dangerous, and irresistible.

🎶 A Soundtrack Forged in Steam and Shadows
Let haunting violin melodies, pounding industrial rhythms, and tense orchestral swells pull you deeper into a world where history and rebellion collide. Every chase, duel, and rooftop escape feels like a chapter in an epic uprising.

🔥 A Revolution Wrapped in Hood and Steel
With its gripping story, memorable heroes, and a London transformed into a playground of intrigue and danger, Assassin’s Creed Syndicate delivers a masterclass in stealth, style, and Victorian-era anarchy.
This isn’t just about freeing a city—it’s about sparking a revolution at the dawn of the modern world.

mac_games.title: Far Cry 4
mac_games.description:
Far Cry 4 hurls you into the untamed heights of Kyrat—a breathtaking Himalayan nation where ancient traditions clash violently with modern warfare, and every cliffside, valley, and village hides danger, beauty, and rebellion. From snow-capped peaks to dense jungles echoing with gunfire, Far Cry 4 delivers a heart-pounding open-world adventure built on chaos, choice, and pure adrenaline.

🗡️ Become the Spark That Ignites a Revolution
You return to Kyrat seeking answers about your past—only to be caught between the tyrannical rule of Pagan Min and the rising voices of the Golden Path. As the country’s fate hangs in the balance, your decisions shape the rebellion. Wield powerful weapons, forge alliances, and carve your own path across a land desperate for freedom.

🏔️ A World as Deadly as It Is Beautiful
From crumbling temples to misty mountains and predator-filled forests, Kyrat feels alive—and ready to kill you at any moment. Ride elephants into battle, take to the skies with a gyrocopter, or stalk enemies through the brush with stealth and precision. Every environment offers opportunity... and danger lurking around the corner.

💥 Action That Never Lets Up
Push through enemy strongholds, turn outposts into safe havens, or cause explosive mayhem just because you can. Whether you're unleashing chaos with heavy weaponry or striking silently from the shadows, every encounter is a chance to craft your own signature style of destruction.

🐅 Wildlife Rules These Lands
The animals of Kyrat don’t just decorate the landscape—they dominate it. Ferocious tigers, raging rhinos, and soaring eagles can become your worst nightmare or your greatest asset. Use them wisely… or become their next meal.

🎨 Gear Up, Upgrade, and Go Wild
Customize your loadout with a massive array of weapons, gear, and skills. Craft essential tools from animal hides, unlock abilities that match your playstyle, and evolve into a one-person force capable of reshaping the future of Kyrat.

🎶 A Soundscape Full of Culture and Chaos
Let traditional melodies, rebellious anthems, and haunting atmosphere immerse you deeper into a world torn between beauty and brutality. Every ambush, every escape, every victory feels larger than life.

🔥 A Legendary Adventure for Every Action Fan
With its sprawling open world, unforgettable villain, and endless opportunities for explosive creativity, Far Cry 4 is more than a game—it's a daring journey into a land where every choice matters and every battle counts.
This isn’t just survival—it’s revolution, chaos, and destiny colliding in the shadow of the Himalayas.

mac_games.title: A Plague Tale: Innocence
mac_games.description:
Step into a world ravaged by a devastating plague in A Plague Tale: Innocence, an emotional tale of survival, sacrifice, and hope amidst the horrors of war. Follow the journey of two siblings as they navigate a brutal landscape, facing overwhelming odds and unimaginable dangers. Every step is a struggle for life, and every decision weighs heavy on the heart.

SURVIVE IN A HARSH, UNFORGIVING WORLD
Experience the brutal reality of medieval France during the Black Death, where death lurks in every shadow. Guide Amicia and her younger brother Hugo through the countryside, avoiding vicious Inquisitors, hordes of rats, and a world turned upside down. Every moment of peace is fleeting, and every threat feels all too real in this perilous environment.

MASTER THE ART OF STEALTH AND RESOURCEFULNESS
Use stealth, cunning, and quick thinking to overcome deadly obstacles. Whether evading hostile soldiers or navigating treacherous landscapes, you’ll need to make use of the environment and limited resources to stay alive. Craft makeshift weapons, create distractions, and keep your wits about you to outsmart enemies and avoid detection.

FACE MULTIPLE CHALLENGES AND HEART-POUNDING MOMENTS
Take on an array of intense challenges, from stealthy escapes to brutal confrontations. Every decision has a consequence, and the choices you make will shape the story and its outcome. Manage your limited supplies wisely, and rely on your bond with Hugo to survive the harsh trials that await.

UNCOVER A MYSTERIOUS AND HEART-WRENCHING STORY
Delve deep into a gripping narrative filled with emotional weight and shocking revelations. Unravel the secrets behind the plague, the sinister forces at work, and the mysterious powers within Hugo. The bond between the siblings is at the heart of the story, and their relationship will drive you forward through every twist and turn.

STRUGGLE TO ESCAPE A WORLD ON THE BRINK OF COLLAPSE
Battle through a ravaged world, constantly on the run from overwhelming forces. Fight for survival as you face hordes of rats, ruthless Inquisitors, and treacherous terrain. Every escape, every rescue, every close call brings you one step closer to finding hope in a world on the edge of destruction.

mac_games.title: Until Then
mac_games.description:
Until Then is a deeply emotional, story-driven adventure set in a richly realized, alternate-universe Philippines. Blending coming-of-age drama with supernatural mystery, the game follows high school student Mark Borja as he navigates the complexities of teenage life—friendships, exams, and awkward text messages—while an unsettling string of disappearances threatens to unravel the world as he knows it.

📱 Slice-of-Life Meets the Surreal Live out the ordinary teenage experience in a not-so-ordinary world. Go to class, hang out with friends, jam on the piano, and send snarky text replies—but all while something strange brews beneath the surface. As people begin to vanish without explanation, Mark’s reality begins to shift in eerie, dreamlike ways.

🧩 A Story of Choices and Consequences Every interaction counts. Dialogue choices, how you spend your day, and even the photos you take can affect your relationships and the unfolding mystery. As Mark delves deeper into the truth, he’ll face moments of levity, heartbreak, and surreal horror.

🌆 Set in a Unique Filipino Backdrop Experience a rare look into modern Filipino culture through beautiful pixel-art environments, authentic references, and local flavor—from street food stalls to busy classrooms to late-night commutes through neon-lit Manila streets.

🎮 Simple Mechanics, Deep Narrative Engage with the world through light exploration, minigames, texting, and environmental puzzles. Whether playing a piano melody or scrolling through a social feed, every detail is carefully designed to ground you in Mark’s world and emotional journey.

🎨 Beautiful 2.5D Pixel Art and Original Soundtrack With a blend of stylized visuals and dynamic lighting, Until Then brings its characters and settings to life in a visually captivating way. A heartfelt soundtrack underscores both the everyday and the extraordinary with emotional depth.

mac_games.title: DOG WITCH
mac_games.description:
Dog Witch is a card roguelike with powerful spells and enchanted dice. Combine over 150 unique items, create strategies and synergistic combos, summon minions, and defeat wondrous enemies that will make your tail wag!


DOG WITCH combines the best features of a deck builder and a dice-based roguelike, creating vast strategic possibilities. In quick battles, you can use item sets, discover new synergies, and face a wide variety of enemies, each requiring a unique approach. For fans of the strategic depth of games like Slay The Spire or the exciting unpredictability of Dicey Dungeons, Dog Witch offers an engaging adventure with high replayability.


In fast-paced combat, each stage is action-packed: combine over 150 magical artifacts (and their twisted counterparts), summon unexpected allies, and harness the whims of enchanted bones. Easy to learn, difficult to master—Dog Witch rewards original builds, bold experimentation, and the ability to adapt quickly.

Peculiarities:
Battle armed matryoshka dolls, vengeful cat ladies, and suspicious vending machines. Each battle is a chaotic puzzle that will test your tactical skills.

Need help? Summon laser ponies, machine-gun rats, nightmarish skeletons, and other helpers to fight for you. Combine them with relics and spells to unleash cunning combinations that can turn the tide of even the most hopeless battle.

Once you think you've seen it all, experiment with different hats! Each hat has its own unique characteristics and guarantees new challenges that require fresh strategic decisions. 

Choose the fur, hat, bark, and even the level of fluffiness. Recreate your own pet or conjure up something grotesque.

Roll the dice and create synergistic spells in a captivating hypnotic trance, accompanied by dreamy trip-hop and whimsical visuals. Feel your routine dissolve: Dog Witch will free you from the noise of everyday life and immerse you in a true state of flow.

mac_games.title: Need for Speed Heat
mac_games.description:
Need for Speed Heat roars onto the streets and throws you straight into the neon-drenched chaos of Palm City—where burning rubber, razor-sharp turns, and high-stakes chases define the legends of the underground racing world. Whether you’re tearing up the sunlit daytime circuits or diving headfirst into the dangerous thrill of the night, NFS Heat blends speed, rebellion, and raw adrenaline into a pulse-pounding racing experience.

🏎️ Rise as the Outlaw Racer Palm City Fears—and Respects
Slide behind the wheel of the world’s most coveted cars and build a legacy that leaves the streets buzzing. Dominate sanctioned events by day to earn bank, then risk it all after dark where illicit street races, hungry rivals, and relentless cops push your skills to the limit. Every drift, every boost, every escape sharpens your reputation and fuels your climb to the top.

🌃 Nightfall: Where Legends Are Forged
When the sun sets, the real game begins. Palm City transforms into a playground of glowing lights and forbidden contests, where daring moves and split-second decisions separate the fearless from the forgotten. Outrun the law, outmaneuver the competition, and leave a trail of smoke in your wake as your REP skyrockets to mythic heights.

⚡ Customisation Unleashed, Speed Personified
Craft your ultimate ride with insane visual mods, performance upgrades, and style choices that scream personality. Tune every inch of your machine—from roar to rims—and hit the streets with a look so bold it turns every head you fly past.

🚨 The Heat Is Always On
Push too far, and the police won’t hesitate to hunt you down. Smarter tactics, faster cars, and ruthless pursuit units keep every night run tense and unpredictable. Outsmart them, outpace them, or go down in a blaze of glory.

🎶 A Soundtrack Fueled by Urban Energy
Immerse yourself in a hard-hitting mix of global beats, street anthems, and electrifying rhythms that sync perfectly with roaring engines and midnight races. Every drift feels cooler, every escape more cinematic.

🌆 A High-Octane Classic for Every Racing Fan
With its mix of deep customization, vibrant open-world culture, and day-versus-night tension, Need for Speed Heat delivers a racing experience that hits you like a nitrous blast.
This isn’t just a race—it’s speed, rebellion, and pure underground intensity wrapped into one unforgettable ride.

mac_games.title: Cricket 19 (Controller Only)
mac_games.description:
🏏 Cricket 19: Step Into the Arena of Legends

Cricket 19 swings open the pavilion doors and launches you straight into the intensity, strategy, and spectacle of world-class cricket—where every delivery, every shot, and every split-second decision shapes the story of champions. Whether you’re dominating under stadium floodlights or crafting miracles in heated Test battles, Cricket 19 blends authenticity, drama, and pure cricketing passion into an experience that keeps your heart racing from the first ball to the last.

🔥 Craft Your Legacy, One Innings at a Time
Take control of cricket’s biggest icons or forge your own rising superstar as you fight for glory across Tests, ODIs, and T20 tournaments. Master the art of bowling variations, read the pitch like a pro, and unleash perfectly timed strokes with a gameplay system designed to reward skill, precision, and cricketing intelligence.

🌏 Deep Career Mode: Rise Through the Ranks
Start from humble club cricket and climb your way to international stardom. Build your reputation, make career-defining choices, captain your nation, and rewrite the stories of famous tours with scenarios that challenge your tactical mindset and nerves under pressure.

⚡ Dynamic Gameplay, Realistic Tension
Every match feels alive with smart AI, realistic physics, and authentic player movements. Tight field placements, dramatic run chases, nail-biting super overs, and momentum-shifting overs keep the action unpredictable and thrilling—just like the real game.

🎤 Immersive Presentation & Atmosphere
Feel the roar of the crowd, the echo of crisp strokes, and the tension between every ball. With broadcast-style visuals, quality commentary, and lifelike stadiums from around the world, Cricket 19 captures the soul and spectacle of international cricket.

🏆 A Modern Classic for Every Cricket Fan
With its mix of strategic depth, lifelike mechanics, and cinematic excitement, Cricket 19 delivers a cricketing experience that hits harder than a cleanly struck six. This isn’t just a game—it’s passion, tradition, and pure sporting adrenaline wrapped into one unforgettable cricket journey.

mac_games.title: FIFA 20
mac_games.description:
FIFA 20 kicks open the stadium gates and drops you into the electrifying heart of the beautiful game—where split-second decisions, precision touches, and pulse-pounding moments define legends. Whether you’re under the blinding lights of world-class arenas or carving your name into the concrete courts of street football, FIFA 20 blends realism, flair, and unfiltered passion into one unforgettable football experience.

⚽ Be the Spark That Ignites the Pitch
Step into the boots of football’s brightest stars or craft your own rising icon as you battle for glory across leagues, cups, and global competitions. Every pass, every tackle, every last-minute strike feels sharper than ever with the refined Football Intelligence system, giving you control worthy of champions.

🏙️ VOLTA Football: Where Street Legends Are Born
Leave the stadium behind and take the game back to its roots in VOLTA Football—small-sided matches played in rooftops, cages, alleys, and underground courts around the world. Style is everything: break ankles with slick skill moves, score off-the-wall stunners, and express yourself through flashy gear, unique avatars, and pure street swagger.

⚡ Dynamic Gameplay, Realistic Moments
Experience football with a new level of authenticity. Smart defending, controlled dribbling, and revamped set pieces give you deeper command of the game while creating edge-of-your-seat matchups—from gritty 1–0 battles to high-scoring thrillers.

🎶 A Soundtrack Fueled by Global Energy
Vibe to a diverse playlist of international artists, pumping beats, and bold rhythms that capture the spirit of both the stadium and the streets. Every match feels like a celebration, every goal like a festival.

🌍 A Modern Classic for Every Football Fan
With its mix of polished realism, street-level flair, and high-energy presentation, FIFA 20 delivers a football experience that hits hard from kickoff to the final whistle. This isn’t just a game—it’s passion, culture, and pure football adrenaline wrapped in one explosive package.

mac_games.title: Total Overdose
mac_games.description:
Total Overdose throws you headfirst into a wild, high-octane action fiesta where bullets fly, cars explode, and style is everything. Set in a sun-drenched world of cartel chaos, this over-the-top third-person shooter blends outrageous stunts, fast-paced gunplay, and explosive humor into one unforgettable ride. Step into the boots of Ram Cruz, an undercover agent with nothing to lose, as he tears through Mexico on a quest for truth, revenge, and a whole lot of action.

🔥 A Badass on a Mission
Play as Ramiro “Ram” Cruz, a reckless DEA agent thrust into a deadly conspiracy after his father and brother fall to cartel deception. Armed with dual pistols, acrobatic moves, and an attitude that could level a city block, Ram takes justice into his own hands—leaving an avalanche of destruction in his wake.

🌵 Open-World Mayhem, Mexican-Style
Explore a vibrant, stylized Mexico packed with lively towns, dusty highways, cartel compounds, and hidden secrets. Race through the streets in stolen cars, motorcycles, and trucks as you leap, shoot, and skid your way across a world built for pure chaotic fun.

💥 Signature Moves & Bullet-Time Insanity
Dive, flip, and wall-run your way through firefights with spectacular slow-motion gunplay. Pull off insane “Loco Moves,” devastating special attacks that turn the battlefield into a cinematic disaster zone—whether you're unleashing spinning tornado shots or dropping explosive piñatas on your enemies.

🎶 A Soundtrack That Hits Hard
Let the adrenaline rush through you with a pumping soundtrack filled with Latin rock, hip-hop, and explosive beats that perfectly match the game’s wild energy.

😎 A Cult Classic Full of Style
With its tongue-in-cheek humor, over-the-top action, and arcade-inspired gameplay, Total Overdose delivers an experience that’s as ridiculous as it is unforgettable. This is not just a mission—it’s a fiesta of bullets, explosions, and pure cinematic chaos.

mac_games.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
mac_games.description:
Clair: Expedition 33 propels players into a haunting, beautifully atmospheric world where humanity’s final hope rests on the shoulders of a resilient few. Developed with cinematic precision and crafted for modern systems, this narrative-driven action adventure follows Clair, a gifted explorer caught in a cycle of destruction and rebirth known as the Thirty-Third Expedition. As timelines fracture and ancient forces stir, you’ll uncover long-buried secrets that could break the loop—or doom all who remain.

🌒 Step Into Clair’s Journey
Take control of Clair, a determined survivor blessed—and burdened—with the ability to perceive echoes of past expeditions. Armed with adaptive gear, shifting abilities, and a sharp mind, Clair must navigate a perilous world where memory is both a weapon and a curse. Every choice you make shifts the balance of a fragile reality and shapes the outcome of an expedition that has repeated 32 times before… and may not survive a 34th.

🌍 A Ruined World Bound by Time
Traverse breathtaking landscapes shaped by the scars of countless failed journeys. From abandoned citadels swallowed by nature to desolate research outposts humming with residual energy, each environment pulses with history. Dynamic encounters, hidden lore fragments, and timeline anomalies bring the world to life, rewarding players who dare to explore every forgotten corner.

⚙️ Strategic, Evolving Combat
Engage in fast, deliberate combat where understanding your enemies is the key to survival. Adapt Clair’s gear with modular upgrades, harness temporal abilities that shift the flow of battle, and exploit enemy weaknesses revealed through past echoes. mac_games.description:
FlipWitch: Forbidden Sex Hex is an indie 2D Metroidvania (action-platformer) game with adventure and role-playing elements, developed by Momo Games and Critical Bliss.


The game combines fast-paced retro gameplay with a light, humorous tone inspired by classics like Shantae and Momodora, but with an emphasis on a fantasy world full of magic and unusual interactions.


Plot

The story takes place in a chaotic fantasy world thrown into chaos by the wily Witch of Chaos. The protagonist is a young apprentice wizard named FlipWitch (or simply "Switch Witch") who gains the unique ability to change her gender and form: from female (witch) to male (wizard).

This allows her to travel through magical forests, dungeons, and towns, defeating monsters, solving quests, and lifting curses from residents. Her goal is to complete her training, defeat the main antagonist, and restore balance to the world.

The plot is non-linear: your decisions influence the development of events, the appearance of characters, and even the moral aspects of the environment.


Gameplay

The game offers freedom of exploration in a Metroidvania style: you discover new areas, collect items and abilities that allow you to return to previously inaccessible areas.

The key mechanic is "flipping"—a shape-shifting action that not only changes appearance but also opens up different paths:

• In female form, you can communicate with certain NPCs, solve magic-based puzzles, or use agility.

• In men's - focus on strength, combat techniques or interactions that require physical power.


Combat is dynamic: fight regular monsters, giant bosses, and even groups of enemies. Add to this the collection of costumes (which don't provide stat bonuses, but they trigger side quests), the search for secrets (hidden NPCs, rare items), and non-linear quests. 

Completing quests earns you upgrades, such as extra "charges" for abilities or attack boosts. All of this is accompanied by high-quality animation, a retro-style soundtrack, and over 100 unique animations for completing the game.


Peculiarities

• World and atmosphere: Beautiful 2D art with bright, whimsical locations.

• Customization elements: Change your appearance, collect costumes for new dialogues and quests.

• Campaign and Difficulty: The campaign takes 5-10 hours for the main playthrough, plus hours for 100% completion. Difficulty is balanced with a focus on platforming and boss fights.

mac_games.title: Honey Select 2: Libido
mac_games.description:
Honey Select 2: Libido is a unique 3D character creation and interaction simulator.


Here, you find yourself in a unique hotel, where you're greeted by a concierge named Fur. She introduces you to a world where you can create your perfect characters using a detailed editor (customizing appearance, clothing, poses, and environments), choose your partner, and spend time in a variety of romantic scenarios—from cozy evenings to exotic situations.


The game offers complete customization freedom, a Studio mode for scenes, and a VIP area with themed locations (swimming pool, wedding, and more). It's a place to bring your fantasies to life, where anything is possible within the chosen settings.

mac_games.title: Don't FOOL ME, Beauties!
mac_games.description:
Don't FOOL ME, Beauties! is an FMV dating sim where you can experience unique romantic stories with four charming heroines.

You play as Hanbin, a new employee at a luxury hotel where you'll experience mischievous and unforgettable moments with four beautiful and icy girls.


Will you be able to melt their hearts and eventually win one of them?


Features:
Maximum immersion - first-person dating

Play as Hanbin and experience the entire story from his perspective. Interact, make choices, and build complex relationships with four charming heroines. Every decision you make can change the course of events—lead to romance, unexpected twists, or even a BAD END. Your choices shape the plot, so play through the game multiple times to unlock all endings!


Long passage and rich storyline

Each chapter is filled with hidden epilogues, bonus videos, and collectible CGs for those who love collecting everything. BAD ENDS scattered throughout the game add tension and make this romance simulator even more captivating.


Cinematic and romantic comedy

From light banter to thrilling moments, the game is full of scenes designed to keep players engaged. The girls will provoke and challenge you, turning every interaction into something unexpected. We worked with professional cinematographers to ensure each scene is vibrant and beautiful.


Four heroines – four unforgettable images

Meet four girls, each with their own distinct personalities and charm: a fiery tsundere, a mischievous troublemaker, a mature beauty, and your childhood friend next door. They won't be easy to get—and that's why you won't be able to put them down. Which one will you win over?

mac_games.title: Honey Select
mac_games.description:
Honey Select is a character creation and intimate interaction simulator. The game allows players to create unique female characters with thousands of customization options, including appearance, clothing, and personality traits.


You can invite up to two characters to various locations for romantic and intimate encounters, choosing from a list of available actions.


Characters' emotions change dynamically based on your decisions and interactions.
