Additionally included:

Honey Studio is a tool for posing and animating characters.

mac_games.title: The Censor DX Edition
mac_games.description:
Yuto lives a recluse's life, revolving around gadgets and idols. Facebook offers him a job moderating adult content. He reluctantly accepts, spending his days deleting images that violate community guidelines.


At first, the work seems boring and monotonous. But over time, he begins to notice oddities. Behind the faceless files lie fragments of the lives of three women: Misa Hashimoto, the married manager of his building; Yui Takahashi, his beloved idol; and Rika Kamiya, a strict nun from the local Church. All of them are hiding something they weren't intended for others to see.


One day, Yuto accidentally filters an explicit image—and everything changes. The neighbors' reactions and the news hint that the world around him has changed.

mac_games.title: The Genesis Order
mac_games.description:
You take on the role of a young detective attempting to uncover the mystery of a cult implicated in a series of murders. Your investigation leads you into conflict with a powerful criminal organization plotting to destroy the world with an ancient evil.


But you're not alone in your perilous adventure. You have a whole harem of beauties at your side, who will support you not only with words but also with deeds.


As you play, you'll deepen your relationships with different women, discover their secrets and desires, and experience the most unforgettable moments of passion and love. You'll also have the opportunity to explore Northern Santiva, complete various quests and events, find and sell valuable artifacts, decorate your home to your liking, and much more.

mac_games.title: HoneyCome: come come party
mac_games.description:
Discover expanded character customization options. Create your ideal partner based on your needs—fall in love or explore the depths of your desires.

At HoneyCome come come party you can allow yourself to dream.


Draw from the source of your passion a sparkling image—the embodiment of your perfect partner. The character editor allows you to create the love of your life or a seductive creature to satisfy your weaknesses.


Don't just go by looks - define your personality to truly create your one and only.

mac_games.title: Outlast II
mac_games.description:
🩸 Outlast 2 – Descent into Darkness, Faith, and Madness

The sun scorches the Arizona desert, but beneath its light lies only shadow. Faith is twisted, love is tested, and sanity frays with every heartbeat. Outlast 2 from Red Barrels is a harrowing first-person descent into psychological terror—where survival is not about strength, but about how long your mind can endure the dark.

📹 No Weapons. No Mercy. Only the Truth.

Step into the worn shoes of Blake Langermann, an investigative journalist searching for answers with his wife, Lynn. What begins as a routine story about a mysterious murder spirals into a nightmare of fanaticism and despair. When their helicopter crashes in the desolate countryside, Blake finds himself alone—hunted by a deranged cult convinced he’s part of an unholy prophecy.

👁️ Run, Hide, Record

Armed only with your camcorder and dwindling night vision, you must navigate cornfields, caverns, and decaying shantytowns haunted by those who’ve surrendered their souls to madness. Every flicker of light and rustle in the dark could mean salvation—or death. Record what you see, uncover the cult’s secrets, and cling to reality before it slips away.

🙏 Faith Falls Apart

In Outlast 2, horror is not only in what lurks outside, but in what festers within. Themes of sin, guilt, and faith intertwine in a chilling narrative that blurs the line between divine revelation and delusion. The deeper you go, the more the truth unravels—and the more you question what’s real.

⚠️ There is no comfort in the light. Only the lies it reveals.

mac_games.title: Trine 5: A Clockwork Conspiracy
mac_games.description:
⚙️ Trine 5: A Clockwork Conspiracy – A Tale of Heroes, Gears, and Broken Bonds

A kingdom teeters on the edge of ruin. Friendship is tested, courage is forged, and destiny turns like a clockwork gear. Trine 5: A Clockwork Conspiracy is a breathtaking fantasy adventure from Frozenbyte, blending puzzle-solving, platforming, and cooperative storytelling into one enchanting journey.

Step once more into the boots of three unlikely heroes—Amadeus the Wizard, Pontius the Knight, and Zoya the Thief—as they battle treachery, unravel intricate mysteries, and fight to save their world from a cunning mechanical menace.

⚔️ Three Heroes. One Fate.

When a shadowy cabal threatens to dismantle the very heart of the kingdom, only the legendary trio of heroes can stand against the gears of conspiracy. Switch between Amadeus’ clever magic, Pontius’ unbreakable valor, and Zoya’s deadly precision to overcome perilous challenges and ingenious contraptions. Every puzzle solved and every battle fought draws the heroes closer—testing not just their skills, but their bond.

🔮 Magic, Metal, and Mastery

Wield the power of mind and muscle in perfect harmony. Conjure objects to bridge impossible gaps, manipulate the environment to outsmart enemies, and slice through clockwork soldiers with elegant precision. Each hero’s abilities intertwine in creative, unexpected ways—rewarding cleverness as much as courage.

🕰️ A Clockwork Conspiracy Unfolds

A grand betrayal brews beneath the kingdom’s golden façade. Aristocrats pull hidden strings, ancient technology hums with dark purpose, and every ticking second brings the heroes closer to the truth. Unravel the mystery behind the mechanical uprising before the gears of fate crush all hope.

mac_games.title: OMORI
mac_games.description:
Explore a strange world full of colorful friends and enemies. Traverse vibrant and mundane places to uncover a forgotten past. When the time comes, the path you choose will determine your destiny... and perhaps the destiny of others.



Omori explores the theme of coping with psychological trauma and contains elements of psychological horror, with the protagonist ultimately either overcoming or suppressing their fears.

mac_games.title: Hearts of Iron IV
mac_games.description:
Victory is in your hands! Your ability to lead your country is your ultimate weapon, and the strategy game Hearts of Iron IV gives you the opportunity to lead any nation during World War II, the largest conflict in world history.



From the heart of battle to the command center, you will lead your country to glory and wage war, negotiate, or launch an invasion. You can tip the balance of power in your favor during World War II. The time has come to prove your abilities as the world's greatest military leader. Will you recreate or reshape history? Will you change the fate of the world by achieving victory at any cost?

mac_games.title: The Wolf Among Us
mac_games.description:
The Wolf Among Us – A Gritty Fairytale Noir Awaits

Step into a world where fairy tales bleed, secrets rot, and justice is anything but black and white. The Wolf Among Us is a gripping narrative adventure from Telltale Games, set in the twisted universe of Fables—a comic book series by Bill Willingham. As Bigby Wolf, the feared Big Bad Wolf turned sheriff of Fabletown, you’ll investigate brutal murders, navigate political minefields, and make choices that can save or shatter lives.

🕵️‍♂️ A Murder Mystery with Fangs
The peace in Fabletown shatters when a brutal killing threatens to expose the hidden community of fairy tale exiles. As Bigby, it’s up to you to follow the trail of blood through a web of lies, corruption, and broken fairy tales. Every decision you make impacts the story, with real consequences for the characters and world around you.

🐺 Become the Big Bad Wolf... or Don’t
Will you rely on your feral instincts, or fight to stay human? Shape Bigby’s identity through tough moral choices, brutal interrogations, and moments of raw emotion. Use force, cunning, or empathy to handle tense situations and see how the world reacts. In The Wolf Among Us, your choices aren’t just remembered—they define who you are.

🎭 Fairy Tales Reimagined
Encounter a rich cast of reimagined fairy tale legends like Snow White, Ichabod Crane, Beauty and Beast, and Bloody Mary—each with secrets to hide and stories to tell. In this mature, noir-inspired take on classic folklore, nothing is as it seems, and every fable has a dark side.

🌆 Atmospheric Noir Visuals
Immerse yourself in a stunning, stylized 1980s New York where neon lights meet shadows and every alley holds a secret. With bold comic-inspired visuals and a moody synth-jazz soundtrack, the world of The Wolf Among Us oozes noir style and supernatural grit.

🧠 Your Story, Your Consequences
Split-second choices. Fateful dialogues. Life-or-death moments. The Wolf Among Us thrives on tension, drama, and player agency. With five gripping episodes, your journey will twist and turn in unexpected ways, and no two playthroughs are alike.

🎮 The Definitive Telltale Experience
If you love games where story matters, stakes are high, and characters feel alive, The Wolf Among Us is a must-play. With tight writing, powerful performances, and edge-of-your-seat drama, it’s a masterclass in interactive storytelling.

mac_games.title: Dying Light: The Beast
mac_games.description:
Dying Light: The Beast – Become the Hunter in a World of Monsters

Darkness has evolved, and so must you. Dying Light: The Beast unleashes a new era of survival horror, plunging you into a devastated open world where the line between man and monster is shattered. Step into the torn boots of a new survivor—or something far more dangerous—and master deadly parkour, brutal combat, and gut-wrenching decisions in humanity’s last stronghold.

🌑 A New Threat Rises
The virus has mutated. Survivors whisper of a monstrous entity stalking the shadows—The Beast—and it’s not alone. Face overwhelming odds in a dynamic world ruled by fear, where infected evolve faster than ever and the infected city pulses with rage, hunger, and blood.

🦴 Become the Beast
For the first time in the series, embrace the infection and unleash your primal instincts. Tap into enhanced senses, monstrous strength, and savage abilities as you blur the line between predator and prey. Will you use your powers to protect the living—or dominate them?

🏃 Parkour with Purpose
Traverse the city with fluid parkour movement, scaling rooftops, vaulting through ruins, and leaping across deadly gaps. Every wall is climbable, every alley a possible escape—or an ambush. The city is your playground and your prison.

🪓 Brutal Combat, Your Way
Wield a savage arsenal of handcrafted weapons, stealth tools, and devastating beast-mode abilities. Rip through enemies with speed and precision, or crush them with raw force. From rooftop chases to underground ambushes, no two fights are ever the same.

🌆 Evolving Open World
Explore a vast, decaying city split between factions, infected zones, and haunting remnants of a fallen civilization. The environment reacts to your choices, the infected adapt, and the world changes whether you’re ready or not. Day is survival. Night is war.

🌒 Day-Night Terror Reborn
When the sun sets, the city transforms. Infected roam freely, hunters become hunted, and the Beast awakens. Use the cover of darkness to stalk enemies—or pray you survive until dawn.

🤝 Co-Op Carnage or Solo Survival
Team up with up to 3 friends in seamless online co-op and combine your powers to survive, strategize, or wreak havoc. Share gear, fight side-by-side, and face the horrors of night together—or go solo and walk the line between savior and monster.

🎮 Next-Gen Immersion
Built for next-gen hardware, Dying Light: The Beast features ultra-responsive combat, dynamic weather systems, terrifying AI, and stunning environmental detail. Feel the crunch of bone, the hiss of the infected, and the heartbeat of the city as it fights back.

🧬 Choices Define You
You are not just fighting to survive—you’re fighting to decide what you are. Every choice you make affects the story, the world, and your evolution. Will you hold on to your humanity, or let the beast inside take control?

mac_games.title: Little Nightmares III
mac_games.description:
Little Nightmares III – Face Your Fears Together

Enter a haunting world of childhood nightmares and forgotten terrors in Little Nightmares III, the chilling new chapter in the critically acclaimed horror-adventure series. For the first time ever, team up with a friend in online or local co-op and survive the nightmarish journey through a decaying, distorted land where escape is never guaranteed—and fear is your constant companion.

🕯 A New Tale of Terror
Step into the shoes of Low and Alone, two new children trapped in the macabre realm of the Nowhere. Each haunted by their own past, they must work together to navigate twisted environments, solve spine-chilling puzzles, and evade horrifying threats lurking in the shadows. Will you trust each other long enough to survive—or will fear tear you apart?

🧩 Co-Op Survival, Eerie Puzzle Solving
Play solo or with a friend and experience the all-new cooperative gameplay at the heart of Little Nightmares III. Use unique character abilities, combine your strengths, and think fast to escape a world that feeds on fear. Solve interconnected puzzles, uncover hidden paths, and outwit grotesque foes in a dance of danger and trust.

👁 Nightmare Worlds Reimagined
Explore a series of strange, surreal regions known as the Spiral, from the windswept wasteland of Necropolis to twisted playgrounds, crumbling ruins, and machinery gone mad. Each location tells its own story—and hides secrets that reveal the disturbing truth behind this terrifying universe. Expect the unexpected, and keep moving forward… if you can.

🎭 Sinister New Foes
Beware the monstrous denizens of the Spiral—grotesque beings with eyes that never blink and hands that reach too far. From towering predators to malformed guardians, each new enemy presents a terrifying challenge and a heart-pounding encounter. Hide, run, or outsmart them—but never let your guard down.

🪞 Immersive Visuals & Haunting Sound
Lose yourself in atmospheric, handcrafted environments with stunning, stylized visuals and a hauntingly immersive soundtrack. Every creaking floorboard, every distant shriek, and every shadow that moves just a little too quickly pulls you deeper into the nightmare.

⚔ A Journey of Trust and Fear
At its heart, Little Nightmares III is a tale of connection. In a world built to isolate and terrify, only together can you find hope. Whether braving the Spiral with a friend or relying on your AI partner, your bond may be the only thing that keeps the darkness at bay.

mac_games.title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Clash
mac_games.description:
Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Clash – Unleash Your Cursed Energy!

Step into the dark, supernatural world of Jujutsu Kaisen: Cursed Clash, the explosive 2v2 arena fighter based on the hit anime and manga series! Choose your favorite Jujutsu Sorcerers and Cursed Spirits, and engage in high-octane battles where cursed energy decides your fate. With powerful team-based combat, jaw-dropping visuals, and signature moves straight from the series, this is the ultimate showdown between good and evil in the Jujutsu world.

💥 Authentic Anime Storyline
Relive the unforgettable moments of Jujutsu Kaisen, from Yuji Itadori’s fateful encounter with Sukuna to epic clashes against powerful curses. Follow the original story with beautifully animated cutscenes and fully voiced characters that bring every intense emotion and fight to life. Whether you're a longtime fan or new to the series, immerse yourself in a cursed world filled with danger, sacrifice, and soul-shaking power.

⚔️ Choose Your Fighters
Assemble your dream team of 2 fighters from a growing roster of iconic characters including Yuji Itadori, Megumi Fushiguro, Nobara Kugisaki, Satoru Gojo, Ryomen Sukuna, Mahito, and more. Each fighter brings their own cursed techniques, combos, and ultimate moves. Master their abilities and discover devastating tag-team synergies to dominate the battlefield.

💥 Team-Based Cursed Combat
Experience lightning-fast, tag-team combat with a unique 2v2 system that rewards coordination, timing, and strategy. Chain cursed techniques, unleash cinematic ultimate attacks, and switch between allies mid-battle to maintain pressure and keep your opponents guessing. Whether you're fighting solo or with a partner, every match is an intense test of skill and cursed energy mastery.

🎮 Customization and Progression
Level up your fighters, unlock new techniques, and equip cosmetic customizations to personalize your team. Enhance your favorite characters with unlockable skills and alternate outfits inspired by the anime and manga. Power up your team and show off your style as you climb the ranks!

🌍 Stunning Arenas and Environments
Battle across iconic locations from the series like Jujutsu High, Shibuya, and the Cursed Womb, brought to life in detailed 3D environments. Each stage features destructible elements and atmospheric effects that immerse you in the cursed world like never before. Feel every impact as cursed energy collides with stunning intensity.

🏆 Online and Competitive Modes
Go head-to-head with players around the world in online ranked battles, friendly matches, and special events. Test your cursed technique against the best and climb the leaderboards to prove you're the strongest sorcerer—or curse—alive. Team up with a friend in co-op battles or take on the world solo in competitive play.

🔥 Strategy Meets Speed
Victory isn’t just about brute strength—timing, synergy, and smart use of cursed techniques are key. Learn each character’s moveset, counter your opponents’ strategies, and unleash perfectly timed combos to win the fight. With fluid combat and room for creativity, every battle is a new opportunity to outplay your rivals and rise to the top.

mac_games.title: Injustice 2
mac_games.description:
Injustice 2: The Ultimate Superhero Showdown

Get ready for the most action-packed, jaw-dropping superhero brawl in Injustice 2! From the creators of Mortal Kombat, this sequel brings you an epic, story-driven fighting experience where iconic DC superheroes and villains face off in explosive, one-on-one combat. With an all-star roster, stunning visuals, and intense battles, Injustice 2 lets you step into the shoes of your favorite DC character and fight for the fate of the world.

💥 Epic Storyline
The battle continues as Superman’s reign of tyranny has left the world in chaos. After the rise and fall of the regime, new threats emerge, and heroes and villains must unite (or clash) to prevent total destruction. Dive into a deep, cinematic story mode where every decision, every fight, and every battle could change the fate of the universe.

⚔️ Choose Your Champion
Play as an iconic cast of DC superheroes and villains, including Batman, Superman, Wonder Woman, The Flash, Aquaman, Harley Quinn, and many more. Each fighter has their own unique fighting style, super moves, and devastating combos. Whether you’re saving the world or conquering it, the choice is yours.

💥 Fluid, Dynamic Combat
Experience fluid, fast-paced combat that’s easy to pick up but hard to master. Chain devastating combos, unleash signature Super Moves, and interact with the environment to deliver brutal takedowns. The game’s unique Gear System allows you to customize your character's abilities, stats, and appearance, making each hero or villain truly your own.

🎮 Gear and Customization
Equip your characters with powerful, loot-based gear to enhance their abilities and stats. Unlock thousands of gear pieces through gameplay, and create a completely personalized version of your favorite character. Whether you want a more powerful Batman or a speedier Flash, the Gear System gives you the power to craft your own ultimate hero or villain.

🌍 Stunning Visuals and Environments
Fight in beautifully detailed, destructible environments inspired by the DC Universe. From Gotham’s dark alleyways to Atlantis' underwater palaces, each stage is rich with detail, interactive elements, and environmental hazards that can turn the tide of battle in an instant. Watch as your surroundings crumble under the weight of super-powered combat.

🏆 Multiplayer and Competitive Mode
Take the fight online and challenge players around the world in ranked matches, or compete in exciting multiplayer modes like 1v1, team battles, and tournaments. With real-time leaderboards, you’ll always have the opportunity to prove you’re the best fighter in the DC Universe.

🔥 Fast-Paced Action and Strategy
Master each character’s unique abilities and fighting style to unleash brutal combos and win intense battles. Learn the timing of each hero’s special moves, and strategize your way to victory by outsmarting your opponents with clever combos, counters, and super-charged attacks.

🌟 The Ultimate DC Battle Arena
With its deep combat mechanics, iconic characters, and powerful customization options, Injustice 2 offers a true superhero experience. Whether you’re a fan of the comics, the movies, or just love a good fight, this game delivers everything you need to become the ultimate champion.

mac_games.title: Waterpark Simulator
mac_games.description:
Waterpark Simulator: The Ultimate Splash!

Dive into the exhilarating world of waterpark management with Waterpark Simulator! Build, customize, and manage your very own waterpark empire, creating thrilling rides, designing lush landscapes, and providing the ultimate summer experience for your guests. Whether you're in it for the challenge of running a business or the fun of designing crazy waterslides, this game offers a refreshing blend of creativity and strategy.

💦 Design Your Dream Waterpark
Become the architect of your own water paradise! Choose from a variety of slides, wave pools, lazy rivers, and aquatic attractions. Build everything from massive rollercoaster-like slides to tranquil relaxation zones. Customize the landscape with palm trees, waterfalls, and lush greenery to create a tropical oasis for your visitors. The possibilities are endless!

🌞 Manage Every Aspect of Your Park
From hiring staff to setting ticket prices, every decision matters. Balance the needs of your visitors with the operational demands of running a waterpark. Ensure your guests are happy, safe, and entertained, all while maximizing profits. Keep an eye on park maintenance, deal with emergencies, and keep your business running smoothly during peak seasons.

🎢 Create Thrilling, Custom Rides
Want to craft the most heart-pounding water slide or a relaxing, meandering lazy river? With a vast selection of customizable ride parts and configurations, you can design the perfect attractions for your waterpark. Will you build daring loops and high-speed drops, or will you go for more family-friendly experiences? The choice is yours!

🌊 A Beautiful, Lively Environment
Immerse yourself in a vibrant, colorful world filled with bustling guests and dynamic environments. Watch your park come to life as visitors enjoy the sun, race down waterslides, and cool off in pools. Realistic weather patterns, day-night cycles, and seasonal changes make every playthrough unique.

👥 Attract and Delight Guests
Create the perfect experience for different types of guests, from thrill-seekers and families to relaxation lovers. Manage queues, ensure safety, and handle special events to boost attendance. Keep your visitors satisfied with food stalls, gift shops, and entertainment, all while ensuring your park remains profitable.

🏆 Achieve Success in Park Management
Compete against other waterpark tycoons, complete challenging objectives, and unlock new features to expand your empire. Upgrade your park with new rides, amenities, and marketing strategies to attract more visitors. Can you build the world’s most popular waterpark?

🎮 Play at Your Own Pace
Whether you’re looking to create a laid-back, beautifully landscaped resort or a high-energy thrill ride haven, Waterpark Simulator lets you approach your waterpark empire the way you want. Manage the flow of guests, optimize your resources, and enjoy a relaxing, yet rewarding, simulation experience.

🌟 Enhanced Graphics & Realism
With stunning graphics and realistic physics, every splash, splashdown, and rush of water feels real. Dive into an immersive, eye-catching world with breathtaking water effects, gorgeous landscapes, and a lively, interactive environment.

mac_games.title: WWE 2K20
mac_games.description:
A Chaotic, High-Impact Wrestling Saga Where Legends Collide and Rivalries Are Forged in Fire

WWE 2K20 throws you headfirst into the electrified spectacle of sports entertainment—a world where muscle meets myth, and every ring is a battlefield. Step into the boots of legends and rising stars alike, navigating a universe driven by power, pride, and pure adrenaline. This is not just about winning—it’s about legacy.

🔥 Rewrite the History. Reshape the Future.

From the heights of WrestleMania to the depths of bitter betrayal, WWE 2K20 delivers an emotionally charged ride through wrestling’s most iconic moments. Relive the meteoric rise of the Four Horsewomen in an immersive showcase mode, or forge your own legend in MyCareer—where your choices echo far beyond the ring.

💥 A Brawl That Breaks All Boundaries

Feel every slam, counter, and finisher in revamped gameplay that’s fast, fluid, and ferocious. WWE 2K20 dials up the drama with explosive new animations, smoother controls, and chaotic multi-superstar matches. Tag in, throw down, and never look back.

🎭 More Than Superstars—They’re Symbols

Heroes. Villains. Rebels. Icons. The WWE roster is a living mythology of conflict and charisma. Play as legends like The Rock, Stone Cold, and Hulk Hogan—or take control of modern titans like Becky Lynch, Roman Reigns, and Bray Wyatt. Every match is a stage. Every entrance, a statement.

👥 Unleash the Universe

Control the narrative with an enhanced Universe Mode—where you book rivalries, shape storylines, and create your own wrestling dynasty. Chaos is your canvas. Rivalries are your fuel. Power is your paintbrush.

🧬 Step Into the Creation Crucible

Build your own superstar from the ground up with deep customization tools. Design arenas, championships, move-sets—even entire storylines. WWE 2K20 doesn’t just let you play the game—it lets you become the architect of its madness.

🎮 A Beautiful Mess of Glory and Grit

Stylized realism meets unfiltered intensity. WWE 2K20 might be unpredictable and even unpolished, but beneath the glitches lies a raw, unrelenting tribute to wrestling culture—loud, chaotic, and unapologetically larger-than-life.

mac_games.title: Haste
mac_games.description:
HASTE: Broken Worlds is a third-person game in which the protagonist rapidly travels through a collapsing universe. You'll explore numerous incredible worlds, hone your maneuvering skills, and utilize items and abilities to complete each level before it disappears. Along the way, you'll encounter challenges and meet characters who will help you find answers to the most important questions: what lies behind the world's destruction and how to prevent it!



CORRECT MOVEMENTS ARE THE KEY TO SUCCESS

Speed ​​and landing are crucial. If you land correctly while running, your speed will increase. But miss your target, and the mistake will be costly. Quickly orient yourself and keep an eye on the ever-changing landscape to escape the crumbling world beneath your feet.



PROCEDURALLY GENERATED WORLDS

To complete the shard before you run out of lives, you must complete all the levels. They are generated procedurally. Collect items and experiment with gear to help you overcome challenges. Traveling through crumbling worlds will be a unique experience; it's not every day you have to escape the apocalypse.



TEAM

During her journey, the main character, Zoe, will meet many different characters who will help her overcome difficulties, share wise advice, provide moral support, or give her useful items.

mac_games.title: Buckshot Roulette
mac_games.description:
Large-caliber duel:

Play Russian roulette with a 12-gauge shotgun. Because it's so much more fun.


Natural brain drain:

Intense 15-20 minute gaming sessions. Join the game, survive three rounds against the dealer, and win a prize. Or die.


Enchanting atmosphere:

Welcome to an underground nightclub where metal beams vibrate to the sound of forgotten drum machines.


A worthy opponent:

Play against the dealer, who plays by the same rules. Everything is fair. Can you beat him on his own field?


Double or nothing:

Test your luck in the new "Double or Nothing" mode. How long can you survive?


New Items:
New items to celebrate the game's release on Steam. Because we love you!

mac_games.title: Hell Is Us
mac_games.description:
An Introspective, Brutal, and Emotionally Charged Action-Adventure Set in a War-Torn World Beyond Reason

Hell Is Us drops you into a surreal, war-ravaged homeland haunted by supernatural forces and emotional trauma. With no map, no compass, and no handholding, this is a dark, symbolic odyssey where violence, memory, and grief manifest as monsters—and only raw instinct will guide you through.

🔥 A Story of War, Loss, and the Unknown

Play as Rémi, a former soldier returning to his fractured country amidst an apocalyptic Calamity. The land is crawling with mysterious creatures born of emotion and violence—manifestations of humanity’s darkest tendencies. Your goal? Uncover the truth. Survive the unknown. And maybe, find redemption.

🗡️ Melee Combat That Hits Deep

Forget guns. In this world, you fight with primal weapons—swords, axes, spears—all fueled by precision, emotion, and timing. Combat is raw and tense, supported by a high-tech drone that serves as your only true companion. Dodge, parry, and strike with purpose—every battle feels earned, not given.

🧭 No Map. No GPS. Just You.

Say goodbye to quest markers and waypoint trails. Hell Is Us throws you into a semi-open world where you navigate by reading the environment, picking up on visual cues, and trusting your gut. It's exploration as it was meant to be—immersive, uncertain, and deeply rewarding.

💀 Face the Manifestations of Trauma

Your enemies aren’t just monsters—they’re metaphors. Hollow Walkers, grotesque beings of sorrow and rage, are physical echoes of the past. Each encounter is a psychological battle, where the lines between inner pain and external threat blur completely.

🌫️ A War-Torn World Like No Other

Explore the decaying beauty of Hadea, a country suffocating in fog, littered with ruins, and fractured by endless conflict. Every structure and landscape tells a story—if you’re willing to look. This is not a place for the faint of heart. It’s a meditation in ruins.

🎮 Stylized Grit with a Purpose

Hell Is Us fuses striking, minimalist visuals with moody lighting and oppressive atmosphere. It’s less about photorealism and more about psychological realism—every frame a reflection of emotional decay and human suffering.

mac_games.title: Baki Hanma: Blood Arena
mac_games.description:
Immerse yourself in the brutal world of Baki Hanma: Blood Arena—a thrilling 2D fighting game inspired by the Netflix anime of the same name. Reminiscent of classic Super Punch-Out!!, the game combines precision, timing, and shayeon-style combat to deliver a dynamic combat experience.


Take on the role of the most determined fighter, striving to prove his strength.

Each opponent is a master of their own fighting style, presenting unique challenges and requiring different strategies to defeat.


Fight in iconic arenas, from underground clubs to majestic tournament stages.

Unleash explosive anime-inspired special moves to dominate your opponents.


Immerse yourself in an original soundtrack that captures the tension and emotion of the Baki universe.

Face your greatest enemy—the strongest creature alive—in a battle for the title of God of Fighting.

Are you ready to enter the arena and take your place among the strongest? Only the most skilled and determined will conquer the Blood Arena.

mac_games.title: Football Life Simulator
mac_games.description:
Football Life Simulator: The Beautiful Game, the Ugly Truth is an immersive life-management experience where the stadium lights shine brightest just as the shadows deepen. From the dusty backstreets of your hometown to the roaring arenas of global football stardom, you carve your path through triumph, temptation, failure, and fame. But behind every cheer is a cost—one paid in sweat, sacrifice, and the soul-crushing weight of expectation. Will you become a legend… or just another forgotten name in the archives of the sport?

Game Features:

Live the Dream—Or Survive the Nightmare:
Start from nothing. A kid with a ball, a dream, and a flicker of raw talent. Train, hustle, and grind your way through youth leagues, contract negotiations, and high-stakes matches. But success breeds pressure. Every goal, every miss, every scandal—it’s all part of your story. In Football Life Simulator, glory is never guaranteed, and the line between hero and villain is thinner than a referee’s whistle.

A Career Built on Choices:
Will you stay loyal to your boyhood club or chase the millions abroad? Speak your mind in interviews or keep your head down? Every decision shapes your path—on the pitch and off. Navigate relationships, rivalries, and relentless media scrutiny. Manage your money, fame, fitness, and mental health as the spotlight grows hotter. Because in football, it’s not just how you play—it’s how you live.

From Grassroots to Global Stage:
The world of football comes alive with breathtaking realism—from muddy Sunday league pitches to stadiums vibrating with 90,000 screaming fans. Explore dynamic seasons, unpredictable transfers, and a living, breathing ecosystem of teammates, coaches, agents, and fans. Your legend is forged in moments: a last-minute penalty, a brutal injury, a career-defining final. The question isn’t just whether you can win… but who you’ll become in the process.

Not Just a Game—A Life:
Football Life Simulator isn’t about controlling a player. It’s about becoming one. Feel the weight of expectation. The emptiness of defeat. The high of lifting a trophy. And the fear of losing it all. This isn’t just football—it’s the raw, unfiltered human story behind it.

mac_games.title: Need for Speed: Payback
mac_games.description:
Need for Speed, one of the leading gaming series, returns for revenge in the new Need for Speed ​​Payback.

Set in the shadowy world of Fortune Valley, you and your team are divided by betrayal and reunited by revenge. Your goal is to bring down the House, a notorious cartel that controls the city's gambling establishments, criminals, and police. In this rotten world, the stakes are high, but the cartel always wins.

Create unique cars, more beautiful and powerful than anything ever made before. Push them to the limit, escaping police pursuit at the last minute. From crazy heist missions to destructive car battles and jaw-dropping moments, Need for Speed™ Payback will fill you with adrenaline and keep you on your toes.


Key Features:

From scrap to stock, from stock to supercars. In Need for Speed ​​Payback, your car is always at the center of the action. Customize your cars with exceptional precision in each of the five classes—Race, Drift, Off-Road, Drag, and Runner—to ensure you consistently outperform your opponents.

Live for cars and racing. Play as three different characters united by a single goal: revenge. Tyler, Mac, and Jess join forces to even the odds and take part in the ultimate race that will allow them to take down the cartel known as The House. Battle the police on the roads, compete against rivals in the city, and race on asphalt and off-road, in mountains, canyons, and deserts.

- High-stakes competition. Win big with the new risk-and-reward gameplay. Intense police chases ensure the stakes are higher than ever. Compete with friends or potential rivals recommended by Autolog in events or head-to-head in classic online races.

mac_games.title: METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER
mac_games.description:
METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER is a masterfully reimagined tactical espionage action game that plunges players into the origin story of the legendary soldier, Big Boss. Developed with stunning modern visuals and faithful gameplay enhancements, this remake of the 2004 classic (Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater) brings the Cold War battlefield to life like never before. Stealth, survival, and sacrifice collide in a deep cinematic experience where the jungle is as much your enemy as the soldiers hunting you.

Game Features

🧊 The Birth of a Legend Step into the boots of Naked Snake as he’s sent deep behind enemy lines in Soviet territory during the height of the Cold War. Uncover the origins of the Metal Gear saga, face haunting betrayals, and make choices that shape the man who will become Big Boss.

🌿 Tactical Stealth in the Wild Use camouflage, sound, and survival tactics to outwit enemies in a living, breathing jungle. Creep through tall grass, climb trees, or crawl through mud as you stay hidden—or strike with deadly precision when the moment is right.

🔫 Combat & Survival Mechanics Scavenge for food, treat wounds in real-time, and manage stamina as you adapt to the unforgiving wilderness. Use CQC (Close Quarters Combat), an array of iconic weapons, and clever tactics to overcome elite operatives and deadly wildlife alike.

🎥 Cinematic Storytelling A gripping, emotional narrative crafted by legendary director Hideo Kojima, featuring unforgettable characters, dramatic plot twists, and philosophical themes about loyalty, identity, and the cost of war.

⚔️ Iconic Boss Battles Face off against the fearsome Cobra Unit—each boss a unique, high-concept encounter testing your skill, patience, and strategy in unexpected ways. From sniper duels to psychological warfare, these encounters are legendary for a reason.

🌀 Faithful Remake, Rebuilt in Unreal Engine 5 Experience the legendary story and gameplay of Snake Eater with modern graphics, enhanced controls, and audio improvements, all powered by Unreal Engine 5. Dense jungles, dynamic weather, and lifelike character models elevate every moment.

🎧 Immersive Audio & Modern Features Get lost in the atmospheric soundtrack, hear the jungle breathe around you, and relive iconic moments with richly re-recorded voice work and enhanced 3D sound design. DualSense support on PS5 adds immersive feedback to every sneaky step and brutal takedown.

mac_games.title: BeamNG.drive
mac_games.description:
BeamNG.drive plunges players into the ultimate vehicle simulation experience, blending ultra-realistic physics, open-world exploration, and thrilling destruction like never before. Powered by a cutting-edge soft-body physics engine, this game lets you dive deep into the world of realistic driving, crashes, and vehicle dynamics with stunning detail and unparalleled authenticity.

🚗 Experience True-to-Life Vehicle Physics
Feel every bump, turn, and collision with extraordinary realism. Every vehicle reacts uniquely to terrain, impacts, and mechanical failures thanks to BeamNG.drive’s revolutionary soft-body physics. Whether you’re drifting around corners or crashing at high speeds, every moment delivers dynamic and unpredictable gameplay.

🌍 Explore Massive Open Worlds
Navigate sprawling maps ranging from winding mountain roads to sprawling urban environments. The diverse landscapes offer endless opportunities for testing your driving skills, performing stunts, or simply enjoying the freedom of open-world driving. From smooth highways to rugged off-road trails, the world is yours to explore.

💥 Dynamic Crash Simulation Like No Other
Witness breathtaking, physics-driven vehicle destruction that reacts in real time. Frame-by-frame, see metal crumple, glass shatter, and parts fly off with astonishing detail. BeamNG.drive sets a new standard for crash realism—whether it’s a minor fender bender or a catastrophic pile-up, every collision is a spectacle.

🔧 Customize and Tweak Your Vehicles
Fine-tune your ride’s performance and appearance with extensive customization options. From engine modifications to suspension adjustments and visual upgrades, create your perfect machine. The game supports an active modding community, expanding the roster with new vehicles, maps, and gameplay modes.

🎮 Endless Gameplay Possibilities
From casual driving and time trials to intense challenges and multiplayer chaos, BeamNG.drive offers a wide variety of gameplay styles. Experiment with physics scenarios, build your own crash tests, or compete with friends in thrilling multiplayer modes that bring new life to vehicle simulation.

🖥️ Optimized for Immersive Play
BeamNG.drive combines detailed graphics with smooth performance on modern hardware, bringing its realistic physics and expansive worlds to life. Whether you’re cruising in 4K or streaming high-framerate gameplay, the game delivers an unparalleled driving and destruction experience.

mac_games.title: Chronos: Before the Ashes
mac_games.description:
In the role-playing game Chronos: Before the Ashes, you will find a fascinating story about a hero who dedicated his life to protecting his native lands from great evil. Explore the depths of a mysterious labyrinth, gain wisdom and become stronger.

But remember that the labyrinth does not forgive mistakes: each death will cost your hero a whole year of his life!



Role-playing adventure: an unusual combination of adventure game aspects and role-playing mechanics.



Multifaceted combat: Players can use a variety of abilities, powers, and weapons to achieve their goals.



Unique aging mechanics: after each death, the character becomes one year older. The young hero is agile and fast, and the elderly one is wise and skilled in magic - change your play style depending on your age and use all its advantages to your advantage.

mac_games.title: Ground of Aces
mac_games.description:
It's the beginning of World War II and you take command of a remote military airbase.

Prepare for missions, send pilots on missions and fight off attacks
Immerse yourself in World War II and feel the heat of battle from the perspective of your airbase personnel. It's your job to make sure everyone is physically and mentally prepared to perform their duties.

Plan, build and develop your own airbase
Build and manage a WWII airbase. Your personal haven for aircraft and crews. Complete freedom of construction. You plan and build every wall yourself.

Fly iconic WWII aircraft
Enjoy a variety of historic fighters. A joy for aviation enthusiasts who can tell a Hurricane from a Spitfire. But remember, a big plane requires a big infrastructure. So make sure your airbase can accommodate the most impressive aircraft of WWII.

Take care of your pilots and staff
Follow the personal stories of the airbase personnel. At your base, every person is important and has their own personality. The game draws inspiration from everyday life at remote airbases and the local atmosphere in both good and stressful times.

In the style of Franco-Belgian comics
The game was built from the start to look like a living comic book and to bring to life the style of these timeless works of art. From Bergese to Hergé: the attention to detail and the old masters' love for airplanes is exactly what we strive for.

mac_games.title: Little Witch in the Woods
mac_games.description:
Everyday life of a little witch as an apprentice
In Lukeryinsky ORTU, witches live together. They have built "Witch Houses" in different places and send their apprentice witches there. Apprentice witches must go to one of the "Witch Houses" and help the residents of a nearby village. If you successfully complete the training, you can become an official witch. Become Ellie's apprentice witch and get to know her everyday life!\n\n\nVarious Stories
Become the main character Ellie and go through the story to successfully complete the apprenticeship.
Put into practice the teachings received at the Witch School, help people and make the world a better place.
Befriend charming characters in the village and listen to their inner story. If you can become their best friend, you may learn their secret.\n\n\nActivities and Research
Collect and process materials to create potions! Potions will come in handy when solving problems.
Explore the mysterious fantasy world. You can find unique places and meet cute creatures there. Talk to different creatures and fill in the information in the witch's book!
Find the hidden place! You can get special items or find the shortest paths there.\n\n\nSlow Daily Life (to be updated later)
Socialize with new friends and learn about their tastes. If you give them a gift that matches their taste, you will be able to bond with your friends faster.
The witch and the cat are inseparable partners from a historical point of view. Socialize with cats living in different places. Each of them will be different from each other, as well as their appearance. If you meet a cat by fate, it may want to spend every day with you.
Sometimes you can go fishing and enjoy the peace. A relaxing rest will give you strength to go on an energetic adventure the next day.

mac_games.title: B.E.S.T
mac_games.description: BEST is an erotic visual novel with many important choices and several possible endings. Take part in various challenges! Help your friends or betray them! There is only one goal: to become the best. Only you can decide who you want to become! Are you ready to become the best student and win $500,000? When you come to the US for a semester to study Economics and Marketing, you find yourself an unwitting participant in a competition where you must excel in endurance tests, sports, knowledge tests, and form the right alliances with the right people to become the best. There were 100 of you at the start of the competition. In the end, there will be only one! The best! This game is a visual novel for adults, where against the backdrop of all the events, you participate in a competition as the main character. The whole story and success of our hero depends only on you! By making choices, you can become the best student and claim an award, or you can help or betray your friends, help them rise in the rankings ... or eliminate them. Make the right choices, make the right decisions, and form alliances with those who can best help you get through the competition. There is only one rule: stay in the competition and win!

mac_games.title: Grim Dawn
mac_games.description: Enter an apocalyptic fantasy world where humanity is on the brink of extinction, iron is more valuable than gold, and trust is hard to come by. This ARPG features complex character development, hundreds of unique items, crafting, and quests with choices and consequences.

mac_games.title: The Mildew Children
mac_games.description:
Children of Mold is a mix of a 2D adventure and a visual novel. It is a dark story about a village inhabited only by children who follow wild, primitive traditions. A young witch named Kirfel and her sisters must perform a nightmarish ritual to save the village. It is common for a witch to die during a ritual, as not everyone can cope with the Lady Death. But Kirfel is strong enough to challenge her. At least, that is what she thought.


The game's plot is inspired by the primitive folklore and beliefs of the peoples of the world, combining elements of a fairy tale and horror. Accompany Kirfel and her fellow sufferers in their bleak and fatal adventure. Explore the village, communicate with strange inhabitants, cast spells, and fight the illness that haunts the heroine - do everything to ensure that the great Ritual takes place!

mac_games.title: MY DESTINY GIRLS
mac_games.description:
MY DESTINY GIRLS is a fun dating simulation game that offers a unique and exciting experience through interactive real-time video. As soon as you wake up, you are surrounded by six beautiful girls, each showing their affection for you in different ways.


With different personalities, from sweet and kind to stubborn and bossy, you'll have to navigate their preferences and provide them with the happiness they deserve.



Will you be able to prove to them that love conquers all, regardless of material wealth, and become the one they have been waiting for?



Try to win the hearts of these beautiful girls!



There's always a girl out there for you.
Is it possible that you genuinely like them all? You know what they say: "the more the merrier" and "good girls like to be chased." So why not just spread the love around? Why limit yourself to just one? Only kids make choices, adults have it all!

mac_games.title: Resident Evil: Revelations 2
mac_games.description:
Resident Evil: Revelations 2 – Complete Edition plunges players into a gripping survival horror experience, blending tense action, eerie environments, and a chilling narrative. Developed by Capcom, this episodic adventure follows fan-favorite Claire Redfield and newcomer Moira Burton as they awaken in a nightmarish detention facility. Across shifting timelines, players also take control of Moira’s father, Barry Burton, who arrives on the island to find his missing daughter—only to encounter something far more sinister. With all episodes, bonus content, and Raid Mode included, this edition delivers the definitive way to experience the terror.

🧟‍♀️ Survive the Horror Together
Play as Claire Redfield and Moira Burton in a desperate bid for survival, then switch to Barry Burton and mysterious child Natalia as they uncover the truth behind the island’s monstrous transformation. Each pair features unique abilities—light-based support, brute force, stealth, and supernatural sensing—designed to complement both solo and co-op gameplay.

🏝️ A Twisted Island of Secrets
Explore an isolated island cloaked in darkness and dread. From abandoned prisons and crumbling laboratories to blood-soaked forests and underground facilities, every environment is laced with environmental puzzles, hidden items, and deadly traps. The story unfolds through two interwoven timelines, creating a layered mystery that builds with every revelation.

🔫 Tense Combat Meets Tactical Co-op
Manage limited resources, craft essential items, and fight off grotesque bio-organic weapons in real time. Use teamwork to overcome enemies—stun with flashlights, scan for weak points, or sneak past danger. Whether you're playing solo with AI support or in local split-screen co-op, coordination is the key to survival.

🧬 Unravel a Story of Betrayal and Mutation
Confront the horrors of bioterrorism and moral decay in a story that explores fear, trust, and redemption. As the truth behind the Overseer and her experiments comes to light, choices made across the campaign influence the outcome—offering multiple endings and powerful emotional payoffs.

🎮 Includes All Episodes, Extras & Raid Mode
This complete edition includes all four main episodes, two bonus chapters ("The Struggle" and "Little Miss"), and a fully featured Raid Mode—a fast-paced action mode with RPG elements, dozens of characters, hundreds of weapons, and online leaderboards. Customize your loadout and take on increasingly difficult challenges, solo or with a friend.

✨ Optimized for Modern Systems
Experience improved performance, sharper visuals, and reduced load times on current-gen platforms. Whether you're facing monsters in the dark or blasting through Raid Mode arenas, enjoy smooth and immersive gameplay designed to keep your heart racing.

mac_games.title: Harold Halibut
mac_games.description:
Harold Halibut is a handcrafted narrative game about friendship and life on a spaceship at the bottom of an alien ocean.


It's been 250 years since your home, a space ark, left Earth on the brink of the Cold War to find a habitable planet and save humanity.


Your name is Harold, you are a young assistant to the scientific director of the expedition, Jeanne Moreau. Most of the ship's inhabitants have long since resigned themselves to life aboard the sunken spaceship, but not Moreau. She is still looking for a way to raise the ship from the bottom and fly to a new planet, this time on dry land.


However, the strange, wonderful and diverse inhabitants of "Fedora I" also do not let Harold get bored... Until one fateful meeting plunges Harold into an unimaginable world... which contains the key to salvation.


Explore a vibrant retro-futuristic world with Harold and help him understand the true meaning of the word "home".


Features:
-Unique stop motion aesthetics: Every element in Harold Halibut was handcrafted using traditional sculpting and modeling techniques.


-Full Voice Acting: The incredible inhabitants of Fedora come to life with full English voice acting that elevates the game's story to cinematic levels.


-A wonderful cast of characters: Meet a variety of unique characters and discover their personalities, quirks, and stories through deep dialogue.


- Gripping Cinematic Storyline: Experience a thrilling adventure with a carefully crafted script that combines drama, humor and suspense.

mac_games.title: Particle Hearts
mac_games.description:
Particle Hearts is a third-person adventure game where you explore a world made entirely of particles. Use special abilities to manipulate particles, solve puzzles, avoid detection, and navigate this ominous yet beautiful land.

Befriend or fight
Along the way you will meet different creatures. Some of them will help you understand your purpose, while others will try to hide it from you.

Hidden Truth
Collect memories, find hidden paths, and explore your connection to this land where much is deceiving.

mac_games.title: Hollow Knight: Silksong
mac_games.description:
Explore a vast, cursed realm in Hollow Knight: Silksong! Uncover its secrets, fight, and struggle for your life as you rise to the heights of the lands ruled by silk and song.


Become a Princess Knight
Become the deadly huntress Hornet and journey through a kingdom ruled by silk and song! Though captured and forced into this strange world against your will, you must battle powerful enemies and solve ancient mysteries as you make a deadly pilgrimage to the very top of the kingdom.


Hollow Knight: Silksong is an epic sequel to the award-winning action-adventure game Hollow Knight. Journey through new lands, discover new abilities, battle hordes of monsters and insects, and uncover secrets about your identity and your past.

Game Features:
Discover Pharlum, the fallen kingdom of insects! Explore its mossy grottoes, golden cities, and mist-shrouded swamps, all the way to the shining citadel at the very top of the world.


Engage in acrobatic death matches! Weave between enemies in a swift and graceful dance of death, mastering a huge range of lethal moves.

Craft powerful weapons! Master an ever-expanding arsenal of weapons, traps, and mechanisms to crush your enemies and reach new heights.

Complete amazing quests! Track down rare monsters and uncover ancient secrets, fulfilling the wishes of the unfortunate and restoring hope to the inhabitants of the kingdom.

Fight more than 200 fierce enemies! Beasts and hunters, monsters and knights - defeat them all with courage and skill!

Crush over 40 legendary bosses! Fight renowned heroes and fallen kings in epic battles that will determine the fate of the realm.

Challenge yourself in the "Steel Soul" mode! Once you conquer the kingdom, you can test your skills in a new, even more severe test.

Enjoy a stunning orchestral soundtrack! Award-winning Hollow Knight composer Christopher Larkin has contributed music to the sequel. Your adventures will be accompanied by melancholic motifs, symphonic strings and heart-wrenching boss themes that will truly take your breath away.

mac_games.title: Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare
mac_games.description:
In Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare, Infinity Ward delivers a relentless, emotionally gripping war epic that redefined the first-person shooter genre. Set in a world teetering on the edge of chaos, players are thrown into the boots of elite soldiers navigating global conflict, covert operations, and moral ambiguity. From the war-torn streets of the Middle East to the frozen fields of Russia, every mission pulses with urgency, and every decision carries weight. In a war where the lines between right and wrong blur into smoke and fire, the cost of failure isn’t just measured in lives—but in the collapse of nations.

Game Features:

Global Conflict, Personal Sacrifice:
Modern Warfare pulls players into a cinematic campaign that spans the globe—where no battlefield is safe, and no soldier is untouched by the horrors of war. Play as members of the SAS and USMC, experiencing the fight from multiple perspectives. Whether storming enemy compounds under cover of darkness or surviving a nuclear aftermath, every moment is a test of resolve, skill, and conscience.

Unflinching Realism and Tactical Warfare:
Modern Warfare trades fantasy for grit, delivering grounded, high-stakes combat rooted in real-world tactics and weaponry. From precise airstrikes to stealth infiltrations, the game balances large-scale warfare with heart-pounding, intimate skirmishes. Enemies don’t respawn—they adapt, flank, and fight like soldiers trained for the very same war you’re fighting to end.

A Moment That Changed Gaming Forever:
With unforgettable set-pieces like the AC-130 gunship mission, the heart-wrenching demise in a nuclear blast, and the desperate final stand on a collapsing bridge, Modern Warfare isn’t just played—it’s survived. These are the moments that etched themselves into gaming history, not for shock, but for the way they confronted players with the human cost of modern war.

Multiplayer Revolution:
Beyond the campaign, Modern Warfare reshaped online gaming with a progression system that became the gold standard. Create custom classes, earn killstreaks, and master every weapon in a fast-paced, competitive battlefield where every second counts and every shot could be your last. It’s not just war—it’s war evolved.

mac_games.title: inZOI
mac_games.description:
inZOI is a life simulation game where players take on the role of creators, shaping the world according to their vision and witnessing the diverse stories that unfold within it.

Through an immersive interface, we aim to show players that life is worth appreciating as a great gift, as a journey where every step matters.

Try on a variety of roles brought to life with realistic graphics!

What sets inZOI apart is its simulation of a fully functioning community where characters known as Zoes live their lives the way they want.

Zoeys perform actions and build relationships based on their personalities and life experiences, which leads to unexpected turns such as rumors, trends, and illnesses.

Take control of cities inspired by real-life ones and change the weather, terrain, and streets to create the perfect backdrop for your stories, all rendered in stunning, realistic graphics powered by Unreal Engine 5.


Bring your fantasies to life with unlimited customization!

inZOI provides advanced customization tools, allowing creators to create their own unique character and make their dreams come true.

Choose from over 250 customization options to create your own unique Zoe, changing everything from her hair, skin, and body type to her clothes, accessories, manicure, and more.

Mix and match architectural elements such as walls, roofs, stairs, fences, platforms and gates to create unique structures. Decorate rooms with different elements and change furniture to your taste to make every detail unique.

Bring your character to life using inZOI's facial and motion capture capabilities and create stunning videos in the world of your choice.


Experience the joy of creativity without boundaries!

inZOI uses a local generative AI model to provide creators with additional customization options for an intuitive creative process.

Enter text queries to create special patterns and images to customize clothing, decorations and furniture to your taste. 

Turn 2D models into in-game 3D objects or create character movements from uploaded videos.

Use these powerful tools to bring your imagination to life! Freedom of creativity promises endless possibilities!

mac_games.title: Oceanhorn 2
mac_games.description:
Oceanhorn 2: Knights of the Lost Realm Golden Edition is out! Want to go on an RPG journey you'll never forget? This is the best version of the game to date, featuring brand new content, quests, items, and upgrades!



Grand adventure

The game Oceanhorn 2: Knights of the Lost Realm takes place a thousand years before the events of the first part of the game. You will have to go on a magical journey through various corners of Gaia with their numerous ancient beliefs and legends. The return of the sorcerer Mezmeroth with a huge army of Darkness poses an almost impossible task for the young knight. Will our hero be able to unite the Soba, the Gills and people in the fight for the future of this world?



This time you are not alone

You will have companions on your journey. Trin, the granddaughter of the ruler of Arcadia Archimedes, and Jen, a mysterious robot with ancient samurai weapons, will help you fight against the army of Darkness Mezmeroth. You will be able to lead your allies in battle or ask them for help in solving difficult puzzles using contextual commands!



Fight, decide, study

The game has become bigger, better and more diverse! Oceanhorn 2 is not only one of the most beautiful adventure games, but also a unique gameplay that will please all fans of classic video games. Collect magic items, shoot from a spell thrower, solve mysterious puzzles of the ancients and explore all the secrets of Arcadia and neighboring kingdoms! Accept the challenge and become a real hero.

mac_games.title: Batman: Arkham Knight
mac_games.description:
Batman: Arkham Knight plunges you into the dark heart of Gotham like never before—an explosive, cinematic finale to the acclaimed Arkham trilogy. Developed by Rocksteady Studios, this next-gen masterpiece fuses gritty storytelling, blistering combat, and open-world exploration into the ultimate Batman experience. Face your fears as the Caped Crusader in a city under siege, where legendary foes rise and a new, mysterious enemy emerges to break the Bat once and for all.

🦇 Be the Batman Step into the armored boots of the world’s greatest detective and wield an arsenal of high-tech gadgets, martial arts prowess, and stealth skills. From brutal freeflow combat to silent takedowns and forensic investigation, every tool of the Bat is at your disposal. Become the Dark Knight Gotham needs—and the one it deserves.

🚓 Drive the Batmobile Tear through the streets with the fully drivable Batmobile, reimagined with tank-like power and high-speed pursuit capabilities. Shift between battle mode and chase mode in an instant as you solve puzzles, overcome obstacles, and engage in explosive combat. The Batmobile isn’t just a vehicle—it’s a weapon.

🌃 Gotham Under Siege The Scarecrow has returned to unite Gotham’s most dangerous villains—including Harley Quinn, the Penguin, Two-Face, and the mysterious Arkham Knight—in a deadly plan to destroy the Dark Knight. Explore a vast, richly detailed Gotham City turned warzone, where every rooftop, alley, and shadow holds danger and opportunity.

⚔️ Master the Art of Fear Take down enemies with lightning-fast strikes and psychological warfare. Use Fear Takedowns to eliminate multiple foes before they can react, and seamlessly transition between combat and stealth in a world where control is everything. Adapt, evolve, and dominate your enemies with Batman’s unmatched tactical versatility.

🎮 Next-Gen Gotham Built exclusively for next-gen platforms, Arkham Knight showcases Gotham like never before with stunning graphics, dynamic weather effects, and immersive sound design. Experience uninterrupted open-world gameplay with no loading screens and a city that truly lives—and dies—by your actions.

🔥 The Epic Finale This is the end of the Arkham saga—the final chapter in Batman’s story. Packed with twists, betrayals, and unforgettable moments, Batman: Arkham Knight delivers a powerful, emotional conclusion to the Dark Knight’s journey. Can you face your greatest fears… and survive?

mac_games.title: Devil May Cry 5
mac_games.description:
Devil May Cry 5 – Special Edition unleashes stylish, high-octane demon-slaying action with cutting-edge visuals, blistering speed, and the return of legendary devil hunters. Developed by CAPCOM, this adrenaline-pumping entry in the iconic Devil May Cry series raises the bar for action games with stunning next-gen enhancements, multiple playable characters, and the debut of fan-favorite Vergil as a playable character. Experience a thrilling tale of demonic invasion, fueled by attitude, flair, and unforgettable combat.

🗡️ Stylish Action. Insane Combos.
Take control of three unique demon hunters—Nero, Dante, and the enigmatic V—each with radically different playstyles, weapons, and abilities. Chain together devastating combos, juggle enemies mid-air, and unleash over-the-top special attacks with unmatched flair. Push your skills to the limit in a game where style matters just as much as strength.

🌆 A City on the Brink
The hellish roots of a demonic tree tear through Red Grave City, plunging the world into chaos. As demonic forces swarm the streets, Nero and his allies must uncover the truth behind the invasion and stop a catastrophe of apocalyptic proportions. Each mission reveals more of the gripping narrative, packed with sharp dialogue, unexpected twists, and cinematic spectacle.

💥 Fast, Fluid, and Fierce Combat
Built on Capcom’s powerful RE Engine, Devil May Cry 5 delivers lightning-fast combat with pinpoint responsiveness. Use Nero’s customizable Devil Breaker arms, unleash Dante’s iconic arsenal, or summon nightmarish creatures with V. Every fight is a sandbox of destruction—perfect your technique, rack up style points, and let your enemies know who’s boss.

😈 Play as Vergil
The Special Edition introduces Vergil—Dante’s cold and calculating brother—as a fully playable character with his own campaign. Wield the Yamato, summon shadow clones, and slice through enemies with precise, elegant brutality. Vergil brings a new layer of challenge and depth for series veterans and newcomers alike.

🎮 Enhanced for Next-Gen Systems
Experience the ultimate version of Devil May Cry 5 with stunning ray tracing, enhanced textures, faster load times, and silky-smooth performance. Choose between high framerate modes or jaw-dropping 4K visuals. The addition of Turbo Mode (20% faster gameplay) and Legendary Dark Knight difficulty floods the screen with enemies for the most intense action yet.

🔥 Pure Demon-Slaying Bliss
Whether you're a longtime fan or new to the series, Devil May Cry 5 – Special Edition delivers the definitive demon-hunting experience—brimming with attitude, elegance, and adrenaline-pumping action. Style never dies.

mac_games.title: The Rogue Prince of Persia
mac_games.description:
The Rogue Prince of Persia is a roguelite action platformer that takes the classic wall-running and action-packed combat of the beloved Prince of Persia series and turns it into a fast-paced, action-packed adventure from Evil Empire, a studio whose first experience was working on post-release content for one of the most famous roguelite action games.


Seamlessly transition from platforming to combat and use acrobatic abilities to outsmart your enemies. Run along walls to find new attack opportunities, avoid traps and open up new areas. Combine attacks and dodges to break through enemy lines without a scratch.


After a fierce battle against the mage invaders, you awaken in an Oasis far from the capital and rush to the city to stop the brutal invasion. If you die, your mysterious bola will take you back to the Oasis in time, allowing you to rush into battle again and again. In this non-linear narrative, you will discover new areas, characters, and lore as you try to find a way to save Persia.


Switch between a variety of deadly weapons during each playthrough, use and upgrade medallions to expand your selection of moves and unlock devastating combos. Change your gear at any time to adapt to the situation, or stick with the one you like best - the choice is yours!


Each playthrough unlocks new medallions, weapons, difficulty modifiers, and more, so you'll always find something interesting to do. Plus, the levels are procedurally generated, so each foray into the city will present new challenges.

mac_games.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
mac_games.description:
The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt – Complete Edition immerses players in a vast, richly detailed fantasy world where choices matter and monsters are real. Developed by CD PROJEKT RED and now enhanced for modern systems, this award-winning RPG follows Geralt of Rivia, a seasoned monster slayer for hire, as he navigates a war-torn continent in search of his missing adopted daughter. With upgraded visuals, faster loading times, and all DLC and expansions included, this is the ultimate way to experience one of the most celebrated role-playing games of all time.
\n\n
⚔️ Become the White Wolf \n
Take on the role of Geralt of Rivia, a legendary Witcher trained from childhood to hunt and destroy deadly beasts. Armed with twin swords, powerful combat magic, and monster-hunting instincts, you’ll face off against everything from twisted specters to cunning human foes. Make choices that shape the fate of kingdoms—and live with the consequences.
\n\n
🌍 A Massive, Dynamic Open World \n
Explore a sprawling continent full of living, breathing cities, treacherous wilderness, and mysterious ruins. From the gritty alleys of Novigrad to the storm-lashed Skellige Isles, every region is teeming with detail, hidden quests, and dynamic encounters. Hunt monsters, solve mysteries, and dive into countless stories as you roam this beautifully realized fantasy world.
\n\n
🩸 Deep and Tactical Combat \n
Master a fluid combat system that rewards strategy and preparation. Brew potions, craft bombs, oil your blades, and wield Signs—magical spells that can stun, burn, or confuse enemies. Each encounter is a chance to think like a Witcher: observe, adapt, and strike with deadly precision.
\n\n
📜 A Story Rich with Choices and Consequences \n
Unravel a dark and emotionally charged narrative where your decisions truly matter. As the Wild Hunt closes in and political intrigue tears the world apart, Geralt must face complex moral dilemmas and form uneasy alliances. No good deed goes unpunished—and some monsters wear human faces.
\n\n
🧛 Includes All Expansions and DLC \n
Experience the full saga with both massive story expansions: Hearts of Stone and Blood and Wine. Take on new quests, face terrifying new monsters, and explore entirely new regions, including the majestic land of Toussaint. Bonus content like additional armor sets, quests, and gear is all bundled in.
\n\n
✨ Enhanced for Modern Hardware \n
Enjoy next-gen improvements including ray-traced lighting, enhanced textures, improved foliage and shadows, and faster load times. Performance and quality modes let you tailor the experience to your playstyle, whether you’re aiming for buttery-smooth framerates or jaw-dropping visuals in 4K.

mac_games.title: Silent Hill 2
mac_games.description:
Silent Hill 2: A Descent into Guilt and Madness is a haunting, psychological horror masterpiece developed by Team Silent, where players are drawn into the fog-shrouded town of Silent Hill—a place where reality twists into nightmare, and the past refuses to stay buried. Driven by a mysterious letter from his deceased wife, James Sunderland arrives seeking answers, only to confront a truth far more disturbing than he could have imagined. In Silent Hill, the boundaries between guilt, grief, and hell are paper-thin—and James must descend into the heart of his own darkness to find the answers that wait in the fog.



Game Features:


Uncover the Horrors of a Twisted Mind:

Silent Hill is no ordinary town—it's a mirror to the soul, reflecting the darkest corners of the human psyche. As James searches for his lost love, he must confront the manifestations of his own guilt and trauma, each one more grotesque and personal than the last. What begins as a search for closure becomes a psychological trial where nothing is as it seems—and the truth may be the most terrifying thing of all.



Atmospheric Terror and Emotional Storytelling:

Silent Hill 2 delivers dread not through jump scares, but through creeping unease, unsettling symbolism, and a story that cuts deep. The town itself is a character—filled with shifting corridors, whispering shadows, and grotesque monsters like the iconic Pyramid Head. The game’s narrative unfolds in layers, inviting players to piece together James’ fractured memories and uncover the hidden sins that haunt him.



A Town Lost to Fog and Memory:

Silent Hill is rendered in oppressive detail—abandoned hospitals, decrepit hotels, and fog-drenched streets form a maze of despair and decay. The world pulses with eerie sound design and a chilling ambient score by Akira Yamaoka, ensuring every step through the mist feels like walking deeper into a dream you can’t wake from. Choices matter, and your actions shape the ending—each one revealing a different facet of the truth, or a deeper layer of madness.

mac_games.title: Dead Island 2
mac_games.description:
Los Angeles is under quarantine, the army has retreated. The future of the city (and all of humanity) depends only on you and a handful of people who have proven resistant to the pathogen. Dead Island 2 is a colorful, stylish and zombie-infested action game. Check out the blood-stained streets of LA Meet crazy characters. Chop countless hordes of enemies into pieces. Develop and become the coolest zombie exterminator!





Dead Island 2 is a colorful, stylish and zombie-infested action game. Check out the blood-soaked streets of LA Meet crazy characters. Chop countless hordes of enemies into pieces. Grow and become the coolest zombie exterminator!





Features:

Explore L-HELL! Dead Island 2 takes players to iconic locations in the City of Angels, now gripped by horror. Roam like a boss, from the green spaces of Beverly Hills to the quaint boardwalk of Venice Beach!





- Incredible scope for cruelty! The most intense, realistic and bloody first-person battles await you, and the variety of weapons and tactics will not let you get bored while clearing the zombie horde. Cut, chop, burn and tear: feel all the realism of madness.





-Become the best zombie exterminator! Choose one of six playable characters, each with their own unique personality traits and lines. Each exterminator's abilities can be customized, and a new skill system allows you to instantly reorganize and try out any, even the craziest, tactics.





-Zombie Invasion! Are you ready for the most advanced dismemberment system in gaming? LA is full of zombies that look and act like the real thing. These poor mutants are the rotting, dead heart of Dead Island 2: there are dozens of zombie varieties with their own mutations and attacks, as well as hundreds of Los Angeles-style appearances. Your enemies are true Angelenos, stubborn and resilient. Will you survive?

mac_games.title: Sniper Elite 4
mac_games.description:
Discover the freedom of sniping in the most advanced WWII shooter of all time. Experience tactical third-person combat, gameplay choices, and incredible long-range shots as you wager a campaign to liberate Italy from the yoke of fascism.

\n\n

Sniper Elite 4 takes place after the events of its successful predecessor, transporting players to the beautiful Italian peninsula, from sun-drenched Mediterranean coastal cities to ancient forests, mountain valleys and colossal Nazi megastructures.


\n\n
Undercover agent and elite sniper Karl Fairburne must fight alongside the brave men and women of the Italian resistance to defeat a terrible new threat that could hammer the Allied advance into Europe.
\n\n


EXTENSIVE CAMPAIGN\n
Experience hours of action-packed gameplay across massive campaign levels with hundreds of enemies, vehicles, and high-ranking Nazi officers to hunt down. Fight your way to your targets, complete new sniper challenges, discover secret side missions, collectibles, and more!
\n\n


AWARD-WINNING SNIPER SHOOTING\n
Experience best-in-class rifle ballistics that take into account wind, gravity and pulse to make accurate shots over hundreds of yards.
\n\n


WIDE ARSENAL\n
Adapt to any combat situation with an impressive selection of WWII weapons, from sniper rifles, pistols and machine guns to heavy weapons, traps, grenades and explosives.
\n\n


DEEP CUSTOMIZATION\n
Increase your combat effectiveness by upgrading your skills and key weapon parameters such as scope power, muzzle velocity, and stability. Create and edit custom loadouts for any combat situation.
\n\n


STEALTHY MOVEMENT AND ELIMINATORS\n
Climb, hang, sidestep, and run through vast game environments. Take deadly shots from cover, hanging off edges, and many other unexpected places.

\n\n

FAMOUS X-RAY KILL CAM The acclaimed\n
X-Ray Kill Cam returns in Sniper Elite with new features and visuals. Now it also shows your most impressive melee attacks and trap kills, all in incredible, stunning detail.

mac_games.title: Toy Shire
mac_games.description:
Your family gave you new toys. Isn't that wonderful? Oh, that's the word...

\n\n

There is a small problem with the old toys. They are no longer played with - they have simply been forgotten. So what happens next? They have united against you and are going to attack your new toys. But it is not time to worry! You are lucky, because your new toys are troops of green soldiers. But they can’t cope without you! Control your troops and defeat the angry old toys! But be careful: you will see some of them for the first time!
\n\n

Interactive Tower Defense\n
Towers alone are not enough to win. To repel an attack, line up your troops in the most advantageous positions and then attack the enemy. Never abandon your towers and place your troops taking into account the enemy's characteristics. The enemy will first try to break through the defense. Help your army by building and strengthening towers. Don't forget to use unique abilities.
\n\n

Epic Battles\n
Defend your base during enemy waves. To win, you need to organize your troops correctly. Clear paths and guard newly opened routes. Upgrade your troops and unlock new soldiers to survive all the waves and win.

\n\n

World of Toys\n
Immerse yourself in a world and story built around the toys of your childhood, including toy soldiers, dinosaurs, robots, building blocks and more.

\n\n
Various maps\n
To continue the journey, you must defeat old toys that are scattered throughout the house, starting with your room. Remember that enemy troops appear in different places! To better cope with the enemy's attack, build towers taking into account its features. In some locations, you will fight on other battlefields. During the battle, you can stumble upon a number of events that can greatly affect the course of the battle.

mac_games.title: Into the Dead: Our Darkest Days
mac_games.description:
