Into the Dead: Our Darkest Days is a side-scrolling survival game about shelters. You will lead and lead a group of survivors in the midst of a zombie apocalypse to safety. Craft weapons, collect resources, balance your group's needs, and try to keep everyone alive and safe!

\n \n 

Texas, 1980. The seaside town of Walton was recently a huge metropolis suffering from the heat of the economic crisis. Everything changed when a wave of zombie epidemic reached the shores of the United States. Hordes of the living dead quickly took over Walton, and the few survivors were cut off from outside help. A group of ordinary people are forced to stick together to escape the city.

\n \n 

ACT THOUGHTFUL
\n 
- Gather a group of ordinary people shocked by a monstrous zombie apocalypse in their hometown.

\n 

-Build upgradeable shelters to house survivors and protect them from zombies, but remember: sooner or later, zombies will break through any barriers.

\n 

-Move from shelter to shelter to stay one step ahead of the advancing hordes of the living dead. Every night, the barricades shake under the onslaught of terrible zombies. If they manage to break through, the survivors will face a brutal reprisal.

\n 

- Monitor the group's condition - physically, so they don't die of hunger or exhaustion, and mentally, so they don't lose hope. Help survivors cope with any injuries - broken ribs or nightmares.


\n \n 
ADAPT TO CIRCUMSTANCES
\n 
-Scavenge the ruins of Walton for precious resources, risking the lives of your comrades who may die in a skirmish with zombies or other survivors. The key to survival is a silent kill.


\n 
Will you choose to sneak away or grab any weapon you can and engage in brutal combat with zombies? Born fighters are rare, but when desperate, people will do anything to survive.

\n 

-Invite other survivors to join the group or get rid of them and take their resources.


\n \n 
DO EVERYTHING TO SURVIVE
\n 
-Your humanity is about to be put to a severe test: decide who will live, who will die, and who will have to be abandoned.

mac_games.title: Marvel’s Spider-Man Remastered
mac_games.description:
Marvel’s Spider-Man Remastered swings players into a thrilling superhero experience, combining fast-paced action, heartfelt storytelling, and the exhilarating freedom of web-slinging through a stunningly recreated New York City. Developed by Insomniac Games and fully remastered for modern systems, this definitive edition follows Peter Parker as he balances the responsibilities of a young scientist and the weight of being Spider-Man. Packed with enhanced visuals, performance upgrades, and all DLC content, Marvel’s Spider-Man Remastered is the ultimate way to experience one of the most beloved superhero games ever made.
\n\n
🕸️ Become the Ultimate Spider-Man\n
Step into the suit of an experienced Peter Parker who’s been fighting crime for years. With advanced combat abilities, acrobatic web-slinging, and a fully realized city to protect, you’ll feel what it’s like to truly be Spider-Man. Fight iconic villains, protect innocent lives, and navigate Peter’s complex personal life as you uncover a sinister new threat to the city.
\n\n
🌆 A Living, Breathing New York City\n
Explore a vibrant and immersive Manhattan filled with bustling streets, dynamic weather, and lifelike cityscapes. From rooftop battles to alleyway rescues, every inch of the open world is alive with detail and activity. Whether you’re swinging between skyscrapers or chasing down criminals, the city feels like a character of its own.
\n\n
⚔️ Fluid and Cinematic Combat\n
Engage in intense, high-flying combat that seamlessly blends melee, gadgets, stealth, and acrobatics. Use Spider-Man’s full arsenal—including web bombs, trip mines, and finishers—to take down enemies with style. Every encounter is a chance to be creative, agile, and efficient.
\n\n
🎭 A Powerful, Character-Driven Story \n
Experience a gripping narrative that balances superhero stakes with Peter Parker’s personal challenges. As his world begins to collide with powerful enemies like Mister Negative, the Kingpin, and more, Peter must confront what it truly means to be a hero. Emotional depth, well-written characters, and unforgettable moments make this one of the most compelling stories in gaming.
\n\n
🧥 Iconic Suits and Customization \n
Unlock over two dozen Spider-Man suits from across comics, films, and original designs—each with unique powers and visual flair. Mix and match suit abilities and gadgets to create your ideal playstyle and look.
\n\n
🎮 Enhanced for Modern Hardware \n
Remastered with ray-traced reflections, updated textures, improved shadows, and performance modes for high framerates and 4K resolution, this version looks and plays better than ever. Whether you're swinging at 60 FPS or marveling at the intricate city details, the remaster delivers a polished and immersive experience.

mac_games.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
mac_games.description:
Red Dead Redemption 2 is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Rockstar Games that transports players to the heart of America’s late 1800s, a time when the Wild West was on the brink of extinction. The game follows Arthur Morgan, a seasoned outlaw and member of the Van der Linde gang, as he navigates the complexities of loyalty, survival, and redemption in a rapidly changing world. With its stunning, vast landscapes, compelling story, and richly detailed world, Red Dead Redemption 2 offers an unforgettable journey into the fading frontier of the American West.



Game Features:



Immersive Open-World Experience:
 Red Dead Redemption 2 offers one of the most expansive and detailed open worlds ever created, featuring dense forests, snow-covered mountains, bustling towns, and lawless plains. Every corner of the world is meticulously crafted, from the wildlife to the weather, creating a living, breathing environment that feels truly alive. Players can hunt, fish, rob trains, or simply explore, with endless activities and secrets to uncover.



A Deep and Emotional Story:
 At its heart, Red Dead Redemption 2 is a gripping tale of camaraderie, betrayal, and the struggle for survival in a vanishing world. Players step into the shoes of Arthur Morgan, whose journey is tied to the Van der Linde gang’s rise and fall. As Arthur grapples with his past and his moral compass, the game unfolds with complex characters, high-stakes drama, and emotional moments that make every decision feel weighty.



Rich, Dynamic Characters:
 The members of the Van der Linde gang are unforgettable, each with their own distinct personalities, motives, and relationships. From the charismatic Dutch to the unpredictable Micah, the gang’s diverse members give life to the story and create a sense of camaraderie and tension. Arthur’s interactions with these characters shape his journey, leading to moments of humor, heartache, and intense drama.



Realistic Gameplay and Mechanics:
 The game delivers an unparalleled level of realism, from its intricate horse mechanics to its detailed combat systems. Players must tend to their horse, maintain their weapons, and hunt for food to survive in the harsh environments. The game’s slow-burn pace encourages thoughtful exploration and decision-making, rewarding players who take the time to engage with its systems.



Unforgettable Setting:
 Set against the backdrop of a dying Wild West, Red Dead Redemption 2 immerses players in a world on the cusp of modernity. The landscapes are breathtakingly beautiful, from sprawling plains to dense swamps, each area brimming with its own unique character. The game’s atmospheric world-building, along with its dynamic weather system and time-of-day cycles, brings the Old West to life in a way that few games ever have.



Epic Action and Combat:
 Red Dead Redemption 2 offers thrilling, fast-paced gunfights, intense brawls, and stealthy encounters. Whether engaging in shootouts with rival gangs, chasing down bounty targets, or defending the gang’s camp, the combat is fluid and highly engaging. The game also features a vast array of weapons, each with its own unique feel, allowing players to approach combat in a way that suits their playstyle.

mac_games.title: Cyberpunk 2077: Ultimate
mac_games.description:
Step into the neon-lit streets of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, a sprawling open-world RPG where technology, corruption, and rebellion collide. Become V, a mercenary in search of fame, fortune, and answers in a city ruled by powerful corporations, criminal syndicates, and dangerous tech. Navigate a world where every choice has consequences, and your destiny is shaped by your actions. 





SURVIVE IN THE UNDERBELLY OF NIGHT CITY

Dive into a high-tech, dystopian world where danger lurks at every corner. Navigate the vibrant, chaotic streets of Night City, filled with ruthless gangs, corrupt corporations, and powerful figures. Whether you're battling foes in the seedy underworld or climbing the corporate ladder, survival in this city requires skill, wit, and ruthless determination.




EXPERIENCE TRUE FREEDOM OF CHOICE

Shape your character and your story with complete freedom. Customize V's abilities, appearance, and skills, tailoring your playstyle to your preferences. Choose how to approach missions—whether through brutal combat, smooth hacking, or persuasive dialogue. The choices you make influence the world around you, from the fate of allies to the political landscape of Night City itself.




ENGAGE IN HIGH-OCTANE ACTION AND STEALTH

Fight your way through intense combat scenarios or avoid the chaos altogether with stealth and hacking skills. Use an arsenal of advanced weapons, cybernetic enhancements, and quick-thinking tactics to take on enemies in fast-paced, dynamic encounters. Whether you’re gunning down foes in a shootout or disabling systems from the shadows, each mission offers multiple ways to succeed.




UNCOVER A WEB OF INTRIGUE AND CONSPIRACY

Unravel the tangled web of corruption, betrayal, and secrets that lies beneath Night City’s shining surface. Join forces with a diverse cast of characters, from rogue AIs to rebels seeking revolution. Discover hidden agendas, and dive deep into the corporate wars and personal vendettas that fuel the city’s power struggles. Every lead takes you deeper into a conspiracy with life-changing implications.




THRIVE IN A WORLD OF CYBERNETIC ENHANCEMENTS AND LIMITLESS POSSIBILITIES

Enhance your body and mind with cyberware that grants new abilities and powers, pushing your limits to the extreme. Hack into systems, manipulate environments, or enhance your reflexes for combat, all while dealing with the ethical dilemmas of becoming more machine than human. Your journey is not just about survival—it's about becoming something greater in a world where technology is both a gift and a curse.

mac_games.title: KENA: Bridge of Spirits
mac_games.description:
Kena: Bridge of Spirits is a breathtaking action-adventure game that blends exploration, puzzle-solving, and emotional storytelling. Set in a vibrant world filled with lush forests, ancient ruins, and powerful spirits, you play as Kena, a young spirit guide tasked with helping lost souls find peace. Developed by Ember Lab, Kena: Bridge of Spirits immerses you in a captivating journey to restore balance to the natural world and uncover long-lost secrets.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🌿 A Beautiful, Living World\n
Explore a visually stunning and emotionally rich world filled with lush environments, mystical ruins, and captivating creatures. Every corner of the forest tells a story, with detailed landscapes and dynamic lighting creating an enchanting atmosphere that draws you deeper into the heart of the adventure.
\n\n
🌟 A Journey of Healing and Discovery\n
Join Kena, a young spirit guide, as she uncovers the ancient secrets of a forgotten village and helps the spirits trapped in its cursed realm. Use your magical staff and the aid of tiny spirit companions called the Rot to solve puzzles, combat dark forces, and restore harmony to the land.
\n\n
🎮 Dynamic Combat and Exploration\n
Engage in fast-paced, action-packed combat with fluid, dynamic mechanics that challenge your agility and strategy. Each encounter requires skill and careful timing as you battle corrupted spirits and powerful foes. The world is full of hidden secrets, so explore every nook and cranny to uncover treasures and powerful abilities.
\n\n
🎙️ Heartfelt Storytelling with a Powerful Cast\n
Kena’s journey is enriched by a touching narrative that explores themes of growth, grief, and redemption. The game’s beautifully crafted world and emotional depth are enhanced by an evocative score and dialogue, with every moment designed to pull you deeper into the experience.
\n\n
🧩 Challenging Puzzles and Mindful Progression\n
Solve intricate environmental puzzles and uncover hidden paths as you use the Rot to manipulate objects, interact with the world, and unlock new areas. Your bond with the Rot will grow stronger as you progress, helping you discover new abilities and tools needed to tackle even tougher challenges.
\n\n
🖥️ Optimized for Performance and Immersion\n
Built for modern hardware, Kena: Bridge of Spirits delivers a smooth, visually stunning experience on both PlayStation and PC platforms. With its seamless integration of high-quality graphics, intuitive controls, and immersive sound design, the game creates an unforgettable experience. Whether on PS5 or PC, you can expect crisp visuals and smooth performance, drawing you into the world of Kena.

mac_games.title: Twelve Minutes
mac_games.description:
Twelve Minutes is a gripping, real-time interactive thriller that traps you in a time loop, forcing you to relive the same chilling scenario over and over—until you break the cycle. Developed by Luís António and published by Annapurna Interactive, this top-down, point-and-click psychological drama unfolds entirely within a single apartment. With every reset, you uncover new layers of a mystery that’s as intimate as it is terrifying. Time is both your enemy and your weapon.
\n\n

Game Features:\n\n
⏳ A Time Loop Thriller Like No Other\n
Live the same 12-minute sequence again and again as you attempt to change your fate—and your wife's. A romantic evening turns violent when a police officer breaks into your home and accuses your wife of murder. Each loop gives you new knowledge, but time resets whether you’re ready or not.
\n\n
🕵️ Unravel a Twisted Narrative\n
Piece together the truth through careful observation and manipulation. Every conversation, movement, and decision leads to new revelations. There’s no dialogue tree—just natural, dynamic interactions that reflect your knowledge of past loops.
\n\n
🎙️ Star-Studded Voice Cast\n
Featuring powerful performances by James McAvoy, Daisy Ridley, and Willem Dafoe, the game delivers emotional depth and tension with every word spoken. Their nuanced performances add weight to your choices and the consequences that follow.
\n\n
🧠 Branching Possibilities, Multiple Endings\n
How far will you go to protect the ones you love—or uncover the truth? The more you learn, the more options open up, with dozens of paths to explore and secrets to unlock. The ending you reach depends on what you know and how you use it.
\n\n
🎮 Minimalist Interface, Maximum Immersion\n
With a simple point-and-click system and a tight, one-room setting, Twelve Minutes focuses your attention where it matters most: the choices, the characters, and the clock. No HUD, no distractions—just pure narrative immersion.
\n\n
🖥️ Optimized for macOS\n
Experience smooth gameplay on your Mac with Retina-ready visuals, native Apple Silicon support (M1/M2), and full mouse/trackpad compatibility. Whether you’re on a MacBook or iMac, the game runs beautifully across modern macOS devices.

mac_games.title: ASYLUM
mac_games.description:
Asylum is a deeply atmospheric, first-person psychological horror adventure set within the crumbling halls of the Hanwell Mental Institute—an abandoned asylum that hides decades of unspeakable torment. Developed by Senscape, the creators of Scratches, Asylum invites you to explore a chilling and immersive world where reality fractures, sanity slips, and the truth may be more horrifying than the madness itself.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n
🧠 A Journey Into Madness\n
Uncover the dark legacy of the Hanwell Mental Institute, a place once meant for healing—now twisted by secrets, trauma, and malevolent forces. Step into the shoes of a former patient returning to confront buried memories, forgotten horrors, and the truth lurking behind locked doors.
\n\n
🏚️ Exploration-Driven Psychological Horror\n
Navigate an enormous, fully explorable asylum rendered with painstaking detail. Investigate every room, corridor, and shadow to uncover hidden lore, documents, and interactive puzzles that unravel the mystery of the institution’s downfall.
\n\n
🕯️ No Jumpscares, Just Pure Dread\n
Asylum relies on oppressive atmosphere, slow-burning tension, and narrative depth—not cheap thrills. This is horror rooted in psychological discomfort, ambient storytelling, and the fear of what you can’t see… but feel closing in.
\n\n
🧩 Intricate Puzzles and Mind-Bending Clues\n
Engage your mind with challenging puzzles that reward careful observation and logical thinking. Use notes, environmental hints, and clues to progress deeper into the asylum—and your own fractured psyche.
\n\n
🎧 Immersive Sound and Environmental Design\n
From creaking doors to distant whispers, Asylum features a haunting soundscape that draws you into its world. Combined with dynamic lighting and minimalist UI, every moment builds an overwhelming sense of isolation and vulnerability.
\n\n
📜 A Story of Sanity, Trauma, and Secrets\n
Piece together a layered and disturbing narrative told through flashbacks, notes, and surreal events. What happened inside Hanwell? Why were the patients left behind? And what role do you play in the nightmare that remains?
\n\n
🖥️ Built on Unreal Engine for Modern Systems\n
Lovingly remastered with updated visuals, performance optimization, and support for modern resolutions and controls. Designed to run smoothly while maintaining the eerie essence of classic horror storytelling.

mac_games.title: Escape Simulator
mac_games.description: Escape Simulator is a first-person puzzle game that can be played solo or in online co-op. Explore a growing set of highly interactive escape rooms. Move furniture, pick up and examine all objects, break pots and pick locks!

mac_games.title: Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands
mac_games.description:
Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands is the next chapter in the fan-favorite Sands of Time universe. While visiting his brother's kingdom after his adventures in Azad, the Prince finds the royal palace under siege by a powerful army bent on its destruction.





When the decision is made to use the ancient power of the Sand in a desperate bid to save the kingdom from total destruction, the Prince embarks on an epic adventure where he will learn the burden of true leadership and how great power often comes with a great price.





Game features include:



• Classic gameplay, reimagined: From massive battles with multiple enemies to dizzying acrobatic feats across vast environments, enhanced by the Prince's ability to control nature and time, Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands takes the Prince's extraordinary abilities to levels never before seen.



• Blockbuster Experiences: Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands will offer players unforgettable scenes made possible by the advanced technology of the award-winning Anvil engine. With war at the gates of the kingdom, the Prince's abilities will be tested like never before in epic and thrilling moments.



• Mastery of Nature: With the powers of nature and time, the Prince will gain unrivaled mastery over his environment and enemies. The Prince will find that harnessing the powers of nature itself will be a devastating complement to his ability to rewind time.



• Return of a Beloved Franchise: Set between Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time™ and Prince of Persia: Warrior Within™, Prince of Persia: The Forgotten Sands will provide fans with a new chapter in the Prince of Persia universe and deepen their understanding of the Sands of Time series.

mac_games.title: Prince of Persia
mac_games.description:
Prince of Persia® returns to next-gen platforms for the first time with an all-new epic journey.
\n\n


Developed by the same award-winning Ubisoft Montreal studio that developed Assassin's Creed™, Prince of Persia has been in development for over three years to bring consumers a completely new action-adventure experience.

\n\n

With a new Prince, storyline, open worlds, combat style, signature illustrative art style and the addition of Elika, a deadly new ally, Prince of Persia takes the franchise to new heights of acrobatic mastery and promises to be the #1 action adventure of 2008 this holiday season.

\n\n

A New Hero Arrives: Master the acrobatics, strategy, and combat tactics of the most agile warrior of all time. Slide down the sides of buildings, execute perfectly timed acrobatic combos, and vault over canyons, buildings, and anything in sight. This new outcast warrior must use all of his new skills, along with an all-new combat system, to battle Ahriman's corrupted minions, heal the land of the dark Corruption, and bring back the light.

\n\n

A new epic journey begins: Dive into a new fantasy world of ancient Persia. Masterful storytelling and vast locations will give fans of action adventures an experience comparable to the best Hollywood films.

\n\n

New Open World Structure: In a first for the Prince of Persia franchise, you now have the freedom to shape how the game unfolds in this non-linear adventure. Players decide how the story unfolds by choosing their path in the open world.

\n\n

A Deadly New Ally Appears: The greatest ally ever made arrives in the form of Elika, a dynamic AI companion who joins the Prince in his fight to save the world.

\n\n

With magical powers, she interacts with the player in combat, acrobatics, and puzzle solving, allowing the Prince to reach new heights of deadly acrobatic skill through special paired acrobatic moves or devastating combo attacks.

mac_games.title: Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones
mac_games.description:
Returning to Babylon with Empress Kailina, the Prince finds his kingdom ravaged by war.
\n
He later learns that Kailina has fallen victim to a conspiracy. The Empress's death releases the Sands of Time, threatening\n
to destroy everything dear to the heir to the throne.

\n\n

Thrown out into the street and persecuted by everyone, the hero realizes that
he is gradually being possessed by the spirit of the Dark Prince, born of the Sands of Time. In a fight with himself - his\n
demonic double - the Prince will have to defend his right to be the ruler of Babylon.


\n\n
• Play as two different characters - each with different skills and individual weapons.
\n\n
• Use your fighting style - You have a variety of unique melee moves at your disposal to destroy countless hordes of enemies. You can also grab and strangle enemies from afar using the Daggertail, or take them out in a single blow by sneaking up and attacking from behind.
\n\n
• Battles in Babylon - Fight enemies on dangerous rooftops, make your way through crooked, tangled streets, and set up ambushes in dark passages.
\n\n
• Dramatic plot - full of unexpected twists and turns, will keep you in suspense until the very end. Show what you are capable of in this adventure full of adrenaline, passion and shocking discoveries.
\n\n
• Manipulate Time - With power over the Sands of Time, you will be able to fight enemies by slowing down and rewinding time. In addition, you will also gain new abilities granted by the Sands of Time.
\n\n
• Unrivaled gameplay - The game is a unique blend of genres and masterfully combines fast-paced combat and original puzzles.

mac_games.title: Wargame: Red Dragon
mac_games.description:
The Wargame series returns bigger, richer, and more spectacular than ever before. In Wargame Red Dragon, you are part of a large-scale conflict that pits Western powers against the Communist bloc.

\n\n

1991: The two blocs confront each other in a new theatre of war - Asia, joined by various other countries: Japan, China, North Korea, South Korea, Australia and New Zealand.


\n\n
You command the military resources of all 17 countries involved, assembling your fighting forces from a phenomenal set of 1,450 units, all faithfully reproduced from the original! Command tanks, aircraft, helicopters, new warships and amphibious units in intense battles with unrivaled tactical depth. Master the terrain of varied, ultra-realistic battlefields, dominate new naval areas and rewrite history in a conflict that was designed and engineered with stunning detail by Eugen Systems.

mac_games.title: Sultans Game
mac_games.description:
The Sultan's Game
\n
A narrative-driven card game inspired by One Thousand and One Nights. You are one of the viziers of the mighty Sultan, a capricious and cruel ruler who turns the lives of his subjects into a deadly game for his own amusement. To survive, you will have to make terrifying decisions – and live with the consequences.
\n\n


Game Rules\n
- The Sultan forces you, his vizier, to participate in a cruel game:
\n
- Draw one of the four cards and fulfill its condition within 7 days - otherwise you will be executed.
\n
- Flesh Card: Immerse yourself in the depths of carnal pleasures.
\n
- Luxury Card: Spend a fortune on reckless extravagance.
\n
- Conquest Map: Embark on a deadly adventure.
\n
- Blood Card: Make a human sacrifice.
\n
- Face the challenges - but be prepared for the consequences.
\n
- Betrayal of family, madness from lust for power, struggle for influence and loss of humanity will threaten your sanity.
\n
- The price of survival may be too high...


\n\n
Tactics and choice\n

Use your wits, cunning and luck to uncover the mysteries of this story – love, betrayal, loyalty, courage and mercy – and turn them to your advantage. Decide:
\n
- Become a humble servant of the Sultan or secretly prepare the regicide.
\n
- Support your spouse in difficult times or seduce the queen.
\n
- Kill the dragon for glory or summon the dark gods for power.

\n\n

Mechanics
\n
- This is a turn-based strategy with resource management:
\n
- Distribute action cards to use allies, resources and complete tasks.
\n
- Accumulate wealth, information and equipment.
\n
- Complete NPC quests to gain allies and increase your influence at court.
\n
- At first, the Sultan's missions are a race for survival, but over time they become tools of your power. The choice shifts from simply preserving life to fateful decisions for others and your own soul.

mac_games.title: Ryse: Son of Rome
mac_games.description:
Ryse: Son of Rome is an action-adventure game developed by Crytek that immerses players in the brutal, cinematic world of ancient Rome. Combining visceral combat, epic storytelling, and stunning visuals powered by the CryEngine, Ryse delivers a gripping tale of revenge and honor. Players step into the sandals of Marius Titus, a Roman soldier whose journey from young recruit to battle-hardened general is fueled by the desire to avenge his family and defend the empire. As the Roman Empire teeters on the edge of collapse, Marius must lead his troops through the chaos of war, facing barbarian hordes and uncovering dark conspiracies within Rome itself.

\n\n

Game Features: \n\n

Cinematic Action and Brutal Combat: \n
Ryse: Son of Rome delivers intense, third-person melee combat that emphasizes timing, precision, and brutal execution moves. With a deep and dynamic combat system, players can seamlessly chain attacks, blocks, and executions to take down multiple enemies in the heat of battle. The combat is designed to feel cinematic and weighty, delivering each strike with bone-crunching impact and visual flair.
\n\n
Epic Story of Vengeance and Valor:\n
The game tells a powerful story of personal loss, revenge, and duty set against the backdrop of a crumbling Roman Empire. As Marius fights his way through enemies both external and within, players experience a journey that is equal parts emotionally charged and action-packed. The narrative explores loyalty, betrayal, and the sacrifices made in the name of justice and empire.
\n\n
Stunning Next-Gen Visuals:\n
Powered by CryEngine, Ryse offers breathtaking visuals with lifelike character models, detailed environments, and cinematic lighting. From the bustling streets of Rome to the blood-soaked fields of Britannia, every location is rendered with photorealistic detail, immersing players in a gritty and majestic world of antiquity. The game’s visuals set a high standard for next-gen console graphics.
\n\n
Authentic Roman Setting:\n
With meticulously crafted armor, architecture, and environments inspired by historical Rome, Ryse brings the grandeur and brutality of the Roman Empire to life. The game draws from real Roman history and mythology to create a believable and immersive world. Players will march through iconic locations, storm barbarian strongholds, and engage in massive battles that evoke the scale and spectacle of ancient warfare.

mac_games.title: Company of Heroes 2
mac_games.description:
The original Company of Heroes 2 game provides access to two armies for online play: the Red Army and the Wehrmacht units that fought on the Eastern Front. It also includes a single-player campaign that introduces the core principles of the series. 





Feel like a Soviet commander, leading fierce battles to liberate the Motherland from the Nazi invaders! Change tactics, take into account severe weather conditions and use all the power of the Soviet people to reach Berlin!




"Company of Heroes 2: Armies of the Western Front" adds two new sides to the list of armies of the multiplayer game: the German High Command "West" and the US Army. The Germans represent a powerful and aggressive, but relatively small army with a large number of special and elite units, while the Americans are famous for the diversity of tactics and effective interaction of troops, but suffer from a lack of heavy armor.




"Company of Heroes 2: Ardennes Offensive" is a dynamic single-player campaign dedicated to the legendary US Army operation. You will take part in 18 battles, leading one of three companies with unique features. Take care of your fighters: the company composition remains from episode to episode, and reinforcements are not always available.





"Company of Heroes 2: British Forces" is the latest product in the series, dedicated to one of the most unique armies of the Second World War. Enjoy an original technology tree, allowing you to constantly balance between maneuverability and defense. Stun your opponents with an original choice of development path, leading to unpredictable results. Command unusual types of troops, including flamethrower tanks "Churchill Crocodile" and parachute gliders of the Royal Air Force.

mac_games.title: KIBORG
mac_games.description:
A ruthless roguelike beat'em up where you upgrade your body with new cyberware in every run. You've been sent to the galaxy's most terrifying prison, where even death won't help you escape your fate, and your only chance for freedom is to win a brutal reality show.

\n\n

FIGHT FOR FREEDOM \n
In the future, even death won't set you free. If a prisoner dies while serving his sentence, he is revived to continue his suffering. You are serving a 1,300-year sentence on a distant prison planet for crimes you didn't commit. Your only hope is a famous reality show called "The Last Ticket". The rules are simple: there is a shuttle on the roof of the prison, and if you can fight your way through the crowds of other prisoners and get to it in time, you will be freed.
\n\n


NO COMPROMISE \n
A unique blend of classic beat-em-up, shooter and roguelike. The combat is fast, brutal and deadly. If you're looking for blood and violence, you've come to the right place: severed limbs, exploding heads and cybernetic cores torn from the bodies of still-living enemies. Dozens of enemy types with unique abilities and tactics that combine to create hundreds of challenging battles.
\n\n

HUGE VARIETY OF BUILDS \n
Replace your body parts with different sets of cybernetic implants, each of which changes your play style. Add hundreds of upgrades to increase their power, and apply dozens of mutations to create deadly synergies. Use a variety of melee and ranged weapons of all types. Combine strikes and special attacks to crush your enemies. Millions of possible combinations and many viable builds to experiment with.

mac_games.title: The Mortuary Assistant
mac_games.description:
The Mortuary Assistant" is a scary adventure simulator about a simple mortuary worker.

\n\n

The game's dark atmosphere immerses you in the activities of a morgue employee doing his routine work. The protagonist arrives at the proposed position in River Fields to study and gain work experience.

\n\n

The mentor is a man named Mortic, who helps to understand the intricacies of everyday tasks and talks about the correct embalming of corpses, as well as the care and correct handling of the bodies of deceased people.

\n\n

While doing your daily chores, you will learn stories about paranormal cases related to the deceased. You will have to sort out the rumors of restless citizens, gradually encountering strange phenomena.

\n\n

One day, Mortic gets in touch and reports the truth of the horrors that are happening. 

\n\n

New bodies arrive at the morgue, which the protagonist must observe, understanding the manifestations of demonic forces.

\n\n

You will examine the dead, analyze and record your observations in a notebook. The game combines the genres of horror and simulator, where you need to accept corpses and sort them.

\n\n

While researching the dead, players will be watching closely for reactions to the experiments your character decides to conduct.

\n\n

In the defiled organisms there lurk otherworldly entities that want to break free and subjugate their hosts.

mac_games.title: NBA 2K25 Arcade Edition
mac_games.description:
NBA 2K25 Arcade Edition for Mac is a high-octane basketball simulation game blending classic arcade action with modern graphics.\n
Featuring fast-paced gameplay, simplified controls, and explosive dunks, it’s built for quick fun.
The Mac version is optimized for smooth performance and retina display support.
Play solo or with friends in local multiplayer mode.
Perfect for fans of retro-style sports games.
\n\n
Take the court in NBA 2K25 Arcade Edition – a throwback to old-school basketball with a fresh twist.\n
Unleash over-the-top moves, alley-oops, and power-ups in fast 2v2 matches.
Built for instant action, no long tutorials or microtransactions.
Smooth gameplay and stylized visuals shine on Mac.
Arcade fun reborn for a new generation of hoop fans.
\n\n
Experience pure basketball adrenaline in NBA 2K25 Arcade Edition for Mac.\n
Every match is packed with flashy dunks, quick plays, and vibrant arenas.\n
No complex mechanics—just pick up and play.\n
Local multiplayer makes it perfect for couch competition.\n
A must-have for fans of NBA Jam-style action.

mac_games.title: RoboCop: Rogue City
mac_games.description:
Become an iconic police officer, half-man, half-machine, and try to restore justice on the dangerous, crime-ridden streets of Old Detroit.

\n\n

Support the law in every way possible.
\n\n
The powerful Auto-9 and 20 other weapons will help you deal with criminals at all stages of this exciting adventure. Robotics and cybernetics have awarded you with strength and skills that can be improved as you progress through the game. It is unlikely that there will be a single police officer who can fight crime more effectively than you.

\n\n

Decide for yourself how to implement the basic directives.
\n
Explore open areas and complete missions based on your own sense of justice. Searching for clues, conducting interrogations, and maintaining public order are just some of your daily tasks as a police officer. But make your decisions carefully: your choices can determine the fate of citizens and the outcome of the mission.
\n\n


An original story set in the RoboCop universe. 
\n
A crime wave has hit Detroit, and a new enemy is threatening public order. Your investigation takes you right into the heart of a devious plan set between RoboCop 2 and 3. Visit iconic locations and meet familiar characters from the world of RoboCop. Peter Weller returns to voice the famous half-robot cop.

\n\n

Get ready…\n
PROTECT THE INNOCENT AND UPHOLD THE LAW

mac_games.title: Tekken 7
mac_games.description:
Tekken 7 is a dynamic fighting game developed by Bandai Namco Entertainment that marks the explosive conclusion of the long-standing Mishima family feud. With its refined combat system, stunning visuals, and emotionally charged story, Tekken 7 delivers a powerful mix of classic arcade action and deep narrative. Set in a world torn apart by war and personal vendettas, players dive into the King of Iron Fist Tournament to uncover the dark secrets behind the Mishima clan’s legacy and the true nature of their power.



Game Features:


Cinematic Story-Driven Experience:

Tekken 7 introduces an intense, story-rich campaign mode that bridges the gap between narrative and gameplay. Players witness the final chapter of the Mishima saga, told through explosive cutscenes and dramatic battles. As secrets are revealed and grudges resurface, the story immerses players in a world where loyalty is tested and power is everything. The transition between cinematics and fights is seamless, keeping players locked in from start to finish.



Refined Combat Mechanics:

At the heart of Tekken 7 is its polished fighting system, blending accessibility with depth. Whether you're a series veteran or a new challenger, the game’s intuitive controls and strategic mechanics offer rewarding gameplay. New features like Rage Arts and Power Crush add cinematic flair and comeback potential, turning the tide in even the most desperate battles. Precision timing, combo mastery, and strategic positioning are key to claiming victory in the arena.



Diverse Roster of Fighters:

With over 30 playable characters, Tekken 7 offers a rich and varied roster that includes returning fan favorites and powerful newcomers. From the stoic Kazuya Mishima to the fiery martial artist Hwoarang, each fighter boasts a unique fighting style and personality. The inclusion of crossover characters like Akuma from Street Fighter adds even more excitement, expanding the universe in thrilling new directions.



Stunning Visuals and Arenas:

Built on Unreal Engine 4, Tekken 7 features visually breathtaking character models, dynamic lighting, and detailed stage environments. Battles come to life with fluid animations and cinematic flair, making every hit feel impactful. From snow-covered temples to neon-lit cityscapes, each arena adds to the game’s dramatic tone and global scale.



Online and Competitive Play:

Whether battling friends or climbing the ranks in global competition, Tekken 7 offers robust multiplayer modes. Ranked matches, tournaments, and player lobbies create a competitive scene where skill is tested and legends are born. With a thriving esports presence, the game continues to be a cornerstone of the fighting game community.



Legacy of the Iron Fist:

More than just a fighting game, Tekken 7 is the culmination of a saga decades in the making. It pays tribute to its legacy while boldly evolving the series for a new generation. Emotion, power, and revenge collide in a finale that will leave fans breathless and newcomers hooked.

mac_games.title: Cyberpunk 2077 (PORT)
mac_games.description:
Step into the neon-lit streets of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, a sprawling open-world RPG where technology, corruption, and rebellion collide. Become V, a mercenary in search of fame, fortune, and answers in a city ruled by powerful corporations, criminal syndicates, and dangerous tech. Navigate a world where every choice has consequences, and your destiny is shaped by your actions. \n

\n\n
SURVIVE IN THE UNDERBELLY OF NIGHT CITY\n
Dive into a high-tech, dystopian world where danger lurks at every corner. Navigate the vibrant, chaotic streets of Night City, filled with ruthless gangs, corrupt corporations, and powerful figures. Whether you're battling foes in the seedy underworld or climbing the corporate ladder, survival in this city requires skill, wit, and ruthless determination.

\n\n
EXPERIENCE TRUE FREEDOM OF CHOICE\n
Shape your character and your story with complete freedom. Customize V's abilities, appearance, and skills, tailoring your playstyle to your preferences. Choose how to approach missions—whether through brutal combat, smooth hacking, or persuasive dialogue. The choices you make influence the world around you, from the fate of allies to the political landscape of Night City itself.

\n\n
ENGAGE IN HIGH-OCTANE ACTION AND STEALTH\n
Fight your way through intense combat scenarios or avoid the chaos altogether with stealth and hacking skills. Use an arsenal of advanced weapons, cybernetic enhancements, and quick-thinking tactics to take on enemies in fast-paced, dynamic encounters. Whether you’re gunning down foes in a shootout or disabling systems from the shadows, each mission offers multiple ways to succeed.

\n\n
UNCOVER A WEB OF INTRIGUE AND CONSPIRACY\n
Unravel the tangled web of corruption, betrayal, and secrets that lies beneath Night City’s shining surface. Join forces with a diverse cast of characters, from rogue AIs to rebels seeking revolution. Discover hidden agendas, and dive deep into the corporate wars and personal vendettas that fuel the city’s power struggles. Every lead takes you deeper into a conspiracy with life-changing implications.

\n\n
THRIVE IN A WORLD OF CYBERNETIC ENHANCEMENTS AND LIMITLESS POSSIBILITIES\n
Enhance your body and mind with cyberware that grants new abilities and powers, pushing your limits to the extreme. Hack into systems, manipulate environments, or enhance your reflexes for combat, all while dealing with the ethical dilemmas of becoming more machine than human. Your journey is not just about survival—it's about becoming something greater in a world where technology is both a gift and a curse.

mac_games.title: Schoolboy Runaway
mac_games.description:
Schoolboy Runaway is an emotional, narrative-driven adventure game that plunges players into the gritty, unforgiving world of adolescence. Set against the backdrop of a sprawling, decaying city, the game follows the journey of a young boy who escapes his troubled home, seeking freedom, self-discovery, and a place where he truly belongs. As players guide him through dark alleyways, bustling streets, and hidden corners of urban life, they encounter both the harsh realities of survival and the fragile hope of new beginnings.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Immersive Storytelling Experience:\n
Schoolboy Runaway focuses heavily on storytelling, drawing players into the boy’s emotional struggle and personal growth. Through rich dialogue, environmental storytelling, and interactive choices, players experience the raw, unfiltered emotions of fear, hope, and resilience. Every decision shapes the boy’s journey, affecting his relationships and the outcome of his story.
\n\n
Survival in an Urban Jungle:\n
The game challenges players to navigate the harsh realities of city life with limited resources. From avoiding dangerous gangs and hostile strangers to scavenging for food and shelter, every choice impacts the boy’s survival. Players must manage his physical and emotional well-being, making tough decisions that reflect the complexity of real-life struggles.
\n\n
Atmospheric, Handcrafted Environments:\n
The city is a character in itself, with dark, gritty alleyways, neon-lit streets, abandoned buildings, and hidden underground tunnels. Each location is meticulously designed to evoke a sense of both danger and mystery, creating an environment that feels alive and ever-changing. The visual style, paired with an atmospheric soundtrack, amplifies the feeling of loneliness and the relentless pursuit of freedom.
\n\n
Complex Characters and Unforgettable Encounters:\n
Throughout his journey, the boy meets a cast of diverse, morally ambiguous characters—some who offer help, and others who pose threats. Each interaction adds depth to the narrative, revealing the complexities of human nature and the harsh realities of life on the streets. These encounters challenge players’ perceptions and force them to question who they can trust.
\n\n
Emotional Depth and Impact:\n
At its core, Schoolboy Runaway is about more than just survival—it’s about the search for identity, the longing for connection, and the courage to face one’s fears. The game’s emotional depth resonates long after the final scene, leaving players with a lasting impression of the boy’s journey and the choices they made along the way.

mac_games.title: Journey
mac_games.description:
Journey is an unforgettable adventure game developed by Thatgamecompany that invites players into a visually stunning and emotionally charged world. Set in a vast, desert landscape, the game tells the story of a robed traveler journeying toward a distant, glowing mountain. Through its unique blend of exploration, puzzle-solving, and emotional storytelling, Journey delivers a rich, immersive experience that resonates deeply with players. It’s a tale of discovery, connection, and self-reflection, told without a single word spoken.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
A Beautiful, Mystical World: Journey takes place in a breathtaking desert environment, where the vast sands stretch endlessly beneath an enormous, glowing sky. The game’s stunning visual design and atmospheric soundtrack work together to create a sense of awe and wonder. Each step you take brings you deeper into this mysterious world, with each location offering its own distinct beauty and enigmatic charm. The game’s fluid animation and minimalistic yet rich landscapes are designed to evoke a sense of peaceful solitude and discovery.
\n\n
Emotional Exploration: At its heart, Journey is a game about exploration and self-discovery. Players guide a lone traveler through the desert, and though the character’s journey is solitary, it is deeply emotional. The sense of isolation is palpable, but the game’s underlying themes of connection and transcendence make it an uplifting experience. As you explore, the player will encounter various environmental puzzles and challenges that require patience, exploration, and reflection.
\n\n
Unique Multiplayer Interaction: Journey introduces a truly innovative approach to multiplayer. While the game is primarily a solo experience, players can encounter other travelers during their journey. These anonymous encounters allow for silent collaboration—no names, no voices, just a shared experience of exploration and mutual aid. The connection between players is subtle yet profound, as the game's simple yet beautiful communication system fosters cooperation without a single word exchanged.
\n\n
Emotive Soundtrack: The emotionally evocative soundtrack of Journey, composed by Austin Wintory, plays a key role in amplifying the game’s narrative and atmosphere. Every note resonates with the emotions of the character’s journey, enhancing moments of triumph, solitude, and wonder. The music not only underscores the game’s visual grandeur but also connects players to the inner journey of the protagonist, making the emotional impact of the experience even more profound.
\n\n
A Meaningful, Silent Story: Journey tells its story through its world, its environment, and its characters’ actions, rather than through traditional narrative techniques. Without a single spoken word, players will slowly uncover the history and mysteries of the desert world, piecing together the past of the traveler and the civilization that once inhabited it. The game’s themes of life, death, and the journey itself are explored in a way that feels universal, offering a deeply personal experience for every player.

mac_games.title: God of War I
mac_games.description:
God of War (PS2) is an action-adventure game developed by Santa Monica Studio and published by Sony Computer Entertainment, originally released in 2005 for the PlayStation 2. The first installment of the God of War series, it introduced players to Kratos, a brutal and vengeful Spartan warrior, as he embarks on a journey to defeat the Greek gods and seek redemption. With its visceral combat, epic storytelling, and detailed world-building, God of War set the foundation for what would become one of the most iconic franchises in gaming history.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Epic Combat System: God of War features a fast-paced and fluid combat system that allows Kratos to unleash devastating attacks using a combination of weapons and magic. The primary weapon, the Blades of Chaos, can be swung with deadly force to strike enemies in quick succession. Kratos can also use a variety of magical powers, such as the Army of Sparta and Medusa's Gaze, to help defeat his enemies. The game’s combat system is satisfying and brutal, allowing for seamless combos, chain attacks, and quick-time events that make the action feel cinematic and intense.
\n\n
Brutal Boss Battles: One of the standout features of God of War is its series of epic boss battles. From the massive Hydra in the opening level to the mighty Ares himself in the final battle, the game is filled with colossal enemies that push Kratos to his limits. These battles require players to learn enemy patterns, exploit weaknesses, and use both combat and puzzle-solving to overcome the odds. The thrill of fighting gods and mythical creatures is one of the most exhilarating aspects of the game.
\n\n
Gripping Story and Mythology: The story of God of War is deeply rooted in Greek mythology, as Kratos seeks revenge against Ares, the God of War, who tricked him into killing his own family. This quest for vengeance is driven by Kratos’ guilt and rage, setting the stage for an emotional and action-packed narrative. Along the way, players encounter various figures from Greek mythology, such as Athena, Poseidon, and Hades, each playing a role in Kratos’ journey. The game’s mature themes of betrayal, loss, and revenge are explored in a dark, dramatic way, with Kratos emerging as a tragic, tortured antihero.
\n\n
Stunning Visuals and Cinematic Presentation: For its time, God of War was a visual marvel, featuring beautifully detailed environments, fluid animations, and spectacular cutscenes. The game's art direction captures the grandeur of ancient Greece, with massive temples, treacherous landscapes, and mythical ruins that add to the sense of scale and adventure. The dynamic camera angles and cinematic presentation enhance the game's epic feel, making players feel like they’re controlling a blockbuster action movie.

mac_games.title: Shadow of the Colossus
mac_games.description:
Shadow of the Colossus is an action-adventure game developed by Team Ico and published by Sony Computer Entertainment for the PlayStation 2. Released in 2005, this critically acclaimed title is known for its breathtaking landscapes, minimalist design, and emotionally charged narrative. In Shadow of the Colossus, players take on the role of Wander, a young man on a quest to resurrect a mysterious woman named Mono by defeating sixteen colossal beings known as Colossi. The game is unique for its focus on exploration, puzzle-solving, and epic battles, as well as its somber atmosphere and themes of sacrifice, loss, and the consequences of one's actions.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Epic Battles Against Colossi: The heart of Shadow of the Colossus lies in its monumental boss battles, where players face off against massive, towering Colossi. Each of these colossal beings requires a different approach to defeat, often involving strategic climbing, puzzle-solving, and precise attacks. The battles are grand in scale, with Wander scaling the Colossus' bodies to reach weak points while avoiding their attacks. The challenge of defeating each Colossus feels like a unique, awe-inspiring experience, as players must figure out how to interact with the environment and the creatures themselves to bring them down.
\n\n
Stunning, Open-World Exploration: The game features an expansive, beautifully crafted open world that is both serene and haunting. The vast, empty landscapes—from sprawling grasslands to desolate deserts—serve as the backdrop for Wander’s journey. There are no traditional enemies or side missions to distract the player, which creates a sense of loneliness and isolation. This empty, yet visually striking world makes each Colossus encounter feel even more monumental, as players travel long distances on horseback to reach their next target. The minimalist approach to exploration adds to the game's atmosphere of solitude and reflection.
\n\n
Atmosphere and Visuals: Shadow of the Colossus is renowned for its art direction and atmospheric presentation. The game’s art style combines beautiful, natural landscapes with a sense of desolation and melancholy. The Colossi are designed to be both awe-inspiring and terrifying, their size and appearance adding to the feeling of insignificance. The world is subtly alive, with changes in weather and time of day affecting the visual experience. The haunting soundtrack, composed by Kow Otani, complements the game's somber tone, enhancing the emotional weight of Wander’s quest.
\n\n
Minimalist Storytelling: Shadow of the Colossus tells a sparse, cryptic story that is delivered through visual cues and environmental storytelling, rather than extensive dialogue. Wander’s motivations, the true nature of the Colossi, and the world’s backstory are left largely open to interpretation. This minimalist storytelling approach invites players to speculate on the deeper meaning of the events unfolding, making the narrative all the more thought-provoking. The relationship between Wander and Mono is central to the game, with Wander's actions raising moral questions about sacrifice and the price of love.
\n\n
Challenging and Rewarding Gameplay: The gameplay in Shadow of the Colossus revolves primarily around exploration and combat with the Colossi. Players are encouraged to carefully plan their attacks, study the movements of the Colossus, and think critically about how to reach their weak points. The game's mechanics are simple but effective, with Wander using a sword to find and mark the Colossus' weak spots and a bow for ranged combat. The game's pacing is slow and deliberate, heightening the intensity and satisfaction of each victory.
\n\n
Thematic Depth and Emotional Impact: One of the defining aspects of Shadow of the Colossus is its emotional weight. The journey is not just about defeating these enormous creatures; it’s about the consequences of Wander’s actions. As players progress, they begin to question whether the destruction of these beings is truly justified, and whether the price Wander is paying to resurrect Mono is worth it. The game explores themes of sacrifice, mortality, and the moral implications of the player's decisions, creating a poignant and thought-provoking experience.
\n\n
Replayability and Hidden Secrets: While the game’s core objective is to defeat the sixteen Colossi, there are various hidden secrets and additional challenges that increase its replayability. Players can find hidden items, explore unreachable parts of the world, and challenge themselves with special time trials. In some versions of the game, unlocking new game modes and bonuses is possible, giving players further incentives to return after completing the main story.

mac_games.title: Resident Evil 4 (PS2)
mac_games.description:
Resident Evil 4 (PS2) is a survival horror game developed and published by Capcom for the PlayStation 2, following its success on the GameCube. This version of Resident Evil 4 brings the revolutionary gameplay of its predecessor to a broader audience with an exciting mix of action, horror, and adventure. The game takes players on a thrilling journey as Leon S. Kennedy, a U.S. government agent, on a mission to rescue the president’s daughter, Ashley Graham, who has been kidnapped by a mysterious cult in rural Spain. With its blend of intense action, intricate puzzles, and terrifying enemies, Resident Evil 4 is widely regarded as one of the best survival horror games of its generation.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Revolutionary Over-the-Shoulder Camera: One of the most notable features of Resident Evil 4 is its shift from the fixed camera angles of previous entries to a third-person over-the-shoulder perspective. This new viewpoint allows players to have more control over combat and exploration, making the game feel more immersive and dynamic. It enhances the action sequences and helps the player react more quickly to the threat of terrifying enemies, creating a sense of constant danger and tension.
\n\n
Action-Packed Combat: Resident Evil 4 brings a faster, more action-oriented combat system, with players needing to shoot, dodge, and survive the relentless onslaught of enemies. The game features a variety of weapons, including pistols, shotguns, rifles, and grenades, all of which can be upgraded as players progress through the game. The precision aiming mechanic, where players aim directly at targets rather than using fixed reticles, adds a new layer of strategy to battles and keeps the gameplay feeling fresh and intense.
\n\n
Terrifying Enemies and Boss Battles: As Leon makes his way through the rural Spanish village and surrounding areas, he encounters a wide array of horrifying enemies, including zombie-like villagers, grotesque monsters, and terrifying boss creatures. The Plaga, a parasitic organism, has taken control of the villagers, turning them into deadly enemies. The game features a mix of gruesome, eerie monsters that escalate in danger as the story progresses. Boss battles are larger-than-life and challenging, requiring players to use their weapons, environment, and wits to survive.
\n\n
Rich Environments and Detailed Locations: The game’s setting, from eerie villages to abandoned castles and creepy forests, is beautifully detailed and full of atmosphere. The environments are packed with secrets, hidden paths, and items to discover, encouraging exploration and adding depth to the world. The eerie soundtrack and ambient sound effects contribute to the creepy, unsettling vibe that permeates the entire game, heightening the sense of dread as Leon navigates through dark, oppressive locations.
\n\n
Inventory and Resource Management: As with previous Resident Evil games, managing resources is key to survival. Players must carefully balance their inventory space, making tough decisions about which weapons and items to carry with them. Ammunition is limited, and health items must be used wisely. The game features an innovative inventory system with a grid-based design that allows players to organize and upgrade their equipment. Players also engage with the Merchant, an enigmatic figure who offers upgrades, new weapons, and healing items throughout the game.
\n\n
Engaging Story and Characters: Resident Evil 4 introduces a compelling narrative filled with intrigue, mystery, and action. As Leon battles through hordes of enemies and uncovers the secrets behind the cult that kidnapped Ashley, players encounter a cast of memorable characters, including the enigmatic Ada Wong, who has her own mysterious agenda. The story unfolds through cinematic cutscenes and in-game dialogue, creating a thrilling, immersive experience that keeps players engaged from start to finish.
\n\n
Additional Features in the PS2 Version: The PlayStation 2 version of Resident Evil 4 includes additional content not found in the original GameCube release, such as extra costumes for Leon, additional gameplay modes, and special unlockable weapons like the Chicago Typewriter. While the PS2 version lacks the visual fidelity of its GameCube counterpart, it still offers a smooth, intense experience with the same engaging gameplay.
\n\n
Endless Replayability: In addition to the main campaign, Resident Evil 4 offers multiple unlockable modes, such as The Mercenaries, where players can unlock new characters and attempt to survive waves of enemies in timed challenges. There are also special costumes, weapons, and hidden secrets to discover, making the game worth revisiting after completing the main story.
\n\n
In Resident Evil 4 on the PS2, players are treated to a horror experience that redefined the genre. Its combination of heart-pounding combat, detailed environments, intriguing characters, and a gripping story makes it one of the most influential games in the Resident Evil series and an unforgettable experience for any survival horror fan.

mac_games.title: WWE SmackDown! Here Comes the Pain
mac_games.description:
WWE SmackDown! Here Comes the Pain is a professional wrestling video game developed by Yukes and published by THQ, released for the PlayStation 2. One of the most beloved entries in the WWE SmackDown! series, Here Comes the Pain delivers a high-energy, fast-paced wrestling experience that combines realistic gameplay mechanics with the over-the-top, dramatic flair of professional wrestling. Featuring an expansive roster of WWE superstars, deep gameplay modes, and a robust career mode, the game offers fans a thrilling, authentic wrestling experience that remains a fan favorite to this day.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Dynamic Wrestling Action: Here Comes the Pain delivers an action-packed wrestling experience that captures the thrill of WWE matches. Players can execute a wide variety of moves, from high-flying aerial attacks to powerful finishing moves like the Stone Cold Stunner and The Rock Bottom. The controls are intuitive yet deep, allowing players to chain together devastating combos, grapple, and counter moves with precision, making every match feel like an authentic WWE bout. The fluid animations and detailed character models enhance the impact of every move, making each match feel intense and immersive.
\n\n
Massive Roster of WWE Superstars: The game features a huge roster of iconic WWE Superstars, Legends, and Divas from the early 2000s, including fan favorites like The Rock, Stone Cold Steve Austin, Brock Lesnar, The Undertaker, Triple H, and more. Each wrestler has their own unique set of moves, taunts, and finishing moves, offering a diverse range of playstyles and strategies. Players can also create their own custom wrestlers, giving them the freedom to design and control their dream WWE Superstars.
\n\n
Engaging Career Mode: The Career Mode in Here Comes the Pain is one of its standout features. Players create a custom wrestler and guide them through a journey in WWE, starting from humble beginnings on SmackDown and working their way up to main-event status. The mode includes a variety of storylines, rivalries, and opportunities to win championships, all while building your wrestler's stats and abilities. The choices you make throughout your career affect your character's development, offering a personalized experience that keeps you invested.
\n\n
Hard-Hitting Match Types: Here Comes the Pain features a wide range of match types, each adding its own level of excitement and intensity. Players can engage in traditional one-on-one bouts, tag-team matches, and hardcore match types like Hell in a Cell, Elimination Chamber, and Last Man Standing. The inclusion of these varied match types allows players to experience the full spectrum of WWE's over-the-top spectacle, with each match offering unique challenges and rewards.
\n\n
Stunning Visuals and Realistic Presentation: The game boasts impressive graphics for its time, with detailed wrestler models, smooth animations, and realistic arenas that replicate the feel of WWE broadcasts. The crowd reacts dynamically to the action in the ring, with boos, cheers, and chants adding to the atmosphere. The commentary, featuring voices from legendary WWE announcers like Michael Cole and Tazz, further enhances the game's immersion, capturing the high-energy, dramatic tone of WWE television.
\n\n
Innovative Submission and Grapple System: The grapple system in Here Comes the Pain is one of the most refined in the series. Players can engage in a variety of moves by pressing different combinations of buttons, leading to a wide range of attacks, counters, and pinning opportunities. The game also introduces an exciting submission system, where players must time their button presses to either escape or apply submissions, creating intense moments of back-and-forth action.
\n\n
Fun Multiplayer Mode: The multiplayer mode in Here Comes the Pain allows players to battle against friends in a variety of match types. Whether it's a simple one-on-one showdown or a chaotic, all-out battle royal, the competitive multiplayer aspect brings the intensity of WWE action to your living room. Customizing wrestlers and taking them into matches with friends makes the experience even more enjoyable, leading to countless hours of fun.
\n\n
Unlockables and Hidden Content: Here Comes the Pain features an abundance of unlockables, including new wrestlers, arenas, costumes, and moves. Players can unlock hidden content by completing challenges, winning championships, and achieving certain milestones, adding a layer of replayability to the game. The unlockable content keeps things fresh and exciting, offering new surprises for players each time they dive back into the game.

mac_games.title: God Hand
mac_games.description:
God Hand is a beat 'em up action game developed by Clover Studio and released for the PlayStation 2. Known for its over-the-top gameplay, quirky humor, and eccentric characters, God Hand offers an action-packed experience that combines brawler mechanics with creative, fast-paced combat. Players step into the shoes of Gene, an ordinary man who becomes the possessor of the legendary "God Hand," a powerful force that gives him incredible strength and abilities. As Gene embarks on a mission to stop a demon uprising led by the mysterious and powerful ruler, Angra, the game blends exaggerated action with a touch of comedy, making it a unique cult classic in the gaming world.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Unleash the Power of the God Hand: The core of God Hand revolves around the titular God Hand, a supernatural force that gives Gene extraordinary combat abilities. Players can execute devastating punches, combos, and powerful "God Moves" that obliterate enemies in stylish, brutal fashion. The game rewards skillful combo execution and creative use of the God Hand, with a range of flashy, over-the-top attacks that feel incredibly satisfying to pull off.
\n\n
Fast-Paced, Over-the-Top Combat: God Hand emphasizes quick, fluid combat with a focus on timing, strategy, and precision. Players must master a variety of combat techniques, including blocking, dodging, counterattacking, and combo-building, to take down hordes of enemies. The game’s frenetic pace and quirky, high-energy combat mechanics make every fight exciting and unpredictable. The fun lies in chaining together crazy combos, unleashing devastating special attacks, and showing off your own unique style.
\n\n
Humor and Personality: One of the most distinct features of God Hand is its unapologetic humor and eccentric characters. The game is filled with ridiculous enemies, bizarre bosses, and offbeat dialogue that keeps the tone light and playful, even during intense combat sequences. The protagonist, Gene, is a wisecracking, larger-than-life character who often engages in comical banter, adding a layer of charm and personality to the game. The tongue-in-cheek humor is one of the key reasons God Hand has become a cult classic.
\n\n
Challenging Difficulty and Replayability: God Hand doesn’t pull punches when it comes to difficulty. Players face tough enemies, tricky bosses, and relentless waves of enemies that test their combat skills to the limit. The game offers a high level of challenge, but this is balanced with a rewarding progression system that allows players to improve Gene’s abilities over time. With multiple difficulty levels, unlockable content, and a variety of challenges to complete, God Hand offers a significant amount of replay value.

mac_games.title: HAAK
mac_games.description:
HAAK is a post-apocalyptic action platformer with elements of the Metroidvania genre. Dexterous movements and well-timed actions will help players solve puzzles, explore this doomed world and discover its hidden dark secrets.

\n\n

Welcome to the world of "HAAK"! Here you will find:
\n
- Lots of tests. 

\n- Hungry mutants. 

- Mysterious groups.

\n\n

Rise up, proud and brave traveler Khaak! Become the light of this dark world!
\n
Pixel graphics + Metroidvania + Wasteland!

\n\n

Story\n\n

The game takes place in a post-apocalyptic wasteland. Cities lie in ruins, and survivors cling to life in their shelters. The southern coastal city of Sanhe was able to survive the disaster due to its unique geographical location, becoming the last beacon of a dying world.
\n\n
The main character is Haak, a traveler from the north who goes south in search of hope for salvation.


\n\n
Gameplay\n
\n
A unique combination of platformer and metroidvania:
\n\n
- Hook throws.
\n
- Jerks.
\n
- Power strikes.
\n
These skills will help you explore every corner of the world.

\n\n

Peculiarities\n\n

- Hand-drawn maps in a unique retro-futuristic style, creating the atmosphere of a graphic novel.
\n
- Treasures and secrets hidden in unexpected places.
\n
- Traps and riddles at every step - to solve them you will need ingenuity and all available means.
\n
- Flexible difficulty system: even beginners will be able to defeat the toughest bosses.
\n
- Several paths and choices that influence the fate of the characters.
\n
Your decisions make history.

mac_games.title: God of War II
mac_games.description:
God of War II is an action-adventure game developed by Santa Monica Studio and published by Sony Computer Entertainment. Serving as the direct sequel to God of War, this critically acclaimed title continues the epic journey of Kratos, the God of War, as he embarks on a quest for vengeance against the gods who have betrayed him. With breathtaking visuals, a deep storyline, and brutal combat mechanics, God of War II elevates the series to new heights while maintaining the iconic mythology and character-driven narrative that fans have come to love.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Epic Storyline and Mythological World: God of War II picks up right where the original left off, following Kratos as he seeks to overthrow the gods of Olympus after being betrayed by Zeus. The game takes players on a journey through awe-inspiring locales, from the sprawling halls of the gods to the terrifying depths of the underworld. Kratos faces betrayal, loss, and the consequences of his violent past as he battles against both mortals and gods in his quest for revenge.
\n\n
Fluid Combat and Brutal Action: True to the series, God of War II offers a refined and brutal combat system that blends fast-paced action with deep combo mechanics. Kratos wields a variety of weapons, including the iconic Blades of Athena, and can unleash devastating attacks, special moves, and magical abilities. The gameplay is a seamless mix of puzzle-solving, exploration, and adrenaline-pumping combat against hordes of enemies, from mythical beasts to vengeful gods.
\n\n
Stunning Visuals and Cinematic Presentation: The game features a rich, cinematic presentation that brings Greek mythology to life with jaw-dropping visuals. From the grandeur of Mount Olympus to the eerie beauty of the Underworld, every environment is meticulously crafted. The game's fluid animations, detailed character models, and dynamic camera work elevate the action to an entirely new level, ensuring that every moment feels like an epic battle.
\n\n
Challenging Boss Fights and Epic Scale: One of God of War II's standout features is its unforgettable boss fights. Players will face off against colossal gods, titans, and mythical creatures, each battle more intense and visually stunning than the last. The scale of these confrontations is immense, with the camera often pulling back to show the epic scope of the battle. These encounters test not only Kratos’ combat prowess but also his cunning and ability to adapt to new challenges.
\n\n
Kratos – A Complex Antihero: Kratos remains one of the most compelling and tragic characters in video games. Driven by rage, guilt, and a thirst for vengeance, his journey is one of inner turmoil as he grapples with the consequences of his actions. God of War II explores the depth of his character, highlighting the complexities of his quest for redemption and the inescapable burden of being the God of War.

mac_games.title: Ghost of Tsushima
mac_games.description:
Ghost of Tsushima is an action-adventure game developed by Sucker Punch Productions that immerses players in the brutal beauty of feudal Japan. Set during the Mongol invasion of Tsushima Island, players take on the role of Jin Sakai, a samurai warrior who must adapt to new methods of combat and tactics to protect his homeland. Blending stunning open-world exploration with intense swordplay, stealth mechanics, and a gripping narrative, Ghost of Tsushima offers a fresh take on the samurai genre while staying true to its roots.



Game Features:



Open-World Samurai Adventure:
 Ghost of Tsushima offers a vast, open-world environment that invites players to explore the lush, detailed landscapes of Tsushima Island. From rolling hills and bamboo forests to ancient temples and coastal cliffs, every corner of the island is filled with beauty and danger. As Jin, players can traverse the world on horseback, uncovering hidden secrets, side quests, and dangerous encounters as they journey through a land at war.



Dynamic Combat and Swordplay: 
 At the heart of Ghost of Tsushima is its fast-paced, fluid combat system. Players engage in intense, samurai-inspired swordfights, utilizing precise timing and masterful techniques to defeat their enemies. Jin can master various combat stances, each tailored to counter different types of foes, from heavy brute enemies to nimble swordfighters. The fluidity of the combat makes every battle feel impactful, whether it's a one-on-one duel or a large-scale confrontation.



Stealth and Assassin Techniques:
 While rooted in samurai tradition, Jin must embrace stealth tactics to confront the Mongol invaders. Players can use a variety of ninja-inspired techniques, such as sneak attacks, distractions, and stealth kills, to take down enemies without alerting others. The game allows players to seamlessly switch between samurai combat and stealth, offering a dynamic approach to every situation. This combination of brutal and quiet methods gives players the flexibility to tackle challenges in creative ways.



Immersive Narrative and Character Development:
 The story of Ghost of Tsushima revolves around Jin’s internal struggle as he faces the realities of war and the transformation from samurai to "Ghost," a figure who must adopt unconventional tactics to defeat the Mongols. As the narrative unfolds, players witness Jin's journey from loyalty to his samurai code to the adoption of guerrilla tactics, ultimately questioning his honor and what it means to protect his people. The relationships Jin forms with allies and enemies add depth and emotion to the story.



Stunning Visuals and Art Direction:
 Ghost of Tsushima's visuals are breathtaking, with the game's art direction inspired by traditional Japanese aesthetics. The vibrant, open world is rendered in stunning detail, from the shifting colors of the seasons to the swaying of tall grass in the wind. The game’s photo mode allows players to capture the beauty of Tsushima, making it easy to immortalize moments of cinematic action or peaceful tranquility. The world itself feels alive, as weather and time of day impact both gameplay and the atmosphere.



Customization and Progression:
 As players progress through the game, they can upgrade Jin's combat abilities, armor, and equipment. Unlocking new techniques and abilities allows players to tailor Jin's skillset to their preferred playstyle, whether they prefer direct combat, stealth, or a mix of both. The game also offers customization options for armor, with different sets providing unique bonuses and allowing players to match their visual style with their playstyle.



Epic Duels and Boss Fights:
 Ghost of Tsushima features epic, one-on-one duels against powerful enemies that test the player’s skill and timing. These duels are a centerpiece of the game, featuring a cinematic and methodical combat style where every move matters. The bosses are designed to challenge the player’s understanding of the combat mechanics, making each victory a hard-earned triumph.

mac_games.title: A Difficult Game About Climbing
mac_games.description:
A Difficult Game About Climbing is a punishing yet oddly rewarding platformer that pushes your skills and patience to the limit. Developed by Chimera Entertainment, this game challenges you to scale an unforgiving mountain where every misstep could send you tumbling back to the start. With precise controls, mind-bending obstacles, and a tongue-in-cheek sense of humor, A Difficult Game About Climbing delivers a masochistic experience that will keep you coming back for more, even as you curse the mountain's every twist and turn.



Game Features:



Brutal Precision Platforming:
 Every move counts in this ruthless climb. You’ll need flawless timing, sharp reflexes, and perfect execution to ascend. The mountain doesn't care about your mistakes; one wrong jump, misstep, or wrong angle will send you back to the bottom. Get ready to retry... a lot.



Mind-Bending Obstacles:
 Navigate through challenging terrain, including narrow ledges, precise jumps, and complex puzzles. The climb is not just physical; it's a test of your ability to problem-solve under pressure as you face absurd and ever-evolving obstacles that require both patience and skill.



Minimalist Controls, Maximum Difficulty:
 The controls are simple, but the challenge is anything but. You’ll quickly learn that every movement requires complete focus, as the smallest error can lead to a long fall or a missed opportunity. Expect to die. A lot. And learn to embrace it.



Philosophical Humor:
 While the climb itself is brutal, the game doesn't take itself too seriously. The journey is filled with quirky commentary, oddball characters, and absurd humor that balances the frustration with fun. It’s a reminder that sometimes the struggle is the reward.



Master the Mountain:
