Sid Meier's Civilization® VII is the next chapter in the legendary strategy series, where you can create the greatest empire in history.   

  The game offers:

  - Civilization development through the ages: Lead your empire through key stages of history, adapting to new conditions and gaining unique advantages in each era. 
 - Flexible development: Choose features and bonuses that suit your strategy and transform your empire with each new century.  
 - Unique Leaders: Play as historical leaders with special abilities that can be upgraded and combined to create new strategies.  
 - Detailed World: Explore a beautiful and diverse world where architecture and units reflect the cultural styles of your civilization.  
 - Accessibility: Improved tutorial and gameplay make the game accessible to both newcomers and series veterans. 
 Create an empire that will leave its mark on centuries and carve your path through history!

mac_games.title: Mafia III
mac_games.description:
New Bordeaux, 1968. 
 In Vietnam, Lincoln Clay learned one thing: family isn't who you grow up with, it's who you die for. But when the Italian Mafia stabs the black crime gang that once acted as Lincoln's family in the back, he creates a new family on the ruins of the old and sets out to exact revenge, brutally and skillfully. If you gather the right people and aren't afraid to get your hands dirty, you can rise to the top of the city's criminal underworld. There will be furious shootouts, brutal hand-to-hand combat, dizzying races, and tough decisions. 

 NEW BORDEAUX: 1968 NEW ORLEANS REIMAGINED
 A vast, diverse, and dark open world where crime and corruption rule. Experience one of the most turbulent times in American history. 

 A RECIPROCATED ANTIHERO, CRUEL AND DANGEROUS
 Live the life of Lincoln Clay, an orphan and Vietnam veteran whose only goal is to take revenge on the killers of his "real brothers", black gangsters killed by the Italian Mafia. 

 CHOOSE YOUR PATH TO VENGEANCE
 Choose your playstyle: from brute force and a hail of bullets to surveillance and stealth assassinations, using Lincoln's military training and collected intel in a bloody war with the mafia. 

 A NEW FAMILY ON THE RUINS 
 Build your own criminal empire by deciding which allies to reward and which to betray.

mac_games.title: Total War: ROME REMASTERED
mac_games.description: ROME REMASTERED is a classic game with a modern graphical design, optimized for 4K and ultra-wide screens, and native support for UHD resolution. The graphics have been improved across a wide range of game elements, including updated building and object models, as well as climate and weather phenomena (such as dust clouds and haze). The updated campaign maps feature high-resolution models, and the battlefield features new unit textures, with updated models as well.   \n\n ROME REMASTERED includes many modern features and improvements to game mechanics. The camera has been improved, map rotation has been added, and a larger zoom scale has been added to the campaign mode. Heat maps and new layer icons (such as diplomacy and security) have been added to the game mechanics. The tactical map now shows unit status and range icons, which will make it much easier to manage troops on the battlefield.

mac_games.title: Fallout Shelter
mac_games.description:
Fallout Shelter gives you the opportunity to manage a high-tech underground shelter from Vault-Tec. Build the best shelter, make its inhabitants happy, protect them from the dangers of the Wasteland. 

   Create the perfect shelter: 
 Build a bright future... underground! Choose modern interiors and gradually transform over 2,000 feet of caves into the perfect underground home.   

 Look after a thriving community: 
 Understand the needs of your charges and provide them with a happy life. Find the perfect activities for them, provide them with clothes and weapons, train them and exercise them.   

 Change of appearance: 
 Turn useless junk into new items! Change the appearance of residents in the hairdresser.  

  Take care of prosperity: 
 A good shelter requires specialists with different skills. Build a radio room to attract new inhabitants, or take an active interest in the personal lives of your charges - choose successful couples and bless the lovers!  

  Explore the wasteland: 
 Send your shelter inhabitants to the surface, explore the scorched desert, where dangers and adventures, useful finds or sudden death await them. Look for new armor and weapons, gain experience and earn caps! The main thing is not to let them die!  

  Protect your shelter: 
 From time to time, the idyllic life in the shelter may be disrupted by the dangers posed by a nuclear disaster. Vault dwellers must be prepared to protect their home from threats from outside... or from within.

mac_games.title: F1 2017
mac_games.description: Win the 2017 World Championship, break records in the fastest F1™ cars and race in some of the most iconic F1 cars of the last 30 years. With an even deeper 10-year career, more varied gameplay in Championships mode and a host of new features across both online and single-player modes, F1 2017 is the most complete and exciting F1 video game ever.  \n\n  In F1 2017, players will not only experience the unprecedented realism of Formula 1, but also manage a team and the engineering developments necessary to win. The already impressive career mode has received additional training programs that will help pilots learn and hone their skills. An expanded research tree provides greater depth and better control over the development of the car, as well as the ability to manage engine and gearbox changes during the season.

mac_games.title: The End of the Sun
mac_games.description:
The End of the Sun is a first-person mystical adventure game set in a world of Slavic beliefs, legends, and mythical creatures. A small village becomes the center of mysterious events, during which the line between myth and reality becomes dangerously thin.   

 Uncover the secrets hidden in the fire!
 As the Ash Priest, a time-traveling priest with knowledge of the other world, you follow the trail of an unusual fugitive and end up in a mysterious village. Unfortunately, there is no one there, at least not in the way you expected. All you find are burnt-out fireplaces.  

  The game is based on Slavic myths and legends. The plot reflects the events that took place during the main Slavic holidays at all times of the year with a large gap in time. The gameplay combines elements of exploration and adventure with non-standard puzzles, but the plot comes first here.  

  Feature list:
 Photogrammetry of ethnographic museums - to create unique graphics, we visited various ethnographic museums. We scanned hundreds of objects and entire buildings so that you can see them as they really are.   

 Time Travel - Move between four seasons that are located many years apart. Get to know the story of the same characters at different stages of their lives. Use your power to solve the mystery!   

 Compelling, non-linear storytelling - experience exciting adventures at your own pace and in your own time.   

 Consequences of time manipulation - strengthen the paths of fate and change the course of events to reveal new fragments of the game world and plot. 

   Slavic culture - immerse yourself in a fascinating story and get acquainted with the life and attributes of bygone times.   

 Exploration and open world - travel around the village and step by step get closer to uncovering the mystery.  

  Dynamic environment - time of day, weather and lighting will smoothly change before your eyes as the secret becomes clear.

mac_games.title: Poppy Playtime - Chapter 2
mac_games.description:
You have to go down deep into the toy factory. Puzzles and terrifying toys are waiting for you. Grab them and make your way to salvation. Try to escape - and do not let mommy find you. 

   Railway station: 
 Explore one of Playtime Co.'s most popular locations - the Play Station! The Train Station is more than just a stop... It's got games, a playground, and much, much more. And even better - the train comes straight from the factory.   

 New toys: 
 This factory is full of remnants of a twisted past - you just have to look deep enough. Let's ask Bunzo the Rabbit. Or maybe PJ the Pug has an idea. Or maybe... Mom knows?  

  Green Hand:
  The GrabPack family has a brand new Green Hand! Now you can transfer energy remotely! But that's not all... Now you can grab too! Innovation has done it again. 

 - Transfer energy wirelessly! 
 - Grab the pipes and swing over the missing floor. 
 - Fly! Something like that - you can grab straight up and more accurately. 

 Game time is not over yet - stay...

mac_games.title: Poppy Playtime
mac_games.description:
Poppy Playtime - this horror adventure has two goals - solve all the puzzles and survive. You will be hunted by bloodthirsty toys living in an abandoned factory. Use the grabber to manipulate the wires and reach distant objects. Explore the territory and avoid the clutches of monsters.  

  Welcome to Playtime Co.! 

 Playtime Company was once a leading toy manufacturer. Until one day, the factory suddenly became empty. Now, many years later, you go to this abandoned facility to find out the whole truth.   

 Toys: 
 You won't get bored with toys from Playtime Co.! Playtime produces Bot, Huggy, Bee Cat, Poppy and many other models. 

 Since you're at the Playtime Co. factory, why not stop by and check out the toys? Maybe you'll make friends...  

  Grabber: 
 The Grabber is a unique backpack to which two artificial hands are attached using steel wire. 

 This cutting-edge tool gives Playtime Co. workers a completely free hand. With the grabber, you can do anything! In the list of functions below, you will find all the possibilities of the grabber. 

 - The hands provide a strong grip, making it easy to move objects. 

 - Long and flexible wire allows you to reach objects at any distance. 

 - Metal wire conducts electricity well. 

 -The grabber has only one limitation - the length of the wire.

mac_games.title: Raji: An Ancient Epic
mac_games.description:
Raji: An Ancient Epic is a visually stunning action-adventure game that blends fast-paced combat with rich, mythological storytelling. Set in a vibrant, fantastical version of ancient India, Raji follows the journey of a young girl who must fight to save her kidnapped brother and protect the world from an impending demonic invasion. With its captivating art style, spiritual narrative, and engaging gameplay, Raji offers a unique and immersive experience that draws players into a world of gods, demons, and heroic deeds. 

 Game Features:

 Immersive Mythological World:
 Explore a beautifully crafted world inspired by Indian mythology, where every temple, village, and environment tells a story. From the lush jungles and vast deserts to the towering palaces and sacred shrines, Raji's world is teeming with history, culture, and lore. The hand-painted art style and intricate level design bring the world to life, giving players a deep sense of connection to the game’s vibrant setting. 

 Mythological Storytelling:
 Raji’s story is rooted in the ancient Indian epics, blending gods, demons, and mortal heroes into a narrative filled with powerful themes of duty, sacrifice, and courage. As Raji, a young woman chosen by the gods, you must battle against dark forces threatening to destroy the world, all while trying to rescue your brother, Golu. Along the way, you’ll receive guidance from divine beings like Vishnu, Durga, and other deities who lend their strength and wisdom to aid your cause. 

 Dynamic Combat System:
 Engage in fast-paced, fluid combat using a mix of melee weapons and divine powers. Raji can wield a variety of weapons, including a spear, shield, and bow, each with its own unique set of moves and combos. Unleash the power of the gods through divine abilities, from summoning elemental forces to harnessing supernatural powers that change the tide of battle. The combat feels tight and responsive, requiring both strategy and skill to overcome the growing threats of demons and mythological creatures. 

 Divine Powers and Upgrades:
 Throughout your journey, Raji can unlock powerful blessings from the gods, enhancing her abilities and granting her access to new divine powers. These abilities, including the power to control fire, wind, and lightning, can be used in creative ways to defeat enemies and solve environmental puzzles. As Raji grows stronger, her connection to the divine grows deeper, offering players a sense of progression and empowerment. 

 Environmental Interactions and Puzzles:
 In addition to its thrilling combat, Raji features puzzle-solving elements that take advantage of the game’s beautifully crafted environments. Players must solve intricate environmental puzzles, navigate through ancient temples, and use the environment to outsmart enemies. The puzzles are thoughtfully integrated into the world, making exploration rewarding and satisfying. 

 Rich Soundtrack and Voice Acting:
 The soundtrack of Raji features an evocative, traditional score that draws from Indian classical music, enhancing the emotional depth of the game. The music is complemented by high-quality voice acting that brings the characters and deities to life, further immersing players in the world of ancient India. 

 Stunning Visuals:
 The game’s distinct art style is inspired by Indian sculpture, architecture, and traditional art forms. Each level is meticulously designed, with hand-painted textures and vibrant colors that showcase the beauty of the world. The breathtaking vistas, intricate designs of temples, and character animations create a visually striking experience that sets Raji apart from other action-adventure titles. 

 Endless Replayability: 
While Raji offers a rich and focused single-player experience, its blend of action, exploration, and mythology invites players to revisit the world and discover hidden secrets. From upgrading divine abilities to unlocking different combat strategies, there’s plenty to explore and master in this epic adventure. 

 Playable on Multiple Platforms:
 Whether you're on PC, PlayStation, or Switch, Raji delivers a seamless, cross-platform experience with polished graphics and smooth gameplay. The Mac version ensures that the stunning visuals and fluid combat are fully accessible, bringing the mythological world of Raji to life wherever you choose to play. 

 With its unique setting, rich storytelling, and satisfying combat mechanics, Raji: An Ancient Epic stands as an exceptional adventure game that blends cultural storytelling with action-packed gameplay. Whether you're a fan of mythology or simply love a good action-adventure, Raji offers a captivating journey into the heart of India's ancient legends.

mac_games.title: A Way Out
mac_games.description:
A Way Out is a cooperative, story-driven action-adventure game developed by Hazelight Studios, offering a unique two-player experience where collaboration is the key to success. Unlike most games, A Way Out requires two players to team up and work together, either locally or online, to escape a high-stakes prison break and navigate a thrilling, emotional journey. Players assume the roles of Vincent and Leo, two inmates with contrasting personalities, each with their own motivations and backstory. As they form an unlikely partnership, they must rely on each other to overcome challenges, solve puzzles, and confront their pasts. 

 Game Features: 

 Co-Op Gameplay (Mandatory):
 A defining feature of A Way Out is its mandatory co-op gameplay. Every moment of the game is designed with collaboration in mind, making it a true partner experience. Whether you're solving puzzles, engaging in action-packed sequences, or escaping from dangerous situations, both players need to communicate and work together to progress through the game. It's a perfect experience for friends or couples looking to dive into a shared story. 

 Dual Protagonists:
 Take on the roles of Vincent, the more calculated and reserved character, and Leo, the impulsive and charismatic one. Each character has their own unique skills, motivations, and backstory, and as you switch between them (or work together), you get to experience different aspects of the narrative and gameplay. The contrasting personalities add depth to the story, creating moments of humor, tension, and emotional connection. 

 Dynamic Split-Screen:
 The game features a dynamic split-screen mechanic, ensuring that both players always see their respective characters' actions, even when they are apart. The split-screen adapts seamlessly based on the gameplay situation, whether you’re sneaking around, engaging in combat, or solving puzzles. This unique design keeps the co-op experience fresh and immersive throughout the journey. 

 Story-Driven Narrative:
 At its core, A Way Out is a narrative-driven game about escape, redemption, and the bonds formed under pressure. As Vincent and Leo work together to break out of prison and evade authorities, the game delves deep into their personal lives, exploring themes of loyalty, betrayal, and moral conflict. The story is filled with twists and turns, with multiple emotional beats that will keep players on the edge of their seats. 

 Varied Gameplay Mechanics:
 While the focus is on co-op puzzle-solving and story-driven moments, A Way Out also offers a variety of gameplay mechanics. From stealth sequences and hand-to-hand combat to thrilling car chases and gunfights, the game keeps things exciting with its diverse range of challenges. The ever-changing gameplay ensures that the pace remains fresh, avoiding repetition and keeping players engaged. 

 Seamless Transition Between Cinematics and Gameplay:
 A Way Out blends story and action flawlessly, with no traditional cutscenes. Cinematic moments transition directly into gameplay, maintaining immersion and giving the player the feeling of being part of the story at all times. The game’s visual style, coupled with realistic character animations, makes the entire experience feel like a seamless movie that you actively shape through your decisions and actions. 

 Tension and Drama:
 The game thrives on its emotional and dramatic moments, building tension between the protagonists as they face their pasts and their uncertain futures. The relationship between Vincent and Leo is central to the narrative, and their evolving trust and camaraderie create a powerful emotional anchor. As the story unfolds, players are forced to make difficult decisions that test their friendship and morality. 

 Replayability:
 Though A Way Out is a linear experience, its replayability lies in its co-op dynamics. Playing through the game with a different partner offers a fresh perspective on the story, with new interactions, dialogue, and ways to tackle certain obstacles. You’ll uncover different facets of each character's personality and learn more about the narrative with every playthrough. 

 Online and Local Co-Op:
 Whether you’re playing with a friend sitting next to you on the couch or connecting with someone online, A Way Out ensures that the experience is accessible to all types of players. The game is designed to be fun and engaging no matter how you choose to play, emphasizing the importance of teamwork regardless of distance. 

 In A Way Out, every decision and action is shaped by the connection between the two players. It’s a gripping, emotional journey that explores the strength of human bonds and the lengths people will go to for freedom. With its unique co-op mechanics and narrative depth, A Way Out offers a one-of-a-kind gaming experience that’s perfect for anyone looking to share a compelling story with a friend.

mac_games.title: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim
mac_games.description:
The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim for Mac is a critically acclaimed open-world RPG that immerses players in a vast, detailed fantasy world filled with ancient dragons, powerful magic, and deep lore. Developed by Bethesda Game Studios, Skyrim offers players a chance to explore the northern province of Tamriel as the Dragonborn, a hero with the unique ability to absorb dragon souls and unlock legendary powers. With endless quests, a rich narrative, and an expansive world, Skyrim delivers a truly epic experience that adapts to every player's choices. 

 Game Features: 

 Open-World Exploration:
 Roam the vast landscapes of Skyrim, from the snowy peaks of the Throat of the World to the dense forests and sprawling cities below. Every corner of the world is filled with secrets, quests, and dangers, giving you the freedom to explore at your own pace. Whether you're climbing mountains, traversing dungeons, or interacting with NPCs, the world is alive with opportunities. 

 Role-Playing Depth:
 Create and customize your Dragonborn to fit your playstyle. Choose from a variety of races and classes, from powerful Nords and sneaky Khajiit to mystic High Elves. Develop your character by choosing from an array of skills, such as swordsmanship, archery, destruction magic, and stealth. Your decisions throughout the game shape who you become and how the world reacts to you. 

 Dynamic Combat:
 Engage in intense combat with a wide range of weapons, spells, and tactics. Whether you're swinging a greatsword, casting fireballs, or sneaking up to deliver a silent assassination, combat feels responsive and rewarding. Use the power of Shouts, ancient dragon abilities that can unleash devastating effects in battle, to turn the tide in your favor. 

 Rich Story and Lore:
 Skyrim’s deep, rich lore is filled with history, mythology, and epic stories of ancient civilizations and gods. As the Dragonborn, your journey revolves around preventing the return of an ancient dragon, Alduin, who threatens to destroy the world. Along the way, interact with countless factions, such as the Thieves Guild, Dark Brotherhood, and Companions, each offering their own unique quests and rewards. 

 Endless Quests and Side Activities:
 Beyond the main story, Skyrim offers an unparalleled number of side quests, dungeon crawls, and hidden treasures. Whether you’re crafting weapons and armor, hunting wild animals, or simply taking a stroll through the market, there's always something to do. With the addition of mods on the Mac version, your adventure can be endlessly expanded with new content created by the Skyrim community. 

 Environmental Interactions:
 Skyrim’s world is incredibly interactive, allowing players to engage with nearly every object in the environment. Use your surroundings to your advantage in battle, or take time to enjoy the scenic beauty of the land. The dynamic weather, changing seasons, and day-night cycle add to the atmosphere, making every moment feel immersive and real. 

 Mod Support (Mac):
 Skyrim for Mac supports mods, enabling players to enhance and personalize their experience with new content, from graphical upgrades to new quests and characters. The active modding community ensures that no two playthroughs are ever the same, and you can continue to enjoy fresh content long after completing the main story. 

 Endless Replayability:
 With multiple factions to join, dozens of unique quests, and a variety of possible outcomes depending on your choices, Skyrim offers virtually unlimited replayability. Customize your character, explore different playstyles, and discover all the secrets the world has to offer. Every playthrough is a new journey in this legendary RPG. 

 Whether you’re a veteran of the Elder Scrolls series or a newcomer to the world of Tamriel, The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim for Mac delivers an unforgettable adventure that has captivated millions of players worldwide.

mac_games.title: Prince of Persia: Warrior Within
mac_games.description:
Awaken the ruthless Warrior within! Having narrowly escaped death, the Prince must face his most feared enemy. The mythical creature Dahaka will not rest until he kills our hero. In defense of his life,   

 The prince sets sail for the mysterious and sinister Cursed Island, where he will encounter hordes of creatures of darkness. Fortunately, our hero is no longer the romantic we knew before.   

 He has become tough and ruthless, he has a whole arsenal of new weapons and fighting techniques, he is ready to meet any danger... is he ready? 

   In Prince of Persia: Warrior Within you will find a much more dynamic and complex combat system than in the previous part, The Sands of Time. Freedom of battle, a great selection of swords, axes, maces and weapons from improvised objects - crush your enemies in style!

mac_games.title: Sifu
mac_games.description:
Sifu is an intense, martial arts-inspired action game developed by Sloclap that combines fast-paced combat, tight mechanics, and a unique narrative structure. Set in a gritty, modern-day world, you take on the role of a young martial artist on a relentless quest for vengeance against those who wronged him. With every battle and every defeat, the protagonist ages, gaining strength but losing time—forcing you to confront both the power and the consequences of your actions. 

 Game Features:

 Martial Arts Combat:
 Master a dynamic, hand-to-hand combat system that blends fluid combos, precise timing, and strategic use of environmental objects. Each fight is a dance of aggression and defense, with deep mechanics that reward skillful execution. Perfecting your techniques and learning from every defeat is key to survival. 

 Age Mechanic:
 Every time you fail in combat, you age—and with each passing year, you grow more powerful, but at a cost. Aging unlocks new abilities and strength, but also means fewer years left to complete your mission. The cycle of life, death, and rebirth is a central theme of the game, pushing players to balance risk with reward and carefully consider each fight. 

 Challenging Difficulty:
 Sifu’s difficulty is unforgiving, demanding precision, patience, and adaptability. Combat is a test of your reflexes and understanding of your opponent’s movements. The game punishes mistakes but rewards persistence, offering a satisfying progression for players who embrace the challenge. 

 Vibrant Visual Style:
 The game’s striking art direction takes inspiration from classic martial arts films, blending fluid animation with bold, stylized visuals. Each environment is meticulously designed to reflect the game's themes of revenge and perseverance, with colorful, immersive settings that enhance the visceral feel of the combat. 

 Narrative-Driven Journey:
 Follow the protagonist’s emotional journey as he hunts down his enemies one by one. With each encounter, players piece together fragments of the story, slowly unraveling the tragic tale of loss, betrayal, and redemption. The nonlinear narrative structure ensures that no two playthroughs are the same, offering a deeply personal and evolving experience. 

 Environmental Interaction:
 The game’s combat system encourages players to use their surroundings to their advantage. Fight in tight alleys, use poles, crates, and even walls to perform devastating moves. Your surroundings are just as much a weapon as your fists, adding an extra layer of strategy to every battle. 

 Refined Progression System:
 As you age and progress through your journey, you unlock new abilities that can be tailored to your playstyle. Whether focusing on speed, power, or defensive techniques, the skill tree allows for a highly customizable combat experience. Your choices shape your approach to each fight and can dramatically change how you tackle obstacles.

mac_games.title: What Remains of Edith Finch
mac_games.description:
What Remains of Edith Finch is a thought-provoking first-person narrative adventure developed by Giant Sparrow. Set in the mysterious and sprawling Finch family home, the game invites you to explore the lives and tragic fates of the Finches, all through the eyes of Edith, the last surviving member of the family. As you uncover the forgotten history of each family member, you piece together a puzzle of life, death, and the intricate web of memories that define the Finch legacy. 

 Game Features: 

 Narrative-Driven Exploration:
 Step into the shoes of Edith Finch as she returns to her family home, which has been abandoned for years. As you explore the house, each room and object tells a story, revealing the personal lives and strange deaths of the Finches. The nonlinear storytelling style lets you experience each story in a unique way, seamlessly blending emotional depth with interactive storytelling. 

 Emotional Storytelling:
 What Remains of Edith Finch is a deeply emotional journey that touches on themes of family, loss, and the fleeting nature of life. Each narrative is not just a story of death but an exploration of the human experience, making you reflect on the fragile nature of existence. The game offers a meditation on memory, and its bittersweet moments linger long after the story concludes. 

 Interactive Storytelling:
 Experience the lives of the Finch family through a variety of interactive scenarios. Each family member’s story is presented as a different mini-game, allowing you to engage in different styles of gameplay—from playing through the eyes of a child to flying through the sky as a bird. These shifts in gameplay style keep the experience fresh, while also helping to convey the varied lives and perspectives of the Finches. 

 Atmospheric World-Building:
 The Finch family home is a character in itself, filled with secrets, hidden rooms, and details that reflect the family’s strange and tragic history. Its decaying rooms, odd architecture, and eerie atmosphere create a sense of melancholy and wonder. The environment is intricately designed, with each corner of the house revealing more about the family’s past and the impact of their deaths on Edith. 

 Thought-Provoking Themes:
 At its core, What Remains of Edith Finch is a rumination on death, legacy, and what it means to be remembered. The game doesn’t shy away from the darker aspects of life, but it also celebrates the beauty of memory and the stories that define us. It raises powerful questions about how we live, how we remember, and how we cope with loss, offering a reflective experience that is both sad and uplifting. 

 Stunning Visuals and Art Direction:
 The game’s rich visual style, with its blend of realistic and stylized art, complements the emotional weight of its storytelling. The vibrant and haunting environments, paired with the attention to detail in every scene, help to evoke a sense of nostalgia and melancholy. Each area feels like an intimate portrait of a person or a moment in time, contributing to the overall atmosphere of the game. 

 Innovative Storytelling:
 Rather than following a traditional linear path, What Remains of Edith Finch uses its open-world house as a metaphor for uncovering the past. The fragmented nature of the story and its nonlinear structure encourage players to explore at their own pace, discovering new pieces of the Finch family puzzle in an organic way. Each story feels self-contained yet part of a larger narrative, creating a seamless experience of discovery. 

 Personal Reflection:
 The game is an emotional journey that encourages introspection and reflection on our own lives, losses, and memories. As you explore the house and uncover the hidden stories of each family member, you’ll likely find yourself questioning your own relationship with family and mortality. The game’s subtle yet powerful approach to storytelling leaves a lasting impact that stays with you long after you’ve finished.

mac_games.title: Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice
mac_games.description:
Hellblade: Senua’s Sacrifice is a haunting action-adventure game developed by Ninja Theory that immerses players in a psychological journey through the mind of its troubled protagonist. Set in the Viking Age, you play as Senua, a warrior on a quest to rescue the soul of her dead lover from the Norse underworld. As she battles both physical and mental demons, the line between reality and hallucination blurs, drawing you into a deeply emotional and immersive experience.

  Game Features:

  Psychological Horror:
 Experience the intense psychological struggle of Senua as the game vividly portrays her battle with psychosis. Voices in her head, disturbing visions, and ever-present hallucinations make every step of her journey feel unpredictable and unsettling. The game challenges your perceptions, leaving you questioning what’s real and what’s imagined. 

 Combat and Exploration: 
Master a fast-paced combat system that blends brutal melee fighting with strategic decision-making. Fight off terrifying foes while exploring the dense, atmospheric environments inspired by Norse mythology. Every combat encounter tests your skills, while exploration unearths hidden lore and symbolism that ties into Senua’s fractured psyche. 

 Unique Audio Design:
 The game uses binaural audio to immerse players fully in Senua’s mind, with voices and sounds coming from different directions, intensifying the feeling of paranoia and confusion. The sound design plays a critical role in how you navigate the world and engage with the story, making it a truly unique experience that needs to be played with headphones. 

 Story-Driven Adventure: 
Follow Senua’s deeply emotional and personal journey as she grapples with loss, guilt, and a relentless drive for redemption. The narrative is a blend of mythological lore and personal trauma, where each decision Senua makes is influenced by her inner turmoil and her perception of the world around her. 

 Stunning Visuals:
 Hellblade: Senua’s Sacrifice features a striking visual style, with photorealistic character models and environments that bring the Viking world to life. The haunting landscapes and detailed textures make the world feel both ancient and otherworldly, enhancing the game’s atmosphere of isolation and unease. 

 Innovative Storytelling: 
The game’s nonlinear storytelling and immersive narrative keep you engaged, gradually unveiling the complexities of Senua’s mental state and her quest. With no clear-cut heroes or villains, the story challenges you to empathize with Senua’s journey, creating a powerful emotional connection. 

 Darker Themes:
 Explore the depths of trauma, loss, and mental illness through Senua’s eyes. The game doesn’t shy away from the difficult aspects of her psyche, portraying her struggles in a raw and realistic manner. This poignant portrayal gives the game an emotional weight that resonates long after you’ve put down the controller.

mac_games.title: The Evil Within 2
mac_games.description:
The Evil Within 2 is a harrowing psychological horror game developed by Tango Gameworks and published by Bethesda Softworks. As a sequel to the critically acclaimed The Evil Within, the game follows detective Sebastian Castellanos as he is drawn back into a nightmarish world filled with grotesque creatures, twisted realities, and unsettling mysteries. This time, he's not just fighting for his own survival—he’s on a desperate quest to rescue his daughter, Lily, who has mysteriously disappeared. 

 Game Features: 

 Twisted Reality and Evolving World: 
Venture through a disturbing open world, where every step could lead to unimaginable horrors. The environment shifts and changes unexpectedly, with surreal landscapes and shifting realities that keep you guessing at every turn. What’s real, and what’s just a product of Sebastian’s fractured mind? Only by delving deeper can you uncover the truth. 

 Tense Combat and Stealth Mechanics:
 Survival is never guaranteed. Engage in brutal combat against horrific monsters or sneak past terrifying enemies using stealth and strategy. The limited resources will force you to make tough choices, balancing between conserving ammo, crafting new tools, and deciding when to fight or run for your life. 

 Emotional Storytelling:
 At its core, The Evil Within 2 is a deeply emotional journey. As Sebastian battles his own personal demons, the game explores themes of loss, guilt, and redemption. The bond between father and daughter is at the heart of the narrative, driving Sebastian to push forward through unimaginable horrors in order to save the one person who still means everything to him. 

 Innovative Horror Design: 
The game’s disturbing atmosphere is amplified by its inventive creature designs, grotesque environments, and a chilling soundtrack that heightens the terror. Whether it's grotesque monsters lurking in the shadows or grotesque deformities stumbling toward you, every encounter is guaranteed to keep you on edge. 

 Dynamic AI and Threats: 
As you explore, unpredictable enemies with advanced AI will keep you constantly on alert. Whether it’s facing down a terrifying supernatural foe or being hunted by more tactical, human-like adversaries, The Evil Within 2 keeps you questioning who— or what—is out to get you. 

 Exploration and Puzzle-Solving: 
Unlock secrets of the nightmarish world as you search for clues, solve puzzles, and discover hidden areas that reveal more about the mystery at hand. Exploration is key to survival, as hidden items and upgrades are scattered throughout the dangerous environments, offering a slight advantage against the chaos you face. 

 Expanded World and Varied Locations: 
From decaying suburban streets to grotesque, otherworldly environments, the world of The Evil Within 2 is as expansive as it is terrifying. Each new location is more unsettling than the last, filled with dangers, mysteries, and secrets waiting to be uncovered. 

 Increased Customization:
 Sebastian’s journey is enhanced by an expanded upgrade system, allowing you to customize your weapons, skills, and survival tactics. Whether you specialize in crafting traps, improving combat efficiency, or enhancing stealth, the choices you make shape your survival in this twisted nightmare. 

 The Evil Within 2 is an unrelenting psychological horror experience, blending intense action, chilling atmosphere, and a gripping emotional narrative into a terrifying journey that will keep you on the edge of your seat.

mac_games.title: Hello Neighbor 2
mac_games.description:
Hello Neighbor 2 is a thrilling stealth horror game developed by Dynamic Pixels and published by tinyBuild. Set in the same eerie universe as its predecessor, you play as a new character who moves into a small town where all the residents have mysteriously disappeared. As you investigate the strange disappearances, you must sneak around, solve puzzles, and uncover dark secrets hidden beneath the surface of your seemingly quiet neighborhood. 

 Game Features: 

 Dynamic AI System:
 The game’s advanced AI keeps you on your toes, with neighbors who learn from your every action. The more you play, the more unpredictable they become, constantly evolving to keep you guessing and on the run. 

 Gripping Mystery:
 Delve deeper into a world of eerie suspense as you uncover the secrets behind the disappearances in the town. What is your neighbor hiding? The more you explore, the darker and more twisted the truth becomes. 

 Stealth and Problem-Solving:
 Navigate through challenging puzzles and stealth-based scenarios, using clever tactics to avoid detection. Hide, distract, and outsmart your neighbors while piecing together clues to move closer to the truth. 

 Expanded World: 
Unlike the first game, Hello Neighbor 2 opens up a whole new neighborhood to explore. From creepy houses to hidden locations, each environment is brimming with secrets to discover, all while evading increasingly dangerous threats. 

 Chilling Atmosphere:
 With a hauntingly immersive soundscape, the game creates an unnerving atmosphere where danger feels just around the corner. The feeling that someone—or something—is always watching you builds the tension as you venture deeper into the mystery. 

 New Neighbors, New Challenges:
 In addition to the main antagonist, the game introduces a variety of unpredictable AI-driven characters who will stop at nothing to stop you. Each one presents its own set of challenges and adds to the ever-present danger.

mac_games.title: Hello Neighbor: Hide and Seek
mac_games.description:
Hello Neighbor: Hide and Seek is a spin-off and prequel to the original Hello Neighbor, developed by Dynamic Pixels and published by tinyBuild. In this game, you step into the shoes of the young child of the mysterious neighbor, exploring the emotional and mysterious story behind the family's strange happenings. Unlike the first game, Hide and Seek focuses more on puzzle-solving, stealth, and the deepening of the story through an eerie, atmospheric journey. 

 Game Features:

  Heart-Wrenching Storyline:
 Uncover the tragic backstory behind the neighbor’s strange behavior as you play through a series of hide-and-seek games. The narrative dives deep into themes of family, loss, and childhood imagination, with emotional moments that reveal the painful events that shaped the neighbor's world. 

 Stealth and Hide-and-Seek Mechanics: 
Unlike the original Hello Neighbor, Hide and Seek focuses more on clever stealth mechanics, where you must hide, evade, and sneak around in various environments. The hide-and-seek games you play with your sibling are both tense and emotionally charged, combining action with narrative-driven gameplay. 

 Creative, Themed Environments:
 Each level presents a unique environment tied to the child’s imagination, turning ordinary spaces into extraordinary, dreamlike settings. From playing in a garden to navigating a massive indoor playground, each level offers a fresh experience with distinct puzzles.

  Challenging AI: 
The AI from the original Hello Neighbor is present here too, but with more of a focus on hiding and evading. The enemy NPCs adapt and learn your behavior, creating a more dynamic experience that challenges your ability to stay undetected. 

 Puzzle-Solving and Exploration:
 Navigate through beautifully designed environments while solving creative puzzles that slowly unravel the emotional and tragic story of the family. The game mixes stealth with puzzle-solving in a way that’s both engaging and rewarding. 

 Stunning Art Style & Emotional Music:
 The game’s art style is uniquely crafted to blend childhood imagination with a sense of eerie mystery. Paired with an atmospheric soundtrack, it creates an emotionally resonant experience that stays with you long after the game ends.

mac_games.title: Hello Neighbor
mac_games.description:
Hello Neighbor is a suspenseful stealth horror game developed by Dynamic Pixels and published by tinyBuild. In this game, you play as a curious neighbor trying to uncover the dark secrets hidden inside your mysterious neighbor’s house. The game combines puzzle-solving, stealth, and tense moments as you sneak around and avoid being caught by an increasingly intelligent AI that learns from your every move.

  Game Features: 

 Unique AI System:
 The neighbor’s artificial intelligence adapts to your actions. If you get caught, the neighbor will set up traps or change his tactics to prevent you from succeeding next time, making each playthrough unpredictable. 

 Intriguing Storyline:
 Dive into a chilling mystery as you investigate your neighbor’s strange behavior. What are they hiding behind those walls? Unravel clues to uncover a sinister plot that will keep you hooked until the end. 

 Stealth and Strategy:
 Use your wits to sneak around, set distractions, and avoid detection while you solve puzzles to progress deeper into the neighbor's home. Every decision you make affects the outcome. 

 Immersive Environments:
 Explore a vast, interactive house filled with secret rooms, hidden passages, and bizarre puzzles. The house itself becomes a character as you discover new areas and face unexpected challenges. 

 Tense Gameplay & Atmosphere:
 The game builds an eerie atmosphere with its creepy sounds, unpredictable moments, and the feeling that you’re always being watched. The neighbor’s relentless pursuit adds a constant layer of tension as you try to outsmart him.

mac_games.title: NieR Automata
mac_games.description:
Nier: Automata is an action-packed, critically acclaimed role-playing game (RPG) developed by PlatinumGames and published by Square Enix. Set in a post-apocalyptic future, the game follows androids 2B, 9S, and A2 as they battle for survival against mysterious alien machines. With its deep narrative, stunning visuals, and a mix of fast-paced combat and exploration, Nier: Automata has garnered praise for its emotional storytelling, multiple endings, and dynamic gameplay mechanics.





Game Features:



Compelling Storyline: 
Experience a gripping tale that delves into themes of consciousness, existentialism, and the human condition, set against a ruined Earth after humanity’s departure.


Engaging Combat System:
 Featuring fluid, combo-heavy combat, the game offers both close and ranged combat with easy-to-learn mechanics, but also high difficulty for seasoned players.


Multiple Playable Characters:
 Play as 2B, 9S, and A2, each offering unique abilities and perspectives on the story, encouraging replaying the game to fully experience all the twists and endings.


Open-World Exploration: 
Roam across diverse landscapes, from desolate cities to forests overtaken by machines, while discovering secrets, side quests, and upgrading your equipment.


Stunning Visuals & Music:
 A mesmerizing art style combines with a beautiful, atmospheric soundtrack that enhances the emotional depth of the game.

mac_games.title: Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot
mac_games.description:
Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot 

   Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot is an action role-playing game (RPG) based on the immensely popular Dragon Ball Z anime and manga series. Developed by CyberConnect2 and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment, the game takes players on an unforgettable journey through the classic Dragon Ball Z storyline, allowing them to experience the adventures and iconic battles of the series in a whole new way. 

 As Goku (Kakarot), players can relive key moments from the anime, battling legendary foes such as Frieza, Cell, and Majin Buu, while also exploring the vast world of Dragon Ball Z. The game features an open-world structure, fast-paced combat, RPG mechanics, and side missions that further immerse players into the Dragon Ball universe. 

 Key Features:

 Epic Storyline:
  -Play through the entire Dragon Ball Z saga, from Goku's early days to his final battle with Majin Buu. Experience iconic moments from the series such as the Saiyan Saga, Frieza Saga, Cell Saga, and Buu Saga.
 -Control Goku, as well as other fan-favorite characters like Vegeta, Piccolo, Gohan, and Trunks. Each character has unique abilities and moves to master.

 Open World Exploration:
  -Explore a large, vibrant open world filled with rich environments from the Dragon Ball Z universe, such as the peaceful plains of Earth, the Capsule Corporation, and the dangerous Namekian landscape.
 -Interact with NPCs, complete side quests, hunt for collectibles, and unlock new locations as you progress through the story.

 Action-Packed Combat:
  -Engage in dynamic, real-time combat that is fast, fluid, and full of spectacular special moves like the Kamehameha and Final Flash.
 -Switch between characters during combat, using their unique abilities and powers to unleash devastating combos.
 -Battle against both regular enemies and powerful bosses, each with their own distinct fighting styles and tactics.

 Role-Playing Elements:
  -Level up Goku and other characters by gaining experience points through combat, side missions, and exploration.
 -Unlock new abilities, moves, and transformations, such as the Super Saiyan transformations. -Equip various items and Z-Orbs to enhance your character's stats and combat effectiveness.

 Side Missions & Activities:
  -In addition to the main story, engage in side quests such as fishing, cooking, and training with other characters to strengthen your skills.
 -Train under the guidance of iconic masters like Piccolo, Vegeta, and King Kai to improve your fighting techniques.
 -Build relationships with characters through interactions and additional mini-games.

 Stunning Visuals:
  -Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot features vibrant, cel-shaded graphics that stay true to the anime’s art style while bringing the world of Dragon Ball Z to life in stunning 3D.
 -Enjoy cinematic cutscenes and in-game visuals that closely mirror the anime's iconic moments.

 Post-Launch Content:
  -Additional DLC packs and expansions have been released, offering new story arcs, characters, and challenges. These include the Battle of Gods and Resurrection ‘F’ storylines, featuring characters like Beerus and Golden Frieza.

mac_games.title: Little Nightmares II
mac_games.description:
Return to the world of charming horror in Little Nightmares II, a suspense-filled adventure game in which you play as Mono, a boy trapped in a world warped by a Transmission from a distant tower.

 With Six, a girl in a yellow cloak, as his guide, Mono attempts to uncover the dark secrets of the Lighthouse. On their arduous journey, Mono and Six will face many new threats from the world's terrifying inhabitants.

 Do you dare to face these new little nightmares?

mac_games.title: WWE 2K Battlegrounds
mac_games.description:
Get ready for over-the-top action and arcade-style gameplay with WWE 2K Battlegrounds, now available for download on your MacBook Air! Step into the ring and experience the world of WWE like never before with unique, cartoon-inspired visuals and fast-paced, energetic matches.

  Game Features:

 Fast-Paced, Fun Gameplay: 
Take control of your favorite WWE Superstars, each with their own special moves and abilities, and fight your way through outrageous battlegrounds.

 Exciting Modes: 
Play in various modes, including Exhibition Matches, Campaign Mode, and Online Multiplayer, for endless hours of entertainment.

 Customizable Fighters:
 Customize your fighter’s appearance, moves, and gear to create the ultimate champion.

 Hilarious, Over-the-Top Action:
 WWE 2K Battlegrounds features insane, larger-than-life moves and environmental interactions that make every match unpredictable and fun.

mac_games.title: Need for Speed: Most Wanted Black Edition
mac_games.description: All events in Need for Speed: Most Wanted take place in the fall, but only during the day, not at night. The gameplay is focused on street racing. The main, story mode of the game is "Career". As in the previous part of the series, Need for Speed: Underground 2, the player is given freedom of movement around the city. During free driving, the player can find racing icons; the appearance of these icons depends on the type of competition.  \n\n  Unlike Underground 2, in Most Wanted the player does not have to drive to the race location in the city, but can instead choose to race in a garage. In addition to races, the city can be found in the player's garages (English Safehouses), car markets and spare parts stores, which open during the game. Radars can also be found in the city. If you drive past them at the required speed, the player will receive an additional rating.

mac_games.title: Garden Story
mac_games.description:
A calm game about a cozy village
 Travel through four seasons in an atmospheric world full of strange fruits and vegetables! As the new Guardian of the Grove, you must restore the village and uncover the secrets of the island.  

  Grow with the city
 Do the daily chores: protect, repair and improve the city. As you play, you will unlock memories that will help Harmony gain the powers of her predecessors.  

 Enjoy your journey: build and gather resources
 Listen to the pleasant music of the island and relax in the cozy atmosphere of the Grove. Grow gardens, collect libraries and communicate with interesting characters that you will meet along the way.  
 
 Play at your own pace
 Only have 12 minutes? That's enough for a quick game. Want to stay longer? Restore the Grove at your own pace. Either way, the neighbors will always have requests for help. They're counting on a new Guardian!   
 
 Features for everyone
 If you like to play through the story without intense battles, activate "Death Disable" in the settings. This feature will also help you get through difficult enemies or bosses.  
 
 Peculiarities:

  -Explore a Rich Living World Immerse yourself in the vibrant and organic ecosystem of the Grove, with four unique (and very cute!) regions. 
 
  - Help your neighbors Take on chores, fulfill requests, and be an example for local residents. Show them how great it is to help each other. And don’t be afraid to ask for help — it’s much easier to fix everything together!  
 
 -Fight the Rot Solve puzzles and fight off the Rot in the most dangerous parts of the Grove. But be careful - the most formidable Rot has settled in the depths!  
 
 -Try out different equipment Various items will help you gather resources, grow gardens, beat rot, solve puzzles, and sometimes even treat yourself to a musical break! 
 
  -Cultivate your home Work in the garden, collect resources, fill up libraries, improve tools and rebuild buildings.

mac_games.title: Songs of Conquest
mac_games.description:
Songs of Conquest is a turn-based strategy game inspired by the classics of the nineties. Control powerful sorcerers, the Lords, and wander through unknown lands. Defeat those who dare to challenge you. Collect powerful artifacts. Make the world fall at your feet!  

  Adventure awaits 
 Explore a variety of maps with a variety of enemies and valuable loot. Different biomes offer unique enemies, landscapes, and battlefields.  

  Build an empire 
 Distribute resources wisely, conduct research, and expand your borders. Customize your cities to suit your needs: are you closer to brute force, sorcery, or a little bit of everything? Many different paths lead to greatness.  

  Fight
  A deep combat system with unique fighter abilities and powerful magic. Unite your troops to deal a crushing blow to the enemy. Block passages and take the high ground - turn the battlefield into your ally. 

   Built-in level editor 
 The level editor allows you to create your own adventures using developer tools. Create campaign and scenario maps, write event scripts and dialogues, customize the music and share the result with the world!  

  Four factions
  Four powerful factions have come together in battle for the fate of the world. The knights of ancient Arleon, fighting for the royal throne. The tribes of Rana, who have survived for centuries in dangerous swamps. The necromancers of Lot, who create a wonderful future by resurrecting the dead. The mercenaries and inventors of Baria, who value money and independence above all else.  

  Choir of voices 
 Bards will sing your way to glory. Each campaign has a unique song that tells the story of your rise and fall. New verses are unlocked with each mission, and at the end you will find the full version of the ballad.

mac_games.title: Minami Lane
mac_games.description:
Minami Lane is a small, useful management game set in a Japanese-style street. Create and manage your own street, keep everyone happy, and watch the villagers go about their daily lives! Enjoy 2-4 hours of gameplay, cute tanuki, and lots of cats! 

   Build Your Street
 Build houses to add residents to your street, then improve their happiness by landscaping every inch and building a variety of shops and attractions! These include ramen shops, boba cafes, bookstores, and more, each with unique inventory and effects.  

  Manage Your Stores
 Attract customers with everything from flower bouquets to karaoke! The stores you create will need your careful management to offer the right products at the right prices. Lead them to success and make your neighborhood prosperous. 

   Observe the lives of your residents.
 As you start the day, you will see how each resident reacts to your street and offers useful tips for improvement! Remember their preferences and improve your street the next day.  

  Achieve your goals
 Complete tasks to unlock new levels with more buildings, types of residents and other surprises. 

   What Minami Lane offers:
 -2-4 hours of play
 -Create and customize your own charming street
 -Manage shops by customizing their inventory, recipes, and prices
 -Play strategically to complete each level's objectives
 -Keep the street clean by picking up trash
 -Tanuki and cats!

    What Minami Lane doesn't offer:
 -Hardcore strategy
 -Multiplayer
 -Tons of missions
 -New levels after release 

   In Minami Lane's missions, you'll have to strategically plan each day and use elements like random events to your advantage to complete a variety of objectives.   

 Sandbox mode is focused on creativity and relaxation, allowing you to immerse yourself in a peaceful, cozy world without the stress of challenging tasks.

mac_games.title: Echoes of the Plum Grove
mac_games.description:
A new life awaits you in Honeywood! You've washed up on the shores of an island, and you've got a modest plot of land under your control. It's time to roll up your sleeves, stock up on tools, and get to work building a farm that will be inhabited not by people, but by entire generations! 

   Echoes of Plum Grove is a simple and cute farm simulator where your decisions have consequences! What to plant, what to stock up on for the winter, who to befriend – all this will affect not only the town of Honeywood itself, but also the fate of the entire island. 

   With the arrival of winter, players will face new and dangerous challenges. With survival at stake, you will need to farm, fish, cook, craft, gather resources, and more to survive the freezing temperatures. If you are not prepared, your dynasty may end before you even begin to uncover the secrets of the island. 

   Even if your main goal is survival, Honeywood knows how to have fun. Unforgettable holidays and celebrations await you.   

 Honeywood is a cozy town, the heart of which is undoubtedly its inhabitants. Each inhabitant of the island has their own plans, work, characteristics, hobbies and children.   

 Work together with your fellow citizens to ensure that your community grows and prospers, or get rid of them with harsh words and decisive measures so that they do not interfere.  

  Building relationships is the main goal in Echoes of the Plum Grove. Your family tree will grow, and one day your first character will pass away. After that, you will have to play as another family member!  

  But while you're busy socializing, don't forget to explore the island. It's full of secrets and mysteries. Rumor has it that a witch lives somewhere on the island, bringing all sorts of strange things to the town. Others swear they've seen some strange creature in the creek. Few people have been interested in what's lurking in the depths of the mines. Head to the farthest corners of the island to find out what other adventures the world of Echoes of Plum Grove holds!

mac_games.title: Starcom: Nexus
mac_games.description:
So, the academy is behind you! You are tasked with commanding your first ship. Sure, it's just a light shuttle, but you have to start somewhere. And that "something" turns out to be an unknown galaxy, hostile aliens, and no way home. 

   Explore the beautiful and mysterious open world of Starcom: Nexus. This is a whole universe where you will fight or befriend strange alien races, find ancient artifacts, study advanced technologies and build your own unique starship.  

  Peculiarities: 
 - A game universe that is a completely open world with many quests and storylines. 
 - Hundreds of unique planetary anomalies, space discoveries, artifacts and much more! 
 - Fast, exciting battles with numerous hostile factions. 
 - More than 150 technologies available for study. 
 - Ability to build your own ship using a modular system. 
 - Diplomacy and trade with numerous alien races, each with their own motivations and dynamic AI. 
 - Lots of secrets and side quests. 
 - Possibility of quick saving at any time. 
 - Much, much more!

mac_games.title: Wingspan
mac_games.description:
WINGSPAN (WINGS) is a collectible card game based on the board game of the same name. The personal computer version is designed for sessions of one to five people. Players play the role of ornithologists, studying new bird species and trying to collect and bring as many rare individuals as possible to the nature reserve.  

  By collecting various birds around the world, more points are awarded to those who manage to get a unique and endangered species. Using a deck of cards, players create various chains of events and properties in a certain habitat. What these environments will be is determined individually and depends on the method of developing the reserve. WINGSPAN has a huge variety and variability.   

 The game will constantly progress and provide new opportunities. Initially, a basic set of cards will be available, but the more the reserve develops, the more opportunities will be available for further play. The gameplay allows you to compete not only with friends or random people from the network, but also try your hand at a single game against artificial intelligence.

mac_games.title: WolfQuest: Anniversary Edition
mac_games.description:
ou are a young gray wolf. Born in the North Range of Yellowstone National Park, you learned the wolf way in your family pack. Now you set out on your own - exploring, hunting, finding a mate, establishing a territory, and raising a family of your own. 

   GO ON A SURVIVAL QUEST
 Your quest begins on the slopes of Amethyst Mountain. Here you will test your hunting skills against moose, calves, and deer. Once you become an experienced hunter, you will be able to find another wolf to become your companion.

  Then you'll travel together to Slough Creek, which cuts through the mountains north of the Lamar Valley, to establish a territory and den and raise your young. You'll feed them, play with them, protect them from deadly competitors, and travel with them across the country to their summer home. Will your little family pack succeed? 

   EXPLORE YELLOWSTONE NATIONAL PARK
 WolfQuest faithfully recreates the North Ridge of Yellowstone National Park - the "Serengeti of North America", where herds of elk and other ungulates roam sage grasslands, alpine forests and magnificent mountain ranges. 

 But beware of packs of strange wolves that patrol their territories and look askance at strangers. The wilderness is full of other dangers, too: grizzly bears, mountain lions, and coyotes all compete with you for territory and food. 

   REALISTIC ECOLOGY AND GAMEPLAY
 WolfQuest: Anniversary Edition raises the bar for realistic and accurate environmental gameplay: 
 -Live the life of a wild wolf, watching your cubs grow and wander year after year. 
 -Realistic herds of moose roam the land, as well as elk, deer, beavers and other prey. 
 -Other wolf packs maintain and protect their territory from intruders - like you. 
 -Grizzlies, cougars, coyotes and other predators will challenge your kills and defend theirs. 
 -Wolves communicate with each other using natural actions and vocalizations. 
 -Dynamic (family-oriented) courtship will allow you to choose the right mate. 
 - Adorable wolf cubs playing with each other and with your wolf and his mate. 
 - Extensive wilderness maps (almost 50 square kilometers) depict the Northern Range of Yellowstone. 
 -The innovative Age Perks system models the arc of life (and death) of a wild wolf. 
 -In Iron Wolf mode (optional) you can live on the edge: your first death will be your last. 
 -Dynamic day/night, weather and seasons immerse you in the wild. 
 -More than 100 achievements, as well as collectibles.

mac_games.title: The Escapists
mac_games.description:
You're back in prison, and your only chance is to figure out how to escape, by any means necessary. It's up to you to decide how you'll do it. Maybe start a prison riot? Dig a tunnel under the prison walls? Or steal a guard's uniform to blend in with the jailers? 

   The Escapists is a unique prison experience where you can craft and combine a variety of items as you bravely fight to gain freedom. Life in prison will keep you on your toes, mindful of the strict rules you will have to break.  

  The guards will try to stop any escape attempts, so try not to arouse suspicion and report to roll call, work and hide the stolen materials.  

  Escapes are what you do best, and you'll have to demonstrate your skills in the challenging conditions of prisons around the world.  

  Become an Escapist now!   

 Peculiarities: 

 -8 fully functioning prisons with different daily routines, allowing you to experience *real* life behind bars!  
  -10 jobs you can do, if you have the knowledge and skills to earn and keep these jobs!  
  - Over 185 unique items to find and maybe even use to craft useful items. (Team17 fully approves of using various weapons, including shivs, nunchucks, and hammers, but only in a fictional environment!). 
   -Different kinds of favors you can do for other prisoners. You don't want to upset them, do you?  
  - Extremely self-confident and incredibly funny prisoners and guards will not only keep you on your toes, but also entertain you!  
  -Many escape routes, after which you can become the best escapee in the history of The Escapists!  
  - Multiple save slots, allowing you to develop multiple escape plans at once!

mac_games.title: MiSide
mac_games.description:
Each of us at least once dreamed of getting into the game with our favorite characters. But what if the dream comes true? Will the game world remain as comfortable and friendly? And will you be able to find a way out? 

   Miside is a first-person adventure game. You take on the role of a nameless protagonist who is unexpectedly sucked into his favorite game. You will meet Mita, a cute girl mascot of the game who has gained power over her game and sucked you in just for the company. But are her motives really so pure, can she be trusted? And what is going on in this place, so far from our usual reality?  

  The game contains an element of nonlinearity and is filled with many activities, due to which you can manage your time yourself: immerse yourself in an idyll with the companion of your dreams or achieve the truth about what is happening behind the virtual walls.  

  In addition, you can expect:

  - Pleasant visual style and cozy atmosphere. 
 - A gripping storyline for several hours of play time. 
 - More than a dozen characters, and each will have their own role: some will help, and some will put a spoke in the wheel. 
 - Mechanics of Mita's life simulator and many mini-games with her participation. 
 - Original soundtrack. 
 - And of course Mita herself, a real treasure of this small world!

mac_games.title: Primordial
mac_games.description:
Set in a post-apocalyptic world littered with abandoned machines, Primordia tells the story of Horatio Nullbild, a stoic robot who values ​​his solitude and independence. Horatio spends his days studying the Book of Man, battling his droid Crispin, and tinkering with the airship they call home - a peaceful existence that is threatened when a rogue robot steals the power source they need to survive.  

 When Horatio and Crispin's search for energy leads them to the dazzling city of Metropolis, a simple attempt to recover a stolen power core leads to unexpected discoveries about Horatio's origins and a new understanding of the legendary people who walked the earth before him. 

   Peculiarities: 
 - An epic tale of the extinction of the human race
 - Voiceover by fan favorite Logan Cunningham
 - Gorgeous post-apocalyptic setting
 - Additional puzzles - the more you play, the more you learn about the world

mac_games.title: Ynglet
mac_games.description:
Floating NON-platformer 
 We decided to experiment and abandon the fundamental element of the genre... platforms.  

  Movement is rhythm 
 Listen to the sounds of music, its dynamic and beautiful notes. Each of your actions creates a new melody.  

  Enchanting movements 
 Find different ways to move through the woven space. Glide in the flow, dash across glowing elements, or rest in safe bubbles.  

  Sketches that became reality 
 The game's hand-drawn world is reminiscent of the scattered scribbles you'd scribble in the margins of your school notebooks.  

  Flexible complexity 
 With quick respawns and adjustable difficulty, create challenges of varying shapes and sizes... even an amoeba-like squid.

mac_games.title: My Summer Car
mac_games.description:
My Summer Car is the ultimate survival, building, repairing, tuning, maintenance and survival simulator. You start the game with hundreds of parts and assemble the car and engine. You need to maintain not only the car, but also yourself. Sausages, beer and sleep will come in handy.  

  If all goes well, you'll have a working machine that you can use for a variety of summer activities in the Finnish countryside of the 1990s.   

 Mostly for doing stupid things while under the influence of alcohol. Once you have saved up some money from various odd jobs, you can start tuning and upgrading your car with parts ordered by mail.   

 You can turn the car into an annoying disco car with a bass sound or a rally car for rally competitions... or just bring it to perfect factory condition. Of course, the car must pass the technical inspection, otherwise you may have problems with the police.  

  Not only do you have access to one car, but you also have access to several other cars and vehicles that you can use. (These are mostly useful for delivering groceries and towing the project car out of a ditch somewhere.) 

   Warning, this game is not for the faint of heart. It requires serious car fever to play properly due to the meticulous approach to car building!  

  Peculiarities:
  - Complete assembly of the car with more than a hundred parts. 
 - Detailed driving and engine simulation. 
 - Various other vehicles, cars and boats to use and drive. 
 - Tens of kilometers of dirt and asphalt roads with artificial intelligence. 
 - Random paid tasks to cover food, drink and fuel costs. 
 - Rally competitions in which you can take part. 
 - Permanent death. 
 - Bathing in the sauna. 
 - Finnish summer of the 90s!

mac_games.title: King's Bounty: Ultimate Edition
mac_games.description:
King's Bounty: Ultimate Edition  

  - King's Bounty: The Legend is a tactical RPG in which players control a hero who explores a fantasy world, fights enemies, and gathers troops. The game combines elements of battlefield strategy and resource management, and offers a variety of quests and exploration opportunities. 

   - King's Bounty: Crossworlds is an expansion to King's Bounty: The Legend that adds new campaigns, quests, and updates. Players can experience additional scenarios and learn new mechanics that expand the gameplay.   

 - King's Bounty: Warriors of the North is the third game in the series, which adds new hero classes and unique units. The game takes place in the northern regions of the kingdom, where players will have to fight Vikings and other mythical creatures, as well as explore vast locations.  

  - King's Bounty: Dark Side is a game that offers a new perspective on the well-known gameplay, allowing players to take on the role of a dark character, exploring the world from the perspective of evil forces. The game adds new tactical mechanics and features, as well as unique units and abilities, expanding the experience of the series.

mac_games.title: Later Alligator
mac_games.description:
Later Alligator tells the story of Pat the Alligator, a (mostly) harmless and (possibly) innocent reptile who finds himself at the center of a conspiracy that could destroy the biggest and scariest family in Alligator New York - his own! Explore the city, get to know the family, and try to save Pat before time runs out.  

  The alligators of New York City come to life in the classic hand-animated style of SmallBu Animation. There are densely animated areas to explore, 30 fun mini-games, and over 100 alligator residents to explore. With multiple endings and a fully animated finale, Later Alligator is a fun urban adventure that can be played over and over again.   

 Peculiarities:

  -Classic 2D animation from an award-winning studio
 -Over 100 alligators and at least 3 ghosts
 -Funny and family-friendly game, perfect for all ages
 -30 joke-filled mini-games and challenges
 -Multiple endings and a secret surprise
 -Original soundtrack by 2 Mello

mac_games.title: Warp Drive - Teleport Racing!
mac_games.description: WARP DRIVE is a fast-paced racing game with a completely new approach to control: TELEPORT around the track to find shortcuts and hidden routes! Take control of a FOUR-PROPELLER CAR to test your innovative driving skills. Ride on the ceiling, jump over huge canyons and accelerate over waterfalls in an epic racing battle! CUSTOMIZE your cars, gradually adding new features, parts and appearance.  \n\n  Listen to your trusty manager Lenny's advice, or ignore everything he says... After all, what do aliens know about racing?! Use deadly HOMOLOGICAL MISSILES to crush your opponents, or lay MINES. Race like a pro, take out your opponents, and rocket to victory!

mac_games.title: Tropico 6
mac_games.description: Tropico 6 is a strategy that will allow you to become a real ruler of your own state, which you must develop and control every process of activity. One of the main systems of government of this kind of state will be dictatorship, where you will take under your full control everything that concerns the state. You will find yourself in the world of real economic strategy, and, accordingly, the development of events will directly depend on your actions. You must do everything possible, your tables, so-called possessions, have become one of the dominant ones in the whole world.  \n\n  You need to create a settlement on an entire archipelago of islands, each with its own rules and features. It is this diversity in governance that will make your task more difficult, but at the same time more exciting. Always try to improve the infrastructure, strengthen the defense, and connect the islands with each other with bridges. The transport infrastructure in this part has become noticeably better, which will allow you to develop your possessions faster and more efficiently. There is a transportation system, including taxis and cable cars. The road system should be thought out and built as comfortably as possible for the city's residents, but it will be quite difficult to cope with such a task, you need to take into account a lot of important points.

mac_games.title: Rocket League
mac_games.description: Welcome to the long-awaited sequel to Supersonic Acrobatic Rocket-Powered Battle-Cars, everyone's favorite physics-based combination of football and racing!  \n\n  In the action-packed sports game Rocket League®, players pilot powerful racing cars, wreak havoc for rewards, and masterfully avoid collisions in a variety of arenas. Rocket League® realistically conveys in-game interactions through an advanced physics system and the laws of mass and momentum, giving players intuitive control in this incredibly high-energy version of soccer.

mac_games.title: Port Royale 4
mac_games.description:
Set sail and join one of the 17th century colonial powers: Spain, England, the Netherlands or France, as they battle for supremacy over the Caribbean.  

  In Port Royale 4, you become a young and ambitious colony ruler who dreams of figuring out how to turn a small settlement into a bustling trading city.   

 Develop production chains that connect multiple islands and create complex trade routes to cross the Caribbean and meet the growing needs of developing cities.   

 Explore the detailed sea chart to avoid stormy weather regions, cliffs, or shallow waters. Complete missions for your country's Viceroy to gain fame and unlock new buildings, ships, and more. Conquer enemy cities or hunt their ships with letters of marque, but beware of other pirates.  

  For the first time in the series, naval battles will be turn-based. Up to 8 ships can join the battle, and captains can maneuver tactically to achieve a brilliant victory even in the most hopeless situation.

mac_games.title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Call of Pripyat
mac_games.description:
A military expedition to the Center of the Zone disappears under mysterious circumstances. Finding out the fate of the crews and establishing the reasons is the task of SBU operative Major Degtyarev, in whose role you will respond to the Call of Pripyat in the third chapter of the cult STALKER series  

  Unknown Lands
  The Exclusion Zone around the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant is ablaze with anomalous activity more than ever before. Emissions of destructive energy shake its lands daily, and their very heart is now open to the most experienced or fearless stalkers. On your way - the swampy Zaton, the industrial zones of the Jupiter plant, the ghost town of Pripyat frozen in time and catacombs where no stalker has set foot since the disaster.  

  New dangers: 
 The Zone has become even more unpredictable and dangerous, and its energy is increasingly distorting the fabric of reality. You will have to learn to save your life, hiding from unexpected and random Emissions and show miracles of stalker ingenuity when getting into new types of anomalies. At night, beware of the most dangerous predator of these lands - the chimera and prepare to meet a new mutant telepath burer, exploring the darkest and most abandoned places.   

 Continuation of the story: 
 No matter how wonderful the life of a free stalker is, in Call of Pripyat you are on a secret mission. During your journey, you will meet many inhabitants of these anomalous places. Be farsighted and careful in your decisions, because many of them can help in your investigation or shed light on the secrets of the Zone.

mac_games.title: TMNT: Shredder's Revenge
mac_games.description:
Leonardo, Michelangelo, Donatello, and Raphael team up again to bring the heat. Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shredder's Revenge is a colorful, lovingly crafted side-scrolling beat 'em up based on the iconic 1987 Turtles look. The game pays homage to classic Turtles games like Turtles In Time.  

  HEROES IN SHELL 
 Reimagined gameplay in Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shredder's Revenge builds on classic combat mechanics and is polished to perfection by beat 'em up experts Dotemu (Streets of Rage 4) and Tribute Games. Fight your way to victory through stunningly beautiful pixel art environments and defeat tons of terrifying enemies. Each turtle's special skills and moves will make each playthrough unique! Choose a fighter and crush your enemies with powerful combos. Feel the tension of battles filled with ninja moves. Don't be caught off guard if you decide to go it alone against Shredder and his loyal Foot Clan. And if team battles are more your thing, grab your best friends and team up with up to four people! 

   KRANG WILL NOT PASS 
 Bebop and Rocksteady decide to attack Channel 6 and steal nightmarish devices to implement the evil plans of Krang and Shredder. In Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Shredder's Revenge, the turtles will fight villains in many locations from the original animated series. From Manhattan to Coney Island, from the heights of skyscrapers to the depths of the sewers - help the fearless foursome send Foot fighters, Triceratons and Stone Soldiers straight to Dimension X! 

   TURTLE POWER!
