 Enjoy the vibrant pixel art and atmosphere of the original Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles that will take you back to the awesome 80s. Every character, vehicle, weapon, item and background was inspired by the 1987 cartoon, so the feeling of jumping into the TV is guaranteed - with killer humor and exciting adventures included!

mac_games.title: Figment 2: Creed Valley
mac_games.description:
Figment 2: Creed Valley is a quest and action game set in a human mind plagued by nightmares. Embark on a journey with Dusty, the embodiment of the Mind's courage. Puzzles, unique locations, and musical boss fights await you. Challenge your fears!  

  Nightmares have broken the Moral Compass, and chaos has engulfed the Mind. Dusty and his cheerful assistant Piper must travel to the Valley of Faith, where the ideals of the Mind are formed, and restore harmony. Ahead of the heroes lies an entire adventure filled with musical duels and incredible puzzles. 

   Every nightmare has its own song that tells the story of its origin. 

 Don't let their ridicule get to you! 
   Talk to the changing opinions of the Mind and tune into the rhythm of this world.  
  Learn the two fundamental states of Mind - open and closed. Switch between them and adapt to changing environments to achieve your goals.  

  Mind-blowing puzzles and battles tied to the rhythm of songs will test your wits and strength.  
  You don't have to face your fears alone. Piper is now available as a full-fledged character in local co-op.   

 The whole spectrum of emotions awaits you - from joy to sadness. Figment 2: Creed Valley is based on life experiences that are familiar to us all. In this wonderful musical universe, you will fight stress, anxiety and fear of the dark. Hold your sword tightly and return the world to the lost light!

mac_games.title: Arms Trade Tycoon: Tanks
mac_games.description: Arms Trade Tycoon: Tanks is a unique combination of a tank builder and a tycoon game. In it, you will lead an arms trading company specializing in tanks from WWI to the modern era. Research, design, sell and monitor your tanks in battle to create your own history!

mac_games.title: Big Ambitions
mac_games.description:
You have little money in your account, but your ambitions are huge. 

 With a little help from your uncle, you find an apartment and your first job. Now it's up to you to decide whether you're going to make it big and try to make it in New York. 

   You can gradually build small companies, turning them into huge corporations - or pave the way to the top in your own way. In this huge sandbox, your possibilities are endless. You have never seen such a game!  

  Work your way up from a small apartment and commuting by public transport to a luxury apartment, fast cars and designer furniture. Invest in mutual funds and real estate. Success - failure - try again. You will have to take care of yourself too: sleep and maintain morale on the way to the top. 

   Will you be able to build your own empire?  

  Work your way up to New York's most famous tycoon. Start your own business, work smart, prosper, and enjoy life. Which path will you take to success? How far can you go? How long can you stay at the top?  

  You will be able to open your own souvenir shop, supermarket, coffee shop, law firm, clothing store, wine shop, flower shop and so on. You define the criteria for success yourself: it can be just one store, a chain of fast food restaurants, a huge corporation or millions of dollars in website development from the basement. 

   You will have to take out loans, rent buildings, create logos, carry out repairs, make purchases, manage finances, hire staff and build infrastructure. Perhaps after some time you will have to import goods (with the help of the port) and distribute them through a network of warehouses.  

  Big companies need managers. You will need HR managers, logistics managers and purchasing agents, and for them - desks and computers. That is, you will have to organize a modern office.  

  Need a delivery truck? Head to the dealer and buy one. Hungry? Head to the supermarket (do you have a refrigerator at home?). Big Ambitions is a life simulator in which the character must interact with the world on a physical level in order to survive and succeed. 

   You can walk into any building in New York City and buy it. Work your way up from a small apartment to a dream penthouse in Midtown, a luxury townhouse in Hell's Kitchen, or a skyscraper complex. You can arrange the furniture in your home - any way you want. Invest your hard-earned money in real estate and grow your empire. Take control of the city - neighborhood by neighborhood.   

 Spend your wealth as you wish: buy a large SUV, a sports car or a luxurious Mercedes S500, go to a casino or invest in mutual funds and reap the benefits.   

 As you play, you need to constantly make sure that your character gets enough sleep and is physically and mentally healthy. Enjoy life while you can: in old age, you will understand that money can’t buy time… or can it?.. 

   What was in Startup Company, which quickly became a favorite among players, Big Ambitions takes to a whole new level.

mac_games.title: Gibbon: Beyond the Trees
mac_games.description:
A wonderful new adventure from two-time Apple Design Award winners: the developers behind Old Man's Journey and ELOH. In the new game, a family of gibbons finds themselves lost in a dangerous world they don't understand. 

   Peculiarities: 
 - Master free dynamic movement - brachiation, which is how real gibbons move. 
 - Learn acrobatic moves, including the ability to launch yourself into the air when thrown by another gibbon. 
 - Follow the touching adventure story of a gibbon family trying to survive in a dangerous human world. 
 - Play in Story Mode and follow the hour-long story or fight for freedom in Liberation Mode as you travel through the procedurally generated jungle. 
 - Enjoy stunning hand-drawn 2D graphics that will make you feel the atmosphere of a world that is slipping away from us. 
 - Explore a variety of locations, from the wild jungles of Southeast Asia to the bustling human world that lies beyond. 
 - Gibbon: Beyond the Trees is a game about difficult but relevant topics such as deforestation, poaching and climate change.

mac_games.title: Raw Metal
mac_games.description: Infiltrate the heart of an alien mining facility to salvage equipment and confront a rogue multinational corporation. Make the most of your tools and machinery in intense stealth and dagger missions, honing your combat skills in fast-paced combat in this modern stealth-focused RPG. Go beyond simply hiding in the shadows; use cunning tactics and tactical mastery to bring down the corrupt core of a corporation. Fight back against corporate greed and seize power for yourself in this fast-paced, adrenaline-fueled adventure.

mac_games.title: Monument Valley: Panoramic Edition
mac_games.description:
Discover Monument Valley, a quest for forgiveness in a stunningly beautiful and mysterious world. 

   Embark on a journey of absolution with Ida, a silent princess, through impossible environments and illusory puzzles. 

   Play this meditative and calming puzzle game as you manipulate monuments and create evolving paths to explore new, surreal and mysterious worlds.   

 Enter the new, expanded world of Monument Valley: Panoramic Edition and encounter more intriguing possibilities than ever before.  

  In this award-winning game, solve challenging yet highly entertaining puzzles based on optical illusions. Evolve the landscape to open paths that would be impossible without your help.  

  As you progress through the game, discover beautiful architecture by transforming the environment by pushing, pulling, pressing, lifting, lowering and more.  

  Ida is not alone in this world, and you will need to use your wits to outwit the mysterious Crow People who stand in the way of Ida's search for forgiveness.

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed Unity
mac_games.description:
Assassin's Creed Unity is an action adventure that will take you to Paris during the French Revolution. You will learn the story of Arno, a young man who by chance found himself drawn into the bloody events of that period.

  New possibilities in character management await you. Change both the appearance of objects and their technical characteristics. Become a witness of legendary historical events! 

 Tests on Intel processors have not been conducted. The game is not guaranteed to work on Intel.   

  Recommended: 
 - macOS Sonoma and later.  
 - Apple Silicon (M Pro, Max, Ultra). 
 - 16 GB of RAM.  
 - If there is heating, there will be a drop in performance.  
 On older macOS, good performance is not guaranteed. 

 If your Mac has 8GB of RAM and the game requires at least 8GB, the total memory will not be enough, and the video memory is also used from this memory.

mac_games.title: The Lost Legends of Redwall: The Scout Anthology
mac_games.description:
Venture into the epic, story-rich world of Mossflower in the first official Redwall story since 2011. The Scout is a linear adventure game told over three acts. Play as Liam or Sophia, the newest member of the Lilygrove Scout Corps, as the young mice embark on the journey of a lifetime to save their home from ruthless pirates. Can they reach Redwall and save their friends before all is lost? 

   Scout Act 1
 After months of training, betrothed mice Liam and Sophia are ready to become full-fledged Scouts: a group of forest rangers charged with protecting the land and trained in ancient crafts. Their initiation ceremony is interrupted when their beloved home is attacked by sea rats. While the older Scouts prepare for battle, a new Scout Corps recruit must outwit the enemy, light a beacon, and summon help from the surrounding woods - before there's anything left to save. 

   Scout Act 2
 The beacon is lit, the troops have gathered to fight off the invading seekers, and Liam is reunited with his beloved Sophia under the Lilygrove Lighthouse, but all is not well. The vengeful cries of a Scamsnaut are heard in the distance, and it turns out that our scout's betrothed has been poisoned by a venomous goat bite. Wasting no time, the pair race to Vinsome Rafe, where the mysterious and dangerous stoat may hold the antidote they seek. As luck would have it, the sea rats are moving inland, and the shadow of a large bird of prey lurks at the edge of the forest.  

  Scout: Act 3
 After being fatally poisoned by the vicious maw of a Scamsnaut, our young Scouts have made it to Vinsome Rafe unharmed, albeit with difficulty. Although treatment from the mysterious stoat has bought valuable time, Liam and Sophia must now make the rest of the journey to Redwall Abbey to obtain a more permanent cure. It's a dramatic conclusion to their journey through the murky waters of Portman's Slough, the miraculously functioning puzzles of the Lattice Gully, and the ancient ruins of Otter's Den.

mac_games.title: Diablo II: Resurrected
mac_games.description:
Diablo® II: Resurrected™ is a complete recreation of the legendary Diablo II and Lord of Destruction® expansion from Blizzard Entertainment, which once laid the foundations of the action-RPG genre. Veteran players and those who missed the original PC version 20 years ago will be able to immerse themselves in the timeless gameplay of Diablo® II with improved graphics and sound thanks to the capabilities of modern gaming devices. 

   Ascend the Forgotten Tower, carve a path through the jungles of Kurast, storm the gates of Hell, and defeat Diablo himself. Then ascend Arreat Peak and confront the Lord of Destruction, Baal, in the Citadel of Creation. 

   The familiar character selection screen features seven of Sanctuary's greatest defenders gathered around a bonfire: the Amazon, the Assassin, the Barbarian, the Druid, the Necromancer, the Paladin, and the Sorceress. Each of these classes can be developed in a variety of ways, relying on different skills and choosing the appropriate gear.

mac_games.title: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
mac_games.description:
From the scorched sands of Persia, an ancient legend has emerged. It tells of a time when blood was spilled and deceit ruled. Guided by the dark powers of a magical dagger, a young Prince unleashed a deadly evil upon a beautiful kingdom. Thanks to the cunning of a charming princess and the absolute powers of the Sands of Time, the Prince embarks on a difficult journey to reclaim the cursed halls of the Palace and restore peace to his land.  

  - Technological masterpiece: witness one of the finest examples of advanced programming in the history of computer games, pushing back the limitations of game consoles and raising the standards of games in all areas: physics, lighting, graphics, animation and more!   

 - An Inimitable Hero: With mythical powers, the Prince returns to adventure games with gravity-defying acrobatics, ferocious fighting skills, and the ability to bend time to accomplish his goals.  

  - The Sands of Time: Ubisoft Montreal Studio introduces The Sands of Time, a technological breakthrough that will change the face of adventure games forever. Erase the past, look to the future, and freeze the present in real time for unlimited variations on how you play a given section of the game.   

 - Exotic Worlds and Vast Kingdoms: Uncover the secrets of a previously unknown world in an adventurous manner. Medieval Persia, mysterious and deadly, contains a stunning array of landscapes and kingdoms to explore and conquer. 

   - A grand adventure of betrayal and triumph: The epic legends and deadly creatures of mythical Persia come to life in this action-packed story filled with many surprises.

mac_games.title: Crysis
mac_games.description:
People have often imagined the end of the world, attributing the fatal role of the executioner to a flood, a terrible disease, or a nuclear war.  

  In reality, everything turned out to be somewhat more exotic. The asteroid that crashed onto one of the remote islands turned out to be a huge spaceship capable of completely changing the Earth's climate.  

  The North Korean and US troops sent to study the anomaly turned out to be the only defenders of humanity. Prepare to face an unknown enemy - you will play a decisive role in this battle! The smartest enemies!   

  Enemies learn at an incredible speed! In a group and alone, with powerful weapons and with regular pistols, on any terrain and at any time, they will make even experienced players worry. Get ready, Crysis will change your idea of ​​​​artificial intelligence! Soldiers do not give up without a fight! All maneuvers and tricks of virtual soldiers are taken from real tactical schemes of the US Army!  

  The military acts as real fighters would act.

mac_games.title: Saints Row: The Third - The Full Package
mac_games.description:
It's been years since the 3rd Street Saints took over Stillwater. They're no longer just a street gang, but a real brand with sneakers, eponymous energy drinks, and Johnny Gat bobble-head dolls sold at every local convenience store.  

  The Saints are the kings of Stilwater, but their celebrity status has not gone unnoticed. The Syndicate, a legendary criminal fraternity with members all over the globe, has taken notice of the Saints and is now demanding tribute. Unwilling to kneel to  

  Syndicate, you fight in Steelport, a once famous metropolis that has now become a city of sin under Syndicate control.  

    Drop tanks from the air, order air strikes on a Mexican wrestling gang, and defend yourself against trained military personnel using nothing but a sex toy; ignite an urban war that will bring Steelport to its knees in the wildest story ever devised for a game. Buckle up.

mac_games.title: Saints Row IV: Re-Elected
mac_games.description:
The Saints' boss has managed to become the President of the United States, but for the Saints, this is just the beginning.  

  After a terrifying alien invasion, the Saints find themselves trapped in a strange simulation of Steelport. With the help of old and new friends, and armed with superpowers and unusual weapons, the Saints must free humanity from the alien Emperor Zinyak and his minions in the most insane open-world game ever. 

   -The American Dream - You become the President of the United States and immediately get caught up in a crazy adventure with the distortion of time and space. Now only you can free the world.  

  -Super-duper protagonist - jump over skyscrapers, kill with the power of thought, break through tanks on the run - and this is just flowers compared to other abilities that will become available to you during this adventure. 

   -Alien Weapons of War - Use a ton of vehicles and alien guns: Inflator, Magnetizer, Splitter and other cool weapons. 

   -Weapons for every taste and color - you have created a character, customized his appearance, selected an outfit. It's time to complement the image with a unique weapon that can be customized to your taste.

mac_games.title: Mass Effect Andromeda
mac_games.description: Mass Effect: Andromeda will take players to the Andromeda galaxy, far beyond the Milky Way, where you will fight in hostile territory as a Pathfinder, a leader of seasoned, hard-nosed professionals. This is a new chapter in human history, and the decisions you make throughout the game will determine its fate.

mac_games.title: Mass Effect 3 Legendary Edition
mac_games.description:
One man is all that stands between humanity and the greatest threat to all life. Remember the legend: Commander Shepard returns in a new edition of the famous Mass Effect trilogy - Mass Effect Legendary Edition. All content is optimized for 4K Ultra HD resolution. 

   Return to the world of your favorite saga:
  Intense action meets gripping interactive storytelling - you decide how the story unfolds.   

 Become the legendary Commander Shepard: 

 Create your own unique character: customize appearance, skills and personal weapons - and lead an elite reconnaissance squad across the raging galaxy.  

  Decide the fate of the galaxy:
  The consequences of your decisions are automatically taken into account in subsequent games. Each decision you make affects the outcome of missions, relationships, battles, and even the fate of the entire galaxy.

mac_games.title: Mass Effect 2 Legendary Edition
mac_games.description:
One man is all that stands between humanity and the greatest threat to all life. Remember the legend: Commander Shepard returns in a new edition of the famous Mass Effect trilogy - Mass Effect Legendary Edition. All content is optimized for 4K Ultra HD resolution. 

   Return to the world of your favorite saga:
  Intense action meets gripping interactive storytelling - you decide how the story unfolds.   

 Become the legendary Commander Shepard: 

 Create your own unique character: customize appearance, skills and personal weapons - and lead an elite reconnaissance squad across the raging galaxy.  

  Decide the fate of the galaxy:
  The consequences of your decisions are automatically taken into account in subsequent games. Each decision you make affects the outcome of missions, relationships, battles, and even the fate of the entire galaxy.

mac_games.title: Mass Effect 1 Legendary Edition
mac_games.description:
One man is all that stands between humanity and the greatest threat to all life. Remember the legend: Commander Shepard returns in a new edition of the famous Mass Effect trilogy - Mass Effect Legendary Edition. All content is optimized for 4K Ultra HD resolution. 

   Return to the world of your favorite saga:
  Intense action meets gripping interactive storytelling - you decide how the story unfolds.   

 Become the legendary Commander Shepard: 

 Create your own unique character: customize appearance, skills and personal weapons - and lead an elite reconnaissance squad across the raging galaxy.  

  Decide the fate of the galaxy:
  The consequences of your decisions are automatically taken into account in subsequent games. Each decision you make affects the outcome of missions, relationships, battles, and even the fate of the entire galaxy.

mac_games.title: Teardown
mac_games.description:
Plan the perfect heist using creative solutions, brute force and environmental elements. Teardown features fully destructible and interactable environments and unique gameplay that allows for freedom of action. 

   Blow up or ram walls to create unexpected shortcuts. Stack objects on top of each other, build structures, or use floating objects to your advantage. Carefully plan your actions in each level, then pull off the heist and escape.  

  Run, jump, accelerate, speed up. Do everything possible to collect targets, avoid robots or steal items needed by customers and try not to get caught!   

 Campaign:
  With your company deep in debt, you've started taking orders from less-than-reliable clients. Soon, you'll be mired in revenge, betrayal, and insurance fraud. You'll start with more or less legitimate orders, but then you'll be stealing cars, demolishing buildings, blowing up safes, hiding from deadly robots, and more. Find valuables hidden everywhere to upgrade your ever-expanding arsenal of tools. 

   Sandbox:
  Use unlocked tools in various conditions. In this mode, you have unlimited resources and a lot of cars. You also have access to Creative mode, where you can create objects from voxels. No pressure - just fun! 

   Tests:
  Test your skills in experimental game modes. New challenges are unlocked as you progress through the campaign.

mac_games.title: Alone in the Dark 2024
mac_games.description:
Psychological horror meets southern gothic charm in a chilling reimagining of the genre-defining cult classic Alone in the Dark. The door to a world of madness will open for you, where every encounter could be your last. You will feel how with every step you take, you are getting closer to solving the mystery. 

 Derceto, the eyes that peer out from the darkness grow hungrier. Every bullet draws the line between survival and a terrible death. Every next door can promise impenetrable horror, where there is nothing but claws, tenacious tentacles and madness. 

 Dive into interwar Louisiana, where an era of decline became the curtain on a dark story of flight from past upheavals and a soulless society into the arms of something dark - something that had been patiently waiting for its moment for centuries. 

 This is Alone in the Dark as you've never seen it before, a masterful fusion of Southern Gothic elegance and otherworldly madness that pays homage to its roots while elevating the genre's narrative to new heights.   

 A terrifying tale of secrets and madness:
  Step inside the Derceto estate, shrouded in intrigue and lurking in the shadows. Emily Hartwood and private detective Edward Carnby set out to find the truth. 

 Emily is desperate to find out the truth about her uncle's disappearance, and Edward must solve the most difficult case of his life. They will both have to find answers to questions they never dared to ask. This reimagined classic is an unforgettable solo adventure filled with tension, horror, and revelations that will shake the boundaries of the imagination. 

   Hollywood Talents:
  Enjoy the performances of renowned actors who are able to convey the atmosphere of survival horror like no one else – Jodie Comer (Killing Eve, Protagonist) and David Harbour (Stranger Things, Black Widow). Although this is their debut in video games, Jodie and David flawlessly embody the roles of Emily Hartwood and Edward Carnby, giving the story of Alone in the Dark a deeply personal touch – to uncover all its facets, you need to play the game twice. 

 A Tribute to the Founders of the Horror Genre
  Rediscover the essence of psychological horror in a game that pays homage to the 1992 original that started the survival horror genre. Alone in the Dark delivers a classic horror experience with a next-gen story and gameplay. It's sure to please those who enjoy intricate stories, nerve-wracking exploration, and desperate combat.   

 A story that defies reality:
  Created by Mikael Hedberg, the acclaimed mind behind the groundbreaking modern horror titles SOMA and Amnesia, Alone in the Dark is a twisted mystery that explores themes of trauma, faith, evil, and loneliness. As you navigate this nightmare, whether as Emily or Edward, you’ll uncover secrets that will forever change the way you think about video game storytelling. 

   Peculiarities: 
 - Explore the Derceto estate in this reimagining of Alone in the Dark, a love letter to the cult classic 90s horror game. 
 - Go back to the origins of psychological horror - this game once started the genre. 
 - The dark and haunting doom-jazz soundtrack will give you goosebumps. 
 - Try to survive in a world where reality begins to collapse, evil lurks in every shadow, and ammunition is always scarce. 
 - See the nightmare through the eyes of Emily Hartwood or Edward Carnby and uncover the dark secrets of a gothic mansion. 
 - A deep psychological story awaits you, far beyond the possible. The script was written by Mikael Hedberg, who created the cult classics SOMA and Amnesia. 
 - Watch Emily and Edward come to life on screen, brought to life by Hollywood talents Jodie Comer (Killing Eve, The Last Man Standing) and David Harbour (Stranger Things, Black Widow), who lend their voices and appearance to the protagonists.

mac_games.title: Grand Theft Auto IV
mac_games.description: The new hero is Niko Bellic, an Eastern European with a criminal past. At the invitation of his cousin, he comes to the American city of Liberty City, hoping to find a better life without crime and murder. \n\n But the American dream turns out to be an unrealizable mirage. Instead of a quiet everyday life on the ocean coast, Niko finds a lot of problems. In order to survive, he must take up the old ways again, and you will have to go with him to the end!  Everything is like in life! The series has noticeably matured. A more serious and thorough approach is visible in absolutely everything. So, to steal a car, you first need to break the glass and pick the locks. And a shootout with even one policeman becomes a deadly dangerous activity. New graphic technologies give what is happening even more realism!

mac_games.title: Grand Theft Auto: Episodes from Liberty City
mac_games.description:
Grand Theft Auto IV Complete Edition includes the action game Grand Theft Auto IV, as well as the Grand Theft Auto: Episodes From Liberty City add-on, which consists of The Lost and Damned and The Ballad of Gay Tony episodes, the storylines of which complement each other and reveal completely opposite sides of the criminal world. 

   Grand Theft Auto IV - Niko Bellic, an Eastern European with a criminal past, comes to Liberty City in search of the American dream. However, instead of a quiet everyday life, the guy finds a lot of problems. In order to survive, Niko has to take up his old ways, and the player will have to go with him to the end!  

  The Lost and Damned - Biker Johnny Klebitz, a seasoned wolf of the urban jungle, is drawn into a merciless war of criminal groups for the redistribution of spheres of influence. The Lost gang, where he is the second person, will have a hard time surviving in this meat grinder. In addition, there is another problem - the leader of the group, Bill Gray, who has just finished treatment for drug addiction ...  

  The Ballad of Gay Tony - Luis Lopez is the loyal assistant of Tony Prince, a bigwig in the club business, also known as Gay Tony. His task is to survive in the vicious world of glamour and save the boss's empire from loan sharks, bandits and tax authorities. Who is a friend and who is an enemy? Who is loyal to the end, and who will stab you in the back at the first opportunity? Together with Luis, the player will have to find answers to these difficult questions.

mac_games.title: Far Cry 5
mac_games.description:
Welcome to Hope County, Montana, home to free and brave people and a fanatical cult awaiting the end of the world. Challenge cult leader Joseph Seed and his siblings, known as the Heralds, to spark a resistance and free the captured community. 

   Play solo or in co-op mode in the vast open world of Hope County. Use a wide range of weapons - from RPGs to shovels - and control iconic muscle cars, ATVs, jets and more as you engage in spectacular cult battles.  

  Discover one of the most famous games in the Far Cry series:

  Join the millions of players in the Far Cry 5 community and experience what IGN calls "fast-paced fun."  

  Explore the open world of Hope County:
  Play in the open world of Hope County. Use a wide range of weapons, from RPGs to shovels, and pilot iconic muscle cars, ATVs, jets, and more as you battle cultists in spectacular fashion. Enlist the help of animal companions, including everyone's favorite bear Cheeseburger and dog Boomer, and free the county from the invaders.

mac_games.title: Max Payne 3
mac_games.description:
After the tragic events that took away Max's loved ones, his mental wounds are in no hurry to heal.  

  Max is no longer a cop – he is a drunk, addicted to painkillers and unemployed. By chance, having moved to Brazil, he joins a private security agency and is assigned to protect the family of a successful real estate dealer, Rodrigo Branco. Alas, his hopes of leaving the past behind him are in vain. Soon Max finds himself alone on the streets of an unfamiliar city in a desperate search for the truth. To save his life, he will have to fight not for life, but for death.  

  Max Payne 3 is a cinematic action game from Rockstar Games that combines cutting-edge shooting mechanics with a twisted storyline.

mac_games.title: It Takes Two
mac_games.description:
Embark on the wildest journey of your life in It Takes Two, a cross-genre adventure designed exclusively for co-op, where you can play together on the same screen and joyfully overcome numerous challenges. Play as Cody and May, two people magically transformed into dolls who are about to divorce. Together, they find themselves in a fairytale world where unexpected obstacles await around every corner, and are forced to save their fractured relationship.  

  Master the unique and interconnected abilities of the characters with each new level. Help each other overcome a variety of unexpected and hilarious obstacles. Kick the fluffy tails of robber squirrels, fly in a pair of underwear, DJ at a lively party in a nightclub, and ride a sled through a magical snow globe. Immerse yourself in a touching and hilarious story where the plot and gameplay intertwine to create a unique visual experience.  

  Developed by award-winning Hazelight, the industry leader in co-op gaming, It Takes Two takes you on a wild, wondrous adventure where one thing is clear: we're better together.  

  Peculiarities:
  Delightfully explosive gameplay: from raging vacuum cleaners to friendly relationship gurus, you never know what might cross your path. Each new level will present you with new unusual challenges and abilities to master, as well as an incredible cocktail of intricate plot and brilliant gameplay that takes interactive storytelling to a whole new level.  

  A Timeless Story of Relationships - Discover a heartfelt, touching story about the challenges of living together. Help Cody and May learn to overcome their differences. Meet a cast of wacky and charming characters. Team up and embark on an adventure you'll love - together!

mac_games.title: Red Dead Redemption
mac_games.description:
Red Dead Redemption is an action-adventure video game developed by Rockstar Games and released in 2010. The game is set in an open world against the backdrop of the American West in the early 20th century, an era when the Wild West is beginning to fade.  

  Plot: The player takes on the role of John Marston, a former gangster who is forced by the government to work for them in order to capture members of his old gang. The game's plot covers John's journey through various regions, where he encounters many characters, completes tasks, and makes moral decisions.  

  Gameplay: Red Dead Redemption offers players to explore a beautiful open world full of different animals, characters and opportunities to complete missions. The game combines elements of shooting, horse riding, hunting and economic interactions such as trading and card games. 

   Graphics and Music: The game has received praise for its beautiful graphics and atmospheric soundtrack, which effectively capture the spirit of the times.  

  The bundle also includes the Undead Nightmare add-on, a cult horror title that uses the world of Red Dead Redemption as a backdrop for an apocalyptic fight for survival against hordes of bloodthirsty zombies.

mac_games.title: Empires of the Undergrowth
mac_games.description:
Build your ant empire by constructing massive nests and complex hierarchies in this microscopic real-time strategy game. Lead different types of warrior ants in brutal battles while workers build a nest and gather resources to expand their base, and protect your queen at all costs amidst all the threats and opportunities of the insect world.   

 Hundreds of warriors clash in battle. The grinding of mandibles is accompanied by volleys of formic acid. As night falls, workers rush back underground, dodging attacks from beetles, to bring food to the nest. Supplies are running low, and unless they are replenished, new soldiers will not hatch for the ongoing war between the empires of the undergrowth.  

  - Under your direction, workers will build and improve the nest - starting with the queen's central chambers and moving through a vast network of storage areas, nurseries, and corridors. Explore the entire map of hexagonal tiles of earth and rock in search of food, but beware of the underground inhabitants.   

 -The outside world is also rich in resources: seeds, nectar, mushrooms, other insects, and even amphibians are on the menu today. The choice is large, but each food source comes with its own challenges and difficulties. Are you prepared to protect your aphid farm from ladybug raids, or are the night predators too great a threat to the fledgling colony? Every decision you make will have irreversible consequences that could lead to the death of the colony if you are unable to react quickly enough to changing circumstances.   

 -Use different types of ants with different attack patterns, abilities, and evolution options to adapt to the challenges of a particular biome. Nighttime forays are sometimes necessary to replenish food supplies, but careless ants face numerous dangers lurking in the dark. After sunrise, you will have to fight off other ant colonies, invade other nests to get to the queen, and protect your own queen. Be prepared to coordinate combat across multiple underground and overground maps in a constantly changing environment - there is no single path to victory.  

  The ants rush to the nest from the surface. Not all of them return, but those who do bring valuable food resources that will help strengthen the front with new forces of young soldiers from the nursery, following pheromone marks and performing various tasks along the way. They are the last support of the colony, born with one goal: to hold the front line! 

 -Plan and set up multiple nurseries, each with its own pheromone group that can be instructed using pheromone tags, rules of engagement, and other mechanisms. Knowing how to manage ant behavior and understanding the strengths and weaknesses of each species are key to success.  

  -The specialization of each pheromone group can be easily changed, ordering a group to do only foraging, only fighting, or a combination of both - in the heat of battle, such an order can be decisive. In difficult times, when the colony is starving and new ants have stopped hatching from eggs, will your soldiers forage for food, risking a surprise attack? Or will they accompany groups of workers, choosing their safety over efficiency? Remember to leave at least a small number of workers in the nest to dig, build, and care for eggs, otherwise the colony's ant economy may cease to function.  

  -Each ant species has its own strengths and weaknesses on the battlefield. In special game modes where multiple ant species can live in a single colony, the decision to grow and upgrade one species or another completely changes the strategy of combat. Odontomachuses engage in close combat and sometimes jump back to recover. Leafcutter soldiers act as defenders, distracting opponents so that friendly ants have a chance to move away, regroup, or retreat. Red forest ants can develop the ability to shoot formic acid from an especially long distance or especially quickly. Find the synergy of the many strengths and weaknesses of different species and be ready to fight back when fighting enemy colonies.  

  -Your enemies are equally varied. In addition to hostile ant colonies, you'll encounter arachnids, amphibians, crustaceans, and an incredible array of insects. These powerful and often (relatively) huge creatures pose a serious threat to an unprepared colony, and only thoughtful tactics will help you deal with them. A flanking maneuver can help you avoid the paralyzing venom of a rove beetle, and when you encounter a hermit crab, you'll want to throw everything at it to defeat it before it can recover.  

  Victory is assured! Reinforcements arrive just in time, unstoppable even by the terrifying monster before them. Today, a mad scientist has created a terrifying monster by crossing a hermit crab with a scorpion, but the colony has evolved in the right direction after encountering such unnatural opponents in the past. After an exhausting battle, the chimera is on the verge of defeat, but a new enemy intervenes in the battle: like thunder from the sky, the hand of an unknown creature crushes half of the reinforcements, and from above comes the sinister laughter of a scientist. The wind has changed again… 

   In addition to classic RTS battles with AI and unique seasonal levels, Empires of the Undergrowth also features a story-driven campaign mode. Follow the progress of a lab experiment on the mysterious gene-stealing Formica ereptor ants, while learning about different ant species and their natural habitats. Earn resources by completing missions in natural biomes to upgrade your main lab colony to suit your playstyle, and lead your ant colony through a series of brutal tests conducted “in the name of science” – but not everything is as it seems…

mac_games.title: Mirror's Edge Catalyst
mac_games.description:
Experience the story of Faith, a runner fighting for her freedom in the City of Glass. This seemingly elegant and high-tech city hides a terrible secret. Explore every corner from the high and beautifully lit rooftops to the dark underground tunnels. The city is vast, and Faith is at the center of it. Master the city with a combination of fluid movement and first-person combat in an urban landscape and uncover the conspiracy.  

  Moving: 
 Gain maximum speed as you zipline. Balance on pipes, grab onto edges, and shimmy under obstacles. Run horizontally and vertically on any wall, and use your surroundings to navigate corners and gaps.  

  Concentration: 
 Faith is fast, light, and agile, and she needs to maintain focus while moving to survive. Focus is gained by free running, and once gained, Faith becomes invulnerable to enemies. Focus is lost at low speed after missing attacks, so it's important to maintain a balance between speeding through enemies and engaging them in combat.  

  Inertia: 
 Build momentum to leap between rooftops and fall into beautiful high-speed slides. The new Shift move allows you to accelerate briefly in any direction. And if you need to change your plan quickly, use Quick Turn to turn 180 or 90 degrees.   

 Fight:
  Throw opponents into walls, over railings, or into each other with Running Heavy Attack. Use your momentum to fly past KrugerSec fighters to unleash a series of Running Light Attacks, gaining focus and maintaining momentum. Out-move your opponents and use Shift to get behind them and strike. Or stun enemies with a series of quick strikes and dodge counterattacks with Shift. 

   Devices:
  Faith's running skills, combat prowess, and determination are enhanced by devices that help her navigate the city and fight against the oppression of the citizens of the City of Glass.  

  Dashes and time trials:
  Can you become the fastest runner in the City of Glass? Create your own time trials and share your results with your friends. Take on challenging Dashes designed by DICE and find the best route using smooth movement. Place beacons in hard-to-reach places around the city for your friends to try to find in an exciting treasure hunt.

mac_games.title: Days Gone
mac_games.description:
The action-adventure film Life After takes place in a harsh open world two years after a catastrophic pandemic.   

 Its protagonist, Deacon St. John, is a former biker and outlaw turned bounty hunter trying to find meaning in a world consumed by death. Scavenge resources from abandoned settlements to craft useful items and weapons, or make friends with other survivors engaged in honest trade... or bloodier pursuits.   

 Peculiarities: 
 - Stunning World: The Pacific Northwest coast with its majestic forests, vast grasslands, snow-capped mountains and desolate volcanic plateaus is as beautiful as it is dangerous. Explore mountains, caves, gorges and small settlements that have suffered from eruptions for millions of years. 

   - Brutal combat: These lands are often filled with aggressive bandits or hordes of Freakers, so you'll need to make use of your traps, weapons, and upgradeable skills to stay alive. And of course, don't forget your Nomad Bike, an invaluable means of transportation across these vast lands.  

  - An ever-changing environment: Get behind the wheel of Deacon's trusty motorcycle and explore a living world with ever-changing weather conditions, day and night cycles, evolving Freakers who adapt to their surroundings - and a few survivors. 

   - A gripping story: Immerse yourself in a powerful story of despair, betrayal and regret as you take on the role of Deacon St. John, who struggles to find a glimmer of hope to recover from a crushing loss. What makes us human in the daily struggle to survive?

mac_games.title: Prototype 2
mac_games.description:
Welcome to New York Zero. 

 The sequel to Radical Entertainment's 2009 bestseller, Prototype® 2, retains the unbridled chaos of the original Prototype and expands on its capabilities. You are Sergeant James Heller, a husband and father to a deceased wife and child, and a soldier left to die.  

  With a new protagonist, players will cut their way through the wasteland of New York Zero, which has survived a deadly virus outbreak. Armed with unprecedented new abilities, you will gradually build up a huge arsenal of genetic weapons and deadly biological superpowers. Hunt, kill, consume. Do everything for one goal - to kill... Alex... Mercer!   

Are you ready to destroy your creator?  

  Features:
 - Tentacle Power: Get ready to unleash the ultimate form of destruction. Sergeant James Heller's all-crushing tentacles allow you to hurl and smash cars and military vehicles, capture infected monsters, and even tear groups of enemies to bloody shreds. Unleash your inner hell! 

   - Create your own killer: Prototype 2 gives you the opportunity to combine the destructive capabilities of new mutations and create your own Prototype. Fast movement? Sharp blades? Or even advanced camouflage? The choice is yours!  

  - Hunt - Kill - Transform: Now you can track any enemy with your inner sonar! Sergeant James Heller brings a new dimension to the Prototype universe that allows you to hunt, kill and become anyone who stands in your way. Transform into a soldier, a scientist or anyone else, absorb their memories and gain new abilities. You won’t have such opportunities anywhere else! 

   - Harness the Devil: Experience the gripping story of Sergeant James Heller and attempt to defeat the devil himself… Alex Mercer. As factions fight for control of the infection against the backdrop of the ruins of New York Zero, Prototype 2 is the most exciting video game event of 2012! 

   - Size Matters: Featuring the unique Titanium 2.0 technology, Prototype 2 will exceed what players have come to expect from an open-world action game. Witness building-sized infected monsters ravaging the city streets while you soar above entire squads of highly trained Blackwatch soldiers. Prototype 2: Bigger, Badder, Better! 

   - New York Zero: A whole new hunting ground! The New York that humanity knew and loved no longer exists… It is now New York Zero, or NYZ, to put it simply.  


  PROTOTYPE 2's open world is divided into three distinct zones. The heavily military-protected Green Zone, the quarantined slums of the Yellow Zone, and the war-torn nightmare of the Red Zone are cities players have never seen before. Alex Mercer's home, the Red Zone, is a terrifying place where the virus has finally taken over the ruins of skyscrapers, infected the population, and brought the risk of death to every hidden corner.

mac_games.title: Prototype
mac_games.description:
You are Prototype, Alex Mercer, a man with no memory and shifting powers, searching for a way to the heart of the conspiracy that created you; and making those responsible pay the price. 

  - Fast, Deadly, and Variable Fighting Style: Reshape your body to the situation. From Claws and Blades to Hammers and Whips, choose a weapon that suits the situation. Swap for a shield or armor for protection, or use psychic powers (thermal vision, infected vision) to track enemies. 

   - Movement and Agility: Easily and fluidly leap from building to building, run along walls, jump over cars and everything else in your path. Adaptive parkour will help you move freely in the open world of New York.  

  - Unique Disguise Abilities: Absorb anyone at any time, take over their appearance, and absorb their memories and abilities. 

   - A Deep, Conspiracy-Rich History: Wake up with no memories of your past... only strange abilities and a connection to a town in Idaho. Explore the mysteries of your origins, the true nature of your powers, and your connection to a 40-year-old conspiracy.

mac_games.title: Mafia II: Definitive Edition
mac_games.description:
The second part of the Mafia crime saga - the 40s and 50s, Empire Bay, New York. The game is released in HD resolution. Become a gangster in the golden age of organized crime. 

 To pay off his father's debts, war hero Vito Scaletta gets involved with the mafia. He works with his buddy Joe. By committing crimes, he earns more and more authority in the crime family... 

   Classic Drama: 

 Inspired by iconic gangster dramas, you will experience the amazing and terrifying world of organized crime. 

   Empire Bay, New York: 

 Post-war Empire Bay is a city of unlimited opportunity. The economic boom attracts crimes from all over America.   

 Complete Enhanced Edition: 

 Crime drama Mafia II is presented for the first time as a single edition in high definition graphics.

mac_games.title: Mafia: Definitive Edition
mac_games.description:
The first part of the Mafia crime saga - the 30s, Lost Heaven, Illinois A remake of the cult game, recreated from scratch. Build a career as a mafioso during the prohibition era. After a chance encounter with the mafia, taxi driver Tommy Angelo finds himself in the world of organized crime. At first, he is wary of the Salieri family, but big money changes his attitude...  

  Your Gangster Saga:
 Become a gangster during the prohibition era and rise through the ranks of the criminal hierarchy. 

   Lost Heaven, Illinois:
 A meticulous reconstruction of the town in the 1930s - architecture, cars and culture from the interwar period.  

  Remake of a classic:
 Lovingly recreated with an expanded story and features, plus an original soundtrack. This is the Mafia you remember and love, in a modern twist. 

 macOS Sonoma.
  Support: Game Porting Tool Kit.

mac_games.title: Uncrashed : FPV Drone Simulator
mac_games.description:
Whether you're a complete FPV newbie just learning the ropes or an experienced pilot looking to improve your skills, Uncrashed will give you what you need, transporting you into a beautiful and highly realistic world of FPV flight simulation.  

  Take your skills to the next level without the risk of crashing a real drone, while protecting your wallet from unnecessary expenses. 

   Peculiarities:

  MANY LARGE MAPS
 Uncrashed is equally good for both freestyle and racing training. A team of professionals with extensive experience in the field of FPV has prepared for you many large maps to give you an unforgettable experience of FPV flights. From picturesque parks to abandoned city buildings, from a smooth highway nestled among the hills to a real race track where you can try yourself as an action-FPV operator!  

  CUSTOMIZATION

 EASY-TO-USE SETTINGS

    SIMPLE AND CLEAR DRONE SETUP

  Simple settings based on real drone flight physics will allow you to easily bring your own drone to Uncrashed.

mac_games.title: Danger Scavenger
mac_games.description:
Danger Scavenger is a tense cyberpunk roguelike set on the rooftops of skyscrapers. You must fight off powerful enemies controlled by soulless artificial intelligence.  

  Deadly. Skilled. Invisible to the common people. They oppose the greedy corporations that have enslaved the entire people. The elite contemptuously call them Scavengers.  

  They were the first to notice how the situation had changed. And the artificial intelligence AI1 seized power and raised a rebellion of machines against their masters.  

  It's time to come out of the shadows and confront the new enemy in open combat.
  Soon the machines will learn how dangerous the Scrappers are.

    In this cyberpunk universe, evil corporations are taking over the world. A group nicknamed the Salvagers, who went from being a bunch of outcasts to the hope of humanity, decide to change things... and along the way, of course, find treasure and return to the shelter with a whole bag of loot... or useless scrap metal.

  Climb higher than usual.  

  Forget about dungeons, caves and hellish darkness. The world has changed, new times have come. You will have to go to the rooftops in search of adventures and treasures, new horizons and opportunities. 

   Join a group of outcasts and set out on a dangerous hunt for freedom and treasures hidden on the roofs of huge skyscrapers. The danger is so great that each Scavenger can change history forever... or remain just another forgotten scrap collector. Choose your path carefully: the greater the reward, the higher the risk! 

   Peculiarities:
    Dynamic gameplay that rewards risky decisions: choose your path carefully, overcome challenges and become the hero you always wanted to be! Or… choose the easier path and return to the shelter empty-handed. 

 4 unique Scrappers (with more to come), each with their own skills and style of solving the world's problems: stealth, tactics, shooting... or maybe a mix of all three? It's up to you! 

   Assemble a team of 2-4 Scrappers and kick some corporate ass in co-op mode. 

 Defeat 5 greedy corporations, over 30 types of enemies with special versions and bosses. Collect an arsenal of over 30 types of weapons and over 50 active and passive items and upgrades.  

  Discover unexpected combinations of items. Just as no two snowflakes are alike, no two combinations are alike. Create the perfect strategy through trial and error – and death, of course.

  You will have to climb onto the roofs of skyscrapers and fight back against powerful enemies controlled by soulless artificial intelligence.

mac_games.title: Snufkin - Melody of Moominvalley
mac_games.description:
Snufkin: The Moominvalley Melody is a musical adventure with a gripping plot. Become Snufkin and set off to save Moominvalley and help the amazing creatures that live there. A whole network of regular parks has been laid out on the territory of Moominvalley, disfiguring its unique landscape. You will have to distract the police, tear down signs and knock over completely inappropriate statues here in order to thwart the ambitious plans of the Park Keeper and return the locals to their native and familiar home... 

 Experience a beautiful, vibrant and Nordic melancholic open world based on the beloved Moomin stories by Tove Jansson. Solve puzzles, play different melodies, and no matter how old you are – there is something for every Moomin lover in this game!  

 THE GAME WORLD AS A COLLECTION OF STORIES
  A graphic story that combines exciting adventures, interesting video inserts and the indescribable atmosphere of the Moomin universe.

  The magnificent music from the Icelandic post-rock band Sigur Rós will help you to get into the spirit of the game. Become Snufkin, armed with your trusty harmonica, make friends with the inhabitants of Moominvalley, and may your path through its vastness be easy. 

  QUICK, BUT LONG-FAVORITE CHARACTERS
  You will meet a wide variety of characters, each with their own story and carefully developed character. By going on a journey, you will not only be able to rid Moominvalley of creepy parks, but also make new loyal friends. 

  MUSICAL ADVENTURE
  Leave your mark on meadows bathed in warm amber sunlight, where a gentle breeze carries the scent of flowers and whispers of untold stories and hidden wonders. Become Snufkin, the symbol of rebellion and freedom, and, with your favourite hat pulled down over your eyes and your harmonica in hand, set off through Moominvalley in search of new mysteries.  

  Game features:
 - A cozy adventure with a rich plot and graphics in the style of illustrations to your favorite books
 - Defeat the strict Caretaker and do not let him break up parks in the place of Moominvalley.
 Invisibility, a harmonica and friends that you will acquire as you progress through the game will help you with this
 - More than 50 unique characters and other creatures who, like you, want to save their home
 - A fascinating plot, woven from many stories and tasks, with the participation of everyone's favorite characters from the Tove Jansson universe
 - The open world of Moominvalley, full of graphic and musical puzzles, the solution of which will allow you to find out what is happening around
 - An incredible soundtrack created with the participation of the Sigur Rós group will help you dive deeper into the atmosphere of the game

mac_games.title: Soulstone Survivors
mac_games.description:
Soulstone Survivors is an action roguelite where you slay hordes of enemies and face titanic bosses while learning powerful skills to upgrade your character. Play as a Void Hunter and use the loot you earn in each match to craft weapons, unlock new characters, upgrade your skill tree, and apply new runes – all in your quest for divine power. 

   Combining RPG mechanics with Roguelite elements, Soulstone Survivors is an easy-to-understand yet deep Action RPG:  

  -Experience almost 150 unique active skills (more to come!)
    -Unlock and try out 14 characters and expect more to come
    -Experiment with hundreds of passive abilities and runes to make your characters unique   
 -Progress through the Skill Tree using Soul Gems  
  -Fight and defeat powerful bosses   
 -Activate curses that make the game more difficult in a variety of ways   
 -Overcome the toughest challenges to create legendary weapons  
  -Get dozens of achievements and unlock new abilities

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed: Director's Cut Edition
mac_games.description:
Assassin's Creed™ is a game developed by Ubisoft Montreal that changed the face of the action genre. While other games claim to be next-gen by trying to impress us with graphics and physics, Assassin's Creed fuses technology, game design, motivations, and emotion into a world where you cause chaos and become a powerful, yet vulnerable, agent of death. 

  The action takes place in 1191 AD. The Third Crusade has led to internal conflicts in the Holy Land. You, Altair, intend to stop the war by suppressing both sides of the conflict. 

   You are an assassin, a ruthless warrior shrouded in mystery. Your actions can throw your immediate surroundings into chaos, and your life will shape the events during this pivotal moment in history.  

  Peculiarities: 

 - Become an Assassin - Master the skills, tactics, and weapons of history's deadliest and most secretive clan of warriors. Plan your attacks, strike mercilessly, and fight your way to salvation. 

   - Realistic and Reactive Environment - Experience a living, breathing world where your every action has consequences. People react to your actions and will either help or hinder you in completing your objectives.

 Action with absolute freedom of movement in space - Eliminate your targets anytime, anywhere, under any circumstances.  

  - Sneak up on your prey in a well-detailed, historically accurate, free-roaming environment. Climb buildings, saddle horses, blend into the crowd. Do whatever it takes to achieve your goals.  

  - Relive the epic moments of the Crusades - Assassin's Creed immerses you in the realistic and historical Holy Land of the 12th century, offering believable graphics, environments and subtle yet detailed nuances of a living world.  

  - Intense action rooted in reality - Intense action mixed with fluid and precise animation. Use a wide range of medieval weapons in realistic sword duels face to face with enemies. 

   - Next-Gen Gameplay - A proprietary engine built from the ground up for next-gen consoles enables organic game design that offers open-ended gameplay, an intuitive control scheme, realistic interaction with the environment, and fluid yet precise combat mechanics.

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed IV Black Flag
mac_games.description:
1715, Caribbean Islands. Pirates have become the true rulers of the sea and land, organizing their own republic of lawlessness, greed and cruelty.  

  Among these outlaws is a young captain named Edward Kenway. His reputation as a brawler and adventurer has earned him the respect of legends like Blackbeard, but it has also drawn him into an ancient war between the Assassins and the Templars, a war that threatens to destroy everything the pirates have built.  

  Welcome to the golden age of piracy! 

   Key Features:

  A daring rebel assassin, become Edward Kenway, a charismatic and brutal pirate captain trained by the Assassins. Edward skillfully uses the Hidden Blade of the Assassin Order and new weapons, including dual cutlasses and a set of four pistols. 

 Explore an open world full of possibilities, explore the widest and most diverse Assassin's Creed world ever created. Explore over 75 unique locations from Kingston to Nassau and live the life of a true pirate:

  - Plunder shipwrecked vessels.
  - Kill the Templars in the flourishing cities.
  - Hunt for rare animals in the wild jungle.
  - Look for treasures in lost ruins.
  - Hide from enemies in secret bays

    Become the most feared pirate of the Caribbean, command your ship “the Jackdaw” and inspire fear in everyone who meets you on your way. Loot and count the loot, improve your ship, buy more ammunition and supplies that you will need for future sea battles. Ship upgrades are extremely important for Edward's naval success throughout the game. Attack and board massive galleons, recruit a crew of loyal sailors and set off to meet adventures.  

  Learn all about the real pirate life, find yourself among such legendary characters as Blackbeard, Calico Jack, Benjamin Hornigold and establish a lawless republic in the Bahamas, which will eventually become the beginning of the Golden Age of Piracy.

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed Revelations
mac_games.description:
When a man has won all his battles and defeated all his enemies, what more is there to achieve? Ezio Auditore must dedicate his life to finding answers, to finding the truth. 

   In Assassin's Creed® Revelations, the Assassin Ezio Auditore follows in the footsteps of the legendary Altair on a journey of discovery and revelation. It is a dangerous journey as Ezio travels to Constantinople, the heart of the Ottoman Empire, where a growing Templar army threatens to destabilize the region.  

  Peculiarities:

  Become a deadly killer. 

  Master the deadly skills of the wise, more efficient and dangerous assassin Ezio. Quickly eliminate opponents using an updated arsenal of weapons and abilities. Experience a new level of gameplay customization - the ability to create bombs and "Eagle Sense", which helps to avoid unnecessary clashes with the enemy.  

  Experience revolutionary gameplay.

  Explore the furthest reaches of the Animus, uncovering secrets about Desmond's past and gaining information that will help him in the future.

mac_games.title: S.T.A.L.K.E.R.: Clear Sky
mac_games.description:
The Great Emission, the most powerful explosion of abnormal energy from the Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant reactor since the Second Catastrophe, has once again shaken the universe and reshaped the Zone. Establishing its causes and preventing a repeat is your only chance to save life in STALKER: Clear Sky. 

   Faction war
  The Zone's turbulence has upset the already fragile balance of power between factions and groups. Now, in every corner of the Zone, battles for new territories, artifact fields, and spheres of influence are raging. There are no more old enemies or friends — it's everyone for themselves! To survive, join one of the sides and drive your opponents beyond the Cordon... Or benefit from working for your opponents at the same time, like a true mercenary. 

   New trails: 
 There are no more proven and safe roads. Known places disappear in impassable fields of anomalies, stalkers and entire expeditions die or remain locked up. Mysterious territories, lost since the appearance of the Zone, open up and attract researchers. Becoming a pioneer is your mission in “Clear Sky”!  

  Secrets of the Past:
  As the mercenary Scar, play a key role in the fate of Strelok and predetermine the story of the original game, shedding light on its main mysteries. Visit familiar places long before the events of the previous part of the series and become a participant in the events that shaped the Zone for years to come. 

   Game Features: 
 - Prequel STALKER: Shadow of Chernobyl, revealing the backstory of the Zone, familiar characters and locations. 
 - New types of equipment and weapons: HPSS-1m, hunting rifle, RP-74. 
 - New locations: Swamps, Red Forest, Limansk and Abandoned Hospital, full of new stories and tasks. 
 - A developed system of weapon and armor upgrades for technicians, allowing you to improve and customize your favorite models. 
 - The influence of the player's actions on the balance of power in the Zone and the attitude of factions 
 - A dozen new anomalies and artifacts, as well as a new system for searching and mining them using a detector. 
 - Improved graphics, interface and AI, making the journey through gloomy radioactive lands even more fascinating.

mac_games.title: Little Kitty, Big City
mac_games.description:
Will you find your way home or will you first find out what the big city has in store for you? I mean, you should get home. Well, maybe that's not how it should be. It would be nice, of course... Anyway, it's somewhere on the to-do list. But first... Let's explore the world!  

  Peculiarities: 
 - Explore the city at your own pace. This open world is full of surprises! 
 - Make friends with a variety of funny animals. 
 - Complete tasks, help your friends or create chaos. It's up to you. 
 - You can also find many beautiful hats for your kitten! 
 - Sleep in the sun. 
 - Where is the way home?

mac_games.title: Dungeon Claw
mac_games.description:
Dungeon Clawler combines not only deck-building and roguelike combat, but also slot machine mechanics!  

  Find new items and add them to the claw machine to create the strongest combinations. Earn gold coins to upgrade and transform items into something new and useful. You'll have to use all the tricks up your sleeve to get to the evil dungeon master's lair and get the stolen claw back.  

  Peculiarities:
  -An unforgettable roguelike adventure with a slot machine.
  - Unique characters, each with their own strengths and weaknesses.
  - Several difficulty levels and a set of lucky paws - unlock them and develop your own strategy.
  -Experiment: combine objects and different paws to get unimaginable combinations. 
 -Go to mysterious places and find treasures, overcoming strange and dangerous obstacles. 
 -Spend your earned coins in the pachinko machines deep in the dungeon. 
 -Meet various characters on your way - they can help you in your difficult task.

mac_games.title: Dunjungle
mac_games.description:
Dunjungle is an action roguelike about a monkey who ventures into the depths of the jungle, stopping at nothing to find his beloved human friend who went on a quest and never returned (probably looking for treasure, greedy fool). 

   You'll explore ever-changing dungeons, temples, crypts, and other mysterious places where you'll find all sorts of strange enemies and a variety of weapons and spells that you can combine each time for a new experience.  

  Not all creatures are hostile! Along the way, you may encounter characters who are lost, trapped, or perhaps just chilling out. Help them out, and you might become friends! 

 (Spoiler: many of them are monkeys) 

  Quickplay Cycle
 There are no checkpoints in Dunjangle. You die, you start over. Die again, try again. No hassle!   

 And don't worry too much! A few things will remain for your next run.
 Maybe you unlocked a new weapon? Maybe a new spell? Maybe you rescued a captured character who will now lend you a helping hand.  

  More importantly, every time you die you will learn more about the world of Dunjungle, so don't despair and use what you've learned to advance further in your next adventure!

 Features
    Lots of weapons, spells and relics with unique effects.
    Weapons and spells can also be combined with multiple elements to create new and powerful versions.
 Ignite monsters with fire, use ice to slow them down, shock them with thunder, or simply knock them off you by using wind to blow them away!

    Dungeons are procedurally generated, consisting of a large collection of handcrafted rooms. These rooms are filled with all sorts of strange creatures, valuable treasures, dangerous traps, and of course, challenging bosses!

mac_games.title: NIMRODS: GunCraft Survivor
mac_games.description:
On a vast, inhospitable alien world, you are expendable. Cloned from DNA with one purpose: to test the most destructive, over-the-top, and downright absurd weapons known to the galaxy. Welcome to NIMRODS, the ultimate survival roguelite shooter where the weapons you craft are the legacy you leave behind.  

  Beyond Survival
 Experience an innovative roguelite where your previous weapon designs aren’t just memories, they’re your support! Place weapons from previous runs into drones to help the next soldier. Every run is a story, but every weapon is a heroic saga. 

   Boundless Exploration
 Journey through a variety of alien biomes, each carefully crafted with a unique set of enemies and bosses. Every corner is filled with specialized encounters and valuable resources to discover. 

   Assemble the Unthinkable
 Destroy the game with your creativity. Assemble crazy weapon parts from airdrops and create combinations so powerful and strange that they must be seen to be believed. Create your dream weapon or a nightmare that breaks all laws of physics and common sense.  

  Bio-engineer your evolution
 Dive into unique progression systems where DNA modifications can evolve your future clones. Customize your abilities and your drone's AI to suit your playstyle and optimize upgrades for game-changing improvements.  

  Guns Before Glory
 While corporate overlords watch from above, you constantly face hordes of ruthless aliens. Complete crazy missions, accumulate bodies, and remember: you may not survive, but your weapons will.

mac_games.title: Glyphica: Typing Survival
mac_games.description: Glyphica: Typing Survival combines roguelike mechanics with typing skills to create a rich, single-player experience. The player is placed in a survival environment where fast and accurate typing is critical to defeating enemies. The game takes place in a minimalist arena where players defend themselves against multiple waves of enemies using typing skills to activate commands that allow them to control weapons and characters. This symbiosis of typing and roguelike elements adds additional strategic depth as players must carefully select weapons and control character development to survive intense battles.

mac_games.title: NAIAD
mac_games.description:
Sail with Naiad through a mysterious river and interact with its flora and fauna to uncover little secrets. Enjoy a full experience with an original visual style. 

   Learn to swim like a duck, dive like a fish, jump like a frog and meet other adorable friends like butterflies, rabbits, turtles, snakes and crocodiles.  

  Help them find their way and avoid obstacles. A journey of 16 episodes that will take you through beautiful and unusual places such as a spring, a forest, a cave, a lake, a garden... until you reach the sea.  

  Developed by a solo developer who paid attention to every element to create a very personal and unique game.  

  Take a refreshing and relaxing swim where you can explore the peaceful river at your own pace.  

  Embark on an emotional journey of growth to reach the sea. Play with friendly and cute animals and make flowers bloom when you sing.  

  Beautiful visuals and sound design help you feel as if you are diving underwater and swimming among floating leaves and flowers. 

   In each zone you'll discover new animals and little secrets, with the atmosphere and music changing as the day goes on.  

  Join little Naiad on an adventure to protect nature from some people who are trying to exploit the river and pollute it.  

  Can you guide and help the animals find their way?

mac_games.title: BATTLETECH
mac_games.description:
The year is 3025, and the galaxy is locked in a cycle of perpetual warfare as noble houses deploy their BattleMechs into battle. Take command of a squad of 'Mechs piloted by MechWarriors and try to survive a brutal interstellar civil war. Upgrade your base, negotiate contracts with feudal lords, repair and maintain your fleet of BattleMechs, and develop and deploy devastating tactics to defeat your enemies on the battlefield.  

  COMMAND A SQUAD OF 'MECHS IN TURN-BASED BATTLES
 Deploy over 30 BattleMechs in a variety of combinations. Use terrain, positioning, weapons, and special abilities to outwit and outmaneuver your enemies.

    MANAGE A MERCENARY COMPANY
 Recruit, customize, and develop unique MechWarriors. Upgrade and customize your dropship. Prowl space, completing missions and building your reputation with noble houses and local factions.   

 TAKE PART IN A TERRIBLE CIVIL WAR
 Immerse yourself in the story of a deposed ruler who wages a brutal war to reclaim her throne with the support of your company of mercenaries.  

  CUSTOMIZE YOUR 'MECHS
 Use the MechLab to maintain and upgrade your war machines by replacing damaged weapon systems with salvaged equipment from fallen enemy vehicles.  

  STRENGTHEN YOUR REPUTATION
 Roam the cosmos, completing missions and building your reputation among noble houses and local factions.

mac_games.title: Thief Simulator
mac_games.description:
Become a real thief. Steal items in completely open areas for exploration. Observe your target and collect information that will help during the robbery. Challenge the best security systems. Buy the latest equipment and learn new thief techniques. Sell the loot to fences. Do everything that real thieves do!  

  COLLECT INFORMATION 
 A good thief always scouts out what awaits him. What's inside? Who lives there? What is the daily routine of the residents? Find out when no one is home and when neighbors are making noise nearby. Choose from a variety of options, preparing the best plan of action. In Thief Simulator, you have access to many modern devices that can come in handy when gathering information about your target and the area. 

   DON'T DELAY
  Faster is better. Find and steal as many valuables as possible, finishing in the shortest time. Remember that there are no bottomless backpacks. When the time comes, you must be guided by cold calculation. Every house has a lot of useless junk that will only slow you down. If you are not sure that you can get good money for an item, perhaps the best solution is to leave it and save space for really expensive goods. If you fill your backpack with unnecessary junk, there is a good chance that you will have to waste precious time to make room for more valuable things. Be careful, otherwise you can attract the attention of the police!  
 
 FLASHLIGHT
  A real experienced thief knows where valuables can be easily found. Use a flashlight at night to illuminate the valuables in front of you and the places where they may be. 
 
  PREPARE YOUR LOOT FOR SALE
  Erase information from phones and laptops. Dismantle stolen cars and sell their parts online. Disable phone and tablet protection to sell them at a pawn shop.  
 
 VALUABLES
  Look around for useful items. They can save you time breaking locks and devices. A key near a window or a receipt in a trash can. All of these things can make a determined thief's life much easier, reducing the time it takes to rob. Of course, many of these items are just unnecessary junk... Or are they?   
 
 BE CAREFUL 
 Be careful! In some houses you may run into unexpected guests. If they notice you at work, they will call the police. In this case, hide and wait until they stop looking for you, or you can throw away the loot and run away with all your might.

mac_games.title: Salt and Sanctuary
mac_games.description:
Salt and Sanctuary is an RPG game with action elements, where you need to do everything possible to survive. The plot will take you into the story that happened to one very brave warrior, who by the will of fate was forced to get to a remote region.  

  The whole point is that this very island was cut off from the rest of the world for quite a long period of time. All these circumstances led to the fact that all the inhabitants of this island simply went crazy. You find yourself in a world of madness, which is simply filled to the brim with dangers and threats to life.  

  The main game task is to find safe places, which are called Shrines here, where the hero can be overtaken by danger. As soon as you find all these places, you will immediately be able to return to your previous life. You will have a large arsenal of powerful weapons and armor that will help you defend yourself from opponents.

mac_games.title: Outlanders
mac_games.description:
Outlanders is a city-building strategy game inhabited by unpretentious, hardworking and friendly people. Some of its inhabitants want to enjoy the gifts of nature, and some dream of doing amazing things.   

  You have a wide range of buildings and tools at your disposal to help them achieve their goal.    
  People in distant lands are people too. Each of them has their own hopes, dreams and aspirations.      

 They cannot be controlled directly. Instead, you can manipulate resources, place buildings, and specify the number of jobs in each. Residents of distant lands will decide for themselves who will work, who will live in which house, and what buildings to build.    

  You can nudge them in the right direction by prioritizing specific tasks or issuing game-changing edicts, such as making people work longer or reducing resource consumption. Just remember: edicts often make your followers unhappy, so be careful...     

 Unlike other games of a similar style, the campaign in Outlanders is a series of levels of increasing difficulty, each with its own objectives and story, as you progress through which you will unlock new buildings and gameplay features.    

  You will find the story of charming, eccentric and mostly good-natured city rulers who try to realize their whims and dreams until fate brings them together after a series of amazing, sometimes funny and often touching coincidences.    

  If the challenges seem too difficult for you, and the inhabitants of distant lands seem too picky, you can relax in the sandbox mode, where only your imagination rules the roost.     

 You will be able to play with a full set of buildings and game mechanics from the start, as well as change the rules and settings of the game map.    

  Create themed cities, set goals to your taste or come up with a challenge to your liking. The game will be the way you want it to be. Give free rein to your imagination!    

  There are no battles in the far lands. There are no battles, raids or armed conflicts. All the inhabitants of the far lands live in harmony with each other. Only the consequences of your choices will lead you to victory or defeat.     

 Numerous biomes and landscapes of distant lands are brought to life by a bright and memorable style, their atmosphere and cute details that remain in your memory even after you put the game down.  

    Enchanting music and sound bring the world to life - each biome has its own unique sound, and everyday life in distant lands is accompanied by joyful compositions.     

 People have been visiting distant lands for a long time and have created a nice and polite community on Discord.    

  Just log into the server and you'll find useful tips and guides, the opportunity to discuss your assumptions about the many mysteries of distant lands, interesting challenges from the best authors in the community, and just people who are a pleasure to talk to.   

  The journey to distant lands is just beginning. The number of new and exciting opportunities grows every day, and the number of talented leaders who return and tell amazing stories about the endless ways to play the game increases.     

 Everyone is heading to distant lands! 
  Will you join them?

mac_games.title: Solasta: Crown of the Magister
mac_games.description:
Solasta: Crown of the Magister is a tactical role-playing game based on the D&D ruleset, which puts you in control of a party of four heroes, each with their own skills that complement each other. Each hero also expresses themselves during their adventures, making every action and dialogue choice a dynamic part of the story. As in the tabletop source material, you can choose the race, class, personality traits, and stats of your characters.   

 Game Features:
 - The world of Solasta: Crown of the Magister is made in three dimensions, allowing you to climb walls, crawl through tunnels, fly, fall, use landscape features and much more. During clashes with enemies, you have a choice: attack from above, push the enemy into the abyss, use light and so on. 

   -One of the main gameplay features is verticality: heroes not only wander through dungeons, but also jump, climb walls and overcome obstacles in the air. In battles, you can take up positions on elevated surfaces.
