It is better to escape pursuit through narrow tunnels, which larger opponents will not be able to squeeze through, and cover should be selected based on the size of the hero. At the same time, you need to remember that opponents also build tactics taking into account verticality.  

  -You can use the environment in battles - collapse bridges, walls and columns, throw enemies into abysses. In addition, you need to take into account the lighting of the locations. "Darkness hides many dangers, but at the same time, light can attract monsters. Some opponents can see in the dark. Others run away, scared by the torch."

mac_games.title: Broken Sword - Shadow of the Templars: Reforged
mac_games.description:
Take to the streets of Paris in Broken Sword - Shadow of the Templars: Reforged, a vastly improved version of the award-winning classic adventure. Enjoy a gripping story as intrepid American George Stobbart and fearless journalist Nico Kollar embark on a thrilling adventure exploring exotic locations, unraveling ancient mysteries and thwarting dark conspiracies to uncover the secrets of the Knights Templar.  

  Whether you're playing the game for the first time or revisiting a beloved classic, get ready to enjoy the masterpiece that is Broken Sword - Shadow of the Templars: Reforged! 

   Key Features:
 - Gripping Storyline: Immerse yourself in a gripping story full of twists and unexpected revelations as George and Nico investigate a multitude of mysteries that will take them from the bustling streets of Paris to exotic locations in Europe and the Middle East.  

  -Classic Point-and-Click Gameplay: Discover or rediscover the joy of classic point-and-click mechanics as you solve puzzles, collect clues, and interact with colorful characters. Immerse yourself in an intuitive and engaging gameplay experience.  

  -Fully Voiced Gameplay: Immerse yourself in the game's atmosphere with fully voiced dialogue and engaging performances that bring wonderful, colorful characters to life. 

   - Challenging Puzzles: Test your intelligence by solving puzzles that require observation, deduction, and creativity. From deciphering codes to manipulating objects, each task is a step toward uncovering the mystery. 

   Reforged Features:
 -Remastered 4K Visuals: Experience the magic of the original game with enhanced high-definition graphics. Vibrant landscapes, detailed characters, and complex environments come to life in stunning 4K resolution for the first time ever.  

  -Enhanced Audio: Immerse yourself in enhanced audio as Revolution delivers the best, most stunning version of George and Niko's original adventure to date, including an incredible soundtrack from world-renowned composer Barrington Pheloung.

mac_games.title: BlazBlue Entropy Effect
mac_games.description:
BlazBlue Entropy Effect is a 2D action roguelike game and a spin-off of the BlazBlue series. 

   In this game, you will find key characters from the fighting franchise, such as Ragna Bloodedge and Noel Vermillion, who will have to go through various trials and battles to save the game world.    

  During dynamic battles with opponents, players will have the skills of seven elements at their disposal. Each character can inherit skills from two other heroes and receive them after battles. You can also combine skills of different elements to adapt to your style of play.

mac_games.title: Monospaced Lovers
mac_games.description:
Monospaced Lovers is a semi-hardcore platformer adventure that breaks the standard notions of the Metroidvania genre. It features exploration-based missions in the style of early Zelda games, coupled with a visual novel-inspired story that is both dramatic and philosophical.   

 We tried to make the game original and fresh, so that it would be perceived as something more than a mix of two long-standing genres.   

 Features:
 A sense of wonder and adventure
 Solve mind-blowing puzzles that will have you running around looking for in-game clues. 
 Return to your childhood to experience the thirst for discovery again in a game that treats you like an adult - in the best traditions of Fez, La Mulana, Majora's Mask and more.

    Gripping Plot Twists and Genre-Breaking Stereotypes
 Dive into a heart-warming story spanning over 100,000 words. Comedy! Drama! Social Anxiety! Philosophy? We've ditched the stereotypical "silent protagonist" and created a heroine with her own personality and feelings - and she's always one step ahead of you .

  A Huge, Colorful World
 Chat with local tanuki, learn to translate Slime language, and explore every nook and cranny of a bizarre but homely town in search of as many as 60 collectibles. Non-linear exploration of the world based on hidden objects and story-driven RPG-style quests await you here . 

 Danmaku Platforming
 Danger is everywhere! With over four danmaku-style boss battles and a ton of challenge rooms, you'll have to rethink your understanding of platforming to win . 

 Plot:
 One fine morning, Clara wakes up with someone else's phone.
  In it, she discovers a cryptic message from a hacker named D̵v̴o̵i̴ch̸n̷y̴ ̴b̷o̸g̴, telling her that her days in this world are numbered. Her only clue is a series of encrypted messages stored on the device... and a mysterious new friend who also woke up with someone else's phone.   

 What does the mysterious hacker want? Why does he keep talking about the end of the world? And what does this have to do with Clara, who leads a peaceful and quiet life in Haven Heights?    However, even if she doesn’t go on this adventure herself… her friends will definitely drag her into it.  ​  Are you ready to uncover the secret of D̶̺͍̜͚͆̋͊v̴̓͂͜o̷̲̠͐̒ͅḭ̸̒̀̉̆ch̷͍̊̅n̵̺̤̘̾̈́̍͜ǫ̶̾g̸̛̹̼͓̠̿o̷͖̥͈̒͋̕ ̴̦̘̮͓͝b̷̞̻̋̐̚͝ǫ̸̣̐̂͝͝g̸̘̼̱̮̐̂ӓ̵̘́̏̈ and learn the whole truth about this strange, but cozy world?    Well... it's not that important.    You can't run away from the truth. Whether you're ready for it or not doesn't matter.

mac_games.title: Celeste
mac_games.description:
In this platformer from the creators of TowerFall, Madeline battles her demons on her way to the top of Mount Celeste. Overcome hundreds of well-designed challenges, find secrets, and unravel the mystery of the mountain.  

 A single-player, old-fashioned game about finding yourself
 Climb 700 screens with challenging tricks and hidden areas
 Bonus chapters for the bravest
 Two hours of music from Independent Games Festival Excellence in Audio finalist Pie

  Simple, easy-to-use controls with plenty of challenging moments where every fall teaches you something.

  It's okay, Madeline. Just breathe. You can do it.

mac_games.title: OXENFREE II: Lost Signals
mac_games.description:
Televisions turn on and off. Planes fly off course. Radio stations are unable to broadcast due to interference. In the coastal town of Kamen, unusual electromagnetic waves suddenly interfere with electrical and radio equipment. Riley Powerly reluctantly returns to her hometown to investigate the mystery, but finds much more than she bargained for. 

 OXENFREE II: Lost Signals is a thrilling sequel to Night School Studio's critically acclaimed adventure game, OXENFREE. Play as a standalone game or experience the original version - the choice is yours. As you play, you'll make decisions and influence the course of events. How you deal with supernatural phenomena will determine the future. 

   Your choices matter.
 Change the story with dialogue. You can befriend an old classmate or ignore a lost fisherman who needs help. Your decisions affect who Riley becomes, her relationships, and the ways things will unfold. 

   Start a conversation anywhere.
 Use the new walkie-talkie to talk to people and make discoveries related to the mysteries of Kamena. Start conversations with locals, ask questions, or ignore them. It's up to you. But every decision has consequences. 

   Stop Legacy.
 Five years ago, a group of teenagers accidentally opened a portal on Edwards Island, creating a rift between realities and time periods. Now, members of a mysterious cult-like organization called Legacy are trying to open a new portal to do something. Who are they? What do they want? Are they trying to communicate with ghosts?  

  Tune into the radio wave.
 Ghostly signals are infiltrating the frequencies of Kamena. Immerse yourself in the ominous sounds and interference with the help of special radio mechanics OXENFREE. You will be able to establish a connection with the supernatural, control the world and travel back in time by tuning into time rifts - unnatural cracks in the space-time continuum.  

  Save everyone and everything.
 In OXENFREE, your future was at stake, and in OXENFREE II, the stakes are even higher. Explore the beautiful and dangerous terrain of Kamena. Take risks - and see where they lead you. Danger awaits you... and an opportunity to save the future. Not just Riley, but everyone in the city.

mac_games.title: Oxenfree
mac_games.description:
Oxenfree is a supernatural thriller about a group of friends who unwittingly open a ghostly rift. Play as Alex, a bright, rebellious teenager who brings her new stepbrother Jonas to a slumber party on an old military island. The night takes a terrifying turn when you unwittingly open a ghostly gate spawned from the island's mysterious past. How you deal with these events, your colleagues, and the sinister creatures you've unleashed is up to you.   

  You shape every aspect of Alex's story as you explore Edwards Island, uncover the base's dark past, and change the course of your friends' lives.   

  Game features:
  - Thanks to the intelligent dialogue system, the plot and your relationships with other characters change with every decision you make 
 - Unique radio mechanics allow Alex to communicate with mysterious spirits and control the world around him 
 -Graphics by Disney alumni and original music by scntfc (Sword & Sworcery, Galak-Z) 
 -You will have to solve many mysteries, the history of which goes back tens and hundreds of years. 
 -The game is inspired by little-known events of World War II 
 - Featuring voice actors from The Wolf Among Us, The Walking Dead, Borderlands and many other famous games

mac_games.title: Planet Coaster
mac_games.description:
Build the amusement park of your dreams and get ready to amaze and entertain your visitors by managing a truly living game world.  

  Whether you have experience or not, your ideas will become reality. Use ready-made projects to place over 700 different objects – rides, buildings and decorations – and then build your own from scratch. You may need to change the landscape – our special tools will help with this too.  

  Managing a park is as easy as building one. Guests react to your every action in real time. Place decorations and attractions and set the price for visiting the park. To attract more profitable visitors, don't forget to entertain them.

mac_games.title: Whisker Squadron: Survivor
mac_games.description:
The galaxy has been overrun by robotic bugs known as the Swarm. They multiply, divide, and conquer, leaving endless carnage in their wake. It's up to you and your team of feline pilots to destroy this menace for the good of all animalistic humanity.  

  From the creators of RACE THE SUN comes Whisker Squadron: Survivor! Embark on a dangerous space epic in your customizable ship to defeat the Swarm once and for all. Fight off waves of enemies in tight quarters, upgrade your ship after each attempt, and most importantly, survive.  

  Features:
 - Embark on an ever-changing adventure through neon-lit, on-rails roguelike shooter levels that change with every 20-30 minute playthrough.
 - Build your fighter using randomized upgrades that can be constructed from scraps dropped in each level and victory points earned throughout the game.
 - Change the course of the game by unlocking mods as you earn achievements.
 - Open portals that send you down a challenging new secret path that changes the way you approach the game.

mac_games.title: Gas Station Simulator
mac_games.description:
Gas Station Simulator is all about repairing, developing and operating a gas station on the highway in the middle of the desert. Freedom of choice, several approaches to business management and fighting against external pressure are the key components of this game.  

  Buy an abandoned gas station in the wasteland and restore it to its former glory. Get rid of the trash and broken furniture, fix the walls, paint and decorate the place to your taste. Just don't spend all your money on the exterior at once, you bought a gas station after all. Repair the equipment, buy what can't be repaired, and start serving your customers to earn money for further upgrades and improvements. 

  You don't have to stay small. You can expand your gas station to serve more customers. Also, a gas station is not just about selling fuel. You can expand the range of services you offer to your customers and thus attract more and more of them. There are various options for improvements at your disposal. From small ones like restrooms, a simple shop to supplement your income to large ones like a full car repair shop or even a car wash. There are quite a few options and most of the improvements can be expanded on their own. There is so much you can do. 

  It's one thing to restore your gas station, but another to give it a personal touch. The game offers a wide range of options for what you've already built, and plenty of decorations to further enhance the uniqueness of the place. Some decorations can be purchased, while others must be acquired as you play. It's not just about making your gas station look pretty. The more impressive your gas station is, the more customers it will attract. 

  Customer service is the key to running a successful gas station. They all expect their cars to be filled and their purchases to be made right away, and they are not so patient, even when it comes to repairing their cars. You will be dealing with serious time pressure and must schedule various tasks for less busy times. Proper time management and choosing the right priorities becomes very important when it comes to keeping customers happy.  

 Although you can try, but in most cases, it works on an expanded and modernized gas station. Providing many different services to customers may be too much for you to do alone. This is where employees come into play. You can even hire multiple employees to help you with different tasks. Employees have their own skills, and some are better at certain tasks than others. Employees also level up based on the tasks they perform and get better over time.  

 You can’t sell what you don’t have. It’s important to keep track of your inventory and place orders for the right time at the right price. This helps maintain profits. To take advantage of the cost savings even more, you can build a warehouse and expand it to accommodate more storage space. Keep a close eye on your inventory. This is critical because shipping takes time. You don’t want to run out of inventory, let alone fuel.  

 We created the game so that you can also dive into the management features and micromanage everything live. However, if micromanagement is not your thing, we do not force you to understand its depths. At the same time, micromanaging certain elements, such as consumables or employees, can be very useful both in terms of finances and in terms of entertainment.  

  Key Features:
 - Upgrade, manage and expand your desert gas station.
 - Create new services: workshop, store, warehouse or car wash.
 - Try to handle everything yourself or hire employees to help.
 - Interesting events on top of the regular gameplay.
 - Lots of customization and decoration options.
 Many different customers with different needs and expectations.
 Many management options to dive into.

mac_games.title: Nocturnals
mac_games.description:
Follow the story of Ted as he navigates the abandoned post-apocalyptic town of Ruddleside and finds a lonely companion in Diego.  

  Your choices will determine whether Diego will bond with Ted and help him continue his search for survivors, or whether the pair will face challenges and problems that will put them at odds with each other as they try to escape the horrors unfolding in Raddleside.  

  Gameplay:
  -Explore stylized 3D environments: Navigate the atmospheric terrain of Ruddleside. 
 -Solve puzzles and find collectibles: Uncover the secrets of the city with various puzzles and collectibles. 
 -Shape Ted's Destiny: Make decisions that will shape Ted's personality and determine his destiny. 
 - Embark on a spiritual journey in Nocturnals.

mac_games.title: Chasm
mac_games.description:
Welcome to Chasm, an action-adventure game where you need to investigate rumors about the closure of the royal mine: some creatures came from the depths and kidnapped the workers.   

 The hero goes on an adventure, fights monsters, explores catacombs and castles, and finds equipment. The plot is the same, but each game will be unique: the rooms are handcrafted, and they form a map that no one else will have.   

 Game Features:
  -Explore the depths of a remote mountain town in this procedurally generated adventure platformer. 
 - Six truly endless levels await you, lovingly created in a retro pixel art style. 
 -Inspired by slashers and Metroidvania-style platformers, Chasm will immerse you in a fantasy world full of exciting treasures, deadly enemies and various secrets. 
 -Help Daltin gain new powers, upgrade his equipment and find the missing miners.

mac_games.title: Five Hearts Under One Roof
mac_games.description:
Five Hearts Under One Roof is a fully immersive interactive video game that follows a love story with five unique heroines. You play as Yuman, who has always lived alone. Now your home has turned into a lively dorm full of love and unexpected moments with five charming girls. 

   Which of these five heroines will win your heart? 

 Or... maybe true love is waiting for you in a completely different place?  

  Peculiarities:
  Immersion in the Novel from the First Person
  You will experience the entire game from the perspective of the main character. You will have to make important decisions that will determine the development of events and romantic lines. This is more than a regular dating simulator - each of your decisions opens up new scenes and romantic events. 

   Rich History 
 Numerous plot forks and multiple endings will give you a gripping narrative. Hidden epilogues and bonus videos in each of the six chapters will add depth to your romantic adventure. Unexpected choices can open up new video routes full of surprises.  

  Natural Acting and High-Quality Visualization

  The charming images of the five heroines convey sincere emotions, making the story even more realistic. Thanks to the excellent work of the developers, who know their characters very well, you will feel a real romance.

    Irresistible Heroines 
 A sweet neighbor, a strict tsundere, a shy recluse, a daring young girl - heroines for every taste and age: older, younger or the same age. Each of them offers a unique and exciting love story.

mac_games.title: Depersonalization
mac_games.description:
Depersonalization is an adventure, role-playing and strategy game developed by MeowNature and published by Gamera Games.  

  The plot tells about a man who suffers from a personality disorder called depersonalization. He cannot recognize his emotions and feelings, often feeling that he does not exist in the real world.  

  The player plays as this person who is trying to understand his condition and find a way to cure depersonalization. He must explore different places and situations to understand what is happening to him and how he can cope with this problem.   

 The game mechanics include exploring locations, solving puzzles, and finding the exit from each room. The player must be attentive and resourceful to cope with the tasks and move on through the levels.

mac_games.title: Jetpack Joyride 2
mac_games.description:
Barry Steakfries is back!   

 Team up with Barry and Betty and make your way through the lab to stop the scientists' experiments before it's too late!  

  Jetpack Joyride 2 is the long-awaited sequel to the cult classic game with new HD graphics, new animations, new mechanics and a new way to play.

mac_games.title: Victoria 3
mac_games.description:
CREATE A GREAT FUTURE 

 Paradox Development Studio invites you to build an ideal society in the turmoil of the crazy 19th century. Find a way to balance social contradictions and earn a place in the sun in Victoria 3, one of the most anticipated games in the studio's history.  

  THE ULTIMATE SOCIETY SIMULATOR 
 - Manage any of dozens of countries in the world from 1836 to 1936. Agriculture or industry, loyalty to traditions or radical reforms, peaceful life or conquests - the choice is yours!  
  -Remember that each group of the population has its own political views and economic problems.  
  -Create a progressive society through government reforms and constitutional updates, or stand up for traditional values ​​against revolutionary upheavals.   
 -Research new technologies and explore new ideas to help your country develop.   

 COMPLEX ECONOMIC SYSTEM
  -Develop industry and trade, tax profits and increase national welfare.  
  -Import cheap raw materials to meet basic needs and look for new markets to sell your goods.  
  -Regulate the circulation of essential goods to support your economy and influence the fate of empires.  
  -Use cheap labor, but do not forget about the market need for qualified employees. 

   PLAY ON THE WORLD STAGE
  - Pull the strings in the tangled web of diplomacy, weave intrigues, create alliances, quarrel and reconcile, strengthen your position in the world. 
   -Use threats, military superiority and bluff to force your enemies to retreat.   
 -Develop your economy and army at the expense of your opponents.  
  -Develop your industry or conquer new territories to strengthen your reputation and earn the respect of your competitors.

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed Brotherhood
mac_games.description:
ive and breathe as Ezio, the legendary Master Assassin, as he battles the Templars. He must enter Italy's greatest city, Rome, the center of power, greed and corruption, where he will strike straight at the heart of the enemy. 

   To defeat the corrupt tyrants who have settled there, it takes more than just strength, but also leadership, which Ezio has as he goes into battle alongside the Brotherhood of Assassins. Only by fighting side by side will the Assassins defeat their sworn enemies.  

  For the first time in the series, the award-winning multiplayer is introduced, allowing you to choose from a wide range of unique characters with their own weapons and killing techniques, and battle against other players from all over the world. 

   The time has come to join the Brotherhood.   

 Features:
 Be a legend: Control Ezio, the legendary Assassin, in a new adventure that will take you over 15 hours.   

 Lead and manage a legendary brotherhood: assemble and customize your guild. Train and level up your fighters' combat skills so that they can help you in your travels.  

  Use Secret Weapons: Eliminate your enemies using tools such as poison darts, parachutes, dual hidden blades, a hidden pistol and an advanced flying machine.  

  Conquer the Heart of the City: Use your hard-earned cash to rebuild the crumbling city. Rally the citizens to your cause and unlock new factions and missions.

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed Liberation HD
mac_games.description:
Assassin's Creed® Liberation HD is a new chapter in the Assassin's Creed saga set in the pre-American Revolution, coming to HD consoles and PC for the first time. With enhanced gameplay, a rich storyline, and HD graphics, Liberation delivers a fully immersive Assassin's Creed experience.  

  The year is 1765. The revolutionary mood in the north forces the Spanish to take control of the southern state of Louisiana. But in their way stands Avelina, a ruthless assassin who uses various abilities and weapons from her arsenal in the fight for freedom. Destroying enemies with various assassin techniques or luring them into deadly traps, Avelina strikes fear into the hearts of anyone who stands in her way.  
  Assassin Aveline is about to embark on an unforgettable journey that will take her from the crowded streets of New Orleans to the lost ruins of the Mayans and the swamps where voodoo magic hovers. She will play an important role in igniting the fire of revolution in New Orleans at the dawn of a new nation. Aveline fights not for her own freedom, but for the freedom of those whose lives and hopes have been trampled.  
  Peculiarities:

  Avelina is back.

  As Aveline, an assassin of French-African descent, you will have to use your skills, instincts and weapons. In your arsenal you will find a machete, a blowpipe with poisoned darts, a whip and dueling pistols. 

   The Disunited States of America.

  The Anvil Next engine will present you with a beautifully detailed world with completely new physics, animation and combat system. A unique tree navigation system will give you a huge advantage over your enemies in the lake area of ​​Louisiana and will allow you to destroy them from above with extreme precision. Dive underwater in search of lost Mayan treasures, but be on your guard: dangerous animals lie in wait in the wild thickets and swamps.  

  Improved gameplay.

  The new technical base of "Liberation HD" expands the horizons of graphic possibilities. High dynamic range (HDR) visualization, high detail of the environment and characters, improved video sequence will create an indelible impression of the game. The gameplay has also undergone changes: new tasks have appeared in which the character's movement has been improved, the story of Avelina is told in more detail and the design of the game world has been improved, which will expand the possibilities when completing tasks. The soundtrack of the game deserves special attention: it will please you with new music and special effects.

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed III
mac_games.description:
The American colonies, 1775. A time of civil unrest and political upheaval in America. A Native American assassin, fighting to protect his land, will light the fires of a burgeoning national revolution.

 Assassin's Creed III will take you back to the Revolutionary War and tell you what the history books don't tell you...  

  Game Features:
 As a Native American assassin, kill your enemies with guns, bows, tomahawks, and more!  
  From bustling streets to battlefields, play a vital role in legendary events of the American Revolution, including the Battle of Bunker Hill and the Great New York Fire.  

  Learn the truth about the most terrible war in history: the American War of Independence. 

   Introducing Ubisoft's new game engine, the Anvil Next Engine; a stunning new technology that will power the game with stunning graphics, realistic character animation, thrilling combat, and advanced physics.

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed II
mac_games.description:
Assassin's Creed® II is the sequel to one of the most famous and best-selling games in the history of the gaming industry. The long-awaited sequel has a new hero - a young Italian nobleman Ezio Auditore da Firenze, as well as a new era - the Renaissance.  

  Assassin's Creed II not only retains the core gameplay that made the first installment a huge success, but also adds some new aspects to the game that will surprise and delight any player.
 Assassin's Creed II is a story of family, conspiracy, and revenge in the ancient, brutal Italy of the Renaissance. Ezio, a member of one of Florence's most influential families and friends with Leonardo da Vinci, travels to Venice to become a Master Assassin. 

   - Ezio, a new assassin for a new era, Ezio Auditore da Firenze is a young Italian nobleman who will study the art of the assassins to take revenge on the conspirators against his family. He is a ladies' man with a free soul and a human personality. You will have to make him a ruthless master assassin. 

   - Renaissance Italy, Italy in the 15th century was much smaller, with many independent city-states, such as Florence and Venice, where families with political and economic influence held positions of power. The protagonist's journey takes place during a period in history when culture and art were born, along with corruption, greed and murder.  

  - Newfound freedom, you can complete tasks whenever and however you want in a world that retains free movement and adds elements such as swimming and even flight. Gameplay innovations allow you to play exactly the way you want.  

  - Dynamic Crowd - A new living, breathing world where every character can interact with the player. It is now easier to blend into the crowd, and interactions with other game characters not only provide a wide range of options for action, but can also lead to unexpected consequences.  

  - Become a skilled killer, improve your skills to become a master assassin. Now you have learned how to use new weapons, you can disarm opponents and use their weapons against them and use several blades at once to kill enemies.

mac_games.title: Sonic Dream Team
mac_games.description:
Sonic the Hedgehog returns in a dynamic and exciting game from Sonic Dream Team! 

  Join Sonic and his friends on a journey through a bizarre dream world! Experience an original and intriguing story as you play as six characters with unique abilities. Climb, fly, and run your way to victory over the evil Eggman!  

 Race through incredible dream worlds where you can run on walls, change gravity and much more! Your task: save your friends and fight Eggman for control of an ancient artifact that can make dreams come true.  

 Complete quests, fight bosses and find figurines of your favorite characters for your collection!

mac_games.title: Sneaky Sasquatch
mac_games.description:
Try yourself in the role of a yeti and do his usual things.

  - Sneak into the camp.
  - Put on human clothes.
  - Enjoy food from unguarded coolers and picnic baskets.
  - Play a quick game of golf.
  - Go fishing in the lake.
  - Don't fall into the hands of the park ranger.
  - Dig up the buried treasure.
  - Go skiing down the hill.
  - Pass the driving test and get your license.
  - Buy ​​cars, test them on the race track and much more.
  - And much more!

mac_games.title: Voxel Tycoon
mac_games.description:
Voxel Tycoon is a management simulator set in an endless voxel world. Mine resources and process them into goods in your own factories. Create supply chains and passenger routes using a huge fleet of trains, trucks and buses, and turn small towns into thriving metropolises with a booming economy!  

  Transport
  The game features over 50 vehicles representing eras from steam to electric, including locomotives, wagons, trucks (including semi-trailers!), buses, high-speed trains and much more.  

  Each vehicle has its own unique properties that must be taken into account when purchasing and building. Thanks to physical modeling, vehicles will behave differently depending on their weight, the type and amount of cargo carried, engine power and brand.   

 Flexible scheduling allows you to, for example, select the exact routes that trains should take to arrive at stations, or select which wagons should be loaded or unloaded at each specific stop. You can issue mass orders using routes, or set individual tasks for each vehicle on your list.  

  Bridges and tunnels, as well as a full signalling system (you don't want your trains crashing into each other, do you?) allow you to build and expand your network with complete freedom.   

 Factories 
 Organize the extraction of minerals using mines, and then process the raw materials using crushers, furnaces, refineries and other mechanisms.  
  Complex production chains require complex logistics! Create your own unique factories by connecting machines, buildings and storage facilities with conveyor belts.  
  Fund and support research into new technologies by unlocking new buildings, production chains and vehicles.  

  Endless world
  Explore an unlimited procedurally generated world filled with unique biomes - from deserts to arctic tundra. Discover new regions to find rare resources and new opportunities for development. The world is infinite, so you will never run out of free space.  

  For the most successful tycoons, we have included a fully functional terraforming feature in the game: transform the world into what you want, according to your ideal plan! However, keep in mind that this can cost you a pretty penny.  

  The world isn't limited to the classic top-down Tycoon view - the free camera mode lets you dive right into the action. Fly around in first person, taking in the stunning views, see production chains, and even ride trains as they do their work.  

  Economy
  Every city has its own needs that you can satisfy to trigger growth. The larger the city gets, the more customers and passengers it has, meaning more potential profit! As the city grows, not only does the amount of goods needed increase - at higher stages of development, the city will move away from basic needs, requiring more complex and expensive goods.  

  Remember that the cost of goods is not constant and largely depends on your actions as a supplier. Increased demand leads to higher prices! As a last resort, you can always help cities and businesses solve their financial problems directly by investing in their development. 

   Don't focus all your efforts on cargo transportation - people have places to go too! Manage the flow of passengers between cities and don't forget to treat them carefully - after all, different passengers are heading to different places. Modifiable from day one

mac_games.title: 东方夜雀食堂 - Touhou Mystia's Izakaya
mac_games.description:
An amazing pixel art restaurant simulator based on the Touhou project! Play as Mystia, the owner of a small izakaya.  

  Collect ingredients during the day, serve customers at night, learn recipes from familiar characters, and become the best izakaya owner in all of Gensokyo!  

  And all this to create the perfect dinner. In other words, there are no battles in this game, only your favorite customers with different demands that you need to fulfill!..   

 Today, the young youkai Mystia Lorelei, a night sparrow, still chases her dream. She dreams of becoming the most popular izakaya owner in Gensokyo. Day after day, she worked hard, making a name for herself and attracting customers from all over Gensokyo.  

  And then one fateful day, a client visited her. That day, both her dream and her future were destroyed.  

  Having lost everything, she was forced to start her life from scratch. Thus began her life in debt to the tyrannical Yakumo family...   

 "Don't underestimate the determination and determination of the lower-level youkai! I will protect those well-fed and contented smiles of the people of Gensokyo!"  

  The young night sparrow will never give up. Besides, having received help from Mystia, the powerful people of Gensokyo will definitely repay her in kind!

mac_games.title: Little Nightmares
mac_games.description:
The Little Nightmares series has captivated millions of players around the world since 2017. Now it's your turn to experience the first game in the most charming horror series in history.  

  Take on the role of Six, a lonely girl lost in the depths of a massive ship called the Womb and surrounded by dangerous, twisted versions of adults. Do whatever it takes to escape, or face a monstrous fate. 

   Look around!
 You wake up in a damp, dark cabin with only a brass lighter. You don't remember how you got here, but you know you're in danger. You'll have to arm yourself with attentiveness and resourcefulness to get out.   

 Find an escape route!
 This world is not meant for children, but your small stature can be an advantage if you use your wits. Climb over boxes and shelves to find passages through the Maw that are too small for adults, and you may be able to escape danger... at least for a while.  

  Hide from the villagers!
 The inhabitants of the "Womb" need children for only one purpose. If you do not want this fate to befall you, be prepared to hide and sneak. Sometimes the villagers can be distracted and run away. If you make noise and attract their attention, they will not be stopped.  

  Run!
 Sometimes the only choice is to run. If you can stay alive and get to safety, you are lucky.  

  Can you make it out of the Womb and into freedom? Six is ​​counting on you. Good luck, little one. 

 Apple Silicon (ARM)
  - macOS Sonoma and later. 
  - Apple Silicon (M1-M4, M Pro, Max, Ultra).
  - 8 GB of RAM.

    - There is Dualsence support.

  - Mokujin mask.
  - Nome's Attic.
  - Digital Deluxe bundle:

mac_games.title: Exovoid Carnage
mac_games.description: A fast-paced game set on the alien-infested Leviathan space station. The protagonist fights waves of enemies using a variety of weapons. There are various bonuses that persist after death, but you'll have to start over.

mac_games.title: DREDGE
mac_games.description:
Take the helm of a fishing trawler and sail to remote islands and discover what lies beneath the waters around them. Sell your catch to the locals and complete quests to learn about the difficult past of these places. Equip your vessel with advanced equipment to fish from the deepest depths and sail to distant lands. But watch the time: you will not be pleased with uninvited guests who may come aboard under the cover of night... 

  Explore the islands and uncover their secrets
 Start a new life in the Big and Little Sol archipelago. From there, you'll set out to sea, scour shipwrecks for valuables, and catch fish and more than 125 other sea creatures in the depths. Explore each area, complete quests, and set sail to neighboring island regions, each with its own unique features, inhabitants, and secrets.

   Raise from the depths
 Someone really wants you to dig into the past, but can you trust them? And will they find what they are really looking for?

   Be careful in the fog
 Dangers are everywhere: beware of treacherous rocks and sharp reefs. But the worst awaits in the fog that covers the waters like a blanket as soon as the sun sets... 

  Game Features:
 Uncover the main secret: at the helm of a fishing trawler, you will be able to sail to islands lost in the wilderness, each of which has its own inhabitants, its own inhabitants of the sea depths and its own secrets.

    Raise from the depths: treasures await in the depths and debris, and completed assignments from the locals can grant you inexplicable abilities.  
  Hone your craft: research new equipment and upgrade your ship to catch rare fish and raise buried treasures.  

  Make a living by fishing: by selling your catch to the locals, you can learn about what's going on on the islands, upgrade your ship, and travel to even more remote places. 
   Fight back against the abyss: Strengthen your mind and use what you've learned to survive on the high seas after dark.

mac_games.title: Ocean Keeper: Dome Survival
mac_games.description:
In this game:
  ◆ Explore the ocean floor and the remains of civilization on a huge spider robot.
 ◆ Find deep caves and drill tunnels in search of valuable resources and artifacts.
 ◆ Improve mechanisms to survive as long as possible in this hostile environment.
 ◆ Fight hordes of sea monsters under an energy dome, using an extensive arsenal of weapons.
 ◆ Earn meta-currency to fully customize your spider robot.

    Dive into a world where the depths of the ocean hide unknown wonders and dangers. Unique adventures in underwater exploration await you. 

  Travel on the map
 Experience a unique adventure in an underwater isometric world where hidden wonders and dangers await you. You will travel across the vast expanses of the ocean and discover the lost remains of civilizations.

   Resource Scavenging
 Venture into forgotten caves and mine rare resources hidden in the darkest corners of the seabed. As you collect treasures, you'll upgrade your equipment and weapons to face the threats lurking among the coral reefs and ominous undercurrents. 

  Replayability
 Each new dive will reveal more secrets of the mysterious underwater kingdom, and encounters with sea monsters will test your courage and survival skills.  

  The adventure game Ocean Keeper is inspired by popular roguelike games known for their unpredictability and difficulty. 
   Each time you explore the underwater worlds, the layout changes, making each journey unique.   
 This means you'll have to improvise and come up with new strategies for each dive, just like in classic games of the genre.  

  You will never play the same scenario twice.

mac_games.title: Shapez 2
mac_games.description:
Shapez 2 is a top-down game where you mine and process geometric shapes. Each shape is made up of individual blocks that can be taken apart, assembled, painted, and put back together in a variety of ways. Build and automate factories to create unique shapes and solve manufacturing problems.  

   Automate the processing of abstract geometric shapes and transform them into more complex objects by cutting, rotating, painting, and more. Create specific shapes to unlock new technologies and expand the capabilities of your factory. Learn and improve or rebuild your facility to solve logistical problems and create the most efficient shape production facility.   

   Place objects on interconnected layers and optimize your workflow. Improve your production lines to get the most out of each space platform and multiply the efficiency of your factories.   

   Shapez 2 is a factory simulator without unnecessary elements. All buildings are free, resources never run out, and there are no enemies or time limits. Nothing will stop you: easily delete and rebuild objects at your own pace and without any penalties.   

   In Shapez 2, you'll always have the tools to upgrade those tangled assembly lines you built 4 hours ago or to destroy entire factories.   

   At first, you will have access to only one asteroid. Build new platforms to gradually expand your enterprise. Unlock new layouts and turn a single assembly line into a large-scale network of stations connected by space trains. Design modular platform plans and place hundreds of objects with just one click. 

     We care about the performance of Shapez 2: the game has been completely redesigned on a new engine, and we are doing everything possible to make your huge factories run smoothly... even with the new 3D graphics!   

   Peculiarities:
  ◆ Multi-level 3D factories: plan and optimize production in three dimensions 
 ◆ Trains: Connect remote stations with a network of space trains 
 ◆ New research tree: unlock buildings, mechanics and improvements 
 ◆ New mechanics of figures: new types of figures with unique properties and logic await you 
 ◆ Blueprint Library: Save, load, export and share factory layouts 
 ◆ Updated graphics: build factories and stations in the middle of fascinating space expanses 
 ◆ Liquids: Use different types of liquids to process figures or speed up production 
 ◆ Animated open buildings: see what exactly is happening inside your factory buildings 
 ◆ Undo/Redo: More than 50 undo/redo operations

mac_games.title: Japanese Rural Life Adventure
mac_games.description:
A quiet life in the Japanese outback.




Start an exciting life on the outskirts of a Japanese village. Fix up an old wooden house, create a garden, grow a crop to provide yourself with everything you need. When spring comes, enjoy the lush cherry blossoms. In the summer, have fun at a traditional festival and make refreshing sweet ice. In the fall, bake potatoes over a fire, and visit the graves of your ancestors on the equinox. In the winter, perform end-of-year rituals: visit a Shinto shrine and ring a bell. Immerse yourself in the measured life of the Japanese outback.





Peculiarities:


◆ Dig a pond in the yard and stock it with carp.


◆ Go fishing, catch insects and photograph wild animals.


◆ Celebrate traditional holidays, take part in events.


◆ Complete the village chief's tasks to restore the village and attract tourists.


◆ Buy a mountain and explore it.

mac_games.title: Creaks
mac_games.description:
Meet your new neighbors. The ground shakes, light bulbs burst, and you realize that something very unusual is happening outside the walls of your room. Armed with a sharp mind and courage, you plunge into a world inhabited by winged people and deadly furniture monsters. 

  From the creators of classic indie games Machinarium and Samorost comes Creaks, a new puzzle adventure featuring hand-drawn graphics, polished animation, quirky sound effects, and an eclectic soundtrack by Hidden Orchestra. Play at your own pace, solve dozens of carefully crafted riddles, explore the mansion in search of hidden paintings, and uncover the great secret.  

  The best way to play Creaks is with a controller and headphones.

mac_games.title: Hades
mac_games.description:
Hades is a dungeon crawler meets roguelike, sharing the best features of Supergiant's critically acclaimed games: the fast-paced gameplay of Bastion, the rich atmosphere and depth of Transistor, and the character-driven storytelling of Pyre.

\n\n

FIGHT TO GET OUT OF HELL\n

Become an immortal prince of the Underworld, wielding mythical weapons and the powers of Olympus to escape the realm of the god of the dead himself. After each unique escape attempt, you will become stronger and watch the story unfold.

\n\n

UNLEASH THE FURY OF OLYMPUS
\n
The Olympians have your back! Meet Zeus, Athena, Poseidon and many other gods: they will offer you dozens of powerful gifts that will improve your abilities. As you play, you will find that there are thousands of effective builds to complete
\n\n


MAKE FRIENDS WITH GODS, GHOSTS AND MONSTERS\n

You will find interesting and colorful characters, each of whom is fully voiced! Become friends with them and witness many unique events to find out what is really going on in this large and not very friendly family.
\n\n


REPLAYABILITY
\n
The bosses guarding the ever-changing Underworld will remember you, and each escape attempt will bring new surprises. Use the powerful Mirror of Night to continually enhance your stats, making your next escape attempts easier.
\n\n


NOTHING IS IMPOSSIBLE
\n
Constant progression will allow you to engage in exciting battles and get acquainted with a gripping storyline, even if you yourself are not one of the host of divine beings. And if you really consider yourself a god, accept the challenge and prepare for intense trials that will fully test your honed skills.

\n\n

SUPERGIANT CORPORATE STYLE\n

The game features deep, atmospheric imagery and the unique blend of gameplay and storytelling that Supergiant focuses on in all of its games. The game's stunning hand-drawn locations and outstanding original soundtrack help players immerse themselves in the Underworld.

mac_games.title: The Universim
mac_games.description:
Take direct control of your own planets; guide a civilization through the ages. Create an unshakable empire in The Universim, a new class of God Simulator game. 

   Your time has come. Guide a young civilization through life's endless trials. Create a modest settlement and watch your people grow and improve under your watchful eye! Influence decisions and punish the ungrateful with a wide range of divine abilities! Interact with objects, cause terrible disasters, and send your bewildered charges flying into orbit. This is your world, and nothing will stop you from having endless fun.  

  Our goal is to bring back all the features that made you love the classic God Simulator games and spice them up with fresh ideas, a modern physics engine and a visual, graphical style developed by just a few people on our team.  

  Meet the Nuggets, a fragile and somewhat eccentric people who rely on your guidance and mentorship to help them build and grow. Help them, and they will soon write their own story. Each Nugget is a unique individual with a special set of traits and characteristics. Like all living creatures, Nuggets will need basic natural resources to survive. Water to drink, food to eat, and recreational activities to increase their happiness and quality of life. Recreational activities may include some very explosive ideas! You have been warned.  

  Over time, you will notice that your Nuggets behave like real, living people. Each of them has their own thoughts and needs - they are even capable of making important decisions from time to time. We would like you to understand: you are interacting with living beings, and not trying to manage the chaotic movement of your ant farm.  

  Planets in Universim are not just made up of a bunch of beautifully arranged objects; all objects are connected to each other and play an important role in the ecosystem of each planet. Every tree that is cut down, every resource that is mined, and every animal that is hunted affects the world the Nuggets live in. Insufficient animal numbers and massive pollution will gradually lead to a global increase in temperature, while constant hunting and fishing will lead to the extinction of various species. Your mission is to manage the Nuggets and how they collect and use resources. What mark will you leave on the ecosystem that existed for a million years before your arrival? Will you quickly use up all available resources to the detriment of the planet, or will you approach the development of your civilization strategically?  

  In The Universim, nature is as beautiful and unpredictable as ever. Each planet holds a few surprises that are sure to challenge your civilization. From tornadoes that devour everything in their path to thunderous earthquakes that threaten to split your civilization in two. If you treat nature poorly, it may show you how cruel and unforgiving it can be. Each planet you encounter will have a unique side. Some planets are calm and full of resources, while others are barren and dangerous. Be careful!   

 The day/night cycle can play an important role in the development of your civilization. Not only should you be wary of attacks from wild animals that come out to hunt at night, but also of a sharp drop in air temperature. Daytime is only slightly safer in this cruel world. Coupled with the change of seasons, the planet's biomes can change beyond recognition, which is why Nuggets will have to learn to survive the harsh winter, even if they do not have time to prepare.

mac_games.title: Braid, Anniversary Edition
mac_games.description:
Manipulate time and solve puzzles in the updated version of the classic indie game Braid with updated graphics and detailed author's commentary. Say goodbye to the walls of your home and go in search of the princess in worlds where time has no clear boundaries. You will have to immerse yourself in memories and come face to face with regrets about the past. The anniversary edition of the cult platformer has completely redesigned graphics in high resolution, new sound effects and detailed audio commentary.  

  Control Time
 Rewind, pause, and use the strange properties of time in each colorful world. Avoid dangers, open doors, and assemble puzzle pieces. And if you get stuck on a puzzle, just leave it and come back later. 

   Fresh Coat of Paint
 This is the game that captured our hearts, with the same vibrant gameplay but repainted pixel by pixel to bring each carefully rendered world to life in high definition. New visual details, animated brush stroke effects and updated sounds will immerse you even more in the atmosphere.

    Look Behind the Curtain
 Check out commentary from the developers who have ever worked on the game. Over 12 hours of commentary from developer Jonathan Blow, artist David Hellman, and other members of the Braid team. Dive into a whole new universe of gameplay with new quests and redesigned classic puzzles. - From Thekla, Inc

mac_games.title: Alto's Adventure
mac_games.description:
A sleepy mountain village lies in the tranquil white snow, promising amazing adventures.  

  Join the slick youngster Alto and his friends on their never-ending snowboarding adventure. Travel through beautiful alpine hills, ancient forests and abandoned ruins.   

 Along the way, you'll escaped llamas, dash across rooftops, leap terrifying chasms, and outwit mountain elders - all rescue while navigating the ever-changing mountain landscape and the passage of time. 

   Peculiarities:  
  • Smooth, sleek, physics-based, addictive gameplay.
  • Procedurally generated terrain based on real snowboarding trails.
  • Fully dynamic lighting and weather effects including storms, blizzards, fog, rainbows, shooting stars and more. 
 • Easy to learn, but difficult to master one-tap trick system. 
 • Combo combination for maximum points and speed. 
 • Test your skills against 180 handcrafted targets. 
 • Six unique snowboarders with individual attributes and skills. 
 • Ability to challenge friends in Game Center. Compete for the best rating, the longest distance and the best trick combo! 
 • Ability to obtain a Wingsuit from Izel's Workshop for a completely new gameplay dynamic. 
 • Beautiful minimalist and memorable design. 
 • Original music and carefully selected sound for complete immersion (headphones recommended!).

mac_games.title: Bloons TD 6
mac_games.description:
Create the perfect defense with a combination of monkeys, upgrades, heroes, and abilities, and then blast away all the incoming balls! 

   Millions of players are already enjoying the massive and ever-growing strategy game that provides endless hours of exciting play.  

  HUGE UPDATES
  - 4-player co-op: Each map and mode can be played with 1-3 more players in both public and private play. 
 - Boss battles! The largest balls, bosses, will test even the most reliable defense. 
 - Odysseys! Complete 3-5 maps with the same design, rules, and rewards. 
 - Trophy Shop! Earn trophies and get a lot of cosmetics that allow you to change the appearance of monkeys and balls, animation, music and more. 
 - Content Browser! Create your own challenges and odysseys, share them with other players, and play the best creations of the community. 

   MIGHTY MONKEYS AND HEROES 
 - 22 powerful monkeys, each with 3 upgrade paths and unique abilities. 
 - Paragons! Look how powerful the new Paragon upgrades are, especially against the Boss Balls! 
 - 13 heroes with 20 upgrades and 2 abilities, as well as skins and voices that can be gradually unlocked. 

   ENDLESS FUN 
 - Play anywhere: single player game works even without Internet! 
 - 56 hand-crafted maps make every game a new tactical challenge. 
 - Monkey Knowledge! Over 100 meta-improvements add power where it's needed and help you get through tough maps and free play rounds. 
 - Abilities and Instant Monkeys! Earned in-game, at events, and for achievements, they help you pop balls when you need it most!

mac_games.title: Barotrauma
mac_games.description:
Barotrauma is a 2D submarine simulator in the survival horror genre. Its creation was influenced by such games as FTL: Faster Than Light, RimWorld, Dwarf Fortress and Space Station 13. This sci-fi game is a combination of ragdoll physics, underwater alien monsters, teamwork and all-consuming fear.  

  LOOK INTO THE ABYSS
 In the not-too-distant future, humans have traveled to Jupiter's moon. Its radioactive surface is covered in ice, so life exists only in the ocean. Travel through the harsh underwater world, befriend or foe four local factions. Find out what lies in the depths of Europa. 
 
  HELP YOUR COMRADES SURVIVE OR MAKE SURE THAT NO ONE SURVIVES
 There are many ways to have fun in Barotrauma, but there are just as many ways to die. Work together with your crew to achieve objectives, or prepare to betray if there is a traitor on board. Play with friends, strangers, or your worst enemies.  
 
 EXPLORE, CONTROL, COMMUNICATE
 Travel underwater, complete missions for the last representatives of humanity, explore the ruins of an alien civilization, fight monsters or run from them. Manage complex onboard systems such as sonar, nuclear reactor, weapons, engines and pumps. Communication is of the utmost importance! 
 
  EXPERIMENT, MANUFACTURING, CREATING
 Set up complex onboard wiring, a complex manufacturing system, and a medical bay. Use built-in editors to create your own submarines and monsters that can compete with conventional ones. You can even get into our program code and change everything.

mac_games.title: ISLANDERS
mac_games.description:
A game in which your strategic capabilities will help you to arrange your own city and achieve its prosperity. It will not be so easy to cope with the task, that is, it is necessary to put in a lot of effort and time.   

  The game world includes several colorful islands, each of which is available for your actions. You must explore the territory and get as many useful materials and valuable resources as possible. Each island has its own characteristics that you must take into account when building.  

  Many of these functions will be useful to you, while others will create additional problems. There are more than enough difficulties in the game, but it is strategic planning of your actions that will lead you to a positive result. The lands around you have the property of constant modification, so you should always be on the alert. Try to properly arrange your possessions, and also do everything possible for the comfortable life of citizens.  

  You can build both simple villages and even huge megalopolises. It is worth remembering: the larger the cities you create, the more difficult it will be to manage them. The graphics in the game are simple, but very tempting, and you will also like the presence of many functions for better use of your skills.

mac_games.title: Night in the Woods: Weird Autumn Edition
mac_games.description:
Night in the Woods is an adventure game that focuses on story and exploration. The main character will meet different characters and many events will take place. The game successfully completed the Kickstarter campaign and is being developed by Infinite Fall, a studio consisting of Alec Golowka (Aquaria), Scott Benson (Late Night Work Club) and Bethany Hockenberry.  

  College dropout Mae Borowski returns home to the mining town of Possum Springs to reconnect with her aimless life and the people she left behind. But little is the same. The house feels strange, her friends have grown and changed. The leaves are falling, and the wind is growing colder. Strange things happen in the twilight.  

  And something lurks in the woods.

mac_games.title: Night Stones
mac_games.description:
Night Stones is an open world adventure game rich in quests, exploration and story.  

  After dreaming of a world where you can fly and change day to night in an instant, you wake up to find yourself still there. Now it's your job to uncover the secrets of this world and find your way home. Follow the trails or explore the wilds, meeting new characters, discovering treasures, and unlocking new abilities. This world is full of beauty, but also danger, so explore at your own risk! 

 Apple processor required
 OS: macOS 12 (Monterey)
 Processor: Apple Silicon (M1, M2, etc)
 RAM: 8 GB RAM

mac_games.title: Lust Theory Season 3
mac_games.description:
And the mystery is finally revealed! After being stuck in a time loop for two days straight and being told it was all part of a simulation, you find out it was all... a lie? 

   Who is behind all this? Why were you the "chosen one"? And the most important question: why are you stuck in a time loop again?  

  Find out while still living in a house with three beautiful women and find a way to get your quiet life back. Or not?  

 Develop further relationships while healing those you hurt in the process. 
   That's right, your favorite heroes are back and the sexual tension is higher than ever!  
 Your favorite characters are back! And if that doesn't make you smile, well... NEW CHARACTERS! So get ready for new faces and new challenges!   

 Can you collect them all? 

  Want to see your favorite characters in a new ambient? Don't! We've not only updated the existing locations, but also added several new ones. 

   Do you know what the new locations mean... New hidden events!  
 We mentioned that in season 2 you'll finally find out why the day keeps repeating itself...  

  In season 3 you will find out the TRUTH.  
  And the truth is, if I may say so, it looks very beautiful.

mac_games.title: Billy Saves the World
mac_games.description:
A narrative platformer that lets you choose between action and adventure.  

  After letting his girlfriend down for the last time, Billy is quickly dumped on their two-year wedding anniversary. While moping alone in the rain, a mysterious portal swallows Billy and strands him on a distant planet.  
 
 Here Billy must learn to become the reliable person he was always meant to be.  
  He will also reveal an ancient alien prophecy and save the world.   

 Billy Saves the World is a comedy sci-fi love story spanning time and space, inspired by the whims of Monkey Island and Futurama, written, directed and designed by award-winning Cooper Bibeau.  

  CHOOSE ONE OF TWO DIFFERENT GAMEPLAY STYLES: Play through all five story chapters, leaning towards an action platformer, or slow things down and use your brain, leaning towards an adventure puzzle game. Play the way you like best.  

  Every quest, every level, every moment has multiple outcomes, solutions or gameplay approaches. 

   -Run, slide, jump, launch rockets, wall jump and use Jedi-like superpowers to explore a small but dense 2D metroidvania style open world featuring 7+ diverse biomes with beautifully hand-drawn environments and animations from the best in film and TV.   
 - Solve over 25 side quests with multiple dialogue branches, decisions and outcomes depending on what you say and do.   
 - The game features 30 additional levels, each containing different routes, unique enemies, deadly traps, creative puzzles, secret items and exciting time trials. 
   -Additional upgrades including 6 Heart Pieces (each with unique benefits) and over 7 special abilities to obtain. 
   - One of the best soundtracks of the year, written by John MacMillan (Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag) and multi-platinum producer Tom Ratesik (Nicki Minaj, Lil Wayne). Voiced by Jonathan Beres (Game of Thrones).

mac_games.title: Timelie
mac_games.description:
In Timelie, a stealth puzzle game where you control time itself, every second counts. A girl and a cat who came from nowhere find themselves in an abstract and surreal world. They will have to try hard to escape from it and save themselves from the enemies pursuing them.  

  The Timeline allows players to rewind time, like a track or TV show in a player. Slide the time marker to the left to rewind time and correct the mistakes of the past. Slide the time marker to the right to look into the future and learn how to influence the past.  

  Control both the girl and the cat at the same time. Coordinate their actions so that they complement each other: do not let them be discovered, distract the enemies and find a way out of this world. Play for two characters at once. It will be unusual at first.   

 Dive into a vibrant universe full of colorful abstractions and surreal images. Explore mysterious worlds where danger lurks everywhere... but the unknown also lurks!

mac_games.title: LustyVerse: Passion on Display
mac_games.description:
Description 
 You play as a young man struggling through college. Heartbroken, you mostly avoid parties and lead a rather boring, uneventful life. One day, all that changes with the arrival of a new roommate, Samantha. You and your roommate, Haley, quickly realize that Samantha is not like the other girls. With a little help from your new friend, you crawl out of your cocoon and start living the real college life. 

   Meet Hailey, your roommate. You've known her for so long that you practically see her as one of the guys. But with your newly opened eyes, she soon begins to be more than just a friend...  

  Samantha is the hot new neighbor next door. Looks, brains, money? She has it all. But not everything is as it seems.   
 Becky... Well, let's not talk too much about her. 
 .... and a few more.   

 Game content:
 - 10,000 IMAGES
 - 300 ANIMATIONS

    Gameplay:
 - Define the relationship in the game
 - Slut angle
 - Nude mode
 - Lust time
 - Change the angle
 - Change the animation angle
 - Multiple endings

mac_games.title: Rage in Peace
mac_games.description:
Rage in Peace is a side-scrolling adventure game that tells the story of Timmy Malinu, an emotionally numb 27-year-old actuary who has only one dream that sets him apart from most people: to die in his sleep in his pajamas, in the warmth of his home, in peace and without drama. 

   Story
  One fateful day, the Grim Reaper appears with the news that Timmy will die today. With his head cut off. But the Grim Reaper does not specify when, where or what he will kill Timmy, giving him one last chance to realize his dream. 

   Gameplay
  But Timmy's dream won't be easy to achieve. To get to his home, Timmy will have to avoid all the traps and obstacles that mysteriously appear to prevent him from "cheating" death. Surprise and memorization will be the key to helping Timmy postpone his end, find peace of mind, and die the way he always wanted. 

   Functions 
 Learn from your mistakes and move forward while the universe is working against you 
 Uncover the story of life, death and acceptance 
 Explore a colorful, imaginative world and hand-drawn cartoon-style creatures that bring Timmy's adventures to life. 
 As you play, enjoy dozens of fantastic songs created in collaboration with various indie bands across a diverse list of genres.

mac_games.title: Deponia: The Complete Journey
mac_games.description:
Garbage, garbage and more garbage. Life on the small planet Deponia is not a bed of roses. It is no wonder that Rufus is fed up with this life and makes one ridiculous plan after another, hoping to escape from this gloomy place. 

   During one of his attempts to escape from Deponia, Rufus meets Goal and falls madly in love with this beautiful girl from Elysium. He accidentally throws her off the comfortable cruiser, and she ends up on a dull junkyard planet. But this accident gives birth to a new plan in his head: he needs to help Goal return to the floating city of Elysium, and to do this, he will have to play the role of her nasty fiancé Klytus, who for some unknown reason looks exactly like Rufus. Thus begins their incredible adventure...  

  The Deponia trilogy, which has already collected a rich harvest of awards and first places in various charts, the creation of the developers of such hits as Edna&Harvey: The Breakout, The Elusive World and Memoria, became a cult even before its release. Thanks to a delightful plot, cute characters, hilarious dialogues and a subtle combination of comedy and riddles, Deponia will appeal to players of all ages. Go on an exciting journey with Rufus! For the first time, the game is released in a full version with a lot of new features that will please not only old fans of adventure games, but also newcomers.

mac_games.title: Little Orpheus
mac_games.description:
The year is 1962. NASA is trying to send a man to the moon, while deep in Siberia, a Soviet cosmonaut is moving in the opposite direction. Comrade Ivan Ivanovich is lowered into the crater of an extinct volcano in a research capsule called Little Orpheus to explore the center of the Earth. Soon, contact with him is lost.  

  Three years later, he returns, claiming to have saved the world. He has also lost the atomic bomb that was powering Little Orpheus. The cosmonaut is taken to a top-secret bunker beneath the Ural Mountains, where he is interrogated by General Yurkovoy, a man so feared that Stalin himself shuns him. The general rolls up his sleeves, fixes Ivan with a steely gaze, and says, "So... where have you been, comrade? And where is my bomb?"   

 Ivan, without lowering his eyes, answers: "Well, Comrade General, you may not believe me, but I will try to explain everything. It happened like this..."   

 Together with our brave but unlucky hero, you will explore lost civilizations, travel through underwater kingdoms, prehistoric jungles and unimaginable worlds. Fight with humanoid savages-menkvas, escape from the paws and jaws of terrifying monsters, rejoice in victories in hopeless situations and bring socialism to the underground worlds!  

  Little Orpheus is a colorful side-scrolling adventure inspired by classic films like Flash Gordon, Sinbad, and The Land That Time Forgot. It's divided into eight short, easy-to-play sections, and is simple enough for casual players, yet detailed enough to keep seasoned adventure gamers interested. 

   If you're a fan of classic family blockbusters, looking for a mind-blowing story that will take you to the center of the Earth and beyond, or just looking for morally correct entertainment, join the most unusual hero on Apple Arcade on an incredible journey. Little Orpheus is a mobile game of epic proportions with stunning graphics, brilliant actors, and a world-class soundtrack. You'll remember it forever.

mac_games.title: TRYP FPV : The Drone Racer Simulator
mac_games.description:
TRYP FPV is a game changer. This FPV drone simulator was created to give the most realistic and complete FPV drone piloting experience to everyone from beginners to professionals.  

  The game includes unique features and many innovations, such as:
 - Ready-made scenarios for cinematic training, testing...
 - Ultra advanced physics that will give you a real and crazy feeling of flying.
 - Huge, detailed and beautiful maps.

    NEW AND UNIQUE FEATURE 
 We have added a new and unique feature: TRYP MODE. It will allow you to fly and practice cinematic flights with amazing and epic music!
 This mode will allow you to practice and improve your skills in various scenarios with motorcycles, racing cars, base jumpers, wing suits, etc. (and many more in the future).
 TRYP MODE also has a challenge system that allows you to practice your aiming skills in specific places.
    The maps are realistic and very large. That's why we've added a mini map so you can explore it, find your favorite spots or create your own flight lines.  

  FLIGHT EXPERIENCE
 To achieve the best flight experience, we have made high-quality graphics, realistic physics and polished sound design.
 Flight experience was our priority to give you the most amazing piloting experience in the simulator.

    EPIC RACING
 Drone FPV has its roots in racing.
 TRYP FPV offers its own vision of what drone racing can be.
 We focus the racing discipline on the sensation of speed and altitude in amazing and realistic conditions.  

 DRONE PRESETS
 We have prepared several drone presets to make it easier for you to fly with your favorite setup. Their physics have been confirmed by the developers of the original frames and rotors.
 If you want to change them, simply duplicate the preset and change parameters such as rotor KV, cells, weight, struts, etc. 

   ADVANCED PHYSICS
 The physics system includes real, complex and accurate equations for thrust, air resistance and aerodynamics.
 If you are an advanced user, you can reproduce the feeling of your own drone!  

 EASY SETUP
 We've made it easy for you to fly with any controller with our easy-to-follow guide. 
   Dear gamer, this simulator was developed by a passionate team of pilots and gamers for you.
 You will not count the hours exploring large and beautiful maps, discovering new places, racing, freestyle and completing challenges.

mac_games.title: Orphan
mac_games.description: Orphan is a 2D dark platformer with stealth elements and a side view. The main character is an orphan who survived an alien attack on Earth. You have to solve puzzles, as well as hide and fight aliens.  \n\n  You will make your way across the countryside, through open fields and dense forests, over dangerous mountains and through lush valleys, hiding behind rocks and trees, while being hunted by enemies bent on destroying all life on Earth.

mac_games.title: Unbound: Worlds Apart
mac_games.description:
Unbound: Worlds Apart is a gripping, atmospheric, hand-drawn puzzle platformer set in a universe where all worlds are connected by portals. You control Soli, a gifted child with a magical gift that can open portals and control each world's unique properties, such as reverse gravity, time manipulation, super strength, and more.   

 Using his new skills, Soli sets out on a journey through dangerous and mysterious worlds, each filled with secrets and obstacles. You must use all of Soli's abilities to defeat the ruthless evil that is tearing apart reality, while also learning the shocking truth about the collapse of your world.  

  Gameplay
  In Unbound: Worlds Apart, your reflexes, reactions, and platforming skills will be put to the ultimate test. As Sol, you'll explore vast worlds filled with secrets, mysteries, and unlockable skills that will help you uncover the map as you progress.   

 Along the way, you'll meet a host of weird, wonderful, and devious characters, each with their own rich backstory and with whom you can engage in dialogue. As you complete their quests or listen to their tales of hope and sorrow, you'll learn more about the grand universe of Unbound worlds and the portals that connect them.

mac_games.title: Unheard
mac_games.description:
Unheard is a well-developed detective simulator with many implemented mechanics aimed at allowing the player to understand the crimes committed in various ways. A team of indie developers worked on the project, with a rather unusual idea and implementation, who decided to use the setting of detective fiction, because the protagonist uses devices that are not available in the real world. The devices allow you to establish some kind of invisible connection between criminals and lawmen.  

  The main character is an experienced detective who has solved hundreds of cases, uses special headphones to listen to everything that happened at the time of the murder, theft, damage to property and other crimes. The plot component is the most developed and detailed in this project. The gamer will get to know a whole group of personalities, whose stories will intertwine with each other, creating a tangled ball. It is necessary to understand it as quickly as possible in order to get to the truth.  

  The protagonist will often wonder where these headphones get all the necessary information from, and whether it is possible to trust what the clear and confident voice coming from the speakers directly into the ear says. Also, the gameplay requires the player to carefully search for evidence at the scene of the crime in order to find a clue for further action.

mac_games.title: Feist
mac_games.description: Feist is an atmospheric platformer about a small creature that finds itself in a mysterious, dangerous world. Your guides are strange animals, and the path lies through uninhabited forests, steep mountains, dark caves and glowing swamps. Be careful! Enemies are not asleep. Stay away from unfriendly creatures that react to your every step thanks to dynamic artificial intelligence, and try not to fall into masterfully disguised traps.  \n\n Feist is a great DIY adventure, truly unique. The game is somewhat reminiscent of the fantasy film "The Dark Crystal" or the cartoon "Hedgehog in the Fog". We hope you will also appreciate the unusual "ghostly" soundtrack by Tomek Kolczynski. Six years of work are worth it.

mac_games.title: YURi
mac_games.description:
Yuri is a platform game with a unique atmosphere. You will need all your dexterity, curiosity and readiness to go to the end to help Yuri overcome all obstacles and reach the goal of his mysterious journey. Explore an amazing organic universe filled with secret passages and memories hidden in the depths of memory. 

   Indeed, Yuri is a wonderful indie game that brothers Ange and Aurélien Potier lovingly developed over six long years. With gorgeous graphics and a wonderful soundtrack, Yuri lets you immerse yourself in its poetic and whimsical world. 

   Embark on an incredible journey and get ready to explore a mysterious forest where no man has ever set foot, the depths of the earth, an old family mansion, Yuri's deepest dreams and endless space...  

  Are you ready?

mac_games.title: Planet Nomads
mac_games.description:
Planet Nomads is an open-world sci-fi game where you have to inhabit new planets using block building. So, you are a lonely astronaut-scientist. After a ship crash, you find yourself on an amazing unfamiliar planet. Your task is not to get confused, provide yourself with food, water and building materials, and then find a way out of this difficult situation.   

 A sandbox game that is currently under development and has a car editor available. You will become a real explorer of the planet, which will have quite impressive dimensions. You will have to go to explore every corner of the planet, where you will find various useful items and build various machines that will help you in this difficult task. You can build both small cars and huge bulldozers. Each mechanical part should not be left without attention, because the further functionality of your creations depends on it. Also, you will have the opportunity to build giant space stations that will be designed for galactic travel. Go on an unforgettable adventure, with a lot of opportunities and interesting missions. Conquer a huge planet and create your own civilization on it.  

  The story is simple and standard - the hero wandered around space for some time, and suddenly there was an accident, after which he was forced to fit into a rescue capsule and land on the first planet he came across. What is most interesting is that the planet will be different each time. The player is offered to automatically generate the next planet on which he will survive, and this adds zest and unpredictability.  

  Survival itself is based on standard aspects. Hunger, cold, fatigue, illness, etc. In addition, you will have to not just survive, but try to settle on a new planet to the fullest extent. That is, you will have to build a base, settle in with technology, and perhaps even build a cool futuristic car. There are many possibilities, by the way, all that remains is to use your imagination.  

  The game is offered in two different modes. The first mode is "sterile" - the world is calm and friendly, there are no predators or enemies, and the player only has to settle down, get resources and live his life. But the second mode is much more interesting (hostile) - here you will have to fight, hunt, and even set up barricades to defend against the local inhabitants.  

  As for the graphic design, the game is absolutely top-notch. Excellent graphics, a sea of ​​all sorts of landscape highlights, spacious locations and an open world will not let you get bored and will make you fully immerse yourself in this world.

mac_games.title: Ghost on the Shore
mac_games.description:
