Ghost on the Shore is a narrative adventure where we go to explore a mysterious island and try to complete a number of important tasks.    

 Take on the role of the main character – the role of a young and brave girl named Riley, who went on a journey but got into trouble during a storm. In some completely unknown way, she found herself on the shore of an island and realized that she was hearing a strange voice in her mind. It turned out that this voice belonged to a guy who had already died, who was asking for help and wanted to understand the reasons for his death. From this moment on, an exciting, but at the same time quite dangerous adventure begins.    

 Go exploring the environment, get valuable resources and find clues to be able to collect as much useful information as possible. Complete the tests and try not to get trapped, because the island is unpredictable and can involve you in a dangerous situation at any moment. The graphic design of the game is well thought out and will allow everyone to plunge into the adventure atmosphere.

mac_games.title: Tangle Tower
mac_games.description:
Uncover a gripping mystery as you explore a strange and mysterious mansion, discovering intriguing clues, interrogating eccentric suspects, and solving unique puzzles.  

  Freya Fellow has been murdered. Who is the prime suspect? A shadowy figure looms over her body, holding a knife. The problem? The figure is... just a painting.  

  Explore every nook and cranny of the Tangled Tower, from its ornate and eerie gardens to the sinister crime scene at the very top of the tower.  

  Will you be able to uncover all the secrets of the Tangled Tower?

mac_games.title: FANTASIAN
mac_games.description:
Fantasian by Mistwalker Corp. - From the creator of Final Fantasy comes the next thrilling adventure from industry legend Hironobu Sakaguchi. Fantasian is a new immersive RPG set against the impressive backdrop of nearly 160 hand-painted dioramas, combining physical environments with 3D characters.  

  Immerse yourself in dioramas
  Explore nearly 160 different handcrafted dioramas in Fantasian, paying close attention to detail. The adventure lasts between 60 and 90 hours, with the first part focusing more on the story and the second on quests, giving players the freedom to explore the world.   

 New combat mechanics
  Drawing on his experience in the Final Fantasy franchise, Sakaguchi brought several quality-of-life improvements to classic JRPGs to Fantasian, such as the "Dimengeon Battle" mechanic, which allows players to send previously encountered enemies to a separate spatial dungeon to streamline combat and maximize continuity in exploring the beautiful locations.  

  Dimengeon Battles introduces various "Gimmicks" or power-ups that can turn the tide of battle and provide satisfaction.
  Additionally, the growth map provides players with a variety of customization options, and party members can be swapped out for even more strategic variety.   

 Legendary soundtrack 
 Renowned composer Nobuo Uematsu, known for his work on the Final Fantasy series, composed all 60 tracks. The multi-layered sound of a full orchestra and a variety of synthesizer melodies to complement the unforgettable and magical world of Fantasian.

mac_games.title: Arrog
mac_games.description:
Introduction:
  The independent video game Arrog breaks the mold of typical video games. This interactive artwork by LEAP Game Studios and Nakana.io will take players on a dreamlike and contemplative trip into the mysterious realm of abstract narrative when it is launched in 2020. By pushing the limits of interactive art, "Arrog" provides a one-of-a-kind and engrossing experience with its stunning graphics, simple gameplay, and thought-provoking story. 

 Mastery of Aesthetics:
 Arrog is renowned for its striking hand-drawn black-and-white animations, which inspire a feeling of stark beauty and mystery. The game's monochrome color scheme and attention to detail provide an eerie and hypnotic dreamscape. 

 Poetic Storytelling:
  Players assume the role of a nameless protagonist on a journey of self-discovery as the game's strange vignettes unfold. The narrative is told entirely without words, focusing instead on imagery, metaphor, and symbolism to communicate its meaning. 

 Extremely Simple Gameplay:
  The gaming mechanisms of Arrog are very stripped down, relying just on tap-and-drag controls. Players may take part in the plot as it unfolds thanks to these interactions, which are interwoven naturally into the narrative. The simple design highlights the creative and emotional aspects of the game. 

 The Meaning of Its Symbols: 
 The game's abstract style encourages thought and discussion. Players are encouraged to contemplate the significance of the game's strange aesthetics and enigmatic happenings through the abundance of symbolism present in every scene and interaction. The storyline of "Arrog" encourages players to reflect on their own experiences. 

 Ambient Noise and Scenery:
  The stunning, haunting music and ambient sound design of the game work together to heighten the dramatic effect of each scenario. The music and soundscapes play a crucial role in creating an immersive and unsettling atmosphere. 

 Concise and powerful:
  Playing duration for Arrog averages approximately 30 minutes, making it a short yet meaningful experience. It's meant to be a short, powerful experience that stays with you long after the credits roll.

  Depth of Feeling and Understanding:
  Life, mortality, self-discovery, and the human condition are just some of the bizarre topics that "Arrog" delves into. It forces them to ponder the meaning of life and the wonders of the universe.

  Conclusion:
  Arrog exemplifies the medium's potential for creative expression. It breaks the mold of typical video games by taking the player on a symbolic and dreamlike trip. It is a one-of-a-kind and stimulating piece of interactive art because of its outstanding aesthetics, lyrical story, and minimalist gameplay. An important addition to the avant-garde gaming and interactive storytelling genres, Arrog challenges players to delve into the depths of their own minds.

mac_games.title: MotorCubs RC
mac_games.description: MotorCubs RC is a very cool racing game that goes beyond standard cars and offers to control their radio-controlled versions. Users will have to become the winner of Monument Valley and show their capabilities to opponents. Be agile and cope with obstacles, overtake rivals and enjoy the magnificent landscapes of the reserve. Be careful not to fly off the track or miss the turn.

mac_games.title: Beastieball
mac_games.description:
Train the Beasties sports team in this turn-based volleyball RPG!  

  The Beasties' teamwork depends on the relationships they form with each other. Whether they become BESTIES, PARTNERS, RIVALS, or SWEETHEARTS, they will have a powerful combo move that is unique to each pair and can turn the tide of a tough match!  

  Explore an open world and meet a variety of trainers, each with their own story. You must defeat them and increase your ranking if you want to take part in the CROWN SERIES.  

  Bosses appear on the map from the very beginning of the game, and they can be defeated in any order. With each boss defeated, the others become stronger, so no matter which path you choose, you will have a difficult and exciting climb to the top. 

   Play sports games in strategic turn-based clashes on a tiny tactical grid. When you have the ball, you have a few moves to pass and launch a devastating attack. When the other team has the ball, you have to anticipate their attack and make a defensive move.  

  Each beast has unique traits, strengths and weaknesses, and they have a variety of ways to work together, giving each match a lot of depth and strategy.   

 There's more to Beastieball League than just sports! Coaches you defeat become available to chat with, allowing you to build friendships and see additional story.   

 As the story unfolds, you'll meet friends, rivals, corporate sponsors, and even a mysterious sports king with grand ambitions...

mac_games.title: The Witness
mac_games.description:
You wake up all alone on an island full of mysteries that will surprise you and challenge your wits and imagination.  

  You don't remember your name or how you ended up here. There's only one thing left to do: explore the surrounding area thoroughly in search of clues and hints that will help you remember the past and return home.  

  The Witness is a single-player open-world game with dozens of locations and more than five hundred puzzles. It respects your intelligence and values ​​your time: there is nothing superfluous here, each solved puzzle brings new ideas. The Witness is a game full of ideas.

mac_games.title: Spiritfarer
mac_games.description:
Spiritfarer is a cozy game about death. You play as Stella, a ferryman for the souls of the dead. Build a boat to explore the world, befriend souls, and care for them until they find peace in the afterlife. Farm, mine, fish, harvest, cook, and craft to help you cross mysterious waters. 
   See the world through the eyes of Narcissus the cat in a cooperative game for two players. In this adventure, you and the souls of the dead will find peace, and also remember many bright moments, but most importantly - learn how to say goodbye to close friends.  

  Peculiarities:
  Beautiful hand drawn illustrations and animations.
  Build and upgrade your boat.
  Farming, mining, fishing, harvesting, cooking, weaving and crafting - the variety of activities is endless!
  You will meet unforgettable characters: invite them into your boat, take care of them and get to know them better.
  Run, jump and slide through elegant levels designed in the best platformer traditions. 
 Explore a magical world that amazes the imagination. Find and collect resources to upgrade your boat and craft gifts for passengers. 
 Discover all the facets of touching stories that will remain in your memory for a long time. 
 Hours of cozy and relaxing gameplay await you: 30 hours to complete the game and another 50+ to discover all the features and secrets of Spiritfarer. 
 You have a wide range of tools at your disposal to change the appearance of your boat, character, and even your cat - create an adventure to suit your taste! 
 In local co-op, you can play as Narcissus the cat.

mac_games.title: Black Book
mac_games.description: Welcome to the dark world of northern mythology, created by domestic developers from Perm!  \n\n  The young peasant girl Vasilisa is destined to become a witch. Despite her fate, she decides to give up witchcraft and marry her beloved. But her dreams are not destined to come true - as Vasilisa finds out when her betrothed tragically dies under unknown circumstances.

mac_games.title: Saint Kotar
mac_games.description:
Saint Kotar is a psychological horror quest in a picturesque and gloomy world. Immerse yourself in the exciting atmosphere of an ancient and perilous place where occult witchcraft reigns, every corner is hand-drawn, and until the very end you are accompanied by a creepy original soundtrack. 

   Every action you take will affect the course of the game: from the actions of other characters to the choice of one of the many endings. Ahead of 20 hours of difficult journey - and only one question... Will you be able to regain your humanity, or will you find only madness and death?   

 "Do not be afraid, do not tremble in fear..."
  October 1996 is drawing to a close. Together with Benedek Dohnany and Nikolai Kalyakin, you wake up from nightmares in a house on the outskirts of the town of Sveti Kotar, Croatia. In a strange house, which you have never seen before... But why is the thought so persistently knocking on your head that everything here is wrong and unclean?  

  "This city dances on the edge of Hell itself..."

  A missing person in the family brought you to this mysterious city - and the disappearance of a loved one could be connected to a series of terrible murders... and with the supernatural secrets of Saint-Cotard, a small town that seems to be stuck between two realities. Even a holy place can turn out to be a dark and sinister breeding ground for terrible witchcraft...  

  "Change your reality, my son."
  Help two servants of the Lord find clarity and a way in the world and find a missing relative. Each of them sees the world in their own way: switching between characters, you will be able to see the world through their eyes and understand what drives them... And the outcome of this story will depend on how you see the world.

    "What's so special about Saint Kotard?"  

  - A psychological horror in which a person's path to faith is intertwined with occult secrets and the horrors of madness.  
  -A unique atmosphere of the incomprehensible.  
  -Hidden from the whole world, the town of Sveti Kotar in the very heart of Croatia - with its rich history and many nooks and crannies hiding sinister secrets.  
  - Up to twenty hours of gameplay with a variety of endings and plot twists. 
   -Two dissimilar game characters - and each sees their own reality. 
   -Any choice made by one character can affect the future of another.  
  - A hand-drawn game world full of darkness and despair.  
  -The game is fully voiced by professional actors.  
  - An original soundtrack imbued with superstitious fear.

mac_games.title: BioShock 2 Remastered
mac_games.description:
BioShock 2 perfectly combines the explosive dynamics of a first-person action game with a compelling story. The streets of Rapture are once again filled with echoes of past sins. All along the Atlantic coast, a monster is stealing girls and dragging them into an underwater city. Players will play as the city's most recognizable inhabitant, Big Daddy, who, in search of answers, pursues an invisible enemy through the ruins. 

   Peculiarities:
  High resolution textures, models and interface graphics
  Support 4K Resolution
  The Protector Trials

    Your Summoning: Sofia Lamb is about to launch her mad plan, and to stop it, Dr. Tenenbaum asks for your help in stealing as much ADAM as possible. Take the Protector Trials: brutal combat tests that will test your skills with weapons and Plasmids. The objective of each trial is simple: guide Little Sister to a corpse infused with ADAM and protect her while she collects it. The closer Little Sister gets to her target, the more fierce the resistance becomes – can you survive the carnage?

mac_games.title: Firewatch
mac_games.description: The year is 1989. Your name is Henry, and you have left the hard life for the woods of Wyoming to work there as a lookout. Situated at the very top of a mountain, you must ensure the safety of the surrounding nature. An especially hot, dry summer makes everyone worry.   \n\n Your boss, a woman named Delilah, always stays in touch with you via a small handheld radio—your only link to the world you left behind. But when something strange forces you to abandon your post and head into the woods, you begin to explore the unfamiliar world around you, asking questions and making decisions that could make or break the only relationship that matters to you.

mac_games.title: John Wick Hex
mac_games.description:
John Wick Hex is a fast-paced action strategy game where you have to think and act like John Wick, the professional killer from the highly acclaimed film franchise. The game was developed with the active participation of creative specialists who worked on the John Wick films.   

  John Wick Hex is a turn-based tactical strategy game with choreographed combat in a video game format. It features the franchise's signature gun fu style while introducing new story elements. Players must make quick decisions and choose every action or strike while considering the costs and consequences.  

  John Wick Hex features a unique combination of strategy elements and a dynamic combat system inspired by the unique tactical shootouts in the movies. This game blurs the line between traditional strategy and action genres. Overcome difficulties and progress through the main story mode (which features a unique story written specifically for the game) to unlock new weapons, equipment, and locations.  

  Each weapon requires a specific tactic and playstyle. Ammunition is limited and expendable, just like in real life, so choose your reload time carefully and use the weapons you find during missions wisely. 

   Experience an all-new story that precedes the events of the films as John embarks on a perilous mission to rescue Winston and Sharon from a dangerous new enemy who is seeking to claim his birthright. The story is brought to life by the world-class voice cast of Ian McShane and Lance Reddick, who return to reprise their iconic roles from the films, as well as legendary voice actor Troy Baker as the antagonist Hex.  

  John Wick Hex complements the style of the films with unique film noir visuals and an original score by renowned composer Austin Wintory.

mac_games.title: Getting Over It
mac_games.description:
Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy is a punishing rock climbing game that pays homage to the 2002 classic Sexy Hiking in the style of Jazzuo. You move a hammer with your mouse, and that's it. With practice, you can jump, swing, climb, and fly. Great secrets and a wonderful reward await the master hikers who reach the top of the mountain. 

   To quote Jazuo himself: “The hiking event is very similar to how you would do it in real life, keep that in mind and you will succeed.” 

   Climb a huge mountain with nothing but a hammer and a pot.
  Listen when I make philosophical observations about the problem.
  Between 2 and ∞ hours of agonizing gameplay, depending on how it goes. The average for my playtests was 5 hours, but the average was closer to ∞.
  Lose all your progress, over and over again.
  Experience new types of disappointment you didn't know you were capable of.
  A magical reward awaits tourists who reach the summit.

mac_games.title: Mark of the Ninja: Remastered
mac_games.description:
Mark of the Ninja Remastered brings you to the real ninja. You must be silent, agile, and resourceful to outsmart your opponents. Cursed tattoos enhance the ninja's senses, and every situation presents new opportunities. The game world features stunning landscapes and beautiful animation.

  Features:
 Play your way: The game rewards any player choice, whether it's finishing the game without killing anyone or killing everyone who gets in your way.
 Special Edition Bonus Content: Dosan's Tale: Adds a new character, level, items, and developer commentary to the game.
 Beautiful Graphics: Unique 2D art style, award-winning animation, and hand-drawn environments, now lovingly remastered in 4K.
 Full 5.1 surround sound support and remastered audio.
 New Game Plus: Unlocked upon completion of the game, this mode features new challenges and rewards.

mac_games.title: Frostpunk 2
mac_games.description:
Here’s a description for Frostpunk 2 with line breaks included:  Frostpunk 2 is the highly anticipated sequel to the award-winning city-building survival game, set in a frozen world where every decision matters. As the leader of a new city, you must manage resources, keep your citizens alive, and make difficult moral choices to ensure your community's survival.

  In this harsh, post-apocalyptic environment, players will explore new technologies, build infrastructures, and face the challenges of a changing climate. Your choices will shape the society you build, influencing everything from governance to the well-being of your citizens.

  Key Features:

  Expanded Gameplay: Experience new mechanics and systems that deepen the survival and city-building aspects of the game.

  Moral Dilemmas: Make tough decisions that will affect the fate of your city and its inhabitants, balancing survival with ethics.

  Rich Storytelling: Immerse yourself in a compelling narrative that unfolds based on your choices and actions.

  Dynamic Environment: Adapt to changing weather patterns and resource availability, influencing your strategy and planning.

  Multifaceted Society: Manage a diverse population with varying needs and beliefs, creating a unique social structure.

  Download Frostpunk 2 now and test your leadership in the ultimate survival challenge!

mac_games.title: Rise of the Tomb Raider
mac_games.description: In the thrilling sequel to Tomb Raider, Lara Croft becomes more than just a survivor. This time, she embarks on her first major expedition to explore the most ancient and remote parts of the world and discover the secret of immortality.   \n\n Use Lara's evolving talents in a dramatic action adventure from the sun-drenched ruins of Syria to the freezing mountains of Siberia. Play as a young archaeologist as you conquer tombs, outrun your rivals, and create your own legend.

mac_games.title: HITMAN - Game of The Year Edition
Mini Motorways
mac_games.description:
Mini Motorways is a strategy game about developing roads for a growing city. Build a network of roads, one road at a time, to create a bustling metropolis. Redesign roads and build highways so that everyone gets the best possible route to their destination. 

 Have you ever been stuck in a traffic jam wishing you could fix it? At Mini Motorways, city traffic problems are in your hands.  

 From the creators of Mini Metro, Mini Motorways is a game about developing a city's road network. Build roads, one road at a time, to grow into a bustling metropolis. Redesign your city to keep traffic moving, and cleverly add complications to accommodate changing urban conditions. How long can you keep the city moving?   

Peculiarities
  Dynamic city growth makes every game unique!
  Great maps visually resemble cities around the world and give you the chance to develop them.
  A variety of development options will help you meet the demands of an ever-growing road network./n  Various color modes for your choice include night mode and special colors.
  A situational, relaxing soundtrack that grows as the city grows, created by Disasterpeace.

mac_games.title: Golf It!
mac_games.description:
Embark on an exciting journey with Golf It! Grab a club, gather your friends and dive into an epic mini golf adventure. Conquer countless courses, create unforgettable memories and hone your skills to become the ultimate mini golf champion. Your exciting golf odyssey starts here!  

  Explore eight official courses, each with unique themes, challenging holes, and brand new mechanics. Want to take your game to the next level? Our workshop features thousands of courses created by the incredible creativity of the community. 

   A detailed level editor gives you everything you need to express and share your creativity. Thousands of unique objects, dynamic landscapes and complex event systems - the possibilities are endless. Are you still missing something? Let us know. We'll be happy to implement even more features for you.  

  The seasons change, and so do our leaderboards, and each restart you'll be rewarded with exclusive gear based on your ranking. Whether you're playing solo, teaming up with friends, joining a tight-knit group, or diving into a 30+ player community, the golf fun never stops.

mac_games.title: Cyber ​​Knights: Flashpoint
mac_games.description:
A modern tactical RPG with some of our favorite elements: gridless movement, environmental cover, specialized overwatch, initiative manipulation, and more. Independent enemy unit AI opens up a world of creative stealth possibilities; pick them off one by one, sabotage them, or use advanced technology to sneak past them.   

  Combat is complex and in-depth. Powerful abilities, sophisticated weapons, and fine-tuned coordination can give you the upper hand, but once you start making noise, expect things to get tense. Move quickly and avoid getting caught in traps to achieve your goals and escape alive.  

  Choose jobs to build your reputation without being overly critical. Use your network of underworld contacts to trade favors, bribes, and gain advantages before pulling off a heist. Plan your path through multi-stage missions and assign your crew to jobs that may reveal new opportunities or threats.  

  Balance factions, perks, reputation, and more. Rivals, fixers, arms dealers, and corporate bigwigs... who you work for, who you let down, or betray can all open or close opportunities for you. Watch your game and try to make more people beholden to you, rather than the other way around.  

  Extensive talent trees, multi-classing, weapon customization, shelter upgrades, evolving character traits, and more combine to give players endless ways to build a team that can handle any job. Rich visual customization and naming allow you to personalize any of your characters.   

 Your squad members evolve as you play based on your choices, their injuries, their interactions, and even their presence in some missions. Inspired by decades-old tabletop RPGs, our custom-built Casting Director story engine uses all this information to select and place squad members and NPCs in the world events and storylines it chooses for you each playthrough. Who will be the traitor, the friend in need, or the villain this time? Create new squads, unlock new stories, and watch as your choices make it all come together.  

  The ecosystem has collapsed. Only 112 cities remain, sheltered under massive domes or inside mountains. Artificial consciousness has been created, destroyed, and outlawed on a global level. Megacorporations, nanotechnology, and quantum computing have radically changed the world… and your character is one of the few who can cope with it.   

 Trese Brothers Games creates deep strategy and RPGs with high replayability. Cyber ​​Knights: Flashpoint is our 9th and best game yet, made possible by our loyal fans and the support of players from our previous games. We are long-time fans of cyberpunk and are excited to combine both a fresh take and many classic themes of the genre around some of our favorite gameplay.

mac_games.title: Devour
mac_games.description:
DEVOUR is a co-op survival horror game for 1-4 players. Stop the possessed cultists before they drag you to hell. Run. Scream. Hide. Just don't get caught. 
 
 DO YOU HAVE NERVES OF STEEL?

  Online co-op for 1-4 players
  Control a team of up to 4 cult members in this unique co-op game where you must work together to stop the possessed cultists who are intent on sending you to hell with them.

  Single player mode
  For hardcore players only, this mode will have you screaming yourself.
  Exciting gameplay

  No two games of DEVOUR are the same. You'll need a well-coordinated team and excellent execution to stop the cultists, with each session lasting no more than an hour. 

   CAN YOU DRIVE AWAY THE EVIL TOGETHER?

  Each DEVOUR themed map not only features a terrifying new incarnation of the goat demon Azazel, but also offers a brand new environment to explore, items to collect, demons to overcome, and forbidden rituals to perform.   

 Cast out the demon possessed
  Your goal is to destroy Azazel's influence over the cultists. In each map, work together in a race against time to find key ritual items - some of which may be living or unwanted - to complete the banishment.

  Increasing complexity
  Each possessed cultist's rage and speed increases as the game progresses, as does the number of baddies they spawn to stop you. Your only means of defense is a UV flashlight. 

 Replayability
  Locked doors, ritual objects, and item spawn locations are randomized, so no two games are the same. What's more, DEVOUR's unpredictable AI enhances the game by keeping you guessing at every turn.

  Player progress 
 Players earn experience with each playthrough, increasing their Cultist Rank and earning Ritual Tokens. These are used to unlock valuable perks that can mean the difference between living to exorcise another demon or suffering a painful death. 

 Nightmare mode
  Finished the game without breaking a sweat? Ha! Try Nightmare mode to test yourself.
  Multi-user functions
  Use our positional voice chat in the game. Invite friends or find other players using the server browser.

mac_games.title: Noun Town Language Learning
mac_games.description:
Thousands of gamers use Noun Town to speed up their language learning. This award-winning program uses the latest advances in science and technology to make learning fast, fun, and truly memorable. Plus, Noun Town is regularly updated with free DLC, quality of life improvements, and regular bug fixes. 

   Start your language journey without expensive monthly subscriptions and without waiting for... ads... to run out on your phone.  

  Learn 1,000+ common words and phrases needed to speak like a local, including hundreds of nouns, adjectives, numbers, colors, days of the week, directions and more.   

 As you learn, you bring color back to Noun Town Island, providing a visual reminder of your progress and helping to free the inhabitants of Noun Town.   

 Reinforce your learning with regular revision. The automated spaced repetition system allows you to study at the most appropriate time to cement the vocabulary in your brain (like Anki).  

  Beat your high score in the Learning Rush revision game by serving customers who ask you for items in a foreign language.  

  Play in 11 zones, learning the corresponding vocabulary in each one, including the cafe, beach, farm, grocery store, etc. Learn the word "coffee" in the cafe, "plastic bag" in the grocery store, or "goat" in the farm. Explore the island and learn new vocabulary as you move from one zone to another.   

 Expand your vocabulary with rich mini-games and fun puzzles. Shoot down crazy robots to learn foreign numbers, plant flowers to learn flower names, and control a delivery bot to learn foreign directions and locations. Each simulator is designed specifically to teach different types of vocabulary.  

  Ask NPCs questions with your voice and get answers from native speakers with different voices, just like in real life.  

  NPC role-play lessons written by native teachers will prepare you for real-life conversations. Order coffee at a cafe, inquire about products at a grocery store, and more in real-life simulations.  

  Build relationships with NPCs, just like in cozy games like Animal Crossing and Stardew Valley. The more you interact with NPCs, the friendlier they become—students will be able to practice formal and casual conversations as their relationships develop. NPCs include a cat named Peashy, Bob the most boring person in the world, a kindly old lady named Yaya, and 13 more characters, each unique in their own way.

mac_games.title: Crafty Survivors
Void Sols
mac_games.description:
Ahead lies a vast, twisting labyrinth shrouded in shadow. Enemies lurk around every corner, but you must fight to survive. If you die, you will have no choice but to try again. And again. And again. 

   Death is but a lesson in geometric darkness. Explore the world from a top-down perspective as a humble triangle, and destroy powerful, angular enemies and bosses as you make your way through minimalist environments filled with secrets. On your journey to liberate an enslaved world, you'll encounter sword-wielding grunts, cunning gunslingers, and brutal boss fights that will test your resolve.   

 IMPROVE YOUR PHYSIOLOGY
 Earn Sols by defeating enemies and exploring a rich world of hidden secrets, and spend them to improve your playstyle. Change your gear and stats at campfires whenever possible to adapt to the challenges ahead. Just remember to pick up your lost Sols every time you're defeated by an enemy...  

 EXPLORE A WORLD FULL OF SECRETS
 Enter a dark abstract fantasy with non-verbal narration and a rich story. Explore a variety of locations and interact with surprises, illuminating every corner to reveal secret paths, discover hidden items, and learn what happened to this world plunged into darkness. 

  FACE FORMISSERIOUS ENEMIES
 Don't let the simple geometry fool you! Void Sols is the perfect introduction to the soulslike genre. It features multiple difficulty controls to ease you into the game or challenge even the most seasoned soulsike veterans. Turn the tide in your favor by using enemy traps, exploiting their weaknesses, and gaining temporary allies. Death is just the beginning as you learn your enemies' attack patterns to defeat them and advance.

mac_games.title: Pascal's Wager: Definitive Edition
mac_games.description:
Pascal's Wager: Complete Edition is a dark fantasy action RPG that will make you sweat. Take on the role of couriers and uncover the mystery hidden behind the Dark Fog. 

   World without light
  The Colossus, the mysterious being that dispelled the Dark Mist that once engulfed the lands of Solas, has fallen. As couriers, you will explore different locations in an intriguing world full of secrets, mysteries, and dark stories. The hidden truth of Solas is waiting for you to shed light on it…

 Insanely challenging combat
    Master five unique and versatile characters, each with a distinct style to vary and challenge your experience. The dark forces you face are ruthless and cunning, and the bosses will test your tactics, reflexes, and resolve to the limit. 

  Human history in dark times
  Centuries ago, the sun sank into the sea, causing the Dark Mist to cover the entire earth overnight. At the same time, giants began to appear. These were the Colossi. They illuminated the surrounding areas, allowing humanity to find its last and only refuge.  

  Thousands of years after the Colossi appeared, a mysterious disease struck these beings of light and they began to die...

    Courier Terrence and his companions will set out on a difficult journey in the footsteps of fallen Colossi. They will meet benevolent and treacherous people, decide their fates or simply become silent witnesses to their fate, and also shed light on the truth that is hidden in this dark world.

mac_games.title: UNDYING
mac_games.description:
Caught in a zombie apocalypse and with time running out, Angling will stop at nothing to ensure the safety of her son, Cody. Surviving countless dangers, including a zombie infection beginning to take over her body, not to mention teaching Cody how to survive in their harsh new reality.  

  As Angling and Cody explore the world, they will encounter an ensemble cast of characters who present unique challenges. How Angling and Cody deal with each of them will determine their fates; some may die, some may survive, and some may become staunch allies or even arch-enemies. Can humanity truly succeed? 

  Your Path, Your Choices, Your Story!
 - With everyone striving to survive, helping or refusing to help others can lead to devastating consequences. Everyone has their own secrets, which raises the question... Who can you really trust? Every decision you make changes the course of your story, what will your ending be?  

 Crafting 1.0 Survival Tools!
 - It's not a survival game without crafting, and now with so many things to create and upgrade, I wonder if there will be enough resources!
  - How you use the crafting system will determine whether you survive or not, and how easy it will be.  

 The world is filled with dungeons, stories, and loot!
 - Did you really think we wouldn't ask David Brevik (the godfather of Diablo) to help design the dungeons and make sure the loot was satisfying?
  - Every time you start a game of Undying, you will never know how the map will unfold before your eyes. 14 main locations will be spread across the map in various compositions, while other "Unsafe Zones" are filled with random events that can quickly change your plans. Will you help an ungrateful survivor; what about a gang surrounded by zombies? You never know who you will meet on your journey, everyone has their own story.  

  Features:
 - Beautiful low-poly art aesthetic
 - Find your very own kitten to care for during the apocalypse
 - A cast of characters as far as the eye can see, each with their own unique story and ending
 - A variety of mini-games to relax in after killing hordes of zombies, so why not take a break?
 - Impactful and tense music that sets the tone for Undying from the get-go
 - One emotional story about survival and letting go, be warned, it can be exhilarating!
 - Roguelike elements that create unique situations you'll have to overcome to survive. After all, zombies don't all mutate the same way, right?
 - How do you teach Cody to survive? With over a hundred skills to learn, there's no single way to impart the necessary tools to keep him safe

mac_games.title: Sonority
mac_games.description:
Sonority is an unusual project for connoisseurs of beauty, where music and puzzles are intertwined, forming a mix of intricate riddles. Young adventurer Esther wanders through a world immersed in silence. Having found mysterious songs and musical instruments, the girl realizes that she has an unusual power in her hands, allowing her to find a way out of dead ends and discover new secrets. 

 Immerse yourself in an atmospheric abandoned, but at the same time bright world right now, because you can download the game Sonority from our website. Together with the main character, find a way out of the most difficult situations. Your constant companions will be musical instruments that you will find along the way. With their help, the player will solve the proposed riddles, focusing on the sound. Determine the peculiarity of the sound of each of them in order to get the maximum benefit and solve riddles faster. 

 Unique game mechanics are easy to understand, but difficult to master. Make your way with music. There are special stones on the map and the player assigns a note to each of them. After that, he moves to the node, activating the chain and getting a full melody for moving platforms.  

  Gradually the puzzles will become more difficult. If at the beginning you use only two notes, then starting from the middle there are eight for each of the available musical instruments, and there are several activation nodes to launch. Use your wits and logical thinking to move forward.

mac_games.title: Return to Monkey Island
mac_games.description:
Return to Monkey Island is the unexpected and incredible return of series creator Ron Gilbert, continuing the story of the legendary adventure games The Secret of Monkey Island and Monkey Island: LeChuck's Revenge, developed in partnership with Lucasfilm Games.  

  Many years have passed since the last battle between Guybrush Threepwood and his arch-enemy, the zombie pirate LeChuck. The love of his life, Elaine Marley, has retired from the governor's affairs, and Guybrush himself has never solved the Mystery of Monkey Island and is simply adrift. New young pirate leaders led by Captain Madison have removed the old guard from power, things are getting worse on Massacre Island, and the famous businessman Stan has been jailed for "advertising crimes."  

  Chat playfully with old friends and new characters, but don't forget that familiar islands have become much more dangerous under new leadership. Go to the open sea and explore new unknown places. On the path to glory, Guybrush will face insidious plots of enemies, tricky puzzles and will get into many funny situations. 

   The Return of the Crazy Quest
  Classic gameplay reimagined for the modern age, with fearless pirates solving puzzles and exploring islands using the original game's cleverly reworked and improved controls. Context-sensitive interactions, reactive dialogue branches, and a simplified inventory system make being a pirate much easier. 

   Adventures on the archipelago are calling
  Traverse the friendly (mostly) landscape of Carnage Island, a familiar place now under a new government that has cornered old friends and new characters alike. Explore uncharted lands like the aptly named Dread Island and the chilling settlements of Brr-Mud in search of allies and enemies. 

   The legendary team is back at the helm
  The thrilling conclusion to the iconic Monkey Island series sees the return of its celebrated creator Ron Gilbert, joined by co-creator Dave Grossman, art director Rex Crowl (Knights & Bikes, Tearaway) and composers Peter McConnell, Michael Land and Clint Bajakian (Monkey Island, Monkey Island 2: LeChuck's Revenge).

mac_games.title: Easy Red 2
mac_games.description:
Easy Red 2 is a game for those who know what they want from a World War II game: Weapon and movement simulation, historical accuracy in battles, huge maps with many deployed units, vehicles dominating the battlefields and a realistic approach to combat.  

  In this new version of Easy red we have written everything from scratch to achieve the quality of the game mechanics and optimized to manage a new great looking design that works even on weak machines.
 We take you to Italy, from the shores of Anzio, to the bombed out heights of Monte Cassino, to Japan in the middle of the Battle of Kwajalein and during the German glider invasion of the Greek island of Kos.  

  As you can see from the changelogs, Easy Red 2 has been receiving more than one update per week during 2021-2022-2023. We want to continue in the same vein and frequently add new features such as weapons, uniforms, vehicles, factions, game modes and more. Usually, new features come from suggestions that users can leave on the Discord server.  

  Simulation and immersion
 This is what we want from Easy Red 2. We try to make the player feel all the emotions that soldiers experience in the turmoil and adrenaline of the battlefield. Explosions, destruction, orders, shots will be all around the player, who will be rewarded by the game not for his number of kills, but for his strategic skills and survival skills.  

  Large battles and historical locations
 The entire campaign will take place on large open-world maps that reproduce real battlefields, and battle plans are true to historical events.   

 Squad-based gameplay
 No one can fight alone; good tactics require good teamwork. So be a squad leader, or a medic, or maybe a radio operator: you will always have a job within your squad.  

  We particularly focused on creating sub-objectives that are distinct from the main mission objectives. While a team's main objective might be to conquer a specific area, a sub-objective might be assigned after a radio request from a tank to clear a path around an anti-tank gun that has been spotted. So the gameplay has been radically improved, becoming more realistic and dynamic.

mac_games.title: Starman
mac_games.description:
Guide Starman through breathtaking atmospheric architectural landscapes and challenging puzzles.
 Bring back the light and bring back life!   

 Originally released for mobile devices as Starman: Tale of Light to overwhelmingly positive reviews from critics, Starman has now been remastered.  

 PUZZLES
 New puzzles at each level will force you to learn and think outside the box. 

   ATHMOSPHERIC
 Starman is not just a game, it's an experience. We put so much love into creating the landscapes and trying to create a creepy atmosphere. Sit back, relax and enjoy. 

   SIMPLE CONTROLS
 Move Starman and interact with the environment using only the mouse. Throw objects with the space bar and move mechanisms with the arrow keys.  

  GAME
 We have created over 30 puzzles on 24 levels, in 9 completely different chapters, so that you can play from 1.5 to 3 hours.
 It is short and sweet.
 

   INDIE
 Starman is our first game. 100% indie, developed with love by Sergio Abril and Jacobo Abril, two brothers who happen to be architects.

mac_games.title: Oxygen Not Included
mac_games.description:
The player's task in Oxygen Not Included is to obtain food, water, oxygen, valuable resources and happiness for the duplicants - the inhabitants of his colony. The world has settled in different parts, because of this, half of the people went to other planets, and the second part called themselves duplicants and decided to travel through space, flying between asteroids. The idea of ​​the most hardcore survival simulator in a strategic shell - Oxygen Not Included - shows that maintaining your own base and several people on it is incredibly difficult. The lower the happiness of our settlers, the more they protest, the worse they work and cope with their tasks. It is important that most settlers have an individual character. Fortunately, the developers made not several hundred players, but only a dozen.

 The simulator's reality is off the charts. For example, in order for your people to feel at ease on the new asteroid you choose at the beginning, they need a full-fledged base. To upgrade it, you need to get out of the building and climb into the gorges to extract minerals. After that, the settlers will want a sufficient amount of food with a "reserve", and then they will require a car for rest. As soon as they begin to absorb everything in their path, you have waste, which leads to a series of diseases. Thus, in the game we will cope with one problem, which immediately gives rise to another.

 Colonists will have their own skill, which is determined during the execution of tasks. For example, some will be easy to learn and make plans; some will be easy to dig, because using a tool is not new to them; some will be great at creating creative solutions to problems. Everyone does their job, but you must carefully monitor the bladder filling, stress, and "workload" of your settlers.

mac_games.title: GRIME
mac_games.description:
The extraordinary matter self-destructs while the world shudders and contracts - it squeezes you tightly and spits you out onto the unknown shore of life.   

 You don't know what it hides, so alien in its recognizability, and yet you must fight to survive in the horror that surrounds you. Explore the surreal atmosphere, absorb as many enemies as you can along the way, and turn their abilities against them to surpass all your previous forms. 

   In GRIME, you can play your way and upgrade the skills that suit you best. You'll find that enemies can be approached in different ways, and you'll traverse a variety of landscapes, encounter their inhabitants, and discover the reason for their madness.  

  Peculiarities:

  • Mind-Blowing Surrealism - Uncover the unfathomable secrets of weeping caves and face-covered deserts. Encounter otherworldly characters from distinctive civilizations in an organic, interconnected world - all in otherworldly 3D. Fight enemies spawned by the world itself and absorb them whole. 

  • Uncompromising Combat - Punish your enemies by parrying their attacks, crush them on the ground and in the air, and consume them to gain even greater power in your war against the living world. 

  • Living Weapons - Swap living weapons on the fly, from clawed swords to centipede whips, that will mutate as you fight.  

 • Unique Skill Progression - Hunt down and consume powerful monsters to improve your skills and truly tailor your character to your play style.  

 • Menacing Bosses - Fight creatures that are many times larger than you. Adapt to their strategy, hold off their attacks, and absorb them to gain game-changing abilities that affect both combat and movement.

mac_games.title: Blasphemous II
mac_games.description:
The second part of the Blasphemous series promises you a new encounter with the Penitent One, whose story will continue in Wounds of Eventide - a free add-on to the main game. The Heart of Heaven announced the return of the Miracle and predicted the birth of an unusual child!  

  Having lost his eternal rest and awakened in an unfamiliar land, the Penitent One finds himself caught in an endless cycle of life, death, and rebirth. Now he must explore a dangerous new world and uncover long-forgotten secrets.  

  Along the way, you will encounter hordes of nightmarish enemies awaiting punishment, and terrifying giant bosses will lie in wait in the darkness to send the Penitent One back to the grave.   

 Defeating them won't be easy, but it's all in your hands: in Blasphemous 2 you can choose and improve your own set of skills, as well as get new unique weapons. Destroy your enemies without holding back your rage!  

  One thing is certain: repentance never ends.  

  Explore an augmented, non-linear world: 
 Waking up in an unfamiliar land, you begin your journey once again through a terrifying and enchanting Gothic landscape full of dangerous traps. How you navigate this twisted world is up to you: there are no wrong turns, only scores to settle.  

  Brutal battles:
  The Penitent One knows no mercy; new weapons allow for various maneuvers, advanced combos, and brutal reprisals - destroy anyone who stands in your way. 

   Play the game in your own style: 
 Play Blasphemous 2 in a new way: choose and upgrade a set of basic skills and crush your enemies with new unique weapons.  

  Epic Boss Battles: 
 Hordes of monsters stand in your way to reach your goal. Each boss has its own skills and fighting style. When the dust settles, there will only be one winner, so study your opponents well. 

   Explore a new mysterious world: 
 A whole world inhabited by mysterious characters awaits you. Some will offer their help, others will need it themselves, and still others will direct you to deadly dangerous places where you will find long-forgotten artifacts. There is so much unknown here that every myth you touch will reveal many secrets, allowing you to immerse yourself in this dark new world and truly feel it.The second part of the Blasphemous series promises you a new encounter with the Penitent One, whose story will continue in Wounds of Eventide - a free add-on to the main game. The Heart of Heaven announced the return of the Miracle and predicted the birth of an unusual child! 

   Having lost his eternal rest and awakened in an unfamiliar land, the Penitent One finds himself caught in an endless cycle of life, death, and rebirth. Now he must explore a dangerous new world and uncover long-forgotten secrets.    Along the way, you will encounter hordes of nightmarish enemies awaiting punishment, and terrifying giant bosses will lie in wait in the darkness to send the Penitent One back to the grave.    Defeating them won't be easy, but it's all in your hands: in Blasphemous 2 you can choose and improve your own set of skills, as well as get new unique weapons. Destroy your enemies without holding back your rage!    One thing is certain: repentance never ends.    Explore an augmented, non-linear world:  Waking up in an unfamiliar land, you begin your journey once again through a terrifying and enchanting Gothic landscape full of dangerous traps. How you navigate this twisted world is up to you: there are no wrong turns, only scores to settle.    Brutal battles:  The Penitent One knows no mercy; new weapons allow for various maneuvers, advanced combos, and brutal reprisals - destroy anyone who stands in your way.    Play the game in your own style:  Play Blasphemous 2 in a new way: choose and upgrade a set of basic skills and crush your enemies with new unique weapons.    Epic Boss Battles:  Hordes of monsters stand in your way to reach your goal. Each boss has its own skills and fighting style. When the dust settles, there will only be one winner, so study your opponents well.    Explore a new mysterious world:  A whole world inhabited by mysterious characters awaits you. Some will offer their help, others will need it themselves, and still others will direct you to deadly dangerous places where you will find long-forgotten artifacts. There is so much unknown here that every myth you touch will reveal many secrets, allowing you to immerse yourself in this dark new world and truly feel it.

mac_games.title: Blasphemous
mac_games.description:
A terrible curse, simply called the Miracle, fell upon the lands of Cvstodia and all its inhabitants.  

  You will take on the role of the Penitent One, the only survivor of the massacre called "Silent Grief". The hero is trapped in an endless cycle of death and rebirth, and now he must save the world from a terrible fate by getting to the cause of all torment.  

  Explore a nightmarish world ruled by a twisted religion to discover the many secrets hidden within. Unleash devastating combos and brutally dispatch hordes of grotesque monsters and gigantic bosses ready to tear you to pieces. Find and use relics, rosary beads, and prayers that will allow you to call upon the celestial powers, gain aid, and ultimately save you from eternal damnation.  

  Key Features

  Explore a non-linear world Fight sinister enemies and overcome deadly traps as you explore a variety of landscapes in the dark, gothic world of Cvstodia on your quest for revenge. 
 Brutal Combat Use the power of Mea Culpa, a sword made of wine, to slay your enemies. Master new combos and special moves as you clear out everything in your path. 
 Executions Unleash your fury and dismember your enemies, drenching everything in blood. Of course, all executions are done in perfect pixel art style. 
 Customize Your Gear Find and equip relics, rosary beads, prayers, and sword hearts to grant you new abilities and stat boosts you need to survive. Experiment with different combinations to suit your playstyle. 
 Epic Boss Battles Hordes of giant, twisted creatures stand between you and your goal. Learn their movements, survive their onslaught, and emerge victorious.

  Uncover the Secrets of Cvstodia The world is full of tormented souls. Some will offer you help, while others will ask for a certain fee in return. Uncover their secrets, study the fates of these tormented characters to receive rewards and better understand the dark world you live in.

mac_games.title: American Truck Simulator
mac_games.description:
American Truck Simulator is a simulator of driving American trucks across the United States. The game is a parallel to another game by SCS Software - Euro Truck Simulator 2. The game will allow you to feel like a "truck driver" and go on a journey across the famous expanses of the United States. The game mechanics are based on Euro Truck Simulator 2, but have received many edits and improvements, both from the technical side and local changes specific to the US market.  

  From the developers of the hit Euro Truck Simulator franchise, get ready to experience life on the West Coast in American Truck Simulator. Based on major arteries experience throughout the Golden State, you'll trucking routes so realistic that it's recommended you apply suntan lotion before you play! There's a lot to love about America, and the trucks you'll be driving are no exception. With more vehicles to choose from than the European side, you'll feel the full power of each vehicle's engine as you cruise down wide, open roads and maneuver through densely populated cities.  

  Peculiarities:

  The entire map of North America, which we will travel around, has been implemented.
  ATS will feature a large number of American trucks, so far we know about Peterbilt and Kenworth. 
 Graphics are significantly improved compared to ETS 2 
 More than 100 large cities and hundreds of small villages. 
 All streets and many other dynamic objects have been implemented. 
 In American Track Simulator you can feel like a real truck driver, endless roads and powerful trucks are waiting for you!

mac_games.title: Prince of Persia: The Lost Crown
mac_games.description:
UNLEASH YOUR INNER WARRIOR 
  Use your Time Powers, combat skills, and platforming abilities to perform deadly combos and defeat time-corrupted enemies and mythological creatures.

    IMMERSE YOURSELF INTO THE MAJESTIC MOUNTAIN OF KAF
  Discover a cursed Persian-style world filled with massive landmarks and explore a variety of highly detailed biomes, each unique, wondrous and dangerous in its own way.   

 EXPERIENCE AN EPIC ADVENTURE
  Immerse yourself in a Persian mythological fantasy through an intriguing and original storyline, using your wits to solve puzzles, find hidden treasures and complete quests to learn more about this wicked place.
  Translated by www.DeepL.com/Translator (free version) 

  Requires macOS 12.0 or later and a Mac with an Apple M1 chip or later.

mac_games.title: TUNIC
mac_games.description:
TUNIC is an isometric adventure developed in the role-playing genre with action elements, which invites us to become part of exciting events in the role of a small but very brave fox.  

   Go explore various locations, extract valuable resources and pass the tests that this mysterious place has prepared for you. Your task is to collect as many treasures and jewels as possible, which will subsequently bring fame and wealth.  

   The task is not easy, so you need to prepare well and always try to develop professional skills. Be attentive to avoid danger and all sorts of traps, show tactical planning skills to think ahead and avoid mistakes.  

   This place has been keeping secrets for many centuries, which will not be easy to reveal, but it will allow you to get closer to completing the task and fulfilling your dream. The graphics have bright drawings and pleasant animation, which greatly complements the overall adventure atmosphere.

mac_games.title: AER – Memories of the Old
mac_games.description:
The ancient gods are forgotten, erased from memory by a great catastrophe that left only islands floating in the sky from the world. However, the darkness threatens to engulf even them: both the bright fragments of land with lost ancient ruins and the endless mystical skies. Fortunately, a girl named Auk has a rare gift: she can turn into a bird. Explore the mysterious land of the gods with Auk and find a way to save all that exists. 

   Look at the world from a bird's eye view. To fly, just jump off any cliff!
  A huge world full of mysteries that can be explored in any direction.
  Visit temples, solve riddles and uncover secrets.
  The emphasis is on atmosphere and bright aesthetics, sustained in the spirit of surrealism and minimalism.

mac_games.title: Liftoff: FPV Drone Racing
mac_games.description:
Liftoff® is the gateway to the drone racing scene, a platform for both pilots with real-life experience and gamers who are new to the sport. Veterans can explore new environments or compete against each other, while newcomers can hone their piloting skills before taking to the field. 

 LOVE OF DRONES FOR EVERYONE
  We want to open up the FPV racing experience to everyone. Liftoff is a game for everyone, from FPV racing veterans to gamers looking to take their first digital steps into the drone racing scene.   

 REALISTIC!
  Liftoff features realistic drone physics recommended by the best drone pilots in the world. Flying a drone in the game feels so real that you'll forget it's not there.

    CUSTOMIZATION
  The drone community is full of creative minds and tech wizards. Accordingly, Liftoff has the tools to customize your drones and create your own race tracks.  

  EXPANDING PLATFORM 
 We will constantly evolve the game and add more content and features as long as the community supports them. We are always interested in hearing your ideas!  

  HARDWARE SUPPORT
  Liftoff supports the use of FPV goggles and a wide range of remote controls to further blur the line between the gaming experience and the real world. 

   IMPORTANT NOTES
  A gamepad or dedicated R/C controller is required to play Liftoff!

mac_games.title: Warhammer 40,000: Mechanicus
mac_games.description:
Take control of one of the most technologically advanced armies in the Imperium, the Adeptus Mechanicus. As Magos Dominus Faustinius, lead an expedition to the recently rediscovered Necron world of Silva Tenebris. Customize your squad, manage resources, discover long-forgotten technologies, and command your Tech-Priests. 

   Every decision you make during the 50 handcrafted missions will impact the missions that follow and ultimately decide the fate of your entire squad. Choose your path carefully - the fate of the Imperium rests in your hands.  

  Flesh is weak! Upgrade your Tech-Priests with weapons, support systems, servo-skulls and medical implants. Choose squad disciplines and character classes to customize your squad to your playstyle.  

  Large-scale, immersive combat will test your mettle against the xenos threat. Access the most powerful weapons and abilities using Cognition Points and keep the pressure on your enemy. Fear not, for the Omnissiah favors the brave.  

  A gripping story that captures the spirit of the Adeptus Mechanicus cult, written by Ben Counter, one of the authors of the Black Library publishing house. Each character has its own personality and motivation. Feel the tension in the air and admire the beauty of stunning graphics and audio effects.   

 Make tough decisions that will determine the future of your ship, the Ark Mechanicus Caestus Metallican. Alternate endings will make each playthrough unique. But remember: the more thoroughly you explore each tomb, the greater the rewards, but the more terrible the threats. 

   Complete achievements in the game and receive powerful abilities as a reward that can be used in battle once per mission.

mac_games.title: Mini Airways
mac_games.description:
Mini Airways is a real-time management game where you manage planes at an airport.  

  In the game, you will play as an air traffic controller who controls the takeoff and landing of planes, clears air traffic, modernizes the airspace... And most importantly, does not let them crash! 

   Air traffic control

  In addition to the usual takeoff and landing arrangements, you will also have to deal with the challenges of mountains, no-fly zones and peak landing times. So please stay focused! 

   Airspace modernization

  At the end of the day, you can choose to improve your airspace and airport: automatic delay, faster turns, more airspace... Using all of this wisely will make your job much easier.  

  Airports from all over the world

  You will discover more complex airspace maps. Show off your skills in managing airspace and airports around the world.

mac_games.title: Cities: Skylines
mac_games.description:
Cities: Skylines is a city-building simulator where you will have a lot of opportunities. Create a whole city where you can let your imagination run wild. You will start small, build small houses and hire workers. You have full control over all aspects of the activity. Be careful when creating a city, take into account all the situations that may occur. Your residents should be as comfortable as possible. Equip the city with a sleeping area, and then create infrastructure. Create more and more jobs, and also improve the scale. Take into account even the smallest details of the city. This simulator is as realistic as possible with a rather pleasant atmosphere. As soon as you build at least a small part of the city, you will immediately be able to observe your residents. Think about a strategy and improve the infrastructure.  

  The game's creators took part in the development of the Cities in Motion series, so the game features a highly realistic transport system. You can use modifications to customize the gameplay to your taste, enjoying a multi-level simulation of city life. You are limited only by the limits of your imagination! 

   Complex and multi-level simulation

  Building a city is easy, but can you make it run like clockwork? As mayor, you'll have to take care of education, water, electricity, police, fire, utilities, and more, not to mention the economy of your region. City residents react quickly to changes, making many game scenarios realistic.   

 Detailed simulation of traffic flows
]n  Colossal Order's extensive experience gained from working on the Cities in Motion series of games helped create a realistic urban transport simulation.

    Districts and Politicians 

 You don't have to be a simple city hall bureaucrat. Divide the city into distinct districts, choose policies for each, and work your way up to the position of mayor.    Change of day and night  Depending on the time of day, the city changes, and its residents live according to a certain schedule. At night, the traffic flow is noticeably thinner, and the efficiency of some areas decreases. This add-on will allow you to manage various aspects of city life at different times of the day.  Wide support for modifications  Create new maps and buildings or modify existing ones to use in the game or send to friends. Visit the Steam Workshop to download mods from other enthusiasts.

mac_games.title: House Flipper
mac_games.description: Before you buy your first property, you need to make some money. But don't worry!/n  Luckily, you have plenty of orders at your fingertips! Accept job offers from residents -/n  clean, paint the walls, install radiators, showers and air conditioners, or furnish your entire property! /n Once grateful clients pay for your solid work, you can get your own home.  /n/n  Grab a hammer! Time to make a little mess and knock down some walls!/n  Get rid of broken glass, trash and furniture scraps to prepare the space for a total renovation! /n It's up to you to decide: either satisfy specific customers or create a comfortable office for developing your business.    Luckily, you're not alone. You have your own set of reliable tools!  With a paint roller, glass cleaner, trowel, mop, hammer and, of course, a tablet, you can tackle any repair job!  Using these tools also gives you experience that can be used to improve and  improving your skills, which will make your work even more enjoyable.    Whether you're planning to build your dream home, help tenants with renovations, or knock down a few walls, House Flipper is for you!  So just sit back, let go of your normal routine, and dive into the world of House Flipper… your world!

mac_games.title: EVERSPACE 2
mac_games.description:
In EVERSPACE 2, you play as a starship pilot in a fast-paced single-player shooter. Experience intense combat, brutal challenges, and epic rewards. Explore the war-torn star systems of the Cluster 34 DMZ, where each massive, handcrafted location is filled with mysteries, secrets, and dangers. 

   Immerse yourself in the gripping story of Adam Roslin, a clone pilot searching for his place in a vast universe. Events from his past intertwine with conflicts from the present, and the Zone is about to descend into chaos. Hide from colonial patrols, resolve conflicts between local crime bosses, escape from deranged cultists, and fight militant aliens.  

  To survive in the harsh space, ingenuity, luck and training are not enough - assemble a team of specialists and help Adam realize his dream and finally leave the Zone. Meet old friends and make new ones among the inhabitants of the universe with an interesting fate. They will help you complete tasks, give useful bonuses, open new abilities and accompany you on various adventures.  

 EMBARK ON A THRILLING ADVENTURE
 Meet new alien races, uncover secrets, find treasures, and defend your loot from space pirates in a 30-hour story campaign. For those who like to look under every stone, you can spend over 90 hours in the EVERSPACE universe, completing side quests, completing challenges, and solving numerous mysteries.

    LET YOUR LASERS DO THE
 SPEAKING Destroy your enemies in EVERSPACE style. Dodge, maneuver, and blast your opponents into space dust with a volley of laser cannons. Use a wide range of weapons and abilities to defeat drones, fighters, heavy bombers, and deadly assault ships. But don’t think it’s easy! Huge cruisers and ancient guardians will require you to demonstrate the heights of your piloting skills. Use the environment to your advantage if you want to prevail over superior enemy forces.

    ENDLESS SPACE
 Travel the EVERSPACE universe at your leisure. The borderlands of Cluster 34, like the Zone itself, are full of story and side quests, interesting events, activities and secrets. Speed ​​up the hyperdrive and set off to furrow more than 100 unique hand-crafted locations located in seven distant star systems. Leave your mark on the vastness of the galaxy! 

   ENDLESS POSSIBILITIES
 Build your own space fleet from a virtually endless variety of fighters, unique classes and designs. For the right price, traders across the cluster will provide you with new models and hold your ship while you try out new toys. Combine different modules, weapons, gadgets and bonuses to find the right combination for each mission. 

   IN SEARCH OF SECRETS
 A smart pilot is a successful pilot. Open caches, examine crash sites and find ancient treasures scattered throughout the Zone. Search abandoned buildings, solve puzzles, blow up asteroids and restore ruins to reveal all the secrets of space. 

   RICH MONEY
 Go on a quest to find the best gear for your arsenal. Look for tools that best suit your playstyle, but don’t be afraid to leave your comfort zone and experiment. Find the perfect combination of weapons, traits, gadgets, and ships.

    LET THE HUNT BEGIN A
 deep story campaign is not all that EVERSPACE 2 has to offer. Upon completion of the game, you will encounter deadly high-risk zones and ancient portals that will demand the most from you and your ship. Defeat increasingly dangerous enemies and earn legendary gear of incredible power.

mac_games.title: Euro Truck Simulator 2
mac_games.description:
Become the king of European roads — a truck driver who delivers important cargo over long distances! Dozens of cities in the UK, Belgium, Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland and more are waiting for you. Test your skills, endurance and speed. Prove that you are ready to become part of the elite community of truckers! 

   In the game you will be able to:  

  Deliver a wide variety of cargo to 60+ European cities.
  Run your own business that grows even when you are driving and delivering cargo.
  Create your own fleet of trucks, buy garages, hire drivers and increase the profitability of the company.
  Customize trucks to your taste: from technical characteristics to appearance.
  Replace headlights, horns, flashing lights, exhaust systems and more on your cars.
  Drive along real roads thousands of kilometers long and see hundreds of famous places and buildings.

mac_games.title: Full Throttle Remastered
mac_games.description:
One day you're on the road, driving along, not caring about anything. Then some guy in a suit shows up and says he's got a deal for you and your gang. But when you come to your senses, you've got a bump on your head, the law on your back, and you know in your gut that the road you're on is about to get a lot tougher...

    Originally released by LucasArts in 1995, Full Throttle is a classic graphic adventure game from industry legend Tim Schafer that tells the story of Ben Throttle, the leader of the Polecats biker gang, who finds himself embroiled in a tale of motorcycles, mayhem, and murder. 

   Now, 20 years later, Full Throttle returns in a remastered edition with new hand-painted and high-resolution 3D visuals with 4k support, plus remastered audio and music. Blow your speakers with cinematic sound and a full digital score featuring GONE JACKALS - a real-life biker band with a hard-hitting hammer!  

  Players will be able to switch between classic and remastered modes, as well as combine audio and graphics as they wish. The package also includes a concept art browser featuring the work of Peter Chan and a commentary track featuring the game's creators.  

  Full Throttle was the first game to feature Tim Schafer as the sole director of the project, and a beloved cult classic! This special edition has been lovingly restored and remastered with the care and attention that can only come from the original creators. The game will be released on PS4, PS Vita, and PC in 2017.

mac_games.title: Len's Island
mac_games.description:
New to the city, with only the tools in your backpack and a determined spirit, you build a new life for yourself on a beautiful island.  

  Uncover the island's dark secrets as you delve into the caves in search of what past travelers have sought.   

 Build, fight, farm and explore. Challenge your own path. Whether it's building your dream home, tending your crops and watching the sunset; or exploring the secrets of the island and the darkness beneath, you can take your sword with you.

mac_games.title: Assassin's Creed Rogue
mac_games.description:
18th century, North America. Amidst the chaos and violence of the North American Seven Years' War, the young and brave Assassin Shay Patrick Cormac undergoes an ideological metamorphosis. After a dangerous mission that ends in tragedy, Shay becomes disillusioned with the Assassin Order and no longer wishes to be a part of their Brotherhood. In mortal danger and rejected by those he once considered his brothers, Shay Patrick Cormac sets out on a completely new adventure. Destroying all those who betrayed him, he becomes one of the most dangerous Assassin hunters.  

  Assassin's Creed Rogue is the darkest chapter in the history of Assassin's Creed. Witness the transformation of the protagonist from a convinced assassin to a brutal hunter for them. Follow your own creed and go on a thrilling journey across the vastness of North America, the neighborhoods of New York, the valleys of turbulent rivers and the cold waters of the Atlantic. Now your goal is to destroy the Assassins!  

  Features:
 Become the first Assassin Hunter - For the first time in Assassin's Creed history, the idea of ​​the Templar order is embedded. Playing as the main character Shay, you will have the opportunity to control all the known skills and weapons of the Master Assassin, as well as a new range of combat equipment: 

  • Use Shay's deadly rifle for close and long-range combat. Distract or eliminate your opponent with an arsenal of ammunition available to you, including a variety of specialized bullets, shells, and grenades.

  • Avoid being pursued by assassins with your unique and upgraded Eagle Vision. Use this skill to monitor your surroundings and spot assassins hiding in the shadows, on rooftops, or in crowds. 

   Dark Path of Vengeance - Witness Shay's transformation from a committed Assassin into a dark and dangerous Templar, ready to kill his former brothers. Experience the events that lead Shay down a dangerous path and embark on an adventure with consequences that will forever change the fate of the Assassin Brotherhood. 

   Updated Naval Gameplay - Launch your ship, the Morrigan, and navigate the North Atlantic seas and narrow rivers of the mainland. Assassin's Creed® Rogue builds on the beloved naval gameplay of Assassin's Creed® IV Black Flag™, with a number of important changes: 

 • New Tactics: Defend yourself against the attacks of assassins who will try to board your ship and kill your crew. Fight back as quickly as possible to avoid major losses in your team.
  • New weapons: Use the Burning Oil, which leaves a trail of fire and burns enemy ships, and the Puckle Gun, a rapid-fire firearm effective at picking off boarding parties.
  • The North Atlantic world is full of possibilities: make your way through the ice sheets, explore snowy terrain and look for secret places where you can hide during naval battles.

    Huge - The history of Shai will open up three unique natural zones for you:

  • The North Atlantic Ocean. You will encounter giant Arctic icebergs on your way and feel the full force of the cold northern winds. 
 • River Valley. The great diversity of North American nature requires the presence of river navigation skills, as well as land travel. 
 • New York. One of the most famous cities in the world, completely recreated according to descriptions from the 18th century.

mac_games.title: Grand Theft Auto III – The Definitive Edition
mac_games.description: Grand Theft Auto III \n\n It all starts in Liberty City. Go anywhere and do whatever you want. The ruthless criminal world will be yours if you have the courage to conquer it.

mac_games.title: Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas - The Definitive Edition
mac_games.description: Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas \n\n  It's the early 1990s. After a couple of cops frame him for a murder he didn't commit, Carl "CJ" Johnson must go on a journey to keep his loved ones safe and take control of the streets of San Andreas.

mac_games.title: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City – The Definitive Edition
mac_games.description: Grand Theft Auto: Vice City \n\n Welcome to the 1980s... Live the story of Tommy Vercetti, full of betrayal, retribution and neon lights of tropical Vice City. All the riches of this city will be yours - all you have to do is reach out and grab them.

mac_games.title: Reus 2
mac_games.description:
In Reus 2, become a god once again, taking control of mighty giants whose power over the elements allows you to shape worlds, create an ecosystem of resources, and ensure the prosperity of human civilizations. Your choices will determine the fate of these fragile human beings, whose independence can lead them to great heights.  

   Shape Worlds with Giants Use 6 powerful giants, each with their own unique ability to control plants, animals, and minerals, to create new biomes for people to settle in. As you progress, you will gain inspiration to unlock new abilities for your giants, giving you a variety of choices. 

  Create Thriving Ecosystems
 Terraform different biomes by strategically combining flora, fauna, and materials native to those environments. Experiment to discover which combinations work best with the needs and goals of your inhabitants, leading to exciting new eras of their existence.

   Lead Humanity into the Future
 Your decisions will shape the development of humanity, from early human societies to modern civilizations. Traveling to the stars as space explorers, founding a cult, or wanting to domesticate nature - each will have its own goals. Regardless of the outcome, remember that you can always start a new humanity. 

   Fill the Galaxy with Life
 Each playthrough leaves a lasting legacy on the stellar expanse, spawning a new planet for you to experiment with. Fill the galaxy with endless variations of life and be inspired to take a new path in your next creation.

mac_games.title: PROTOCOL 11 - Episode 1
mac_games.description: A sci-fi story about friendship, love, and what it means to be human. Embark on a thrilling adventure to take back what a strange race of invaders has taken from you.   \n\n Follow Phil through multiple worlds in a thrilling quest for justice. Embark on an adventure to reclaim what was taken from you by a strange race of invaders. Gather resources for your journey. Fight your enemies the way you like. Destroy them without mercy or finish them off quietly as you attack from the shadows. Play through various scenarios with an unusual and improvised ally.

mac_games.title: Vagrus - The Riven Realms
mac_games.description: Vagrus The Riven Realms is a two-dimensional RPG game with a colorful, unusually designed world, dynamic gameplay and a lot of interesting events. Here you will become a participant in dynamic turn-based battles, in which your enemies will be real martial arts professionals. The game involves a fairly large amount of text information, so in order to feel the whole atmosphere, you need to know English. Here you will decide for yourself how to move and what missions to complete, and the development of events will depend on your choice.
