You will independently influence the plot line, choosing this or that action and completing the corresponding quest.  \n\n  Coping with the task is not as easy as it may seem at first glance, so you should take care of improving your skills. There are more than enough plot branches in the game, which will allow you to go through it more than once. You will be able to independently lead your team, with which you will go on a long, and sometimes even dangerous journey. The world is filled with darkness and has prepared for you a lot of challenges that you must be ready to face at any moment.

mac_games.title: Rising Front
mac_games.description:
Rising Front, the groundbreaking WWI shooter, puts you right in the thick of the war in the trenches. Experience a seamless fusion of FPS, RTS and combat simulation. Our mission is to bring the battles of World War I to life, filling the battlefield with hundreds, if not thousands, of combat units, all fighting for victory. 

    The epic scale of the battle 

  Unprecedented in its scale, Rising Front delivers skirmishes with over 1,000 units operating simultaneously. Step into an era never before depicted so vividly in a World War I game! 

   Key Features:
 - Realistic WWI Tactics: Master the art of warfare a century ago.  
 - Highly Optimized: Smooth performance, no matter the scale of the battle.
 - Artillery: Use a variety of artillery for a strategic advantage.
 - Procedural Cover System: Adaptive environment for tactical gameplay.
 - Rag-Doll Physics: Experience dynamic and impressive combat scenarios.
 - AI Control: Command AI units for a tactical advantage. - Construction System: Build defensive structures to strengthen your position.

mac_games.title: Stellar Settlers: Space Base Builder
mac_games.description:
Stellar Settlers is a space base/city builder and colony simulation game set in the depths of uncharted space. Embark on a space adventure, take control of a space settlement and build a thriving colony on alien planets with a variety of challenging and hostile environments that are out to destroy your colony.

    Each new planet features procedurally generated conditions, ores, special events, new settlers, building modules, and stories. Adapt your playstyle to mine and collect as many materials as possible. Once you're resilient enough, start designing and building a physics-based spaceship (similar to Kerbal Space Program) to escape the planet when environmental conditions become too harsh. Travel through the various planets and visit them all.  

  Explore the unknown, mine valuable resources, and manage your colony with strategic decisions like selecting talented Settlers. Add it to your wishlist now!   

 With original mechanics of vertical space base construction, strategically plan your base with horizontal and vertical connections with Base Modules of different functionality, durability and cost. Mine more, build a bigger and safer space base for your Settlers.  

  Take on the challenge of adventure and overcome 5 different carefully designed hostile planets (there will be 10 upon full release) that seek to destroy your plans and colony at every turn. Each planetary environment and disaster mechanic requires a different mindset and strategy to overcome.  

  Your Settlers are your most important tool for success. With new Settlers gradually unlocked with different talents and benefits, choose the Settlers that will go with you based on your own play style and strategy.  

  Once you start accumulating enough materials, start building your Starship to explore even better and richer planets, gain more experience, and REPEAT!

mac_games.title: Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery EP
mac_games.description: Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery EP is an exploration action game with an emphasis on audiovisual style. Travel through a small mythical kingdom, fight with a sword and summon magic to unravel mystical musical secrets. Feel yourself in a video game world influenced by the phases of the moon and help a wandering warrior monk fulfill his sad errand.

mac_games.title: Phantom Spark
mac_games.description:
Phantom Spark is a fun and fast-paced racing game that will push you to the limit. Compete for a personal best in time trials across three visually unique regions. Complete challenges, hone your skills, and learn to beat the champions.

    Ignite the Spark
 In the single-player campaign, you'll take to the track against regional champions - they'll be your rivals and mentors. As you defeat each champion, your spark will grow stronger and new tracks and ships will become available to you.  

  Hone your skills
 Competing with "ghost" rivals, you will clearly see how the track was passed for the record and will be able to polish your technique to gain a few precious fractions of a second. Instant returns to the track will help you maintain rhythm and focus. Improve your result time after time! 

   Features:
 - Over 30 handcrafted tracks.
 - Play through the single-player campaign or play with a friend on the same screen.
 - Compete in three regions, each with its own unique champion, visual style and track features.
 - Dynamic challenges encourage constant improvement.
 - The soundtrack is captivating and keeps you in a state of flow.
 - Replay mode allows you to see particularly spectacular moments again.

mac_games.title: Wylde Flowers
mac_games.description:
Step into the shoes of Tara, a girl who arrives in a cozy island village to help her grandmother with the family farm. Meet the locals (fully voiced!) and their intriguing pasts, make friends, and maybe even romance!

    During the day, you can immerse yourself in all the joys of rural life: tending crops and livestock, fishing, crafting, and other activities. At night, the witch sleeping inside you will wake up, who can fly on a broomstick, brew potions, control the weather and seasons, and even turn into a cat! 

   Fairhaven is waiting for you!  

  Peculiarities: 

 Dive into a heartwarming and honest story that involves magic and farming. Help Tara find herself and unite the entire town.  

  Wylde Flowers features a BAFTA-winning cast of voice actors, with over 18 hours of dialogue recorded.  ㅤ 

   From local blacksmith Natalia to cafe owner Sofia, every Fairhaven resident has their own special story that you can't help but fall in love with.   

 You can romance one of Fairhaven's seven residents, from non-binary Kim, who runs a butcher shop, to flirtatious Amira from the clinic.  

  Cook, fish, farm, look after animals, cast spells and brew potions - both household and magical skills will come in handy!  

  From 35 to 60 hours or more of exciting gameplay awaits you - explore the world and enjoy.   

 The musical score is closely intertwined with the narrative, and the melody, recorded with a real orchestra, changes according to your actions in the game.

  macOS 12.0 or later

mac_games.title: WHAT THE CAR?
mac_games.description:
A wacky adventure full of racing, jokes and surprises! 

    THIS IS NOT JUST A RACING GAME

  Here you control a car that has legs instead of wheels! Complete hundreds of original levels: jump, fly on a jetpack, climb on the roofs of buildings, deliver packages... basically, do everything that cars usually do NOT.
  Helpful Hint: Look for non-obvious shortcuts and avoid items that explode.

    DISCOVER THE WHOLE WORLD
  In this game you can not only race, but also explore many islands, make friends, search for treasures and solve puzzles.
  Helpful tip: Don't forget to look behind the waterfalls!

    CREATE YOUR OWN LEVELS
  Create hilarious levels, share them with your friends and set new records on levels from other players.

  Helpful tip: adorable teddy bears and booster platforms make the levels even more fun!

    THERE IS NO LIMIT TO FRICKNESS
  Flip burgers, fish, swim and sing karaoke!
  Helpful advice: it’s better not to talk to a laser cow…

    WARNING!
  The game is created for entertainment purposes only and is not intended to help you improve your driving skills. In fact, none of the developers of this game can drive.

    SPOILER!
  It turns out that a spoiler is a thing that is attached to the back of a car for aesthetics. Who would have thought?!

    We hope you enjoy our game as much as we enjoyed creating it.

mac_games.title: Minecraft Java Edition
mac_games.description: Minecraft is a sandbox game created by Markus Persson, the founder of Mojang AB. He drew inspiration for Minecraft from his previous lesser-known projects as well as popular games like Dungeon Keeper./n/n    Minecraft's gameplay can be summed up in one sentence: the player travels through a virtually limitless 3D world made up of various blocks that he can destroy and create. The game also features a unique "pixel" graphic style that is instantly memorable, although many may initially find it unattractive./n/n    Minecraft is not a project about graphics, but about creativity, imagination and creation, and this is exactly the case when the game is very easy to master, but hundreds of hours are required to comprehend its full depth./n/n    In 2014, Mojang and the rights to Minecraft were acquired by the American company Microsoft./n  Minecraft provides the player with a three-dimensional procedurally generated world made entirely of cubic blocks, and gives the player the ability to freely rebuild it, creating complex structures from blocks - this feature of the game makes Minecraft similar to the LEGO constructor./n/n    The game does not set any clear goals for the player, but offers him many opportunities and activities: for example, the player can explore the world, create various structures and objects, fight with various opponents./n  Minecraft is one of the best-selling video games of all time, second only to Tetris, with combined sales across all platforms exceeding 154 million copies as of October 2018, and over 91 million active players playing the game at least once a month. The game has won numerous awards, including the Spike Video Game Awards and the Golden Joystick Award./n/n  OS: OS X 10.11 and later/n  Processor: Dual Core, 3 GHz/n  RAM: 4 GB/n  Video card: with support for OpenGL 4.4 and newer/n  Software: Java 8/n  Disk space: 500 MB/n

mac_games.title: Road Redemption
mac_games.description:
Road Redemption is a racing action game where you lead a gang of motorcyclists on an epic road trip across the country - an epic adventure with brutal motorcycle combat. 

  Earn money by completing races, committing murders and robberies, and by dealing with obstacles along the way. After collecting loot, you can upgrade your character, motorcycle, and weapons. 

  You only live once 

 Riding a motorcycle at 100 mph while trying to hit someone with a pipe is dangerous, and death can come quickly. Luckily, whenever you die, all the experience you've collected can be used to upgrade your character, bike, and weapon. 

  A truly grand quest 

 Set in a post-apocalyptic world ruled by a brutal dictator, Road Redemption is a game that Mad Max fans will feel right at home. 

  After years of bloody street wars, the country's biker gangs have agreed to an uneasy truce. 

  This truce is broken after the leader of the country's richest arms cartel is assassinated, and a $15,000,000 bounty is placed on the head of the mysterious killer. 

  It's up to you and your fellow gangsters to chase down the killer and collect the reward, but you'll have to drive through enemy territory to do it. Every biker in the country wants their share of the $15,000,000 reward and won't hesitate to kill anyone who gets in their way. 

  Other features 

  The single player campaign can be completed in its entirety in multiplayer mode. 

 Lots of brutal weapons. It's more Twisted Metal than Mario Kart. 

 4-player split-screen co-op mode. 

 Multiplayer online game. 

 A massive, expandable skill tree. Collect loot to upgrade your character, bike, and weapons. 

 A sophisticated motorcycle combat system with grabs, kicks, counters, collisions, critical hits and more. 

 Full support for mouse, keyboard and joystick control configurations.

mac_games.title: Psychonauts 2
mac_games.description:
Razputin "Raz" Aquato, a professional acrobat and talented young psychic, has realized his long-time dream - he joined an international organization of psychic espionage called "Psychonauts"! But these psychic super-spies are in trouble. Their leader was kidnapped, and although he was rescued, he returned as a completely different person... Moreover, there are suspicions that there is a traitor in the headquarters. 

  Psychonauts 2 is a platformer about incredible psychic abilities and mysterious conspiracies, stylish, spectacular and with great humor. You have to lead your hero through the dangerous labyrinths of the minds of friends and enemies to defeat a cruel psychic villain. 

  You will experience a fascinating story from the legendary designer Tim Schafer (Grim Fandango, Brütal Legend, Broken Age) - unusual, action-packed and very funny. 

  Use Raz's powers to enter other people's minds. Fight their inner demons, seek out repressed memories, and help them cope with the burden of emotions. 

  Jump high into the air, walk on ropes and swing on trapezes to overcome a variety of challenging and exciting levels. 

  Use powerful psychic abilities to blast and burn enemies with the power of your mind. To solve puzzles, you will have to make objects levitate and even slow down the passage of time.

mac_games.title: XCOM 2 Collection
mac_games.description:
XCOM 2 is a sequel to the critically acclaimed strategy game XCOM: Enemy Unknown, which won the Game of the Year title in 2012. 

  Earth has changed. Twenty years have passed since world leaders signed an act of unconditional surrender to aliens. XCOM, Earth's last line of defense, has been destroyed, and its remnants are scattered across the globe. In XCOM 2, aliens rule the planet, building it with glittering cities and promising humanity a cloudless future. However, the aliens secretly hatch sinister plans and destroy all who refuse to live by the new rules. 

  Only those living on the fringes of the new world have retained some vestiges of freedom. They gather their strength to fight back against the invaders. Forced to constantly hide from an enemy that outnumbers them, former XCOM agents try to revive their organization, expose the occupiers, and destroy them once and for all. 

  XCOM UNDERGROUND: Take command of the Avenger, an alien transport ship converted into XCOM's mobile headquarters. The game's new open world gives you the freedom to choose where to strike, how to rally support from the populace, and when to launch special operations to disrupt ADVENT's plans. 

  RECRUIT RESISTANCE FIGHTERS: Five classes of fighters, each with their own unique talent tree, allow you to create squads of soldiers whose skills are best suited to the implementation of your tactical plans. 

  GUERRILLA TACTICS: New game mechanics will give you more freedom in battle. Use cover to ambush enemy patrols and loot the corpses of defeated opponents. Rescue VIPs and wounded comrades-in-arms, dragging them to the extraction zone. 

  A NEW GENERATION OF ENEMIES: A variety of enemies, from new advanced alien species to the ADVENT military, the new regime's enforcers, provide tactical diversity on the battlefield. 

  RESEARCH, CRAFT, AND UPGRADE: Design and build sections of your Avenger to gain an edge on the battlefield. Use your scientists and engineers to research, create, and upgrade weapons and armor that best suit your fighting style. 

  EVERY MISSION IS UNIQUE: Embark on missions all over the world, from the wilds to the heart of alien-controlled cities and the depths of enemy installations. There is a virtually endless variety of maps, missions and objectives to choose from. 

  CREATE YOUR OWN MODIFICATIONS: Special game tools allow players to create their own campaigns, tactical and strategic gameplay features, aliens and new soldier classes, and then share them with the gaming community via the Steam Workshop.

mac_games.title: Wonderbox: The Adventure Maker
mac_games.description:
Crafting and exploration are at the core of Wonderbox, a fast-paced adventure game set in beautiful dioramas. 

Explore this ever-expanding universe with friends and family and create and share your own adventures. 

  Seven Wonders of the Game: 

  1 – Adventures 

 Answer the call and set out for the purpose of your journey: to have fun! Prepare to set out on a path full of obstacles, enemies, jumps and puzzles. Every time you start the game, a new road of challenges opens between you and the heart of the adventure. Here, only the brave will succeed. 

  2 – Creator mode 

 Playing adventures is great, but what about creating your own? You have everything you need: blocks, characters, and objects. They have pre-set behaviors, and you can create entire adventures using the same tools and materials we use. Watch as blocks magically connect to create amazing structures. All you need to create environments, bring characters to life, hide treasures, place enemies, and design battles is your fingers. Give it a try! Publish your adventure and share it with friends and players around the world. Your creations may even make it into the Wonderbox Gallery. 

  3 – Cubes 

 This is the core of the game: carefully designed environments where adventures take place. The colorful graphics are sometimes breathtaking. But don’t relax – a cube with a serene sunset can be followed by night or a sandstorm. One cube after another forms an interconnected chain of landscapes to explore. Each one is unique, like a masterfully grown bonsai: small in form and huge in meaning. 

  4 – Heroes 

 Choose the hero you want to be. You will have many options to customize your character, and the number will only grow as you play and expand your collection. Collect the coolest, bravest, or even the weirdest hero for your journey. Travel through cubes, talk to villagers, cross portals, defeat enemies, and avoid danger. Wonderbox is about exploring, fighting, jumping, and problem solving. 

  5 – Obstacles 

 Some cubes are breathtaking. Others are a maze. Sometimes you need coins to buy a sword with which you will defeat a goblin, who will give you a key that will open a door through which you can finally escape. The treasure can be hidden under a simple tree, above it, in front of it or behind it - look for it yourself! Rotate the camera to explore every corner of the diorama. And be careful, because the obstacles are endless, as are the adventures. 

  6 – Squad mode 

 Multiply the fun! Up to four players can team up and go on an adventure together. Gather your tribe and cross the threshold. Even the darkest dungeon will be brighter when you have well-equipped family and friends with you. 

  7 – Soundtrack 

 Enjoy the chords of Eric Chevalier, composer of Rayman 2: The Great Escape. Every note in the soundtrack exists for a reason: it is meant to create the perfect atmosphere not only for the game, but also for playing the hero.

mac_games.title: Unforeseen Incidents
mac_games.description:
Unforeseen Incidents is a classic quest. The indie project has two-dimensional hand-drawn graphics. The character is controlled with a mouse. If you click on an object, the hero will comment or try to interact with it. Active objects can be highlighted to avoid pixel hunting. The protagonist has an inventory. 

   The story is divided into 4 chapters. The main character of Unforeseen Incidents is Harper Pendrell. He is a jack of all trades, but lives poorly because he is irresponsible and does not work anywhere. The events unfold in the United States around the end of the 20th century or the beginning of the 21st. One day, an epidemic of an unknown deadly disease similar to the plague occurs in this country. By chance, the fate of the entire state will depend on this man.  

  The electrical engineer will visit Yelltown and the city of Port Nikola, and will also look into the National Park and explore other places. He will be assisted by a female journalist and an elderly scientist. The loser hero has a Swiss knife with him, which he actively uses when solving puzzles. The puzzles here are mostly logical. The complexity of the puzzles increases gradually. There are also many dialogues. When communicating with NPCs, you need to choose the right lines. The game has a map that allows you to quickly move between locations.

mac_games.title: Trine 3: The Artifacts of Power
mac_games.description:
A grand adventure with complex and exciting levels will be the best test of the ingenuity and combat skills of three heroes, who will have to show miracles of resourcefulness and solve many puzzles. 

  Trine 3: Artifacts of Power is a magical, dangerous journey of three heroes: the wizard Amadeus, the knight Pontius and the thief Zoe. The heroes are familiar to us from the popular previous parts of the series - Trine and Trine 2. Join their new adventure, which for the first time takes place in a fully three-dimensional world! 

  The heroes attempted to return their supernatural powers back to the artifact known as Trine, but the task proved too much for them and the artifact was destroyed. Now the heartless (literally) ancient mage has broken free, and our heroes are forced to clean up the mess they themselves have made... or will make. 

  The wizard Amadeus, the knight Pontius and the thief Zoya eventually came to the logical conclusion that the concept of the paradigm of their existence, empirically dependent on a powerful magical artifact, contradicts their conceptual autogenesis vision of their own existence.

mac_games.title: Pathfinder: Kingmaker
mac_games.description:
Pathfinder Kingmaker is an adventure game that will take you to a fantasy world where you will fight your rivals and try to gain dominance. 

  You control a team of four people, each with their own distinctive features and characteristics. Together you will set off on adventures, solving world secrets and completing numerous missions. 

  There will be more than enough goals, and achieving them will not be so easy if you do not develop skills and improve abilities. You will be able to visit dozens of different locations, as well as conduct fierce battles in a multi-level dungeon covered with a dark shroud. You will have a unique opportunity to be in the role of the ruler of all these lands, taking control of all aspects of activity and trying to develop them in every possible way. 

  The developers presented their brainchild as a classic role-playing game, which will definitely appeal to all fans of the genre. The graphics in the game are excellently executed, there is also a fascinating plot line with unexpected turns of events, and the whole atmosphere is greatly complemented by sound and music. Tactical skills will also be useful to you, because all your actions must be thought out in advance in order to succeed in a difficult task. 

  The Imperial Edition includes: 

  Premium downloadable version of the game. Contains 2 in-game items that will help the beginning adventurer (signet, which allows blessing the party several times a day and belt, which has a bonus to resistance to diseases and fatigue). Premium in-game items do not spoil the balance of the game. 

  Two additional portraits. Images of a fearless warrior from Cheliax and a skilled elven mage will complement the gallery of portraits available when creating a character. 

  Digital ArtBook. 176 pages of sketches of characters, monsters, objects and the game world, lovingly selected by our artists. 

  Official Soundtrack. Contains the full set of game music, inspired by the title theme and other compositions by Inon Zur. 

  A digital tabletop adventure module. This module was created from scratch by game designer Chris Avellone with the help of experts from Paizo as a thank you to the entire RPG community and the Pathfinder universe for their support and inspiration during the development of the game. 

  A high-resolution digital map of the Stolen Lands. This detailed map can be used as desktop wallpaper or as a guide to navigating the dangerous and unknown territories of the Stolen Lands. 

  Red Panda: Not only does this pet greet its owner by standing on its hind legs, it will also increase your resistance to negative effects. 

  Season Pass. With the Season Pass, you'll automatically gain access to the first three DLC packs. These add-ons expand the world of the Stolen Lands and add new companions, locations, quests, items, and most importantly, new emotions.

mac_games.title: Sniper Elite: Nazi Zombie Army 2
mac_games.description: Europe during World War II has been overrun by legions of the undead. You must save humanity by seizing the sacred artifacts that unleashed this curse, hidden somewhere in the twisted depths of Berlin. Together, players push against all odds into the demon-infested city and eventually the Führer’s terrifying bunker itself, with every step costing blood./n/n    Take on the campaign in online co-op with up to four players, or if you're feeling adventurous, tackle the twisted missions solo. /n/n   With new enemies, new levels, terrifying surprises and the return of the infamous X-ray "kill cam", Sniper Elite: Nazi Zombie Army 2 will satisfy even the most bloodthirsty zombie hunters.   /n/n Experience the signature adrenaline-fueled sniper combat and co-op team play that made Nazi Zombie Army a Steam bestseller./n Enjoy the slow-motion action of bullets ripping through the putrid entrails of legions of undead! The X-ray kill cam is back! Survive/n against the odds in battles with countless hordes using traps, explosives, and powerful new machine gun turrets! /n/n   MORE THRILLS! MORE BLOOD!/n/n  New grotesque enemies, effects and tense cinematic inserts will make you jump away from the monitor!/n Immerse yourself in a completely new Carpenter-style soundtrack in the best traditions of horror-slashers./n

mac_games.title: Beautiful Desolation
mac_games.description:
BEAUTIFUL DESOLATION is a 2D isometric adventure game set in the distant future. 

Explore post-apocalyptic landscapes, solve puzzles, make new friends and powerful enemies, mediate conflicts, and fight for your life to unravel the mysteries of the world around you. 

  Mark, a man out of time, searches for his lost brother Don in a distant futuristic era where highly advanced technology reigns, both revered and reviled. 

  The world around you contains echoes of past devastation and fleeting glimpses of a dark future that your actions have not yet created. Be prepared to make many difficult decisions that will have a decisive impact on these lands long after you have completed your journey. 

  The inhabitants of this world will help and hinder you on your journey as you make new discoveries and navigate through a stunning African-inspired landscape. Negotiate for passage with local leaders, healers, and warriors, or engage in battles against swarms of nanites, giant scorpions, and missile-wielding robots. 

  From thriving villages to decaying cities, from petrified forests to dried-up ocean floors, this strange new world features a wide variety of terrain, all beautifully rendered in 2D isometric art. 

  The music is masterfully crafted by composer Mick Gordon, known for his scores for Wolfenstein®, DOOM®, Prey®, Killer Instinct® and Need for Speed®.

mac_games.title: Pillars of Eternity: Definitive Edition
mac_games.description:
Pillars of Eternity - Meet a world where every action and choice you make affects the fate of your heroes. 

Obsidian Entertainment, the studio behind Fallout: New Vegas™ and South Park: The Stick of Truth™, and Paradox Interactive are proud to present you with Pillars of Eternity. 

  You will once again experience the joy of exploration and adventure, that unforgettable excitement when you lead a party of companions through an unknown fantasy world - forward, into dungeons full of monsters, treasures and ancient secrets. 

So gather your party and set off on a journey - towards adventure, into a world of wonder and nostalgia, into the exciting world of classic RPGs - together with Pillars of Eternity from Obsidian! 

  Key Features: 

  Play as any of the six available races: humans, aumaua, dwarves, elves, godlikes and orlans. 

  Five basic skills will help you get out of any trouble: Stealth, Athletics, Knowledge, Mechanics and Survival. 

  Deep character customization and development – you can choose from eleven classes: Barbarian, Chanter, Cypher, Druid, Fighter, Monk, Paladin, Priest, Ranger, Adventurer, and Wizard. 

  Create your own story: interact with different communities and groups using the reputation system, and remember: your actions determine how you will be treated. 

  Explore a vast and diverse world: beautifully rendered backgrounds, a fascinating story and characters - all this makes the game world truly alive.

mac_games.title: In Silence
mac_games.description:
Ah, got it! Here's the text with actual line breaks included where I inserted them, so you can see the formatting clearly: 

  Silence is designed to provide a different online horror experience.
 You can hunt everyone using your superior sensory abilities by controlling a super-sensitive monster, or you can be a player who plans to deal with this situation by using our 3D voice chat system and communicating with other players who want to survive.
 Moreover, there is no need to run away only ... Also, you can hunt it.

  Blind monster... Rake!
 A monster whose vision in silence has deteriorated, but in places with a loud voice, his vision has improved, he can hear the breath you take from hundreds of meters away, who can run a long distance in a matter of seconds, who can smash in a few seconds when he catches his hunt, who is silent as well as smart... It is not difficult to guess what the Rake can do in smart hands.

  Shh... Be calm, my friend!
 That heartbeat of facing a monster after a step you take, a toy you step on, or a vase you break... Maybe that's what you want? Because you can use the voices to your advantage. You can leave the TV on and run away, leave the radio you find at the bottom of the trap...

  Escape or hunt!
 As a Survivor, you have two options. To escape, you can find the missing parts of the car and fix it, or open the secret armory to solve the mystery in the game and hunt down the monster.

  Where am I?
 Every episode you play will not be the same. Your privileges, exit points, item locations, various responsibilities, etc. will change with each game. You will never feel comfortable, and you will never know what might happen.

mac_games.title: Darkwood
mac_games.description:
Darkwood will change your perception of the survival horror genre. 

  Explore a rich, fluid open world during the day, and at night, hide in your shelter and pray for morning to come. 

  Peculiarities: 

 Top-down survival horror game that is truly scary to play. 

 During the day, explore the randomly generated, eerie forest, gather materials, craft weapons, and solve mysteries. 

 At night, find shelter, build barricades, set traps, hide or protect yourself from the horrors of the night. 

 Make an unusual essence from what you find in the local flora and fauna and gain positive or negative abilities by injecting yourself. Be prepared for unexpected consequences... 

 Make decisions that will impact the world of Darkwood, its inhabitants, and create your own storyline. 

 You will meet terrifying characters, learn their past, and decide their fates. The main thing to remember is that you can't trust anyone. 

 Over time, the line between reality and nightmares will begin to blur. Are you ready to dive into the world of Darkwood?

mac_games.title: Justin Wack and the Big Time Hack
mac_games.description:
Justin Wack and the Big Time Hack is a story of heroes out of their element, lost loves, and hostile agents hunting down unauthorized time travelers! 

  While slacking off at work and missing his ex-girlfriend Julia, something strange is about to happen to Justin... 

  Two gentlemen are about to switch places in time... 

  Agents from the future got wind of unauthorized time travel... 

  Meanwhile, Julia decided to move on with her life...

mac_games.title: Thronefall
mac_games.description:
Saddle up your horses! See your kingdom come to life, fight exciting battles to protect it, and finish in time for dinner.  

  With Thronefall, we tried to remove all unnecessary complexity from the classic strategy game, combining it with a lot of hacking and combat. Build your base during the day, defend it to your last breath at night. 

   Will you be able to find the right balance between economy and defense? Do you need more archers, thicker walls, or an extra mill? Will you hold your enemies at bay with a longbow or ride into their ranks on horseback? You'll have a tough night ahead, but there's nothing better than seeing the sun rise over your little kingdom, ready to live another day.

mac_games.title: The Wandering Village
mac_games.description:
In a world overrun by mysterious plants that spread poisonous spores, a small group of survivors find salvation on the back of a massive, world-moving creature known as Onbu. 

  Become their leader, build your own settlement and establish relations with Onbu. Only in this way will you be able to survive in this inhospitable, but so beautiful post-apocalyptic world. 

  My own village 

 An efficiently functioning village is the basis for survival. Build it on the back of Onbu, think through the production chains and use the limited space wisely. Create a society that fears nothing. 

  Life on someone else's back 

 Living on the back of another living creature comes with many challenges. Will you build a trusting relationship with Onbu to satisfy everyone's needs, including the giant creature's? Or will you become a parasite who values ​​only human life? The choice is yours. 

  Exploring Biomes 

 As you travel, you will have to constantly adapt to the changing conditions of different biomes, each with its own climate, opportunities, and dangers. Explore the world around you, sending squads in search of rare resources and ancient artifacts. 

  Research of new technologies 

 The remains of the old world still contain almost forgotten knowledge. It is up to your inhabitants to extract it. This way you will be able to research useful technologies, but use them wisely, because progress can be a double-edged sword. 

  Survival in the wasteland 

 The game will feature toxic spores, harsh weather conditions, blood-sucking parasites and many other obstacles. It would seem that the whole world is against you. Will you be able to survive and take care of the others?

mac_games.title: Deus Ex: Mankind Divided
mac_games.description: The events of the futuristic stealth action Deus Ex: Mankind Divided take place in an alternative future, where humanity is divided into two camps. On one side are ordinary people, on the other - people who have resorted to mechanical augmentations to improve their bodies and gain new superhuman abilities. The latter were rejected by the former and turned into outcasts, forced to survive under the yoke of the "pure"./n/n  The hero of the game is a certain Adam Jensen - a man whose body is half made up of perfect prostheses and modules. According to the plot, the protagonist joins the resistance movement and becomes a secret agent whose task is to get as close as possible to the enemy in the person of a megacorporation and uncover an impressive global conspiracy./n/n  The game is positioned as a stealth action, conceptually focused on covert passage. However, the player is not prohibited from completing missions, so to speak, straight ahead, that is, in the open. Compared to Deus Ex: Human Revolution, the AI ​​of opponents in Mankind Divided has become much better, and the protagonist's arsenal has been replenished with new capabilities, in particular, with the help of a special module, Jensen can scan opponents and hack electronics from a distance./n/n  True connoisseurs of stealth play risk not getting a flip-out nanoblade and a set of subcutaneous armor "Titan". These two improvements were created specifically for open battles. Implants allow the player to make Adam Jensen a fighter for his style of play. All the same fans of the correct playthrough will be able to attach a built-in shock gun "Tesla" to the protagonist's body, with the help of which, after a series of improvements, you can disable up to four opponents.

mac_games.title: For The King
mac_games.description:
The king is dead, killed by an unknown assailant. And now the once peaceful kingdom of Farul is plunged into chaos. 

  With no options left and her treasury empty, the Queen turns to her subjects to help hold back the approaching doomstorm. Embark on a journey with an impromptu group, either solo or in local or online co-op. Split your group to claim territory, or stick together for defense. A well-thought-out strategy can be the difference between survival and survival. 

  For The King is a fascinating mix of strategy, JRPG, and roguelike elements. Each game is unique thanks to procedurally generated maps, quests, and events. Look cruelty in the eye, fight evil creatures, sail the seas and dive into the dark underworld. None of those who set out on the journey before you have returned. Can you put an end to the Chaos? 

  Fight and die as a group in dynamic and brutal turn-based combat, using a unique slot system for attacks and special abilities. Find and collect herbs for the good old pipe that will heal wounds and cure diseases. Set up a safe camp or face the horrors that come at night. 

  Remember, adventurer, you do this not for wealth and glory, but for your country and for the King - For The King! 

  A turn-based combat system with roguelike elements that allows you to join forces with your team of adventurers or split up to explore areas more effectively. 

 Online and local multiplayer mode, which can be played by one to three players at a time. 

 Procedural map generation ensures that the gaming experience remains unique no matter how much you play. 

 Take a risk and journey through the snowy wasteland where new weapons, armor, enemies, and much more await you!

mac_games.title: Neverwinter Nights: Enhanced Edition
mac_games.description:
Here’s your text with the appropriate line breaks added:  Neverwinter Nights Enhanced Edition is an updated computer project that belongs to the genre of isometric role-playing game, where you will find a lot of improvements and opportunities for the main character. The interface has also undergone changes, where you can independently take on the creation of your own character, giving him certain character traits and external data. 

  The graphic component has also undergone significant improvements, where you will now plunge into a more colorful and thoughtful world, with pleasant animation and a variety of heroes. In order to improve the visualization, you are given a unique opportunity to connect additional effects. 

  You are going to the world of fantasy and magic, where you will fight with the most insidious and fearless opponents who will constantly appear on the way and will not allow you to achieve your goal. There will also be a lot of dialogues with those you meet in this amazing world. Each hero will affect you in one way or another, so be careful in choosing your actions, because one mistake can lead to unexpected and even sad consequences. 

  Return to the Forgotten Realms in this best-selling Dungeons & Dragons RPG. The Enhanced Edition includes everything from the Neverwinter Nights Diamond Edition plus brand new features never seen before. It gives you over 100+ hours of award-winning adventures and the tools to create them yourself!

mac_games.title: Transport Fever 2
mac_games.description:
Transport Fever 2 is the new gold standard in the genre of transport simulators. Explore a new world, moving on land, water, and air. Long live progress and prosperity! 

  Provide the world with transportation infrastructure and get rich by providing special transportation services. Your trains will run on the railways, buses and trucks will roll on the highways, ships will sail the seas and planes will soar in the skies. Help people get to work and play, and make cities prosper because of you. Deliver raw materials and goods needed to develop the economy. Challenge the greatest logistical problems from 1850 to the present day and build a transportation empire that has no equal! 

  Experience unlimited creative possibilities in Free Play mode and rewrite the transport history of three continents in Campaign mode. Transport Fever 2 offers a choice of over 200 vehicles from Europe, America, and Asia, modeled with incredible attention to detail. With the help of the game map editor, you can recreate landscapes from three different climate zones. Finally, the gameplay is complemented by realistic transport and economic simulation and comprehensive modding support. 

  Discover the world 
 A vast game world awaits your railroads, cars, planes, and ships. Intuitive interactive railroad building tools and a modular station building system make it easy to build and expand your transportation empire. With a huge number of configuration options, each Freemode game is full of new challenges that require a different approach. 

  Write the history of transport 
 Three historical campaigns in different time periods on three different continents - each with its own objectives... Only real transport magnates will be able to complete all the missions. Voiceovers and videos enrich the story and complement the exciting gameplay. The Free Play mode is full of achievements for you to unlock. 

  Optimize your infrastructure 
 You will have to adapt the company to the needs of the economy and cities. Bridges, tunnels, interchanges, railway signals, one-way streets, traffic lights, and bus lanes are just some of the things you can use to optimize the transport infrastructure. Even train stations and airports can be expanded with modules for different needs, and various information screens will help visualize traffic and pollution volumes and provide information for further improvements. 

  Unleash your creativity 
 With an incredibly detailed game world, you can create your own virtual railway network. The map editor allows you to create countless worlds, paint and modify their landscape. Mod support means you will always have access to new maps, which are completely free to get from the Steam Workshop.

mac_games.title: Slime Rancher
mac_games.description:
Slime Rancher is a charming first-person experience set in an experimental environment. Become Beatrix LeBeau, a brave young farmer who decides to spend the rest of her life on the planet of the Endless Beyond, thousands of light years from Earth. 

  Each day brings new challenges and risky opportunities as you try to make a fortune in the slime farming business. Collect colorful slimes, grow crops, mine resources, and explore the wilds with the mastery of your multi-functional backpack vacuum cleaner. 

  The famous farmer Hobson Twillgers has given you his farm. Bring it into order, reveal the secrets hidden on this mysterious planet and learn how to make money on the plort market. 

  Grow crops and breed chickies to feed your hungry slimes. 
  Complete daily requests from other farmers to earn extra rewards. 
  Earn money to upgrade your backpack vacuum cleaner, build more pens or expand your farm. 
  Use Slime Science to find rare resources, create decorations and devices that will help you in your adventures. 
  Explore a rapidly evolving world full of secrets and hidden treasures. 

  Slime Features: 

  Choose from three game modes: Adventure, Casual, and Race 
 Get creative and crossbreed slimes into over 150 types of hybrid slimes 
 Take advantage of our full gamepad support if you think keys are made for music, not games.

mac_games.title: Fetish Locator
mac_games.description:
Play as a young college student exploring love, lust and sexual fetishes with the hottest women in town. Score points in the Fetish Locator app that has taken over the campus. Make choices and decide the fate of the story in Fetish Locator! 

   As you progress through the story, you will meet a variety of girls! Many of them also use the Fetish Locator app, and perhaps you will be able to convince them to help you with your problems. Which of them do you like the most? 

   The Fetish Locator app is an in-game app that encourages users to submit photos of themselves doing what it calls the "fetish of the day"! The points you collect can earn you rewards, like an invite to a wild fetish party. How many points can you get?  

  The storyline is entirely dependent on the choices you make throughout the game. In one playthrough, you might get to know some of the girls very well. In the next, you might not even talk to them. There are many possibilities, but can you reach every ending?  

  Experience the best sex scenes you've ever seen! And the best part: you'll be able to explore multiple fetishes, such as exhibitionism, domination, cuckold, blindfold sex, watersports, and more!

    You will have the opportunity to attend a fetish party full of sexy events and even sexier women! Which events will you choose to attend?

mac_games.title: Yaga
mac_games.description:
Yaga is a side-scrolling action RPG set in a fantasy setting, based on Slavic mythology. The main character is a one-armed blacksmith named Ivan, who suffers from a terrible curse - bad luck. 

  Firstly, the hero serves the Tsar, who constantly gives Ivan impossible tasks. Secondly, Baba Yaga wants to manipulate the blacksmith. And thirdly, Ivan is pestered by his grandmother, who asks him to marry. Ivan can create prostheses with different properties for himself. The hero will have to meet many different creatures from Slavic myths: field spirits, spirits, house spirits, Morozko, etc. The hero will also have to watch his reputation. It determines how other characters will treat him. 

  Play as Ivan, an incredibly unlucky one-armed blacksmith who must complete impossible tasks given to him by the Tsar. Meanwhile, the mysterious witch Baba Yaga watches over Ivan's fate. 

  Conquer and defeat the murderous legends of Slavic mythology in this darkly funny RPG that changes every time you play. Play as Ivan, an incredibly unlucky one-armed blacksmith who must complete impossible tasks given to him by the Tsar. Meanwhile, the mysterious witch Baba Yaga watches over Ivan's fate. 

  The World of Yaga is a world steeped in Slavic folklore and ancient pagan beliefs. Featuring a stunning Romanian hip-hop soundtrack from Subcarpați and vibrant hand-drawn 2D art, Yaga is a true love letter to children's fables from Romanian indie developer Breadcrumbs Interactive. 

  Defeat the ancient monsters of Slavic folklore using a huge arsenal of hammers and tools forged by Ivan's own hands. 

  Your decisions change Ivan's story, his reputation, and the upgrades he can choose. 

  Experiment with the deep forging system to create weapons like teleporting glowing hammers and pitchforks with hook shots. 

  Explore combinations of talismans, magic items, blessings, perks, and curses to radically change the way Ivan plays. 

  Multiple endings, multiple ways to solve encounters, a procedural map, many characters to encounter and hidden secrets - all this means that Yaga will make you want to play again and again. 

  Ivan's grandmother just wants him to find a wife. Don't disappoint her!

mac_games.title: Light Fall
mac_games.description:
Explore the lost world of Numbra to uncover your mysterious past and save the land and its inhabitants from an impending threat. In this land of eternal night, you will rely on the Heart of Shadows to overcome many challenges and crush the enemies that stand in your way. Will you be able to survive in the dangerous Numbra? 

   Control the Heart of Shadows and use it at your discretion to bypass obstacles in the game. You can place this magical box under your feet to jump into the air and move forward at your own pace. With the Heart of Shadows, you become the master of the situation and pave your own path.  

  Install Light Fall and dive into this mysterious universe where darkness reigns over light. In this adventure, you will be joined by Strix, an old and grumpy owl, who will act as your companion and the game's narrator. Depending on his mood, he will either give useful advice or make fun of your failures.

mac_games.title: Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous
mac_games.description:
Pathfinder: Wrath of the Righteous is an isometric role-playing game that takes us on incredible adventures and dynamic conquests. Here, the player will play the role of a brave and fearless warrior who will put all his strength and power to destroy evil. The plot line will tell about terrible demonic creatures that arrived from another world with the purpose of destruction. 

  The planet was under threat and only a few were able to cope with this problem. There were brave warriors who decided to return their lands to their former prosperity and safety at any cost, but, as it turned out, it would be very difficult to do. 

  Set out to conquer numerous lands, explore locations, extract valuable resources and fill your combat arsenal with powerful weapons. Be on guard, because the enemy is not asleep and is ready to enter into a merciless battle at any moment, which you will be able to win only with the proper level of skills. This means that your character needs to be constantly modified, increasing the rank and learning new techniques of fighting the opponent. It is also worth remembering that any decision made and action taken will have consequences, so try not to make mistakes. Show your strength to the fullest and exterminate everyone who dared to take the demonic side. 

  Discover the history of the Crusades 

  Dare to step into the wastelands of the Worldscathe, where a rift between worlds has opened up, unleashing the all-consuming horror of the Abyss. For over a century, neighboring nations have fought valiantly to drive back the demonic hordes, but to no avail. 

  Now you have the chance to end this war once and for all, but the path to victory is shrouded in uncertainty. Will you become a shining angel, supported by noble paladins? A powerful necromancer, master of hordes of immortal undead? Or perhaps someone else entirely? Lead your army and challenge the mighty demon lords. Your crusade will set in motion a chain of events that will change you—and the world—forever. 

  YOUR HERO, YOUR RULES 

  Use an arsenal of 25 classes, 12 races, and over a thousand spells, unique traits, and abilities to create the character of your dreams using the flexibility, richness, and depth of the Pathfinder RPG ruleset. 

  THE WEIGHT OF EVERY CHOICE 

  All your decisions carry more weight than ever before. Who will die and who will live? Who will stay and who will go? Make your choice and watch how the world around you changes. 

  A NEW APPROACH TO BATTLES 

  Destroy your enemies using two combat modes: real-time with pause or turn-based. Switch between them on the fly, so you can always approach the battle tactically, or rush into the thick of the battle with lightning speed. The Pathfinder ruleset allows you to use advanced combat maneuvers both on foot and astride your trusty steed. Use them wisely! 

  ASSEMBLE YOUR SQUAD 

  Over 10 unique companions are ready to join your cause. Earn their trust and respect, and they will become your reliable support, no matter what dangers lie in wait for you ahead. And if your relationship does not work out, well... Perhaps it is time to part ways. 

  LEAD THE CRUSADE 

  A single band of adventurers cannot cleanse the land of demonic evil - it takes an army to defeat an army. Take command of the Crusaders and lead them to victory - both as a strategist, directing the battle from a bird's eye view, and as a field commander in the new tactical battle mode. 

  CHOOSE YOUR PATH 

  Unlock nine unique mythic paths: gain extraordinary abilities and determine everything that happens next. Your decisions can transform you into a righteous Angel, a furious Demon, a dark Lich, a cunning Trickster, a mysterious Aeon, a rebellious Azata, a wise Golden Dragon, a voracious Striding Swarm - or remain mortal and embark on the difficult path to becoming a living Legend.

mac_games.title: Helping the Hotties
mac_games.description:
You're a psychology student ready to finally spend the summer with your super hot girlfriend. But instead of spending the summer with her, you get an unexpected phone call...  

  The next morning, you take the bus to work at a behavioral rehabilitation camp. And, as you soon learn, this year will be different from the previous ones...  

  Your job is to guide a group of four beautiful girls on a path of self-improvement and reintegration into society, while trying to remain as professional as possible... and maintain a long-distance relationship.  

  This may be more difficult than you expected. Each girl has her own character, her own whims and desires, and their satisfaction depends only on you.  

  Will you be able to cope with this task, under the watchful eye of the camp leader, Eva? She has her eyes on you. And she is not the only one!  

  You will have a lot of fun getting to know the beautiful inhabitants of the camp, who will surprise you at every step.  

  Peculiarities:  

  Full English voice acting for each girl 
  Delightful images 
  Provocative and seductive animation 
  Exciting music and sound effects 
  Hidden collectibles 
  Tasks and Achievements 
  And plenty of room for your imagination

mac_games.title: ENCODYA
mac_games.description:
Neo Berlin, 2062. Nine-year-old orphan Tina and SAM-53, a huge, clumsy robot bodyguard, live in a makeshift rooftop house. Their home is located in Neo Berlin, a scary metropolis run by corporations. Tina is a child of the urban jungle. She has learned to survive alone, rummaging through the city's garbage dumps and barely making ends meet. A funny robot, programmed to protect the girl, accompanies her everywhere.  

  One day, the girl learns that her father has entrusted her with an important task: to complete his plan and save the world from dullness! Tina and SAM set off on amazing adventures in worlds inhabited by strange robots and grotesque humanoid creatures. Solving puzzles and engaging in fascinating dialogues, our heroes will understand what it means to be alive.  

  Set in a dystopian future, ENCODYA is a point-and-click adventure that combines the charm and creativity of Studio Ghibli with the atmosphere of Blade Runner and the playful humor of Monkey Island.  

  Game Features:  

  Explore the dark cyberpunk world of ENCODYA in a pseudo-3D game with two playable characters. 

  Over 34 NPCs populate the world of ENCODYA and drive the story forward. 

  Over 100 places to explore. 

  Some puzzles are randomized to make each playthrough unique. 

  Interesting video scenes. 

  Amazing graphics and sound. 

  An original soundtrack that creates atmosphere.

mac_games.title: Jenny LeClue - Detectivu
mac_games.description:
Jenny LeClue is a gripping coming-of-age mystery adventure set in the sleepy town of Arthurton, featuring a cast of memorable, complex characters and a unique aesthetic.  

  Make your choices and shape the meta-statement. You not only choose Jenny's path, deciding her fate, but also help her unravel a complex tangle of mysteries. Under your skillful guidance, she will become the detective she is destined to be.  

  Jenny is faced with a lot of problems: her mother is accused of murder. The girl has to go in search of the truth.  

  Soon Jenny discovers that idyllic Arthurton is not as peaceful as it seems at first glance, and invisible forces will do everything to prevent her from learning the truth. She will need all the powers of deduction to find the real killer and clear her mother's name.  

  A tiny heroine sets out on a long journey to fight for justice:  

  Jenny is a brilliant young detective; attentive, perceptive, and a tireless seeker of truth. During dialogues, she can look around to take a closer look at her interlocutor and find evidence of guilt or innocence that cannot be discovered in any other way.  

  A beautiful hand-drawn world full of secrets:  

  An interesting and beautiful world, drawn in vintage mid-20th century aesthetics and filled with mysteries. There are a huge number of objects to interact with. Players who like to check all the objects will make many discoveries, uncover secrets, and hear funny jokes.  

  A story within a story where your choices matter:  

  Jenny LeClue's gripping meta-narrative explores themes of family, loss, and identity. The "author" of Jenny's adventures, Arthur K. Finklestein, is present in the game as a narrator and guide. His presence allows you to choose where Jenny's story goes. Your choices may even impact Finklestein's own life.  

  Variety of characters and locations:  

  Explore Arthurton: you will descend into abandoned mines, wander through a forgotten cemetery, visit Lake Nowhere and the Humboldt Library. Jenny will meet many mysterious and suspicious characters who can help or hinder her in getting to the truth.

mac_games.title: Röki
mac_games.description:
Inspired by Scandinavian folklore, Röki is a dark modern fairy tale that will delight you with its touching storyline, charming graphics, mysterious puzzles, and exciting exploration.  

  You and Tova are in for a magical adventure to save her family. You will go to a secret and long-forgotten world of fairy tales and myths, whose bizarre lands are inhabited by no less bizarre creatures.  

  Explore ancient wilderness, uncover secrets, and save your family in a modern adventure that will appeal to every player.  

  Explore a vibrant fairytale forest  

  Join Tova in exploring the rich and enchanting world of winter fairy tales and Scandinavian myths, brought to life by the game's unique graphics.  

  Make friends among monsters  

  In the wild Scandinavian lands, you will meet many ancient magical creatures - friendly and not so friendly! Röki is full of creepy but cute creatures that will introduce you to Nordic folklore.  

  Look for long forgotten items  

  The ancient wild lands hold many secrets and lost items that will help you on your adventure.  

  Solve the mysteries of the wild  

  In Röki, wits are more important than brute force, because only with their help you will be able to open ancient passages and find answers to riddles.  

  Plan your routes  

  Tovah records every aspect of her journey in her beloved journal. You can discover uncharted regions, collect finds, earn unique wilderness explorer badges, and delve deeper into the rich world of Scandinavian folklore.  

  Enjoy the game  

  Röki is an adventure for absolutely all players. Non-combat gameplay, simple controls and clear motives will appeal to everyone. You will face many challenges. If it gets too difficult, the game itself will help you move on. Therefore, Röki, with its truly modern take on the adventure genre, will appeal to both experienced players and beginners.

mac_games.title: Papetura
mac_games.description:
Papetura is an atmospheric adventure made entirely of paper.  

  This is a game set in a mysterious and unusual paper world, shrouded in shadow with flashes of light, with music written by Floex.  

  Story  

  Papetura tells the story of Pape, a paper boy who is imprisoned in a flower prison. One day, he escapes and meets little Tura, a magical creature, whom he begins to care for. Together, they will fight back against dark fire monsters who want to burn down their beloved paper world.  

  Peculiarities  

  An unusual adventure in the quest genre, 
  A world where everything is made of paper: insects, strange creatures, monsters, and truly magical locations, 
  Atmospheric and memorable music by Floex (Thomas Dvorak), 
  Riddles seamlessly woven into the story and world of the game, 
  A story told without a single word through animation and strange sounds.

mac_games.title: Phoenix Point
mac_games.description:
The famous strategy Phoenix Point from the creator of X-COM is now released in a complete edition, which includes all add-ons, content updates, and game improvements for all four years of development. Now with a support mod!  

  Earth has been invaded. A mutated alien threat is putting the last of humanity at risk. Only the Phoenix Project, a secret organization of the best scientists and bravest soldiers, can repel the attack and prevent the inevitable. They await your instructions. Discover and develop new technologies, explore the devastated world, build bases, manage resources, and dominate the battlefield.  

  Remember. You are not alone. Factions, including the corporatist New Jericho, the hesitant Sanhedrin, the fanatical Followers of Anu, and a host of subfactions, all have their own values, goals, and visions for the fate of the Pandorans. Cooperate with organizations through the diplomacy system, use subterfuge to steal what you need, or simply take it all by force. No matter which path you choose, victory will not be easy. The full version of Phoenix Point brings together the best of everything.  

  Game Features:  

  A sea of ​​content. The full version of Phoenix Point includes all 6 released add-ons: Living Weapon, Blood and Titan, Legacy of the Ancients, Festering Sky, Horizons of Corruption and Engines of Kaos. In addition, updates, improvements and new content from our community.  

  The Steam Workshop supports subscribing and enabling mods from the modding community to customize the game, as well as the official mod for creating new campaigns.  

  Mutation of the Alien Threat: Fight aliens that constantly adapt to your tactics. They give you no respite, even as your team becomes stronger and more technologically advanced.  

  The Secret of the Pandorans. Interact with a complex storyline, with multiple endings that can only be unlocked through repeated playthroughs. Explore and uncover the mysteries of the story as you learn about the origins of mutants, the pandoravirus, and the creation of the Phoenix Project itself.  

  Diplomatic Relations: The Phoenix Project isn't the only organization trying to liberate Earth. The military faction New Jericho, the mysterious Disciples of Anu, and the technophile Sanhedrin will offer you unique rewards for cooperation and threaten you if you refuse. But it's up to you to decide how and why to engage with them.  

  Aiming on the battlefield. In Phoenix Point, you can not only equip and command units, but also directly control the soldier's shots in battle using a unique free aiming system. Aim at weak points, weapons, valuable items, or just the body of your opponents.  

  Next-gen technology with a classic pedigree. Designed by Julian Gollop, who created the X-COM series in the 1990s, Phoenix Point is the best game in its class, preserving the spirit of X-COM while updating the visuals, technology, and systems to modern standards.

mac_games.title: Kentucky Route Zero
mac_games.description: As dusk falls in Kentucky, the birdsong gives way to a chorus of frogs and insects, familiar roads become less familiar, and it's easy to get lost. And those who are already lost may find themselves on a secret highway that runs through a system of underground caves. The people who live and work along this road seem a little strange at first, but you soon get used to them - an aging delivery guy delivering the last order for a closing antique store, a girl who repairs old televisions surrounded by ghosts, a boy and his giant eagle friend, robot musicians, an invisible but invisibly watching power company, and small communities living out their days, struggling with their own extinction.   \n\n  Kentucky Route Zero is a five-act magical realism game featuring a haunting electronic score, as well as a set of anthems and bluegrass tunes from The Bedquilt Ramblers. It's a story about unpaid debts, an impossible future, and people searching for a place in society. The game's gorgeous visuals are inspired by theater, film, and experimental electronic art as much as the history of video games.

mac_games.title: Haven Park
mac_games.description: Haven Park is a game that is an exciting adventure where we have to go to a colorful world. Play the role of the main character, who has an important task: to review and, if possible, develop his grandmother's park. At first glance, the mission may seem simple, but as soon as you start it, you will understand that this is far from the case. Explore the environment, study numerous locations, and then improve them, taking care of the future comfort of visitors. As you develop, discover new opportunities and do not forget to improve your skills, which will allow you to cope with more global and complex tasks. The overall atmosphere in the game is positive, and the gameplay is dynamic, so we will definitely not have time to get bored. Each new day is a new task where you will need to make the most correct decisions, which always have consequences. Pass all the tests, modify the park territory and do everything to achieve success.

mac_games.title: Total War: SHOGUN 2
mac_games.description:
LEARN THE ART OF WAR  

  In Japan's dark age, endless war tears the country apart. It is the mid-16th century in Feudal Japan. The country, once ruled by a single government, is now divided into many warring clans. Ten legendary generals struggle for power, their conspiracies and conflicts tearing the state apart. But only one will rise above them all and become the new shogun - the sole ruler of the empire... The rest will fall by his sword.  

  Take on the title of Daimyo, the leader of a clan, and use military might, economics, and diplomacy to achieve your ultimate goal: to unite Japan under your command and become the new Shogun - the undisputed ruler of a nation united by peace.  

  Game Features:  

  Total War: SHOGUN 2 features both the massive, detailed 3D battles that made the series' name, as well as the tactical campaign map that many consider to be the heart and soul of Total War. In creating the new AI system for Total War: SHOGUN 2, Creative Assembly took inspiration from the text that dictated all Japanese warfare, Sun Tzu's legendary Art of War. By carefully studying ancient writings, Creative Assembly has helped create a tactical gameplay experience unlike any other.  

  CONQUER the islands of 16th century Japan. Lead vast armies of samurai and fleets of gigantic warships in thrilling real-time battles.  
  BUILD your kingdom on a turn-based campaign map. Manage your economy, diplomacy, and military to build your wealth, army, and political influence.  
  SCHEME according to Sun Tzu's Art of War. Use fire and siege tactics, spies and assassins to adapt to the ever-changing conditions of the battlefield and your entire kingdom.  

  New Total War Features in SHOGUN 2:  

  New RPG skills and experience for your Generals and Agents. 
  New multi-stage sieges: storming the walls is just the beginning! 
  New Hero squads that inspire your people and cut your enemies to pieces. 
  New rotating 3D campaign map

mac_games.title: >observer_
mac_games.description: The year is 2084. Your name is Daniel Lazarski and you are an elite private detective with the corporate police department known as Observer, specializing in hacking and entering the minds of suspects. One day, you receive a mysterious message from your son, a top-notch engineer for the all-powerful Chiron Corporation, and your investigation leads you to the Class C slums of Krakow. Your ability to hack into the minds of criminals and their victims allows you to bring their darkest fears to life. How far will you go in pursuit of the truth? \n\n    A stunning cyberpunk horror for an adult audience >observer_ from the creator of Layers of Fear, the developer Bloober Team. A stunning spectacle.

mac_games.title: Ziggurat 2
mac_games.description:
Ziggurat 2 is the second part of the adventure game developed in the action genre with RPG elements. The player will have to take on the role of a student who aspires to the majestic title of "Battle Mage".  

  To achieve your goal, you will have to overcome many obstacles and face a huge number of dangers, destroying opponents and leaving deadly traps behind. The final test for the future magician was the dungeon, from which only a few manage to escape. These places are teeming with insidious and sinister monsters, and are also full of secrets covered in a veil of darkness, which must be solved in order to get out of this ill-fated place as quickly as possible.  

  Among the features of the game project, it is immediately worth noting the presence of procedural generation of the surrounding world, which automatically makes the process as interesting as possible. The visual component was also well thought out and developed, with the help of which an excellent atmosphere was created, immersing the player completely. The developers did not ignore the combat system, which is thought out to the smallest detail, includes dynamic battles and a wide selection of arsenal.  

  Evil lurks in the depths  

  As a member of the most powerful magical order, your task is to protect humanity from the forces of evil. Face hordes of enemies and powerful Guardians in epic and dynamic battles. Monitor elemental resistances and vulnerabilities to maximize your effectiveness and gain experience to level up and learn powerful skills that will help you reach the end of the dungeon in one piece.  

  First person shooter at its finest!  

  Ziggurat 2 focuses on fast-paced combat and constant movement, where mistakes pay dearly. You'll need agility, reflexes, and resource management skills to have a chance of surviving the dangers lurking in the shadows and making it back in one piece.  

  No two races are the same  

  Following in the footsteps of its predecessor, Ziggurat 2 features randomly generated dungeons, filled with danger and treasure for the brave wizards who dare to enter them. Taking things a step further, dungeons now feature more verticality and variety, and more compact rooms for faster combat and easier exploration.  

  Return to the Citadel  

  In the Citadel, home of the Brotherhood, you will be able to recruit new and old allies, as well as upgrade your gear and skills before choosing which mission to undertake next. With dozens of unlockable weapons with different natures and behaviors, preparation before a mission is important and can mean the difference between a resounding victory and the bitter taste of defeat.  

  Improved formula  

  Ziggurat 2 has been rebuilt from the ground up to improve upon the original in every way, offering a smoother, faster experience, with faster, tighter sessions, more interactivity and satisfying progression.

mac_games.title: Moto Racer 4
mac_games.description:
Moto Racer 4 continues the arcade motorcycle racing series. The game allows you to play a single career or compete with a friend in split-screen mode. As you progress through the career, the player gains access to new drivers and upgrades. At the end of each chapter, a championship opens, and you can move on to the next level only after a complete victory in the final competition.  

  Races in Moto Racer 4 are divided into two types - asphalt and dirt. For each type, you need to choose the appropriate bike - road or mountain. On the road, the racer develops maximum speeds, overtakes cars from a certain side, and does not collide with obstacles or fences, so as not to earn a fine. Classic competitions are also available, such as "cross the finish line first" or go through a series of checkpoints for a while. Off-road, you can do tricks and push with other rivals. For acceleration, jumps, riding close and other skills, points are awarded for customizing the motorcyclist and his vehicles. The main character can be dressed in a different uniform, and the bike can be painted in different colors.  

  Before each race, the gamer must make a prediction on the final result. Choose an easy mode for one star or risky trips for 2 or 3 stars. For example, in a survival race, passing for 1 or 3 stars differs in the time during which you need to stay on the track. If the actual and expected results coincide, the player will be able to enter the next competition. If not, the number of stars will go into the negative, subsequent stages will remain blocked, and old tracks will have to be driven at a higher difficulty level.

mac_games.title: Beholder 2
mac_games.description: You are a young but promising employee of the Main Ministry of the country. A dizzying career awaits you and, perhaps, even the Minister's portfolio! But the path to the top is never easy. Where will this career ladder lead you? The choice is still yours!\n\n   A responsible and diligent employee, whom the Wise Leader will personally award with an order? Or a tough and uncompromising careerist, ready to step over anyone who stands in your way to the Ministerial chair? Or perhaps you have completely different goals? What if you came here against your will? If so, who sent you and why?  Anyway, you are now part of the Ministry!   And from this moment on, no one outside these walls has power over you. You are free to decide your own future destiny!

mac_games.title: Frostpunk
mac_games.description:
Frostpunk is a new game from the creators of This War of Mine. It is a game about the survival of a society where there is no life without heat and every decision has its price. In a completely frozen world, people develop steam engines to withstand the unbearable cold. You have to build the last city on earth and provide your people with the means to survive.  

  Often, optimization and rational use of resources are on one side of the scale, and on the other - compassion and humanity. While managing the city and society will take up the lion's share of the ruler's time, at some point, exploring the outside world will become necessary to understand its history and current state.  

  What decisions will you make to ensure that society survives? What will you do when you reach the limit? And who will you become in the process?  

  ESTABLISH THE LAW  

  Determine the principles that govern the lives of a growing population. Set working hours, provide medical care and food, and decide other aspects of daily life. Give people hope and meet their needs: maintaining people's morale is as important as providing them with food and shelter.  

  FORM YOUR SOCIETY  

  When the turning point comes, be decisive and determine the path of your people. Will you rule with an iron fist... or show them the path of compassion and faith? Will you fall into extremes or try to find a reasonable balance? Whatever you choose, remember: there is no turning back.  

  WEIGH EVERY DECISION  

  Some of your decisions—like helping a citizen in need or compromising with a new faction—may seem small, but remember that the sum of your actions can lead to unexpected results. People have put their trust in you, but their loyalty is not unlimited. Power can become a burden.  

  DEVELOP TECHNOLOGIES  

  Survival is impossible without development. React to current events, but do not forget about the long-term perspective and invest in technological progress. Creating an advanced infrastructure with self-loading automatons, aircraft and other wonders of technology is not easy, but achievable. Everything depends on your management and leadership skills.  

  EXPLORE THE FROSTLANDS  

  Although New London is always your focus, there is a much more diverse world beyond your city. Expeditions are risky, but can yield important intelligence, valuable resources, and increase your city's population. There may be people out there in the icy wastes, and their fate is entirely in your hands.  

  PLAY ENDLESSLY  

  Frostpunk's Endless Mode gives you unlimited possibilities for new playthroughs. Play on 8 maps with unique landscapes, varied weather conditions and challenges. We know that players' desires may differ, so the Endless Mode is presented in three versions. "Endurance" will be a real test for lovers of construction, management and survival in the harshest conditions. In "Builders", you will start the game without a generator, which will certainly cause you new difficulties. Finally, "Serenity" is entirely dedicated to building a city in a calm, relaxed atmosphere.

mac_games.title: Project Zomboid
mac_games.description:
Project Zomboid is an open-world zombie apocalypse simulator. Your fate is sealed: you're screwed. The only question is, how will you die?  

  A handful of surviving inhabitants of two sleepy towns are forced to search for food every day, loot, build fortifications and get by as best they can: zombies are everywhere, there is no help to wait for, and they can only rely on their own legs and ingenuity.  

  Already available in this version:  

  Hardcore survival simulation in an open world overrun by the living dead. 
  Network game with support for custom servers. 
  Local co-op mode for 4 people in split screen mode. 
  Detection system and dynamic lighting: zombies see and hear you. 
  Stay in the shade, try not to make noise, turn off the lights at night and, in any case, cover the windows with sheets. 
  A vast area to explore, the outlines of which will remind you of the landscapes outside your window. Explore, settle in, survive. And pay attention to the mapping project from Blindcoder. 
  Use various tools, create weapons and barriers, cook food. And if you learn to work with wood and saw trunks, you can even build a fort and hide from zombies in it. 
  Come up with ways to cope with hunger, thirst, illness, boredom and depression. 
  Night follows day. Power grids are unreliable. Zombies roam everywhere. Winter is coming. Nature takes its toll. 
  Farming, hunting wild animals, cooking and character customization - your skills grow based on how you spend your time. 
  Classic zombies that don't run (unless you select the appropriate option in the menu). 
  Atmospheric music by Zach Beaver. 
  In addition to the main survival modes: severe trials and a special mode "To the last fighter". 
  Mod support. 
  Xbox controller support on Windows [other controllers can be supported via manual setup; gamepads are not supported in the current Mac version].

mac_games.title: ATOM RPG: Trudograd
mac_games.description:
ATOM RPG is a post-apocalyptic indie game inspired by classic CRPGs: Fallout, Wasteland, System Shock, Deus Ex, Baldur's Gate. 

  In 1986, the USSR and the Western bloc were virtually destroyed in a nuclear exchange. You are one of the survivors of the apocalypse. Your task is to explore the cruel and mysterious world of the Soviet Wasteland, win your place in the sun, and unravel a sinister conspiracy that threatens life on Earth even more than a nuclear war...

  ATOM is: 

  The ability to create a unique character with its own strengths and weaknesses; 
  A balanced role-playing system inspired by GURPS: each set of statistics promises a unique way to play the game, separate dialogues and special ways to complete quests!
