  Dozens of skills - from hacking to gambling! 
  Exciting gameplay in a variety of locations: get to know the life of other survivors in a settlement rebuilt from the ashes of the old world, visit fields and forests overrun with dangerous mutants, challenge the pre-war secrets of an underground bunker... or just go fishing near a picturesque pond. 
  Tactical turn-based battles; 
  Random encounters with dangerous and amazing inhabitants of the Soviet Wastelands! 
  Dozens of carefully crafted dialogues with unique NPCs; 
  Lots of tasks with alternative ways to complete them. Complete the game the way you want, not the way the developers made you do it! 
  Completely non-linear plot! 
  And much more...

mac_games.title: Surviving Mars
mac_games.description:
Welcome home! It's time to land on Mars and establish the first functioning colony in human history on the Red Planet. All you need are supplies, oxygen, decades of hard training, the ability to survive sandstorms, and the determination to figure out the purpose of those strange black cubes that appeared out of nowhere. This is going to be a great place! With a little cleaning. 

   Surviving Mars is a sci-fi settlement simulator where your goal is to colonize Mars and not die in the process. Choose a space agency that will provide you with logistics and financial support, then decide on a location for your colony. Build domes and other infrastructure, explore new possibilities, use drones to improve and expand your settlement. Grow food, mine minerals, or just relax in a bar after a hard work shift. But most importantly, don’t let the colonists die. Which is not the easiest task on an unknown planet.  

  You will have to overcome many difficulties. Carefully work out the strategy of colony development and do not forget to explore the secrets of the new world. Are you ready? Mars is waiting for you!

mac_games.title: Wasteland 2
mac_games.description:
Wasteland 2 is a direct sequel to 1988's Wasteland, the very first post-apocalyptic computer RPG that inspired the creators of the legendary Fallout series. Before Wasteland, no other CRPG allowed you to control individual party members for tactical purposes or give you the opportunity to make important decisions that would change the game world. Wasteland was the first game to take a non-linear approach to problem solving, full of decisions and consequences, throwing out the traditional single-solution approach of other games to give players the ability to solve all problems in their own way. 

   Wasteland 2 takes the innovation of Wasteland and updates it to modern standards. Put your strategic skills to the test in turn-based combat as you try to survive in a desert world where force alone can't solve everything. Arm your Rangers with the most powerful weaponry this side of the fallout zone and prepare for maximum destruction, with the role-playing and character customization that made the first Wasteland so fun. Save an ally from certain death or let them die - the choice is yours, but the consequences are yours too.  

  Director's Cut Features: The Director's Cut version is based on the transition to the Unity 5 engine and the abandonment of Unity 4.5, thanks to which Wasteland 2 has fresh visuals, improved character models, physics-based shaders, updated environment objects, as well as realistic shading and lighting models. New voice acting, an improved system of hero customization with new perks and individual traits (Quirks), as well as slightly reworked combat mechanics.

mac_games.title: Superhot: Mind Control Delete
mac_games.description: SUPERHOT: MIND CONTROL DELETE is a new, more advanced interesting addition to the project of the same name. You will face a huge number of opponents and a small amount of ammunition. How you will cope with this situation depends only on the decisions you make and the actions you take. In the threesome's arsenal there will be a huge selection of various weapons, from cold weapons to firearms, which will help you in the fight against numerous ill-wishers.\n\n    There is also the possibility of using a function called slow motion, xbh will allow your opponents enemies to die beautifully and effectively. Slow battles, more difficult enemies and a new level in confrontations - all this is in the game SUPERHOT: MIND CONTROL DELETE. During the game, you will pay to get to numerous levels, which will be quite difficult to pass, you need to overcome a bunch of obstacles for this. When you stand - time freezes, and when you move - the gameplay will continue at its dynamic pace.

mac_games.title: Overland
mac_games.description:
In this turn-based survival simulator, you control a group of people crossing a post-apocalyptic United States in cars. Fight creepy creatures, rescue survivors, search for fuel, first aid kits, and weapons. Decide where to go next, whether to upgrade a broken car, whether to take a stray dog ​​with you. Remember that all actions have consequences. Ahead lie deadly dangers, dramatic escapes, difficult decisions, heated arguments - and the end of the world.  

  Game Features:  

  Make sure there is always gas in the tank. Stay away from strange creatures. Be alert. Don't make noise. 

  Loud noises will bring troubles you can't handle. Collect more gas, help strangers in trouble, and get back to the car on time. 

  Move west, through meadows, mountains, deserts and very unusual places. The road map, all levels and characters are randomly generated, so each journey is unique. 

  Use dozens of items: first aid kits, shields, axes, homemade armor, roof racks and even flower pots. 

  A whole new end of the world from Finji (Canabalt, Night in the Woods).

mac_games.title: Lust Theory - Season 1
mac_games.description:
Lust Theory is an adult visual novel where you control a 20-year-old guy whose life is turned upside down when he discovers that the same day is repeating itself. The game is filled with sex scenes, humor, romance, drama, and mystery.

    You control a guy living with three beautiful women. He lives a completely normal life... Goes to school, does household chores, studies, plays games, watches TV. Suddenly, the same day starts repeating itself, over and over... again.

    Gameplay:

  -FULL VOICE OVER (for all female characters)
  -Free movement
  -Time cycle
  -Detailed hint system in the game
  -Choose your own relationships
  -Possibility to repeat hot scenes
  -"Time of Lust" (interactive sex scenes)
  -Ability to change the angle in scenes
  -Nude mode
  -And much more...

mac_games.title: Dead Island
mac_games.description:
The game takes place in July 2006 on the fictional island of Banoi, a famous tropical resort located off the east coast of Papua New Guinea, north of Australia.

\n\n

It is the largest island in the Banoi Archipelago, which also includes the islands of Palanai, Narapela, and Amala.

\n\n

In recent years, Banoi has become quite famous and populated, but many areas of the island are still wild, untouched by the modern world. Although its capital Moresby was founded by Australian settlers back in 1895, most areas of the island are covered in impenetrable jungle and remain unexplored.

\n\n

Banoi is world famous as the location of the popular luxury five-star resort hotel "Royal Palms Resort" which often attracts celebrities. Not far from Banoi, on a small island surrounded by a minefield, is the Banoi Maximum Security Prison, a private facility for holding international terrorists and criminals.

\n\n

The island has a police force and its own military force called the Banoi Island Defense Force (BIDF), which is responsible for the protection and security of Banoi.

\n\n

For unknown reasons, a zombie invasion occurs in this area. Four survivors, who are immune to the zombie virus, are looking for a way to leave the island. They are helped and guided by a voice on the radio, scientists, and other survivors, of whom there are quite a lot on the island.

\n\n

But in order to get out, the heroes will have to go through difficult trials - infected beaches, a dead city, jungles, meeting and killing terrible undead and marauders, their only hope is a helicopter that is on the prison island.

mac_games.title: Metro 2033 Redux
mac_games.description:
n 2013, the world was struck by an apocalypse that almost completely destroyed humanity and turned the Earth's surface into a poisoned wasteland. A handful of survivors took refuge in the depths of the Moscow metro, and humanity plunged into a new Middle Ages. 

  The year is 2033. An entire generation has grown up underground. The besieged city-stations fight among themselves for survival, and beyond the cities, terrifying mutants roam. 

  Your name is Artem. You were born in the last days before the Earth burned, but grew up underground. You had never left the city limits before, but a fateful event forced you to set out on a desperate journey into the very center of the underground labyrinth to warn the survivors of the monstrous threat looming over them. 

  From the abandoned dungeons beneath the subway, your path will lead to the surface, to wild, abandoned lands, where your actions will decide the fate of humanity. 

  But what if the real threat is internal? 

  Metro 2033 Redux is the most complete and best version of the cult game Metro 2033, re-created on the 4A Engine graphics core for the latest generation of gaming systems. 

  Fans of the original will see the world of Metro transformed with incredible lighting, physics, and changing weather. 

  Players new to the series will get one of the best story-driven shooters of all time - an epic adventure that combines gripping survival horror, exploration, tactical combat, and stealth. 

  What appeared or changed for the better in the game mechanics in the sequel Metro: Last Light, is transferred to Metro 2033 Redux - excellent AI, interface, animation, weapon handling mechanics and much more. Both new and experienced players will have something to admire.

mac_games.title: Dead Cells
mac_games.description:
Dead Cells is a Rogue-like/Metroidvania action platformer set in a massive, ever-changing castle... if you can defeat those who stand in your way in 2D Souls-like combat. No saving. Kill, die, learn, and try again. 

  The interconnectedness of the levels and the gradual opening of access to different parts of the island motivate you to explore the environment time after time. Add to this the evolution of the character and the “eternal” weapon upgrades - and it becomes clear why Dead Cells belongs to the glorious line of games in the MetroidVania subgenre. 

  Ultimately, however, it’s YOUR skill as a player that matters most! Roguelikes are a genre that’s all about constant improvement, and what seemed like an insurmountable obstacle soon becomes a pleasant walk in the park. The combination of an unforgiving combat system and a lack of any safety net means that each playthrough is a thrill, providing unrivaled replayability. 

  OS: Mavericks 10.9 or later 

 RAM: 2 GB RAM 

 Video card: OpenGL 3.2+

mac_games.title: Mount & Blade: Warband
mac_games.description:
The endless war is tearing the kingdom apart – it’s time to gather your own band of brave warriors and join the fight. Lead battles, expand your domain and claim the ultimate trophy: the throne of Calradia! 

  Complete graphics update: added support for HDR, FSAA, depth of field, soft particles, tone mapping and other effects. 

  New models with increased detail and high quality textures. 

  Online battles with support for up to 200 players. Among the multiplayer modes: "Fight to the death", "Team fight to the death", "Capture the flag", "Capture", "Battle" and "Siege". 

  During the campaign, you can lead your own faction and convince other lords to stand under your banner. 

  Make your comrades your vassals by granting them lands. 

  The opportunity to marry a noble lady - for love or convenience. Try to conquer her heart with your courage or poetry. 

  Improved discipline system for fighters: if their morale drops too low, they will throw down their weapons and flee the battlefield. 

  Pick up any ammo on the battlefield and use it as your own. 

  New combat animation using motion capture technology. 

  Many combat system improvements: your shield stops arrows even if you don't raise it. 

  Possibility to participate in online games on random or specially created maps. 

  Online Gear System: Earn money by fighting opponents and completing missions. 

  Possibility of using throwing weapons in close combat: if the enemy gets too close, use the throwing spear as a pike. 

  Spend gold on more effective equipment - thanks to the subtle game balance, battles are always exciting, and neither side has an obvious advantage.

mac_games.title: Divinity: Original Sin 2
mac_games.description:
The long-awaited sequel to the famous role-playing game. Gather a squad. Master a powerful combat system. Invite up to three friends with you, but remember that only one of you can become a god. 

  The Divine is dead. The Void is closing in. And unknown forces are awakening within you. The battle for divinity has begun. Choose carefully whom you believe: in these difficult times, darkness may lurk in every heart. 

  What do you want to become? 
 An elf who eats the flesh of his fellows? A royal lizard? A corpse risen from the grave? The world around you will react to you depending on your choices. 

  It's time for a new deity! 
 Assemble a squad and develop relationships with your companions. Deal with enemies in thoughtful, tactical turn-based battles. Use the landscape as a weapon; use the heights to your advantage and drive enemies into traps. 

  Become the deity Rivellon so desperately needs. 
 Explore the vast world of Rivellon alone or with friends. Up to 4 players can play at once, and drop in and out at any time. Go anywhere, let your imagination run wild, and explore the endless ways to interact with the game world. And if you get bored in Rivellon, there's a new PvP mode and Game Master mode waiting for you! 

  Features of Divinity: Original Sin 2 - Definitive Edition 

 Larian's script department was not happy with the final look of Original Sin 2. They had to add and rewrite 150,000 words. The developers changed the third act of the story especially strongly - we are talking about additional dialogues, differently scripted events and redesigned characters. 

  In the difficulty level selection menu, you will come across a new option – Story Mode. The number of resurrections of fallen adventurers in it is not limited, and you can rush away from the battlefield at any time. Story Mode is designed for that part of the audience that is not on first-name terms with old-school party “role-playing games”. The training location is also addressed to them. 

  The PvP arena now features new heroes, maps, and ways to kill enemies. You can fight online or in the good old hot seat mode (two players on one computer). 

  Larian has carefully analyzed the use of skills in Original Sin 2 (their number has increased compared to the first part, by the way). Those that were rarely used in battles have become much stronger. A reason to study them! 

  In addition, the authors revised the prices for armor (the more useful, taking into account the statistics from the community, the more expensive), rewrote the quest diary, corrected the interface and threw markers on the map. 

  The technical requirements and recommended devices for the game are listed below. To find out your Mac model, open the About This Mac window from the Apple menu in the menu bar.

mac_games.title: Pine
mac_games.description:
Pine is an open-world action-adventure game. Journey through the breathtaking landscape of Evolmar as resourceful teenager Hugh, who must fight, trade, and explore a dangerous land where humans are not at the top of the food chain to survive. 

  As you search for a new home for your tribe, explore the rich ecosystem of Evolmar. Explore, trade, craft, interact, and battle with the island's inhabitants in six different biosystems. 

  Life in the open world of Pine does not stand still. Each of its inhabitants has only one goal - to survive at all costs. Befriend the creatures you like and fight side by side with them or steal their food and force them to find a new home. The constantly evolving world of the game reacts to all your actions.

mac_games.title: Machinarium
mac_games.description:
"Machinarium" is our first full-scale adventure game. You play as a robot that was sent to the dump. You have to think logically, collect important items and solve puzzles that are logically built into the game world. Help the robot return to his native Machinarium, where he must save the city mayor and his robot girlfriend, and at the same time defeat the villains from the Black Hat Gang. 

  "Machinarium" is a great proof that classic adventure games are still alive. The game was created by people who are truly in love with the genre and dream of making a real gift to those who miss the magical world of "adventures". They did a great job! Every element of the game, even the most insignificant, was brought to perfection: after all, everyone on the team understood what they were doing and did it with love. This level of attention to detail is not often found in modern games that resemble mass-produced goods, and it is a real joy to see a game created with such attention and dedication. 

  Winner of numerous prestigious gaming awards, including "Excellence in Visual Arts" (Independent Games Festival) and "Best Musical Score" (PC Gamer magazine award for 2009). 

  This classic, yet very modern, point and click adventure revives the point and click genre and takes it to new heights. 

  Enchanting, memorable music that combines classical and futuristic elements.

mac_games.title: Cult of the Lamb
mac_games.description:
In Cult of the Lamb, you take on the role of a possessed lamb, saved from death by a creepy stranger. To repay your debt to your savior, you will have to find him loyal followers. Grow your own cult in the lands of false prophets, go on hikes through mysterious corners of the forest, unite loyal followers around you and carry your word to the masses to make your cult the only one. 

  GATHER YOUR FLOCK 
 Collect resources and use them to construct buildings, perform dark rituals to appease the gods, and strengthen the faith of your flock with sermons. 

  CRUSH THE INFAITHFUL 
 Explore a randomly generated world, fight hordes of enemies and destroy the leaders of hostile cults to absorb their power and establish the dominance of your own cult. 

  CARRY YOUR WORD 
 Train your flock and set out on a journey to uncover the secrets of four mysterious regions. Conduct purges of the infidels and mystical rituals, bring enlightenment to the masses, and become a powerful lamb god.

mac_games.title: Broken Lens
mac_games.description:
Broken Lens is a relaxing game in which you will learn the story of a little robot with a vision problem. 

  The classic game of our childhood "Spot the Difference" gets a second wind with the new exploration system in Broken Lens. 

  Move your viewpoint and zoom in to spot the differences between the images coming from the two lenses, revealing the truth about the little robot's journey. 

  Peculiarities: 
  Soulful relaxing atmosphere 
 Rich and incredibly touching universe 
 Many different worlds 
 Play at your own pace 
 Collect lost pages and find out the continuation of the story

mac_games.title: Arctico
mac_games.description:
A quiet exploration game about restoring the works of your late mentor. 

  Base building 
 Collect valuable resources, conduct experiments, sell plant seeds and expand your scientific facility! 

 Take care of your plants and experiments 
 Producing a large amount of crops and data will allow you to upgrade your base and buy new tools! 

 Customize your equipment 
 Apply new paint jobs and improve your structures and sleds! 

  Study 
 Explore the many places around the island and find ancient objects and letters.

mac_games.title: ΔV: Rings of Saturn
mac_games.description:
Rings of Saturn is a 2D spaceship game that takes place in the distant future of 2273. Humanity has begun to extract important resources from the rings of Saturn. This event has become known as the Gold Rush of the new century. You control a ship that is engaged in the extraction of minerals in the vastness of outer space. 

  Your main goal was only one - to get rich. However, in the process of passing, you will have to learn many secrets that will forever change the idea of life. The gameplay of Delta V: Rings of Saturn is a top-down action in a sci-fi setting. The developers tried to back up every aspect of the gameplay with scientific facts and evidence. Shuttles move through space as they should do in reality. 

  Each ship consists of dozens of parts that can be improved, upgraded, and customized. Each aspect of the spaceship has a major impact on the gameplay. You can make instant jumps in space, but this will require a lot of fuel. Survive in harsh conditions and try to overcome all the obstacles that open space will throw at you. 

  Try to unravel the mystery of the Ring. Lead your own excavation company and get rich. All important strategic decisions are made at the Enceladus Prime station. Extract resources, sell raw materials, hire a crew and employees. An interesting and rich adventure awaits you.

mac_games.title: Farming Simulator 25
mac_games.description:
Farming Simulator 25 invites you to enjoy the pleasant life of the countryside. Whether you set up everything alone or with friends in a cooperative game, the farm will turn out the way you want it. 

  You are the boss! 
 Build a farm near the meandering rivers and historic grain elevators of North America; surrounded by ponds in Central Europe; or near a neon port and lush East Asian rice paddies. Grow vegetables, tend to animals, farm forestry, and manage farm shops, factories, and construction sites! 

  The weather changes and affects the landscape. 
 Hurricanes and hail will add to the challenge, and farmers will have to prepare for them and then assess the damage to their crops. Tires will also leave marks on the ground thanks to the deformation function, and there will be many other weather conditions that make the farm more romantic and realistic. Watch as the morning sun breaks through the trees, illuminating the fog with a golden light! 

  Asian Farm, New Crops and Animals 
 You can grow two types of rice in the flooded fields, and Farm Simulator 25 now has spinach, peas and green beans: a total of 25 crops! In addition, there are different types of trees and greenhouse vegetables. You can use new machinery on the Asian farm, and buffalo and baby animals have joined the cows, sheep, pigs, chickens and horses in the pens and pastures. 

  Authentic GPS technology 
 GPS steering and improved automation will help you drive more accurately. The game features 400 authentically recreated machines and tools from 150 well-known international manufacturers: Case IH, CLAAS, Fendt, John Deere, Kubota, Massey Ferguson, New Holland, Valtra, etc. Choose your favorite brand or see what others have! 

  High-quality farming improvements 
 General technical innovations will allow you to better feel the connection with the fields and nature: the latest GIANTS Engine 10 engine has allowed us to seriously improve the graphics and physics. Functions for people with disabilities and other conveniences make "Farm Simulator 25" easy for beginners, so that both beginners and experienced farmers can take up farming. And if this is not enough for you, you can download user creations verified by the developers from the ModHub game section!

mac_games.title: Warhammer 40,000: Rogue Trader
mac_games.description:
Travel across vast distances in your massive starship as you travel between the many systems of the Koronus Expanse, a little-explored and deadly region of space. Though considered the fringe of the Imperium, the vast expanse holds many opportunities for discovery and wealth.

   Your decisions matter, Lord-Captain.
 Show mercy or contempt for your subjects, remain loyal to the God-Emperor or ally with the enemies of Mankind - every decision and action a Rogue Trader makes impacts the entire sector, changing the game world and those who inhabit it.

   Assemble your crew.
 Rogue Traders never travel alone. Assemble your own retinue, which may include righteous warriors, dangerous psykers, and treacherous xenos. Each is ready to follow you into the darkness between the stars, and each is ready to advise you, aid you in combat, and help you gain even more power and influence. In turn, you can aid them in their own trials, changing their fates forever.

   Plan your actions carefully.
 Destroy the enemies of Humanity in a turn-based combat system. Use cover and the environment to overcome your opponents. If your forces are not enough, use the powerful abilities of your companions to turn the tide of battle and achieve victory even in the most desperate situations. Our adaptation of the classic Rogue Trader ruleset offers an incredible number of possibilities on the battlefield.

mac_games.title: 7 Days to Die
mac_games.description:
7 Days is a one-of-a-kind open-world game that combines elements of first-person shooter, survival horror, castle defense, and RPG. It features combat, crafting, loot, resource mining, exploration, and character development that fans around the world have come to appreciate. Get the genre-changing zombie survival sandbox RPG that set the tone for other games like it. You're in for a wild ride! 

  GAME FEATURES 

  Explore a vast, unique game world full of surprises: you will have the freedom to play the way you want. Discover 5 unique biomes and worlds up to 100 square kilometers in size. 

  Craft and repair weapons, clothing, armor, tools, vehicles, and more using over 500 recipes. Find schematics and learn more advanced recipes. 

  Build your own fortress with traps, electricity, automatic turrets, gates, devices and defensive positions to deal with the undead in a world that can be changed and destroyed as you wish. 

  Cooperate or compete with other players to build settlements together or plunder each other's bases. Decide for yourself who is your friend and who is your enemy in a wasteland ruled by bandits and zombies. 

  Let your imagination run wild: use over 800 game items, over 1,300 unique building blocks and a painting system that offers almost limitless possibilities. 

  Grow and improve your skills and abilities with five main attributes. Read over 100 books to gain additional skills. 7 Days to Die is the only RPG that takes survival seriously. 

  Choose to play in a campaign world or immerse yourself in a randomly generated world with towns and villages, lakes, mountains, valleys, roads, caves and more than 550 unique locations. 

  Fight: You will face over 60 types of unique zombies, including special infected with unique behavior. To keep you from getting bored, the difficulty of their attacks constantly increases! 

  Survive through truly challenging mechanics: Nearly 50 buffs, power-ups, and diseases will impact the game, sometimes helping you survive, sometimes making things more difficult. 

  Destroy: buildings and natural elevations can collapse under their own weight due to mechanical damage or poor design: stability works according to real laws. 

  Loot, find the best weapons, tools and armor in the world. 6 types of quality provide countless combinations, as well as many modifications with which you can improve items. 

  Complete Quests: You will find several NPC merchants in the world who will sell or buy goods, as well as offer quests for rewards. You will have access to many unique quests in over 550 locations. 

  Customize: Create your own character and customize them with a variety of clothing and armor, all crafted or found in the world. 

  Master the coolest transport system: find all the parts, learn the recipe, and then create and customize your own bicycle, minibike, motorcycle, 4x4 truck or autogyro and travel with your friends. 

  Hunt or farm, plant and grow crops to obtain renewable resources, or go hunting to get more than a dozen unique species of animals.

mac_games.title: No Man's Sky
mac_games.description:
IMPORTANT 

  If the game does not start, enter in the terminal: 

  xattr -cr /Applications/"No Man's Sky.app" && codesign --force --deep --sign - /Applications/"No Man's Sky.app" 

  To change the language, edit the NemirtingasSteamEmu.json file 
  by path: 

  /Applications/No Man's Sky.app/Contents/Config/nsteame_settings/NemirtingasSteamEmu.json 


 Inspired by the adventures and ideas we love from classic science fiction, No Man's Sky introduces you to a galaxy filled with unique planets and life forms, as well as constant threats and action. 

  In No Man's Sky, every star is the light of a distant sun, orbited by habitable planets you can visit if you so choose. Move freely between the vastness of deep space and the surfaces of planets, with no loading screens or restrictions. In this infinite, procedurally generated universe, you'll discover places and creatures you've never seen before and probably never will again. 

  Embark on an epic journey 
 At the center of the galaxy is an extremely powerful pulse, drawing in anyone who wants to uncover the true nature of space. However, when faced with hostile creatures and brutal pirates, you will find that death is costly, and survival comes down to choosing how to upgrade your ship, weapons, and suit. 

  Find your own destiny 
 Your journey through No Man's Sky is entirely up to you. Will you become a fighter, taking riches from the weak or plundering pirates? By upgrading your ship for maximum speed and firepower, you will gain true power. 

  Or a trader? Find resource-rich lost worlds and make the most of their exploitation. Invest in increasing cargo space and you will be rewarded greatly. 

  Or perhaps an explorer? Venture beyond the known realms and discover what no one has ever seen before. Upgrade your engines to jump even further, and beef up your suit to survive in toxic environments that would kill anyone unaware of the danger. 

  Share your journey 
 The galaxy is a place filled with life and breathing. Trade convoys travel between the stars, factions fight for territory, pirates prey on the unwary, and the police constantly watch over the proceedings. All players inhabit a single galaxy, and you can share your discoveries with them on a map spanning the known reaches of space. You may see the results of their actions as clearly as you see the results of your own...

mac_games.title: Totally Accurate Battle Simulator
mac_games.description:
In Totally Accurate Battle Simulator, a fun simulator, you can become a commander, managing massive battles. The physics of the game are very realistic! 

  At the beginning of the game, the player has a certain amount of money, as well as warriors - in limited quantities. The army consists of different fighters. Here are simple fist fighters, and heavy ballistic installations. The more advanced the fighter, the more expensive he is. Based on the available resources - money and combat, the player assembles his army, places the fighters in positions. And the battle begins. The mechanics of the battles are very interesting. The developers have created a very fun game. 

  Having won the battle, you can move on to another level, more difficult. As a reward - additional money. With it you can form a new army, cooler. Well, if your army failed, you will have to take into account the mistakes, make changes in your army, change tactics - and again into battle. The game very realistically simulates medieval battles. The player gathers a small army, and then throws it into a bloody battle. 

  The project is currently in alpha testing. But it already has a lot of units: timid villagers and huge catapults. 

  The main difference of the game is the well-developed physics of the rag doll, thanks to which the game becomes very realistic and funny.

mac_games.title: Disco Elysium
mac_games.description:
Disco Elysium is the definitive edition of the amazing RPG game. Your character is a detective with a set of unique skills who must explore an entire city district. Fate will bring you together with unforgettable characters. Conduct interrogations, solve murders or take bribes. It's up to you to decide who you want to be - a hero or a complete loser. 

  Full voice acting. 
 Full English voice acting truly brings the city's amazing inhabitants to life. Play them against each other, try to help them, or fall head over heels in love, because now every word is spoken with the right accent and emotion. 

  New Political Perspectives Quests: 
 Face your real worldview as you follow the call of your political compass. Discover new townspeople, monumental landmarks, and an entire additional location to further influence the world as you pursue your dreams. 

  A new level of freedom of choice. 
 Intimidate, flatter, use force, write poetry, sing karaoke, dance like crazy or finally find the meaning of life. Disco Elysium is the most authentic video game to recreate the experience of a tabletop RPG. 

  Endless roleplaying possibilities. 
 24 unique skills - develop and rule. Create your own style with 80 different clothing items. Use 14 different tools: from weapons and flashlights to a tape recorder. Or mix yourself a cocktail of 6 unique and not so harmless substances. In the thought locker, you will find 60 crazy thoughts that will allow you to develop your character even more. 

  Revolutionary dialogue system and unforgettable characters. 
 A world populated not by extras, but by real people. Get answers from them, make insightful observations and realize your wildest dreams, playing as a cop or someone completely different. The game's revolutionary dialogue system will allow you to do almost anything. 

  Forge your own path through the city. 
 Explore, manipulate others, collect tare or become a millionaire. You have never seen such opportunities in an open world. Conquer Revachol step by step. From the labyrinth of streets to the sea beaches and beyond the horizon. 

  Cool hardcore. 
 Death, sex, taxes and disco — no taboo topics. Revachol is a real city with real challenges. Solve an incredible murder. Or relax and enjoy side missions. The detective will show the townspeople who's boss here.

mac_games.title: Stardew Valley
mac_games.description: You've inherited your grandfather's old farm in Stardew Valley. With a handful of coins in your pocket and some old tools in your hands, you begin a new life. Can you turn a vacant lot into a thriving garden? It won't be easy. Things have changed a lot since the Joja Corporation settled in town. The community center is abandoned. However, the valley is full of opportunities. Who knows... Maybe you'll be the one to restore Stardew Valley to its former glory!

mac_games.title: Gear Club Stradale
mac_games.description:
IMPORTANT 



If the game does not open, enter in the terminal: 



xattr -cr /Applications/Gear.Club-Stradale.app && codesign --force --deep --sign - /Applications/Gear.Club-Stradale.app 

 Gear.Club Stradale is a dream come true: you will spend a long holiday in a luxurious villa, and you will have as much time as you want to drive the most beautiful cars in the world. 

  Peculiarities: 

  • Get together with your friends and create your own club in the birthplace of supercars and the most beautiful region of Italy – Tuscany. 

  • Ride with friends through exclusive daily, weekly and monthly content to build your dream car collection! 

  • Experience the best driving experience on mobile devices, featuring intelligent, realistic driver assistance systems that are easy to learn and use. 

  • Build and upgrade a workshop at your villa to get better performance and customize your cars. 

  • Defend your club in global competitions and reach the top of the rankings together. 

  • Unlock new content as you progress and achieve goals. 

  You won't want this vacation to end...

mac_games.title: The Last Plague: Blight
mac_games.description:
The Last Plague: Blight is an extremely challenging and realistic single-player survival game. 

  Blight 
 A mysterious new disease called "Blight" has come to the land. You managed to escape its devastating effects as it engulfed your village and left it in ruins - now you find yourself alone in the wild, tired and hungry. You have bought yourself some time, but how much? Blight grows larger every day, consuming everything in its path... 

  Realism 
 The game aims to provide a stunningly realistic and immersive experience with a ton of depth. Activities like chopping trees and cooking take up a lot of valuable time. You can only carry a few things at a time. You need to boil water to make sure it’s safe to drink. Water and other liquids need to be carried in bowls and other containers, and they can spill if they’re not transported reliably. You’ll need to collect a variety of raw materials, many of which need to be refined, combined, processed, or hardened to create tools, items, and structures. 

  Blight's challenge 
 is just one of many threats to your survival in the unforgiving wilderness. Once you've quickly set up camp, you'll need to keep well-fed and hydrated, replenish lost energy through sleep and short rests, defend yourself from the wild beasts that still roam the forest, heal your wounds, protect yourself from the harsh elements, and find a way to end this dreaded disease. Almost everything in the procedurally generated world can and will kill you if you're not careful.

mac_games.title: Tank Mechanic Simulator
mac_games.description:
Repair, build and maintain highly detailed and fully interactive tanks (German, American or Soviet), armored vehicles or self-propelled guns. Experience a realistic tank mechanic simulator game.

  Find abandoned and destroyed tanks from the battlefields of World War II. Use special tools to find each tank and extract it from the ground. Grow your repair business and establish your own tank museum.

  Start the engine of the newly repaired tank and feel its former power!

  Use various tools to work on tanks:
  Rust removal tool
 Sandblaster
 Paint sprayer
 Hammer
 Grinder - to cut and grind
 Air impact wrench - to quickly disassemble rusty screws/bolts

 Experience the full refurbishment process:
  Clean the tank from dirt
 Decontaminate the tank
 Sandblasting the tank
 Apply primer paint to the tank
 Apply final paint to the tank (factory paint)
 Add custom paint, camouflage, color, decal to the paint room
 Sell the tank or put it in your museum to earn money and reputation

 Take the tank apart
  Use the tools and disassemble each tank into parts. You can disassemble the external parts of the tank, from the bottom (wheels and tracks) to the turret (gun, barrel, cradle, etc.). In addition, the interior of the tank is also available for repair, the crew space, the tank engine and the tank drive system.

  Take a seat inside the tank as any of its crew. From here you can have better and easier access to the tank's interior. Repair hatches, viewers, ammunition holders, drive control components, and gearbox parts.

  To get the tank up and running, you need to repair its engine, gearbox, and fuel system. Remove the engine and move it to a special engine stand so you can interact with it. Make sure the fuel, cooling, and oil systems are assembled and the fluids are filled so you can test the tank's engine.

  High attention to detail
  Our tanks and vehicles are based on design documentation, expert opinions and insights from the best WWII museums. Our goal is to provide a fun and realistic experience of simulating the construction and repair of these legendary machines.

  Customize your tank to your liking, use different camouflage, paint colors, stickers, etc.
  Search and extract tanks
  One way to get the tank is to get it during an extraction mission. After finding the location where the tank is underground, call in the excavation crew. Prepare the tank for extraction by pumping out the dirt from the tank and then cleaning the tank of what is left. Finally, order the tank to be lifted onto the truck trailer to finish the mission and move the tank to the workshop.

  Check your repaired tanks
  Head to the training ground, check how your tank copes with special obstacles. Get inside the tank, start the engine and drive around it to make sure everything works properly.

  You can also take the tank to the shooting range, where you can shoot the tank's weapons at a special shooting range. You can use two different camera modes for better control of the tank.

  Features of Tank Mechanic Simulator:
  15 vehicles, including 12 tanks, 2 armored vehicles and 1 self-propelled gun:
 PzKpfw VI Tiger Ausf. H1
 M4A3E8 Sherman
 PzKpfw III Ausf. M
 KV-1
 M26 Pershing
 KV-2
 T-34/85
 T-34/76
 PzKpfw III Ausf. J
 StuG 40 Ausf. G
 PzKpfw IV Ausf. G
 M10 GMC Wolverine
 PzKpfw V Panther Ausf. A
 SdKfz 251/1 Ausf. D
 M3 Halftrack
 German, American and Soviet tanks
 Each tank has about 200+ parts
 Unlimited tank customization options with paint, camouflage, color, decals
 Ability to share and download other players' custom files
 Use various tools to repair the tank: hammer, rust remover, sandblaster, paint gun, grinder, impact wrench
 Go through the entire tank upgrade process: Mud, Rust, Debris, Sanding, Primer and Final Paint.
 Interact with the external and internal parts of the tank, engine, fuel system and gearbox, tracks and wheels
 Put the tank on a test drive, fill with fluids, start the engine, drive with the tank on a test drive of the yard
 Take the tank to the shooting range to have some fun with your fully repaired and assembled tank
 Extract tanks from the ground, use special tools: Metal detector, Ground penetrating radar, Drone, Shovel. Find a place for the tank, use detectors to mark the tank, call the excavation, clean the tank, put the tank on the trailer of the truck
 Sell the repaired tanks and vehicles or open your own museum

mac_games.title: Firmament
mac_games.description:
Firmament is a new mystery adventure game from the legendary studio behind Myst and Riven. Deep storytelling and meticulous detail will immerse you in an abandoned world where the mysteries of 3 unique lands await you… and more!

  EXPLORE A NEW WORLD
  Firmament invites you to the latest creation of Cyan Worlds - a new detailed world with a unique steampunk aesthetic. Firmament is a real treat for the eyes, where new beauty opens up around every corner. But at the same time, the world of Firmament is easy to believe, as if it was built according to someone's great plan... A plan that you will want to unravel.

  SOLVE RIDDLES
  You always have a device called the Adjunct with you. With it, you can operate various devices in the world of Firmament. Use the Adjunct, solve puzzles, and unravel the mysteries that fill these lands.

  LEARN THE STORY TO THE END
  You are not alone in the world of Firmament. In addition to the Adjunct, you are accompanied by a mysterious ghost with her own story. And on your way you will find 3 separate lands with their own mysteries and secrets. What purpose do they serve? And can you trust your ghost companion?

  REVEAL THE MYSTERY
  Are the lands of Firmament really that abandoned? What are these giant mechanisms scattered across them? What are they for? And what role do you play in this great mystery? Explore, solve and uncover the secrets by playing Firmament!

mac_games.title: Total War: WARHAMMER III
mac_games.description:
TOTAL WAR: WARHAMMER III

  The Dying God has opened a portal to the Realm of Chaos, and from it have emerged the four Ruinous Powers - Khorne, Nurgle, Tzeentch and Slaanesh. Will they conquer the mortal world? Or will the kingdoms of Kislev and Great Cathay be able to turn the tide of the war?

  ASSEMBLE A MIGHTY ARMY
  You will command seven races and hundreds of troops. Win large-scale and spectacular battles in real time.

  BUILD AN EMPIRE
  Build your empire in the sandbox strategy game – the most ambitious Total War game ever, where every campaign is unique.

  CHOOSE YOUR HERO
  Choose from 10 legendary lords! Team up with the ancient dragon-man of Great Cathay, the Ice Queen of Kislev, or the many-faced demon prince.

  NETWORK CHAOS
  Fight in Domination mode, capture lands and defeat enemies, or complete campaigns in large-scale online games.

mac_games.title: PRIM
mac_games.description:
PRIM is a creepy but cute quest with black humor. 

  After her mother's death, Prim discovers that her father is none other than Death himself. Now forced to live with him in the Underworld, she is determined to escape the Grim Reaper and his strict rules, because Death is completely unfit to be a father. But when she finally manages to escape him on her 16th birthday, Prim's hidden powers are unleashed, with horrific consequences... 

  In an attempt to set things right, Prim must explore the Underworld, confront its dangers, and form unlikely alliances. 
 Can you help Prim find her place in this world, or will the consequences of her actions forever upset the delicate balance between life and death? 

  At the heart of PRIM is the story of a father learning to be less controlling of his daughter and a girl trying to find herself. But it’s also a thrilling adventure full of darkness and magic. During her journey, Prim will switch between the worlds of the living and the dead, where she will encounter demons – real ones and those that live inside her – and her faithful companion, the eye on legs, will always come to the rescue in difficult times. 

  Features: 

  An emotional yet humorous story about family, friendship, and death. 
 A diverse Afterlife, presented in hand-drawn graphics. 
 Challenging puzzles and various mini-games. 
 Several playable characters. 
 An immersive soundtrack performed live by the Film Orchestra Babelsberg.

mac_games.title: Mosaic
mac_games.description: Mosaic is a modern narrative adventure game that lasts around 2-3 hours. \n\n   Day after day, you lead a monotonous, lonely life in a cold, overcrowded, rapidly expanding city. Along with a faceless crowd, you go to work every day at a giant corporation and sit in the office until late at night, and only meaningless messages on your mobile distract you from work. You do not understand the purpose of all this. But one day - when you go to work again - everything changes.

mac_games.title: Cuphead
mac_games.description:
Cuphead is a classic platformer with boss battles as its core element. The developers were inspired by 1930s cartoons. Authentic techniques such as celluloid animation and watercolor backgrounds were used in the creation of the game, and original jazz compositions were specially recorded as a soundtrack. 


    Together with Cuphead or Mugman (in single or co-op mode), you will go on a journey through unusual worlds - there you will acquire various weapons, learn the most powerful blows and reveal secrets. And all this in order to repay the debt to the devil himself!

mac_games.title: BioShock Remastered
mac_games.description:
The BioShock action movie is unique in its genre – you have never seen such weapons and combat techniques before. At your service is a rich arsenal – from simple revolvers to rocket launchers and chemical sprayers, but you will also have to genetically modify your DNA to create the most perfect weapon – yourself. 

  Explore the underwater city of Rapture. Home to society's greatest minds, this dystopian nightmare has been transformed by one man's hubris. A new ecosystem has emerged from the flooded ruins, where deranged mutants hunt down the Little Sisters, who are helpless without their guardians, the hulking Big Daddies. Only your quick thinking, rebuilt weaponry, and superhuman strength from DNA-altering plasmids will keep you alive. To defeat Rapture's mutated beasts, you'll have to become one of them. 

  Here's what else awaits you in the game: 

 • Orphaned Concept Museum: Take a tour of several exhibits dedicated to the origins of BioShock in this virtual museum, from early concept art to full-fledged in-game models. 

 • Challenge Rooms: Put your combat skills and puzzle-solving wits to the test as you take on a unique series of challenges. 

 • Developer Commentary on the Making of BioShock: Unlock new collectibles to unlock episodic videos with engaging commentary from Art Director Ken Levine and Lead Animator Sean Robertson.

mac_games.title: Batman: Arkham City
mac_games.description:
Batman: Arkham City is a third-person action adventure game based on one of the most popular comic book, cartoon, film and toy heroes, Batman. This project is an expanded edition of the original game. The media product was developed by Rocksteady Studios. The official release was in early autumn 2012. 

  The game world is five times larger in area than the previous Batman: Arkham Asylum. The huge locations of the darkest of DC Comics cities terrify ordinary citizens, because the power in the city is increasingly passing into the hands of various marauders, murderers and psychopaths. A huge number of gangs are controlled by their leaders - Penguin, Mister Freeze, Joker and other monsters in human form. 

  Batman sees his own symbol illuminated by a spotlight in the stormy night sky, and this means only one thing - the city needs him. He sets off to restore order to the streets of Gotham City. This time, he will not go into battle alone: ​​the developers have added the ability to play as Catwoman, the sworn enemy of the "Bat", but this time, the implacable enemies have formed an alliance. 

  The gameplay for Batman and Catwoman differs quite a lot. Bruce Wayne, in the guise of his alter ego, is able to literally soar over the city like a hawk, looking for another victim who has crossed the line of what is permitted. He fights using both his mighty physical strength and using special gadgets, while "Cat" relies mainly on her instincts and agility. Among the innovations, it is worth noting a smoke grenade to disorient enemies, a new detective mode. Separately, the developers highlighted 400 new achievements! 

  The stunning graphics from the previous part have noticeably improved, the game world has become several times larger, the artificial intelligence has become smarter, and the non-trivial plot has prepared several non-obvious surprises for you!

mac_games.title: Stellaris: Galaxy Edition
mac_games.description:
Stellaris is a global strategy about the development of the universe. The goal of the game is the creation and development of a galactic empire. The strategy stands out for its unique gameplay. The classic mechanics of the 4X genre were taken as a basis. Earthlings leave their home planet to create a colony. To conquer distant worlds, they master innovative technologies and fight alien races. Galaxy Edition comes with additional content. 

  The action takes place in real time, as evidenced by the dial in the upper corner of the screen. There are many space objects on a large space map. Not all planets are suitable for life, so each of them requires study. Colonizers take samples, search for useful resources, and if successful, build a base and industrial enterprises. 

  The game becomes more complex as settlements grow with residents. The larger the society, the more contradictions there are in society. This means that the number of internal conflicts increases. Individual regions become autonomous units with their own governors, and artificial intelligence takes control over them. Everyday issues will also appear, including the distribution of funding, maintaining diplomatic relations. 

  A global strategy on a galactic scale. Go to a universe full of wonders and devote yourself to exploring the boundless space! Paradox Development Studio, the creators of the famous Crusader Kings and Europa Universalis series, presents a new word in the genre of global strategies. Stellaris is a thoughtful strategic gameplay, an impressive variety of alien races and a truly fascinating storyline. This is an exciting pastime of exploring the vastness of space, where you will travel, meet the inhabitants of distant worlds, interact with them and constantly learn something new. 

  Write your name in the history of space exploration and create your own galactic empire! Colonize distant worlds and assimilate their inhabitants. Conquer star systems by force or try to achieve what you want through diplomacy? The choice is yours.

mac_games.title: The Long Dark
mac_games.description:
The Long Dark is an exploration and survival game where solo players must fend for themselves as they explore vast, frozen wilderness areas. There are no zombies here - just you, the cold, and whatever Mother Nature has to offer. 

  The Long Dark is brought to you by Hinterland Studio, an independent game developer staffed by industry veterans who have worked on many well-known franchises including Far Cry, Red Faction, Saints Row, God of War, Mass Effect, Knights of the Old Republic, Dragon Age, Company of Heroes, and more. The Long Dark is the team's first attempt at creating a thought-provoking, unique, independent game that pushes the boundaries of what's possible. 

  Part of the first story season of The Long Dark, WINTERMUTE consists of two of the five episodes. In December 2018, in the Redux update, we completely reworked both episodes: we changed the quest system, rewrote the plot, dialogue, animation, and more. 

  EPISODE 1. "Don't Go Meekly" 
 Long-haul pilot Will Mackenzie (the player character) and Dr. Astrid Greenwood are separated when a mysterious flash of light causes their plane to crash in the wilds of northern Canada. Desperate to survive and find Astrid, Mackenzie comes to the town of Milton, where he begins to understand the scale of this silent disaster. 

  EPISODE 2. "Light Fugue" 
 Mackenzie's search for Astrid takes him deep into the snow-covered wilderness. A mysterious trapper may be able to help him, but can he be trusted? 

  The first two episodes of WINTERMUTE take up about 15 hours of play. The next three episodes are included in the price of the game and will be unlocked for free as they become available. 

  The characters are voiced by Jennifer Hale, Mark Meer, David Hayter, and Elias Toufexis (episode three). The music was composed by Cris Velasco.

mac_games.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops III
mac_games.description: Call of Duty: Black Ops III is a sequel to the legendary shooter, the events of which take place in 2065. The development of unique air defense systems called "DEAD" has become a solution to all aviation threats. Now the clashes between opponents take place exclusively on the ground. But science has developed weapons so strongly and quickly that people practically do not participate in the clashes, sending combat robots to hot spots.\n\n   Ordinary soldiers have also undergone some changes. They have been made superfighters, significantly improving their physical indicators and characteristics. The military has become faster, more accurate and more durable, and you are becoming one of them. Take the first-class weapon of the future into your hands and crush the enemy.
downloadLink: https://vikingfile.com/f/QOsu7ndUcJ#Call of Duty- Black Ops III.dmg

mac_games.title: Nine Sols
mac_games.description:
Apologies for the misunderstanding! I now see what you mean. You want the line breaks counted and inserted appropriately, with 
 for a single line break, 

 for two breaks, and so on. Let's go over the text again carefully, counting the natural breaks and adding the correct line breaks. Here’s the revised version:  Nine Sols is a story-rich, hand-drawn 2D action platformer with reflex-focused combat in the vein of Sekiro. Embark on a journey through Asian fantasy, explore a land once inhabited by an ancient alien race, and follow a vengeful hero to destroy the 9 Sols, the fearsome rulers of this forgotten realm. 

  Features: 

  2D action in the style of Sekiro: Slash, parry, rush at enemies and explode them with the help of the Taoist talisman! Each fight combines fast, brutal action with classic platforming mechanics. 

  Intriguing Boss Fight: Prepare to face evil ancient guardians and terrifying creatures. Be patient and use all the moves in your arsenal, combining them with the divine bow Yi, to defeat these huge, life-like figures. 

  Taopunk Setting: When cyberpunk collided with Taoism, mixing sci-fi elements with Eastern mythology/fantasy, the experimental taopunk genre was born. 
 Exploration: Travel through the interconnected regions of New Kunlun. Uncover secrets, piece together the story of Yi's revenge. 

  Help from the inhabitants: Meet interesting NPCs of this world and interact with them to get upgrades, gain new abilities and discover useful technologies. 

  Hand-drawn environments/animations and manga: Nine Sols is filled with meticulously hand-drawn anime-style environments, hand-drawn sprite-based animations, and Japanese manga-style scenes.

mac_games.title: Myst
mac_games.description:
Welcome to Mist, a stunningly beautiful island steeped in sinister secrets and intrigue. 

  Travel to the island of Myst and other stunning, long-dormant locations called “Ages” and begin to unravel the mystery that has drawn you into. As you slowly uncover what happened on the island, you’ll find yourself playing a key role in an epic story whose ending has yet to be written. Explore the deeper connections within these incredible and surreal Ages, uncover a story of cynical family betrayal, and make choices that will impact both you and Myst itself. 

  From the indie studio Cyan, the creators of the beloved classic, comes a reimagining of Myst. 

 Built from the ground up to be played in both VR and traditional flat screens, Myst features brand new graphics, re-recorded audio, reimagined interactive experiences, and even additional puzzle randomization. The long-awaited Myst 2D/VR is finally here! 

  Now you can explore the Ages of Myst in a new dimension! 

  Game Features: 

  Designed and built from the ground up using the Unreal Engine, this newly reimagined version of Myst includes enhanced visuals in every area of the game. With both VR and 2D gaming experiences in mind, this definitive, modern edition of Myst will immerse you in its world like never before. 

 The VR experience includes both free-roaming and teleportation modes, and supports Valve Index, HTC Vive, Oculus Rift, Rift S, and Quest via Oculus Link. 

 Additionally, Myst includes a variety of “comfort level” features for both new and experienced VR users, including the ability to turn smoothly or sharply, quickly climb any ladder, quantize vertical height, and more! 

 For the first time in Myst history, enjoy the game in multiple languages ​​with a localized user interface, including dialogue and subtitles. 

 A variety of accessibility features to aid in gameplay. 

 Tired of taking notes? Now you can take in-game screenshots and trace what you encounter! 

 A wide range of graphics options to choose from, such as supersampling and ray tracing options, to ensure the best Myst experience on your hardware.

mac_games.title: #DRIVE Rally
mac_games.description:
DRIVE Rally not only captures the spirit of the 90s, it also revives it for a new generation of racers. Whether you're a dirt track veteran or a newbie who just wants to get the tires wet, this game will let you redefine speed over and over again. 

  DRIVE World 

 From the sun-drenched landscapes of Dry Crumbs to the whispering forest of Holzberg and the frigid desert of Revontuli, embark on a journey through a diverse world unlike any you've ever seen in a racing game. 

  Legendary Cars 

 Get behind the wheel of legendary rally cars like Das Holzwagen, The Doggo, The Bobond and many more. This time we're going back to the 90s, so there will be some new ones too. Das Sandsturm and Celestia are just the beginning! 

  Passionate Navigators 

 Your navigator can be your biggest cheerleader and your toughest judge. It’s a partnership based on results and emotions. Celebrate victories together, but be prepared to face criticism when things go wrong. 

  DRIVE Design 

 Build your cars from scratch to suit your driving style and rally style. Customize the body, paint, decals, and then add some flair with custom decorations. 

  DRIVE Arcade Mechanics 

 Simple enough for beginners, yet challenging and demanding in depth, this is a control system designed to put the fun back into racing games. 

  The retro revival of 

 #DRIVE Rally is filled with references, hints and Easter eggs that will take any car enthusiast down a nostalgic path. 

  Photo Mode 

 Get creative and capture your best moments in #DRIVE Rally. Adjust angles, switch filters, go crazy. Create the perfect shot. 

  System Requirements 

 OS: MacOS 11.0 
 Processor: Intel Core i3 2.5GHz or equivalent 
 RAM: 4 GB RAM 
 Disk space: 5 GB

mac_games.title: Ogu and the Secret Forest
mac_games.description:
Explore the amazing world with little Ogu! 

  "Ogu and the Secret Forest" is a 2D adventure game with hand-drawn characters and various puzzles. 

  Befriend restless characters and defeat strange creatures to unravel the mystery of a charming world. 

  Features 

  Explore different types of territories. Each area has a unique atmosphere and history. 

  Solve puzzles and find clues to uncover secrets and mysteries that have remained undiscovered for a long time. 

  You will find a wide variety of puzzles, from recognizable classics to unique ones. 

  The power of the Great One has been shattered, and many evil foes seek to collect the scattered pieces of the Great One's power. 

  Defeat these terrible enemies to save the world.

mac_games.title: Borderlands 3
mac_games.description:
Have a blast! Everyone's favorite loot-heavy shooter is back with TONS of guns and wild adventures. As one of four new Vault Hunters, you'll experience intense battles across uncharted worlds against new enemies. Play solo or with friends, battle completely insane enemies, load up on loot, and save your home from the most ruthless cult leaders in the galaxy.

  Peculiarities:

  Stop the Calypso twins from uniting the bandit clans and gaining dominance over the entire galaxy.

 Become one of four Vault Hunters, each with an advanced skill tree, powerful abilities, and extensive customization options.

 Mountains of guns, tons of equipment - every fight promises new equipment.

 Travel beyond Pandora and discover new worlds with unique environments and enemies.

 Play with anyone at any time using online co-op, regardless of your level or mission progress.

mac_games.title: GRID Autosport
mac_games.description:
Turn the key and begin your professional racing career in Codemasters' hit AAA title that combines simulation features with arcade controls for an irresistible experience.

  RACING WITH CONSOLE-LEVEL QUALITY

 High-quality graphics and amazing performance make GRID Autosport an incredible gaming experience.

  100 CARS AND 100 ROUTES

 Race behind the wheel of sports cars across a variety of tracks, routes, races and loops.

  BEST IN CLASS CONTROL

 Enjoy intuitive controls and taps or play using a gamepad.

  ADJUSTABLE DIFFICULTY LEVEL

 From super-light to ultra-realistic, the choice is yours.

mac_games.title: Outlast
mac_games.description:
The game begins with journalist Miles Upshur, who arrives at Mount Massive Asylum, a psychiatric hospital in search of a scoop. To his surprise, Miles discovers that the hospital is unguarded and all entrances are closed. 

    Having entered the hospital through the window, the journalist sees all the horror happening in it: dismembered corpses are scattered everywhere, and crazy and mutilated patients wander along the corridors. Among all these crazy people, the protagonist meets a certain priest Martin, who promotes a cult around a local deity called Walrider, a former security guard Chris Walker, stuffed with hormones, looking like a huge mutant and pursuing Miles throughout the game in order to restore order, that is, to kill, and doctor Richard Trager - a sadist who uses patients for his delusional surgical experiments. Moving along the corridors of the hospital, the protagonist learns that it is only a cover for the Murkoff scientific institute, which serves as a base for conducting illegal experiments on people in order to obtain the greatest profit and breed a new species of people with superpowers.

    Miles soon learns that Murkoff's laboratory is located under the hospital. While exploring the lab, he stumbles upon a strange dark clot, similar to fog, which begins to haunt him. Suddenly, Chris grabs the reporter and tries to kill him, but that black fog intervenes and brutally kills Chris, disappearing after that. Miles moves on and finds a scientist, Dr. Rudolf Wernicke, who talks about the Walrider project and the mysterious clot - Billy - the only test subject who survived the experiments. After that, he asks to kill Billy. To do this, it is necessary to turn off the water and electricity supply to Billy's capsule, which contains his physical body. The Walrider, having lost its owner, moves into Miles's body. Miles slowly returns to Wernicke's office, where special forces are waiting for him. The screen goes dark, shots are heard in the background, and then screams. The special forces kill Miles, and the Walrider, having broken free, deals with the special forces.

mac_games.title: Leo's Fortune
mac_games.description:
Leo's Fortune is a platform adventure game where you hunt down a mysterious and cunning thief who stole your gold. Beautifully designed levels make Leo's adventure truly realistic.

  "I returned home to find my gold stolen! For some strange reason, the thief scattered my coins in the forest like bread crumbs. Even though it looks like a trap, I have no choice but to follow it. No matter what lies ahead, I must get my wealth back." - Leopold. Complete Leo's Fortune to unlock Hardcore Mode.

mac_games.title: Hellpoint
mac_games.description:
Hellpoint is a challenging Action RPG set in a dark fantasy universe where the line between science and the occult is blurred.

  Irid Novo Station, a magnificent monument to human achievement, is now abandoned, in the hands of savage extradimensional monsters—and malevolent cosmic gods.

  You become the creation of the mysterious Author, called upon to explore Irid Novo and discover what terrible events led to the mysterious catastrophe called the Confluence.

  Irid Novo is a vast and intricate space station that hides countless secrets. It's up to you to unravel them all. There are many paths open to you, and the further you delve into the station's secrets, the more terrifying it becomes.

  Dozens of melee and ranged weapons await you. Choose the ones that suit you best. Each weapon has a unique special ability - discover it!

  The world that has survived a monstrous catastrophe is enchanting. It is based on classic and modern science fiction, and the soundtrack will give you goosebumps!

  The space station revolves around a huge black hole. Because of its radiation, anything can happen - monsters' parameters will change, bosses will appear, a wave of monsters will attack you.

  If you're having a hard time, call a friend for help. Co-op play is possible both locally and online. All trophies are shared between players, and experience is given to everyone.

  If you don't have enough monsters, fight other players in the multiplayer PvP mode (up to 4 people)!

mac_games.title: SOMA
mac_games.description:
SOMA is a sci-fi horror game from Frictional Games, the creators of Amnesia: The Ghost of the Past. You will find a frightening story that poses difficult questions – what is consciousness, personality, and what it means to be human.

  The radio is silent, food is running low, and robots think they're human. As you navigate the underwater station Pathos II, which has been completely cut off from the outside world for a long time, you'll have to make tough decisions. What can you do? What still matters? Is there anything left worth fighting for?

  Dive into the world of SOMA and face the horrors lurking in the depths of the ocean. Study the records on locked terminals and read classified documents to find out what secrets are hidden under the veil of chaos that surrounds you. Try to find the last survivors on the station and decide the fate of the underwater complex. Be extremely careful, because danger lurks around every corner: infected people, ugly creatures, crazy robots, and an omnipresent mysterious AI.

  You will have to find a personal approach to each opponent. Remember that resistance is useless: cunning and fast feet are your main weapons.

mac_games.title: Gibbous - A Cthulhu Adventure
Plants vs Zombies: Replanted
mac_games.description:
Zombies have invaded your home, and your only way to survive is to plant an arsenal of plants! Armed with alien zombie-killing plants like the Peashooter and Cherry Bomb, you'll need to think fast and plant even faster to keep the zombies out of your home at all costs. With a setting sun, creeping fog, and a swimming pool, plus five game modes, there's no stopping the fun!

  Try yourself in five game modes: "Adventure", "Mini-games", "Puzzles", "Survival", as well as the relaxing "Zen Garden"

  Win all 50 levels in Adventure mode: day, night, fog, pool and even on the roof of a house

  Fight 26 types of zombies such as: Pole Zombies, Divers and Zomboni Riders

  Earn 49 mighty evergreens and collect coins to buy a pet snail, upgrades and more!

  Open the Almanac to see all the plants and zombies, and read some funny "facts" and quotes along the way

  Visit Crazy Dave's shop to purchase special plants and tools that will help you stop any zombie attack

  Amazing graphics and sound, as well as a nice bonus - a video clip

  Excellent replayability: each subsequent game will not be similar to the previous one!

mac_games.title: Samurai Jack
mac_games.description:
Samurai Jack: Battle Through Time is an action platformer where your actions will become a new legend!

  An unsolved adventure tied to the series finale

  Team up with trusted allies and fight against familiar enemies.

 Worlds from the series

  Visit familiar places and relive moments from your favorite series. Search for your destiny, traveling through time and space.

 Create your own legend

  Master a variety of weapons and skills, train and develop your fighting style.

mac_games.title: X-Plane 12
mac_games.description:
X-Plane 12 is a new realistic flight simulator, which is a direct development of its predecessor. Players will once again be able to sit at the controls of civil and military aircraft and try them out in action. Thanks to the built-in training mode, users will be able to learn the basics of aircraft control, as well as acquire the necessary skills to control airliners in the sky. It should be noted that the project is not an arcade, you will find a full-fledged flight simulation.

  The developers definitely call their project unique and do not overdo it, because this is the first game that offers a realistic flight experience and flight control at the level of flight simulators. In front of the player there is a real control panel, not a simplified version, and you must carefully manage it.

  The modern engine has allowed not only to revive the faithfully created 3D models of 19 aircraft, but also to create a colorful open world. Complete missions and fly through different cities and landscapes, admiring the scenery. Experience the most favorable weather conditions with the 4D weather engine and test yourself when you get into a storm or get into a turbulence zone. You need to analyze all the risks before takeoff and prepare for the upcoming tests, because the lives of all crew members and passengers are on your shoulders.

mac_games.title: Subnautica: Below Zero
mac_games.description:
Below Zero is an underwater adventure set in an alien ocean world. Meet the next chapter in the Subnautica universe, developed by Unknown Worlds.

  Return to Planet 4546B

  Embark on an underwater expedition in the frigid Arctic region of planet 4546B. Armed with only your wits and a modest set of rescue equipment, you must investigate the events that happened to your sister...

  Get to the bottom of the truth

  After a mysterious incident, Alterra hastily abandoned the planet. The entire region is littered with abandoned research stations. What happened to the scientists who lived and worked here? Journals, items, and data banks scattered among the debris provide a different perspective on the incident. With limited resources, you will have to improvise to survive.

  Find unexplored biomes

  Swim beneath the sparkling blue arches of the Twisting Bridges. Marvel at the enormous glittering crystals in the Crystal Caves. Climb snow-capped peaks and explore the frigid caverns of glaciers. Weave between erupting thermal springs to find ancient alien artifacts. Below Zero is a whole new world to survive, explore, and roam.

  Build housing and vehicles

  Build spacious homes, mine resources, and craft equipment to survive in harsh climates. Race across the snowy tundra on the Polar Fox gravity bike. Navigate fascinating and dangerous biomes in the modular submarine Seafarer.

  Explore alien life forms

  The unknown will be encountered at every turn. Swim through the colossal Titan Holetail, find the ghostly Shadow Leviathan and visit the cute Pingwings. But be careful. Not all creatures in this amazing world are friendly.

  Survive in sub-zero temperatures

  Jump in, the water is warm. Sub-zero temperatures in this Arctic region pose a new threat. Above the surface, new weather conditions await you. Dress in a warm and cozy thermal suit, pour yourself a cup of hot coffee and warm yourself by the fire lilies to ward off the cold.

  Ocean of intrigue

  What really happened to your sister? Who were the aliens who discovered this place before you? Why did they live on this planet? Can we find solace in our grief in the truth? Below Zero's story expands on the Subnautica universe, delving even deeper into the mystery of the original game.

  Open source development

  Subnautica: Below Zero is in development. Get weekly or daily updates, see the team at work, read changelogs updated in real time, and provide feedback from within the game. We invite you to share your thoughts and get involved with our project.

  Team of developers

  Below Zero is being developed by a small studio called Unknown Worlds, whose first project was Natural Selection, a modification for Half-Life that was released in 2002. The same studio gave the world the original Subnautica. The studio's employees are scattered around the world - in the USA, Great Britain, France, Russia, Austria, Australia, Canada and many other countries.

  Warning

  The game contains bright flashing lights that may be unacceptable to people with photosensitive epilepsy or other disorders associated with sensitivity to light. The player must use their own discretion.

mac_games.title: Subnautica
mac_games.description:
Subnautica is an underwater adventure game set on an alien ocean planet. Explore a vast open world full of wonders and dangers!

  Dive into the vast underwater world

  You've been shipwrecked in a wondrous ocean world where the only way out is down. Subnautica's oceans range from sun-drenched coral reefs to treacherous deep-sea fissures, lava fields, and bioluminescent underwater rivers. Manage your oxygen levels as you explore kelp forests, plateaus, reefs, and twisting cave systems. The waters teem with life, some beneficial, many dangerous.

  Collect, create and survive

  After crash-landing in an escape pod, it's a race against time to find water, food, and craft survival gear. Scavenge resources from the ocean around you. Craft knives, diving gear, and personal watercraft. Venture deeper and further to find rarer resources that will allow you to craft more advanced items.

  Build underwater dwellings

  Build bases on the seabed. Choose the layout and elements, control the durability as the depth and pressure increase. Use the base to store resources, dock transport, and replenish oxygen supplies as you explore the vast ocean.

  Solve the mystery

  What happened to this planet? There are plenty of signs that something is wrong. What caused you to crash? What is infecting the sea life? Who built the mysterious structures scattered across the ocean? Can you find a way to get off the planet alive?

  Break the food chain

  The ocean is teeming with life: use the ecosystem to your advantage. Lure and distract dangerous creatures with fresh fish, or simply swim as fast as you can to avoid the jaws of wandering predators.

  Overcome the pressure

  Build a Jet Autonomous Armored Suit (or "CRAB") and explore extreme depth and heat. Modify your suit with drills, torpedo launchers, propulsion cannons, grappling hooks, and more.

  Beware of the night

  When the sun goes down, predators emerge. The ocean is unforgiving to those caught unawares in the dark. Places that are safe to explore during the day become treacherous at night, but also reveal beauty that those who avoid the dark will never see.

  Dive below the seabed

  Below the seafloor, cave systems branch out, from dark, cramped passages to large caverns illuminated by bioluminescent life and scorching lava flows. Explore the world beneath the ocean floor, but keep an eye on oxygen levels and beware of threats lurking in the darkness.

mac_games.title: Neversong
mac_games.description:
After waking up from a coma, Pete discovers that his girlfriend is missing. In this unforgettable, dreamlike story game, you'll have to find out what the screams are coming from the depths of the Eternal Forest, study the extremely strange behavior of adult zombies, and discover the chilling truth about Pete's past.

  Explore six uniquely atmospheric levels - from the Red Wind Field to the creepy corridors of the Black Fork Vault.

  Use your trusty baseball bat against bosses, monsters and adult zombies.

  Immerse yourself in a soul-stirring keyboard soundtrack.

  Embark on a dangerous journey with your eccentric childhood friends and faithful pet and learn the whole truth about your coma.

mac_games.title: Don't Starve Together
mac_games.description: Don't Starve Together is a standalone expansion to the indie project Don't Starve, offering joint survival in a dark and not entirely player-friendly world. You can join forces with a friend or by choosing a random comrade online. The gameplay does not impose joint actions in any way - you can either work together or do your own thing on a common map.

mac_games.title: Don't Starve
mac_games.description:
Here’s the text with line breaks as you requested:  Don't Starve is an uncompromising survival game set in a wild world filled with science and magic.

  You are Wilson, a brave scientist who has been captured by an evil demon and sent to a mysterious wilderness. Wilson must master this world and its inhabitants to escape and return to his home.
