  Discover a mysterious unknown world where strange creatures, dangers and surprises await you at every step. Collect resources to create items and things that will help you survive. Play the way you want and unravel the secrets of these mysterious lands.

  Key Features:
  Survive and explore a world where there are no compromises:

  No instructions. No help. No one will hold your hand. Start with empty pockets and create what you need from the resources you collect, hunt, make scientific discoveries and fight for your right to live on.

mac_games.title: Baldur's Gate II: Enhanced Edition
mac_games.description:
You have been kidnapped. You are being held captive. You are being tortured. The Mage Irenicus has trapped you in his fortress and is attempting to strip you of the powers that are your birthright. Can you resist the evil in your blood and reject the dark fate that awaits you? Or will you embrace your monstrous nature and ascend to become the new God of Murder?

  Continue the journey that began in Baldur's Gate: Enhanced Edition or create a completely new character in this isometric Dungeons & Dragons RPG. Powered by an updated and improved version of the Infinity Engine, Baldur's Gate II: Enhanced Edition includes the original Shadows of Amn adventure, the Throne of Bhaal expansion, and all-new content, including four new party members.

mac_games.title: 60 Parsecs!
mac_games.description:
The atomic space age was a blast! Until it became the post-apocalyptic space age.

  Your space station is about to explode, and you have just 60 seconds before everything goes awry. What (or who) will you grab before making a desperate dash for the escape shuttle and journey into the great unknown?

  This is 60 Parsecs!, a darkly humorous sci-fi comedy adventure set in the atomic space age, complete with Cold War paranoia, chrome-plated walls, and cockroaches in helmets.

  Become the leader of a crew of woefully unprepared astronauts equipped with whatever junk—sorry—"supplies" you grabbed before setting off on a journey through space that's best described as "clunky." Endure adversity as you struggle with soup shortages and other horrors of outer space. Will you have what it takes to find a new home and survive?

  Have a nice trip!

  GRAB SUPPLIES AND EVACUATE
 There are only 60 seconds left before nuclear missiles turn the space station into particles hurtling through the vacuum of space, so run and grab any supplies and crew members you can in the chaos. You never know when a sock puppet might come in handy.

  SURVIVE AND DECIDE
 Burial in space is an awkward affair, so try not to die if you can. Use your limited supplies and (hopefully not so limited) intelligence to make tough decisions and ensure your survival, despite the odds clearly stacked against you.

  EXPLORE AND CRAFT
 If duct tape can hold everything together, how do you hold (or even make) duct tape together? Send out expeditions to find resources, craft essential items, and explore strange new worlds in this methodical permadeath adventure.

  COMMAND AND PROTECT
 It's the captain's job to keep the crew happy. That way they're less likely to kill you. Watch how the crew's relationships develop, hoping no one throws anyone out of the airlock.

mac_games.title: Hollow Knight
mac_games.description:
Brave the Depths of a Forsaken Kingdom
 Deep beneath the fading city of Dirtmouth lie the ruins of an ancient Kingdom. Many are drawn underground by the lure of wealth, fame, or answers to ancient mysteries.

  Hollow Knight is a classic 2D adventure set in a vast interconnected world. Explore twisting caverns, ancient cities, and deadly wastelands, battle corrupted creatures, befriend strange bugs, and uncover ancient secrets at the heart of the kingdom.

mac_games.title: GRIS
mac_games.description:
Gris is a naive girl who has locked herself in her own world because of the pain that has enveloped her in reality. Her grief is embodied in her dress, which gives her different abilities that allow her to better navigate her world. As the story progresses, Gris grows emotionally stronger and begins to see her world a little differently, discovering more and more new paths.

  GRIS is a meditative and intelligent game in which you don’t have to fear death, a nervous breakdown or an oppressive atmosphere of danger. You will find a carefully designed and animated world, and your ears will be caressed by an original soundtrack. And also - simple puzzles, platformer elements and optional challenges.

  There is almost no text in GRIS - only small control prompts written in understandable common symbols. Anyone can play this game, no matter what language they speak.

mac_games.title: 60 Seconds!
mac_games.description:
Ted, a decent citizen and head of a family, encounters only one small problem in his carefree suburban life. NUCLEAR APOCALYPSE.

  In the remaining 60 seconds before the explosion, you need to help your hero in his frantic and tense search for family members and necessary supplies. Everything will turn against you - time, your own furniture, a house that changes in each game and the most important question - what to take with you and who to leave behind?

  But getting to the shelter in time and in one piece is only the beginning. Everything you managed to collect and everyone you managed to save will be the deciding factor in the fight for salvation. Each survival story will be different, and each new day will surprise you with new surprises. Will all these stories end well? That's up to you. Share food and water, use the collected items as best as possible, make tough decisions and make forays into the radioactive wastelands.

  Good luck.

  EXPERIENCE
 the ultimate nightmare when a nuclear bomb falls on your cozy town in this apocalyptic black comedy set in 1950s America.

  COLLECT
 all the supplies you can to keep you and your family alive while running around a randomly generated house in a 60-second rush.

  PREPARE
 for the worst. Don't grab everything you can get your hands on - think of a survival plan and follow the advice of emergency radio messages!

  SURVIVE
 in a fallout shelter with the supplies you've gathered. How many days can you last? Will everyone survive this adventure?

  DECIDE
 what to do when the harsh post-apocalyptic world puts you against the wall. Will you dare to go outside? Who will get the last spoonful of soup? How will you cope with the invasion of mutant cockroaches?

mac_games.title: Unveiling
mac_games.description:
You are driving a car when a UFO crosses the road. You are abducted, but what happens next is not what you expect.

  It is a mysterious journey of your mind to the mind of the Other. He wants to tell you something. Will you listen? Will you understand?

  Unveiling's gameplay is simple and the puzzles are unobtrusive. You navigate through mind-blowing environments, bathed in vibrant visuals, and interact with bits of the story.

  Inspired by a love of science fiction and the resurgence of UFO/UFO themes in modern psyche, this 30-minute experience explores the moment of contact and the possible motives of non-human intelligence.

mac_games.title: The Forgotten City
mac_games.description:
The Forgotten City is a detective adventure game based on the popular (over 3 million downloads) Australian Writers Guild Award-winning modification.

  You can resort to violence, but not all issues can be resolved by force. Question memorable residents of the settlement, use the time loop wisely, and solve insurmountable moral dilemmas - only then will the secrets of the city be revealed to you. Your decisions have far-reaching consequences. The fate of the city is in your hands.

  Features:

  Explore an open world of a carefully recreated ancient Roman city with historically accurate architecture, costumes and customs
 Experience a tense non-linear story with multiple endings
 Meet interesting characters and learn the story of each of them
 Overcome moral dilemmas whose consequences can cost you your life
 Create a character to your liking, choosing their gender, origin and backstory
 Unravel mysteries using wits, charm, bribery, cunning, intimidation or clever use of the time loop

 Requires macOS 11.0 or later.

mac_games.title: Art of Rally
mac_games.description:
Doing something dangerous with style is an art. Art of Rally is a stylized rally experience inspired by the "golden era" from the developer of Absolute Drift. 


    Race around the world in a colorful and stylized top-down environment. Compete for the top spot on the leaderboard in daily and weekly challenges. Can you master the art of rallying?

mac_games.title: Aragami
mac_games.description: Aragami, a stealth game about moving around secretly using supernatural powers. Just because you move silently and avoid light sources doesn't mean you're one with the shadows. Dance with them, live in them, let them pass through you as you pass through them. You are Aragami, a spirit of vengeance summoned to this world by a mysterious girl who wants to free herself from captivity. You must fight the army of Light and destroy all of its negligent minions. It's a difficult task, but not for someone who can control shadows, change their shape, and absorb enemies into them without revealing their presence. There are several ways to get around each obstacle, and you'll probably decide that it's better to keep your enemies alive than to take them. After all, your main goal is to get to Yamiko in time and fulfill your mysterious destiny.

mac_games.title: Borderlands 2
mac_games.description: A new era of shoot-and-collect is upon us! Team up with up to three Vault Hunters and face off against a world of beasts, psychos, and the evil mastermind Handsome Jack. Make friends, arm them with guns from a gigantic arsenal, and set out with your partners to fight shoulder to shoulder in search of vengeance and redemption across the uncharted territories of Pandora.

mac_games.title: Wasteland 3
mac_games.description:
In Wasteland 3, you lead a band of Desert Rangers, lawmen of a nuclear-ravaged world trying to rebuild society from the ashes. Over a hundred years have passed since the nuclear war. You are fighting a losing battle to save your beloved Arizona. Suddenly, the self-proclaimed Patriarch of Colorado contacts you; he promises to help you if you take on a task he can only entrust to an outsider. He wants you to save his land from the ambitions of his three bloodthirsty children. 

  Agreeing to undertake this desperate mission, you leave the hot desert and head to the snowy mountains, where you will have to start all over again. Build a base, find vehicles to move through the snow, train recruits and fight in the dangerous frozen wastes. You will have to decide who to trust in this land torn apart by corruption, intrigue, warring factions, crazy cultists, gangs of cutthroats and implacable relatives. Earn a reputation by making decisions that will greatly affect Colorado, its people and the story. Will you become Colorado's savior or its worst nightmare? 

  Wasteland 3 is a party-based RPG from inXile entertainment that will appeal to both series veterans and newcomers alike. Featuring a challenging turn-based tactical combat system and a deep, action-driven story full of twists and turns and tough moral dilemmas, Wasteland 3 is a party-based RPG from inXile entertainment. Create a squad of up to six Rangers and customize it to your playstyle with perks and abilities. You can even get a combat truck that can be turned into a gun-toting beast of a war to slaughter hordes of enemies.

mac_games.title: Riven
mac_games.description:
"I know what he's doing. He's watching you." 

  Riven awaits you - a beautiful and mysterious world on the brink of disaster. Unravel the mysteries of this place, solve puzzles and risk everything to save someone important to you and escape. 

  IMMERSE YOURSELF INTO THE SECRETS OF ANOTHER WORLD 
  "My name is Genn. I think you already know my name." 

  The impenetrable jungles, fantastically beautiful caves and majestic monoliths of Riven will not leave anyone indifferent. Explore the world that is subjugated to the will of a man who imagines himself a god, and be prepared for the fact that a new exciting adventure will await you around every corner. 

  ADMIRE THE SURREALISTIC LANDSCAPES 
  "Perhaps I should first give you a tour of history..." 

  Those who thrive in Riven are those who listen and notice the smallest details to solve puzzles that are skillfully woven into the overall fabric of the story. The world around you will push you to make the right decisions while you piece together a picture of what happened from seemingly unrelated pieces of information. 

  UNRELATE THE SECRETS OF RIVEN 
  "...as if some foundations of the universe had shifted to give me another chance." 

  How do the mysterious inhabitants of the island live that you will meet along the way? Why is there a huge golden dome in the middle of the island? What brought this world to the brink of disaster? Launch Riven and find answers to these and many other questions. 

  ABOUT THIS REMAKE 
  Released by legendary indie studio Cyan Worlds in 1997, Riven was an instant hit - and in 2024, key members of the original team lovingly reimagined their creation to give fans a fresh take on the familiar Myst universe. 

  The fully 3D world of Riven can now be explored completely freely and in real time. This new, expanded and improved version of Riven features additional story elements, stunning next-gen graphics, and an atmosphere that is every bit as immersive as the original.

mac_games.title: The Pathless
mac_games.description:
Here’s the text with line breaks (
 for single line breaks and 

 for double line breaks) added as requested:  Become a Hunter and set out on a journey across a mysterious island to lift the curse of darkness that has enveloped the world. Strengthen your bond with your faithful eagle and soar through the skies. Smooth acrobatics and stunning shots – in a unique archery system where you can shoot arrows while moving at high speed. 

  An open world full of mysteries 
  Make your way through a beautiful open world full of amazing secrets. Wander through misty forests, green meadows and snowy tundra. Explore the dark history of the island, solving puzzles of ancient ruins and jumping in the treetops. 

  Hunting for Corrupted Spirits 
  Enormous corrupted spirits roam the forest. It will take great hunting skill to defeat them. Beware and do not become prey! Engage in epic battles against the cursed beasts and bring light back to these lands. The fate of the entire world depends on how strong your bond with the eagle is.

mac_games.title: DiRT Rally
mac_games.description:
DiRT Rally is the most realistic racing game ever made. (Proven by the DiRT community with over 80 million miles on the clock.) Feel the tension of being a driver who knows the cost of making a mistake. 

  Each stage has its own difficulties, surfaces and weather. All cars wear out, but the team will help you stay alive, although each rally is a marathon test. 

  DiRT Rally features licensed World Rallycross content, including the fastest cars in the world. Race in single and multiplayer modes. 

  Peculiarities: 
  • ICONIC RALLY CARS: DiRT Rally offers you a choice of over 40 of the most famous and significant cars from the past and present, including cars that are fan favourites and those that are best suited to the terrain of the upcoming race. 

  • SIX EMPHASIS RALLIES WITH OVER 70 STAGES: Race on the muddy roads of Wales, the dusty tracks of Greece and the icy asphalt roads of Monte Carlo. Ride along the legendary slopes of Pikes Peak, the snowy mountains of Sweden and the breathtaking landscape of Finland. 

  • OFFICIAL FIA WORLD RALLYCROSS CHAMPIONSHIP CONTENT! Take on Lydden Hill, Holjes and Hell in six of the fastest all-terrain vehicles, competing against your friends in intense, action-packed multiplayer racing. 

  • CUSTOMISABLE EVENTS: Take any car and any track, set the parameters and compete in a rally with one or more stages. 

  • RALLY CHAMPIONSHIPS: Start at the bottom of the rally ladder and compete in a series of races, earning points and cash on your way to glory. Careful driving and well-organized repairs will help you climb the leaderboard and earn the most valuable rewards. 

  • UPGRADES, REPAIRS, INSTALLATIONS AND CUSTOMIZATION! DiRT Rally exceeds all expectations in every aspect, including the ability to repair, upgrade, install and customize, making your game incredibly rich and strategically diverse. 

  • SOPHISTICATED, UNCOMPROMISING HANDLING MODEL: Codemasters has redesigned the racing simulator for DiRT Rally to capture every sensation of racing on changing terrain, and created entirely new deflection, suspension, engine performance and turbo simulation. 

  • TEAM MANAGEMENT! Hire and fire your team members, each with different skills that can improve the repair times of different parts of your car. Teach them new skills so that they gain experience and work well as a team, contributing to your records in competitions. 

  • PLAYER LEAGUE SUPPORT: Race with your friends and manage your own racing league. Create or join countless leagues and manage them as you wish. 

  • DAILY, WEEKLY AND MONTHLY ONLINE CHALLENGES: Take on the entire DiRT community in daily, weekly or monthly challenges to earn in-game credits to use to upgrade your car and team.

mac_games.title: DiRT 4
mac_games.description: The best off-road racing is back! DiRT 4 features the most powerful cars and off-road racing modes. The game's Your Stage system lets you create millions of routes at the touch of a button.

mac_games.title: DiRT 3: Complete Edition
mac_games.description:
DiRT 3 is a racing simulator computer game, the eighth in the Colin McRae Rally series. A sequel to the previous game in the series, DiRT 2. DiRT 3 is based on the EGO 2.0 game engine. 

  The main part of the gameplay is dedicated to earning reputation points, which the player receives by participating in various competitions and which are needed to attract the attention of sponsors who provide new vehicles. The game also has a gymkhana mode, where the player must complete a track with obstacles, while performing tricks to get points. 

  In addition, the game also has "party" modes, in which the goals are to destroy wooden structures, spread zombie infections, and capture the flag. In hardcore mode, the player only has access to the view from the cabin, there are no assistants, snow and rain appear, and there is also the ability to upload video replays directly to YouTube.

mac_games.title: NBA 2K24 Arcade Edition
mac_games.description:
Enjoy the game at home or on the go with all the updates to the latest installment of the world-famous NBA 2K franchise, available exclusively on Apple Arcade! 

  Become a unique NBA superstar in MyCareer mode and play to win fans and get endorsements from iconic brands like Nike, Jordan or Adidas. 

  Challenge the next Greatest in Greatest mode and discover a brand new roster of NBA superstars and legends. Assemble your wildest dream team and battle other Greatest teams in the ultimate fantasy team challenge. 

  Do you think you have what it takes to lead? Experience the role of a head coach in Association mode with SimCast Live. Follow your team's strategy and lead your NBA franchise to victory! 

  Get the best sideline seat with Spectator mode or play NBA season-long games with NBA Today. 

  And here's the kicker - it's not just about the game, it's about your style! Now you can set up your own court in MyCOURT mode, hone your skills, and then invite your friends via Game Center to witness your greatness! 

  Looking for another reason to upgrade to NBA 2K24 Arcade Edition? We've got you covered: 

  MyCAREER: Start your NBA career from a young rookie to a league legend. Create your player and choose physical attributes such as height, wingspan, weight, playing style and more 
 Choose your position on the court and play for your favorite NBA team. Improve your statistics and improve your skills 

  Association Mode: Become the general manager and head coach of your favorite NBA team and create your dream team in Association Mode. Manage your NBA roster and make trades, sign free agents, scout prospects and control your team's finances. 

  Quick Match Modes: Test your skills with authentic basketball gameplay by choosing your favorite NBA team and playing against any NBA opponent in 5v5 matches. Gather your favorite players and play 1v1, 3v3 or 5v5 street basketball on a paved court.

mac_games.title: Stela
mac_games.description:
Stela is a cinematic and atmospheric platformer about a young woman who watches as a mysterious ancient world collapses. 

  Embark on an exciting journey through the fading lands, full of difficult challenges, tricky traps and giant monsters. Use the objects around you to solve many detailed puzzles and sneak past dangerous enemies accompanied by original music. Mysterious cities, gloomy forests and vast underground ruins - all this will allow you to fully immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere of the game, the main task of which is to survive.

mac_games.title: Metro: Last Light Redux
Life Is Strange 2: Complete Season
mac_games.description:
Life is Strange 2 is the same episodic interactive film with direct player participation. The entire game is divided into two gameplay modes: watching cutscenes and choosing answers in dialogues, or rare participation in point-and-click moments. 

  The introductory part of the plot tells us about two boys who grow up surrounded by one parent, because the mother died long ago. Due to fate or destiny, the father dies in a tragic situation, and the two children are left to be torn apart by life. 

  The first episode tells the story of Sean and Diaz. At first we get to know their fears, motives and desire to go to Mexico, and later we learn that one of the brothers has the ability of telekinesis, and that the police are hunting the boys not because of specific abilities. The older brother always looks after his brother, so the younger one's abilities are not fully revealed - there is no opportunity and conditions. The two brothers leave for Mexico, to their father's homeland, Puerto Lobos. There they seek salvation, so they go to America, and then the heroes face a real, difficult life question: what next? 

  Hiding the abilities of the younger brother becomes unhelpful when he can completely remove the heroes from the conflict situation, however, with the help of the young brain, Sean manages to establish contacts with some people, and they very quickly stop sleeping at gas stations, in abandoned houses. However, the players often face the question: steal, borrow or ask? Lie, tell the truth or ask for help? On the way, the characters meet a lot of heroes, the player will lead them through locations, use and collect items, and at the same time decide: leave the brothers together or separate them forever? 

  OS: macOS 10.15

mac_games.title: Life is Strange: Before the Storm
mac_games.description:
Life is Strange is an episodic adventure set in the fictional town of Arcadia Bay, Oregon. The story of a friendship that could have ended quickly if not for Max's suddenly discovered talent. She has found a gift in herself - the ability to rewind time. But it is still unclear how exactly this works and what it could lead to. 

  It all starts with saving the main character's friend, Chloe, who was shot in the stomach, but she's unlikely to know about it. As a witness to her death, you try to prevent what's happening, which leads to rewinding time. Now you have the right to change the course of events, influence the past, future, present, and it won't end with preventing the death of an old friend. Soon the couple will reveal the shocking truth about the disappearance of their classmate. Meanwhile, Max must realize the opportunities she's received, her power over time, and learn to use it without harming others. 

  You take on the role of an unlikely rebel in Dontnod's dark prequel to the hit 2016 game Life is Strange. Set three years before the dramatic events of the original game, Before the Storm returns you to the fictional town of Arcadia Bay, where 16-year-old Chloe Price unexpectedly befriends the pretty and popular local girl Rachel Amber. After a strange series of events brings the girls together, you'll choose how to handle a variety of situations, influencing the gameplay with your decisions and dealing with the consequences of your actions.

mac_games.title: Life is Strange: Complete Season
mac_games.description:
Life is Strange is a five-part series of games that takes a revolutionary approach to storytelling based on the consequences of your actions, allowing the player to turn back time and influence the past, present and future.

  You play as Max, a high school student who loves photography. Max saves her old friend Chloe and learns that she can reverse time. The friends will have to get acquainted with the dark side of the city of Arcadia Bay and discover the terrible truth about the disappearance of one of the students.

  Max is overcome with foreboding and struggles to understand the implications of her power. She learns that tampering with the past can sometimes lead to a terrible future.

  Peculiarities
  A modern adventure game with a great storyline.
  Turn back time to change the course of events.
  Different endings of the game depend on the decisions you make.
  Stunning hand-crafted graphics.
  Soundtrack of original indie compositions.

  OS: macOS 10.11

mac_games.title: Undead Horde
mac_games.description:
Become a necromancer and raise the dead! Undead Horde is a necromancer action game with RPG, strategy and slasher elements. Fight the living - they are the ones who sent the necromancers and the undead serving them into exile. Raise from the dead everyone you kill and summon up to 100 undead fighters to your army. Depending on your orders, your army will follow you or attack.

  Explore and conquer a world inhabited by a variety of creatures, from humans to giant scorpions.

  Revive slain enemies and add them to your undead army.

  Endless amount of new weapons, decorations and magic items.

  Create and develop a necromancer - let him become a real embodiment of nightmare.

  Sell and buy items from merchants.

  Upgrade your stores.

  You will become the leader of the undead horde and will be able to open new servants by killing enemies. At your disposal are more than a dozen types of fighters, from human archers to poisonous scorpions.

  You are a necromancer, which means you can raise the enemies you kill, turning them into undead warriors. You will be able to summon undead in your crypt. Graves can greatly strengthen your army - do not miss them.

  Empower your necromancer and his minions with powerful items. The properties of the items are randomly generated, which means you will have an infinite number of options for weapons and equipment.

  You will reclaim the lands that the living have taken from you. You will travel through forests, deserts and wastelands and eventually destroy Paladin Benevolix.

mac_games.title: Alien: Isolation
mac_games.description:
Experience the true fear of Alien: Isolation, a thriller with an atmosphere of dread and mortal danger. 15 years after the events of Alien™, Ellen Ripley's daughter, Amanda, begins to search for the true reason for her mother's disappearance and enters into a fight for survival.

  As Amanda, you will be immersed in an explosive world: you will be threatened by desperate, panicked locals and an unpredictable, ruthless Alien.

  You are a weak girl, so look for resources and improvise, trying to survive in this hell.

  OS: macOS 10.10.4

  The Trigger
 Lost Contact
 Safe Haven
 Last Survivor
 Crew Expendable

mac_games.title: GRID Legends
mac_games.description:
Here is your text with the appropriate line breaks:  GRID Legends is a thrilling racing experience that takes place across the globe. Create your dream races, participate in multiplayer events, experience the events that unfold in the storyline and enjoy the spectacle of motorsports.

  Fight for your place. Push your cars to the limit. Feel the speed. Push your old rivals to the limit, beat your friends again and again... and don't let them forget!

  Play with up to 21 other players - this is the most social and large-scale GRID game with cross-platform play. Make a splash on the track.

  Every race will be unforgettable thanks to a wide range of cars, new locations (like London), a variety of events and the ability to find opponents right on the track.

  Use the constructor to create intense adrenaline-fuelled races and compete with friends in events such as elimination, "electro" and "drifting". Want to put a hypercar against a truck - easy!

  Become part of the spectacular motorsport action in our dramatic Path to Glory story mode, or embark on a massive career mode with hundreds of mind-blowing events.

mac_games.title: Parallyzed
mac_games.description:
Parallyzed is an atmospheric adventure platformer with unique gameplay mechanics.

  Inseparable twin sisters Red and Blue have very different personalities and skills. One day, in a fit of jealousy, Red pushes Blue off a swing, paralyzing her. Devastated, she suddenly realizes that she can penetrate her sister's mind and help her wake up from her coma and return to life.

  You control two sisters at the same time. Red and Blue can switch bodies at any time. Help them get through eerie but fantastically beautiful landscapes, where countless dangers block their path. The color and size of each sister must match the color and size of obstacles in both dimensions.

  Split your consciousness in two and immerse yourself in the parallel beauty of Parallyzed!

  OS: OS X Mavericks

mac_games.title: The Witcher
mac_games.description:
You are Geralt of Rivia, and you are a witcher. That means you hunt monsters for money. You were trained in this profession until you became one of the best, and were given mutagenic elixirs that hardened your body.

  You suffer from amnesia and remember nothing of your past. Kaer Morhen, the last stronghold of the witchers, was attacked by unknown assailants just as you arrived to lick your wounds. The attack was repelled, but the recipe for the mutagen that creates fighters like you were stolen by the attackers. The surviving witchers set out to find the missing recipe, vowing to punish the blasphemers harshly. Despite your memory loss, you join the hunt.

  The game takes place in a dark fantasy medieval world with a subtle modern feel. This sets The Witcher apart from most other role-playing games with a similar plot. With its gripping story, multifaceted characters, and many difficult choices that determine the outcome of events, this game will keep you glued to your monitor until you beat it!

mac_games.title: Descenders
mac_games.description:
Descenders is a modern extreme freeride downhill with procedurally generated tracks where your mistakes have real consequences. Will your team achieve glory and become the next legendary icon?

  From the developers of Action Henk, Descenders is an extreme downhill bike racing game that's easy to pick up but hard to master.

  A modern take on extreme sports

  Procedurally generated tracks: try new jumps, slopes and descents every time you play.

  Freestyle Bike Control: Control your rider's every move with a sophisticated physics system built for drifting and spinning.

  Risk or reward: get huge points and combos -- but if you fall too often, you'll lose everything.

  Gain Reputation: A fully functional online reputation that shows how good you are, and can also be used to earn new items and bikes.

  Fully Licensed Soundtrack: We've partnered with drum & bass label Liquicity to bring you the best mountain-smashing soundtrack.

  Become the new legendary rider: will you be able to survive until the end and reach the highest ranks?

mac_games.title: Dark Light
mac_games.description:
Here is the text you provided with the appropriate line breaks:  Dark Light is a sci-fi action platformer survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world overrun by dark creatures from unknown dimensions.

  You have been thrown into a ruined world as a Dark Hunter, the last remnant of elite human soldiers. To survive, you must gear up, fight your way forward, and collect "shards" from killing supernatural creatures to fuel your energy. As you survive, you will explore mysterious dark zones, kill, loot, grow stronger, and find a way to seal the Dark Void and save the world from destruction.

  PECULIARITIES

  Cinematic quality graphics, detailed characters and environments, vibrant animation with rich visual effects.

  Fast-paced action, complex combat system similar to Souls. You must time your attacks, use dodge and parry enemy strikes to get maximum damage. Use special attacks of your weapon, drone skills or air combos to defeat the enemy in different situations.

  Explore a dynamic world with ever-changing enemies, temporary bonuses, totems that change every time you play. Acquire new drones through factions, and bosses will unlock your skill tree to constantly become stronger.

  Fight nightmarish enemies and epic bosses - from cyborgs to dragons - in the Dark Zones to earn valuable loot and upgrade materials that can be used to customize weapons, drones, and improve your character in a variety of ways.

  Non-linear map structure allows you to choose your own path to explore the dark zones. Travel through a nightmarish post-apocalyptic world and explore hand-crafted maps. Seek strength in an underground city abandoned by ancient builders, fight in eerie castles of flesh. Descend into machine temples buried deep in the Great Swamp in search of your own existence.

  Meet terrifying supernatural enemies, fearsome bosses. Uncover the plot and discover side quests. Meet mysterious characters, join one of the factions, earn their trust by completing quests, and acquire unique skills to defeat rivals or kill them all.

  Detect invisible enemies and reveal hidden paths with a special light source from your drone.

  OS: Mac OS 10.15.4+

mac_games.title: Blacksad: Under the Skin
mac_games.description:
A dark case of corruption in the heart of New York's criminal underworld for charismatic detective John Blacksad

  In the early 1950s, Joe Dunn, the owner of a boxing club, is found dead. At the same time, his rising star, Robert Yale, who is about to step into the ring for the most important fight of his career, disappears under mysterious circumstances. Sonya Dunn, Joe's daughter, takes over the club and must cope with financial difficulties. She hires private detective John Blacksad to investigate Yale's disappearance and find him. This grim case will lead our detective to the darkest and most gloomy depths of New York.

  With anthropomorphic characters and a beautifully recreated 1950s style, BLACKSAD: Under The Skin promises an adventure in the dark detective novel atmosphere typical of the comics of the same name.

  Conduct the investigation your own way. Use your cat abilities to discover new clues. Make decisions that will affect the development of Blacksad's character and the outcome of the case.

  Specifications:

  • An official, all-new story for BLACKSAD set in the unique universe of the comic book series, beautifully recreated in the game.
  • A narrative detective game with gameplay that combines investigations, puzzles, Quick Time Events (QTEs) and multiple-choice dialogues.
  • Choice situations that directly influence the development of your character and the ending of the story.
  • Over 30 new characters, as well as others already known, each of whom has their own story and side quests.
  • A vast world accompanied by a jazz soundtrack worthy of the best Hollywood noir films.
  • A game that will delight both adventure game lovers with its gameplay and storytelling, and comic book fans who will rediscover the characters and visual style of this unique universe.

  OS: Mac OS X 10.11+

mac_games.title: Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor
mac_games.description:
Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor is a next-generation game set in the famous Middle-earth. You will experience a gripping story of revenge and redemption. Play as the ranger Talion, whose family was killed by Sauron's minions. Talion himself did not escape a cruel fate, but the Spirit of Vengeance brought him back to life and endowed him with supernatural powers. Now the ranger, who has returned from the dead, must go into the depths of Mordor to fulfill his oath and destroy those who destroyed his life. Over time, he will discover the truth about the Spirit who brought him back to the world, he will learn about the rings of power and fight his enemy.

  Each enemy the player encounters will be unique, with its own characteristics, strengths, and weaknesses. Thanks to the Nemesis System mechanics, the relationships between enemies and their characteristics are determined by the player's actions and decisions. The dynamic world of Middle-earth: Shadow of Mordor remembers you, reacts to your decisions, and adapts to them. Here, each player will live their own unique adventure.
  macOS

mac_games.title: Sleeping Dogs
mac_games.description:
Sleeping Dogs Definitive Edition is a remastered, next-gen edition of the critically acclaimed and award-winning open-world action-adventure game. All 24 previously released add-ons are included, including the story-expanding Year of the Snake and the terrifying Nightmare in North Point. With a host of technological, visual and audio enhancements, Hong Kong has never felt more alive than it does in Sleeping Dogs™ Definitive Edition.

  The vibrant, neon-lit city exudes a vibrant life, but behind its exotic landmarks, bustling streets and markets lies one of the most powerful and dangerous criminal organizations in the world: the local mafia, made up of the infamous Triads. You play as Wei Shen, a highly trained undercover cop trying to take down the Triads from within. Prove your worth to the mafia bosses by fighting your way up the Triads and participating in their criminal activities, but never giving yourself away.

  Eliminate your opponents in brutal hand-to-hand combat using a unique martial arts system. Dominate the bustling streets of Hong Kong in blood-pumping illegal street racing or tear them apart in explosive shootouts. Sleeping Dogs turns Hong Kong into the ultimate playground.

  Key Features:

  A mature and gritty drama about an undercover cop who could be exposed at any moment.
  Explosive action, seasoned with a nuclear mixture of deadly martial arts, hot shootouts and brutal showdowns.
  Adrenaline-pumping action: Rage through the streets and tear up the seas with a huge fleet of exotic cars, sports bikes and speedboats.
  Hong Kong is your personal playground: take part in illegal races, place bets on cockfights or relax at karaoke. The city's districts offer countless ways to have fun.

mac_games.title: Dying Light
mac_games.description:
From the creators of popular projects Dead Island and Call of Juarez. Over 50 awards and nominations of the gaming industry. It was this first-person zombie game that set new standards for the genre.

  Try to survive in a city where a zombie virus is raging! During this special mission, you will have to make difficult decisions. Will loyalty to your superiors be higher than the desire to save the survivors? The choice is yours...

  HUGE OPEN WORLD

  You will experience unprecedented freedom of movement around the city and a unique atmosphere. With the help of parkour, you will be able to climb buildings and get to the most inaccessible places.

  UNUSUAL BATTLES

  Spill blood in brutal battles and find new and innovative ways to destroy your enemies. Use the environment, weapons and your abilities wisely to outshine your opponents.

  CHANGE OF DAY AND NIGHT

  The world around you changes, and you change with it: from a cruel hunter in the daytime to a defenseless victim at night. Challenge dangers or run away from them as fast as you can.

  OS: macOS Sierra 10.12.1
  Processor: Intel Core i5 3.20 GHz
  Memory: 4GB DDR3 RAM
  Hard Drive: 40 GB free space
  Graphics: AMD Radeon R9 M370X (2GB VRAM)
  Additional Notes: Only AMD Radeon graphics cards are officially supported.

  5th Anniversary Bundle
  Astronaut Bundle
  Be the Zombie
  Book
  Chivalry Weapon Pack
  Classified Operation Bundle
  Crash Test Skin Pack
  Cuisine & Cargo - New (Expansion)
  Custom Maps
  Custom Maps 2

  Godfather Bundle

  Volkan Combat Armor Bundle
  White Death Bundle

mac_games.title: Thief: Master Thief Edition
mac_games.description:
Thief is not a continuation of the previous parts, as the Thief series was rebooted with the release of Thief. The gameplay is based on "choices". In the levels, Garrett has several possible paths and approaches.

  The hero can use the environment and steal from characters. If guards and other NPCs notice that Garrett is trying to steal something, he is in danger. Different NPCs will look for the hero in different ways. The artificial intelligence is familiar with level design, so its behavior will be modeled using different algorithms.

  The fictional world of Thief is influenced by the aesthetics of steampunk and the Victorian era. Unlike the previous parts, there are no factions of the Guardians, Hammerites, and Pagans. The action takes place several centuries after the events of the last game, and therefore these organizations have long since fallen into decline and were forgotten, although the old churches and the Hammerite Cathedral remain as a historical monument.

  The game world locations are similar to those in Thief: Deadly Shadows. There are also glyphs, zombies, a mental hospital "Moira's Haven" (where you can find the mechanical eye of "old" Garrett), the god of the Pagans - Trickster (Temptor), who appeared in the first part of the game, is mentioned. The city is ruled by Baron Northcrest, who wants to make an industrial revolution. Garrett lives in the Clock Tower, not in a rented apartment, and the City itself is divided into two warring factions: the Guard and the Lighted.

  An important role is played by the magical energy of Primal, thanks to which people gain superpowers, at the cost of their sanity and human appearance.

  Compared to the original version, this edition includes a lot of new and varied content:

  Opportunist Bonus Pack: Increases your quiver capacity and contains additional Choking Arrows, Poppy Flowers, and Gold.

  Bank Heist: In this mission, you will have to infiltrate the most secure location in the City - the First Bank of Stonemarket. Bypass the bank's unique security systems to steal the coveted Star of Oldale.

  Digital Artbook: Featuring concept art that helped create the beautiful, dark world of Thief (22 pages). [Thief Artbook.pdf.zip]

  Digital Soundtrack: A collection of music from the game Thief, evoking a mysterious atmosphere. [Luc St-Pierre - Thief OST Director's Cut (2014).zip]

  Tales of The City digital comic: a collection of short stories that shed light on the lives of some of the City's most unsavory residents. [Tales of The City.zip]

mac_games.title: REVEIL
mac_games.description:
The game with a unique story and attractive graphics will test your mind. Various puzzles, unanswered questions, confusing clues and a shattered psyche... To cope with all this, the player, like the main character Walter Thompson, will have to put in a lot of effort. 

  Will you be able to figure it all out? Perseverance will help you find the answers. 

  You wake up. You don't know where you are. Your head is splitting. Everything seems strange, even though it's so familiar. 

  Your wife Martha and daughter Dori are nowhere to be found. But why? 

  You look around and sift through your memories in search of answers. Wanting to understand what's going on, you come across mysteries again and again. 

  What happened last night? Why do you keep remembering how you once built a stage at the circus? 

  The degree of madness is growing, the boundaries between reality, memories and imagination are erased more and more, and it becomes clear: there is no way back. It is absolutely necessary to reach the end. Whatever it takes... 

  "Don't think you're safe. This isn't the end." 

  Players will be immersed in the detailed world of REVEIL, where the boundaries between reality and illusion are erased. 

  The setting is a faithful recreation of a 1960s circus, although it quickly takes on surreal features. 

  You will be able to look into the soul of Walter Thompson and learn about his past. 

  The further you go, the darker and more mysterious the images become. 

  When you find yourself in a whirlpool of deceptive images, fragments of memories and incomprehensible visions, the only way out is to throw yourself into the pool with the hope of finding a way out of the tangled situation. It does not matter that hope is slowly fading. 

  Only the desire to find Martha and Dory keeps you going. Pay attention to the clues they leave behind. Keep your eyes open and... try not to lose your mind. 

  Peculiarities: 

  Deep psychological experiences that will make you doubt everything. 
 Five chapters in different carefully designed locations. 
 First-person narration. 
 Various puzzles and riddles. 
 Beautiful graphics that provide an immersive effect. #madewithunity 
 A multi-layered plot with episodes from life, psychedelic elements and frightening moments. 
 Atmospheric paintings, posters, notes and documents related to circuses of the 60s.

mac_games.title: Ten Bells
mac_games.description:
Ten Bells is an anomalous horror game set in an old English pub. This disturbing adventure game will draw you into a world of surreal anomalies and hidden history, where every detail matters and a ghostly past haunts you.

  "Ten Bells" is a horror game with anomalous phenomena.

  Explore a creepy timeless pub.
  If you don't find any anomalies, move on.
  If you find an anomaly, go back.
  Avoid traps and pub inhabitants.
  Solve the mystery using the collected items.
  Get to the Ten Bells and eventually escape from them.

 ...if you can.

  Peculiarities:

  Over 30 Anomalies: Discover thirty anomalies to progress and uncover the story. Anomalies can be subtle, surreal, frightening, or deadly.

  Unfolding Narrative: Find items that contain plot elements that will help you piece together a creepy story about the pub's ghostly inhabitants.

  Playing Time: Perfect for a fun get-together with friends or a chilling solo session, games last between 20 minutes and an hour. A full game lasts between 1 hour 20 minutes and 3 hours.

  Will you be able to escape the pub and uncover the dark secrets of the Ten Bells? Explore the pub, find anomalies, and experience the horror yourself.

mac_games.title: Neva
mac_games.description:
The emotional adventure Neva was created by the same team of developers who released the critically acclaimed and beloved GRIS.

  The main character of Neva is a girl named Alba, who after meeting with dark forces finds herself connected to a curious wolf cub. Together they set off on a dangerous journey through a once beautiful dying world.

  Alba and the wolf cub learn to work together, helping each other get out of increasingly dangerous situations. The disobedient baby will grow into an impressive beast with a complex character. He will test Alba's love and their devotion to each other more than once.

  The cursed world threatens to destroy them, but Alba and her brave companion will do everything possible to survive and build a new home together.

  OS: MacOS Catalina (10.15)
 Processor: Intel Core i5-4570
 RAM: 8 GB RAM
 Disk space: 15 GB

mac_games.title: Dark Souls: Remastered
mac_games.description:
The game takes place in the fictional kingdom of Lordran, reminiscent of medieval Europe. Lordran is afflicted by a curse that turns its inhabitants into undead; the main character, also a living dead, is tasked with rekindling the sacred fire and restoring the order of things. 

The gameplay of Dark Souls is based on exploring the world, finding key items and destroying bosses; the game is distinguished by a high level of difficulty - it is assumed that the game character will die over and over again, and the player will learn from their mistakes. 

The re-release contains the full version of Dark Souls and the Artorias of the Abyss add-on. 

The add-on adds a side branch to the main plot of Dark Souls, which sends the protagonist back in time to Oolacile and tells the legend of the Voidwalker. As well as new locations, new enemies, new items and an arena for PvP mode. This add-on is also a patch, changing and fixing many aspects of the console versions of Dark Souls. 

Intel 

- Doesn't work, requires Game Porting Tool Kit support. 

Apple Silicon (ARM) 

- macOS Sonoma and later. 

- Apple Silicon (M1-M4, M Pro, Max, Ultra). 

- 8 GB of RAM. 

- There is support for gamepads.

mac_games.title: Football Manager 2024 Touch
mac_games.description:
Achieve instant fame as a manager at one of the world's best clubs, or import an existing career from Football Manager 2023 Touch and continue your journey. 

  New features and gameplay improvements will help improve the team's performance this season, as well as help win titles and motivate players. 

  Play anywhere, anytime on iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple TV. 

  Game Description 

 • Find a winning strategy. You have the best tactics at your disposal to hit the ground running from your first game. To really stand out, come up with your own winning philosophy. 

 • Build a Dream Team: Rely on your scouts to find the stars of the present and future. 

 • Train the next generation. Raise the level of young players on the training ground and turn them into celebrities. 

 • Enjoy the matches. Make important decisions and feel the thrill of life on the sidelines. 

 • Jump quickly through seasons with the Instant Result option, which takes you straight to the final whistle. 

  NEW FOR THIS SEASON 

  TITLE-WINNING CULTURE 

 Decide how you want to manage your team with the new manager principles. Go into the locker room, meet the players and watch their reactions. 

  LEVEL UP YOUR SUPERSTARS 

 Take your team's game to the next level with the new Training System. An improved interface provides greater control, while updated mentoring groups make it easier to manage experienced stars and help them grow the next generation of celebrities. 

  THE MOST AUTHENTIC MATCHES 

 Significant improvements to player movement, ball physics and lighting make matches even more exciting - this is the best-looking football engine to date. And the introduction of inverted defenders will allow you to use the latest tactical options. 

  DOMINATE WITH STANDARD PROVISIONS 

 Thrive in both attack and defence with the new Set Piece Master. Your coaching staff will help you create winning set pieces. 

  GROW YOUR CLUB 

 Influence the future of the club with a new hierarchy system for everything from increasing the transfer budget to building a new stadium. You will be able to more clearly state your demands and demand support. 

  There are a number of other changes coming to each career, including improvements to the opponent pool and two new ways to play. Full details are available on the Football Manager website.

mac_games.title: Football Manager 2024
mac_games.description:
Step into the shoes of a real boss and write your own football history in Football Manager 2024, the most complete edition of the series. 

  Whether you are a manager who likes to build a game from scratch or prefers to chase instant glory, the perfect challenge awaits you. With the new Meiji Yasuda Insurance Ltd J. League license, the J1 League, J2 League and J3 League are open for the first time in history, giving you the opportunity to explore new horizons in Japan. 

  Wherever you end up, you'll have to build a team that can compete with the world's elite. 

  Game Description 

  Continue your relentless journey to the top of the footballing world with the new ability to import your career from Football Manager 2023. 

 Create winning tactics using the most popular systems in modern football and cutting-edge positional innovations to achieve victories on the pitch. 

 Master the transfer market with new ways to build your squad to create a team that can achieve your goals. 

 Improve the quality of your players on the training pitch, developing the mentality and teamwork needed to turn opponents into champions. 

 See your tactical vision come to life on match days, with improvements to the movement of the ball and players making every game more exciting. 

 NEW FOR THIS SEASON 

  A TRUTHIER MOVEMENT IN FOOTBALL 

 Improvements to player animation, ball physics and lighting deliver the most immersive engine in Football Manager history. Be at the cutting edge of football with the new Inverted Full-Back player role, while smarter player rotation adds more fluidity to every moment. 

  DOMINATE THE FIELD 

 Succeed at both ends of the pitch with the updated Set Pick Creator. Drawing on the expertise of brand new Set Pick Coaches, you can develop winning plays in any scenario to outsmart your opponents. 

  PREPARE FOR TRANSFER BATTLES 

 Show off your team-building skills in our most advanced transfer market yet. The battle for talent is tougher than ever as rival managers take a more strategic approach to their recruitment decisions. 

  NEW AGENTS TO CREATE YOUR DREAM TEAM 

 Build your perfect squad with new brokerage agents who can help you sell your surplus players for a fraction of the final transfer price. Additional features for existing agents and the debut of TransferRoom, a real-life football transfer marketplace, give you more real-world tools than ever to build an elite team and dominate the competition. 

  IMPROVE YOUR WORK EFFICIENCY WITH GOALS 

 Motivate your team to achieve more on and off the pitch by setting individual goals. Whether it's goals scored in a season or average performance in training, you can push your star players and prospects to perform at their best. 

  MANY OTHER ADDITIONS 

 Enjoy more variety in each career with the addition of two new game modes. Real World reflects the real time when players joined your club. In Real World, club rosters and budgets are formed on the day of the career start, meaning your roster will only contain players who joined the club before this date, giving you the opportunity to rewrite your team's transfer window. 

  Elsewhere in the game, you can dominate international management and plan your country's future with an updated national pool that gives you a better overview of the talent at your disposal. Match preparation and briefings let you know what it takes to win before each match.

mac_games.title: Football Manager 2023 Touch
mac_games.description:
The ultimate sports manager comes to Apple Arcade. Experience the thrill of being a football coach, develop the most talented players and win the biggest trophies. 

  Featuring a 3D game engine for the first time on iPhone, Football Manager 2023 Touch brings the most realistic football manager experience to mobile gaming. 

  It's time to join the coaching elite. With over 120 leagues in the world's top football countries at your fingertips, which one will give you the perfect job? 

  By choosing one of the best clubs in Europe, you will experience all the excitement and drama of the main club tournament - the UEFA Champions League, fully licensed along with other UEFA club tournaments. 

  Once you're at the helm of a club, work with scouts to sign superstars or find wunderkinds around whom you can build a team for years to come. 

  Use ready-made tactical templates to recreate the most popular styles in football to determine how your players will play in matches. 

  During the match, follow the action from the digital coaching area and motivate your players by setting the right tone with Team Talks and Sideline Instructions. Or, skip straight to the final whistle with Result Calculator. The choice is yours. 

  Continue your career across Apple devices and with an Arcade subscription. Whether you’re using iPhone, iPad, Mac or Apple TV, Football Manager 2023 Touch lets you focus on the best areas of management: transfers, tactics and performances. Make your mark on football. 

  FULL CONTROL OVER THE GAME ON TOUR 

 Enhance your tactical intuition to perfection and manage every moment - during the match you find yourself in the very center of the action. 

  EUROCUPS 

 Test your skills against the best clubs in Europe in tournaments such as the UEFA Champions League, UEFA Europa League and UEFA Conference League, fully licensed for the new season. In European competitions, you will find real draws and official match registration. 

  LET YOU BE HEARD 

 Set the right mood for your team during the break and after the match in Team Chats. With a wide range of reactions and recommendations from your assistant, you can capture every emotion and decide the outcome of any situation. 

  ENJOY SUCCESS 

 Your career highlights will be tracked in a dynamic coaching timeline, giving you a visual representation of your achievements as you progress through the ranks of football. 

  Unlock many other opportunities in the game, both big and small.

mac_games.title: Football Manager 2021
mac_games.description: Being first and winning is not all that football is about. Football is about winning against all odds, making dreams come true and achieving success. Getting to the very top, surprising the world, or getting out of a hopeless situation - these are the moments that make playing worth it.

mac_games.title: Football Manager 2020
mac_games.description:
Enter the tunnel that leads to the vibrant and vibrant world of football and make it revolve around you. Your opinion matters here! 

  Unlike other games, there are no pre-set endings or mandatory scenarios - only unlimited possibilities. This world encourages insight and the pursuit of knowledge, and the history of each club depends only on you. 

  Football is said to be a game of the mind. Indeed, football managers are a special kind of thinker. 

  They do not see obstacles, but only opportunities: the chance to compete with the best of the best, to develop and shape a new football philosophy, to nurture talent and allow it to blossom, to take your club to new heights and, finally, to win the long-awaited Champions League. 

  Whether you will take the podium depends only on you... You are free to make any decisions and are responsible for them...

mac_games.title: Football Manager 2019
mac_games.description:
Simulation brought to perfection. Create your own football history - manage your favorite football club. You have full control over this amazingly realistic game world - make or delegate every decision. 

  You always thought you could do better, didn't you? 

  Sign better players. Play differently. Take those three points. 

  Now you have the opportunity to make your football dreams come true... 

  Go ahead! Sign the contract and take over the reins of the club. 

  Receive tasks from management and start working with players. 

  Whose time at the club is over and who is ready to make their debut in the first team? 

  Your breeders know who can improve your squad and whether you can afford it. 

  Roll up your sleeves and start training. It takes work to make your vision a reality. 

  The coaching staff will help if you let them. Some coaches do everything alone… 

  The press calls your tactics ambitious - they are probably right. 

  Yes, it would be quite possible to play 4-2-3-1, but that’s how everyone plays… 

  And now the stadium is packed, the fans are impatient. The day of the game has arrived. 

  Will you stick with your chosen tactics or make changes right from the edge of the field? Your choice, your way. 

  You are the sole creator of your team's destiny. And your path is unique. 

  The glory may go to the players, but their glory is your story. 

  FM19 brings football closer than ever before. New gameplay features and improved game mechanics give you new, more realistic ways to manage your team. 

  The new training sessions closely replicate the training process of professional football teams. Specially selected tasks and training schedules allow you to fully control the preparation for the next game and the development of future stars. Or you can simply reap the benefits by delegating the hard work to the coaching staff. 

  Explore new horizons and create a unique football philosophy with new styles that reflect the latest tactical trends in modern football. You can also take advantage of new ready-to-use development templates and try to achieve success with them. 

  Clear and concise progression paths are a new feature designed to help new managers reach their potential. The manager initiation is guided by an assistant, covering the basics of football management and helping you chart a course to the top. 

  For the first time in the game, you can try your luck in the fully licensed Bundesliga and 2. Bundesliga, featuring official kits and emblems, as well as players that look like their real-life counterparts. 

  With a new, contemporary design, Football Manager 2019 has a fresh, modern look - the new game looks great and is super easy to get started with.

mac_games.title: Hades II
mac_games.description:
The first sequel ever, Supergiant Games takes the best of the original rogue-like to create a brand new action-packed, replayable adventure. Enter the underworld of Greek mythology and discover how witchcraft began. 

  GO BEYOND THE UNDERWORLD 

 New horizons are opening up for the immortal princess of the underworld: with the support of the inhabitants of Olympus, you will have to stand against the titan of time himself. Both victory and defeat can be the next step in this exciting story. 

  MASTER THE ART OF WITCHCRAFT AND COMMAND DARK MAGIC 

 Ancient magic will fill the legendary weapons of the night; it will not allow anyone to block your path. More than a dozen Olympian gods, from Apollo to Zeus, will present you with gifts and make you stronger. There will be no boundaries for you. 

  (NEW) ENCOUNTERS WITH GODS, GHOSTS AND MONSTERS 

 You will meet dozens of memorable characters, among which there will be both new faces and old acquaintances. Unexpected encounters and many amazing events combine into a unique story that will be special for each player. 

  EVERY FORTUNATE WILL BE A NEW ADVENTURE 

 New locations, challenges, upgrade systems and various surprises await you in the changing underground world. Solve the secrets of the arcane altar, tame magical pets and collect reagents with the help of magical tools to achieve the goal. 

  THE PERKS OF IMMORTALITY 

 With constant upgrades and the familiar Divine Mode, even mere mortals will be able to experience everything that will appear in Hades II. And if you do not consider yourself one of them, take a chance on deadly trials that will allow you to demonstrate the power of a god. 

  THE SUPERGIANT SIGNATURE 

 Memorable, atmospheric universes and adaptive gameplay have always been the hallmarks of Supergiant games. Vibrant hand-drawn landscapes, 3D characters with even smoother movement, and a brand new, exciting soundtrack bring this mysterious world to life.

mac_games.title: Arma 3
mac_games.description:
Experience the true taste of combat in a massive military sandbox.

Enjoy a variety of single and multiplayer modes, over 20 vehicles and 40 weapons, and unlimited content creation in the best-in-class military game on PC.

Realistic and varied, Arma 3 sends you to war.


Arma 3 Features:

- Altis and Stratis 
Destroy your enemies on a detailed open-world battlefield. The action takes place on an island territory in the Mediterranean Sea, covering more than 290 km².

From large cities to rolling hills, you can cross dusty plains in a tank, fly over dense forests in a helicopter, or fight on rocky slopes.

The islands of Altis and Stratis are a dynamic world that can host a wide variety of combat operations.


- Weapons and Vehicles 
Join the battle on foot, pilot armored vehicles, or take to the skies in helicopters or fighter jets.

Conduct joint air, land, and naval operations. With over 20 types of combat vehicles, over 40 types of weapons, customizable gear with melee and ranged attachments, and a variety of gear types to suit any battlefield need, Arma 3 offers a wealth of tactical options.


- Single Player 
Experience the story of Corporal Ben Kerry, drawn by fate into an armed conflict in the Mediterranean, and play through three episodes of the single-player campaign: Survive, Adapt, Win.

Immerse yourself in the varied gameplay of Arma 3 and complete demonstration scenarios. Perfect your combat skills in target practice and get trained in Arma 3 Bootcamp. Here you will find guides for single and multiplayer games, as well as dedicated training in VR.

Feel the crushing force of battles with an improved audio engine, appreciate the new smooth animations on the battlefield, and experience the new simulation of character physics and combat vehicles with PhysX™ support.

Enhanced by the advanced moddable Real Virtuality™ 4 engine, the new Arma game has even more stunning graphics, excellent world simulation, and vast game environments.


System Requirements:

OS: macOS Big Sur 11 
Processor: Apple M1 or 2-core Intel Core i5 1.4 GHz or better 
Memory: 8 GB RAM 
Graphics: Intel HD Graphics 5000 or better 
GPU Memory: 1 GB 


Included DLCs: 
- Apex 
- Art of War Charity Pack 
- Contact 
- Creator DLC: CSLA Iron Curtain 
- Creator DLC: Global Mobilization - Cold War Germany 
- Creator DLC: Reaction Forces - Just Added! 
- Creator DLC: SOG Prairie Fire 
- Creator DLC: Spearhead 1944 
- Creator DLC: Western Sahara 
- Helicopters 
- Jets 
- Karts 
- Laws of War 
- Malden 
- Marksmen 
- Tac-Ops Mission Pack 
- Tanks 
- Zeus

mac_games.title: Total War: PHARAOH
mac_games.description:
Total War: PHARAOH takes you into ancient Egypt at the height of its power and through the dramatic events that threaten its downfall.

Featuring dynamic real-time battles and incredible turn-based empire management, will you become the last great Pharaoh of Egypt or the conquering king of the Hittites?

Or will you take command of the bloodthirsty hordes of the Sea Peoples and bring about the collapse of the Bronze Age?


As the Bronze Age Collapse looms and the dark sails of the Sea Peoples fill the horizon, the people of Egypt cry out for a new leader.

Many want to take over the throne, but the path to becoming Pharaoh is perilous.

In this breathtaking recreation of the Bronze Age Collapse, you must combat civil unrest, withstand natural disasters, and protect your people from waves of invaders.


Enemy armies aren’t the only challenge to overcome on the battlefield.

Lead your soldiers through sudden and dramatic weather changes, such as torrential rains and sandstorms, and witness how the ebb and flow of battle directly impacts the surrounding terrain.

Beware of the threat of fire, too: battles can be engulfed in flames that spread across the battlefield, burning forests and destroying the foundations of enemy settlements.


Prove your legitimacy as Pharaoh, the Great King of the Hittites, or command the invading Sea Peoples, and expand your growing empire across a campaign map spanning the rich cultural centers of Egypt, Canaan, and Anatolia.

Choose from ten faction leaders, embrace their unique playstyles, and command a diverse range of units.

Whether you charm your courtiers as a master diplomat, charge into battle as a steadfast general, or wreak havoc as a fearless warlord, become a leader that history will remember.


On your journey to becoming a Pharaoh, discover a stunningly lush and vibrant recreation of Ancient Egypt at the height of its power.

From the fertile banks of the Nile River to the windswept deserts of the Sinai Peninsula and the mountain ranges of ancient Anatolia, this stunning visual reimagining brings to life the beauty and brutality of Egypt's most turbulent era.


With the all-new campaign customization feature, no two campaigns will be the same.

Define how you play with an expanded set of campaign customization options, such as random starting positions for all factions, detailed resource settings, the ability to play with natural disasters, and more.

With so many options, you can stack the odds against yourself for an extra challenge or become the unrivaled force to blast your way to victory.

mac_games.title: ELEX II
mac_games.description:
ELEX II is the sequel to ELEX, a vintage open-world RPG from the renowned studio Piranha Bytes, developers of Gothic and Risen.

In ELEX II, you will return to the post-apocalyptic world of Magalan, where you will have unprecedented freedom to explore its diverse expanses thanks to the jetpack.


Not even a few years have passed since Jax's victory over the Hybrid, when a new danger falls from the skies to the planet, bringing with it the most dangerous forces of dark elex and a threat to all life.

In order to protect Magalan, Jax is forced to unite all the factions on the planet against a common enemy, while trying to participate in the upbringing of his young son Dex.

A huge, diverse, completely unique world with many biomes and factions in a post-apocalyptic sci-fi setting will open before you.


What awaits you in the game:

- Explore the planet Magalan with unprecedented freedom: the jetpack will allow you not only to quickly move around the map, but also to really fly!

- Interact with a variety of unique NPCs who:
 - remember your actions and react to them accordingly
 - will join you and leave the squad depending on your actions
 - are mortal, and their death will significantly affect the plot

- Fight in close and long-range combat thanks to a significantly improved control system.

Write your own story, where all your actions have consequences, and the ethical decisions are as varied as the game world itself.

Requires macOS 12.4 or later.

mac_games.title: Mad Max
mac_games.description:
Mad Max – the return of the legendary and truly Mad Max!

Transform into the role of a ruthless, unyielding fighter, driven by a sense of justice.

The protagonist has long done everything possible to get rid of his nickname, which has become a stigma on his fate, and to start a new, quiet and measured life.

As calm as possible in the conditions of a post-apocalyptic world.


You are a lone warrior, tired of the status quo.

You seek peace and tranquility.

But the enemy is not asleep and is ready to take advantage of any weakness you may have.

The only safe place in this world full of madness, cruelty, and violence is your car.

A slightly modified rule of "my car is my castle" applies here, which reflects the spirit of this universe.

To stay alive, you need to constantly move, so your car must be reliable, ready for any difficulties.


Your task is to reach the Silent Plain and establish your new home there.

But first you will have to wander through the dangerous and soulless Wasteland, performing all sorts of not the most pleasant tasks.

All for the sake of turning your car into a reliable combat machine and reaching your goal no matter what.


System Requirements:

OS: 10.11.6 or later

Processor: 3.2 GHz Core i5+

RAM: 8 GB RAM

Video RAM: 2GB


Included Items:

- The Ripper
- Thirst Cutter
- The Road Warrior Pack
- Stampede Knockshock
- Rockmaw Brawl
- Pentacal GulpCut
- Circa Blades
- Grizzlegrinda Hood Ornament
- Sawmeister Hood Ornament

mac_games.title: Layers of Fear
mac_games.description:
The canvas awaits the finishing touches. The lead actor is expected on stage. The novel is missing only the last chapter. It is time to face your fears one last time. 

The series that has left its mark on the first-person, story-driven psychological horror genre returns to tell the final, spine-chilling story in the Layers of Fear series. The new release will be the culmination of the critically acclaimed series, as it contains Layers of Fear and Layers of Fear 2, as well as all additional content (including the new The Final Note DLC, which offers a new perspective on the Layers of Fear story) and an all-new writer's story that ties everything together. Built on Unreal Engine 5, Layers of Fear features ray tracing, HDR, and 4K resolution to deliver the most realistic nightmare experience possible. 

Layers of Fear: Create a Masterpiece 

"The only thing you ever wanted...FINISH THE PICTURE." 

Explore a Victorian-era home as an artist whose sanity is cracking at the seams like oil paint on an old canvas. Wander the ever-changing mansion in search of materials to complete your best painting, while trying to escape your past. 

Inheritance DLC: Confront Your Past 

"Someone told me that madness runs in my family's blood... It's time to put an end to it." 

As the artist's daughter, you set out to find answers. What secrets does this house hide? Will you ever be able to understand the madness you inherited from your father? Will you be able to forgive him? All the answers are here, in the house... if you can once again delve into the past. 

The Final Note DLC: Delve deeper into the story 

A new expansion designed to shed light on the artist, his muse, and their family history. The Final Note is told from the perspective of the artist's wife. The new plot may change the way you view the characters in the first game and their actions. 

Layers of Fear 2: Take Your Seats 

"Time doesn't wait even for actors. So don't waste our minutes." 

You're the lead actor in a movie set on an ocean liner. Only things are not what they seem. Explore the ship and find out why you're the perfect choice for the director's (voiced by Tony Todd) latest film. As soon as you open your eyes, you're given a single command: "Play." But will you obey? 

The Lighthouse Chapter: Tie the Story Together 

As the writer, the last protagonist, visit a creepy deserted lighthouse and discover a completely new story that will unite all parts of the series. What awaits you there? It's time to find out. 

Game Features: 

- Explore dark environments and solve strange puzzles to unravel the story of this first-person psychological horror. 
- The stories of three different characters obsessed with art (the Artist, the Actor and the Writer), intertwined into one gripping storyline. 
- All games in the Layers of Fear series, including all add-ons. No questions will remain unanswered. 
- New mechanics for Layers of Fear and its sequel, as well as additional changes that will organically unite all plots and chapters. 
- Rebuilt from the ground up in Unreal Engine 5, Layers of Fear features ray tracing, HDR, and 4K resolution for the most realistic visuals possible. 
- The new Lumen system creates the most immersive and powerful horror experience. 
- A mesmerizing soundtrack by renowned and award-winning composer Arek Reikowski. The trance-inducing music adds another level of spice to the game and will keep you on the edge of your seat until the very end.

mac_games.title: Valheim
mac_games.description:
Prove your worth! 

Will the gates of Valhalla open for you? 

You are now in Valheim, the 10th world of the Vikings. 

Defeat the mighty monsters of these lands and gain the favor of the gods! 

On your way, you will visit the farthest corners of this world, from dense forests to the highest mountain peaks. 

Create powerful weapons, build impregnable castles, and set sail on drakkars to the very horizon. 

Valheim is a game in which you will explore a huge fantasy world, steeped in Scandinavian mythology and Viking culture. 

Your adventure will begin in the heart of Valheim, a fairly calm place. 

But beware, because the further you go, the more dangerous the world around you will become. 

Fortunately, along the way, you will not only face dangers—you will also find valuable materials that are very useful for creating deadly weapons and strong armor. 

Build fortresses and outposts all over the world! 

Eventually, build an indestructible drakkar and set off to conquer the endless oceans in search of foreign lands... But try not to sail too far... 

Game Features: 
- Flexible system of building houses and bases. 
- Intuitive menu for creating items (weapons, armor, food, etc.). 
- Huge generated world. 
- Combat system based on strikes and blocks with a wide selection of various weapons. 
- Fights with bosses and unique trophies. 
- Fascinating system of food and health. 
- Possibility of building and moving on ships. 

OS: MacOS 10.13 or later 
Processor: 2.6 GHz Quad Core or similar 
RAM: 8 GB RAM 
Video Card: Radeon Pro 450 or R9 M290X 
Disk Space: 3 GB

mac_games.title: SnowRunner
mac_games.description:
Get behind the wheel of a cool SUV in SnowRunner and get ready to conquer harsh expanses with realistic terrain simulation! 

At your disposal are 40 models of such famous brands as Ford, Chevrolet and Freightliner. 

Leave your mark on the wild world of the game. 

Complete challenging missions in harsh conditions. 

Mud, torrents, snow and frozen lakes await you. 

Expand your fleet and customize your vehicles with upgrades and various attachments, such as snorkels for torrents or chains for driving on snow. 

Play solo or in a team of up to 4 players and push the boundaries of SnowRunner with modifications from our community! 

• Extreme racing with a realistic physics model 
• 40 unique cars that can be improved and customized to your taste 
• Dozens of challenging missions in a single game world 
• Play solo or in a team of up to 4 players 

App Store: 

Requires macOS 14.0 or later 

Steam: 

OS: Monterey or later 
Processor: 2.6GHz or higher 
RAM: 8 GB RAM 
Video card: 4GB or higher 
Disk space: 50 GB

mac_games.title: Alto's Odyssey: The Lost City
mac_games.description:
Join Alto and his friends on an endless sandboarding adventure to find the Lost City and uncover its secrets.

  Soar over windswept dunes, traverse breathtaking canyons, explore ancient temples, and dive into vast caverns in this fantastical location far from home.

  Along the way, you’ll grind on vines, bounce on hot air balloons, glide across towering rock walls, soar above the ground in a flying wingsuit, and escape mischievous lemurs as you uncover the secrets of the desert.

  Explore a new biome with special hidden challenges layered on the classic Alto Odyssey experience that fans have come to know and love for years—only on Apple Arcade.

  Requires macOS 10.14.0 and later, 64-bit processor.

mac_games.title: Fort Solis
mac_games.description:
Fort Solis: A Story Told in Four Parts

  Fort Solis can be played in one intense session, like a Netflix marathon, or it can be relished chapter by chapter, like rewatching your favorite show from beginning to end.

  Welcome to Fort Solis

 After responding to an unusual emergency call from a remote mining base, Jack arrives at a dark and deserted Fort Solis. Despite the gathering storm, he heads inside and desperately tries to make contact. As the night continues, the situation escalates. Events spiral out of control, and the mystery of the base's missing personnel begins to lift.
