  Fort Solis' Immersive Storytelling

 Fort Solis offers players an incredible level of control to achieve a fully immersive gaming experience. Featuring a cast including Roger Clark, Troy Baker, and Julia Brown, each chapter of Fort Solis evokes powerful emotions in players, including fear, empathy, and more. The main storyline is accompanied by a host of additional narrative elements, such as audio logs, security footage, and flashbacks that reveal the dark secrets of the battle. In addition, there are personal videos from staff members about the events leading up to and after the ill-fated night when the alarm went off in Fort Solis...

  Stunning Graphics!

 Fort Solis offers players a new level of detail and character animation. The game literally comes to life before your eyes, thanks to the latest version of Unreal Engine 5.2.

  An Isolated Mining Base

 Fort Solis stands ominously above the landscape and extends underground for many levels. Players can explore the storm-battered surface, the dark, unlit service tunnels, and the various sections of the base that support its day-to-day functions, including engineering, medical, and communications. As the story progresses, all areas can be revisited for more clues or simply to soak up the atmosphere as Jack's fate is decided hour by hour.

  Requires macOS 13.0 or later and a Mac computer with an Apple M1 chip or later.

mac_games.title: Only Up!
mac_games.description:
Only Up!

  Jackie, a young teenager from the ghetto, dreams of breaking free from the grip of poverty.

  The world around him feels chaotic, but perhaps this is his moment. In times of crisis, action is essential, though each step carries the weight of uncertainty.

  The path ahead is daunting, and choices are often unclear. Yet, mistakes are part of the journey—every stumble is a lesson learned. Jackie knows that to reach new heights, he must first take that leap, leaving the familiar ground behind, not knowing what awaits him.

  Inspired by the tale of Jack and the Beanstalk, Only Up! invites players to embark on a journey that mirrors Jackie’s quest for self-discovery and growth.

  A samurai embodies the spirit of the journey—no fixed goals, just a path marked by stoicism, patience, and cunning. The summit may hold unknown challenges, but the climb itself is where true transformation occurs.

  Forward? Only up!

  In this platformer-like game, players can slow down time and adjust their character's speed, honing their focus for crucial jumps and decisions. With hundreds of Easter eggs and references scattered throughout, the game rewards curiosity and exploration.

  Concentration and patience are vital, but remember: a journey of 10,000 steps begins with that first brave leap.

  Are you ready to rise?

mac_games.title: The Witcher 2
mac_games.description:
The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings Step into the shoes of Geralt of Rivia in The Witcher 2: Assassins of Kings, the acclaimed sequel in the saga of the professional monster hunter. This game offers a mature, philosophical narrative that expands upon one of the most detailed RPGs ever released for PC.

  In a time of unprecedented chaos, powerful forces vie for dominance in the Northern Kingdoms, preparing for war. Yet, amidst the clashing armies, a sinister conspiracy brews, and blood will be spilled...

  Enhanced Edition Features:
 Additional Gameplay: Discover new adventures in previously unseen locations, introducing fresh characters, secrets, and monsters.
  New Intro and Videos: Enjoy all-new animations and cinematic sequences, including an intro crafted by BAFTA winner and Oscar nominee Tomasz Bagiński.
  Arena Mode: Test your skills in this arcade-style mode, battling waves of relentless enemies.
  Expanded Tutorial System: A gradual introduction to Geralt's abilities and adventures, perfect for new players.
  Dark Mode: For the seasoned warrior, this challenging level emphasizes combat training, defensive maneuvers, and surprise attacks, featuring unique dark items.

  Prepare for an unforgettable journey in a world where your choices shape the fate of kingdoms!

mac_games.title: The Medium
mac_games.description:
The Medium is a psychological horror game that immerses players in a dual-reality experience. As Marianne, a medium with unique abilities, you navigate between the real world and a haunting spirit realm, solving puzzles and uncovering dark secrets.

  Set in an abandoned communist resort, the game explores themes of loss, trauma, and the supernatural. Utilize your psychic powers to interact with both realities, revealing hidden truths and confronting the malevolent entities that lurk in the shadows.

  Key Features:

  Dual-Reality Gameplay: Experience simultaneous gameplay in two worlds, solving puzzles that bridge the gap between reality and the spirit realm.

  Intriguing Storyline: Dive into a gripping narrative filled with psychological depth, uncovering the mysteries of Marianne's past and her abilities.

  Atmospheric Design: Explore beautifully crafted environments that enhance the game's eerie atmosphere, drawing players deeper into the horror.

  Unique Soundtrack: Enjoy a haunting score composed by renowned musicians, adding to the emotional and psychological impact of the game.

  Intense Encounters: Face terrifying supernatural threats and use your skills to navigate dangerous situations while unraveling the truth.

  Download The Medium now and step into a chilling world where reality and the supernatural collide!

mac_games.title: Shadow of the Tomb Raider
mac_games.description:
Experience the final chapter of Lara's journey into becoming the Tomb Raider she was destined to be in the Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition. Combining the base game, seven Challenge Tombs expansions, and all downloadable weapons, outfits, and skills, the Shadow of the Tomb Raider Definitive Edition delivers the ultimate immersion into Lara's defining moment. 

   Learn to survive in the most dangerous place on earth: Survive and conquer the merciless jungle. Explore the underwater spaces with all their crevices and winding tunnels. 

   Become a part of the jungle: When enemies are many and stronger, there is only one way out - to become smarter than them. Lara learns from the jungle. She learns to attack when no one expects, disappear into the bushes like a jaguar, camouflage herself with mud, strike fear into her enemies and sow chaos.   

 Descend into dark and scary tombs: You have never seen such creepy tombs before. Reaching them requires great skill, and inside you will find deadly traps.  

  Experience Living History: Discover a hidden city and explore the largest hub location in the Tomb Raider series.

mac_games.title: Tomb Raider: GOTY
mac_games.description: Shipwrecked on an unknown island, young Lara Croft must fight for survival using her raw instincts. Help Lara hone her natural gifts as she embarks on a perilous journey to save her friends and escape the island's bloodthirsty inhabitants. \n\n   Gather vital resources, upgrade Lara's gear, and her skills as a tracker, fighter, and survivor to fend off the treacherous followers of a cannibal cult. Jump, climb, and swing your way through impenetrable forests, treacherous mountains, and labyrinthine temples. Find out how an ordinary girl became the famous Lara Croft - Tomb Raider.

mac_games.title: INSIDE
mac_games.description:
The game takes place in a post-apocalyptic world; the player controls an unnamed boy and must avoid dangers and overcome various obstacles to progress. Inside does not contain dialogue or backstory to what is happening on screen, its plot leaves room for interpretation. System: Mac OS 10.13

  Processor: 2.0 GHz dual i5

  Memory: 4 GB RAM  Graphics: Intel Iris Pro 5200 1536 MB / AMD Radeon R9 M370X 2 GB or Metal-capable equivalent   Storage: 3 GB

mac_games.title: Limbo
mac_games.description: Limbo is a monochrome 2D platformer about a boy who goes into a mysterious world to search for his missing sister. On the way to his goal, the hero will have to face dark creatures, mysterious people and a huge number of other dangers. The player will have to make his way through a dark world, constantly dying and returning to life again.\n\n  Requires macOS 11 or later

mac_games.title: Stray
mac_games.description:
A lost, lonely, and separated stray cat must solve an ancient mystery and escape from a long-abandoned city.


    Stray is a third-person adventure game set in the neon streets and grim, dirty alleys of a dying cyber city. Wander through basements and rooftops, defend yourself from unexpected threats, and unravel the mysteries of this unfriendly place where there is no one but indifferent droids and dangerous creatures.


    See the world through the eyes of a stray cat and interact with your surroundings in the most bizarre ways. When meeting the strange inhabitants of this alien world, you will have to be stealthy, agile, unwise, and sometimes annoying.

    Along the way, your cat will make friends with a small flying drone B-12. With the help of your newfound friend, you will certainly find a way out of the city.


    Stray was developed by BlueTwelve Studio, a small team from the south of France made up mostly of cats and a few humans.

mac_games.title: Baldur's Gate 3
mac_games.description:
Baldur's Gate 3 is a critically acclaimed role-playing game set in the Dungeons & Dragons universe. Players embark on an epic journey filled with rich storytelling, character development, and strategic turn-based combat. You can create your own character or choose from pre-made ones, each with unique abilities and backgrounds.

  The game features a dynamic world where choices matter, allowing you to interact with a variety of characters and factions. Explore beautifully crafted environments, engage in deep conversations, and make decisions that shape the outcome of your adventure.

  Key Features:

  Deep Storytelling: Experience a narrative-driven journey with multiple branching paths and endings.

  Character Customization: Choose from diverse races and classes, each with unique skills and traits.

  Turn-Based Combat: Engage in tactical battles using a mix of spells, abilities, and environmental interactions.

  Co-op Multiplayer: Play solo or team up with friends in online multiplayer mode.

  Stunning Graphics: Enjoy beautifully rendered visuals and animations optimized for the latest Apple Silicon Macs.

  Download Baldur's Gate 3 now and immerse yourself in this unforgettable RPG experience!

mac_games.title: Grand Theft Auto V
mac_games.description:
When a young street hustler, a retired bank robber, and a dangerous psychopath find themselves embroiled in a series of dangerous heists against some of the most feared and deranged figures in the criminal underworld, the US government, and the entertainment industry, they must carry out a series of risky heists to survive in a ruthless city where they can trust no one - least of all each other. 

   Los Santos is a city of sun, starlets and washed-up celebrities. Once the envy of the Western world, it is now a haven for trashy reality shows and suffocated by economic problems. At the center of all this chaos are a trio of very different criminals, desperately trying to grab luck by the tail in an ongoing struggle for a place in the sun. 

   Former gang member Franklin tries to break away from the past. Retired bank robber Michael discovers that the honest life is not as rosy as he imagined. Violent psycho Trevor moves from one businessman to another in the hopes of hitting the jackpot. Having exhausted their options, the three put their lives on the line and commit a series of daring heists in which it's either make or break. 

   In Grand Theft Auto V, fans will not only find the largest and most detailed world ever created by Rockstar Games, but also the ability to influence the lives and actions of three main characters at once. This interweaving of stories of several characters will make the game as exciting and gripping as possible. All the attributes of the famous series are fully inherent in Grand Theft Auto V - here is incredible attention to detail, and signature black humor, and ridicule of pop culture. 

 Apple Silicon (ARM)
  - macOS Sonoma and later.  
 - Apple Silicon (M1-M4, M Pro, Max, Ultra). 
 - 8 GB of RAM. 
 - 80± GB of free space (keep in mind that you are downloading the installer, not the game itself, the game must be unpacked).   

  - There is support for Dualsence and Xbox gamepads.

mac_games.title: Metro Exodus
mac_games.description:
The year is 2036.

    A quarter of a century has passed since nuclear war devastated the earth. Moscow lies in ruins, and a few thousand survivors are forced to fight for existence in the subway tunnels.

    They were not killed by the poisoned nature and mutated monsters, they survived the supernatural nightmare and the horrors of the civil war.


    Now, as Artem, you must leave the metro and lead the fighters of the Spartan Order to embark on an incredible journey across the post-apocalyptic lands of Russia in search of a new life in the East.

    Metro Exodus is a spectacular first-person shooter with a gripping story. 4A Games has perfectly combined intense combat, exploration, and a frightening atmosphere to create one of the most convincing gaming worlds in history.

    Embark on a journey through the wild lands of Russia. Large non-linear levels and a gripping storyline await you. Experience spring, summer, autumn and the horrors of nuclear winter.

    Inspired by Dmitry Glukhovsky's novels, Metro Exodus continues Artyom's story in the best adventure in the Metro series.
  Peculiarities
  An incredible journey. Together with a handful of survivors, you must set off in search of a new life in the East on a modified steam locomotive "Aurora".
  Survival in a big world. A fascinating story combines the classic gameplay of the Metro series with huge non-linear levels.
  A beautiful but hostile world. Explore the post-apocalyptic lands of Russia, made even more alive by dynamic weather and day and night cycles.
  Intense combat and stealth. Collect items and craft weapons, improve your makeshift arsenal and engage in unequal combat with humans and mutants.
  The fate of your comrades depends on your actions. Not all of your companions will survive the journey, and the decisions you make will have consequences. This is a fascinating story that you want to dive into again and again.
  Full immersion into the atmosphere. A flickering candle in the dark, a ragged breath in a frozen gas mask, a mutant's howl and the noise of the night wind - Metro will captivate and scare you like no other game...

mac_games.title: DEATH STRANDING DIRECTOR'S CUT
mac_games.description:
Legendary creator Hideo Kojima presents the final version of DIRECTOR'S CUT, a landmark game for the genre.

    A mysterious event known as Death Stranding has opened a door between the world of the living and the world of the dead in the future. As a result, deformed otherworldly creatures have set out to roam a fallen world devoid of humans.

    As Sam Bridges, you must unite the last survivors of America to restore hope to humanity.

    Will you be able to reunite the destroyed world step by step?
  Requires macOS 13.3 or later and a Mac with an Apple M1 chip or later.

mac_games.title: Lies of P
mac_games.description:
You are a puppet created by Geppetto and caught in a web of lies. You will encounter nightmarish monsters and untrustworthy people who will prevent you from discovering the truth about the chaos that has befallen the world of Lies of P.
  You are awakened by the sounds of a mysterious voice that leads you through the dilapidated Krath, a once thriving city now ruled by madness and violence. In our soulslike game, you will have to adapt yourself and your weapons to withstand unspeakable horror and uncover the nasty secrets of the city's rich. Will you overcome all obstacles by making truth your weapon? Or will you weave your own web of lies to overcome trials and find yourself? It's up to you to decide.

   ・ A DARK, ELEGANT, AND CRUEL WORLD
 Discover the secrets of Krath, a city reminiscent of the Belle Époque. This city once thrived thanks to the puppets, but now its streets are covered in blood because of them.

   ・FIGHT WITH REFINED TOOLS
 Develop a unique fighting style to take on fierce enemies and overcome obstacles. Combine different weapons, use the Legion Arm, and activate new abilities.


    ・WHAT IS A LIE? Sometimes you will have to choose: to lie to comfort the grieving and despairing, or to tell them the truth. Forge your own path.

    ・A CLASSIC STORY REWORKED The beloved tale of Pinocchio is reworked into a dark and sinister story that will have players uncovering secrets and symbols hidden throughout the world of Lies of P.

  OS: macOS Ventura 13.0 or newer Processor: Apple Silicon RAM: 8 GB RAM Video Card: Apple Silicon Disk Space: 50 GB

mac_games.title: Resident Evil Village
mac_games.description:
Experience survival horror like never before in the eighth installation of the legendary Resident Evil series, Resident Evil Village.

    Several years after the horrific events of Resident Evil 7 biohazard, which received critical acclaim, a different story begins. Ethan Winters and his wife Mia have settled in a new place, far from the horrors of the past. But before the couple had time to enjoy a serene life, tragically struck again.


    PECULIARITIES
  - First-person. Players will assume the role of Ethan Winters and experience every desperate battle and monstrous chase through the character's eyes.

    - Familiar Faces and New Enemies: Chris Redfield has typically been a hero in the Resident Evil series, but in Resident Evil Village, his image is tainted by evil intentions. The mysterious village is teeming with ruthless new enemies, and they will hunt Ethan at every turn as he tries to understand the latest nightmare that has closed in on him.

pc_games.title: DEATH STRANDING 2: ON THE BEACH
pc_games.description:
🌫️ Death Stranding 2

Death Stranding 2 is a haunting and deeply atmospheric action-adventure experience that expands on a fractured world where humanity struggles to stay connected. Set in a surreal, post-apocalyptic landscape shaped by mysterious forces, players once again traverse a dangerous terrain where every journey carries both physical and emotional weight.

👣 A Lone Porter’s Burden

You step into the role of Sam Porter Bridges, a resilient courier tasked with reconnecting isolated communities across a broken world. Burdened with cargo and responsibility, every step forward is a test of endurance, balance, and determination in a land where survival is never guaranteed.

🌍 A Shattered Yet Connected World

The environment is vast, eerie, and unpredictable—filled with otherworldly threats, shifting landscapes, and remnants of a lost civilization. Invisible entities, environmental hazards, and human adversaries create constant tension, turning even the simplest delivery into a high-stakes mission.

🤝 Bonds That Shape Survival

Connection remains at the heart of the journey. Players can build structures, leave behind tools, and indirectly assist others, creating a shared world where cooperation transcends isolation. Every action contributes to a larger network of survival and hope.

🧭 Exploration and Strategy

From treacherous mountains to desolate plains, players must carefully plan routes, manage resources, and adapt to changing conditions. Terrain, weather, and cargo weight all influence movement, making preparation just as important as execution.

🎨 Cinematic and Surreal Design

The game blends hyper-realistic visuals with surreal, dreamlike elements. Stunning landscapes, detailed character models, and an evocative soundtrack create an emotional and immersive experience that feels both grounded and otherworldly.

🌫️ Beyond Survival

Death Stranding 2 is more than a journey across a broken land—it’s a story about connection, resilience, and the invisible threads that bind people together, even at the end of the world.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660, AMD Radeon RX 5500 XT 8GB

pc_games.title: Resident Evil Requiem
pc_games.description:
🎯 Resident Evil 9: Requiem

Resident Evil 9: Requiem is a haunting, high-intensity survival horror experience that pushes the legendary franchise into darker, more psychological territory. Blending cinematic storytelling, nerve-shredding tension, and brutal combat, this next chapter redefines fear in a world where survival is never guaranteed and every shadow hides a nightmare.

🧟 A New Descent into Terror

Step into a world unraveling at the seams. Biological horrors have evolved, outbreaks are spreading in silence, and the line between human and monster grows thinner by the hour. As a new protagonist—or perhaps a returning survivor—you are drawn into a catastrophe tied to secrets long buried and experiments that should have never seen the light of day.

Isolation is constant. Resources are scarce. And something is always watching.

🏚 Atmosphere That Breathes Fear

From decaying urban ruins and abandoned laboratories to gothic mansions and underground facilities, each environment is meticulously crafted to suffocate you with tension. Dynamic lighting, environmental storytelling, and immersive sound design make every creaking floorboard and distant growl feel terrifyingly real.

Exploration rewards the brave—but punishes the careless.

🔫 Survival Over Strength

Ammo is limited. Healing items are precious. Every encounter forces a choice: fight, flee, or outsmart. Combat blends strategic gunplay with close-quarters desperation, encouraging careful aim and smarter resource management rather than reckless aggression.

Enemies are unpredictable—mutated monstrosities that adapt, stalk, and overwhelm. Boss encounters test not just reflexes, but composure under pressure.

🧬 A Story of Consequences

At its core, Resident Evil 9: Requiem tells a deeply personal story woven into a global biohazard conspiracy. Shadowy corporations, rogue operatives, and forbidden research collide in a narrative filled with betrayal, loss, and moral ambiguity.

Every revelation deepens the horror.

🧠 Psychological Horror Returns

Beyond physical threats lies something far more disturbing. Hallucinations blur reality. Environments shift unexpectedly. Familiar faces may not be what they seem. The terror isn’t just what hunts you—it’s what waits inside your own mind.

Whether unraveling the mystery behind a new viral strain or surviving a relentless pursuit through pitch-black corridors, Resident Evil 9: Requiem delivers a chilling evolution of survival horror—where every bullet counts, every step matters, and fear is the only constant.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 6GB / AMD Radeon RX 5500 XT 8GB

pc_games.title: NieR Automata
pc_games.description:
NieR:Automata invites players into a hauntingly beautiful, post-apocalyptic world where humanity has vanished—and the meaning of life itself is called into question. Set during a proxy war between androids and alien machines, this genre-defying action RPG blends fast-paced combat, philosophical storytelling, and emotional depth into an unforgettable experience.

🤖 A War Fought in Humanity’s Absence
Step into the role of elite YoRHa androids—2B, 9S, and A2—deployed to reclaim Earth from machine lifeforms. As battles rage across ruined cities and desolate landscapes, fragments of truth begin to surface, challenging everything you believe about duty, purpose, and existence.

🌍 A World of Beauty and Ruin
Explore vast, interconnected environments where nature reclaims the remnants of human civilization. From crumbling skyscrapers to desert wastelands and abandoned amusement parks, every location tells a silent story of loss and memory.

⚔️ Fluid Combat, Constant Evolution
Experience a seamless blend of hack-and-slash action, shooting mechanics, and RPG progression. Customize abilities, upgrade weapons, and adapt your fighting style as the game shifts perspectives and genres in unexpected ways.

🧠 A Story That Questions Everything
NieR:Automata weaves a deeply emotional narrative filled with themes of identity, consciousness, and sacrifice. Multiple playthroughs reveal new perspectives, hidden truths, and endings that reframe the entire journey.

🎶 A Soundtrack That Lingers in the Soul
Accompanied by an award-winning score that evolves with the story, the music heightens every moment—whether in quiet reflection or explosive combat.

✨ An Experience Beyond Genre
With striking art direction, innovative storytelling, and profound emotional impact, NieR:Automata is more than a game—it’s a meditation on life, loss, and what it truly means to be alive.

There are no easy answers. Only echoes of those who fought before.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i3 2100 or AMD A8-6500
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 770 VRAM 2GB or AMD Radeon R9 270X VRAM 2GB

pc_games.title: Resident Evil 3
pc_games.description:
Resident Evil 3 plunges players into a desperate fight for survival amid the collapsing streets of Raccoon City. As a deadly viral outbreak spirals out of control, chaos, fire, and fear consume the city—and something unstoppable is hunting you. Rebuilt from the ground up with modern visuals and cinematic intensity, this reimagining blends survival horror, relentless action, and heart-pounding pursuit.

🧟 Escape a City on the Brink of Collapse
Play as Jill Valentine, an elite S.T.A.R.S. officer fighting to survive the nightmare unleashed by the T-Virus. Navigate burning streets, abandoned subways, and crumbling buildings as the city falls apart around you. Supplies are scarce, danger is constant, and escape is never guaranteed.

👁️ Relentless Pursuit
Nemesis is always watching—and always advancing. This towering bioweapon adapts, mutates, and hunts you relentlessly, turning every encounter into a frantic test of nerve and survival. There is no safe place. Only moments to run.

🔫 Survival Horror Meets High-Intensity Action
Balance careful resource management with explosive combat. Dodge incoming attacks, master precision shooting, and make split-second decisions under pressure. Every bullet counts, and every mistake can be fatal.

🏙️ Raccoon City Reimagined
Explore iconic locations brought to life with stunning modern detail. Flickering neon lights, rain-soaked alleyways, and claustrophobic interiors create a city that feels alive—even as it dies. Each area hides secrets, danger, and fragments of a larger tragedy.

🧬 A Story of Desperation and Defiance
Experience a fast-paced, cinematic narrative filled with tension, loss, and survival against impossible odds. As the outbreak worsens and hope fades, Jill must confront both the horrors of Umbrella and the monster designed to erase her.

✨ A Modern Survival Horror Experience
With cutting-edge visuals, immersive sound design, and refined gameplay mechanics, Resident Evil 3 delivers a relentless, adrenaline-charged journey through one of gaming’s most iconic nightmares.

Escape is your only goal. Nemesis won’t let you forget it.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel® Core™ i5-4460 or AMD FX™-6300 or better
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 760 or AMD Radeon™ R7 260x with 2GB Video RAM

pc_games.title: Sekiro
pc_games.description:
Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice thrusts players into a brutal, beautifully bleak journey through a war-torn reimagining of Sengoku-era Japan—where honor is shattered, death is never the end, and mastery is earned blade by blade. From the creators of Dark Souls and Bloodborne, Sekiro delivers a relentless action experience built on precision, resilience, and rebirth.

🗡️ Become the One-Armed Wolf
Step into the role of Sekiro, a disgraced shinobi bound by duty to protect his young lord. Armed with a deadly katana and a versatile prosthetic arm, you must hunt down powerful enemies, reclaim your honor, and confront a destiny soaked in blood and loss.

🏯 A Japan on the Edge of Collapse
Explore a dark, myth-infused version of feudal Japan filled with crumbling castles, snowy mountain paths, hidden temples, and cursed battlefields. Every location is steeped in history, danger, and mystery—where death lurks around every corner.

⚔️ Precision Combat, No Mercy
Sekiro’s combat is fast, intense, and unforgiving. Victory depends on timing, posture-breaking swordplay, and calculated aggression rather than brute force. Learn enemy patterns, deflect with perfect precision, and strike decisively—or fall.

🦾 Tools of the Shinobi
Master a range of prosthetic tools, from grappling hooks and shuriken to fire-based weapons and stealth tactics. Adapt your approach to each encounter, blending speed, creativity, and deadly skill to survive impossible odds.

🌑 Death Is a Lesson, Not an End
Resurrection gives you a second chance—but at a cost. Every failure teaches restraint, patience, and growth. As you die and rise again, the world itself reacts to your struggle.

✨ A Ruthless Test of Skill and Will
With striking art direction, haunting sound design, and one of the most demanding combat systems ever created, Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice is a test of resolve. Victory is never given—only earned.

Death is inevitable. Mastery is not.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 | AMD Radeon HD 7950

pc_games.title: Forza Horizon 5
pc_games.description:
Forza Horizon 5 throws players into the ultimate open-world racing festival, set against the breathtaking and ever-changing landscapes of Mexico. From blazing deserts to lush jungles and vibrant cities, this is a high-speed celebration of cars, culture, and freedom—where every road is an invitation and every horizon promises adventure.

🌄 A Living, Breathing Mexico
Explore the largest and most diverse map in Horizon history. Tear through towering sand dunes, weave across dense rainforest trails, drift through colorful towns, and race past ancient ruins and volcanic peaks. Dynamic weather and seasonal events transform the world around you, making every drive feel fresh and unpredictable.

🏁 Your Festival, Your Rules
Create your own Horizon experience. Choose how you race, where you explore, and what events you tackle. From high-octane street races to off-road chaos and custom challenges, Forza Horizon 5 puts you in control of how the festival unfolds.

🚗 Hundreds of Dream Cars
Collect, customize, and master an ever-expanding roster of legendary cars—from classic icons to modern hypercars. Fine-tune performance, apply stunning liveries, and push each vehicle to its limits across asphalt, dirt, and everything in between.

🌦️ Dynamic Weather, Dynamic Racing
Experience massive sandstorms, tropical downpours, and dramatic thunderstorms that reshape races in real time. Changing conditions demand skill and adaptability, turning familiar roads into thrilling new challenges.

🎶 A Festival of Speed and Style
Immerse yourself in a vibrant atmosphere powered by pulse-pounding music, stunning visuals, and seamless online play. Join friends, compete with rivals, or simply cruise the open roads together as the Horizon Festival comes alive around you.

✨ The Ultimate Horizon Experience
With cutting-edge visuals, refined driving mechanics, and a world bursting with color and energy, Forza Horizon 5 delivers a racing adventure that’s as exhilarating as it is beautiful. This is more than a race—it’s a journey to the edge of the horizon.

pc_games.title: Batman: Arkham Knight
pc_games.description:
Batman: Arkham Knight plunges you into the dark heart of Gotham like never before—an explosive, cinematic finale to the acclaimed Arkham trilogy. Developed by Rocksteady Studios, this next-gen masterpiece fuses gritty storytelling, blistering combat, and open-world exploration into the ultimate Batman experience. Face your fears as the Caped Crusader in a city under siege, where legendary foes rise and a new, mysterious enemy emerges to break the Bat once and for all.

🦇 Be the Batman Step into the armored boots of the world’s greatest detective and wield an arsenal of high-tech gadgets, martial arts prowess, and stealth skills. From brutal freeflow combat to silent takedowns and forensic investigation, every tool of the Bat is at your disposal. Become the Dark Knight Gotham needs—and the one it deserves.

🚓 Drive the Batmobile Tear through the streets with the fully drivable Batmobile, reimagined with tank-like power and high-speed pursuit capabilities. Shift between battle mode and chase mode in an instant as you solve puzzles, overcome obstacles, and engage in explosive combat. The Batmobile isn’t just a vehicle—it’s a weapon.

🌃 Gotham Under Siege The Scarecrow has returned to unite Gotham’s most dangerous villains—including Harley Quinn, the Penguin, Two-Face, and the mysterious Arkham Knight—in a deadly plan to destroy the Dark Knight. Explore a vast, richly detailed Gotham City turned warzone, where every rooftop, alley, and shadow holds danger and opportunity.

⚔️ Master the Art of Fear Take down enemies with lightning-fast strikes and psychological warfare. Use Fear Takedowns to eliminate multiple foes before they can react, and seamlessly transition between combat and stealth in a world where control is everything. Adapt, evolve, and dominate your enemies with Batman’s unmatched tactical versatility.

🎮 Next-Gen Gotham Built exclusively for next-gen platforms, Arkham Knight showcases Gotham like never before with stunning graphics, dynamic weather effects, and immersive sound design. Experience uninterrupted open-world gameplay with no loading screens and a city that truly lives—and dies—by your actions.

🔥 The Epic Finale This is the end of the Arkham saga—the final chapter in Batman’s story. Packed with twists, betrayals, and unforgettable moments, Batman: Arkham Knight delivers a powerful, emotional conclusion to the Dark Knight’s journey. Can you face your greatest fears… and survive?

systemRequirements.os: Win 7 SP1, Win 8.1 (64-bit Operating System Required)
systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i7-3770, 3.4 GHz | AMD FX-8350, 4.0 GHz

pc_games.title: Dispatch
pc_games.description:
From the creators and directors of Tales from the Borderlands and The Wolf Among Us, Dispatch is a superhero workplace comedy set in modern-day Los Angeles.


You play as Robert Robertson, also known as Mecha-Man, whose mecha armor is destroyed in a battle with his nemesis, forcing him to take a job at a superhero agency: not as a hero, but as a dispatcher. Leading a group of former supervillains, you must manage the team, navigate office relationships, and rebuild your suit for a chance at revenge.


In Dispatch, every decision you make impacts your story. From break room conversations to life-or-death situations on emergency calls, your choices shape your relationships with characters, their loyalties, and how your own story unfolds.


Use the strategy map to view current emergencies and deploy appropriate (or inappropriate) heroes to address them. Balance risks and rewards when making tactical decisions, knowing that every choice can have long-term consequences for your team and the city.


Managing your heroes sometimes goes beyond their superpowers. Each hero has their own unique traits, weaknesses, and past, which you'll have to navigate to keep your team together. Upgrade their skills and unlock new abilities to increase their effectiveness in the field.

Combining storytelling, strategy, and humor, Dispatch explores what it means to be a hero, whether behind a cape or a desk.

systemRequirements.processor: Processor: Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-7400 CPU / AMD Ryzen 5 2600 or higher

pc_games.title: Elden Ring
pc_games.description: Elden Ring is an epic, action-RPG adventure that immerses players in a vast, mysterious world full of danger, lore, and untold secrets. Developed by FromSoftware and produced in collaboration with fantasy author George R. R. Martin, Elden Ring combines the studio’s signature dark fantasy aesthetic with an expansive open world, offering players a rich and challenging experience unlike any other. Whether you're an experienced Soulsborne player or new to the genre, Elden Ring promises to deliver hours of intense combat, exploration, and discovery. \\n\\n Game Features:\\n\\n Expansive Open World:\\n Elden Ring takes place in the hauntingly beautiful, interconnected world of the Lands Between, a vast open-world environment filled with intricate landscapes, towering castles, eerie forests, and underground labyrinths. The world is seamless and vast, offering a true sense of freedom, exploration, and discovery. Players can explore this dynamic world at their own pace, uncovering secrets, battling fearsome foes, and interacting with a rich variety of NPCs that enhance the deep lore of the game. From the towering cliffs to the haunting ruins, every corner of the world beckons with mystery and danger. \\n\\n Challenging Combat Mechanics:\\n True to the legacy of FromSoftware’s iconic titles, Elden Ring features tight, visceral combat that rewards skill, strategy, and precision. Players can engage in fast-paced melee battles, devastating magic attacks, and flexible stealth tactics. The combat is highly customizable, allowing players to create unique builds with various weapon types, magic, and combat styles. The game features epic boss encounters, where skillful timing, dodging, and careful planning are crucial to surviving. Every fight presents a challenge, and overcoming them is immensely satisfying. \\n\\n Deep Customization and RPG Elements: \\n Elden Ring offers a deep character customization system that allows players to build a protagonist suited to their preferred playstyle. From weapon choices to magical abilities, armor sets, and skill development, the game provides a wide range of options for personalization. With an extensive class system, players can choose to be a powerful warrior, agile rogue, master sorcerer, or any combination in between. The game's leveling and progression system provides meaningful choices, encouraging players to experiment and craft their ideal character. \\n\\n Intricate Lore and Storytelling: \\n Developed in collaboration with George R. R. Martin, Elden Ring's world is rich in lore and mystery, with a complex narrative that unfolds as players explore the world and interact with its characters. The story is deeply woven into the fabric of the world, with fragmented tales told through NPC dialogue, environmental storytelling, and ancient texts. The history of the Elden Ring, the powerful artifact that once governed the realm, is central to the plot, and players will uncover its secrets through their journey. \\n\\n Stunning Visuals and Atmospheric Design: \\n Elden Ring’s art design captures the haunting beauty of a world that is both majestic and desolate. The game’s stunning landscapes, atmospheric lighting, and breathtaking vistas create a world that feels alive and full of wonder. From the rolling hills to the dark, mist-filled swamps, every area is meticulously designed to draw players into its eerie beauty. The dynamic weather and day-night cycle enhance the immersive experience, adding to the sense of danger and awe in the game world. \\n\\n Multiplayer and Cooperative Play:\\n Elden Ring offers players the opportunity to engage in online multiplayer experiences, whether it’s invading other players' worlds for PvP combat or summoning allies to help conquer difficult bosses. The cooperative gameplay allows friends to join together and face the game's most dangerous challenges as a team. The game also features a unique messaging system where players can leave helpful tips, warnings, or cryptic hints to assist or mislead others in their journey. \\n\\n Epic Boss Fights and Exploration: \\n Boss battles in Elden Ring are one of the game’s most iconic features, each one offering a unique challenge. From enormous beasts to ancient gods, every encounter tests a player's skills, patience, and adaptability. Outside of boss battles, the open world is filled with a variety of enemies, dungeons, and challenges, ensuring there’s always something new to discover. Whether it's uncovering hidden caves, solving environmental puzzles, or engaging in intense duels, Elden Ring offers an exploration-focused gameplay loop that keeps players engaged for hours. \\n\\n Progression and Rewards: \\n As players venture through the Lands Between, they will earn experience points, materials, and powerful artifacts that can help them grow stronger and uncover more of the world’s mysteries. The game rewards exploration and perseverance, with hidden treasures, weapons, and upgrades scattered throughout the world. Every victory, no matter how small, contributes to the progression of your character and your understanding of the world’s lore, ensuring a satisfying sense of growth with every challenge overcome. \\n\\n With its thrilling gameplay, intricate lore, and atmospheric world, Elden Ring is a must-play for fans of action RPGs, offering an unforgettable experience filled with danger, discovery, and triumph.

pc_games.title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
pc_games.description:
The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt – Complete Edition immerses players in a vast, richly detailed fantasy world where choices matter and monsters are real. Developed by CD PROJEKT RED and now enhanced for modern systems, this award-winning RPG follows Geralt of Rivia, a seasoned monster slayer for hire, as he navigates a war-torn continent in search of his missing adopted daughter. With upgraded visuals, faster loading times, and all DLC and expansions included, this is the ultimate way to experience one of the most celebrated role-playing games of all time.
\n\n
⚔️ Become the White Wolf \n
Take on the role of Geralt of Rivia, a legendary Witcher trained from childhood to hunt and destroy deadly beasts. Armed with twin swords, powerful combat magic, and monster-hunting instincts, you’ll face off against everything from twisted specters to cunning human foes. Make choices that shape the fate of kingdoms—and live with the consequences.
\n\n
🌍 A Massive, Dynamic Open World \n
Explore a sprawling continent full of living, breathing cities, treacherous wilderness, and mysterious ruins. From the gritty alleys of Novigrad to the storm-lashed Skellige Isles, every region is teeming with detail, hidden quests, and dynamic encounters. Hunt monsters, solve mysteries, and dive into countless stories as you roam this beautifully realized fantasy world.
\n\n
🩸 Deep and Tactical Combat \n
Master a fluid combat system that rewards strategy and preparation. Brew potions, craft bombs, oil your blades, and wield Signs—magical spells that can stun, burn, or confuse enemies. Each encounter is a chance to think like a Witcher: observe, adapt, and strike with deadly precision.
\n\n
📜 A Story Rich with Choices and Consequences \n
Unravel a dark and emotionally charged narrative where your decisions truly matter. As the Wild Hunt closes in and political intrigue tears the world apart, Geralt must face complex moral dilemmas and form uneasy alliances. No good deed goes unpunished—and some monsters wear human faces.
\n\n
🧛 Includes All Expansions and DLC \n
Experience the full saga with both massive story expansions: Hearts of Stone and Blood and Wine. Take on new quests, face terrifying new monsters, and explore entirely new regions, including the majestic land of Toussaint. Bonus content like additional armor sets, quests, and gear is all bundled in.
\n\n
✨ Enhanced for Modern Hardware \n
Enjoy next-gen improvements including ray-traced lighting, enhanced textures, improved foliage and shadows, and faster load times. Performance and quality modes let you tailor the experience to your playstyle, whether you’re aiming for buttery-smooth framerates or jaw-dropping visuals in 4K.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i7-3770 (3.4 GHz) / AMD FX-8350 (4 GHz)
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 770 / AMD Radeon R9 290

pc_games.title: Hollow Knight: Silksong
pc_games.description:
Explore a vast, cursed realm in Hollow Knight: Silksong! Uncover its secrets, fight, and struggle for your life as you rise to the heights of the lands ruled by silk and song.


Become a Princess Knight Become the deadly huntress Hornet and journey through a kingdom ruled by silk and song! Though captured and forced into this strange world against your will, you must battle powerful enemies and solve ancient mysteries as you make a deadly pilgrimage to the very top of the kingdom.


Hollow Knight: Silksong is an epic sequel to the award-winning action-adventure game Hollow Knight. Journey through new lands, discover new abilities, battle hordes of monsters and insects, and uncover secrets about your identity and your past.

Game Features: Discover Pharlum, the fallen kingdom of insects! Explore its mossy grottoes, golden cities, and mist-shrouded swamps, all the way to the shining citadel at the very top of the world.


Engage in acrobatic death matches! Weave between enemies in a swift and graceful dance of death, mastering a huge range of lethal moves.

Craft powerful weapons! Master an ever-expanding arsenal of weapons, traps, and mechanisms to crush your enemies and reach new heights.

Complete amazing quests! Track down rare monsters and uncover ancient secrets, fulfilling the wishes of the unfortunate and restoring hope to the inhabitants of the kingdom.

Fight more than 200 fierce enemies! Beasts and hunters, monsters and knights - defeat them all with courage and skill!

Crush over 40 legendary bosses! Fight renowned heroes and fallen kings in epic battles that will determine the fate of the realm.

Challenge yourself in the "Steel Soul" mode! Once you conquer the kingdom, you can test your skills in a new, even more severe test.

Enjoy a stunning orchestral soundtrack! Award-winning Hollow Knight composer Christopher Larkin has contributed music to the sequel. Your adventures will be accompanied by melancholic motifs, symphonic strings and heart-wrenching boss themes that will truly take your breath away.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i3‑3240 or AMD FX‑4300

pc_games.title: Lost Soul Aside
pc_games.description:
Lost Soul Aside

Step into a breathtaking world of high-octane action and breathtaking visuals in Lost Soul Aside, a third-person action RPG that blends lightning-fast combat with a deeply emotional story. Follow the journey of Kazer, a young warrior wielding a mysterious, sentient weapon known as the "Lost Soul," as he battles monstrous creatures and unravels a dark, otherworldly conspiracy.

⚔️ Fluid, Explosive Combat

Master a seamless combat system that blends swordplay, gunfire, and supernatural powers. Swift combos, evasive maneuvers, and devastating special attacks keep the adrenaline pumping as you face hordes of grotesque enemies and colossal bosses. Every battle is a thrilling dance of skill and precision.

🌌 A Stunning, Surreal World

Explore a richly detailed and vibrant fantasy universe filled with strange landscapes, ancient ruins, and futuristic technology. From sweeping vistas to claustrophobic dungeons, the environment is as alive and dynamic as the combat, offering secrets and challenges around every corner.

🧠 A Story of Power and Identity

Uncover the truth behind Kazer’s lost memories and the origins of his enigmatic weapon. Lost Soul Aside weaves a tale of self-discovery, sacrifice, and the fight against inner and outer demons—set against a backdrop of cosmic conflict.

🔥 Next-Level Visuals and Sound

Powered by a cutting-edge engine, the game dazzles with breathtaking effects, fluid animations, and cinematic camera work that puts you right in the middle of the action. The evocative soundtrack and immersive sound design amplify every heartbeat and clash of steel.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5-10400 or AMD Ryzen 5 3600
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1060 (6 GB) or AMD RX 5500 XT

pc_games.title: Gears of War: Reloaded
pc_games.description:
Gears of War: Reloaded

Return to the battlefield where it all began. Gears of War: Reloaded is a complete reimagining of the original Gears of War, rebuilt from the ground up for modern platforms. Featuring cutting-edge visuals, blistering performance, and cross-platform integration, this is the definitive way to experience the brutal war between humanity and the Locust Horde.

🔥 A Fully Rebuilt Classic

This isn’t just a remaster—it’s a reloaded, reengineered version of the 2006 landmark shooter. Every asset has been overhauled: 4K textures, realistic lighting, redesigned cinematics, and optimized combat flow all come together to create a new yet familiar experience. The campaign runs at a locked 60 FPS, and multiplayer hits a smooth 120 FPS with full support for HDR, Dolby Atmos, and instant loading.

💣 All Content, All In

Includes everything from the original Gears of War and its Ultimate Edition: the extra campaign act, all multiplayer maps and modes, and dozens of unlockable cosmetics. No battle passes. No microtransactions. Just all the content, right out of the box.

🤝 Cross-Play and Co-Op Without Barriers

Play how and where you want. Jump into two-player story co-op or squad up for eight-player online matches with seamless cross-play and cross-progression between PC, Xbox, and PlayStation 5. Whether you’re using keyboard and mouse, controller, or Steam Deck, your squad travels with you.

🔫 Tactical Combat, Brutal Impact

Cover-based shooting has never felt so tight. The signature Lancer chainsaw rifle, active reload mechanics, and visceral third-person action return with satisfying precision. AI behavior has been reworked, hit feedback enhanced, and every explosion leaves a mark—literally.

🧱 A Gritty World Reimagined

From crumbling cities to underground strongholds, Reloaded revitalizes the atmosphere of Sera with rich environmental detail and oppressive scale. Every battlefield is packed with tension and story, making each firefight feel like a desperate last stand.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5-4460 or AMD FX-6300
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 or AMD Radeon R9 290

pc_games.title: Cronos: The New Dawn
pc_games.description:
Cronos: The New Dawn throws you into a decaying, retro-futuristic nightmare where time fractures, survival is brutal, and the past is something you literally carry with you. As a lone Traveler for a mysterious organization, you navigate a world torn apart by an event known only as The Change, where the dead don’t stay dead—and your sanity is always at risk.

🕰️ A Time-Warped Tale of Collapse and Consequence

Step into the boots of a Traveler—an elite agent sent into fractured timelines to retrieve lost human essences before they vanish forever. Your mission spans two realities: a devastated future shaped by brutalist decay and a haunting version of 1980s Poland during the rise of chaos. The more you carry, the heavier your burden becomes—mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.

🧟‍♂️ Survive the Orphans, Burn the Corpses

In this world, death is never final. The monstrous Orphans mutate and evolve from fallen bodies—unless you burn them fast. Fail to do so, and they'll merge into even greater horrors. Every encounter demands quick thinking, brutal efficiency, and a full grasp of your limited resources. This is survival horror stripped raw.

🧠 Harvest the Past, Lose Your Mind

Your weapon—the Harvester—lets you extract the essence of dead souls from a time long gone. But beware: every soul you carry twists your mind, spawning hallucinations, whispers, and flashbacks that blur the line between reality and memory. Power comes with a price, and the further you go, the deeper the psychological cost.

🏙️ Two Timelines. One Dying World.

Navigate a dual-layered world: a decaying, neon-lit dystopian future and a grim, industrial past steeped in communist-era oppression. Each zone is packed with secrets, horrors, and environmental storytelling that paints a bleak picture of what went wrong—and what little hope remains. No loading screens. Just seamless jumps between the eras as timelines collapse in on each other.

🔫 Slow, Tactical Combat with No Mercy

Combat in Cronos is weighty and deliberate. Ammunition is rare, enemies are relentless, and weapons feel handcrafted—each with their own strengths and limitations. Whether using guns, melee tools, or setting traps, every move you make could be your last. There’s no rushing here—only surviving.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5‑8400F / i5‑8600K or AMD Ryzen 5 3600
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1080 or AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT

pc_games.title: Hell Is Us
pc_games.description:
An Introspective, Brutal, and Emotionally Charged Action-Adventure Set in a War-Torn World Beyond Reason

Hell Is Us drops you into a surreal, war-ravaged homeland haunted by supernatural forces and emotional trauma. With no map, no compass, and no handholding, this is a dark, symbolic odyssey where violence, memory, and grief manifest as monsters—and only raw instinct will guide you through.

🔥 A Story of War, Loss, and the Unknown

Play as Rémi, a former soldier returning to his fractured country amidst an apocalyptic Calamity. The land is crawling with mysterious creatures born of emotion and violence—manifestations of humanity’s darkest tendencies. Your goal? Uncover the truth. Survive the unknown. And maybe, find redemption.

🗡️ Melee Combat That Hits Deep

Forget guns. In this world, you fight with primal weapons—swords, axes, spears—all fueled by precision, emotion, and timing. Combat is raw and tense, supported by a high-tech drone that serves as your only true companion. Dodge, parry, and strike with purpose—every battle feels earned, not given.

🧭 No Map. No GPS. Just You.

Say goodbye to quest markers and waypoint trails. Hell Is Us throws you into a semi-open world where you navigate by reading the environment, picking up on visual cues, and trusting your gut. It's exploration as it was meant to be—immersive, uncertain, and deeply rewarding.

💀 Face the Manifestations of Trauma

Your enemies aren’t just monsters—they’re metaphors. Hollow Walkers, grotesque beings of sorrow and rage, are physical echoes of the past. Each encounter is a psychological battle, where the lines between inner pain and external threat blur completely.

🌫️ A War-Torn World Like No Other

Explore the decaying beauty of Hadea, a country suffocating in fog, littered with ruins, and fractured by endless conflict. Every structure and landscape tells a story—if you’re willing to look. This is not a place for the faint of heart. It’s a meditation in ruins.

🎮 Stylized Grit with a Purpose

Hell Is Us fuses striking, minimalist visuals with moody lighting and oppressive atmosphere. It’s less about photorealism and more about psychological realism—every frame a reflection of emotional decay and human suffering.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i7‑7700K or AMD Ryzen 3 3300X
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 (8 GB) or AMD Radeon RX 5600 XT (6 GB) or Intel Arc A750 (8 GB)

pc_games.title: High on Life
pc_games.description:
HIGH ON LIFE is a bizarre, bold, and hilariously twisted sci-fi shooter from the minds behind Rick and Morty. Set in a colorful, grotesque alien world where talking guns crack jokes and humanity is under threat of cosmic exploitation, this outrageous first-person adventure blends absurd humor, fast-paced action, and intergalactic exploration like nothing you've ever experienced.

Game Features

🧠 A Wild Sci-Fi Comedy Adventure
Step into the space boots of a down-on-their-luck human turned unlikely bounty hunter after Earth is invaded by an alien cartel. Their goal? To turn humans into drugs. Your mission? Stop them—armed with sentient, wisecracking weapons who are just as confused (and annoyed) as you are.

🔫 Talking Guns With Attitude
Each weapon is a character, complete with unique personalities, upgrade paths, and hilarious dialogue. From Gatlians who sass you mid-fight to tools that talk back, your arsenal becomes your dysfunctional crew in this over-the-top journey across the stars.

🌌 Explore an Insane Alien Universe
Travel to vibrant, grotesque, and oddly charming alien worlds, from sludgy cities to carnivorous jungles. Meet weird alien species, take on bounty contracts, and experience side quests packed with absurdity, pop culture satire, and dark comedy.

⚔️ Chaotic, Creative Combat
Engage in explosive FPS combat with a twist—use your living weapons’ alt-fire abilities, jetpacks, environmental hazards, and more. Fight cartel goons, grotesque monsters, and over-the-top bosses in fast, flexible battles where laughter and bullets fly equally.

🎥 Ridiculous Storytelling Meets Satire
Written by Justin Roiland and a team of comedy writers, High on Life blends narrative absurdity with biting satire. Expect fourth-wall breaks, wild plot twists, and bizarre moments that’ll leave you laughing, cringing, and questioning reality.

🎮 Next-Gen Visuals with a Psychedelic Edge
Brought to life in stunning detail, the alien worlds and characters of High on Life pop with grotesque charm and vibrant weirdness. Dynamic lighting, smooth animations, and surreal design elements make every moment look like a twisted Saturday morning cartoon for adults.

🔊 Immersive Audio & Off-the-Wall Performances
Enjoy fully voiced performances from a star-studded comedic cast, layered with irreverent banter and absurd alien languages. The soundtrack ranges from sci-fi synthwave to oddly catchy alien tunes—perfect for blasting aliens while questioning your life choices.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 (3 GB) or AMD Radeon R9 290X (4 GB)

pc_games.title: METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER
pc_games.description:
METAL GEAR SOLID Δ: SNAKE EATER is a masterfully reimagined tactical espionage action game that plunges players into the origin story of the legendary soldier, Big Boss. Developed with stunning modern visuals and faithful gameplay enhancements, this remake of the 2004 classic (Metal Gear Solid 3: Snake Eater) brings the Cold War battlefield to life like never before. Stealth, survival, and sacrifice collide in a deep cinematic experience where the jungle is as much your enemy as the soldiers hunting you.

Game Features

🧊 The Birth of a Legend
Step into the boots of Naked Snake as he’s sent deep behind enemy lines in Soviet territory during the height of the Cold War. Uncover the origins of the Metal Gear saga, face haunting betrayals, and make choices that shape the man who will become Big Boss.

🌿 Tactical Stealth in the Wild
Use camouflage, sound, and survival tactics to outwit enemies in a living, breathing jungle. Creep through tall grass, climb trees, or crawl through mud as you stay hidden—or strike with deadly precision when the moment is right.

🔫 Combat & Survival Mechanics
Scavenge for food, treat wounds in real-time, and manage stamina as you adapt to the unforgiving wilderness. Use CQC (Close Quarters Combat), an array of iconic weapons, and clever tactics to overcome elite operatives and deadly wildlife alike.

🎥 Cinematic Storytelling
A gripping, emotional narrative crafted by legendary director Hideo Kojima, featuring unforgettable characters, dramatic plot twists, and philosophical themes about loyalty, identity, and the cost of war.

⚔️ Iconic Boss Battles
Face off against the fearsome Cobra Unit—each boss a unique, high-concept encounter testing your skill, patience, and strategy in unexpected ways. From sniper duels to psychological warfare, these encounters are legendary for a reason.

🌀 Faithful Remake, Rebuilt in Unreal Engine 5
Experience the legendary story and gameplay of Snake Eater with modern graphics, enhanced controls, and audio improvements, all powered by Unreal Engine 5. Dense jungles, dynamic weather, and lifelike character models elevate every moment.

🎧 Immersive Audio & Modern Features
Get lost in the atmospheric soundtrack, hear the jungle breathe around you, and relive iconic moments with richly re-recorded voice work and enhanced 3D sound design. DualSense support on PS5 adds immersive feedback to every sneaky step and brutal takedown.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5-6400 @ 2.7GHz or AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 (6 GB) or AMD Radeon RX 580 (8 GB)

pc_games.title: Returnal
pc_games.description:
Returnal is a relentless third-person sci-fi action shooter that blends high-octane bullet hell combat with roguelike progression and psychological horror. Developed by Housemarque and published by Sony Interactive Entertainment, this PS5 and PC title thrusts you into a surreal, ever-changing alien world where death is just the beginning—and escape might be impossible.

Game Features

🌌 Break the Cycle
Play as Selene, a deep-space scout who crash-lands on the hostile planet Atropos. Trapped in an endless loop of death and rebirth, she must battle for survival and sanity as the world—and her memories—morph with every cycle.

🎯 Fast-Paced, Bullet Hell Combat
Engage in explosive third-person shooter gameplay that fuses tight, responsive controls with chaotic, screen-filling enemy patterns. Dash, dodge, and unleash devastating alien weaponry in split-second firefights that demand precision and agility.

🌀 Roguelike Replayability
Each run is unique. Procedurally generated biomes, randomized enemy encounters, loot, and environmental storytelling make every loop unpredictable. Learn from your deaths, evolve your strategy, and unlock permanent upgrades that shape future runs.

🧬 Alien Arsenal & Augmentations
Discover an arsenal of evolving alien weapons, each with unique traits and alternate fire modes. Enhance Selene with powerful Parasites, Suit Upgrades, and mysterious Artifacts—each offering risk-reward decisions that impact your survival.

🧠 Psychological Horror & Storytelling
Uncover Selene’s fractured memories and piece together a narrative woven with cosmic dread and emotional depth. Encounter strange visions, cryptic symbols, and a mysterious house that offers chilling glimpses into her past.

🌁 Stunning Next-Gen Visuals
Built exclusively for next-gen systems, Returnal delivers incredible detail, atmospheric lighting, and smooth performance. Real-time particle effects and immersive environments bring Atropos to life with eerie beauty and haunting danger.

🎧 3D Audio & Haptic Feedback
Experience next-level immersion with 3D spatial audio and full DualSense support (on PS5). Hear enemies creeping behind you, feel every trigger pull, and sense the alien world pulsing through your controller.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5-6400 @ 2.7GHz or AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 (6 GB) or AMD Radeon RX 580 (8 GB)

pc_games.title: Resident Evil 2 Remake
pc_games.description:
Resident Evil 2 returns as a stunning, nerve-shredding reimagining of the survival horror classic. Built from the ground up using Capcom’s RE Engine, this modern masterpiece blends tense, atmospheric exploration with brutal combat and a haunting narrative. Whether you’re stepping into Raccoon City for the first time or returning decades later, this is a horror experience that feels terrifyingly fresh.

Game Features

🧟 Classic Horror Reimagined
Experience a modern take on the 1998 survival horror landmark with cinematic storytelling, realistic visuals, and over-the-shoulder combat. The game honors its roots while delivering a fully updated gameplay experience tailored for a new generation.

🔫 Survival-Driven Combat
Manage limited resources and face every encounter with caution. Whether using pistols, shotguns, or grenades, every shot counts against the grotesque undead and bio-organic horrors that stalk the corridors of Raccoon City.

👥 Dual Campaigns, One Nightmare
Play as rookie cop Leon S. Kennedy or college student Claire Redfield, each with their own campaign, story paths, and exclusive areas. Their journeys intertwine, revealing different perspectives of the same nightmarish outbreak.

🧩 Puzzles and Secrets in a Dying City
Solve classic Resident Evil-style puzzles that block your path, open secret areas, and reveal hidden lore. Search every drawer, hallway, and shadow to piece together the mystery behind the outbreak.

🎯 Over-the-Shoulder, High-Tension Gameplay
The third-person camera redefines tension, placing you closer to the action than ever. Carefully aim, conserve your ammo, and prepare for the game’s unpredictable enemy behavior and deadly ambushes.

🧠 Relentless Enemies & Iconic Bosses
Face terrifying foes—from twitching Lickers crawling across walls to the unrelenting force of Mr. X, a monstrous stalker who will hunt you from room to room with chilling persistence.

💀 Photorealistic Gore & Immersion
Powered by the RE Engine, every detail is designed for immersion—from dynamic lighting and detailed environments to reactive enemy damage. Flesh peels, blood splatters, and enemies deform in real-time as you fight to survive.

🔁 Multiple Playthroughs, Endless Terror
Unlock alternate modes, weapons, and story variations. With "2nd Run" scenarios, Hardcore mode, and bonus content, the nightmare never ends.

🎮 Optimized for Modern Systems
Resident Evil 2 Remake supports high resolutions, improved frame rates, and enhanced lighting for a next-gen horror experience. Whether on console or PC, the game delivers smooth, stunning performance with minimal load times.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel® Core™ i7-3770 or AMD FX™-9590 or better
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1060 or AMD Radeon™ RX 480 with 3GB VRAM

pc_games.title: RoboCop: Rogue City – Unfinished Business
pc_games.description:
RoboCop: Rogue City – Unfinished Business – Justice Hits the Elevator

RoboCop returns—leaner, meaner, and more relentless than ever—in a standalone, high-intensity mission that descends into the darkest depths of Old Detroit’s corruption. Unfinished Business picks up immediately after the events of Rogue City, throwing players into a vertical stronghold crawling with enemies, secrets, and moral choices.

🏢 OmniTower: Detroit’s Fortress of Crime
Enter OmniTower, a towering mega-complex built for displaced citizens, now taken over by ruthless mercenaries with a singular goal—control RoboCop. Every floor is a battlefield, filled with drones, turrets, jetpack soldiers, cyborg ninjas, and explosive traps. It's a kill zone stacked to the ceiling.

⚙️ Expanded Arsenal & Brutal Takedowns
RoboCop’s Auto-9 sidearm is back and deadlier than ever. Alongside it, wield new weapons like the Cryo Cannon to freeze enemies mid-charge. The environment becomes your weapon—smash enemies into TVs, electrocute them with breaker boxes, or toss them into vending machines with mechanical strength.

⏪ Flashbacks & Alternate Playable Perspectives
For the first time, step into the past and play as Alex Murphy before his transformation—more vulnerable but still fighting for justice. You’ll also take control of ED-209 in heavy-metal segments, unleashing pure firepower in scenes of explosive devastation.

👥 New Faces & Fragile Alliances
Reunite with familiar allies and encounter new characters like Miranda Hale, a former OCP scientist navigating a dangerous path to redemption. Decisions made along the way deepen relationships and shape your understanding of the twisted hierarchy behind the chaos.

⚡ Focused, Relentless Action
This expansion distills the core RoboCop experience into a high-octane, 6–10 hour campaign packed with close-quarters combat, narrative intensity, and next-gen visuals. No distractions, no open-world padding—just pure, purposeful gameplay where every bullet counts and justice never quits.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i9-9900k or AMD Ryzen 5 5600X
systemRequirements.graphics: GeForce RTX 3080 10GB or Radeon RX 6800 XT 16GB

pc_games.title: Call of Duty: Black Ops 6
pc_games.description:
Call of Duty: Black Ops 6 – When Loyalty Breaks, Legends Rise

Call of Duty: Black Ops 6 propels you into the shadowed epicenter of political turmoil and betrayal in the early 1990s. Developed by Treyarch and Raven Software using the IW Engine, this spy-infused shooter melds cinematic action, clandestine espionage, and pulse-pounding gunplay to redefine how warfare—and trust—are fought.

⚔️ Rogue Operatives, Broken Bonds
You are Black Ops veteran Frank Woods, once a warrior for the CIA, now branded a traitor by the very people who trusted you. With the agency infiltrated by a cryptic enemy known only as Pantheon, you abandon broken institutions and take up arms with allies forged in secrecy—fighters like Troy Marshall, Jane Harrow, and others whose loyalties are as volatile as the world around them. Your mission? End the conspiracy or be the casualty.


🌍 Global Stage, Cold-Blooded Intrigue
From lavish Washington DC galas to the scorched deserts of the Gulf War, and into the frozen reaches of Russia and Southern Europe—every mission is a nerve-lashed blend of stealth, espionage, and cinematic intensity. Whether you're infiltrating a gala to extract intel or unleashing chaos in sand-swept missile fields, each scene is a high-stakes set piece that demands precision, patience, and ruthless adaptability.


🌀 Movement Without Limits
Discover the Omnidirectional Movement mechanic—dive, slide, sprint, and pivot in any direction with visceral fluidity. Whether scaling walls, sprinting across cover, or diving to flank enemies, motion becomes as much a weapon as your firearm.


⚫ Zombies Return, Wild and Relentless
Face off against grotesque hordes in the revitalized Round-Based Zombies mode. Launching with two fresh maps—Liberty Falls and Terminus—the undead are more terrifying and strategic than ever, complete with deep narrative undercurrents and atmospheric triggers buried in co-op combat.


🎮 Multiplayer, Reborn and Refined
Jump into 16 meticulously crafted maps: 12 classic 6v6 arenas and 4 Strike maps tailored for frenetic 2v2 or 6v6 action. Prestige mode has returned to its roots, rewarding dedication with new unlocks and prestige tracks. From corner slicing precision to fully customizable HUDs, this isn’t just multiplayer—it’s a surgical return to form.


🎥 A Rogue’s Redemption
Black Ops 6 builds a bold legacy within the series—one rooted in betrayal and redemption. Your choices aren’t just tactical—they are existential. As you carve your path through deception and violence, every bullet fired and secret uncovered brings you closer to redemption—or total annihilation. The deeper the lie, the more explosive the reveal.

systemRequirements.processor: AMD Ryzen 5 1400 or Intel Core i5‑6600
systemRequirements.graphics: AMD Radeon RX 470, NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960, or Intel Arc A580 (2 GB VRAM)

pc_games.title: The Alters
pc_games.description:
The Alters – Who Could You Have Been?

The Alters is a genre-bending sci-fi survival game from 11 bit studios, creators of This War of Mine and Frostpunk. Set against the backdrop of a distant, deadly planet and powered by Unreal Engine, the game tells a deeply human story of identity, consequence, and survival—where the greatest danger isn’t just the world outside, but the fractured pieces of yourself.

🧬 One Life. Infinite Selves.
Step into the role of Jan Dolski, a lone worker stranded on a hostile planet where every sunrise brings death. With no crew, no way home, and time running out, Jan discovers a mysterious substance—Rapidium—that allows him to create alternate versions of himself: The Alters. Each Alter represents a different version of Jan based on pivotal life choices he never made—some optimistic, some broken, all essential to survival.

🏚️ Build, Adapt, Survive
Operate and upgrade your mobile base as it crawls across the planet’s scorched surface, always one step ahead of the rising, lethal sun. Mine resources, craft tools, manage power systems, and assign your Alters to specialized roles—engineers, technicians, botanists, and more. But balancing their needs and managing their emotions is as critical as maintaining the base itself.

🧠 A Web of Conscious Minds
Each Alter is a fully realized character with unique memories, beliefs, and feelings. They aren’t tools—they’re people, grappling with what it means to be real. Some will resent you. Others will support you. Conflicts will arise, alliances will form, and every choice you make could tip the balance between harmony and collapse.

🌌 Existential Sci-Fi with a Human Heart
This isn’t just about survival—it’s about the lives we could have lived. Through branching dialogue, moral dilemmas, and deeply personal story arcs, you'll explore the psychology of regret, identity, and the fractured self. Who would you be if you had made just one different decision?

⚙️ Next-Gen Immersion with Unreal Engine
Explore a beautifully bleak alien landscape rendered in rich, realistic detail. Dynamic lighting, procedurally reactive systems, and lifelike animations draw you into a world that’s as captivating as it is hostile. Your every decision—every bolt tightened, every clone awakened—feels grounded and meaningful.

🪐 A Singular Journey Through Many Selves
In The Alters, survival is not just about building, fighting, or running. It's about understanding. Only by facing the versions of yourself you left behind can you find a path forward—and possibly, a way home.

systemRequirements.processor: AMD Ryzen 5 1600 or Intel Core i7‑6700
systemRequirements.graphics: AMD Radeon RX 570, NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060, or Intel Arc A570 (6+ GB VRAM)

pc_games.title: Prototype 2
pc_games.description:
Welcome to New York Zero.

The sequel to Radical Entertainment's 2009 bestseller, Prototype® 2, retains the unbridled chaos of the original Prototype and expands on its capabilities. You are Sergeant James Heller, a husband and father to a deceased wife and child, and a soldier left to die.

With a new protagonist, players will cut their way through the wasteland of New York Zero, which has survived a deadly virus outbreak. Armed with unprecedented new abilities, you will gradually build up a huge arsenal of genetic weapons and deadly biological superpowers. Hunt, kill, consume. Do everything for one goal - to kill... Alex... Mercer!

Are you ready to destroy your creator?

Features:
- Tentacle Power: Get ready to unleash the ultimate form of destruction. Sergeant James Heller's all-crushing tentacles allow you to hurl and smash cars and military vehicles, capture infected monsters, and even tear groups of enemies to bloody shreds. Unleash your inner hell!

- Create your own killer: Prototype 2 gives you the opportunity to combine the destructive capabilities of new mutations and create your own Prototype. Fast movement? Sharp blades? Or even advanced camouflage? The choice is yours!

- Hunt - Kill - Transform: Now you can track any enemy with your inner sonar! Sergeant James Heller brings a new dimension to the Prototype universe that allows you to hunt, kill and become anyone who stands in your way. Transform into a soldier, a scientist or anyone else, absorb their memories and gain new abilities. You won’t have such opportunities anywhere else!

- Harness the Devil: Experience the gripping story of Sergeant James Heller and attempt to defeat the devil himself… Alex Mercer. As factions fight for control of the infection against the backdrop of the ruins of New York Zero, Prototype 2 is the most exciting video game event of 2012!

- Size Matters: Featuring the unique Titanium 2.0 technology, Prototype 2 will exceed what players have come to expect from an open-world action game. Witness building-sized infected monsters ravaging the city streets while you soar above entire squads of highly trained Blackwatch soldiers. Prototype 2: Bigger, Badder, Better!

- New York Zero: A whole new hunting ground! The New York that humanity knew and loved no longer exists… It is now New York Zero, or NYZ, to put it simply.


PROTOTYPE 2's open world is divided into three distinct zones. The heavily military-protected Green Zone, the quarantined slums of the Yellow Zone, and the war-torn nightmare of the Red Zone are cities players have never seen before. Alex Mercer's home, the Red Zone, is a terrifying place where the virus has finally taken over the ruins of skyscrapers, infected the population, and brought the risk of death to every hidden corner.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel® Core™ 2 Duo 2.6GHz or AMD Phenom X3 8750
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® 8800 GT or ATI Radeon HD 4850 (512MB VRAM)

pc_games.title: Until Then
pc_games.description:
Until Then is a deeply emotional, story-driven adventure set in a richly realized, alternate-universe Philippines. Blending coming-of-age drama with supernatural mystery, the game follows high school student Mark Borja as he navigates the complexities of teenage life—friendships, exams, and awkward text messages—while an unsettling string of disappearances threatens to unravel the world as he knows it.

📱 Slice-of-Life Meets the Surreal
Live out the ordinary teenage experience in a not-so-ordinary world. Go to class, hang out with friends, jam on the piano, and send snarky text replies—but all while something strange brews beneath the surface. As people begin to vanish without explanation, Mark’s reality begins to shift in eerie, dreamlike ways.

🧩 A Story of Choices and Consequences
Every interaction counts. Dialogue choices, how you spend your day, and even the photos you take can affect your relationships and the unfolding mystery. As Mark delves deeper into the truth, he’ll face moments of levity, heartbreak, and surreal horror.

🌆 Set in a Unique Filipino Backdrop
Experience a rare look into modern Filipino culture through beautiful pixel-art environments, authentic references, and local flavor—from street food stalls to busy classrooms to late-night commutes through neon-lit Manila streets.

🎮 Simple Mechanics, Deep Narrative
Engage with the world through light exploration, minigames, texting, and environmental puzzles. Whether playing a piano melody or scrolling through a social feed, every detail is carefully designed to ground you in Mark’s world and emotional journey.

🎨 Beautiful 2.5D Pixel Art and Original Soundtrack
With a blend of stylized visuals and dynamic lighting, Until Then brings its characters and settings to life in a visually captivating way. A heartfelt soundtrack underscores both the everyday and the extraordinary with emotional depth.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5‑4460 or AMD FX‑8320
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 750 Ti or AMD Radeon R7 260

pc_games.title: Killing Floor 3
pc_games.description:
Killing Floor 3 drops you into a relentless, hyper-violent future set in 2091, where humanity’s last stand is waged against the nightmarish hordes of bioengineered monstrosities—Zeds—spawned by the malevolent megacorporation Horzine. Developed by Tripwire Interactive using Unreal Engine 5, this visceral survival horror-FPS blends punishing co-op wave combat with deep weapon customization, immersive gore, and tactical environment use.


⚔️ Suit Up as a Nightfall Specialist
Play as one of six unique Specialists—Commando, Sharpshooter, Firebug, Medic, Engineer, or Ninja—each equipped with signature abilities, skill trees, and ultimate attacks. Coordinate with up to five teammates in full co-op PvE, or brave the onslaught solo. The redesigned perk system and operational budget mechanics empower you to tailor loadouts and strategies with lethal precision.
