🔫 Arm Yourself with Customizable Carnage
The weapon crafting system is deeper than ever: mod your arsenal performance with scopes, ammo types, elemental effects, and attachments suited to your style. From flamethrowers to katanas, deliver dismemberment in cinematic detail through the enhanced M.E.A.T. gore system—notice severed limbs, persistent blood pools, and bone-shattering impact. 


🌆 Dynamic, Brutal Wave-Based Combat
Battle through diverse hot zones—including vertical arenas filled with traps and environmental hazards like turrets and vents. Smarter, more agile Zeds now climb walls, deploy jump-packs, and coordinate assaults, turning each wave into a chaotic ballet of survival and strategy. 


🌍 Cinematic Sound, Apocalyptic Atmosphere
Feel the pulse of slaughter to a thunderous metal soundtrack by Rocky Gray that elevates every moment from tension to pure adrenaline. Unreal Engine 5 breathes life into the apocalypse with real‑time lighting, realistic blood physics, and dynamic destruction that makes every shot count. 

🗓 Release and Reception
After a delay from its initial March launch, Killing Floor 3 officially released on July 24, 2025 for PC, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S 
. Critics gave mixed reviews, praising the co-op thrills and gory spectacle while noting a need for more variety and polish in post-launch content

systemRequirements.processor: AMD Ryzen 5 2600 or Intel Core i7‑4790
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 or AMD Radeon RX 480

pc_games.title: WUCHANG: Fallen Feathers
pc_games.description:
Wuchang: Fallen Feathers plunges players into a hauntingly beautiful dark fantasy world inspired by the tumultuous final years of the Ming Dynasty. Developed by Leenzee Games and powered by Unreal Engine 5, this atmospheric action RPG blends brutal, tactical combat with an emotionally layered narrative steeped in Chinese folklore, myth, and history. As chaos consumes the land and a strange disease spreads, a lone warrior must fight through corruption—both within and without—to uncover the truth.

⚔️ Awaken the Warrior Within
Step into the shoes of Wuchang, a mysterious female warrior afflicted by the Feathering Disease—a strange curse that grants both immense power and unspeakable torment. Armed with deadly weapons, ancient knowledge, and supernatural abilities tied to her inner demon, you’ll carve a path through a crumbling world teeming with both monstrous foes and human treachery.

🌑 A Grim and Atmospheric World
Journey through a sprawling world inspired by 17th-century China—rich with haunted temples, mist-covered forests, war-ravaged villages, and cursed strongholds. Every location drips with history and decay, offering secrets to uncover, lore to piece together, and deadly surprises lurking in the shadows.

💀 Challenging, Soulslike Combat
Engage in punishing, precise battles where patience, timing, and strategy reign. Switch between weapon stances, parry incoming strikes, and unleash devastating counterattacks using your Inner Demon powers. Prepare before each fight: study your enemies, master their patterns, and exploit their weaknesses to survive.

🩸 Corruption, Choice, and Consequence
Your journey is shaped by the choices you make—and the burdens you carry. Will you embrace the dark power growing within you, or resist it at great cost? Unravel a deeply personal story of loss, vengeance, and redemption where morality is never black and white, and every decision echoes across the dying land.

👹 Face Monstrous Foes and Legendary Beasts
From grotesque yokai-inspired horrors to twisted remnants of corrupted humanity, your enemies are as diverse as they are deadly. Each boss encounter is a brutal test of skill, reflexes, and preparation—offering not just combat, but revelations about the world and your own past.

✨ Built with Unreal Engine 5 for Next-Gen Immersion
Witness a visually stunning world brought to life with next-gen technology. Realistic lighting, detailed character models, and dynamic environments create a sense of weight and presence as you traverse the dark lands of Shu. Whether in performance or quality mode, every frame is crafted to pull you deeper into the journey.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 (6 GB) / AMD Radeon RX 580

pc_games.title: Brothers: A Tale of Two Sons – Remake
pc_games.description:
Brothers: A Tale of Two Sons Remake is a breathtaking, emotionally charged adventure reimagined for modern platforms. This beautifully remade masterpiece follows two young brothers on a heartfelt journey to find the “Water of Life” and save their dying father. Presented in third-person co-op style controlled solo, the game weaves a poignant tale of courage, sibling bonds, and sacrifice, set against a world that’s enchanting yet dangerous.



Game Features:


👬 Dual-Protagonist Control, One Emotional Journey

Guide each brother using a separate control stick—older, stronger Naiee and his younger, nimble brother—working together to overcome obstacles, solve puzzles, and traverse breathtaking environments. Together, they embody the true meaning of teamwork and love.



🌿 Stunning Visuals, Fully Remastered

Every scene has been redrawn and fully graphically enhanced. Lush forests, crumbling ruins, and icy peaks come to life with gorgeous lighting, rich textures, and animated details—bringing a fairy-tale world to vivid life.



🧩 Clever Physics-Based Puzzles

Over 40 carefully crafted environmental puzzles require both brain and brawn: pull levers, build bridges, carry each other across perilous chasms, and make split-second decisions in moments that test your bond.



😢 Emotionally Resonant Storytelling

Experience a universal tale of love, loss, and growth—told without dialogue. Narrative power is conveyed through expressive animations, haunting ambient music, and dynamic environmental storytelling that tug at your heart.



🎶 Immersive Soundtrack & Audio Effects

A fully revamped orchestral score breathes warmth and life into every scene, supported by dynamic environmental audio. From rustling leaves to cracking ice, every sound pulls you deeper into the world.



🕊️ Accessible Controls & Seamless Flow

Simplified controls make the game welcoming to newcomers while retaining nuance. Push through breathtaking moments—from soaring across cliffs to sailing great waterways—with smooth, intuitive gameplay.



🧭 Short Yet Unforgettable Experience 

In just 3–5 hours, you'll traverse a deeply emotional arc filled with joy, danger, and bittersweet conclusions. Perfect for players seeking a concise, moving journey with lasting impact.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i7-6700 or AMD Ryzen 5 1500X

pc_games.title: Remnant II
pc_games.description:
Remnant II is a brutal, third-person action-survival shooter that plunges you into a shattered multiverse teetering on the edge of oblivion. Developed by Gunfire Games and published by Gearbox Publishing, this sequel to the sleeper-hit Remnant: From the Ashes evolves everything that came before—deeper worlds, more ruthless enemies, and limitless co-op possibilities. Alone or with allies, you must face the unknown and stop an ancient evil from unraveling reality itself.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n
⚔️ Dynamic, Souls-Inspired Combat\n
Master a satisfying blend of precise gunplay and tactical melee in real-time combat that rewards timing, positioning, and adaptation. Dodge, shoot, and strike through waves of grotesque foes and towering bosses that demand skill and grit.
\n\n
🌌 Explore a Multiverse of Chaos\n
Travel through bizarre and deadly alternate worlds—each with its own environments, creatures, and secrets. From the eldritch horrors of Yaesha to the clockwork ruins of N’Erud, no two playthroughs are ever the same thanks to Remnant II’s dynamic, procedurally generated level design.
\n\n
🎯 Build Your Hero, Shape Your Fate\n
Customize your character with a wide range of gear, weapons, and armor sets. Choose and evolve your Archetype—such as the handler, gunslinger, or medic—to unlock unique abilities and passive perks tailored to your playstyle.
\n\n
🧩 Co-Op Mayhem, Solo Mastery\n
Play solo or team up with up to two other players in seamless drop-in/drop-out co-op. Scale the challenge with your team or face it alone for the ultimate test of resilience, tactics, and endurance.
\n\n
🕹️ Roguelike Systems & Endless Replayability\n
Every journey through Remnant II is different. Dungeons, quests, events, and enemies shift with every session. Combine Archetypes, discover hidden story branches, and revisit worlds to uncover all their secrets and gear.
\n\n
🧠 Challenging Puzzles & Deep Lore\n
It’s not just about combat—each world is packed with cryptic puzzles, hidden doors, and layered lore. The narrative unfolds through environmental storytelling and optional mysteries that reward exploration and attention to detail.
\n\n
🎮 Built for Modern Platforms\n
Optimized for next-gen performance, Remnant II supports high frame rates, fast load times, and 4K visuals. Experience detailed environments, intense lighting effects, and seamless transitions between worlds and encounters.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5‑7600 or AMD Ryzen 5 2600
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1650 or AMD RX 590 (4 GB VRAM)

pc_games.title: Until Dawn
pc_games.description:
Until Dawn is a premier interactive drama and survival horror experience, originally developed by Supermassive Games (PS4, 2015) and confidently reborn on PS5 and PC in 2024 by Ballistic Moon using Unreal Engine 5. Set on the remote, snowbound Blackwood Mountain, the game casts you as eight friends whose reunion turns into a nightmare. With a horror movie–grade cast and spine-chilling atmosphere, your every decision affects who survives until sunrise—because until dawn, no one is safe.
\n\n
🧩 Core Game Features
\n\n
🎬 Cinematic Branching Narrative
\n
Experience the story in real time—no loading screens, just continuous tension. Make split-second choices or take your time weighing moral dilemmas. Each decision ripples through the “butterfly effect,” locking or unlocking future story paths and possible endings.
\n\n
😱 Interactive Horror Mechanics
\n
In addition to exploration and clue hunting, the game features pulse-raising QTEs—like remaining motionless during “Don’t Move” sequences—to heighten vulnerability. The new “Stay Calm” mechanic ensures tailored tension for mouse/keyboard or controller players.
\n\n
🎭 Ensemble Cast & Visual Horror
\n
Confront your fears alongside characters portrayed by Hayden Panettiere, Brett Dalton, and more. Unreal Engine 5 brings dynamic lighting, ray tracing, and upgraded facial capture—making every scream, creak, and flickering shadow feel real.
\n\n
🔁 New PC-Exclusive Content
\n
The 2024 PC/PS5 remake adds fresh camera angles, remixed audio, new endings, and expanded scenes—providing both nostalgic replay value and first-time frights.

pc_games.title: Tomb Raider 2013
pc_games.description:
Tomb Raider (2013) is the gritty and emotional origin story of Lara Croft, developed by Crystal Dynamics and published by Square Enix. Stranded on a mysterious island in the Dragon's Triangle after a violent shipwreck, a young and inexperienced Lara must evolve into a hardened survivor. Blending cinematic storytelling, visceral combat, environmental puzzles, and harrowing survival elements, this reboot redefines the legacy of one of gaming’s most iconic characters.
\n\n
🎮 Game Features:
\n\n
🏝️ A Harsh, Mysterious Island to Explore
\n
Journey across a deadly island filled with ancient tombs, rugged terrain, and forgotten secrets. From windswept cliffs to decaying ruins, every environment is hand-crafted for exploration and danger. Discover relics, hidden documents, and cryptic puzzles as you uncover the island’s dark history.
\n\n
⚔️ Gritty Combat and Instinctual Survival
\n
Engage in intense third-person combat with an evolving arsenal that includes bows, pistols, shotguns, and makeshift gear. Use stealth, guerrilla tactics, and brutal melee kills to overcome enemy scavengers, cultists, and wild animals. Lara’s resourcefulness is key to surviving overwhelming odds.
\n\n
🧩 Environmental Puzzles & Tombs
\n
True to its name, Tomb Raider challenges players with clever puzzles and hidden tombs. Manipulate fire, water, weight, and gravity to solve complex environmental challenges and unlock ancient treasures.
\n\n
🎓 Skill Trees & Weapon Upgrades
\n
Earn XP by exploring, hunting, and fighting to unlock new abilities in three skill trees: Survivor, Hunter, and Brawler. Upgrade weapons at base camps with salvaged materials to increase damage, accuracy, and add new features like incendiary arrows or burst fire.
\n\n
🎥 Cinematic Presentation & Immersive Storytelling
\n
With motion-captured performances, dynamic cutscenes, and a stirring orchestral score, the game delivers a visceral narrative experience. Camilla Luddington gives life to Lara through a raw, emotional performance that anchors the character’s growth from frightened survivor to battle-hardened warrior.
\n\n
📸 Instincts Mode & Exploration Aids
\n
Use Survival Instincts to highlight interactable objects and hidden paths in the environment. This intuitive system guides you subtly through exploration, puzzles, and combat without holding your hand.
\n\n
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Optional Multiplayer Modes
\n
Take the fight online in 4v4 multiplayer modes such as Team Deathmatch and Cry for Help, where players choose between scavengers or survivors and use traps, gear, and terrain to win. (Note: multiplayer is no longer widely active.)

systemRequirements.processor: Dual‑core (Athlon64 X2 2.1 GHz / Core2 Duo 1.86 GHz)
systemRequirements.graphics: DirectX 9 with 512 MB VRAM (Radeon HD 2600 XT / GeForce 8600)

pc_games.title: Life is Strange Double Exposure
pc_games.description:
Life Is Strange: Double Exposure (Deck Nine, Square Enix) sees Max Caulfield returns a decade after the original, now a photography professor at Caledon University. When her friend Safi is murdered on a snowy Vermont campus, Max unlocks a startling new ability: shifting between two parallel timelines. It’s now up to her to race through shifting realities, unearth a dangerous conspiracy, and save Safi—before the timelines collapse.
\n\n
🎮 Game Features:
\n\n
🔍 Shift Between Two Timelines
\n
Max’s new power lets you Pulse, Shift, and Entangle—seeing two realities, jumping between them, and moving items across them. Solve layered puzzles (e.g., grab a ladder in one world, use it in the other) to piece together the murder mystery. 
\n\n
💬 Narrative-Driven, Choice-Based Gameplay
\n
Dive into a gripping story full of suspense, moral decisions, and interpersonal drama. Your choices—not just dialogue but timeline shifts—impact relationships, uncover secrets, and shape both realities. 
\n\n
📚 Max, Evolved
\n
No longer a teenage rewind prodigy, Max is now mature and vulnerable. Voice actress Hannah Telle returns, delivering expressive performances enhanced by lifelike facial animation. Players witness a more introspective, emotionally complex Max grappling with grief and identity. 
\n\n
🌨️ Atmospheric Campus Setting
\n
Explore a beautifully detailed winter campus—lecture halls, arts buildings, student venues—rendered with striking fidelity. The dual-timeline conceit creates eerie echoes and narrative contrast across both versions of Caledon. 
\n\n
🎵 Rich Aesthetic & Authentic Vibes
\n
A haunting original soundtrack (Dodie, Chloe Moriondo, Tessa Rose Jackson) complements a soundtrack steeped in indie charm. Ambient social media posts and subtext conversations deepen immersion and emotional impact.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 960 (4 GB) / AMD RX 470 (4 GB)

pc_games.title: The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered
pc_games.description:
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered is a sweeping, open-world fantasy RPG that brings the iconic 2006 classic into the modern era. Rebuilt with enhanced visuals, refined mechanics, and quality-of-life improvements, this remastered edition invites both longtime fans and new adventurers to rediscover the magic, mystery, and depth of Tamriel’s most turbulent chapter. As the gates of Oblivion open and daedric horrors pour into Cyrodiil, you alone hold the key to the empire’s salvation.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n
🗡️ Epic Fantasy Reimagined for a New Generation\n
Step into a richly detailed world reborn with modern graphics, updated lighting, remastered textures, and enhanced performance. From the bustling streets of the Imperial City to the eerie, alien chaos of Oblivion realms, every environment is brought to life with stunning clarity.
\n\n
🛡️ Deep Roleplaying and Freedom of Choice\n
Create your hero from dozens of races and classes, customizing your abilities, appearance, and playstyle. Shape your journey through branching quests, moral decisions, and dynamic faction systems. Whether you're a noble knight, sneaky thief, or arcane battlemage, the world reacts to your actions.
\n\n
🌍 An Expansive World Full of Stories\n
Explore the vast province of Cyrodiil—home to forests, mountains, caves, ancient ruins, and cities teeming with lore and secrets. Every NPC has a routine and personality, making the world feel alive and reactive. Dive into major storylines or carve your own path in hundreds of side quests and encounters.
\n\n
🔥 The Oblivion Crisis Returns in Stunning Detail\n
Face off against the daedric invasion in high-definition horror. Step into the twisted planes of Oblivion with revamped visual effects, brutal combat encounters, and reworked enemy AI. Close the gates before Tamriel is lost to fire and shadow.
\n\n
🧙 Enhanced Combat, Magic, and AI Systems\n
Enjoy rebalanced and modernized combat mechanics that offer smoother melee, ranged, and spellcasting experiences. Improved enemy behavior, smarter AI companions, and updated skill progression make every battle feel fresh and tactical.
\n\n
🎨 Modern Upgrades with Classic Charm\n
Remastered for today’s hardware with 4K support, widescreen UI scaling, faster load times, and improved mod support. Quality-of-life updates bring streamlined menus, better navigation, and cleaner inventory management without sacrificing the original game's soul.
\n\n
🎮 Mod-Friendly and Customizable\n
Still the foundation for one of the most modded games in history, Oblivion Remastered supports expanded mod integration, letting you enhance or overhaul nearly every aspect of gameplay, visuals, and world content.

systemRequirements.processor: AMD Ryzen 5 2600X or Intel Core i7‑6800K
systemRequirements.graphics: AMD Radeon RX 5700 or NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 Ti

pc_games.title: My Friend Pedro
pc_games.description:
My Friend Pedro is a stylish, over-the-top action platformer that blends intense gunplay, acrobatic stunts, and slow-motion chaos into a wild, adrenaline-fueled journey of revenge. Developed by DeadToast Entertainment and published by Devolver Digital, the game puts you in the shoes of a mysterious masked protagonist guided by a talking banana named Pedro—your oddly charming partner in crime. With a focus on creative combat, fluid movement, and cinematic flair, My Friend Pedro turns every level into an explosive ballet of bullets and mayhem.



Game Features:


💥 Stylized Violence Meets Bullet-Time Precision

Dive into a high-octane, side-scrolling experience where every move counts. Use slow-motion mechanics, flips, kicks, and ricochet shots to choreograph your own action sequences. Bounce bullets off frying pans, kick objects into enemies, or dual-wield pistols while flipping through the air—it’s all about creativity and style.



🕶️ Cinematic Combat with Maximum Style

Channel your inner action hero with tight gunplay mechanics and smooth animation. Whether you’re dodging bullets mid-backflip or slicing enemies in half with a katana, every moment is designed to look and feel like a blockbuster action movie.



🧠 A Surreal, Twisted Narrative

Follow the strange and darkly humorous journey of a silent killer guided by a sentient banana. Question reality as the lines blur between sanity and madness, and piece together a story filled with betrayal, vengeance, and bizarre twists.



🏃 Acrobatic Platforming and Tactical Puzzles

Move with precision and fluidity through diverse environments packed with obstacles, traps, and tactical challenges. Use walls, ziplines, skateboards, and even kitchen utensils to outsmart enemies and navigate deadly terrain.



🔫 Weapons, Tricks, and Combat Variety

Choose from a deadly arsenal of pistols, shotguns, SMGs, and more. Master the use of environmental tools and unique kill combos to dispatch enemies in increasingly creative ways. The more stylish your kills, the higher your score—perfect for chasing leaderboard glory.



🎧 Pulse-Pounding Soundtrack & Visual Flair

Backed by an energetic, synth-driven soundtrack and minimalist, graphic novel-inspired visuals, My Friend Pedro delivers a hypnotic aesthetic that perfectly matches its chaotic gameplay. Every beat and bullet hits with rhythmic intensity.



🎮 Fast, Fun, and Replayable

With tight levels, multiple difficulty modes, and a scoring system built for perfectionists, My Friend Pedro encourages multiple playthroughs. Push your limits to find faster routes, higher scores, and deadlier kill chains.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i3‑530 (2×2.93 GHz) or equivalent"

pc_games.title: Hogwarts Legacy
pc_games.description:
Hogwarts Legacy is an immersive, open-world action RPG set in the 1800s Wizarding World, long before the events of Harry Potter. Developed by Avalanche Software and published by Warner Bros. Games under the Portkey Games label, the game puts you in the role of a young witch or wizard who holds the key to an ancient secret—one that could reshape the future of magic itself. With deep customization, spell-based combat, and iconic magical locations to explore, Hogwarts Legacy invites you to forge your own legacy in a living, breathing version of the wizarding world.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🪄 Become the Witch or Wizard You Want to Be
\n
Create and customize your own magical student, choosing your appearance, house, wand, and unique magical abilities. Progress through a rich RPG system with skill trees that support different playstyles—whether you prefer stealth, spell-slinging, potion crafting, or magical creature care.
\n\n
🏰 Explore a Fully Realized Hogwarts
\n
Step into a faithful recreation of Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, complete with dynamic classrooms, secret passages, dungeons, and moving staircases. Attend classes like Potions, Charms, Defense Against the Dark Arts, and Herbology as you master new spells and uncover secrets hidden within the castle walls.
\n\n
🌍 Open World Beyond the Castle Walls
\n
Venture beyond Hogwarts to explore Hogsmeade Village, the Forbidden Forest, and uncharted magical regions teeming with danger, mystery, and ancient ruins. Discover side quests, tame magical beasts, and uncover the legacy of long-lost magic buried deep within the world.
\n\n
⚔️ Spell-Based Combat & Magical Mastery
\n
Engage in real-time combat using a wide array of spells, including offensive attacks like Expelliarmus, Incendio, and Avada Kedavra, alongside defensive shields and utility charms. Chain spells together, exploit enemy weaknesses, and wield ancient magic to turn the tide of battle in intense encounters against dark wizards, goblins, and monstrous beasts.
\n\n
🧪 Crafting, Potions, and Customization
\n
Brew potions, cultivate magical plants, and upgrade your gear using resources found throughout the world. Customize your robes, broomsticks, and wand handles to suit your personal style. Establish your own Room of Requirement, a customizable sanctuary where you can grow ingredients, build workstations, and care for rescued magical creatures.
\n\n
🧙‍♂️ A Story-Driven Journey Through Magic and Mystery
\n
Uncover a hidden history of the wizarding world as you battle the forces of dark magic and unravel your character’s unique connection to ancient, forbidden powers. Encounter morally complex decisions that affect the outcome of your journey—your choices shape your legacy.
\n\n
🎨 Stunning Visuals and Immersive Design
\n
Built for modern platforms with 4K visuals, realistic lighting, and detailed environments, Hogwarts Legacy brings the wizarding world to life like never before. The ambient soundtrack and environmental storytelling immerse you in every moment—from the echoing halls of the castle to the moonlit trees of the Forbidden Forest.

pc_games.title: Street Fighter V
pc_games.description:
Street Fighter V is the explosive fifth installment in Capcom’s legendary fighting game franchise, reigniting the iconic one-on-one combat with modern visuals, deep mechanics, and a global stage of warriors. Featuring a refined combat system, dynamic visuals, and a constantly evolving roster, Street Fighter V balances accessibility for newcomers with depth for competitive veterans. Whether you're chasing ranked glory or mastering your favorite fighter, the road to world warrior status begins here.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🥊 Refined, Strategic Combat System
\n
At the heart of Street Fighter V is a precise and responsive 2D fighting system where timing, spacing, and mind games reign supreme. The introduction of the V-System brings a new layer of strategy:
\n
V-Skills provide character-specific techniques.
\n
V-Triggers unleash powerful, cinematic abilities.
\n
V-Reversals offer clutch defensive counters.
\n
Mastering these mechanics opens up deep layers of tactical play for each character.
\n\n
🧑‍🎤 Diverse and Expanding Roster
\n
Choose from over 45 characters (in the Champion Edition), including series staples like Ryu, Chun-Li, and M. Bison, alongside new challengers like Necalli, Rashid, Laura, and returning legends like Sagat, E. Honda, and Rose. Each fighter has a unique style, personality, and move set—giving players a deep well of strategies to explore.
\n\n
🌍 Global Battle Arenas
\n
Fight across vibrant, hand-crafted stages set in locations around the world—from the bustling streets of Metro City to lush temple ruins and urban rooftops. Every arena is packed with life and built to showcase the game’s stylized, high-impact art direction.
\n\n
🎮 Game Modes for Every Fighter
\n
Story Mode: Explore cinematic character backstories and unlock new gear.
\n
Arcade Mode: A love letter to Street Fighter history, with tailored paths and endings based on each previous title.
\n
Online Versus & Ranked: Face global challengers via Capcom Fighters Network, with replays, match data, and skill-based matchmaking.
\n
Training & Trials: Learn combos, spacing, and execution with interactive tutorials and character-specific combo trials.
\n\n
🎭 Evolving Visual Style & Presentation
\n
Built on the Unreal Engine 4, Street Fighter V delivers bold character designs, exaggerated animations, and cinematic flair. Special moves explode with impact, and every super-fueled Critical Art attack is a visual showcase of the character’s fighting spirit.
\n\n
🎖️ Esports Ready – Built for Competition
\n
From Capcom Pro Tour to grassroots tournaments, Street Fighter V is a pillar of competitive fighting games. With rollback netcode enhancements, cross-platform play between PlayStation and PC, and a massive global player base, the game is fully equipped for the esports scene.

pc_games.title: The Callisto Protocol
pc_games.description:
The Callisto Protocol is a cinematic, survival horror experience developed by Striking Distance Studios and directed by Glen Schofield, co-creator of Dead Space. Set on Jupiter’s dead moon Callisto in the year 2320, the game follows Jacob Lee—a cargo pilot thrown into the depths of Black Iron Prison, a maximum-security facility overrun by terrifying, mutated inmates. With its gruesome atmosphere, visceral combat, and next-gen visuals, The Callisto Protocol plunges players into a relentless nightmare where survival is earned, not given.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🧬 Brutal, Strategic Combat System
\n
Combat is intense, personal, and unforgiving. Use a mix of melee, firearms, and the powerful GRP gravity weapon to manipulate enemies, dismember limbs, and hurl Biophage monsters into deadly hazards. Every encounter is a deadly puzzle—resource management, timing, and tactics matter just as much as firepower.
\n\n
🔦 Cinematic Survival Horror
\n
From tight corridors and flickering lights to spine-chilling audio design and grotesque creature animations, the game delivers triple-A horror production values. The over-the-shoulder perspective draws players close to every horrifying moment, delivering a film-like, immersive terror that never lets up.
\n\n
👁️ Haunting World Design & Deep Lore
\n
Explore the collapsing Black Iron facility and unravel the dark truth behind the mysterious outbreak. Environmental storytelling, encrypted logs, and visual cues reveal the facility’s hidden past and the shady motives of the United Jupiter Company. The horror isn’t just in the monsters—it’s in what created them.
\n\n
🧟 Terrifying Enemy Evolution
\n
Face off against the Biophage—evolving, grotesque creatures born from a horrific alien infection. Some mutate mid-fight, sprouting limbs and new abilities if not dispatched quickly. The further you go, the smarter and deadlier they become, keeping you constantly on edge.
\n\n
🎮 Next-Gen Visuals & Immersion
\n
Built for modern hardware, The Callisto Protocol offers real-time ray tracing, 4K resolution, and detailed character models powered by Unreal Engine 5. Advanced facial capture and motion performance bring lifelike realism to every scream, strain, and step in the shadows.
\n\n
🎯 Upgradeable Gear & Custom Builds
\n
Collect Callisto Credits to upgrade weapons, suit modules, and the GRP. Boost damage, reload speed, and control abilities to fit your survival style—whether that’s head-on aggression or tactical crowd control. Every improvement helps tip the balance in your fight for freedom.
\n\n
💀 Death Has Weight
\n
The game’s brutal death animations are not just shock value—they emphasize the cost of mistakes and the fragility of human life. One wrong move can mean a horrifying end, reinforcing the game’s dark and merciless tone.
\n\n
🩸 Hardcore Modes & DLC Content
\n
Beyond the main campaign, players can test their skills in Hardcore mode, New Game+, and story expansions that deepen the narrative and unveil chilling new locations. With The Final Transmission DLC and optional Contagion Pack, the nightmare only grows.

pc_games.title: Poppy Playtime - Chapter 1-4
pc_games.description:
Poppy Playtime is a first-person survival-horror series by Mob Entertainment that plunges you into the abandoned toy factory of Playtime Co., where failed experiments turned playthings into relentless killers. Across Chapters 1–4, you’ll piece together eerie clues, solve twisted puzzles, and confront ever-more dangerous creations using the iconic GrabPack—a modular gadget that evolves as the horrors deepen .
\n\n
Game Features :
\n\n
GrabPack Evolution & Ingenious Puzzles
\n
Chapter 1 introduces the classic GrabPack: two extendable hands for grabbing, pulling, and connecting.
\n
Chapter 2 adds a green hand for electricity and traversal.
\n
Chapter 3 upgrades to GrabPack 2.0 with jet boosters, longer cables, and an orange flare-gun hand.
\n
Chapter 4 further enhances it with grappling features and object storage—essential for its multi-stage environmental puzzles.
\n\n
Evolving Atmosphere & Narrative Depth
\n
Journey from the factory’s halls into deeper, oppressive zones—including orphanages, underground labs, and prison-like sectors. Each chapter unveils more of the dark history of Playtime Co., including tragic lost children and horrifying tests gone wrong.
\n\n
Familiar & New Nightmarish Foes
\n
Combat or evade staple antagonists like Huggy Wuggy, Mommy Long Legs, and CatNap.
\n
Chapters 3–4 introduce chilling new foes: Yarnaby, Doey the Doughman (an unlikely ally), the Prototype, and the AI-driven Doctor—each with unique behaviors and terrifying presence.
\n\n
Intensifying Horror & Immersion
\n
Every chapter raises the stakes: dim corridors, haunting audio, and spine-chilling set-pieces ramp up tension.
\n
Chapter 4, labeled the “darkest yet,” immerses you in claustrophobic rooms, underground prisons, and even betrayals from those you trust .
\n\n
📅 Chapters Recap:
\n
Chapter 1: A Tight Squeeze – Reacquaint with GrabPack, confront Huggy.
\n
Chapter 2: Fly in a Web – Face Mommy Long Legs, puzzle through train station madness.
\n
Chapter 3: Deep Sleep – Sabotage gas-drenched orphanages and battle CatNap.
\n
Chapter 4: Safe Haven – Descend to underground prison, meet Doey, evade Yarnaby and the Doctor, and uncover the Prototype’s plan

pc_games.title: Forza Horizon 4
pc_games.description:
Forza Horizon 4, developed by Playground Games, is the award-winning open-world racing game that redefines what it means to explore, compete, and cruise. Set in a stunningly recreated Great Britain, this entry in the Horizon series introduces a shared, dynamic world where seasons change everything, and every player becomes part of a vibrant festival of speed, skill, and exploration. With hundreds of cars, breathtaking environments, and a deep progression system, Forza Horizon 4 is more than a racer—it’s a celebration of automotive freedom.



Game Features:



🌦️ Dynamic Seasons in a Shared Open World


Experience the thrill of racing through spring rainstorms, summer heat, autumn mud, and icy winter roads—all in a world that changes every week in real time. Each season transforms the environment and gameplay: frozen lakes open new routes, storms affect traction, and seasonal events bring fresh challenges. It’s not just a visual shift—it’s a whole new way to race.



🚗 Over 450 Legendary Cars


Build your dream garage with a vast collection of over 450 meticulously modeled vehicles from more than 100 manufacturers. From vintage classics to hypercars and off-road beasts, every car handles uniquely and can be customized to suit your racing style.



🌍 Explore Beautiful Historic Britain


Cruise through a seamless open world filled with rolling hills, ancient castles, modern cities, and hidden backroads. Whether you're drifting through the Scottish Highlands, tearing down cobblestone streets in Edinburgh, or relaxing during a countryside cruise, the world is always inviting you to explore.



🏁 Horizon Life – Always Online, Always Evolving


Forza Horizon 4’s shared world lets you race and roam alongside other players in real time. Seamlessly jump into cooperative events, head-to-head races, or massive weekly Forzathon challenges. Prefer a solo ride? You can still experience the world with AI Drivatars, ensuring the road is never empty.



🔧 Customization & Progression That Matters


Earn credits and unlock perks as you race, drift, explore, and perform stunts. Tune and paint your cars, build unique liveries, and even create and share your own race events with the powerful Blueprint system. Progress through the Horizon Festival and shape your journey as a racer, stunt driver, business owner, or explorer.



🎭 Endless Events & Expansions


From Showcase Races where you outrun trains and airships, to Seasonal Championships, Community Events, and expansions like Fortune Island and LEGO Speed Champions, Forza Horizon 4 never runs out of reasons to get behind the wheel.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 650 Ti or AMD R7 250X (2 GB VRAM)
systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i3‑4170 @ 3.7 GHz or Intel i5‑750 @ 2.67 GHz

pc_games.title: Grand Theft Auto: Trilogy - The Definitive Edition
pc_games.description:
Grand Theft Auto: The Trilogy – The Definitive Edition brings together three of the most iconic titles in gaming history—GTA III, GTA: Vice City, and GTA: San Andreas—revamped for modern platforms with enhanced visuals, upgraded controls, and a faithful preservation of their groundbreaking stories. Developed by Rockstar Games and remastered with Unreal Engine, this definitive collection reintroduces the open-world chaos, freedom, and cinematic storytelling that redefined the action-adventure genre for an entire generation.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🌆 Three Iconic Cities, Reimagined
\n
Return to Liberty City, Vice City, and San Andreas—each a distinct, living world with its own atmosphere, style, and criminal ecosystem. Explore sprawling urban landscapes and rural outskirts, from neon-lit beaches to gritty alleys and dusty deserts, all with enhanced textures, environmental detail, and lighting effects.
\n\n
🎮 Modernized Controls & Quality of Life Upgrades
\n
Experience a smoother, more intuitive gameplay experience inspired by GTA V. Improvements include better aiming and gunplay, updated weapon wheels, reworked minimaps with GPS navigation, checkpoint-based missions, and improved driving physics. Whether you're jacking a car or fleeing a five-star wanted level, every moment feels more refined.
\n\n
🧨 Classic Chaos, Preserved with Polish
\n
Each game stays true to its original story, humor, and open-ended gameplay—now with modern enhancements. Whether it’s Claude’s silent rise through Liberty City’s underworld, Tommy Vercetti’s neon-drenched conquest of Vice City, or CJ’s journey through betrayal and brotherhood in San Andreas, the trilogy preserves every explosive moment with remastered fidelity.
\n\n
🎨 Visual Enhancements Across the Board
\n
Remastered in Unreal Engine, the Definitive Edition includes:
\n
Improved character models and animations
\n
Enhanced weather, reflections, and draw distances
\n
Updated lighting systems and shadows
\n
New textures for buildings, vehicles, roads, and nature
\n
The world feels richer, more vibrant, and more immersive—while retaining the stylized aesthetic of the originals.
\n\n
📀 Soundtrack & Voice Acting Legacy
\n
Enjoy the unforgettable licensed music and legendary voice performances that made these games cultural milestones. From ‘90s hip-hop and Miami synth-pop to ‘80s rock and talk radio satire, the trilogy’s radio stations are just as iconic as the missions themselves.
\n\n
🎯 Seamless Experience Across All Platforms
\n
Optimized for new-generation consoles and PC, the trilogy features high-resolution support, faster load times, and platform-specific features such as haptic feedback (PS5), enhanced performance modes, and achievement tracking.
\n\n

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon R9 280

pc_games.title: Middle-earth: Shadow of War
pc_games.description:
Middle-earth: Shadow of War is the epic sequel to the award-winning Shadow of Mordor, plunging players back into J.R.R. Tolkien’s iconic world to wage war from behind enemy lines. Developed by Monolith Productions, this action-RPG expands the groundbreaking Nemesis System, allowing players to build armies, conquer fortresses, and dominate Mordor from within. As Talion, a resurrected Ranger bound to the spirit of the elf lord Celebrimbor, you must forge a new Ring of Power and rise against the Dark Lord Sauron in a personal tale of revenge, loyalty, and betrayal.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🔥 Expanded Nemesis System – Rule with Fear or Loyalty
\n
The critically acclaimed Nemesis System returns, more complex and personal than ever. Enemies now remember past encounters, develop grudges, and evolve based on your actions. Forge rivalries or recruit them as allies—every orc has a story, and your choices shape their rise or fall in Mordor's brutal hierarchy.
\n\n
⚔️ Brutal Combat & Spectacular Set Pieces
\n
Blend stealth, swordplay, archery, and magical abilities in a combat system that feels fast, brutal, and deeply satisfying. Use your Wraith powers to dominate enemies, execute combos, and control the battlefield as you lead armies into cinematic fortress assaults, where every battle tells a story of its own.
\n\n
🏰 Fortress Sieges & Army Building
\n
Conquer and control entire regions of Mordor. Assemble your own army of customized orc followers, each with unique traits, skills, and loyalties. Launch massive siege battles to claim fortresses, defend them from invasions, and rule with either a ruthless or noble hand.
\n\n
🧠 Deep RPG Progression & Customization
\n
Unlock powerful abilities across multiple skill trees, including Combat, Wraith, Stealth, and Beast Mastery. Equip legendary gear sets, craft upgrades, and empower Talion with enhancements that reflect your playstyle—whether you prefer dominating minds or crushing skulls.
\n\n
🌍 Expansive Open World of Mordor
\n
Explore five distinct regions—each with dynamic ecosystems, enemy cultures, and stunning environmental diversity. From fiery plains and cursed citadels to lush, corrupted forests, the world of Mordor is bigger, deeper, and far more unpredictable than ever before.
\n\n
🎭 A Dark, Emotional Narrative
\n
Experience a haunting tale of power, sacrifice, and vengeance. Talion’s bond with Celebrimbor grows more fractured as they forge the Ring of Power and clash with familiar and new foes—including the Witch-king, the Nazgûl, and the Dark Lord himself. Your choices throughout the campaign will have lasting effects on both allies and enemies alike.
\n\n
🛡️ Endgame: Shadow Wars & Beyond
\n
After the main story concludes, take on the Shadow Wars, an evolving endgame where your conquered fortresses are attacked by increasingly powerful enemy forces. Defend your domain and prove your dominance in this long-form strategic challenge that tests everything you've built.

systemRequirements.graphics: AMD HD 7870 (2 GB) or NVIDIA GTX 660 (2 GB)
systemRequirements.processor: AMD FX-4350 (4.2 GHz) or Intel Core i5-2300 (2.8 GHz)

pc_games.title: R.E.P.O.
pc_games.description:
R.E.P.O. (Retrieve, Extract & Profit Operation), from Swedish indie studio Semiwork, is a wildly inventive online co‑op survival horror releasing into Early Access on February 26, 2025 . Up to six players dive into procedurally generated, monster-haunted facilities to recover valuable objects using physics-powered tools—then escape before horror strikes.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Physics-Based Extraction Meets Horror
\n
Instead of instant “add to inventory,” every object—from pianos to porcelain—is physically lifted and carried via a telekinetic grabber. Every collision dents value or breaks fragile goods. Teamwork is a must.
\n\n
Chaotic, Evolving Co-op Experience
\n
Each run drops you into a different map with shifting rooms, loot, and threats. Enemy behavior and layout evolve based on how long you linger—adding tension and unpredictability.
\n\n
Monsters That Hunt—and React
\n
You’ll face 19 unique enemy types—creatures that hunt you, react to noise, and even gravitate like the objects you carry. From ghostly lurkers to duckling-looking predators, every spawn demands a strategic response.
\n\n
Proximity Voice Chat & Tactical Fear
\n
Communication is key—and limited. Proximity-based chat means you must stick together to coordinate… and stay silent to avoid attracting evil. It’s tense, hilarious, and chaotic by design.
\n\n
Upgrade and Progress Between Missions
\n
Extract with success to earn SURPLUS, the in-game currency. Use it to unlock gear, robotic enhancements, and tools for future runs. With 29 equipment items and 8 player upgrades already live, the meta loop is strong.

pc_games.title: FIFA 23 Ultimate Edition
pc_games.description:
FIFA 23 Ultimate Edition is the most comprehensive and refined football experience ever created by EA Sports—marking the historic final chapter under the FIFA name. Enhanced with next-gen visuals, revolutionary gameplay powered by HyperMotion2 technology, and expansive content across both men’s and women’s football, FIFA 23 delivers unmatched authenticity, depth, and control. With exclusive bonuses and early access, the Ultimate Edition is designed for players who want to dominate every mode from the very first whistle.



Game Features:



Next-Level Realism with HyperMotion2 Technology


Experience the most fluid and responsive gameplay in franchise history. HyperMotion2 combines machine learning with real-match data to create more than 6,000 true-to-life animations—allowing players to move, react, and play with unprecedented realism. From tactical build-up to explosive finishing, every match feels authentic and alive.



Exclusive FUT Content and Early Access


Get a head start on the competition with exclusive Ultimate Team rewards, including:


3 Days Early Access – Play before the standard edition launch


4600 FIFA Points – Build your squad and enter FUT Drafts


Ones to Watch Item – A dynamic card that upgrades based on real-world performance


FUT World Cup Hero – A unique item celebrating tournament legends


Homegrown Talent – A Career Mode star with elite potential


Whether you're grinding FUT Rivals or managing a club in Career Mode, Ultimate Edition equips you with the tools to rise early and rise fast.



Immersive Presentation & Global Leagues


From the roar of the Premier League to the passion of La Liga, FIFA 23 includes 19,000+ licensed players, 700+ teams, and 100+ stadiums across 30+ leagues. The inclusion of the FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022™ and FIFA Women’s World Cup Australia & New Zealand 2023™ brings unparalleled global authenticity—complete with official kits, commentary, and matchday presentation.



Cross-Play, Dual Entitlement & Expanded Access


For the first time in the series, enjoy full cross-play in 1v1 modes across PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC. Dual Entitlement ensures that if you upgrade your console, your progress and access come with you. Play with friends across generations and platforms without missing a beat.



Tactical Evolution & Player Personality


Take full control of your team’s identity with enhanced passing, refined set pieces, and new sprint mechanics. In Career Mode, build your manager profile or step into the boots of a real-world star. Personality points, transfer storylines, and training decisions shape your player's legacy in a deeper, more cinematic way.



Street Style and Pro Clubs Progression


Step outside the stadium and into the playground of VOLTA Football, where style, flair, and creative expression are king. Or team up with friends in Pro Clubs, now offering mixed-gender teams and shared progression that evolves across seasons.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1050 Ti or AMD RX 570
systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5‑6600k or AMD Ryzen 5 1600

pc_games.title: Uncharted Legacy of Thieves Collection
pc_games.description:
Uncharted: Legacy of Thieves Collection is a stunning remaster of two of Naughty Dog’s most cinematic and critically acclaimed adventures: Uncharted 4: A Thief’s End and Uncharted: The Lost Legacy. Rebuilt for modern hardware, this collection elevates the franchise’s iconic blend of action, storytelling, and exploration to new heights. With jaw-dropping visuals, upgraded performance, and immersive haptics, it's the ultimate way to experience the globe-trotting adventures of Nathan Drake and Chloe Frazer—two thieves with nothing to lose and legacies to reclaim.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🏴‍☠️ Uncharted 4: A Thief’s End – The Final Chapter of a Legend
\n
Years after walking away from the treasure-hunting life, Nathan Drake is forced back into the world of thieves when his long-lost brother resurfaces. Their journey takes them across Madagascar, Scotland, and pirate-infested ruins in a high-stakes race to uncover the lost treasure of Henry Avery. With heart, humor, and breathtaking action, this is the final—and most personal—adventure of Drake’s saga.
\n\n
🔎 Uncharted: The Lost Legacy – A New Hero Rises
\n
Set in the lush landscapes of India’s Western Ghats, Lost Legacy follows Chloe Frazer, the fan-favorite treasure hunter, as she partners with mercenary Nadine Ross. Together, they must navigate ancient ruins, civil conflict, and their own uneasy alliance to retrieve the mythical Tusk of Ganesh. It’s fast-paced, beautifully written, and proves that the Uncharted legacy lives on beyond Drake.
\n\n
🧭 Epic Set Pieces and Exploration
\n
From careening convoys and collapsing ruins to wide-open maps with side exploration, both games are packed with unforgettable cinematic sequences. Climb cliffs, solve puzzles, and uncover ancient secrets in environments that feel alive, dangerous, and awe-inspiring.
\n\n
🎯 Fluid Combat and Stealth
\n
Combat is as dynamic as the story. Use stealth to take down enemies silently or engage in brutal gunfights with an arsenal of realistic weapons. The remaster keeps the action smooth and intuitive, blending melee, traversal, and cover-based shooting seamlessly.
\n\n
💼 Cinematic Storytelling with Deep Characters
\n
Uncharted is more than explosions and exotic locales—it’s about flawed heroes, broken relationships, and the weight of obsession. Both games deliver top-tier voice acting, motion capture, and character-driven writing that’s as compelling as any Hollywood blockbuster.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 960 (4 GB) or AMD R9 290X (4 GB)

pc_games.title: Quarantine Zone: The Last Check
pc_games.description:
Quarantine Zone: The Last Check is a tense, morally charged first-person survival-simulation developed by Brigada Games. Set in a zombie-ravaged near-future, players assume the role of an army officer overseeing the last evacuation checkpoint. Armed with inspection tools and powered convictions, every decision—to trust, quarantine, or liquidate—echoes with life-or-death consequences.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🔎 Forensic Refugee Screening
\n
Equip UV flashlights, thermometers, document scanners, and stethoscopes to analyze survivors' symptoms and belongings. Spotting fever, rashes, or hidden contraband determines who enters—another tool in your moral arsenal. 
\n\n
⚖️ High-Stakes Moral Choices
\n
Each day, decide people's fates based on limited data. Admit the healthy, quarantine the suspicious… or eliminate those beyond hope. Every action reshapes the camp’s stability, resources, and survivors' trust. 
\n\n
🧩 Tower-Defense & Base Management
\n
Beyond screening, expand your base, reinforce defenses, and repel zombie hordes through intense FPS sequences. Juggle daily reports, resource supply, and defensive upgrades in a relentless, evolving crisis. 
\n\n
⏳ Dynamic Threat & Resource Balancing
\n
Face waves of refugees—some ill, others infected, and many desperate. Limited test kits and equipment demand smart choices: do you spend resources on the unsure, or risk letting infection slip through? 
\n\n
🎭 Gallows Humor in Horror
\n
Amid the tension, dry humor shines—like strip-searching a grandma or confiscating ketchup as contraband. These bizarre moments inject humanity and levity into the dire scenario.

pc_games.title: Five Nights at Freddy's: Secret of the Mimic
pc_games.description:
Five Nights at Freddy's: Secret of the Mimic reimagines the FNaF horror formula into a tense, first-person survival-adventure set in Murray’s Costume Manor. Developed by Steel Wool Studios and launching June 13, 2025 on PS5 and PC, this chilling entry pits you against a shapeshifting animatronic prototype that adapts to your deepest fears and refuses to let you leave alive .
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🏚️ Fully Explorable Manor of Madness
\n
Move freely through the abandoned halls and workshops of Costume Manor, piecing together Edwin Murray’s past via scattered recordings and clues. No cameras—just your own two feet and the constant threat lurking around each corner.
\n\n
🔍 The Adaptive Threat – The Mimic
\n
Unlike static animatronics, The Mimic can wear any costume in the manor and evolve. It learns as you play, reacting to your tactics—making each playthrough unpredictable and dangerous.
\n\n
🛠️ Gadget-Based Survival
\n
Armed only with a handful of limited-use tools—motion detectors, flashlights, signal disruptors—you must outsmart The Mimic. Hide, distract, and manipulate your environment to survive the night. 
\n\n
🧩 Puzzle-Driven Progression
\n
Unlock sealed wings of the manor by decrypting terminals, rewiring circuits, and unlocking doors. The mechanical puzzles also reveal the dark motive behind the prototype and its creator’s descent.
\n\n
🎭 1970s Lore & Showbiz Horror
\n
Set in 1979, your mission is to recover Mimic schematics for Fazbear Entertainment. Through terminals and documents, uncover the sinister backstory of Edwin Murray, his missing son David, and the tragic accident that birthed the Mimic’s violence.
\n\n
🌒 Atmospheric, Psychological Horror
\n
The dark, tense corridors, sporadic jump scares, and ever-evolving Mimic make for a raw, immersive horror experience. There's no combat—just survival via quick thinking and careful observation.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 8GB or AMD RX Vega 56 8GB

pc_games.title: Wolfenstein: The New Order
pc_games.description:
Wolfenstein: The New Order is a hard-hitting, story-driven first-person shooter developed by MachineGames and published by Bethesda Softworks. Set in an alternate 1960s where the Nazis won World War II, the game reinvents the iconic Wolfenstein series with a gripping narrative, intense gunplay, and dystopian worldbuilding. Step into the boots of William "B.J." Blazkowicz, a war hero turned resistance fighter, as he launches a desperate crusade to ignite a revolution and dismantle the Nazi war machine from within.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🔫 Old-School Gunplay, Modern Feel
\n
Wolfenstein: The New Order delivers satisfying, visceral FPS combat that honors its roots while embracing cinematic flair. Dual-wield classic and futuristic weapons, perform stealth takedowns, or charge in with brute force—combat is fluid, weighty, and wildly entertaining. Every firefight is a test of reflex, precision, and aggression.
\n\n
🛠️ Weapon Variety & Upgrades
\n
From heavy-duty shotguns and scoped rifles to laser cutters and diesel-powered cannons, B.J.’s arsenal evolves with the mission. Collect parts, modify your weapons, and tailor your loadout for chaotic shootouts or quiet infiltration. The game blends grounded WWII tech with eerie sci-fi innovation.
\n\n
🕵️ Stealth & Tactical Options
\n
You’re not just a soldier—you’re a resistance operative. Stealth plays a vital role in many missions. Sneak through bunkers, silently eliminate officers, and sabotage Nazi operations. You choose how to approach combat—guns blazing, or blades in the dark.
\n\n
🌍 A Dystopian 1960s Ruled by Nazis
\n
This isn't the world you know. The Nazis control everything—cities, culture, and even the moon. From Berlin’s fortified streets to underwater strongholds and occupied London, The New Order crafts a chilling alt-history filled with propaganda, surveillance, and dehumanization. It’s a bleak yet fascinating setting steeped in visual detail and eerie authenticity.
\n\n
🎭 Emotional, Character-Driven Narrative
\n
Behind the gunfire lies a surprisingly heartfelt story. Follow B.J. and a ragtag band of rebels as they battle not just fascism, but personal demons. With excellent voice acting, cinematic cutscenes, and poignant moments of humanity, the game adds emotional depth rare in shooters.
\n\n
🧠 Perk System & Replayability
\n
Unlock passive upgrades through your playstyle—stealth kills, headshots, and explosives each feed different perk trees. Choose between two alternate timelines early on, changing not only gameplay mechanics but key character arcs and story events.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 460 or AMD Radeon HD 6850

pc_games.title: Assassin's Creed Origins
pc_games.description:
Assassin’s Creed Origins is a sweeping open-world action-RPG that redefines the iconic franchise with a bold new direction. Developed by Ubisoft Montreal, it transports players to Ancient Egypt, a land of gods, empires, and rebellion. Witness the birth of the Assassin Brotherhood through the eyes of Bayek of Siwa, a Medjay warrior driven by vengeance and bound to history. With expansive exploration, deep character progression, and visceral combat, Origins marks the rebirth of the creed.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🏺 Explore a Vast, Mythic Egypt
\n
From the sun-scorched dunes of the Sahara to the fertile banks of the Nile, Origins offers a stunning recreation of Ptolemaic Egypt at its cultural and political peak. Roam seamlessly between bustling cities like Alexandria and Memphis, mysterious tombs, ancient pyramids, and remote temples guarded by secrets and shadows.
\n\n
⚔️ Combat Reimagined
\n
No more counter-based duels—Origins introduces hitbox-based melee combat with light/heavy attacks, dodging, blocking, and adrenaline-fueled finishers. Use swords, spears, bows, and shields to suit your style. Each weapon class handles differently, offering tactical depth in every encounter.
\n\n
🎯 RPG Systems & Progression
\n
Level up by completing quests, uncovering secrets, and battling enemies across Egypt. Equip loot-based gear with rarity tiers and special perks. Choose abilities from skill trees focused on Warrior, Hunter, and Seer disciplines—tailor Bayek into a stealth assassin, a fierce fighter, or a master of tools and trickery.
\n\n
🦅 Senu – Your Eagle Companion
\n
Use Senu, your eagle scout, to survey areas, tag enemies, and plan infiltrations. This innovative mechanic allows real-time aerial recon, adding tactical layers to stealth and combat—making every outpost a strategic challenge.
\n\n
🧱 Tombs, Puzzles & Ancient Mysteries
\n
Delve into long-lost tombs and sacred ruins filled with traps, riddles, and relics. Origins blends historical fiction with mythological undertones, featuring side quests and secrets tied to Egyptian gods, astronomy, and forgotten technology.
\n\n
🎭 A Story of Justice and Origins
\n
Bayek’s deeply personal story of loss, honor, and duty evolves into a tale of revolution—of the first hidden blade, the secret creed, and a shadow war that will echo for centuries. Alongside his wife Aya, witness the first sparks of the Assassin Brotherhood.

systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 660 or AMD R9 270 (2 GB VRAM)
systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5‑2400s @ 2.5 GHz or AMD FX‑6350 @ 3.9 GHz

pc_games.title: Scorn
pc_games.description:
Scorn is a grotesque, atmospheric horror adventure developed by Ebb Software, set in a surreal and bio-mechanical universe inspired by the works of H.R. Giger and Zdzisław Beksiński. More than just a game, Scorn is an experiential descent into a nightmarish world where the boundaries between flesh and machine have melted away. With no dialogue, no hand-holding, and no mercy, you must rely on intuition to navigate a labyrinthine landscape filled with horror, mystery, and disturbing beauty.



Game Features:



🧠 Immersive, Diegetic Exploration

\nThere’s no HUD. No mission objectives. Scorn trusts you to learn by observing, experimenting, and surviving. The game’s world is its UI—everything you need to know is baked into the environment, forcing you to engage with it on a deeply tactile level. You are not a visitor. You are part of this nightmare.



🧩 Environmental Puzzles with Organic Logic


Progress is blocked not by enemies, but by the world itself. Doors that pulse like organs, machines powered by bone and blood—every puzzle in Scorn is a grotesque mechanism to be understood and manipulated. Solve them not with tutorials, but with curiosity and dread.



🧬 Biomechanical Weaponry


Even your tools are alive. Weapons in Scorn are assembled from living tissue, bone, and strange alloys—modular, fragile, and disturbingly real. Ammo is limited. Reloading is slow. Combat is tense, deliberate, and rare—survival often means avoidance.



🧟 A World of Living Death


Explore vast, interconnected zones of decaying architecture, where nothing is explained but everything is implied. Fetal machines, pulsing wombs, surgical altars—each environment tells a story without words. The horror is existential, and your purpose remains obscure until the bitter end.



🕯️ Isolation and Interpretation


There are no allies. No narration. Scorn is a meditative, solitary experience where meaning is drawn from observation, not exposition. It’s a puzzle-box world where narrative and gameplay merge, and where the final revelation may be more psychological than plot-driven.

systemRequirements.processor: Quad‑core AMD Ryzen 3 3300X / Intel Core i5‑8400

pc_games.title: Call of Duty: Vanguard
pc_games.description:
Call of Duty: Vanguard is a gripping World War II first-person shooter that thrusts players into the chaos and intensity of global conflict. Developed by Sledgehammer Games, this chapter in the iconic franchise redefines the WWII experience by telling the origin story of the special forces—an international group of soldiers who rise from the ashes of war to become legends. From the battle-scarred ruins of Stalingrad to the jungles of the Pacific, Vanguard is a sweeping, cinematic war epic built on fast, visceral gameplay and powerful storytelling.



Game Features:


Cinematic Campaign Across Four Fronts:

Live the heroic stories of a multinational squad—Task Force One—as they fight across Europe, North Africa, and the Pacific. Experience the war through the eyes of unique characters, each inspired by real-world soldiers, and uncover how special forces were born in the fires of global conflict. The campaign blends personal sacrifice with historical scale in an emotionally charged narrative.



Signature Call of Duty Combat:

With tight gunplay, destructible environments, and a mix of tactical options, Vanguard delivers high-impact action across all modes. Whether storming bunkers in Normandy or defending sniper positions in Stalingrad, the gameplay is intense, fluid, and cinematic—designed for both veterans and newcomers alike.



Revolutionized Multiplayer:

Enter a dynamic multiplayer suite featuring 20 maps at launch, innovative modes, and a new “Combat Pacing” system that lets you control the intensity of every match. From small-scale skirmishes to all-out warfare, customize your loadouts, progress your Operator, and master the arsenal of WWII with deep gunsmithing and tactical variety.



Champion Hill Mode:

A brand-new tournament-style survival experience, Champion Hill blends the thrill of battle royale with small-team tactics. Face off in fast, round-based matches where economy, strategy, and reflexes determine victory. Compete solo or in duos and trios in this high-stakes, close-quarters arena.



Zombies by Treyarch:

Uncover the dark origins of the undead in a chilling cooperative experience set in the same universe as Black Ops Cold War. With evolving objectives, occult-powered enemies, and secrets lurking beneath the war-torn surface, Vanguard’s Zombies mode expands the lore while delivering classic survival thrills.



Unified Progression and Warzone Integration:

Enjoy seamless progression across Vanguard, Warzone, and Call of Duty: Black Ops Cold War. Carry your weapons, operators, and stats across titles, and drop into Verdansk and beyond with new gear, fresh content, and seasonal updates that connect the entire Call of Duty ecosystem.

pc_games.title: Immortals Fenyx Rising
pc_games.description:
Immortals Fenyx Rising is a vibrant action-adventure game set in a mythological open world where gods, monsters, and legends collide. Step into the winged sandals of Fenyx, a forgotten hero tasked with saving the Greek gods from a dark curse. Armed with divine powers and legendary weapons, you’ll soar through the skies, conquer epic challenges, and shape your own heroic destiny in a tale inspired by ancient myth—and infused with modern wit.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n
Mythological Adventure Reimagined:\n
Journey across a fantastical world steeped in Greek mythology, from the lush plains of Aphrodite’s Grove to the volcanic depths of Hephaistos’ Forge. Each region is ruled by a god and filled with unique creatures, secrets, and puzzles that breathe new life into timeless legends.
\n\n
Dynamic Combat System:\n
Engage in fast-paced, fluid combat that combines aerial acrobatics, swordplay, and god-given powers. Use a mix of light and heavy attacks, parries, and mythic abilities to take down monstrous foes like Cyclopes, Gorgons, and corrupted heroes. Every battle is a test of reflexes and strategy, as you channel the strength of the gods.
\n\n
Divine Powers & Heroic Customization:\n
Wield the wings of Daidalos, the sword of Achilles, and other enchanted relics as you customize Fenyx to match your playstyle. Unlock new skills, upgrade gear, and master godly abilities like Herakles’ strength or Ares’ wrath to become a champion worthy of Olympus.
\n\n
Epic Puzzles & Trials:\n
Explore the Golden Isle's sprawling open world to uncover hidden Vaults of Tartaros—challenge rooms packed with environmental puzzles, platforming trials, and mythic rewards. Use your wit and agility to outsmart traps, manipulate physics, and overcome the gods’ toughest tests.
\n\n
A Tale Told with Humor and Heart:\n
Narrated by the bantering duo of Zeus and Prometheus, the story blends epic myth with sharp, self-aware humor. It's a lighthearted yet heartfelt journey that balances heroic stakes with charming storytelling, bringing both ancient gods and new heroes to life in fresh and surprising ways.
\n\n
Next-Gen Presentation:\n
With its painterly art style, sweeping landscapes, and seamless traversal mechanics—including climbing, gliding, and horseback riding—Immortals Fenyx Rising offers a visually striking and joyfully accessible take on the open-world genre. Every corner of the island invites exploration and discovery.

pc_games.title: The Walking Dead: The Telltale Definitive Series
pc_games.description:
The Walking Dead: The Telltale Definitive Series is an emotionally gripping narrative adventure that brings together all four seasons of Telltale’s critically acclaimed saga. Follow the harrowing journey of Clementine—a young girl forced to grow up fast in a world shattered by a zombie apocalypse—as she learns to survive, protect, and lead in the face of unimaginable loss and danger. With enhanced visuals, behind-the-scenes content, and every choice-driven episode in one package, this is the ultimate way to experience the story that defined a genre.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n
Complete the Story:\n
Play through all four seasons, The Walking Dead: Michonne mini-series, and bonus content including 400 Days. Watch Clementine grow from a scared little girl into a hardened survivor, and make the choices that shape her destiny in a world where no one is truly safe.
\n\n
Choice Matters:\n
Every decision you make—from who to trust to how you react in tense situations—alters the course of the story. Relationships, morality, and survival all hang in the balance, and your choices carry through from one season to the next, culminating in a deeply personal and emotionally charged finale.
\n\n
Definitive Visual Style:\n
Featuring “Graphic Black,” an art style inspired by the original comic books, the game’s visuals have been enhanced for a more striking, dramatic look. Re-experience key moments with improved lighting, performance, and character detail that bring new depth to familiar scenes.
\n\n
Immersive Audio & Music:\n
Enjoy remastered audio, dynamic soundscapes, and an expanded musical score that heightens the tension and emotion of every encounter. Voice performances, led by Melissa Hutchison as Clementine and Dave Fennoy as Lee, deliver unforgettable moments filled with humanity and heartbreak.
\n\n
Behind-the-Scenes Bonuses:\n
Dive deeper with over 10 hours of developer commentary, concept art galleries, and an in-game character viewer. Learn how the iconic series was made and revisit your favorite characters and scenes from a new perspective.
\n\n
Narrative-Driven Survival:\n
More than just a zombie game, this is a tale of family, sacrifice, and the cost of holding onto your humanity. The Telltale Definitive Series captures the raw emotional weight of surviving in a dying world—where the dead walk, but the living are often the greater threat.

pc_games.title: Milf City
pc_games.description:
Milf City: Final Edition is a mature visual novel/RPG hybrid that immerses players in a provocative, story-rich urban adventure. Set in a vibrant, stylized cityscape teeming with mystery, desire, and power dynamics, you step into the shoes of a young protagonist navigating a world where relationships, secrets, and ambition intertwine. As you interact with a cast of complex and alluring characters, every choice you make influences the paths you take—and the connections you forge.
\n
Game Features:\n\n
Narrative-Driven Exploration:\n
Delve into a branching storyline where every interaction matters. Navigate the personal lives, hidden agendas, and emotional vulnerabilities of the city’s powerful and seductive matriarchs. Whether you pursue genuine bonds, uncover buried truths, or manipulate your way to the top, the city reacts to your decisions in meaningful ways.
\n\n
Mature Themes & Relationship Building:\n
This isn’t just about steamy encounters—it’s about deep, evolving relationships. Explore themes of trust, temptation, dominance, and self-discovery as you develop meaningful connections with the women of Milf City. Dialogue options and choices carry real emotional weight, shaping how characters see you and how your story unfolds.
\n\n
Urban Sandbox with RPG Elements:\n
Earn money, build reputation, and upgrade your lifestyle as you move through the city’s varied districts. From luxurious penthouses to shadowy clubs, every location has unique opportunities and challenges. Balance daily life with deeper story arcs as you carve your own path in a city full of intrigue.
\n\n
Final Edition Enhancements:\n
This definitive edition includes revamped visuals, extended storylines, new character routes, and a refined gameplay system. Enhanced animations, voice work, and bonus content bring Milf City to life like never before, offering fans and newcomers alike the most complete experience yet.
\n\n
Stylized Presentation & Immersive Atmosphere:\n
Featuring a blend of sharp dialogue, mature storytelling, and a soundtrack that matches the game’s emotional tone, Milf City: Final Edition blends sensuality with substance. With high-quality artwork and a sleek interface, the game invites players into a world that’s both provocative and narratively compelling.

pc_games.title: Lost in Random: The Eternal Die
pc_games.description:
Lost in Random: The Eternal Die is a dark fantasy roguelite action adventure developed by Stormteller Games, set in the whimsical yet perilous world of Random. Players assume the role of Queen Aleksandra, once the benevolent ruler of Random, now trapped within the malevolent Black Die. Accompanied by her sentient die companion, Fortune, Aleksandra must navigate a labyrinth of ever-changing realms, battling twisted foes and confronting her own past to reclaim her throne and restore balance to her fractured kingdom.



Game Features:

Dynamic Real-Time Combat with Tactical Depth:


Engage in fast-paced, second-to-second combat that blends real-time action with strategic decision-making—and a touch of luck. Wield four unique weapons, throw your die-companion, and combine over 100 relics with powerful card-based abilities to unleash devastating synergies.



Ever-Changing World:

Traverse four randomly generated worlds, each with its own distinct secrets and challenges, and face over 30 different enemy types and formidable bosses. The game's dynamic environments ensure that no two runs are the same, offering endless replayability.



A Dark Fantasy Tale:

Immerse yourself in a fully voiced story set in a Tim Burton-inspired world, brought to life with hauntingly beautiful landscapes and an enchanting soundtrack. The narrative delves into themes of fate, redemption, and the consequences of randomness.



The Sanctuary:

Death is not final but returns you to the Sanctuary, an evolving haven with a fully-voiced band of eclectic characters. Unlock and upgrade weapons from a living weapon rack, choose wisely among the Blessings from the almighty Aama, or simply freshen up your wardrobe. Performing quests for your allies will restore Aleksandra’s full power and reveal her true potential.

pc_games.title: HELLBREAK
pc_games.description:
HELLBREAK is a brutal first-person roguelite shooter developed by Double Barrel Games, plunging players into the infernal depths as a World War soldier battling relentless demonic hordes to reclaim their soul from eternal damnation. Set in a twisted arena filled with bloodthirsty demons, players must earn the favor of powerful demon lords, unlocking devastating weapons, spells, and blessings to survive the onslaught. With fast-paced combat, strategic blessings, and a combo-driven scoring system, HELLBREAK offers a dynamic and challenging experience where each attempt is uniquely perilous.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n
Infernal Arena Combat:\n
Engage in intense first-person battles within a demonic arena, facing waves of enemies and formidable bosses. Utilize a variety of weapons, including demonic versions of WW1 and WW2 firearms, to annihilate foes and prove your worth to the Lords of Hell.
\n\n
Demonic Arsenal and Spells:\n
Equip yourself with a diverse range of weapons and unleash powerful spells to control the battlefield. Cast infernal flames, summon demonic totems, and transform into a chilling wraith form to decimate enemies and gain the upper hand in combat.
\n\n
Strategic Blessings and Curses:\n
Choose from over 80 different blessings that modify your abilities and playstyle, tailoring each run to your preferences. Additionally, leverage multiple unique curses to strategically control and defeat your enemies, making each battle uniquely challenging and rewarding.
\n\n
Dynamic Progression and Leaderboards:\n
Earn the favor of demon lords by completing their quests, unlocking unique rewards that enhance your combat prowess. Compete on global leaderboards to achieve the highest score and prove your dominance in Hell.
\n\n
Early Access Development:\n
HELLBREAK is currently in Early Access, with plans to introduce more content, enhanced features, and community-driven updates based on player feedback. The developers aim to release the full version within 6 to 12 months, incorporating additional weapons, spells, enemies, and gameplay improvements.

pc_games.title: Kena: Bridge of Spirits
pc_games.description:
Kena: Bridge of Spirits is a captivating action-adventure game developed by Ember Lab that invites players into a lush, mystical world brimming with ancient secrets and spiritual energy. Blending fast-paced combat, exploration, and heartfelt storytelling, the game follows Kena, a young Spirit Guide, on a journey to restore balance to a forgotten village haunted by restless spirits. With a breathtaking visual style inspired by animated films, Kena: Bridge of Spirits offers an emotionally rich adventure that merges tradition, nature, and magic.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n
Emotional Journey Through a Mystical World:\n
Step into the role of Kena, a compassionate Spirit Guide with the ability to connect with and help troubled souls move on. Her quest to uncover the truth behind a cursed village leads players through a powerful narrative about loss, healing, and spiritual growth. The story is both intimate and epic, told through beautifully animated cutscenes and character-driven moments.
\n\n
Dynamic Combat with Magical Abilities:\n
Kena wields a versatile staff that transforms into a bow, allowing for fluid melee and ranged combat. Players must time dodges, parries, and powerful spirit attacks to overcome corrupted foes and challenging bosses. As Kena unlocks new abilities, battles become increasingly tactical, rewarding precision and skill.
\n\n
The Rot – Tiny Companions, Big Impact:\n
Throughout her journey, Kena is joined by adorable spirit companions known as the Rot. These small creatures play a vital role in combat, puzzle-solving, and exploration. Players can command the Rot to move objects, weaken enemies, or unlock new pathways, creating a unique bond between the hero and her helpers.
\n\n
Stunning Pixar-Like Visuals:\n
Crafted with remarkable attention to detail, Kena: Bridge of Spirits boasts a visual style that rivals animated films. Lush forests, mystical ruins, and vibrant villages are brought to life with rich colors, cinematic lighting, and expressive animations. The art direction delivers a magical atmosphere that immerses players in a world where nature and spirit coexist.
\n\n
Deep Exploration and Environmental Puzzles:\n
The game’s world is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Players will traverse dense woodlands, ancient temples, and crumbling mountaintops, solving environmental puzzles and uncovering relics that reveal the history of the land and its lost spirits. Exploration is rewarding and seamlessly integrated into the narrative and gameplay.

pc_games.title: Riders Republic
pc_games.description:
Riders Republic is an adrenaline-fueled, open-world sports adventure developed by Ubisoft that drops players into a massive, vibrant playground built for extreme sports. Set across a sprawling landscape inspired by iconic American national parks, the game invites players to bike, ski, snowboard, wingsuit, and rocket wingsuit their way through an ever-evolving, chaotic multiplayer experience. Whether carving down snow-covered peaks or soaring through canyon winds, Riders Republic delivers non-stop action and freedom in a breathtaking natural world.



Game Features:


Massive Multiplayer Playground:

Riders Republic brings the energy of a sports festival to life with up to 64 players competing simultaneously in a shared open world. Dive into wild mass races, freestyle competitions, and trick battles, or just roam freely with friends. The game's seamless multiplayer integration ensures that the world always feels alive, competitive, and buzzing with activity.



Adrenaline-Pumping Extreme Sports:

From downhill mountain biking and freestyle snowboarding to wingsuit gliding and rocket-powered flight, the game features a deep roster of extreme sports disciplines. Each sport is designed with fluid physics and intuitive controls that let players chain tricks, navigate rugged terrain, and build momentum in thrilling ways.



Expansive and Diverse Open World:

Combining seven legendary U.S. national parks—including Yosemite, Bryce Canyon, and Mammoth Mountain—into one massive map, Riders Republic offers a vast and varied terrain to explore. Lush forests, rocky ridges, snowy summits, and desert canyons create a dynamic playground full of environmental challenges and visual splendor.



Career Progression and Customization:

Players can rise through the ranks in multiple career paths, mastering each sport and unlocking new gear, outfits, and sponsors along the way. With deep customization options, riders can express their style both on and off the trail, from sleek racing suits to outlandish costumes.

pc_games.title: Shadow of the Tomb Raider
pc_games.description:
Shadow of the Tomb Raider is the climactic finale of Lara Croft’s origin trilogy, developed by Eidos-Montréal in collaboration with Crystal Dynamics.
