Set in the lush, deadly jungles of Latin America, this action-adventure title follows Lara’s transformation into the legendary Tomb Raider as she races to stop a Maya apocalypse—one she inadvertently sets in motion. With cinematic storytelling, brutal survival mechanics, and intricate tombs to conquer, this installment delivers the most intense and personal journey in the series.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🌿 Explore a Living, Lethal Jungle
\n
Survive and adapt in the heart of the Peruvian jungle, where nature itself is one of your fiercest adversaries. Navigate through dense foliage, scale vertical cliffs, swim through deep caverns, and contend with predatory wildlife—all while using the environment to hide, ambush, and overcome your enemies.
\n\n
⚔️ Guerilla Combat & Advanced Stealth
\n
Master the art of jungle warfare with enhanced stealth mechanics. Use mud to camouflage yourself, blend into walls of vegetation, and strike from the shadows. Take down enemies with stealth kills or set traps, and use fear tactics to disrupt and dismantle enemy patrols.
\n\n
🗝️ Tombs, Puzzles, and Ancient Mysteries
\n
True to its name, Shadow of the Tomb Raider delivers some of the most challenging and intricate tombs in the franchise. Solve deadly environmental puzzles, avoid hidden traps, and uncover lost secrets as you explore sprawling underground complexes and forgotten cities inspired by Mesoamerican cultures.
\n\n
🧠 Psychological Depth & Personal Story
\n
Witness Lara’s psychological transformation as she grapples with guilt, responsibility, and destiny. Her decisions shape not only her journey but the lives of those around her, culminating in a powerful, character-driven narrative that tests her resolve and redefines her legacy.
\n\n
🔧 RPG Elements & Gear Customization
\n
Earn experience through exploration, hunting, and combat to unlock skills across three trees: Seeker, Warrior, and Scavenger. Craft upgrades using resources found in the wild, customize outfits with functional and aesthetic perks, and tailor Lara’s tools and weapons to match your playstyle.

pc_games.title: Kaodi
pc_games.description:
Kaodi is a poignant, narrative-driven 2D platformer developed by Outlander Games and published by Dojo System. Released on June 3, 2025, for PC (Steam), it follows Barren—a veteran of the Republic of Shan conflict—on a deeply emotional trek across a war-ravaged kingdom as he confronts guilt, trauma, and fractured relationships .
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🎭 Introspective Storytelling
\n
Step into Barren’s shoes on a quest for redemption. Carry the weight of war as you meet NPCs whose stories of loss, dignity, and forgiveness challenge your understanding of conflict's human toll.
\n\n
🌌 Inner World Mechanic
\n
Enter the “Inner World,” a surreal reflection of Barren’s psyche. Navigate his memories, emotions, and moral conflicts through personal spaces and dialogues—uncover hidden testimonies and impact the narrative depth.
\n\n
⚔️ Action & Platforming
\n
Though non-combatant in soul, Barren is no stranger to violence. Engage in precise duels and navigate platform challenges using smooth combat and agile movement to earn your way forward.
\n\n
🎨 Stunning Visual Blend
\n
The art style merges pixel-art aesthetics with 3D modeling and Chinese-ink inspired effects. This unique fusion crafts haunting, atmospheric visuals that bring the ravaged but hopeful world to life.
\n\n
⏳ Short, Focused Experience
\n
Designed to deliver impact quickly, Kaodi runs about 1 hour—offering a focused, emotionally charged narrative journey perfect for players seeking a brief yet stirring experience

pc_games.title: Lies of P
pc_games.description:
Lies of P is a dark and twisted reimagining of the Pinocchio tale, transformed into a brutal soulslike action-RPG. Developed by NEOWIZ and Round8 Studio, the game places players in the role of a puppet named P, who must navigate the fallen city of Krat—a once-thriving metropolis now rotting under madness, mechanized monsters, and broken humanity. With its haunting art style, punishing combat, and themes of deception and identity, Lies of P blends gothic horror and steampunk elegance into a masterclass of atmospheric storytelling.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🗡️ Soulslike Combat, Refined
\n
Inspired by Bloodborne and Sekiro, the combat in Lies of P is deliberate, fast-paced, and unforgiving. Parry and dodge with precision, then counterattack with calculated strikes. With a wide array of weapons and customizable fighting styles, every enemy encounter becomes a brutal dance of timing and tactics.
\n\n
🧠 Lying System – Shape Your Destiny
\n
Your choices matter—especially your lies. In a world where truth is elusive, Lies of P introduces a "Lying System" that influences quests, story progression, and even the game’s ending. Will you lie to protect others, or tell the truth and face the consequences? Your morality is tested, and your humanity questioned.
\n\n
🦾 Weapon Assembly & Customization
\n
Craft your own fighting style with a modular weapon system. Mix and match blades, hilts, and enhancements to suit your playstyle—from fast and agile thrusts to heavy, hammering strikes. Combine with Legion Arms—mechanical upgrades that give P special abilities like flamethrowers, grapples, or shields.
\n\n
🏙️ Krat – A City of Gears and Madness
\n
Explore the decaying, plague-ridden city of Krat—a steampunk world drenched in Victorian gloom and Belle Époque beauty. From bloodied puppet factories to haunted opera houses and shattered clocktowers, every corner of the city oozes dread and mystery. Rich environmental storytelling invites exploration and discovery.
\n\n
🔧 Puppet Upgrades & RPG Progression
\n
Unlock new abilities, passive perks, and Legion enhancements through exploration and leveling. Choose how to evolve P’s body and mind—improving health, stamina, strength, and more. The further you delve into Krat’s secrets, the more power (and questions) you’ll uncover.

pc_games.title: Stray
pc_games.description:
A lost, lonely, and separated stray cat must solve an ancient mystery and escape from a long-abandoned city.

\n\n
Stray is a third-person adventure game set in the neon streets and grim, dirty alleys of a dying cyber city. Wander through basements and rooftops, defend yourself from unexpected threats, and unravel the mysteries of this unfriendly place where there is no one but indifferent droids and dangerous creatures.
\n\n

See the world through the eyes of a stray cat and interact with your surroundings in the most bizarre ways. When meeting the strange inhabitants of this alien world, you will have to be stealthy, agile, unwise, and sometimes annoying.
\n\n
Along the way, your cat will make friends with a small flying drone B-12. With the help of your newfound friend, you will certainly find a way out of the city.

\n\n
Stray was developed by BlueTwelve Studio, a small team from the south of France made up mostly of cats and a few humans.

pc_games.title: Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League
pc_games.description:
Suicide Squad: Kill the Justice League is a third-person action-shooter developed by Rocksteady Studios, set in the expansive universe of the Batman: Arkham series. Released on February 2, 2024, for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC, the game follows Amanda Waller's Task Force X—Harley Quinn, Deadshot, Captain Boomerang, and King Shark—as they confront a Brainiac-controlled Justice League in a war-torn Metropolis. Players can switch between characters or team up in online co-op to tackle missions and defeat corrupted superheroes.



Game Features:



Dynamic Character Abilities: 
Each member of the Suicide Squad boasts unique traversal and combat skills, such as Harley Quinn's agility and Deadshot's precision shooting.



Expansive Open World:
 Explore a detailed Metropolis featuring iconic DC landmarks, including the Daily Planet and Hall of Justice.



Live-Service Content:
 Post-launch updates introduced new playable characters like The Joker, Mr. Freeze, Lawless, and Deathstroke, alongside seasonal missions and events.



Offline Mode:
 A long-requested feature, offline mode was added in the final update, allowing solo play without requiring an internet connection.

pc_games.title: Bright Memory: Infinite
pc_games.description:
Bright Memory: Infinite is a high-octane fusion of first-person shooter and action genres, developed by FYQD-Studio. Set in the year 2036, the game follows Shelia, an agent of the Supernatural Science Research Organization (SRO), as she investigates mysterious phenomena linked to an ancient mystery involving two worlds.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Dynamic Combat System:\n
Engage in lightning-fast combat by seamlessly combining gunplay and swordplay. Utilize a variety of weapons, including customizable firearms with special ammunition types like incendiary bombs and homing missiles, alongside a versatile sword capable of deflecting bullets and executing devastating melee attacks.
\n\n
Visually Stunning Environments:\n
Experience breathtaking graphics powered by Unreal Engine, showcasing meticulously designed environments that blend futuristic technology with ancient mythology. The game's visual fidelity contributes to its immersive atmosphere.
\n\n
Short but Intense Gameplay:\n
While the game offers a brief campaign, lasting approximately two hours, it delivers a concentrated experience filled with intense action sequences and challenging encounters.

pc_games.title: Resident Evil Village
pc_games.description:
Experience survival horror like never before in the eighth installation of the legendary Resident Evil series, Resident Evil Village.
\n\n
Several years after the horrific events of Resident Evil 7 biohazard, which received critical acclaim, a different story begins. Ethan Winters and his wife Mia have settled in a new place, far from the horrors of the past. But before the couple had time to enjoy a serene life, tragically struck again.
\n\n

PECULIARITIES\n
- First-person. Players will assume the role of Ethan Winters and experience every desperate battle and monstrous chase through the character's eyes.
\n\n
- Familiar Faces and New Enemies: Chris Redfield has typically been a hero in the Resident Evil series, but in Resident Evil Village, his image is tainted by evil intentions. The mysterious village is teeming with ruthless new enemies, and they will hunt Ethan at every turn as he tries to understand the latest nightmare that has closed in on him.

pc_games.title: Senua’s Saga: Hellblade II
pc_games.description:
Senua’s Saga: Hellblade II is a dark and immersive action-adventure game developed by Ninja Theory, delivering a deeply psychological and visually stunning journey into myth and madness. A sequel to the critically acclaimed Hellblade: Senua’s Sacrifice, this installment follows Senua as she ventures deeper into the brutal and unforgiving landscapes of mythic Iceland. Blending visceral combat, cinematic storytelling, and powerful themes of mental trauma and resilience, Hellblade II is a harrowing tale of survival and sacrifice brought to life with next-gen fidelity on Xbox Series X|S and PC.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
A Haunting and Personal Story:\n
In Senua’s Saga: Hellblade II, players once again step into the troubled mind of Senua, a warrior haunted by psychosis and loss. As she confronts both inner demons and brutal enemies, the line between reality and hallucination blurs in an emotionally charged narrative. The game explores themes of mental illness, mythology, and personal redemption with unflinching intensity, offering a gripping and intimate experience unlike anything else in the genre.
\n\n
Cinematic Combat and Psychological Immersion:\n
Combat in Hellblade II is fierce, grounded, and brutally intimate. Every strike feels weighty and personal, reflecting Senua’s struggle for survival. With an overhauled melee system and seamless cinematic transitions, players are fully immersed in every battle. The game's audio design — featuring binaural sound and reactive voices — further deepens the psychological experience, pulling players into Senua’s fractured perception of the world.
\n\n
Stunning Visual Realism Powered by Unreal Engine 5:\n
Leveraging the cutting-edge capabilities of Unreal Engine 5, Hellblade II delivers a visual masterpiece, with photorealistic environments, lifelike character animations, and breathtaking lighting effects. The rugged terrain of Iceland is rendered with haunting beauty, providing a stark and unforgettable backdrop for Senua’s journey. Every detail — from facial expressions to atmospheric weather — enhances the game's emotional and immersive impact.

pc_games.title: Hellblade: Senua's Sacrifice
pc_games.description:
Hellblade: Senua’s Sacrifice is a haunting action-adventure game developed by Ninja Theory that immerses players in a psychological journey through the mind of its troubled protagonist. Set in the Viking Age, you play as Senua, a warrior on a quest to rescue the soul of her dead lover from the Norse underworld. As she battles both physical and mental demons, the line between reality and hallucination blurs, drawing you into a deeply emotional and immersive experience.
\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Psychological Horror:\n
Experience the intense psychological struggle of Senua as the game vividly portrays her battle with psychosis. Voices in her head, disturbing visions, and ever-present hallucinations make every step of her journey feel unpredictable and unsettling. The game challenges your perceptions, leaving you questioning what’s real and what’s imagined.
\n\n
Combat and Exploration:\n
Master a fast-paced combat system that blends brutal melee fighting with strategic decision-making. Fight off terrifying foes while exploring the dense, atmospheric environments inspired by Norse mythology. Every combat encounter tests your skills, while exploration unearths hidden lore and symbolism that ties into Senua’s fractured psyche.
\n\n
Unique Audio Design:\n
The game uses binaural audio to immerse players fully in Senua’s mind, with voices and sounds coming from different directions, intensifying the feeling of paranoia and confusion. The sound design plays a critical role in how you navigate the world and engage with the story, making it a truly unique experience that needs to be played with headphones.
\n\n
Story-Driven Adventure:\n
Follow Senua’s deeply emotional and personal journey as she grapples with loss, guilt, and a relentless drive for redemption. The narrative is a blend of mythological lore and personal trauma, where each decision Senua makes is influenced by her inner turmoil and her perception of the world around her.
\n\n
Stunning Visuals:\n
Hellblade: Senua’s Sacrifice features a striking visual style, with photorealistic character models and environments that bring the Viking world to life. The haunting landscapes and detailed textures make the world feel both ancient and otherworldly, enhancing the game’s atmosphere of isolation and unease.
\n\n
Innovative Storytelling:\n
The game’s nonlinear storytelling and immersive narrative keep you engaged, gradually unveiling the complexities of Senua’s mental state and her quest. With no clear-cut heroes or villains, the story challenges you to empathize with Senua’s journey, creating a powerful emotional connection.
\n\n
Darker Themes:\n
Explore the depths of trauma, loss, and mental illness through Senua’s eyes. The game doesn’t shy away from the difficult aspects of her psyche, portraying her struggles in a raw and realistic manner. This poignant portrayal gives the game an emotional weight that resonates long after you’ve put down the controller.

pc_games.title: MindsEye
pc_games.description:
MindsEye is a narrative-driven action-adventure game developed by Build A Rocket Boy and directed by former Rockstar North president Leslie Benzies. Released on June 10, 2025, for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC, the game immerses players in the dystopian desert metropolis of Redrock City. In this near-future setting, technology reigns supreme, with AI, robotics, and neural implants shaping daily life. Players assume the role of Jacob Diaz, a former soldier burdened with fragmented memories due to a mysterious neural implant, the MindsEye. As Jacob delves deeper into his past, he uncovers a web of corporate espionage, political corruption, and the pervasive influence of unchecked technology .
\n\n
Despite its ambitious premise, MindsEye has faced criticism for its dated gameplay mechanics and technical issues. The game offers a linear third-person shooter experience, reminiscent of titles from over a decade ago, with repetitive missions and limited player agency. Critics have highlighted the game's lack of innovation and depth, with some describing it as a "forgettable sci-fi action adventure" . Additionally, technical glitches, poor optimization, and performance issues have marred the player experience, leading to widespread disappointment among the gaming community .
\n\n
However, MindsEye does introduce an innovative feature in the form of its Game Creation System. This tool allows players to craft user-generated content, enabling them to design and share their own missions and experiences within the game's universe. While this feature shows promise, it has been criticized for feeling disconnected from the main narrative and lacking meaningful integration into the core gameplay . Overall, while MindsEye presents an intriguing concept, its execution falls short of expectations, leaving players with a sense of missed potential.

pc_games.title: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33
pc_games.description:
Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 is a strikingly original turn-based RPG set in a surreal, painterly world where art and death are tragically intertwined. Developed by Sandfall Interactive and powered by Unreal Engine 5, this debut title blends rich storytelling, fluid exploration, and fast-paced, timing-based combat in a visually breathtaking universe. Step into the shoes of the last hope of humanity, and embark on a journey to break the cycle of death dictated by the mysterious Paintress.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🎨 A Beautiful, Terrifying World of Living Art
\n
Set in a hauntingly artistic vision of Belle Époque France, the world of Clair Obscur is both enchanting and oppressive. Hand-crafted environments blend dreamlike surrealism with oil-painted textures and dynamic lighting to create a world like no other—alive, unpredictable, and soaked in symbolism.
\n\n
🖌️ A Deadly Ritual of Oblivion
\n
Each year, the enigmatic Paintress awakens and paints a number on her monolith. Every person of that age vanishes—erased from existence by her magic. This year, she has painted “33.” You are part of Expedition 33, a final mission to reach the Paintress and end the cycle once and for all.
\n\n
⚔️ Dynamic Turn-Based Combat with Real-Time Input
\n
While turn-based at its core, combat in Expedition 33 requires timing, precision, and rhythm. Attack by pressing at the right moment. Dodge, block, and counter in real time. This hybrid battle system blends strategic planning with action-game reflexes, keeping every encounter tense and tactile.
\n\n
🧙 Unique Party & Character-Driven Powers
\n
Build a squad of uniquely gifted individuals, each with personalized skills, backstories, and combat roles. Combine magic, melee, and ranged abilities to create devastating synergy—or adapt your party mid-battle as threats evolve. Team bonds and story arcs unfold as you progress, deepening the emotional stakes.
\n\n
🧭 Exploration Across a Shattered World
\n
Venture through decaying cities, bizarre biomes, and impossible architecture in semi-open world segments. The world reacts to your presence, filled with secrets, NPCs, puzzles, and powerful optional enemies. Discovery is as much a part of the journey as combat.
\n\n
🎼 A Cinematic Score & Deep Narrative
\n
Driven by themes of mortality, fate, resistance, and the meaning of legacy, Clair Obscur delivers emotional storytelling in every scene. The orchestral soundtrack elevates both combat and quiet moments, building a poetic atmosphere that lingers long after you’ve put the controller down.

pc_games.title: Final Fantasy XVI
pc_games.description:
Final Fantasy XVI is a bold, mature reimagining of the legendary RPG series, blending epic fantasy storytelling with high-octane real-time combat. Developed by Creative Business Unit III (the team behind FFXIV) and exclusively for PlayStation 5 (at launch), it tells a dark, politically charged tale of revenge, brotherhood, and the cost of power. Set in the war-torn realm of Valisthea, FFXVI delivers cinematic spectacle, powerful character drama, and some of the most intense battles in franchise history.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🐉 Eikon Battles – Titans Clash in the Sky
\n
In FFXVI, summoned beings called Eikons (like Ifrit, Shiva, Bahamut, and Titan) are more than just weapons—they’re central to the story and gameplay. You’ll not only battle them in jaw-dropping, kaiju-scale set pieces, but also harness their powers in combat. Each Eikon grants unique abilities, and mastering them defines your fighting style.
\n\n
⚔️ Cinematic, Real-Time Combat
\n
No turn-based system here—FFXVI delivers fast-paced, fluid real-time action designed by Ryota Suzuki (Devil May Cry 5, Dragon’s Dogma). Dodge, parry, combo, and unleash devastating Eikon abilities in stylish, high-impact duels. Whether battling soldiers or gods, the action feels visceral and empowering.
\n\n
🌍 A Dark Fantasy World Rich in Lore
\n
Explore Valisthea, a continent powered by magical Crystals and divided by warring nations. The world is steeped in political intrigue, with alliances, betrayals, and ancient magic shaping the fate of kingdoms. Think Game of Thrones meets Final Fantasy—with chocobos and monsters.
\n\n
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 A Hero Forged by Tragedy
\n
You play as Clive Rosfield, firstborn to the Archduke of Rosaria. Sworn to protect his younger brother Joshua—the Dominant of the Phoenix—Clive is thrust into a tale of loss, vengeance, and fate. Over decades, you’ll witness his evolution from noble knight to mythic warrior.
\n\n
🔥 Mature Themes & Complex Characters
\n
This is Final Fantasy for grown-ups. The game tackles themes like political oppression, personal identity, sacrifice, and revenge—through nuanced writing and fully voice-acted scenes. Expect morally grey characters, hard decisions, and emotional payoffs.
\n\n
🧭 Semi-Open World Exploration
\n
While not a fully open world, FFXVI offers large, richly detailed zones to explore, from scorched battlefields and bustling towns to enchanted forests and crumbling ruins. Side quests, lore entries, hidden bosses, and world-building moments await the curious traveler.

pc_games.title: Dying Light 2 Stay Human
pc_games.description:
Dying Light 2: Stay Human is an open-world action RPG set in a post-apocalyptic world devastated by a zombie outbreak. Developed by Techland, this gripping sequel elevates the franchise with a massive explorable city, brutal melee combat, parkour traversal, and a branching narrative shaped by your choices. As Aiden Caldwell, an infected survivor with mysterious powers, your decisions will determine the fate of a crumbling civilization.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🧟 A City on the Brink
\n
Set 20 years after the original outbreak, The City—one of humanity’s last strongholds—teeters on collapse. Factions vie for control, the infected roam the streets, and danger lurks around every corner. Your actions determine its future. Will you restore order or plunge it into further chaos?
\n\n
🏃 Parkour-Driven Exploration
\n
Traverse rooftops, scale buildings, and vault over gaps using a robust, first-person parkour system. The environment is your playground—fluid movement is essential for survival, especially when the infected swarm at night. Unlock new abilities as you grow stronger.
\n\n
⚔️ Brutal, Creative Combat
\n
Combat is melee-focused, visceral, and deeply satisfying. Use crafted weapons—spiked bats, electrified machetes, modded tools—to dispatch human enemies and horrifying mutations. Timing, stamina, and positioning are crucial, especially against stronger foes.
\n\n
🧬 Choices That Matter
\n
Your decisions have real impact. Align with different factions, shape the city’s politics, unlock new routes and tools—or destroy them. Every choice ripples across the world, affecting characters, storylines, and even the city’s skyline.
\n\n
🌙 Terrifying Day-Night Cycle
\n
The infected are weak in sunlight but grow deadly at night. As dusk falls, powerful “Volatiles” emerge and safe zones vanish. Nighttime runs offer high rewards—but carry lethal risks. Will you brave the dark, or play it safe?
\n\n
🔨 Crafting, Upgrades & Survival
\n
Scavenge for materials and blueprints across abandoned buildings and quarantined zones. Craft weapons, gear, and consumables to give yourself the edge. Manage your immunity, avoid infection, and make each resource count.

pc_games.title: Wo Long: Fallen Dynasty
pc_games.description:
From Team Ninja—the creators of Nioh and Ninja Gaiden—Wo Long: Fallen Dynasty is a fast-paced action-RPG set in a dark, demon-infested version of China’s Later Han Dynasty. As a nameless militia soldier, players fight for survival against twisted warlords, mythic beasts, and demonic forces in a land torn apart by chaos, blood, and magic. With intense combat rooted in Chinese martial arts and a deep morale-based system, Wo Long offers a unique and punishingly rewarding experience.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
⚔️ Fast, Fluid Martial Arts Combat
\n
Inspired by Chinese swordplay, combat is aggressive, graceful, and highly technical. Master parries, deflections, and counters to overwhelm both human and supernatural foes. Every move is a dance of timing and precision—mistime a dodge, and death is swift.
\n\n
🐉 Myth and History Collide
\n
Enter a war-torn world where real historical figures—like Lu Bu, Cao Cao, and Zhang Liang—are reimagined in a dark fantasy narrative. Alongside them rise demonic beasts drawn from Chinese mythology, from hulking war demons to ethereal serpents.
\n\n
🧘‍♂️ Morale Rank System
\n
A unique twist on progression: every enemy has a morale level, and so do you. Losing to stronger foes decreases your rank, while defeating them boosts it—shifting the balance of power. Use this system to gain the edge over even seemingly impossible bosses.
\n\n
💥 Devastating Wizardry Spells & Divine Beasts
\n
Unleash elemental spells—fireballs, stone pillars, lightning strikes—and call upon mythical Divine Beasts like Qilin and Zhuque for devastating attacks or passive boosts. Mix martial arts with magic for deeply customizable playstyles.
\n\n
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Co-op Multiplayer
\n
Join forces with up to two friends in seamless online co-op. Summon allies to help in tough boss fights or explore cursed battlefields together. Teamwork can tip the scales in this brutal war.
\n\n
🌄 Stylized Feudal China
\n
Explore hauntingly beautiful battlefields—from flaming fortresses and corrupted villages to towering mountain temples. Every region oozes atmosphere, combining historical detail with eerie fantasy elements. Expect traps, ambushes, and hidden secrets around every turn.

pc_games.title: Need for Speed Heat
pc_games.description:
Need for Speed Heat is an adrenaline-charged street racing experience that blends daytime sanctioned competition with illegal night racing across a vibrant open-world city. Developed by Ghost Games and published by EA, Heat redefines the iconic franchise with intense car customization, thrilling chases, and a rebellious spirit that pulses through every mile.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
🏙 Day vs. Night – Two Worlds, One City
\n
Palm City runs on a dual clock. By day, compete in sanctioned races to earn cash legally. By night, shift into the underground for illicit races that build your rep—but beware, the corrupt cops are more ruthless after dark. Your strategy changes with the sun.
\n\n
🚔 High-Stakes Police Pursuits
\n
Night racing comes with danger. As your heat level rises, police become more aggressive—using spike strips, roadblocks, and helicopters. Escape means glory. Get caught, and you lose both money and rep. Tactical driving and smart escapes are key.
\n\n
🚗 Deep Car Customization
\n
Build your dream ride from over 120 real-world cars, from classic muscle to supercars. Customize almost every detail: body kits, paint jobs, exhaust tones, tire smoke, underglow, and more. Performance tuning allows you to optimize for speed, drift, or off-road power.
\n\n
🛠 Progression Split: REP vs. BANK
\n
Heat uses a unique two-currency system. Race by day for cash (BANK) to upgrade your car. Race at night to build your reputation (REP), unlocking new vehicles, parts, and challenges. The more you risk, the more you gain—or lose.
\n\n
🌴 Open-World Palm City
\n
Explore a stylized Miami-inspired open world—from sun-drenched highways and downtown skyscrapers to murky swamps and winding mountain roads. Dynamic weather and a day/night cycle add depth and unpredictability to every race.

pc_games.title: Lost Records: Bloom & Rage
pc_games.description:
Lost Records: Bloom & Rage – A Dual-Timeline Journey of Friendship, Mystery & Music is Developed by Don't Nod Montréal and directed by Michel Koch, Lost Records: Bloom & Rage (Unreal Engine 5) is a narrative-driven single-player adventure released in two parts (Tape 1 “Bloom” on Feb 18, 2025; Tape 2 “Rage” as a free update on Apr 15) for PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X/S 
\n\n
Game Features:
🔄 Dual-Timeline Narrative
\n
Follow Swann through summer 1995 and again in 2022, unraveling a mysterious summer event and the promise that scattered her friend group.
\n\n
🎥 Camcorder Gameplay
\n
Use Swann’s camcorder to film and preserve memories—recordings impact narrative and immersion, adding a personal, cinematic touch.
\n\n
💬 Dynamic Dialogue & Relationship Building
Interact through realistic conversations with interrupt options and gaze-driven responses. Player choipe friendships with Nora, Autumn, and Kat.
\n
🎸 90s Nostalgia & Soundtrack
Set in Velvet Cove, Michigan, with neo‑punk aesthetics, VHS-era visuals, and a dreamy, punk-infused soundtrack from Milk & Bone, Ruth Radelet, and Nora Kelly Band .
\n\n
🎮 PC & Console Polished Performance
\n
Supports keyboard/mouse and controllers, automatic saving, accessibility features, and runs at crisp 1080p/4K with DLSS/FSR support.

pc_games.title: Split Fiction
pc_games.description:
Split Fiction is a cooperative-only action-adventure experience from Hazelight Studios and director Josef Fares. Tasked with stepping into the shoes of two aspiring writers—Mio and Zoe—players are thrust into a surreal simulation where science fiction and fantasy collide. United by necessity, they’ll navigate glitch-infested worlds and discover a playful yet emotionally rich narrative about creativity, connection, and survival.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Cinematic Co‑op Gameplay
\n
Designed exclusively for two players, Split Fiction thrives on split-screen or online co‑op. With the signature Friend’s Pass, one owner can invite a friend for free—regardless of platform—so collaboration becomes the heart of the experience.
\n\n
Dynamic Dual Worlds
\n
Each level reflects either Mio’s futuristic visions or Zoe’s fantasy dreams. From riding dragons to piloting hi‑tech hoverbikes, these genre-bending transitions deliver unpredictable fun and variety.
\n\n
Innovative Split Mechanics
\n
Challenges demand tight coordination: Mio may walk on walls as Zoe navigates upside-down, or one shields the other while they tackle puzzles. It’s a synchronized dance that pushes teamwork to its limits.
\n
Story of Creative Ownership
\n\n
The core plot critiques artificial intelligence harvesting creativity, as Mio and Zoe fight to reclaim their ideas from the mysterious Rader Corporation. A narrative that explores artistic identity threaded through a high-stakes cooperative journey.
\n\n
Polished Presentation & Performance
\n
Built on Unreal Engine 5, the PC edition supports high resolutions and framerates, with a smooth 60 FPS performance and vivid, stylized environments that keep gameplay both crisp and immersive.

pc_games.title: Marvel's Spider-Man 2
pc_games.description:
Marvel’s Spider-Man 2 is an action-adventure epic developed by Insomniac Games that thrusts players into the heart of a darker, more intense chapter in the Spider-Man saga. Building on the critically acclaimed foundation of its predecessors, the game delivers a dual-hero experience, allowing players to swing between the lives of both Peter Parker and Miles Morales as they face their greatest challenge yet. Set in a richly detailed and expanded New York City, Marvel’s Spider-Man 2 combines high-octane combat, emotionally driven storytelling, and jaw-dropping visuals powered by the PlayStation 5.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Dual Spider-Men, One Epic Journey:\n
For the first time, players seamlessly switch between Peter Parker and Miles Morales, each with their own unique abilities, suits, and story arcs. Whether unleashing Peter’s new symbiote powers or harnessing Miles’ bio-electric venom abilities, the combat is faster, deeper, and more visceral than ever before. Team up to face a new era of threats while navigating personal struggles and heroic responsibilities.
\n\n
A Darker, More Emotional Story:\n
Marvel’s Spider-Man 2 explores themes of identity, power, and sacrifice as Peter and Miles confront iconic villains such as Kraven the Hunter, Lizard, and the fearsome Venom. As the symbiote’s influence grows, Peter’s battle becomes increasingly personal — testing the bonds of friendship, mentorship, and the very essence of what it means to be a hero.
\n\n
Stunning Next-Gen Realism:\n
Harnessing the power of the PlayStation 5, the game delivers a visually breathtaking rendition of New York City — larger, denser, and more alive than ever. Real-time ray tracing, ultra-fast loading, and fluid character animations bring the world to life with cinematic fidelity. From high-speed web-swinging to high-stakes boss battles, every moment is a spectacle of motion and emotion.

pc_games.title: Hitman 3
pc_games.description:
Hitman 3 is a stealth-action game developed by IO Interactive that plunges players into a world of deadly precision and high-stakes assassination. As the dramatic conclusion to the World of Assassination trilogy, Hitman 3 refines and elevates the series’ signature sandbox gameplay, offering a globetrotting experience filled with intrigue, disguise, and perfectly executed kills. Players once again assume the role of Agent 47, the enigmatic and ruthless assassin, as he undertakes his most personal and professional missions yet — unraveling a global conspiracy and confronting his past one target at a time.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Ultimate Stealth Experience and Creative Assassination:\n
Hitman 3 emphasizes freedom of approach, allowing players to plan and execute hits with precision and creativity. Whether using disguises, environmental traps, or high-tech tools, every mission offers countless possibilities for infiltration and elimination. The game’s seamless mechanics and immersive design reward both meticulous planning and bold improvisation.
\n\n
A Gripping Conclusion to the World of Assassination Trilogy:\n
Agent 47’s final journey takes players across six meticulously crafted locations around the world, from the towering skyscrapers of Dubai to the shadowy alleys of Chongqing. The narrative delves deeper into 47’s origins and his struggle with identity, loyalty, and fate, delivering a mature and suspenseful story filled with twists and revelations.
\n\n
Visually Stunning, Immersive Environments:\n
Powered by IO Interactive’s proprietary Glacier engine, Hitman 3 features stunning environments rendered in exquisite detail. Each location is richly atmospheric and alive with AI-driven NPCs, dynamic weather effects, and layered sound design. Whether sneaking through a luxurious English manor or infiltrating a secretive Berlin club, players are drawn into a vibrant world where every corner holds opportunity — and danger.

pc_games.title: Horizon Forbidden West
pc_games.description:
Horizon Forbidden West is a breathtaking open-world action RPG developed by Guerrilla Games, where players journey into a majestic yet perilous frontier ruled by awe-inspiring machines and ancient secrets. As Aloy, a hunter of the Nora tribe and bearer of the Focus, you are driven beyond the familiar wilds into the Forbidden West—a vast, untamed region devastated by violent storms, crumbling civilizations, and a mysterious blight that threatens all life. In a land where the old world’s ruins stir with new dangers and primal technology walks as gods, your survival depends on mastering both nature and machine.



Game Features:


Uncover the Secrets of a Dying World:

In the wake of the events of Horizon Zero Dawn, a new catastrophe looms. Aloy must unravel the mystery behind a deadly red blight spreading across the world and confront ancient forces that may rewrite the fate of humanity. Face powerful new tribes—some wielding machines as weapons—and discover the buried truths of a broken Earth and its lost creators.



Fluid, Tactical Combat Against Machines and Men:

Combat in Horizon Forbidden West is deeply strategic and exhilarating. Face dozens of new mechanical beasts, from the soaring Sunwings to the towering Tremortusks, each with unique behaviors and weaknesses. Customize your arsenal with elemental arrows, tripwires, and explosive traps—or override your enemies to turn their might against your foes. Human adversaries are deadlier than ever, requiring stealth, agility, and raw power in equal measure.



A Lush, Expansive Frontier:

The Forbidden West is a stunning and diverse landscape—sunken cities, lush jungles, desert ruins, and storm-swept coasts sprawl across a massive open world, teeming with secrets and stories. Explore on foot, mount, or by air, uncovering hidden cauldrons, ancient vaults, and the echoes of a civilization long past. Every environment reacts to your choices and offers dynamic weather systems, day-night cycles, and breathtaking realism powered by next-gen technology.



Deep Customization and Progression:

Aloy’s journey is your own to shape. Gain powerful new skills across revamped skill trees, craft advanced weapons and gear, and unlock Valor Surges—devastating combat abilities fueled by precision and timing. Customize your approach to every threat, whether you're an agile hunter, a trap master, or a relentless warrior.

pc_games.title: It Takes Two
pc_games.description:
Embark on the wildest journey of your life in It Takes Two, a cross-genre adventure designed exclusively for co-op, where you can play together on the same screen and joyfully overcome numerous challenges. Play as Cody and May, two people magically transformed into dolls who are about to divorce. Together, they find themselves in a fairytale world where unexpected obstacles await around every corner, and are forced to save their fractured relationship.
\n\n
Master the unique and interconnected abilities of the characters with each new level. Help each other overcome a variety of unexpected and hilarious obstacles. Kick the fluffy tails of robber squirrels, fly in a pair of underwear, DJ at a lively party in a nightclub, and ride a sled through a magical snow globe. Immerse yourself in a touching and hilarious story where the plot and gameplay intertwine to create a unique visual experience.
\n\n
Developed by award-winning Hazelight, the industry leader in co-op gaming, It Takes Two takes you on a wild, wondrous adventure where one thing is clear: we're better together.
\n\n
Peculiarities:\n
Delightfully explosive gameplay: from raging vacuum cleaners to friendly relationship gurus, you never know what might cross your path. Each new level will present you with new unusual challenges and abilities to master, as well as an incredible cocktail of intricate plot and brilliant gameplay that takes interactive storytelling to a whole new level.
\n\n
A Timeless Story of Relationships - Discover a heartfelt, touching story about the challenges of living together. Help Cody and May learn to overcome their differences. Meet a cast of wacky and charming characters. Team up and embark on an adventure you'll love - together!

pc_games.title: InZOI
pc_games.description:
inZOI is a next-generation life simulation experience developed by inZOI Studio and powered by Unreal Engine 5, where players are immersed in a hyper-realistic world shaped by choices, creativity, and the complexity of modern existence. Set in vibrant, living cities like Dowon and Bliss Bay, inZOI allows you to step into the lives of digital inhabitants—known as Zois—and shape their destinies in a simulation where beauty, chaos, and emotion collide. Whether building a legacy, crafting relationships, or rewriting the rules of reality, inZOI offers limitless freedom in a world that feels astonishingly alive.



Game Features:


Live the Life You Choose:

At the heart of inZOI is a deeply personal journey—each Zoi is a reflection of your desires, decisions, and dreams. Create characters with rich backstories, complex personalities, and hundreds of traits that define how they interact with the world. Navigate careers, romances, rivalries, and personal transformations in a simulation that mirrors the joys and challenges of real life.



A City That Breathes With You:

Explore the intricately detailed open-world cities of Dowon and Bliss Bay, where every street corner, café, rooftop, and subway platform tells a story. These living environments change with time, weather, and your actions—offering opportunities for discovery, drama, and connection. Whether you’re living fast in the neon-lit downtown or retreating to a beachside haven, the world of inZOI is both your playground and your canvas.



Unprecedented Realism and Creativity:

Thanks to Unreal Engine 5, inZOI delivers breathtaking realism—from expressive character animations to dynamic lighting and richly textured environments. Build homes with architectural precision, design your dream lifestyle with over 250 appearance options and 400 traits, and modify nearly every aspect of the world around you. The in-game “Canvas” tool lets you generate, customize, and share content with ease—fueling a thriving community of creators.



Emergent AI-Driven Storytelling:

No two lives are the same. Advanced AI ensures every Zoi behaves uniquely—forming friendships, rivalries, and life paths that evolve with or without your intervention. Whether you're crafting a peaceful domestic life, climbing the corporate ladder, or spiraling into chaos, inZOI lets you witness the unfolding of stories you never expected to tell.

pc_games.title: Silent Hill 2
pc_games.description:
Silent Hill 2: A Descent into Guilt and Madness is a haunting, psychological horror masterpiece developed by Team Silent, where players are drawn into the fog-shrouded town of Silent Hill—a place where reality twists into nightmare, and the past refuses to stay buried. Driven by a mysterious letter from his deceased wife, James Sunderland arrives seeking answers, only to confront a truth far more disturbing than he could have imagined. In Silent Hill, the boundaries between guilt, grief, and hell are paper-thin—and James must descend into the heart of his own darkness to find the answers that wait in the fog.



Game Features:


Uncover the Horrors of a Twisted Mind:

Silent Hill is no ordinary town—it's a mirror to the soul, reflecting the darkest corners of the human psyche. As James searches for his lost love, he must confront the manifestations of his own guilt and trauma, each one more grotesque and personal than the last. What begins as a search for closure becomes a psychological trial where nothing is as it seems—and the truth may be the most terrifying thing of all.



Atmospheric Terror and Emotional Storytelling:

Silent Hill 2 delivers dread not through jump scares, but through creeping unease, unsettling symbolism, and a story that cuts deep. The town itself is a character—filled with shifting corridors, whispering shadows, and grotesque monsters like the iconic Pyramid Head. The game’s narrative unfolds in layers, inviting players to piece together James’ fractured memories and uncover the hidden sins that haunt him.



A Town Lost to Fog and Memory:

Silent Hill is rendered in oppressive detail—abandoned hospitals, decrepit hotels, and fog-drenched streets form a maze of despair and decay. The world pulses with eerie sound design and a chilling ambient score by Akira Yamaoka, ensuring every step through the mist feels like walking deeper into a dream you can’t wake from. Choices matter, and your actions shape the ending—each one revealing a different facet of the truth, or a deeper layer of madness.

pc_games.title: Elden Ring Nightreign
pc_games.description:
Elden Ring: Nightreign is an epic, dark-fantasy action RPG developed by FromSoftware, where players are thrust into a beautifully bleak world of shattered kingdoms, fallen gods, and eternal night. Nightreign is an ancient, secretive faction born from the depths of the Elden Ring’s fractured history—a cult devoted to the powers of the Moon, the Void, and the inevitable reign of darkness that threatens to overtake the lands of the Lands Between. As an outcast, cursed to wield the forbidden powers of Nightreign, you must traverse a world on the brink of annihilation, where only the strongest and most cunning can survive the eternal twilight.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Unravel the Secrets of the Nightreign Faction:\n
The Nightreign are a shadowy faction tied to the Elden Ring’s original shattering. With their worship of the Moon and their association with darkness, they seek to usher in an era of eternal night. You, as a member—or perhaps a foe—of Nightreign, must uncover their true purpose, facing both treacherous enemies and forgotten gods in your pursuit of power.
\n\n
Soul-Crushing Combat and Strategy:\n
As in all FromSoftware titles, Elden Ring: Nightreign demands patience, precision, and an understanding of your enemies' patterns. With new abilities tied to Nightreign’s dark influence, players wield mysterious magic that manipulates the shadows, controls the dead, and shifts time itself. Combat is punishing but rewarding, with every victory feeling hard-earned and every death a lesson in your growth.
\n\n
A World Drenched in Moonlight and Shadow:\n
The Lands Between is now suffused with the influence of Nightreign’s powers—moonlit forests, crumbling castles, and eerie plains all bear the scars of the faction's dark rituals. Vast open-world exploration invites you to uncover forgotten temples, hidden dungeons, and moonlit sanctuaries where the forces of darkness grow stronger. Time and space warp under the power of the Nightreign, making the environment as unpredictable as it is vast.
\n\n
Character Customization and Forbidden Magic:\n
Nightreign’s magic is deeply entwined with the fabric of the world. As you progress, you’ll gain access to powerful spells that warp reality, summon ancient horrors, and control the very shadows that threaten to engulf you. From stealthy assassination techniques to devastating dark sorcery, you will craft your character to suit your playstyle, and the choices you make will determine your path to power.
\n\n
Pivotal Battles Against Gods and Nightmarish Foes:\n
From towering deities to ancient beasts, the Nightreign are connected to powerful celestial entities who govern the night. To ascend within their ranks or to destroy their influence, you must engage in mind-bending boss battles that test both your combat skills and your resolve. Each victory against these foes is a step closer to unraveling the Elden Ring’s hidden truths.
\n\n
Immersive Worldbuilding and Lore:\n
With George R. R. Martin contributing to the lore, Elden Ring weaves an intricate tapestry of myth, history, and prophecy. The Nightreign’s deep connection to the Elden Ring’s shattered fragments opens doors to new stories, lost realms, and forgotten wars. Every NPC, every item, every shadow carries a piece of the grand narrative.

pc_games.title: Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered
pc_games.description:
Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered is an enhanced version of the critically acclaimed action-RPG by Guerrilla Games, bringing the stunning open-world adventure into sharper focus with upgraded visuals, refined gameplay, and improved performance. Set in a post-apocalyptic world where nature has reclaimed the Earth and robotic creatures roam free, Horizon Zero Dawn thrusts players into the role of Aloy, a young hunter with a mysterious past, as she unravels the secrets of the ancient world. Now remastered for the latest generation of hardware, players can immerse themselves even deeper in a vast, dynamic world where survival is determined by wit, resourcefulness, and a sharp eye.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n

Enhanced Survival Mechanics:\n
Survival in the world of Horizon Zero Dawn requires more than just combat prowess—it demands mastery of the environment. Scavenge for resources from fallen machines, hunt wild game, and craft a wide array of weapons, traps, and armor to survive the harsh conditions. Every resource you collect has a purpose, and every battle requires strategy, as you take on massive robotic creatures and human foes alike.
\n\n
An Expansive, Lush Open World:\n
Explore a breathtaking, post-apocalyptic landscape where nature and technology collide. From sun-drenched plains and towering mountains to dense forests and ruined cities, the world is a playground teeming with life, danger, and hidden wonders. The remaster offers significantly enhanced visuals, with upgraded textures, lighting, and environmental details that make the world more alive than ever before.
\n\n
Strategic Combat and Stealth:\n
The game’s dynamic combat system revolves around exploiting the weaknesses of robotic foes. Use elemental traps, bow and arrow tactics, and a range of other weapons to outwit and take down your enemies. Stealth also plays a crucial role in your survival, as you can sneak past machines, use the environment to your advantage, or carefully plan your attacks to take down the larger, more dangerous foes.
\n\n
Crafting, Customization, and Resource Management:\n
The remastered version improves the crafting system, offering more diverse ways to customize your gear and weapons. Craft ammo, traps, and potions while managing your inventory to maximize efficiency and survival. A careful balance of resources is essential in this world—don’t waste your precious materials.
\n\n
Unravel the Mystery of the Past:\n
At the heart of the game lies a compelling mystery, as Aloy seeks to uncover the truth behind the fall of the ancient civilization and the rise of the machines. As you piece together the puzzle of her origins, you’ll confront morally complex choices and unravel the destiny that binds Aloy to the fate of the world.
\n\n
Stunning Visuals and Remastered Performance:\n
Now fully optimized for next-gen hardware, Horizon Zero Dawn Remastered offers upgraded visuals with 4K support, enhanced character models, and more detailed environments. Whether you’re taking in the sweeping vistas or engaging in intense combat sequences, every moment feels cinematic and immersive. The remaster also boasts faster load times and smoother performance for an even more seamless experience.

pc_games.title: The Last of Us Part II Remastered
pc_games.description:
The Last of Us Part II is a gripping, emotionally charged action-adventure developed by Naughty Dog that explores the devastating cost of revenge in a world where every choice carries weight. Set years after the harrowing journey of the original game, this sequel thrusts players into a brutal and beautifully decayed post-pandemic America. You play as Ellie, now 19, as she embarks on a relentless path of justice and retribution—one that will challenge her morality, her humanity, and the meaning of survival. As relationships fracture and loyalties are tested, The Last of Us Part II delivers a cinematic experience unlike anything before it: bold, haunting, and unforgettable.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Emotional and Complex Narrative:\n
At its heart, The Last of Us Part II is a story about love and loss, rage and redemption. Told through powerful performances and nuanced storytelling, the game explores the human consequences of violence in a world already torn apart. As Ellie’s quest for vengeance deepens, players experience perspectives that blur the line between hero and villain.
\n\n
Brutal, Realistic Combat:\n
Combat is visceral, tense, and deeply grounded in realism. With limited resources, players must scavenge, craft, and make every shot count. Stealth is critical—move through tall grass, break line of sight, and silently take down enemies or use sheer force when necessary. Every encounter feels intimate and dangerous, pushing you to think fast or die trying.
\n\n
Expanded Gameplay and Exploration:\n
Traverse stunning, semi-open environments that range from the overgrown suburbs of Jackson to the rain-soaked ruins of Seattle. Each location is crafted with immense detail, encouraging exploration and offering hidden narratives, resources, and world-building elements. Dynamic weather and time-of-day systems enhance immersion and strategy.
\n\n
Advanced Enemy AI and Factions:\n
Face both infected monstrosities and hostile human factions, each with unique behavior and tactics. Enemies communicate, coordinate, and react to your actions. Dogs can track your scent. Cultists move with eerie silence. No two encounters feel the same, and every enemy is a threat.
\n\n
Cinematic Presentation and Visual Fidelity:\n
Pushing the limits of the PlayStation hardware, The Last of Us Part II features lifelike animations, expressive facial capture, and photorealistic environments. The game’s visual storytelling is enhanced by a haunting, minimalist score by Gustavo Santaolalla, creating a mood that lingers long after the credits roll.
\n\n
Representation and Bold Themes:\n
Naughty Dog doesn’t shy away from complex social topics—identity, trauma, gender, and grief are explored with maturity and authenticity. The game features a diverse cast of characters, including LGBTQ+ representation, making it a landmark in both storytelling and inclusivity in AAA games.

pc_games.title: Assassin’s Creed Mirage
pc_games.description:
Assassin’s Creed Mirage is a narrative-driven action-adventure developed by Ubisoft, offering a return to the franchise’s roots with a focus on stealth, parkour, and classic assassin gameplay. Set in ninth-century Baghdad, during the peak of the Islamic Golden Age, Mirage follows Basim Ibn Ishaq, a cunning street thief haunted by visions and drawn into the mysterious world of the Hidden Ones. As the city teeters between innovation and political unrest, Basim embarks on a transformative journey—from a hunted fugitive to a master assassin. In a richly detailed world shaped by knowledge, power, and secrecy, your blade is your only truth.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n

Back-to-Basics Stealth and Assassin Gameplay:\n
Mirage brings the franchise back to its core: tight stealth mechanics, fluid parkour, and swift, lethal assassinations. Use the shadows, rooftops, and crowds to your advantage. Plan every strike, vanish without a trace, and eliminate targets with precision using an array of tools, gadgets, and classic assassin tactics.
\n\n
A Deeply Personal Origin Story:\n
Experience the coming-of-age tale of Basim, a complex character first introduced in Assassin’s Creed Valhalla. Haunted by a mysterious past, Basim’s journey is one of transformation and identity, as he uncovers the truth behind the Hidden Ones and his own fate. The story delves into themes of loyalty, guilt, and free will—all in the shadow of empire.
\n\n
A Lush and Vibrant Ninth-Century Baghdad:\n
Explore the golden heart of the Abbasid Caliphate—an open world filled with bustling markets, scholarly libraries, grand palaces, and vibrant districts. Baghdad is brought to life with rich cultural detail and historical authenticity, making it one of the most immersive settings in the series.
\n\n
Refined Parkour and Urban Mobility:\n
Move through the city with unmatched freedom. Run across rooftops, leap over gaps, scale buildings, and use the environment to outmaneuver guards or escape danger. The fluid traversal system draws inspiration from Assassin’s Creed Unity and the original games, emphasizing momentum and grace.
\n\n
Modern Stealth Meets Classic Assassin Tools:\n
Use smoke bombs, throwing knives, distraction mines, and the iconic hidden blade to eliminate enemies with efficiency. Disguise yourself, blend with crowds, and master your surroundings to become the ultimate silent predator.
\n\n
Immersive Sound and Visual Design:\n
With a soundtrack that blends traditional Middle Eastern instrumentation and a cinematic score, Mirage creates an atmosphere both authentic and emotionally resonant. Detailed visuals, dynamic lighting, and period-accurate architecture bring ninth-century Baghdad to life with historical richness and artistic flair.

pc_games.title: Cricket 22
pc_games.description:
Cricket 22 is the officially licensed cricket simulation from Big Ant Studios that brings the intensity, strategy, and spectacle of international cricket to life like never before. Featuring fully licensed teams, next-gen visuals, and enhanced gameplay mechanics, Cricket 22 delivers the most authentic and immersive cricket experience to date. Step onto the pitch as your favorite players, lead your country to glory, or forge your own path in a deep career mode that spans formats, nations, and continents. From the roar of the crowd to the tension of the final over, this is the ultimate cricket showdown.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Next-Gen Cricket Realism:\n
Powered by advanced visuals and refined motion capture, Cricket 22 offers fluid player animations, realistic stadium atmospheres, and dynamic weather systems that impact gameplay. Every delivery, drive, and diving catch feels more lifelike, bringing unprecedented realism to the sport.
\n\n
Fully Licensed International Experience:\n
Play as officially licensed teams from England, Australia, the West Indies, New Zealand, and more, with authentic kits, player likenesses, and stadiums. Compete in iconic tournaments like The Ashes, the Big Bash League, The Hundred, and CPL—each recreated with true-to-life detail and intensity.
\n\n
Deep, Narrative-Driven Career Mode:\n
Craft your own cricketer and rise from club-level obscurity to international stardom. Engage in press conferences, manage fitness and form, make key decisions off the pitch, and navigate the challenges of a professional cricket career. Your choices shape your legacy both on and off the field.
\n\n
Enhanced Controls and Gameplay Mechanics:\n
With overhauled bowling and fielding systems, Cricket 22 emphasizes timing, strategy, and skill. The game introduces a more accessible control scheme for newcomers while maintaining depth for veterans. Tactical field placements, player stamina, and ball conditions all play critical roles in your strategy.
\n\n
Immersive Commentary and Presentation:\n
A dynamic commentary team—including the likes of Michael Atherton, Mel Jones, Alison Mitchell, and Ian Healy—delivers sharp insights and emotional storytelling. Realistic broadcast-style presentation makes each match feel like a live event, immersing you in the drama of every inning.
\n\n
Multiplayer and Online Leagues:\n
Compete against friends or players around the world in online matches, leaderboards, and custom tournaments. With cross-platform multiplayer support and robust customization tools, you can create your own cricketing legacy or challenge others to prove your dominance.

pc_games.title: Days Gone
pc_games.description:
Days Gone is an open-world action-adventure game developed by Bend Studio that thrusts players into a brutal post-apocalyptic wilderness where survival demands resilience, resourcefulness, and sacrifice. Set in the rugged high-desert of the Pacific Northwest, Days Gone follows Deacon St. John, a former outlaw biker turned drifter and bounty hunter, as he navigates a world ravaged by a global pandemic. In a land overrun by mindless, feral creatures known as Freakers—and just as many threats from the living—Deacon rides the broken highways on a quest for hope, redemption, and truth.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Gripping Survival Action:\n
Days Gone delivers visceral third-person combat with dynamic gunplay, stealth, and brutal melee encounters. Players must scavenge for supplies, craft makeshift weapons, and adapt to shifting threats in real-time. From ambushes to deadly hordes, every encounter is unpredictable, demanding quick thinking and ruthless efficiency.
\n
A World Alive with Danger and Decay:\n
The game's vast, dynamic open world is shaped by a fully simulated ecosystem. Weather, time of day, and Freaker behavior constantly evolve, influencing how enemies move, hunt, and react. Whether navigating dense forests, abandoned towns, or snowy mountains, players must stay alert and prepared for the unexpected.
\n\n
The Motorcycle: Your Lifeline and Identity:\n
Deacon's custom Drifter bike is more than transportation—it’s survival. Upgrade, repair, and refuel your bike to withstand the harsh world. It serves as both a mobile base and a symbol of Deacon’s past, blending gameplay and story in one roaring, fuel-burning heartbeat.
\n\n
A Story of Loss, Brotherhood, and Redemption:\n
At the heart of Days Gone is an emotional narrative driven by love, loyalty, and grief. Deacon’s journey is one of personal reckoning as he searches for meaning in a world that’s lost its humanity. Relationships with fellow survivors, outlaws, and enemies alike create a deeply human tale amidst the chaos.
\n\n
Hordes Like You’ve Never Seen:\n
Face off against massive, dynamic hordes of Freakers that behave like living swarms—flowing over terrain, breaking through defenses, and relentlessly pursuing their prey. Each horde is a tactical puzzle that requires creativity, strategy, and every tool at your disposal to survive.
\n\n
Beautiful, Harsh Post-Apocalyptic Setting:\n
Rendered in stunning detail, the Pacific Northwest comes to life with breathtaking realism. From towering pine forests to crumbling highways, the world of Days Gone is both beautiful and deadly—an evocative backdrop for a story about loss, survival, and the will to keep going.

pc_games.title: A Way Out
pc_games.description:
A Way Out is a cooperative, story-driven action-adventure game developed by Hazelight Studios, offering a unique two-player experience where collaboration is the key to success. Unlike most games, A Way Out requires two players to team up and work together, either locally or online, to escape a high-stakes prison break and navigate a thrilling, emotional journey. Players assume the roles of Vincent and Leo, two inmates with contrasting personalities, each with their own motivations and backstory. As they form an unlikely partnership, they must rely on each other to overcome challenges, solve puzzles, and confront their pasts.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Co-Op Gameplay (Mandatory):\n
A defining feature of A Way Out is its mandatory co-op gameplay. Every moment of the game is designed with collaboration in mind, making it a true partner experience. Whether you're solving puzzles, engaging in action-packed sequences, or escaping from dangerous situations, both players need to communicate and work together to progress through the game. It's a perfect experience for friends or couples looking to dive into a shared story.
\n\n
Dual Protagonists:\n
Take on the roles of Vincent, the more calculated and reserved character, and Leo, the impulsive and charismatic one. Each character has their own unique skills, motivations, and backstory, and as you switch between them (or work together), you get to experience different aspects of the narrative and gameplay. The contrasting personalities add depth to the story, creating moments of humor, tension, and emotional connection.
\n\n
Dynamic Split-Screen:\n
The game features a dynamic split-screen mechanic, ensuring that both players always see their respective characters' actions, even when they are apart. The split-screen adapts seamlessly based on the gameplay situation, whether you’re sneaking around, engaging in combat, or solving puzzles. This unique design keeps the co-op experience fresh and immersive throughout the journey.
\n\n
Story-Driven Narrative:\n
At its core, A Way Out is a narrative-driven game about escape, redemption, and the bonds formed under pressure. As Vincent and Leo work together to break out of prison and evade authorities, the game delves deep into their personal lives, exploring themes of loyalty, betrayal, and moral conflict. The story is filled with twists and turns, with multiple emotional beats that will keep players on the edge of their seats.
\n\n
Varied Gameplay Mechanics:\n
While the focus is on co-op puzzle-solving and story-driven moments, A Way Out also offers a variety of gameplay mechanics. From stealth sequences and hand-to-hand combat to thrilling car chases and gunfights, the game keeps things exciting with its diverse range of challenges. The ever-changing gameplay ensures that the pace remains fresh, avoiding repetition and keeping players engaged.
\n\n
Seamless Transition Between Cinematics and Gameplay:\n
A Way Out blends story and action flawlessly, with no traditional cutscenes. Cinematic moments transition directly into gameplay, maintaining immersion and giving the player the feeling of being part of the story at all times. The game’s visual style, coupled with realistic character animations, makes the entire experience feel like a seamless movie that you actively shape through your decisions and actions.
\n\n
Tension and Drama:\n
The game thrives on its emotional and dramatic moments, building tension between the protagonists as they face their pasts and their uncertain futures. The relationship between Vincent and Leo is central to the narrative, and their evolving trust and camaraderie create a powerful emotional anchor. As the story unfolds, players are forced to make difficult decisions that test their friendship and morality.

pc_games.title: A Difficult Game About Climbing
pc_games.description:
A Difficult Game About Climbing is a punishing yet oddly rewarding platformer that pushes your skills and patience to the limit. Developed by Chimera Entertainment, this game challenges you to scale an unforgiving mountain where every misstep could send you tumbling back to the start. With precise controls, mind-bending obstacles, and a tongue-in-cheek sense of humor, A Difficult Game About Climbing delivers a masochistic experience that will keep you coming back for more, even as you curse the mountain's every twist and turn.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n

Brutal Precision Platforming:\n
Every move counts in this ruthless climb. You’ll need flawless timing, sharp reflexes, and perfect execution to ascend. The mountain doesn't care about your mistakes; one wrong jump, misstep, or wrong angle will send you back to the bottom. Get ready to retry... a lot.
\n\n
Mind-Bending Obstacles:\n
Navigate through challenging terrain, including narrow ledges, precise jumps, and complex puzzles. The climb is not just physical; it's a test of your ability to problem-solve under pressure as you face absurd and ever-evolving obstacles that require both patience and skill.
\n\n
Minimalist Controls, Maximum Difficulty:\n
The controls are simple, but the challenge is anything but. You’ll quickly learn that every movement requires complete focus, as the smallest error can lead to a long fall or a missed opportunity. Expect to die. A lot. And learn to embrace it.
\n\n
Philosophical Humor:\n
While the climb itself is brutal, the game doesn't take itself too seriously. The journey is filled with quirky commentary, oddball characters, and absurd humor that balances the frustration with fun. It’s a reminder that sometimes the struggle is the reward.
\n\n
Master the Mountain:\n
Every level offers its own unique challenges, with new mechanics introduced as you progress. Learn to use your climbing tools effectively, conquer tricky verticals, and rise to the top against all odds.
\n\n
Endless Replayability:\n
Each fall teaches you something new, and every ascent brings you closer to conquering the mountain. With an infinite number of challenges, A Difficult Game About Climbing keeps you climbing, retrying, and improving with every attempt.
\n\n
A Difficult Game About Climbing offers an experience that blends frustration and satisfaction in equal measure. Perfect for players who love a challenge, this game will test your skill, patience, and persistence to the extreme. Ready to climb? Just don’t expect it to be easy.

pc_games.title: Blasphemous 2
pc_games.description:
Blasphemous 2 is a dark action-platformer developed by The Game Kitchen, continuing the brutal and deeply symbolic journey of The Penitent One in a world shaped by twisted faith, suffering, and divine punishment. Awakened once more in a strange new land where the Miracle has returned, The Penitent One is thrust into a fresh cycle of guilt and redemption. As Cvstodia’s curse deepens and divine horrors rise again, players must face a macabre procession of enemies, blasphemous saints, and eldritch deities. With new weapons, expanded lore, and even more intricate world design, Blasphemous 2 is a relentless pilgrimage into sacred suffering and sorrow.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n

Evolved Combat and Weapon Variety:\n
Blasphemous 2 refines its predecessor’s punishing combat with a new arsenal of weapons—each offering distinct move sets, timing, and strategic possibilities. Choose between the massive flail-like Veredicto, the twin-bladed Sarmiento & Centella, or the balanced Ruego Al Alba, and master a refined parry and execution system to vanquish grotesque enemies in violent, balletic encounters.
\n\n
A New World Built for Exploration and Secrets:\n
Journey through a labyrinthine, hand-crafted world filled with beautifully haunting environments—from crumbling palaces and corrupted sanctuaries to burning libraries and mournful monasteries. With expanded mobility, new traversal abilities, and a wealth of secrets to uncover, exploration is as crucial as combat. Hidden relics, upgrades, and tragic stories await those willing to delve into every cursed corner.
\n\n
Deeper Customization and Progression:\n
Customize your playstyle with new altars of prayer, passive boons, Rosary Beads, and skill trees unique to each weapon. The Penitent One can now grow in power through a more flexible upgrade system, allowing players to tailor their approach to battle, exploration, and spiritual sacrifice.
\n\n
A Haunting New Chapter in a Sacred Nightmare:\n
Set after the events of the Wounds of Eventide, Blasphemous 2 tells a new standalone tale steeped in grief, symbolism, and theological horror. The game expands the lore of Cvstodia, introducing strange new characters, cryptic revelations, and divine forces with their own agendas. Faith, suffering, and rebirth intertwine in a tale where salvation is never without a cost.
\n\n
Striking Gothic Art and Orchestral Score:\n
With enhanced pixel art and hand-animated sprites, Blasphemous 2 is visually arresting—blending sacred imagery with surreal horror in a style that’s unmistakably baroque and Spanish Catholic-inspired. A haunting, orchestral soundtrack complements the world’s emotional weight, heightening every revelation, battle, and moment of quiet grief.

pc_games.title: Blasphemous
pc_games.description:
Blasphemous is a brutal action-platformer developed by The Game Kitchen that immerses players in a dark, twisted world of religious despair, grotesque beauty, and relentless penance. Set in the cursed land of Cvstodia, where faith has turned to torment and miracles manifest as suffering, Blasphemous combines fast-paced, skill-based combat with deep exploration and haunting lore. Players take on the role of The Penitent One, the sole survivor of the massacre known as the “Silent Sorrow,” bound by guilt and driven by a mysterious purpose. With a sacred blade and a soul scarred by sin, The Penitent One must carve a bloody path through monstrous abominations, tortured saints, and ancient relics of a dying faith.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n

Punishing Combat and Precision Platforming:\n
Blasphemous delivers intense 2D action with responsive controls and brutal difficulty. Players must master timing, dodging, and counterattacks to survive relentless enemies and grotesque bosses. Wielding the Mea Culpa, a sword forged from guilt, The Penitent One unleashes devastating combos, brutal executions, and sacred relics imbued with deadly power.
\n\n
A Haunting Tale of Faith and Suffering:\n
At the heart of Blasphemous lies a dark narrative steeped in religious symbolism, sorrow, and penance. As The Penitent One explores the desolate world of Cvstodia, players uncover the tragic histories of its cursed inhabitants, unravel forgotten truths, and confront their own role in a cycle of eternal punishment. Each step forward brings revelation—and horror.
\n\n
Metroidvania World of Sacred Horror:\n
Cvstodia is a vast, interconnected world filled with secrets, shortcuts, and hidden lore. From crumbling cathedrals and desecrated shrines to festering crypts and blighted wastelands, players must explore, backtrack, and unlock new abilities to progress. The game rewards curiosity and persistence, rewarding exploration with powerful upgrades and deeper story threads.
\n\n
Stunning Pixel Art and Gothic Visuals:\n
With richly detailed pixel art, Blasphemous brings its grim world to life in astonishing detail. Every environment, character, and enemy is hand-crafted, blending beauty and grotesquery in equal measure. The game’s art direction draws heavily from Spanish Catholic imagery and baroque aesthetics, creating a world that is as mesmerizing as it is disturbing.
\n\n
Sacred Upgrades and Customization:\n
Players can enhance The Penitent One through a variety of relics, rosary beads, prayers, and sword abilities. Each item adds depth to the combat and lore, allowing for tailored builds and new strategies. Mastering these sacred tools is essential for enduring the trials ahead.

pc_games.title: Five Nights at Freddy’s
pc_games.description:
Five Nights at Freddy’s is a survival horror game developed by Scott Cawthon that traps players in a nightmarish setting where suspense, fear, and strategy collide. Set in a seemingly innocent family pizza restaurant, the game transforms a cheerful venue into a house of horrors once the lights go out. Players assume the role of a night security guard at Freddy Fazbear’s Pizza, where the animatronic mascots exhibit disturbing behavior after dark. With limited resources and nowhere to run, survival means enduring five terrifying nights—using only security cameras, flickering lights, and quick thinking to stay alive.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n

Tense, Survival-Based Gameplay:\n
Five Nights at Freddy’s offers a unique horror experience where the player cannot move freely or fight back. Instead, survival depends on managing power, monitoring security cameras, and making quick decisions to keep the killer animatronics at bay. Each night grows more intense, with new threats and escalating difficulty that keeps players on edge from start to finish.
\n\n
Atmosphere of Dread and Suspense:\n
The game’s minimalistic setting—one office, dim hallways, and grainy camera feeds—creates an atmosphere of claustrophobia and dread. Audio cues, flickering lights, and sudden animatronic appearances build unbearable tension, leading to heart-pounding jump scares that have become iconic in the horror genre.
\n\n
A Disturbing Mystery Beneath the Surface:\n
Beyond its scares, Five Nights at Freddy’s hides a sinister story. Through cryptic messages, hidden mini-games, and subtle clues, players can piece together a chilling narrative involving missing children, a haunted restaurant, and dark secrets buried beneath animatronic smiles. What begins as a simple job turns into a descent into psychological horror and conspiracy.
\n\n
Iconic Animatronic Villains:\n
Meet Freddy Fazbear, Bonnie, Chica, Foxy, and more—each animatronic with its own behavior patterns, personalities, and unpredictable attacks. These once-friendly mascots are now relentless predators, and knowing when and how each one moves is key to surviving the night.
\n\n
Minimalist Horror with Maximum Impact:\n
Despite its simple mechanics and setting, Five Nights at Freddy’s revolutionized indie horror with its psychological tension, resource management, and cinematic pacing. It’s a masterclass in doing more with less—proving that fear doesn’t always need gore or action, just smart design and brilliant execution.

pc_games.title: Nioh 2
pc_games.description:
Nioh 2 is a critically acclaimed action RPG developed by Team Ninja that plunges players into a deadly and beautifully twisted reimagining of Japan’s Sengoku era. Set in a dark fantasy world where myth and history collide, Nioh 2 builds upon the punishing combat and rich lore of its predecessor, offering deeper customization, enhanced gameplay mechanics, and an even more personal journey. Players step into the role of a mysterious half-human, half-yokai warrior battling demonic forces and warlords alike in a land consumed by chaos. As darkness spreads across feudal Japan, the path to mastery is forged in blood, steel, and spirit.
\n\n
Game Features:\n\n

Refined and Ruthless Samurai Combat:\n
Nioh 2 delivers intense, high-stakes melee combat that rewards precision, timing, and tactical awareness. Players must master three dynamic combat stances, fluid weapon-switching, and powerful yokai abilities to overcome brutal enemies. With a vast arsenal of traditional Japanese weapons and deep skill trees, the combat system is both flexible and unforgiving—designed to challenge and empower those who dare to learn its depths.
\n\n
Become a Yokai Warrior:\n
Harness the dark power within. As a Shiftling, a being born of both human and yokai blood, players can unleash devastating supernatural abilities. Transform into a fearsome yokai form during battle, absorb enemy souls to unlock new skills, and summon powerful guardian spirits to turn the tide of combat. This fusion of human skill and demonic might adds a new dimension to the series’ signature combat.
\n\n
Expansive Character Creation and Customization:\n
For the first time in the series, players can fully create and customize their protagonist. From appearance and voice to fighting style and spirit guardian, Nioh 2 offers a deeply personal role-playing experience. Armor, weapon affinities, skill trees, and yokai cores allow for intricate builds and strategic experimentation.
\n\n
A Dark, Mythical Tale of War and Destiny:\n
