Set decades before the original Nioh, this prequel unravels the hidden history behind the chaos of the Sengoku period. Players will encounter legendary historical figures and face terrifying yokai inspired by Japanese folklore. The story explores identity, sacrifice, and the delicate balance between human and demon, weaving a haunting narrative that bridges myth and memory.
\n\n
Stunningly Crafted World:\n
From cursed villages and haunted temples to war-ravaged battlefields, every location in Nioh 2 is rich with detail and atmosphere. The game’s environments evoke a sense of awe and dread, blending historical accuracy with otherworldly design. Enhanced visuals, dramatic lighting, and immersive sound design bring the dark fantasy world to life in unforgettable ways.
\n\n
Multiplayer and Co-Op Experience:\n
Team up with friends or other players online in co-op missions and revenant battles. Whether taking on massive bosses together or summoning allies for support, Nioh 2 offers cooperative gameplay that maintains the game’s intense difficulty while fostering shared triumph.

pc_games.title: Nioh
pc_games.description:
Nioh is an action role-playing game developed by Team Ninja that plunges players into a dark and supernatural version of the Sengoku period in Japan. Blending intense samurai combat, deep RPG elements, and mythological horror, Nioh delivers a challenging and rewarding experience. Players take on the role of William, a lone Western warrior with a mysterious past, who travels to war-torn Japan in pursuit of a powerful foe. As civil war and demonic forces tear the land apart, William must master the way of the samurai and face formidable enemies, both human and yokai, to uncover a sinister plot threatening the nation's soul.
\n\n
Game Features:
\n\n
Master the Way of the Samurai:\n
Nioh offers fast-paced, tactical combat that requires precision, patience, and skill. Players must adapt to each enemy by switching between three unique stances—high, mid, and low—each suited to different combat situations. With a wide arsenal of traditional weapons including katanas, spears, axes, and more, mastering weapon types and learning enemy patterns is key to survival.
\n\n
Brutal Difficulty and Deep Customization:\n
Inspired by the challenge of classic action games, Nioh demands strategy and skill. Players can customize their character’s gear, stats, and fighting style, tailoring their build to match their preferred playstyle. From armor crafting to spirit guardians and magical abilities, the game offers rich depth for those who seek mastery.
\n\n
Gripping Tale of War and the Supernatural:\n
Set during Japan’s Warring States period, Nioh weaves real historical figures and events into a gripping narrative filled with political intrigue and supernatural danger. As William journeys through a land ravaged by war and yokai, he encounters powerful warlords and uncovers secrets that intertwine his fate with that of Japan itself.
\n\n
Atmospheric and Hauntingly Beautiful World:\n
Nioh creates a rich and eerie atmosphere with meticulously designed environments, from crumbling castles and misty forests to cursed battlefields. The game’s striking visual design and haunting soundtrack immerse players in a world where death is always close and beauty exists side by side with horror.
\n\n
Rich in Japanese Mythology and History:\n
Drawing deeply from Japanese folklore, Nioh introduces players to a wide array of mythological creatures and legendary warriors. Each yokai enemy is inspired by traditional tales, adding cultural depth and unpredictability to encounters. Combined with historical accuracy and stylized authenticity, the game presents a unique blend of fact and fantasy.

pc_games.title: Red Dead Redemption 2
pc_games.description:
Red Dead Redemption 2 (PC) 

  Step into the wild heart of America with "Red Dead Redemption 2," now available for PC! This critically acclaimed open-world game offers a rich narrative experience as you follow Arthur Morgan, a member of the Van der Linde gang, navigating the challenges of life in the late 1800s. Explore stunning landscapes, engage in thrilling gunfights, and make choices that shape your story in a world teeming with life. 

  Key Features:

 => Stunning Visuals: Experience breathtaking graphics with 4K resolution support, showcasing the detailed environments and vibrant ecosystems of the American frontier.
 => Immersive Storytelling: Engage in a deep narrative filled with complex characters and moral dilemmas, exploring themes of loyalty, survival, and the struggle against an encroaching modern world.
 => Expansive Open World: Discover a vast, dynamic world filled with diverse wildlife, towns, and activities, from fishing and hunting to engaging in high-stakes robberies.
 => Rich Gameplay Mechanics: Experience a variety of gameplay systems, including crafting, horseback riding, and an engaging honor system that affects your interactions with others.
 => Online Multiplayer: Join friends in Red Dead Online, featuring a range of cooperative and competitive modes, missions, and events in the same expansive world.
 => **Download "Red Dead Redemption 2" today on Steam or the Epic Games Store and embark on an unforgettable journey through the last days of the Wild West.

pc_games.title: Resident Evil 4 Remake
pc_games.description:
Step into the terrifying and thrilling world of Resident Evil 4 Remake, a heart-pounding survival horror experience that reimagines the classic with stunning graphics, intense gameplay, and a gripping narrative. Play as Leon S. Kennedy, an elite special agent, as he embarks on a dangerous mission to rescue the U.S. president’s daughter from a mysterious cult in a remote European village. Face horrifying enemies, solve puzzles, and survive a nightmarish adventure where danger lurks at every corner.
\n\n
SURVIVE THE HORROR \n In Resident Evil 4 Remake, your survival instincts are put to the ultimate test. Armed with limited ammo and facing an ever-growing number of grotesque enemies, you’ll need to think on your feet. Each encounter is a fight for your life, requiring strategic thinking and quick reflexes to outsmart and outgun terrifying foes. Experience heart-stopping moments as the line between life and death constantly blurs.
\n\n
EXPLORE A DARK AND DREAD-FILLED WORLD\n The game takes you through a beautifully reimagined world filled with breathtaking environments, from eerie villages and dark forests to decaying castles. The sense of dread is palpable in every shadowy corner, where the atmosphere itself seems to whisper danger. Every location is meticulously designed to immerse you in the horrors that await, whether you’re creeping through narrow alleys or fighting for survival in blood-soaked halls.
\n\n
ENGAGE IN INTENSE COMBAT\n Combat in Resident Evil 4 Remake is fast, tactical, and brutal. Use a variety of weapons, from handguns and shotguns to explosives and knives, to take on the relentless enemies pursuing you. Every battle is a test of your resourcefulness – will you conserve your ammo for the larger threats, or will you go all-out in a desperate bid for survival? The choice is yours, but be warned, there’s no guarantee you’ll make it out alive.
\n\n
UNRAVEL THE MYSTERY \nAs Leon, you’ll not only fight for your life but also uncover a chilling conspiracy as you dig deeper into the cult’s twisted plans. Unravel the truth behind the parasitic infection spreading through the village and learn about the sinister forces manipulating events. As you piece together the mysteries, prepare for shocking twists that will keep you on the edge of your seat.
\n\n


UNLOCK NEW WEAPONS AND UPGRADES\n In Resident Evil 4 Remake, progression is key to survival. As you battle through the game, you’ll unlock new weapons, upgrades, and abilities to help you face the increasingly dangerous enemies. Customize your loadout to suit your playstyle, whether you prefer precision headshots, explosive takedowns, or up-close-and-personal combat. Your choices will determine your fate as you navigate the terror ahead.

pc_games.title: Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot
pc_games.description:
Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot 

   Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot is an action role-playing game (RPG) based on the immensely popular Dragon Ball Z anime and manga series. Developed by CyberConnect2 and published by Bandai Namco Entertainment, the game takes players on an unforgettable journey through the classic Dragon Ball Z storyline, allowing them to experience the adventures and iconic battles of the series in a whole new way. 

 As Goku (Kakarot), players can relive key moments from the anime, battling legendary foes such as Frieza, Cell, and Majin Buu, while also exploring the vast world of Dragon Ball Z. The game features an open-world structure, fast-paced combat, RPG mechanics, and side missions that further immerse players into the Dragon Ball universe. 

 Key Features:

 Epic Storyline:
  -Play through the entire Dragon Ball Z saga, from Goku's early days to his final battle with Majin Buu. Experience iconic moments from the series such as the Saiyan Saga, Frieza Saga, Cell Saga, and Buu Saga.
 -Control Goku, as well as other fan-favorite characters like Vegeta, Piccolo, Gohan, and Trunks. Each character has unique abilities and moves to master.

 Open World Exploration:
  -Explore a large, vibrant open world filled with rich environments from the Dragon Ball Z universe, such as the peaceful plains of Earth, the Capsule Corporation, and the dangerous Namekian landscape.
 -Interact with NPCs, complete side quests, hunt for collectibles, and unlock new locations as you progress through the story.

 Action-Packed Combat:
  -Engage in dynamic, real-time combat that is fast, fluid, and full of spectacular special moves like the Kamehameha and Final Flash.
 -Switch between characters during combat, using their unique abilities and powers to unleash devastating combos.
 -Battle against both regular enemies and powerful bosses, each with their own distinct fighting styles and tactics.

 Role-Playing Elements:
  -Level up Goku and other characters by gaining experience points through combat, side missions, and exploration.
 -Unlock new abilities, moves, and transformations, such as the Super Saiyan transformations. -Equip various items and Z-Orbs to enhance your character's stats and combat effectiveness.

 Side Missions & Activities:
  -In addition to the main story, engage in side quests such as fishing, cooking, and training with other characters to strengthen your skills.
 -Train under the guidance of iconic masters like Piccolo, Vegeta, and King Kai to improve your fighting techniques.
 -Build relationships with characters through interactions and additional mini-games.

 Stunning Visuals:
  -Dragon Ball Z: Kakarot features vibrant, cel-shaded graphics that stay true to the anime’s art style while bringing the world of Dragon Ball Z to life in stunning 3D.
 -Enjoy cinematic cutscenes and in-game visuals that closely mirror the anime's iconic moments.

 Post-Launch Content:
  -Additional DLC packs and expansions have been released, offering new story arcs, characters, and challenges. These include the Battle of Gods and Resurrection ‘F’ storylines, featuring characters like Beerus and Golden Frieza.

systemRequirements.processor: Intel Core i5-2400 or AMD Phenom II X6 1100T
systemRequirements.graphics: NVIDIA GTX 750 Ti or Radeon HD 7950

pc_games.title: WWE 2K25
pc_games.description:
Step into the ring and experience the most electrifying wrestling game to date in WWE 2K25, where legends are made, rivalries are born, and the action never stops. With enhanced gameplay, stunning visuals, and a deeper roster than ever before, WWE 2K25 brings the intensity and excitement of the WWE universe to your fingertips. Whether you’re a hardcore fan or new to the franchise, this game delivers an unparalleled wrestling experience that will have you on the edge of your seat.

\n\n
ENTER THE RING WITH UNMATCHED REALISM\n
Feel every punch, slam, and submission with the most realistic wrestling gameplay ever created. WWE 2K25 pushes the limits of technology with hyper-realistic graphics, lifelike animations, and dynamic physics that bring the action to life. Watch as your favorite superstars come to life with intricate details, from their signature moves to their in-ring personality. Every match is a spectacle, and every moment feels real.

\n\n
BUILD YOUR LEGEND WITH NEW GAME MODES\n
Create your own path to glory with a host of new and improved game modes. Whether you’re rising through the ranks in MyCareer, dominating in MyUniverse, or crafting your dream matches in Custom Mode, the possibilities are endless. Build your character from the ground up, manage storylines, and rise to the top of the WWE world in a journey filled with challenges and triumphs.

\n\n
EXPERIENCE EPIC MATCH TYPES AND STADIUMS\n
Engage in a wide variety of match types, from classic singles and tag team battles to extreme matches like Hell in a Cell, Royal Rumble, and TLC. Take the action to the next level in stunning new arenas, including reimagined versions of iconic WWE venues and fresh, never-before-seen locations. Every match feels unique, offering new ways to fight, strategize, and claim victory.

\n\n
COMPETE WITH AN EXPANSIVE ROSTER OF WWE STARS\n
WWE 2K25 delivers the most complete and diverse roster of WWE superstars, past and present. From current champions to wrestling legends, you’ll have access to a wide range of characters to choose from. Whether you want to step into the boots of Roman Reigns, Becky Lynch, or a classic Stone Cold Steve Austin, the roster is packed with all your favorites. Plus, new legends and faces join the roster, ensuring there's someone for every fan to cheer for.

\n\n
SHOW OFF YOUR SKILLS IN ONLINE COMPETITION\n
Take the fight online and face off against players from around the world in fast-paced, competitive matches. Challenge others to prove who truly rules the ring in ranked and unranked modes. With a revamped online experience, WWE 2K25 ensures smooth, lag-free matches, while offering rewards and challenges to keep you coming back for more.

\n\n
CREATE, CUSTOMIZE, AND SHARE YOUR WWE WORLD\n
Unleash your creativity with the most powerful creation suite yet. Customize superstars, arenas, and entrances to bring your vision to life. Create dream matches, unique championships, or entire wrestling organizations and share them with the community. The power is in your hands to shape your WWE universe in ways you never thought possible.

pc_games.title: Rise of the Ronin
pc_games.description:
Step into the violent and turbulent world of feudal Japan in Rise of the Ronin, an action-packed RPG where honor, betrayal, and the struggle for power collide. As a skilled ronin, you must navigate a nation on the brink of revolution, torn apart by political unrest and internal strife. With the samurai way of life fading, you must forge your own path in a world defined by shifting allegiances and brutal combat.

\n\n
BATTLE THROUGH THE CHAOS OF FEUDAL JAPAN\n
Immerse yourself in a richly detailed, open-world Japan during a period of intense conflict. Travel across vast landscapes—from war-torn villages to bustling cities—and engage in high-octane combat that pits you against ruthless samurai, skilled mercenaries, and deadly warlords. Every battle is a test of skill, timing, and strategy, as you fight for survival in a country at war with itself.

\n\n
MASTER THE ART OF SWORDPLAY AND COMBAT\n
Harness the deadly techniques of the ronin as you engage in fluid, dynamic swordfights and brutal, tactical combat. Customize your fighting style, adapting your approach to each enemy and situation. Whether using swift katana strikes or powerful, precise counterattacks, your ability to read the battlefield will determine your success. Unleash devastating combos and special abilities as you rise to become a true master of the blade.

\n\n
CHART YOUR OWN DESTINY IN A FRACTURED WORLD\n
As a ronin, you’re not bound by the honor of a samurai clan. Your choices define your fate as you navigate a world where trust is scarce and every alliance is fragile. Choose your allies wisely, as the decisions you make throughout the story will influence your relationships, the course of the war, and the future of Japan itself. Will you uphold your personal code, or succumb to the temptation of power?

\n\n
UNCOVER A STORY OF POLITICAL INTRIGUE AND BETRAYAL\n
Engage in a deeply woven narrative filled with betrayal, vengeance, and the pursuit of power. As you unravel the complex stories of samurai, mercenaries, and warlords, you’ll uncover a world of corruption and ambition. The fight for control of Japan takes many forms—whether in the shadows of politics, the brutality of battle, or the quiet honor of the samurai code. Every action you take brings you closer to uncovering the truth behind the chaos.

\n\n
SURVIVE A TIME OF WAR, HONOR, AND SACRIFICE\n
The path of the ronin is one of hardship and sacrifice, where survival means making difficult choices. Protect those you care about, face powerful enemies, and embrace the harsh realities of a land torn apart by war. As you fight for your own freedom and the future of Japan, every battle and every decision could be your last—leave behind a legacy of honor, or become a shadow in the bloodstained pages of history.

pc_games.title: The Mortuary Assistant
pc_games.description:
Enter the chilling world of The Mortuary Assistant, a psychological horror game where the line between the living and the dead blurs. As a newly hired mortuary assistant, you must navigate the eerie, unsettling tasks of preparing bodies for their final rest. But beneath the surface, dark forces linger, and something far more sinister is at play. In a place where death is an everyday occurrence, the true terror begins when the dead refuse to stay quiet.

\n\n
FACE THE DARKNESS OF THE MORTUARY\n
Step into the shoes of an assistant at a funeral home, tasked with embalming and preparing the deceased for their final journey. But as night falls, the simple, routine work turns into a fight for survival. In the solitude of the mortuary, you’ll find yourself haunted by disturbing occurrences and unspeakable horrors. Every procedure, every body, brings you closer to uncovering the chilling truth behind the mortuary's dark secrets.

\n\n
SURVIVE A NIGHTMARE OF THE UNDEAD\n
Perform your duties under the weight of an oppressive atmosphere, where every sound, shadow, and movement could signal something terrifying. Something otherworldly watches you as you go about your tasks. The dead may not be at rest, and strange occurrences blur the lines of reality. Stay focused, stay calm, and try to survive the horrors that await in the morgue's darkest corners.

\n\n
UNCOVER A SINISTER STORY WITH EVERY STEP\n
Discover the chilling mystery behind the mortuary, the cryptic events surrounding your new job, and the dark presence that haunts the building. As you encounter increasingly disturbing events, pieces of a haunting story begin to emerge. Unravel the mystery piece by piece as you try to understand the true nature of the evil force at play and the role you’ve been forced to play in this horrifying narrative.

\n\n
MANAGE YOUR FEARS AND ENVIRONMENT\n
Your tasks may seem simple—prepare the deceased, verify their identities, and complete the embalming process—but fear and dread quickly take hold. The environment shifts, disturbing figures and sounds begin to surface, and supernatural forces push you to the brink of insanity. You must stay sharp, manage your surroundings, and make the right choices to survive the night.

\n\n
ESCAPE THE GRIP OF THE SUPERNATURAL\n
As the night progresses, the horrors become more intense. Whether you find yourself trapped in a deadly game of cat-and-mouse or facing the forces of the beyond, your survival depends on keeping a cool head and making split-second decisions. The night’s terror will push you to your limits, and only by understanding the true nature of the evil you face can you hope to escape its grip.

pc_games.title: Cyberpunk 2077
pc_games.description:
Step into the neon-lit streets of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, a sprawling open-world RPG where technology, corruption, and rebellion collide. Become V, a mercenary in search of fame, fortune, and answers in a city ruled by powerful corporations, criminal syndicates, and dangerous tech. Navigate a world where every choice has consequences, and your destiny is shaped by your actions. \n

\n\n
SURVIVE IN THE UNDERBELLY OF NIGHT CITY\n
Dive into a high-tech, dystopian world where danger lurks at every corner. Navigate the vibrant, chaotic streets of Night City, filled with ruthless gangs, corrupt corporations, and powerful figures. Whether you're battling foes in the seedy underworld or climbing the corporate ladder, survival in this city requires skill, wit, and ruthless determination.

\n\n
EXPERIENCE TRUE FREEDOM OF CHOICE\n
Shape your character and your story with complete freedom. Customize V's abilities, appearance, and skills, tailoring your playstyle to your preferences. Choose how to approach missions—whether through brutal combat, smooth hacking, or persuasive dialogue. The choices you make influence the world around you, from the fate of allies to the political landscape of Night City itself.

\n\n
ENGAGE IN HIGH-OCTANE ACTION AND STEALTH\n
Fight your way through intense combat scenarios or avoid the chaos altogether with stealth and hacking skills. Use an arsenal of advanced weapons, cybernetic enhancements, and quick-thinking tactics to take on enemies in fast-paced, dynamic encounters. Whether you’re gunning down foes in a shootout or disabling systems from the shadows, each mission offers multiple ways to succeed.

\n\n
UNCOVER A WEB OF INTRIGUE AND CONSPIRACY\n
Unravel the tangled web of corruption, betrayal, and secrets that lies beneath Night City’s shining surface. Join forces with a diverse cast of characters, from rogue AIs to rebels seeking revolution. Discover hidden agendas, and dive deep into the corporate wars and personal vendettas that fuel the city’s power struggles. Every lead takes you deeper into a conspiracy with life-changing implications.

\n\n
THRIVE IN A WORLD OF CYBERNETIC ENHANCEMENTS AND LIMITLESS POSSIBILITIES\n
Enhance your body and mind with cyberware that grants new abilities and powers, pushing your limits to the extreme. Hack into systems, manipulate environments, or enhance your reflexes for combat, all while dealing with the ethical dilemmas of becoming more machine than human. Your journey is not just about survival—it's about becoming something greater in a world where technology is both a gift and a curse.

pc_games.title: A Plague Tale: Requiem
pc_games.description:
Embark on a haunting and emotional journey in A Plague Tale: Requiem, where the horrors of the past collide with the brutal present. Follow Amicia and Hugo as they seek a way to control Hugo's mysterious powers while facing new, even darker challenges. The world has fallen deeper into chaos, and the siblings' bond is put to the ultimate test in a fight for survival against overwhelming odds.

\n\n
SURVIVE IN A CRUEL, UNFORGIVING LANDSCAPE\n
Venture through war-torn villages, desolate forests, and corrupted cities in a world on the brink of collapse. Face new, terrifying enemies, including relentless soldiers and supernatural threats. Every step through this devastated land demands courage, resilience, and an unbreakable will to survive, as every decision can mean the difference between life and death.

\n\n
MASTER NEW SKILLS AND STRATEGIES\n
Use your wits, stealth, and resourcefulness to overcome deadly obstacles. With new abilities at your disposal, adapt to a wider variety of combat and stealth tactics. Utilize Hugo’s mysterious powers and Amicia’s cunning to create devastating distractions, overcome enemies, and escape near-impossible situations. The environment itself becomes a key ally as you carefully plan your every move.

\n\n
TAKE ON MULTIPLE COMPELLING CHALLENGES\n
Engage in emotionally charged missions that test both your combat abilities and moral compass. From evading merciless soldiers to confronting the plague’s most grotesque forms, each objective will push you further into the heart of despair. But through it all, the hope of finding answers for Hugo’s condition and a brighter future remains.

\n\n
UNRAVEL THE DARKER SECRETS OF THE WORLD\n
Dive deeper into the mysteries behind the plague, the power within Hugo, and the dark forces at play. Discover long-hidden secrets as you uncover the true origins of the chaos, and confront the grim realities of a world where survival and betrayal often go hand-in-hand. With every answer comes a new question, leading you closer to a fateful conclusion.

\n\n
STRUGGLE FOR A FUTURE IN A WORLD OF DESPAIR\n
As danger closes in on all sides, Amicia and Hugo must fight not only for their survival but for their future. Battling the plague’s horrifying spread, the hostile forces hunting them, and their own fears, every step forward is uncertain. But with courage, determination, and the strength of their bond, they just might find the light in the darkest of times.

pc_games.title: A Plague Tale: Innocence
pc_games.description:
Step into a world ravaged by a devastating plague in A Plague Tale: Innocence, an emotional tale of survival, sacrifice, and hope amidst the horrors of war. Follow the journey of two siblings as they navigate a brutal landscape, facing overwhelming odds and unimaginable dangers. Every step is a struggle for life, and every decision weighs heavy on the heart.

\n\n
SURVIVE IN A HARSH, UNFORGIVING WORLD \n
Experience the brutal reality of medieval France during the Black Death, where death lurks in every shadow. Guide Amicia and her younger brother Hugo through the countryside, avoiding vicious Inquisitors, hordes of rats, and a world turned upside down. Every moment of peace is fleeting, and every threat feels all too real in this perilous environment.

\n\n
MASTER THE ART OF STEALTH AND RESOURCEFULNESS\n
Use stealth, cunning, and quick thinking to overcome deadly obstacles. Whether evading hostile soldiers or navigating treacherous landscapes, you’ll need to make use of the environment and limited resources to stay alive. Craft makeshift weapons, create distractions, and keep your wits about you to outsmart enemies and avoid detection.

\n\n
FACE MULTIPLE CHALLENGES AND HEART-POUNDING MOMENTS\n
Take on an array of intense challenges, from stealthy escapes to brutal confrontations. Every decision has a consequence, and the choices you make will shape the story and its outcome. Manage your limited supplies wisely, and rely on your bond with Hugo to survive the harsh trials that await.

\n\n
UNCOVER A MYSTERIOUS AND HEART-WRENCHING STORY\n
Delve deep into a gripping narrative filled with emotional weight and shocking revelations. Unravel the secrets behind the plague, the sinister forces at work, and the mysterious powers within Hugo. The bond between the siblings is at the heart of the story, and their relationship will drive you forward through every twist and turn.

\n\n
STRUGGLE TO ESCAPE A WORLD ON THE BRINK OF COLLAPSE\n
Battle through a ravaged world, constantly on the run from overwhelming forces. Fight for survival as you face hordes of rats, ruthless Inquisitors, and treacherous terrain. Every escape, every rescue, every close call brings you one step closer to finding hope in a world on the edge of destruction.

mac_softwares.title: Raycast Pro
mac_softwares.description:
Raycast is an incredibly fast and fully extensible launcher. It lets you perform tasks, calculate calculations, share links, and much more.


Raycast is a cutting-edge tool designed to streamline your everyday Mac tasks. Acting as a personal assistant deeply integrated into macOS, it's just a click away, allowing you to work smarter, code faster, and get quick answers thanks to the power of artificial intelligence.


Tired of flitting between browser tabs and tools to get work done? Even the simplest tasks sometimes require too many clicks. But with Raycast, you can control your tools with just a few taps. The command-line-inspired interface organizes tools into commands to cut through the noise.


Raycast's interface
is known for its very clean and easy-to-use design. Simply press ⌥ + Space, and a floating interface opens, giving you access to everything you need to do in the app.


This app is designed with built-in shortcuts and commands that significantly speed up access to specific functions on your Mac and various tasks. If you want to run a custom command to define words, simply open the extensions menu, record a command for it, and you're all set. This works for any action you want to automate with commands.


If the built-in features aren't enough, you can add your own script commands, including access to over 400 scripts already created by the Raycast community.


Third-Party App Integration:
You can connect Raycast to third-party apps and execute custom commands for actions in those apps. An example of this is the ability to connect your Google account to Raycast. From there, you can execute a custom command to create a new Google document or search your Google Drive library.

Another example is the ability to connect your Zoom account. If you're a college professor or a remote team leader who regularly schedules meetings, this will likely come in handy. Once connected, you can set up Teams to schedule meetings, start meetings, and view upcoming meetings.


Other features:
Let's say you want to program a command to go to a specific web page. The Quick Links feature lets you do just that. You can even choose which browser or app you want the links to open in. You can search for local files using the command and run commands to view your calendar schedule.


Floating notes are also a great addition to Raycast. For those who quickly think of something and want to jot it down, the floating notes window is perfect for that. After writing a note, you can share it with your Apple Notes, send it to someone in iMessage, or copy it to the clipboard.


These are just a few of the many great features Raycast has to offer. We highly recommend checking it out if you're looking for a program that makes creating useful shortcuts easy. Don't forget to check out Raycast if you're interested!

mac_softwares.title: Repo Prompt
mac_softwares.description:
Repo Prompt is an application designed to simplify working with AI models during code development. It helps developers efficiently manage and modify code files using AI, providing precise context control and integration with various models.

The goal: to enable AI to understand code as well as a user and to simplify the process of AI-assisted code editing. 

Features:
-Visual context engineering. A file tree interface where you can visually select, search, and browse files across the entire project. 

-Integration with MCP (Model Context Protocol). Allows you to synchronize context, use file analysis, and information from multiple repositories directly in the tools you already use. 

-Support for multiple AI models. You can connect to local and cloud models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, etc.) using your own API keys. 

-Code review mechanism. Allows you to review and approve code changes created by AI gradually or in batches. 

-Token optimization. Visualize and optimize token usage in real time. 

-Multiple repository support. Allows you to work on different projects. 

-Prompt library. Save and use effective prompts to increase productivity.

mac_softwares.title: Wondershare Filmora X
mac_softwares.description:
Wondershare Filmora is a rather interesting tool for working with multimedia files. I personally really liked how easy it is to use, everything is quite clear, and most importantly, there's an official Russian interface. With this program, you can practically create a real movie. You can use your videos, tracks, photos—well, you get the idea.

It's worth mentioning that the application offers a variety of good effects, including various transitions, filters, overlays, and much more. Incidentally, you can add your own captions to your videos, so for example, you can create a title for your video or even subtitles. It supports HD video, but if you have video that's not quite as good, you can try improving it with a special tool. While you shouldn't expect much from it, it's definitely better. 

Using the program, you can trim and rotate videos. You can even split them into multiple separate clips. If you can't finish your movie in one go, don't worry—you can save it as a special project and then open it at any time to continue working where you left off.

Once your masterpiece is ready, you can save it in one of the many formats on your computer and share it with family and friends. Incidentally, video export to popular online services is also supported.

mac_softwares.title: CrossOver 26
mac_softwares.description:
Those familiar with Wine will enjoy using CrossOver Mac. This application allows you to run programs written for Microsoft Windows without actually installing the operating system.



CrossOver Mac includes a Windows program library of Windows programs it can run. You'll find very popular applications like Microsoft Word, Excel, Quick Start, and Windows Media Player. Keep in mind that you'll still need the installer to install any application.



CrossOver Mac will create bottles, which are essentially Windows environments, for the programs you install. These include their own C: drive, subdirectories, and registry.



Because CrossOver Mac isn't a true virtual environment, it can launch applications much faster. The downside is that you never feel like you're using Windows. Another problem with CrossOver Mac is that software not supported by Wine will either not run or be unstable.

mac_softwares.title: Final Cut Pro
mac_softwares.description:
Final Cut Pro combines advanced video editing and media organization with incredible performance that empowers you to create at the speed of thought.


Advanced video editing technologies

• Magnetic Timeline uses advanced metadata and Clip Connections technology for fast and easy editing.

• Improved indexing allows you to move audio clips around the timeline by simply dragging and dropping.

• Object Tracker technology automatically matches titles and effects to the movement of faces or objects in the video.

• You can change focus points and depth of field in videos shot on iPhone using Cinema Effect mode (requires macOS Monterey or later).

• Edit video from multiple cameras and enjoy automatic sync with support for up to 64 shooting angles.

• Automatically convert video projects to square or vertical format with Smart Conform.

• Import and edit equirectangular panoramic videos in various formats and aspect ratios.

• Create, edit, and save closed captions right in Final Cut Pro.

• Use third-party extensions to get even more features.


Organize your media files efficiently

• Organize files into media libraries for efficient content management and collaboration.

• Create proxy copies of media files for increased portability and efficiency.

• Apply your own keywords to ranges of clips and instantly add them to your favorites.

• Dynamically organize content into smart collections to find any shot in seconds.

• Identify duplicates by color-coding clip ranges or indexing on the timeline.


Incredible performance

• Mac computers with Apple chips are now even faster and more efficient.

• Optimized for M2 Pro, M2 Max and M2 Ultra chips and delivers unrivaled performance.

• Work with a wide range of formats, including ProRes, RED, XAVC, AVCHD, Avid DNxHR, Avid DNxHD, H.264, HEVC and many more.


Impressive customizable effects

• Add easily customizable 2D and 3D titles with beautiful animations.

• Change title styles, transitions, and effects with intuitive controls.

• Choose third-party FxPlug plugins with their own interfaces.


Built-in audio editing features

• Assign audio roles upon import to easily track and manage project elements.

• Open and edit multi-channel audio files on the timeline.

• Apply Logic-based effects and remove background noise to make voices sound clearer.

• Synchronize video with individual audio files using instant waveform matching.


Intuitive color correction

• Import, edit, and save video in standard color spaces or in Rec. 2020 and HLG spaces.

• Fine-tune modulation and masks with visual color wheels and curves.

• View HDR video with accurate color on MacBook Pro and Pro Display XDR.


Convenient optimized export

• Instantly export projects in a format suitable for playback on Apple devices and uploading to Vimeo, YouTube and other hosting services.

• Export groups of audio sources and different versions of processed video using role metadata.

• Import and export XML files for third-party workflows such as color correction and audio mixing.


System requirements: macOS 13.5 or later; 8 GB of RAM (16 GB recommended for third-party effects and plug-ins); a graphics card with Metal support (only for Mac computers with an Intel processor); 5.8 GB of available disk space.


Some features require a Mac computer with an Apple chip. Some features require an internet connection; fees may apply. Blu-ray disc burning requires a Blu-ray recorder.

mac_softwares.description:
InDesign is the leading page design and layout application that lets you create, prepare, and publish professional documents and digital publications. InDesign provides all the tools you need to create posters, books, digital magazines, e-books, interactive PDFs, and more.



Professional layout creation and text work

mac_softwares.title: App Cleaner & Uninstaller
Downie 4
mac_softwares.description:
Find the video you want to download, then drag the link into the app, or simply take advantage of the Downie browser extension, which will do the rest. That's literally all you need to do to get a video on your Mac. Downie will help you download YouTube videos and save video content from thousands of other sites, including Facebook, Vimeo, and Instagram. It's simple and fast, so you'll get the job done in seconds, without getting bogged down by unnecessary features.



Downie Key Features



Download videos from YouTube

Downie helps you download videos from YouTube, Vimeo, Facebook, Instagram, and over 1,200 other websites. If there's a video on a webpage, you can rely on Downie to save it to your Mac.



Search directly in the video downloader

You don't need to switch between Downie and your browser to find the content you need. Simply enter your query into the app's search bar, and it will quickly find the video for you.



Save 4K videos from YouTube

Unlike many other YouTube downloaders, Downie can handle even 4K videos. This means you can download high-quality, high-resolution videos from YouTube and any other website online.



Download MP4 or audio only

If you don't need the entire video file, Downie can save just the audio track. Or, if you only need the MP4 video, you can configure Downie to convert it automatically.



Just drag and drop the URL

Downie is brilliant in its simplicity: copy and paste or drag and drop the video URL, and it will start downloading automatically. Even if the page contains text or any other content, Downie will detect the video and save it for you.



Post-processing with Permute

Downie seamlessly integrates with Permute, a powerful media converter. To convert a downloaded video to another format or merge its parts into a single file, simply send it to Permute and retrieve the result.

mac_softwares.title: Pixea Plus

mac_softwares.title: Adobe Substance 3D Painter
mac_softwares.description:
Substance 3D Painter has the tools you need to easily texture 3D assets using your natural hand gestures, from advanced brushes to smart materials that automatically adapt to your model. Painter is widely used in game and film production, as well as in the design, apparel, and architecture industries. It’s the 3D texturing app of choice for creative professionals everywhere.

  Powerful drawing engine
  Paint 3D models using dynamic brushes, projection tools, or particles. Painter also supports Photoshop brush sets.

  Smart tools for creating artwork
  Use Smart Materials that adapt to any object and allow you to realistically display surface texture or wear marks. Use mask styles that adapt to any shape and paint with powerful, dynamic tools.

  You pay only for what you buy
  Painter's state-of-the-art viewport shows all your artistic decisions in real time. Try out complex materials with improved lighting and shadows, making texturing even more creative and painless. You can even preview your model in path-tracing mode.

  Non-destructive workflow
  Painter records every action and stroke and can be recalculated at any time. This means you can change the resolution of your project at any time without reducing quality, or even change existing paint strokes.

  Release notes are available on the official website substance3d.adobe.com >

mac_softwares.title: Side Notes
mac_softwares.description:
SideNotes is a sidebar that fills one side of your Mac screen with notes. Text, code, or images - SideNotes can handle it all, allowing you to keep important data at hand. For convenience, move notes into customizable folders, assign a color, and add flags to tasks. It's a single shelf for everything that really matters.

  Key Features of SideNotes

  Notes that don't distract you
  A blog post, a piece of code, or recently downloaded images can all be stored on your desktop thanks to SideNotes. The best part is that you won’t even notice they’re there! The app acts like an overlay menu, drawing your attention to the notes only when you need them.

  Dynamic display options
  Remember that the application will not distract you. That is why you will have to choose when and on which side of the screen it should appear. Open Preferences and choose one of the two locations on the desktop - Left or Right. You can also choose how to hide/show SideNotes using keyboard shortcuts or clicks.

  Interface supporting code
  SideNotes supports monospaced fonts for code. The same width for each character - you don't have to switch anywhere to convert your fonts. Copy a code snippet and paste it into the SideNotes window as you work. To better organize your code notes, you can use a specific color.

  Markdown formatting support
  When creating a new note, you can choose the desired mode - code, plain text or standard (markdown). The latter opens up a variety of formatting options, such as adding headings or converting text to a quote. Everything you paste is formatted and formatted properly by default.

  Your to-do list is done
  With SideNotes at your fingertips, you can accomplish more than ever before. And here's the next feature you'll need: creating and managing task lists within your notes. By clicking the text formatting button, you can add checkboxes to your to-do list.

  Share your notes
  SideNotes keeps your notes private unless you want to share them with the world. The app supports multiple sharing options, including Messages, Reminders, Notes, and Dropshare. And you can always add more. Just tap the Share button in the top left corner of your note.

mac_softwares.title: Amadine
mac_softwares.description:
Amadine is a convenient program for drawing and vector illustrations. It is easy to learn, but has everything you need for professional work. Amadine is suitable for creating illustrations, logos, icons, interface prototypes and much more. There is also a mobile version for iPad and iPhone, with Apple Pencil support.

  Working with the program
  • Customizable interface: as a single window or with individual panel arrangement

  • Unlimited number of artboards in a document

  • Unlimited number of layers

  • Different blending modes for layers

  • View modes: with pixel grid, as outlines, with guides, grid and rulers

  • Export the entire document, individual artboards or objects to JPEG, TIFF, EPS, PNG, PDF, SVG

  • Easily share files between desktop and mobile versions with iCloud Drive

  • Touch Bar and QuickLook support

  Drawing capabilities
  • More than 30 tools for selecting, creating, editing, cutting vector objects and their parts

  • Support for multiple fills and strokes on an object

  • Create unique stroke profiles using the Path Width tool

  • Create text inside a shape or along any path

  • Logical operations with figures: addition, subtraction, intersection, exclusion

  • Pressure sensitive graphics tablet support

  • Drawing with brushes of different properties

  Working with paths
  • Create paths using the Path and Draw tools

  • Adding, deleting, moving anchor points

  • Change the anchor point type (smooth/angular)

  • Edit paths and compound shapes with the Knife, Scissors and Eraser tools

mac_softwares.title: ON1 Photo RAW MAX 2025
mac_softwares.description:
Photographers need integrated software tools for desktop and mobile devices that allow them to create high-quality photos without any hassle. Some companies release multiple apps to complete the photography workflow, lock your photos into their proprietary system, and force you to subscribe. Once you stop paying, they take away your software. Others are overly complicated and contain many features you would never use at an exorbitant price. Same thing with ON1 Photo RAW.

  The new ON1 Photo RAW for computers is a user-friendly professional photo organizer, RAW processor, layered editor and effects app. It is ideal for those looking for an ultra-user-friendly all-in-one photo editing solution that delivers high-quality results.

  ON1 Photo RAW provides the essential photo editing needs for every photographer, no matter what they shoot, without having to switch between multiple programs. Get the professional photo editing tools you need to get the professional results you need while maintaining an efficient, powerful, and simple workflow.

  At its core, ON1 Photo RAW includes a cutting-edge image processing engine. Photo RAW is optimized for today's super-megapixel cameras and high-performance computer graphics systems. It is the fastest, most flexible, and easiest-to-use photo editor on the market.

  Creators want to create, not spend all their time learning how to use editing tools. Photo RAW is like Lightroom and Photoshop under one roof. It comes with the tools you need for compositing, hundreds of the most popular built-in presets and filters, and world-class masking tools that will make your life easier.

  ON1 Photo RAW gives you an open system for complete control over how you store, organize, edit, and buy. No long imports, easy organization, unlimited ways to customize your style, and ON1 will never be a subscription-only model either.

  ON1 Portrait AI is perfect for almost any workflow. Get stunning retouching results in seconds using ON1 Portrait AI as a plugin for:

  Adobe Photoshop
 Adobe Lightroom Classic
 Adobe Photoshop Elements
 Affinity Photo
 Capture One (coming soon)

 INTRODUCTION TO THE VERSION

mac_softwares.title: ARCHICAD 27
mac_softwares.description:
ArchiCAD is a powerful modeling application that enables architects to design buildings more efficiently using Virtual Building technology.

 ArchiCAD enables architects to focus on design, working alone or in a team, while sharing data with consultants and specialists in other fields.

 With ArchiCAD, you will discover the benefits of architectural design in 3D space and enjoy incredible freedom in your work.

  ArchiCAD significantly changes the capabilities of the average user

 by allowing the use of third-party BIM components in their projects.

 In conjunction with the cloud database, the new modeling capabilities in ArchiCAD allow architects to create, search, upload and download new BIM components for use in their projects.

  Fully integrated into ArchiCAD, the web portal is a single point for sharing BIM components between users.

 BIMcomponents.com also provides a central location for all GDL objects, making them available to all ArchiCAD users whenever they need them.

  The construction industry is constantly changing: new materials, designs, ideas and technologies appear every day.

 It can be said that building components are one of the most actively developing areas in the construction BIM industry.

 The GDL technology used in ArchiCAD is a powerful professional tool for creating highly intelligent parametric elements.

 However, not all users are ready to create their own GDL objects.

 It is for them that the fundamental changes that have occurred in ArchiCAD are addressed!

  Now any user can not only model their object in volume, but also upload the created BIM component to a single cloud database of objects.

 Newly added objects are assigned a unique description, by which other users can instantly find not only this object, but also dozens of similar ones using keywords.

 Then all that remains is to select the elements necessary for your BIM project and upload them with one click of the mouse.

  It is unique that all the described operations are carried out within ArchiCAD – the program provides a full set of tools for creating, searching, loading and unloading objects directly from the Objects dialog!

 In addition, all posted BIM objects can be found on the specialized web portal BIMcomponents.com, which provides the necessary tools for self-organization of the ArchiCAD user community: comments, object ratings, updates, etc.

 Thus, the new technology for loading/unloading BIM components and the new site are a unique centralized resource for exchanging GDL objects.

  Release notes are available on the official website graphisoft.com.

Use Animate to create interactive vector animations for games, apps, and websites.

 Export projects to multiple platforms, including HTML5 Canvas, Web FL, Flash/Adobe AIR, and non-standard platforms like SVG.

mac_softwares.title: Sensei
mac_softwares.description: Sensei is a new Mac computer optimization app that offers a clean interface and a set of tools for cleaning disks, monitoring battery health, monitoring the GPU, CPU, and RAM. There are also options to monitor temperatures, enable SSD Trim, uninstall apps, control fans, and more...

mac_softwares.title: Matlab R2024a
mac_softwares.description:
MATLAB is a high-level language and interactive environment for programming, numerical calculations, and visualization of results.

 With MATLAB, you can analyze data, develop algorithms, and create models and applications.

  The language, tools, and built-in math functions allow you to explore different approaches and get to a solution faster than using spreadsheets or traditional programming languages ​​such as C/C++ or Java.

  MATLAB is widely used in areas such as:

  signal processing and communication,

 image and video processing,

 control systems,

 automation of testing and measurement,

 financial engineering,

 computational biology, etc.

  More than a million engineers and scientists worldwide use MATLAB as their technical computing language.

  Compared to traditional programming languages ​​(C/C++, Java, Pascal, FORTRAN), MATLAB allows for an order of magnitude reduction in the time required to solve typical problems and significantly simplifies the development of new algorithms.

  MATLAB is the foundation of the entire MathWorks product family and is the primary tool for solving a wide range of scientific and applied problems in areas such as:

  modeling objects and developing control systems,

 designing communications systems,

 processing signals and images,

 measuring signals and testing,

 financial modeling,

 computational biology, etc.

  The MATLAB kernel makes it extremely easy to work with matrices of real, complex, and analytical data types, and with data structures and lookup tables.

  MATLAB contains built-in functions for linear algebra (LAPACK, BLAS), fast Fourier transform (FFTW), functions for working with polynomials, functions for basic statistics and numerical solution of differential equations; extended mathematical libraries for Intel MKL.

  All built-in MATLAB kernel functions are designed and optimized by experts and perform faster or as well as their C/C++ equivalent.

  Additional information:

  1 The name of the Matlab version contains the letter a or b as the last character, which are NOT related to the pre-release alpha and beta stages of the release of programs.

 a means the release in the first half of the year, b means the release in the second half of the year.

 2 Matlab can be installed without deleting the previous version.

 3 When reinstalling Matlab, the settings are not deleted.

 If you need to add a toolbox or blockset, do not be afraid to move Matlab to the same folder

 4 You can start studying Matlab from the exponent's website or the documentation in Russian.

 5 There is no Russian version of the program (or a translation into Russian or a Russifier) ​​and there will not be!

 However, there is Russian-language documentation (it's a pity, though, that they still have not made it a component of the installed Matlab).

 6 It is not necessary to install the maximum number of Matlab components.

 This will slow down its launch somewhat and eat up more disk space.

 You can easily deliver what you need in the future by simply installing Matlab in the same folder where you installed it earlier and selecting additional components.

 The installer will ask whether to reinstall the already installed components, which you can refuse to save installation time.

 7 In the latest versions of Matlab, there is a problem with the refusal to install additional components after you have updated Matlab.

 In this case, you need to either completely remove Matlab and install it again but with a changed list of components and then update ...

 or cheat: copy with replacement the VersionInfo.xml file from the root of the iso disk to the folder with Matlab,

 install the required Matlab components (now this operation will not fail) and then roll the update to Matlab again.

mac_softwares.title: Sublime Text
mac_softwares.description:
Sublime Text supports a large number of programming languages ​​and has syntax highlighting for C, C++, C#, CSS, D, Dylan, Erlang, HTML, Groovy, Haskell, Java, JavaScript, LaTeX, Lisp, Lua, Markdown, MATLAB, OCaml, Perl, PHP, Python, R, Ruby, SQL, TCL and XML.

 In addition to the programming languages ​​that are included by default, users have the ability to download plugins to support other languages.

 Sublime Text can be equipped with a package manager that allows the user to find, install, update and remove packages without restarting the program.

 The manager keeps installed packages up to date by downloading new versions from repositories.

 In addition, it provides commands for activating and deactivating installed packages.

  Features:

  Interface:
 The editor contains various visual themes, with the ability to download additional ones.

 Users see all their code on the right side of the screen in the form of a mini-map, which can be clicked to navigate.

 There are several screen modes.

 One of them includes from 1 to 4 panels, with which you can show up to four files at a time.

 The full (free modes) mode shows only one file without any additional menus around it.

  Column selection and multiple editing:
 Select entire columns or place several pointers in the text, which makes instant editing possible.

 Pointers behave as if each of them is one in the text.

 Commands such as move to character, move to line, select text, move to word or its parts (CamelCase, separated by hyphen or underscore), move to the beginning/end of line, etc., affect all pointers independently and at once, allowing you to edit complex text quickly, without using macros or regular expressions.

  Autocompletion:
 When the user types code, Sublime Text, depending on the language used, will offer different options for completing the entry.

 The editor also automatically completes variables created by the user.

  Syntax highlighting and high contrast:
 Sublime Text's dark background is designed to increase text contrast.

 Key syntax elements are highlighted in different colors, which work better with a dark background than with a light one.

  Build system support:
 Sublime Text allows the user to build programs and run them without having to switch to the command line.

 The user can also customize their build system and enable automatic program assembly every time the code is saved.

  Snippets:
 Save frequently used code fragments, keywords for running them.

  File navigation:
 A navigation tool that allows users to move between files, as well as within them, using fuzzy search.

  Other features:
 An autosave function has been implemented, helping users not to lose their work.

 Customizable keyboard shortcuts and a navigation tool allow you to assign your own keyboard shortcuts to menus and toolbars (only for the first version, in the second and third - Command Palette).

 The search as you type option is used to search within a document.

 The syntax check function works in a similar way, checking for correctness right as you type.

 It is possible to automate using macros and repeat the last actions.

 Editing commands, including editing indents, reformatting paragraphs and merging lines.

mac_softwares.title: VMware Fusion Pro
mac_softwares.description:
VMware Fusion is the best solution for running Windows on Mac computers and the most powerful tool for developing and testing applications for any platform.

Additionally, these solutions provide improved performance and security, and support for on-premises Kubernetes clusters and OCI containers with a new command-line interface.

mac_softwares.title: MacGPT
mac_softwares.description:
MacGPT is a simple native macOS app that lets you quickly access ChatGPT from the menu bar. With one click, you can open ChatGPT and start chatting using the powerful Assistant language model. 

  Access ChatGPT from anywhere on your Mac using the global feature. Simply activate the Global text field that appears in the center of the screen and start chatting using ChatGPT. 

  Add ChatGPT directly to your text fields with MacGPT Inline. Just enter your trigger phrase and prompt, and ChatGPT will do the rest! 

  Quickly access ChatGPT from the menu bar, via the website, or via the API. 

  How to use 

 MacGPT loads the ChatGPT chat interface in your web browser. Log in with your OpenAI credentials, then simply click the menu bar icon to start a conversation. You can also assign a keyboard shortcut by clicking the gear icon to activate MacGPT without moving your mouse! 

  You can also use your own OpenAI API key to interact directly with ChatGPT. Note that you must link your credit card to use the OpenAI API key. If you want to use GPT-4, you will have to sign up for the GPT-4 waitlist.

mac_softwares.title: Parallels Desktop 26
mac_softwares.description:
If you need to run Windows programs that aren't available on Mac, or need to migrate data when switching from a PC to a Mac, Parallels Desktop can help you solve these problems. 

  Run Windows side-by-side with macOS (no reboot required) on your MacBook, MacBook Pro, iMac, iMac Pro, Mac mini, or Mac Pro. Share files and folders, copy and paste text and images, and drag and drop files between Mac and Windows apps. 

  Parallels Desktop automatically detects what is required to get started, so setup takes just minutes. If Windows installation is required, the user will be prompted to download and install Windows 10 or select the currently installed version of Windows, Linux, Ubuntu, or Boot Camp. 

  Graphics and other resource-intensive Windows applications run without sacrificing Mac system performance. Run the most resource-intensive graphics applications, such as Adobe Photoshop or Visual Studio or SketchUp, without sacrificing performance. 

  In Coherence mode, the Windows interface will be hidden when using applications from this operating system. If you are not used to working on a Mac, you can make the Windows window take up the entire screen, creating the feeling of working on a regular Windows computer.

mac_softwares.title: Adobe Photoshop 2025
mac_softwares.description:
From photo editing and compositing to digital painting, animation, and graphic design, you can create anything you can imagine in Photoshop. Bring your ideas to life on desktop and iPad. Use AI technology to make quick edits. Learn new skills, and share your work with the community. With our latest release, doing amazing things has never been easier. 

  Retouching, replacement, composition and more 

 Brighten portraits and enhance facial expressions. Replace the sky in the background with one click. Remove objects, retouch, change colors. With powerful editing tools and new intelligent features for creating stunning effects, you can turn graphics work into real art. 

  A versatile tool for graphic design 

 Posters, packaging, banners, websites – graphic design starts with Photoshop. Combine photos, diagrams and text into completely new images. Select objects with one click. Play with color and effects to enhance any project. 

  Thousands of amazing brushes 

 Paint with a variety of specialty brushes or create your own—the world's largest collection of Photoshop brushes is always at your fingertips.

mac_softwares.title: Microsoft Office 2019
mac_softwares.description:
Unmistakably Office, made for Mac. 

 New modern versions of Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and OneNote combine familiar Office features with the unique capabilities of Mac to help you get started quickly. 

  Word 

 Word is a robust application that lets you create, edit, view, and share text documents (even email attachments). Word puts the power of Office at your fingertips. It's ideal for anyone who works with documents: bloggers, writers, journalists, reviewers, students, or project managers. 

  Excel 

 The powerful Excel application makes it quick and easy to create, view, edit, and share spreadsheet files (even email attachments). No matter where you are, you can confidently use it to collaborate in accounting, auditing, or finance. Excel puts all the power of Office and advanced features for creating complex formulas at your fingertips. 

  PowerPoint 

 PowerPoint is the familiar app that lets you quickly and easily create, edit, view, present, and share presentations. Want to edit a new presentation on the way to work? PowerPoint lets you quickly open your recent files on any device. Worried about your smartphone edits not being saved? The app automatically syncs across all your devices. Collaborate with others and present your presentations wherever you are. PowerPoint puts the power of Office at your fingertips. 

  Outlook 

 Outlook is a single platform for email, calendars, and contacts, so you can stay connected and productive and organized, while Office integration lets you share attachments directly from OneDrive, access contacts, and view LinkedIn profiles. 

  OneNote 

 The OneNote workspace is a blank sheet, anywhere on which you can make text and handwritten notes, drawings, and also record voice comments. You can also drag information into OneNote with the mouse from the browser window. This program does not have a "Save" icon, since the entered data is saved automatically.

mac_softwares.title: DisplayBuddy
mac_softwares.description:
DisplayBuddy is a display management program designed for Mac users. It allows you to adjust the brightness of your display directly from your Mac, without having to press awkward buttons on your monitor. It provides best-in-class support for third-party displays. With DisplayBuddy, users can control the brightness, contrast, and even the volume of external displays. It also supports presets, allowing you to save settings for multiple displays and easily restore them with a single click.
